Our study uncovers a \textbf{``Geometric Decoupling"}: while curvature in normal generation functionally encodes image detail, OOD generation exhibits a functional decoupling where extreme curvature is wasted on unstable semantic boundaries rather than perceptible details. This geometric misallocation identifies ``Geometric Hotspots" as the structural root of instability, providing a robust intrinsic metric for diagnosing generative reliability.

</details>


### [75] [LLM-as-Judge Framework for Evaluating Tone-Induced Hallucination in Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18803)
*Zhiyuan Jiang,Weihao Hong,Xinlei Guan,Tejaswi Dhandu,Miles Q. Li,Meng Xu,Kuan Huang,Umamaheswara Rao Tida,Bingyu Shen,Daehan Kwak,Boyang Li*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Ghost-100：一个评估视觉语言模型在渐进胁迫性提示下幻觉行为的基准，包含800张合成图像和5级提示强度框架，采用双轨评估协议测量幻觉率和幻觉分数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有幻觉基准主要依赖中性提示和二元检测，未能充分表征VLMs在渐进胁迫性提示下的行为变化。需要研究不同任务类型中幻觉发生率和强度如何响应分级语言压力。

Method: 构建Ghost-100基准：800张合成图像涵盖三个任务家族（文本不可读、时间读取、对象缺失），采用负真实值原则确保查询目标不存在。每个图像配5个基于5级提示强度框架的提示。采用双轨评估：基于规则的H-Rate测量从拒绝到承诺的转变比例，GPT-4o-mini评分的H-Score（1-5级）量化幻觉置信度和特异性。

Result: 评估9个开源VLM发现：H-Rate和H-Score在不同模型家族间显著分离；阅读风格和存在检测子集对提示压力的响应方式不同；多个模型在中间语调水平表现出非单调敏感性峰值；聚合指标会掩盖这些模式。

Conclusion: Ghost-100基准揭示了VLMs在胁迫性提示下幻觉行为的复杂模式，强调需要细粒度评估来理解模型在操作环境中的可靠性。双轨评估协议和自动化验证工作流程为未来研究提供了实用工具。

Abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are increasingly deployed in settings where reliable visual grounding carries operational consequences, yet their behavior under progressively coercive prompt phrasing remains undercharacterized. Existing hallucination benchmarks predominantly rely on neutral prompts and binary detection, leaving open how both the incidence and the intensity of fabrication respond to graded linguistic pressure across structurally distinct task types. We present Ghost-100, a procedurally constructed benchmark of 800 synthetically generated images spanning eight categories across three task families -- text-illegibility, time-reading, and object-absence -- each designed under a negative-ground-truth principle that guarantees the queried target is absent, illegible, or indeterminate by construction. Every image is paired with five prompts drawn from a structured 5-Level Prompt Intensity Framework, holding the image and task identity fixed while varying only directive force, so that tone is isolated as the sole independent variable. We adopt a dual-track evaluation protocol: a rule-based H-Rate measuring the proportion of responses in which a model crosses from grounded refusal into unsupported positive commitment, and a GPT-4o-mini-judged H-Score on a 1-5 scale characterizing the confidence and specificity of fabrication once it occurs. We additionally release a three-stage automated validation workflow, which retrospectively confirms 717 of 800 images as strictly compliant. Evaluating nine open-weight VLMs, we find that H-Rate and H-Score dissociate substantially across model families, reading-style and presence-detection subsets respond to prompt pressure in qualitatively different ways, and several models exhibit non-monotonic sensitivity peaking at intermediate tone levels -- patterns that aggregate metrics obscure.

</details>


### [76] [CrossPan: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Cross-Sequence Pancreas MRI Segmentation and Generalization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18797)
*Linkai Peng,Cuiling Sun,Zheyuan Zhang,Wanying Dou,Halil Ertugrul Aktas,Andrea M Bejar,Elif Keles,Tamas Gonda,Michael B Wallace,Zongwei Zhou,Gorkem Durak,Rajesh N Keswani,Ulas Bagci*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: CrossPan基准研究发现，胰腺MRI分割中跨序列域偏移比跨中心变异性更严重，现有域泛化方法对此无效，而MedSAM2等基础模型通过形状先验保持中等零样本性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 胰腺自动分割对腹部MRI分析至关重要，但针对单一MRI序列训练的深度学习模型在应用于其他序列时性能会严重下降，这一问题尚未得到系统研究。

Method: 引入CrossPan多机构基准数据集，包含1,386个3D扫描，涵盖三个常规采集序列（T1加权、T2加权和Out-of-Phase），来自八个中心。通过实验评估跨序列域偏移的严重程度，测试现有域泛化方法的有效性，并分析半监督学习在不同序列上的表现。

Result: 1. 跨序列域偏移比跨中心变异性严重得多：域内Dice分数超过0.85的模型在跨序列迁移时性能崩溃至接近零（<0.02）。2. 现有最先进的域泛化方法在物理驱动的对比度反转下几乎无效，而MedSAM2等基础模型通过对比度不变的形状先验保持中等零样本性能。3. 半监督学习仅在强度分布稳定的序列上有效，在器官内变异性高的序列上变得不稳定。

Conclusion: 跨序列泛化能力——而非模型架构或中心多样性——是临床可部署胰腺MRI分割的主要障碍。研究强调了开发针对MRI序列间物理差异的鲁棒分割方法的必要性。

Abstract: Automatic pancreas segmentation is fundamental to abdominal MRI analysis, yet deep learning models trained on one MRI sequence often fail catastrophically when applied to another-a challenge that has received little systematic investigation. We introduce CrossPan, a multi-institutional benchmark comprising 1,386 3D scans across three routinely acquired sequences (T1-weighted, T2-weighted, and Out-of-Phase) from eight centers. Our experiments reveal three key findings. First, cross-sequence domain shifts are far more severe than cross-center variability: models achieving Dice scores above 0.85 in-domain collapse to near-zero (<0.02) when transferred across sequences. Second, state-of-the-art domain generalization methods provide negligible benefit under these physics-driven contrast inversions, whereas foundation models like MedSAM2 maintain moderate zero-shot performance through contrast-invariant shape priors. Third, semi-supervised learning offers gains only under stable intensity distributions and becomes unstable on sequences with high intra-organ variability. These results establish cross-sequence generalization-not model architecture or center diversity-as the primary barrier to clinically deployable pancreas MRI segmentation. Dataset and code are available at https://crosspan.netlify.app/.

</details>


### [77] [CAHAL: Clinically Applicable resolution enHAncement for Low-resolution MRI scans](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18781)
*Sergio Morell-Ortega,Ángela González-Cebrián,Boris Mansencal,Marien Gadea,Roberto Vivo-Hernando,Gregorio Rubio,Fernando Aparici,Maria de la Iglesia-Vaya,Gwenaelle Catheline,Pierrick Coupé,José V. Manjón*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: CAHAL是一种针对临床厚层各向异性MRI的超分辨率框架，通过物理信息混合专家架构避免解剖幻觉，直接在患者原始采集空间工作。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 临床MRI常采用厚层各向异性采集，限制了大规模自动化形态分析。现有生成式超分辨率方法会产生解剖幻觉、系统性体积高估和结构扭曲，影响下游定量分析和诊断安全性。

Method: 提出CAHAL框架：1) 使用确定性双变量混合专家架构，根据体积分辨率和采集各向异性两个独立描述符路由输入到专门的3D U-Net专家；2) 组合损失函数包括边缘惩罚空间重建、傅里叶域谱相干匹配和分割引导语义一致性约束；3) 通过物理基础退化从大规模真实世界数据库生成训练对。

Result: 在T1加权和FLAIR序列上验证，CAHAL相比生成式基线方法取得最先进结果，在准确性和效率方面改进了最佳相关方法。

Conclusion: CAHAL提供了一种幻觉鲁棒、物理信息的超分辨率框架，可直接在患者原始采集空间工作，解决了临床MRI厚层各向异性采集的限制，同时避免了现有生成式方法引入的解剖幻觉问题。

Abstract: Large-scale automated morphometric analysis of brain MRI is limited by the thick-slice, anisotropic acquisitions prevalent in routine clinical practice. Existing generative super-resolution (SR) methods produce visually compelling isotropic volumes but often introduce anatomical hallucinations, systematic volumetric overestimation, and structural distortions that compromise downstream quantitative analysis and diagnostic safety. To address this, we propose CAHAL (Clinically Applicable resolution enHAncement for Low-resolution MRI scans), a hallucination-robust, physics-informed resolution enhancement framework that operates directly in the patient's native acquisition space. CAHAL employs a deterministic bivariate Mixture of Experts (MoE) architecture routing each input through specialised residual 3D U-Net experts conditioned on both volumetric resolution and acquisition anisotropy, two independent descriptors of clinical MRI acquisition. Experts are optimised with a composite loss combining edge-penalised spatial reconstruction, Fourier-domain spectral coherence matching, and a segmentation-guided semantic consistency constraint. Training pairs are generated on-the-fly via physics-based degradation sampled from a large-scale real-world database, ensuring robust generalisation. Validated on T1-weighted and FLAIR sequences against generative baselines, CAHAL achieves state-of-the-art results, improving the best related methods in terms of accuracy and efficiency.

</details>


### [78] [REVEAL: Multimodal Vision-Language Alignment of Retinal Morphometry and Clinical Risks for Incident AD and Dementia Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18757)
*Seowung Leem,Lin Gu,Chenyu You,Kuang Gong,Ruogu Fang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: REVEAL框架通过将彩色眼底照片与个体化疾病风险特征对齐，结合分组感知对比学习策略，实现阿尔茨海默病和痴呆症的早期风险预测（平均提前8年）


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视网膜为阿尔茨海默病和痴呆症提供了独特的非侵入性观察窗口，但现有方法通常将影像和风险因素分开建模，无法捕捉对早期风险预测至关重要的联合多模态模式，且缺乏组织和对齐具有相似特征患者的机制

Method: 提出REVEAL框架：1) 将结构化问卷风险因素转化为临床可解释的叙述文本，与预训练视觉语言模型兼容；2) 引入分组感知对比学习策略，将具有相似视网膜形态测量和风险因素的患者聚类为正样本对，增强多模态对齐

Result: REVEAL在预测阿尔茨海默病和痴呆症方面显著优于最先进的视网膜成像模型与临床文本编码器的组合，以及通用视觉语言模型，平均提前8年（范围：1-11年）实现准确预测

Conclusion: REVEAL通过联合建模视网膜生物标志物和临床风险因素，提供了一个可推广的非侵入性早期风险分层方法，有望实现更早干预并改善人群层面的预防性护理

Abstract: The retina provides a unique, noninvasive window into Alzheimer's disease (AD) and dementia, capturing early structural changes through morphometric features, while systemic and lifestyle risk factors reflect well-established contributors to disease susceptibility long before clinical symptom onset. However, current retinal analysis frameworks typically model imaging and risk factors separately, limiting their ability to capture joint multimodal patterns critical for early risk prediction. Moreover, existing methods rarely incorporate mechanisms to organize or align patients with similar retinal and clinical characteristics, constraining the learning of coherent cross-modal associations. To address these limitations, we introduce REVEAL (REtinal-risk Vision-Language Early Alzheimer's Learning), a framework that aligns color fundus photographs with individualized disease-specific risk profiles for predicting incident AD and dementia, on average 8 years before diagnosis (range: 1-11 years). Because real-world risk factors are structured questionnaire data, we translate them into clinically interpretable narratives compatible with pretrained vision-language models (VLMs). We further propose a group-aware contrastive learning (GACL) strategy that clusters patients with similar retinal morphometry and risk factors as positive pairs, strengthening multimodal alignment. This unified representation learning framework substantially outperforms state-of-the-art retinal imaging models paired with clinical text encoders, as well as general-purpose VLMs, demonstrating the value of jointly modeling retinal biomarkers and clinical risk factors. By providing a generalizable and noninvasive approach for early AD and dementia risk stratification, REVEAL has the potential to enable earlier intervention and improve preventive care at the population level.

</details>


### [79] [URoPE: Universal Relative Position Embedding across Geometric Spaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18747)
*Yichen Xie,Depu Meng,Chensheng Peng,Yihan Hu,Quentin Herau,Masayoshi Tomizuka,Wei Zhan*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: URoPE是一种通用的旋转位置编码扩展，将RoPE从固定几何空间扩展到跨视图/跨维度的几何空间，通过相机射线采样和投影实现几何感知的相对位置编码。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有相对位置编码通常局限于固定几何空间（如1D序列或规则2D/3D网格），限制了在需要跨相机视图或2D-3D空间几何推理的计算机视觉任务中的应用。

Method: URoPE为每个键/值图像块沿对应相机射线在预定义深度锚点采样3D点，将其投影到查询图像平面，然后使用投影的像素坐标应用标准2D RoPE。该方法无需参数、具有内参感知能力，且对全局坐标系选择具有不变性。

Result: URoPE作为Transformer架构的插件式位置编码，在多种任务（新视角合成、3D目标检测、目标跟踪、深度估计）中均能持续提升性能，涵盖2D-2D、2D-3D和时间场景。

Conclusion: URoPE是一种通用有效的几何推理相对位置编码方法，与现有RoPE优化注意力内核完全兼容，能够显著提升基于Transformer的模型在各种几何推理任务中的性能。

Abstract: Relative position embedding has become a standard mechanism for encoding positional information in Transformers. However, existing formulations are typically limited to a fixed geometric space, namely 1D sequences or regular 2D/3D grids, which restricts their applicability to many computer vision tasks that require geometric reasoning across camera views or between 2D and 3D spaces. To address this limitation, we propose URoPE, a universal extension of Rotary Position Embedding (RoPE) to cross-view or cross-dimensional geometric spaces. For each key/value image patch, URoPE samples 3D points along the corresponding camera ray at predefined depth anchors and projects them into the query image plane. Standard 2D RoPE can then be applied using the projected pixel coordinates. URoPE is a parameter-free and intrinsics-aware relative position embedding that is invariant to the choice of global coordinate systems, while remaining fully compatible with existing RoPE-optimized attention kernels. We evaluate URoPE as a plug-in positional encoding for transformer architectures across a diverse set of tasks, including novel view synthesis, 3D object detection, object tracking, and depth estimation, covering 2D-2D, 2D-3D, and temporal scenarios. Experiments show that URoPE consistently improves the performance of transformer-based models across all tasks, demonstrating its effectiveness and generality for geometric reasoning. Our project website is: https://urope-pe.github.io/.

</details>


### [80] [DeltaSeg: Tiered Attention and Deep Delta Learning for Multi-Class Structural Defect Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18745)
*Enrique Hernandez Noguera,Md Meftahul Ferdaus,Elias Ioup,Mahdi Abdelguerfi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: DeltaSeg：一种用于结构缺陷分割的U型编码器-解码器架构，采用分层注意力策略，在S2DS和CSDD数据集上优于12种竞争方法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 结构缺陷的自动分割面临三大挑战：缺陷类型多样性、极端类别不平衡以及需要精确边界划分。现有方法难以同时应对这些挑战，需要更强大的分割架构。

Method: 提出DeltaSeg架构：1) U型编码器-解码器结构；2) 编码器使用深度可分离卷积和扩张阶段保持空间分辨率；3) 瓶颈处采用ASPP捕获多尺度上下文；4) 分层注意力策略：编码器用SE通道注意力，瓶颈和解码器用坐标注意力，跳跃连接用新颖的深度Delta注意力机制；5) DDA模块通过双路径方案结合学习的delta算子抑制干扰特征和空间注意力门；6) 通过多尺度辅助头进行深度监督。

Result: 在S2DS数据集（7类）和CSDD数据集（9类）上评估，DeltaSeg在12种竞争架构中表现最佳，包括U-Net、SA-UNet、UNet3+、SegFormer、Swin-UNet、EGE-UNet、FPN和Mobile-UNETR，展现出跨缺陷类型、成像条件和结构几何的强泛化能力。

Conclusion: DeltaSeg通过分层注意力策略和创新的DDA机制，有效解决了结构缺陷分割中的多样性、类别不平衡和边界精度问题，在多个基准测试中表现出优越性能。

Abstract: Automated segmentation of structural defects from visual inspection imagery remains challenging due to the diversity of damage types, extreme class imbalance, and the need for precise boundary delineation. This paper presents DeltaSeg, a U-shaped encoder-decoder architecture with a tiered attention strategy that integrates Squeeze-and-Excitation (SE) channel attention in the encoder, Coordinate Attention at the bottleneck and decoder, and a novel Deep Delta Attention (DDA) mechanism in the skip connections. The encoder uses depthwise separable convolutions with dilated stages to maintain spatial resolution while expanding the receptive field. Atrous Spatial Pyramid Pooling (ASPP) at the bottleneck captures multi-scale context. The DDA module refines skip connections through a dual-path scheme combining a learned delta operator for nuisance feature suppression with spatial attention gates conditioned on decoder signals. Deep supervision through multi-scale auxiliary heads further strengthens gradient flow and encourages semantically meaningful features at intermediate decoder stages. We evaluate DeltaSeg on two datasets: the S2DS dataset (7 classes) and the Culvert-Sewer Defect Dataset (CSDD, 9 classes). Across both benchmarks, DeltaSeg consistently outperforms 12 competing architectures including U-Net, SA-UNet, UNet3+, SegFormer, Swin-UNet, EGE-UNet, FPN, and Mobile-UNETR, demonstrating strong generalization across damage types, imaging conditions, and structural geometries.

</details>


### [81] [Autonomous Skeletal Landmark Localization towards Agentic C-Arm Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18740)
*Jay Jung,Ahmad Arrabi,Jax Luo,Scott Raymond,Safwan Wshah*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该研究提出基于多模态大语言模型的智能C臂控制框架，通过微调MLLMs实现骨骼标志点定位，在合成和真实X射线数据集上表现优异，具备推理和空间感知能力，有望实现自主C臂控制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统深度学习方法在C臂控制失败时需要临床医生手动操作，导致治疗延迟。需要能够整合临床医生反馈并通过推理进行调整的智能C臂控制框架，而骨骼标志点定位是实现这一目标的关键。

Method: 使用标注的合成X射线数据集和真实X射线数据集，每个X射线图像配对了多个骨骼标志点。微调了两个多模态大语言模型，使其能够从X射线图像中检索最接近的标志点。进行了定量评估并与领先的深度学习方法比较，还进行了定性实验展示MLLMs的推理能力和C臂导航能力。

Result: 在两个数据集上，微调后的MLLMs在所有定位任务中均表现出与深度学习方法竞争的性能。定性实验显示MLLMs具备推理和空间感知能力，能够纠正初始错误预测并顺序导航C臂至目标位置。

Conclusion: 研究表明微调后的MLLMs能够实现准确的骨骼标志点定位，在智能自主C臂控制方面具有应用前景。代码已开源。

Abstract: Purpose: Automated C-arm positioning ensures timely treatment in patients requiring emergent interventions. When a conventional Deep Learning (DL) approach for C-arm control fails, clinicians must revert to manual operation, resulting in additional delays. Consequently, an agentic C-arm control framework based on multimodal large language models (MLLMs) is highly desirable, as it can incorporate clinician feedback and use reasoning to make adjustments toward more accurate positioning. Skeletal landmark localization is essential for C-arm control, and we investigate adapting MLLMs for autonomous landmark localization.
  Methods: We used an annotated synthetic X-ray dataset and a real X-ray dataset. Each X-ray in both datasets is paired with several skeletal landmarks. We fine-tuned two MLLMs and tasked them with retrieving the closest landmarks from each X-ray. Quantitative evaluations of landmark localization were performed and compared against a leading DL approach. We further conducted qualitative experiments demonstrating: (1) how an MLLM can correct an initially incorrect prediction through reasoning, and (2) how the MLLM can sequentially navigate the C-arm toward a target location.
  Results: On both datasets, fine-tuned MLLMs demonstrate competitive performance across all localization tasks when compared with the DL approach. In the qualitative experiments, the MLLMs provide evidence of reasoning and spatial awareness.
  Conclusion: This study shows that fine-tuned MLLMs achieve accurate skeletal landmark localization and hold promise for agentic autonomous C-arm control. Our code is available athttps://github.com/marszzibros/C-arm-localization-LLMs.git

</details>


### [82] [Align then Refine: Text-Guided 3D Prostate Lesion Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18713)
*Cuiling Sun,Linkai Peng,Adam Murphy,Elif Keles,Hiten D. Patel,Ashley Ross,Frank Miller,Baris Turkbey,Andrea Mia Bejar,Halil Ertugrul Aktas,Gorkem Durak,Ulas Bagci*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出一种用于双参数MRI前列腺病灶自动3D分割的新方法，通过多编码器U-Net架构结合文本引导，实现更精确的多模态融合和病灶级语义注入。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前双参数MRI前列腺病灶自动3D分割面临两个主要挑战：一是多模态信息融合不可靠，难以保证解剖学一致性；二是现有视觉语言模型缺乏病灶级别的细粒度语义信息，无法提供有效的局部化指导。

Method: 提出多编码器U-Net架构，包含三个关键创新：1) 对齐损失增强前景文本-图像相似度以注入病灶语义；2) 热图损失校准相似度图并抑制虚假背景激活；3) 置信度门控多头交叉注意力精炼器在置信区域执行局部边界编辑。采用阶段调度训练策略稳定优化。

Result: 在PI-CAI数据集上持续超越先前方法，通过增强的多模态融合和局部化文本指导建立了新的最先进性能。

Conclusion: 该方法通过创新的多模态融合机制和病灶级语义注入，显著提升了前列腺病灶分割的精度，为可靠的算法分析提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Automated 3D segmentation of prostate lesions from biparametric MRI (bp-MRI) is essential for reliable algorithmic analysis, but achieving high precision remains challenging. Volumetric methods must combine multiple modalities while ensuring anatomical consistency, but current models struggle to integrate cross-modal information reliably. While vision-language models (VLMs) are replacing the currently used architectural designs, they still lack the fine-grained, lesion-level semantics required for effective localized guidance. To address these limitations, we propose a new multi-encoder U-Net architecture incorporating three key innovations: (1) an alignment loss that enhances foreground text-image similarity to inject lesion semantics; (2) a heatmap loss that calibrates the similarity map and suppresses spurious background activations; and (3) a final-stage, confidence-gated multi-head cross-attention refiner that performs localized boundary edits in high-confidence regions. A phase-scheduled training regime stabilizes the optimization of these components. Our method consistently outperforms prior approaches, establishing a new state-of-the-art on the PI-CAI dataset through enhanced multi-modal fusion and localized text guidance. Our code is available at https://github.com/NUBagciLab/Prostate-Lesion-Segmentation.

</details>


### [83] [Vision-Based Human Awareness Estimation for Enhanced Safety and Efficiency of AMRs in Industrial Warehouses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18627)
*Maximilian Haug,Christian Stippel,Lukas Pscherer,Benjamin Schwendinger,Ralph Hoch,Angel Gaydarov,Sebastian Schlund,Thilo Sauter*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出基于单目RGB摄像头的实时视觉方法，用于估计人类对自主移动机器人的意识状态，通过3D人体姿态重建和头部朝向估计来判断人类是否注意到机器人，从而让机器人根据人类意识状态调整运动策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前仓库环境中人机混合作业时，现有方法通常将人类视为通用动态障碍物，导致自主移动机器人采取保守行为（如减速或绕行），即使工人完全意识到机器人存在且能安全共享空间。这种保守策略降低了操作效率。

Method: 采用基于单目RGB摄像头的实时视觉系统，集成最先进的3D人体姿态重建技术和头部朝向估计方法，确定人类相对于机器人的位置及其视线锥，从而判断人类是否意识到机器人的存在。

Result: 在NVIDIA Isaac Sim物理精确机器人仿真环境中使用合成数据验证了整个流水线。实验结果表明，系统能够实时可靠地检测人类位置和注意力状态，使自主移动机器人能够根据人类意识状态安全调整运动。

Conclusion: 该方法通过准确估计人类对机器人的意识状态，使自主移动机器人能够采取更智能的运动策略，在确保安全的同时提高工业自动化环境中的操作效率，为人机协作提供了更精细的交互机制。

Abstract: Ensuring human safety is of paramount importance in warehouse environments that feature mixed traffic of human workers and autonomous mobile robots (AMRs). Current approaches often treat humans as generic dynamic obstacles, leading to conservative AMR behaviors like slowing down or detouring, even when workers are fully aware and capable of safely sharing space. This paper presents a real-time vision-based method to estimate human awareness of an AMR using a single RGB camera. We integrate state-of-the-art 3D human pose lifting with head orientation estimation to ascertain a human's position relative to the AMR and their viewing cone, thereby determining if the human is aware of the AMR. The entire pipeline is validated using synthetically generated data within NVIDIA Isaac Sim, a robust physics-accurate robotics simulation environment. Experimental results confirm that our system reliably detects human positions and their attention in real time, enabling AMRs to safely adapt their motion based on human awareness. This enhancement is crucial for improving both safety and operational efficiency in industrial and factory automation settings.

</details>


### [84] [MUA: Mobile Ultra-detailed Animatable Avatars](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18583)
*Heming Zhu,Guoxing Sun,Marc Habermann*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出一种基于小波引导的多级空间分解混合形状的动画化虚拟人表示方法，通过蒸馏管道将高质量教师模型的运动感知服装动力学和细粒度外观细节转移到紧凑高效表示中，实现2000倍计算成本降低和10倍模型大小压缩，同时保持视觉逼真度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有动画化虚拟人建模方法存在高保真度与低计算复杂度之间的权衡问题：超高保真度虚拟人需要服务器级GPU计算，而轻量级虚拟人则存在表面动态有限、外观细节减少和明显伪影等问题。需要同时实现高保真度和低计算复杂度的解决方案。

Method: 提出小波引导的多级空间分解混合形状表示方法，结合多级小波频谱分解和纹理空间低秩结构分解，并设计相应的蒸馏管道，从预训练的超高质量教师模型中提取运动感知服装动力学和细粒度外观细节到紧凑表示中。

Result: 相比原始高质量教师模型，计算成本降低2000倍，模型大小减少10倍，同时保持视觉上合理的动态和外观细节。在桌面PC上达到180+FPS，在Meta Quest 3上实现24FPS的实时本地设备性能，显著优于移动设备设计的现有方法，与服务器级方法质量相当或更优。

Conclusion: 该方法成功解决了高保真动画化虚拟人建模中保真度与计算效率的权衡问题，通过创新的表示方法和蒸馏管道实现了高质量虚拟人在资源受限平台上的实用部署，显著提升了沉浸式应用中高保真虚拟人的实用性。

Abstract: Building photorealistic, animatable full-body digital humans remains a longstanding challenge in computer graphics and vision. Recent advances in animatable avatar modeling have largely progressed along two directions: improving the fidelity of dynamic geometry and appearance, or reducing computational complexity to enable deployment on resource-constrained platforms, e.g., VR headsets. However, existing approaches fail to achieve both goals simultaneously: Ultra-high-fidelity avatars typically require substantial computation on server-class GPUs, whereas lightweight avatars often suffer from limited surface dynamics, reduced appearance details, and noticeable artifacts. To bridge this gap, we propose a novel animatable avatar representation, termed Wavelet-guided Multi-level Spatial Factorized Blendshapes, and a corresponding distillation pipeline that transfers motion-aware clothing dynamics and fine-grained appearance details from a pre-trained ultra-high-quality avatar model into a compact, efficient representation. By coupling multi-level wavelet spectral decomposition with low-rank structural factorization in texture space, our method achieves up to 2000X lower computational cost and a 10X smaller model size than the original high-quality teacher avatar model, while preserving visually plausible dynamics and appearance details closely resemble those of the teacher model. Extensive comparisons with state-of-the-art methods show that our approach significantly outperforms existing avatar approaches designed for mobile settings and achieves comparable or superior rendering quality to most approaches that can only run on servers. Importantly, our representation substantially improves the practicality of high-fidelity avatars for immersive applications, achieving over 180 FPS on a desktop PC and real-time native on-device performance at 24 FPS on a standalone Meta Quest 3.

</details>


### [85] [ReCap: Lightweight Referential Grounding for Coherent Story Visualization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18575)
*Aditya Arora,Akshita Gupta,Pau Rodriguez,Marcus Rohrbach*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: ReCap：轻量级一致性框架，通过条件帧引用和语义漂移校正提升故事可视化中的角色一致性和视觉保真度，仅增加149K参数，在FlintstonesSV和PororoSV基准上超越现有SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统方法通过显式记忆库、架构扩展或辅助语言模型来维持跨帧一致性，导致参数大幅增长和推理开销增加。需要一种轻量级框架，在不修改基础扩散模型的情况下提升角色稳定性和视觉保真度。

Method: 提出ReCap框架：1) CORE模块：将代词作为视觉锚点，仅在角色被代词指代时激活，以前一帧为条件传播视觉身份，避免无条件跨帧条件化；2) SemDrift：仅在训练时应用，当文本模糊或指代不清时，通过将去噪器表示与预训练DINOv3视觉嵌入对齐来校正语义漂移，强制语义身份稳定性，零推理成本。

Result: 在FlintstonesSV上Character-Accuracy提升2.63%，在PororoSV上提升5.65%，在两个主要故事可视化基准上建立新的SOTA角色一致性。仅增加149K参数，远少于记忆库和LLM增强方法。成功扩展到源自真实电影的人类中心叙事，超越风格化卡通领域。

Conclusion: ReCap通过选择性条件帧引用和训练时语义漂移校正，以极小的参数开销实现了卓越的角色一致性，为故事可视化提供了一种高效轻量的解决方案，并能扩展到更广泛的叙事领域。

Abstract: Story Visualization aims to generate a sequence of images that faithfully depicts a textual narrative that preserve character identity, spatial configuration, and stylistic coherence as the narratives unfold. Maintaining such cross-frame consistency has traditionally relied on explicit memory banks, architectural expansion, or auxiliary language models, resulting in substantial parameter growth and inference overhead. We introduce ReCap, a lightweight consistency framework that improves character stability and visual fidelity without modifying the base diffusion backbone. ReCap's CORE (COnditional frame REferencing) module treats anaphors, in our case pronouns, as visual anchors, activating only when characters are referred to by a pronoun and conditioning on the preceding frame to propagate visual identity. This selective design avoids unconditional cross-frame conditioning and introduces only 149K additional parameters, a fraction of the cost of memory-bank and LLM-augmented approaches. To further stabilize identity, we incorporate SemDrift (Guided Semantic Drift Correction) applied only during training. When text is vague or referential, the denoiser lacks a visual anchor for identity-defining attributes, causing character appearance to drift across frames, SemDrift corrects this by aligning denoiser representations with pretrained DINOv3 visual embeddings, enforcing semantic identity stability at zero inference cost. ReCap outperforms previous state-of-the-art, StoryGPT-V, on the two main benchmarks for story visualization by 2.63% Character-Accuracy on FlintstonesSV and by 5.65% on PororoSV, establishing a new state-of-the-art character consistency on both benchmarks. Furthermore, we extend story visualization to human-centric narratives derived from real films, demonstrating the capability of ReCap beyond stylized cartoon domains.

</details>


### [86] [MultiWorld: Scalable Multi-Agent Multi-View Video World Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18564)
*Haoyu Wu,Jiwen Yu,Yingtian Zou,Xihui Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: MultiWorld是一个用于多智能体多视角世界建模的统一框架，解决了现有视频世界模型局限于单智能体场景、无法捕捉真实世界多智能体系统复杂交互的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频世界模型主要针对单智能体场景，无法有效处理真实世界中多智能体系统的复杂交互和动态关系，这限制了它们在多智能体环境中的应用。

Method: 提出MultiWorld框架，包含多智能体条件模块实现精确的多智能体控制，以及全局状态编码器确保不同视角间的观测一致性。支持智能体和视角数量的灵活扩展，并能够并行合成不同视角以提高效率。

Result: 在多玩家游戏环境和多机器人操作任务上的实验表明，MultiWorld在视频保真度、动作跟随能力和多视角一致性方面均优于基线方法。

Conclusion: MultiWorld为多智能体多视角世界建模提供了一个有效的统一框架，能够准确控制多个智能体并保持多视角一致性，在复杂交互环境中表现出色。

Abstract: Video world models have achieved remarkable success in simulating environmental dynamics in response to actions by users or agents. They are modeled as action-conditioned video generation models that take historical frames and current actions as input to predict future frames. Yet, most existing approaches are limited to single-agent scenarios and fail to capture the complex interactions inherent in real-world multi-agent systems. We present \textbf{MultiWorld}, a unified framework for multi-agent multi-view world modeling that enables accurate control of multiple agents while maintaining multi-view consistency. We introduce the Multi-Agent Condition Module to achieve precise multi-agent controllability, and the Global State Encoder to ensure coherent observations across different views. MultiWorld supports flexible scaling of agent and view counts, and synthesizes different views in parallel for high efficiency. Experiments on multi-player game environments and multi-robot manipulation tasks demonstrate that MultiWorld outperforms baselines in video fidelity, action-following ability, and multi-view consistency. Project page: https://multi-world.github.io/

</details>


### [87] [AnchorSeg: Language Grounded Query Banks for Reasoning Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18562)
*Rui Qian,Chuanhang Deng,Qiang Huang,Jian Xiong,Mingxuan Li,Yingbo Zhou,Wei Zhai,Jintao Chen,Dejing Dou*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: AnchorSeg将推理分割重新定义为基于语言锚定查询库的结构化条件生成过程，通过解耦语义推理和空间定位来提升性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法依赖单个分割令牌<SEG>，其隐藏状态同时编码语义推理和空间定位，限制了模型明确解耦"分割什么"和"在哪里分割"的能力

Method: 引入AnchorSeg，构建有序的查询库序列：潜在推理令牌捕获中间语义状态，分割锚令牌提供显式空间锚定。将空间条件建模为图像令牌上的分解分布，锚查询确定定位信号而上下文查询提供语义调制。提出令牌-掩码循环一致性(TMCC)双向训练目标来桥接令牌级预测和像素级监督

Result: 在ReasonSeg测试集上达到最先进结果：67.7% gIoU和68.1% cIoU

Conclusion: 通过结构化语言锚定查询库显式解耦空间锚定和语义推理，AnchorSeg实现了推理分割的显著改进，代码和模型已公开

Abstract: Reasoning segmentation requires models to ground complex, implicit textual queries into precise pixel-level masks. Existing approaches rely on a single segmentation token $\texttt{<SEG>}$, whose hidden state implicitly encodes both semantic reasoning and spatial localization, limiting the model's ability to explicitly disentangle what to segment from where to segment. We introduce AnchorSeg, which reformulates reasoning segmentation as a structured conditional generation process over image tokens, conditioned on language grounded query banks. Instead of compressing all semantic reasoning and spatial localization into a single embedding, AnchorSeg constructs an ordered sequence of query banks: latent reasoning tokens that capture intermediate semantic states, and a segmentation anchor token that provides explicit spatial grounding. We model spatial conditioning as a factorized distribution over image tokens, where the anchor query determines localization signals while contextual queries provide semantic modulation. To bridge token-level predictions and pixel-level supervision, we propose Token--Mask Cycle Consistency (TMCC), a bidirectional training objective that enforces alignment across resolutions. By explicitly decoupling spatial grounding from semantic reasoning through structured language grounded query banks, AnchorSeg achieves state-of-the-art results on ReasonSeg test set (67.7\% gIoU and 68.1\% cIoU). All code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/rui-qian/AnchorSeg.

</details>


### [88] [Advancing Vision Transformer with Enhanced Spatial Priors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18549)
*Qihang Fan,Huaibo Huang,Mingrui Chen,Hongmin Liu,Ran He*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: EVT是基于RMT改进的视觉Transformer，通过欧几里得距离衰减增强空间先验建模，采用空间独立分组机制替代分解注意力，在多项视觉任务上取得优异性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统Vision Transformer的自注意力机制缺乏显式空间先验且计算复杂度高，限制了其应用。RMT虽然引入了曼哈顿距离衰减和分解注意力来改善这些问题，但仍存在改进空间。

Method: EVT在RMT基础上进行了两个关键改进：1) 使用更合理的欧几里得距离衰减来增强空间信息建模；2) 放弃分解注意力机制，采用更简单的空间独立分组方法，提供更灵活的token分组控制。

Result: 在图像分类、目标检测、实例分割和语义分割等任务上进行了广泛实验。无需额外训练数据，在ImageNet-1k上达到86.6%的top1准确率。

Conclusion: EVT通过更合理的空间先验建模和更灵活的分组机制，克服了RMT的局限性，为自注意力机制提供了更成熟和适应性强的空间先验集成方法，在多种计算机视觉任务中表现出色。

Abstract: In recent years, the Vision Transformer (ViT) has garnered significant attention within the computer vision community. However, the core component of ViT, Self-Attention, lacks explicit spatial priors and suffers from quadratic computational complexity, limiting its applicability. To address these issues, we have proposed RMT, a robust vision backbone with explicit spatial priors for general purposes. RMT utilizes Manhattan distance decay to introduce spatial information and employs a horizontal and vertical decomposition attention method to model global information. Building on the strengths of RMT, Euclidean enhanced Vision Transformer (EVT) is an expanded version that incorporates several key improvements. Firstly, EVT uses a more reasonable Euclidean distance decay to enhance the modeling of spatial information, allowing for a more accurate representation of spatial relationships compared to the Manhattan distance used in RMT. Secondly, EVT abandons the decomposed attention mechanism featured in RMT and instead adopts a simpler spatially-independent grouping approach, providing the model with greater flexibility in controlling the number of tokens within each group. By addressing these modifications, EVT offers a more sophisticated and adaptable approach to incorporating spatial priors into the Self-Attention mechanism, thus overcoming some of the limitations associated with RMT and further enhancing its applicability in various computer vision tasks. Extensive experiments on Image Classification, Object Detection, Instance Segmentation, and Semantic Segmentation demonstrate that EVT exhibits exceptional performance. Without additional training data, EVT achieves 86.6% top1-acc on ImageNet-1k.

</details>


### [89] [MetaCloak-JPEG: JPEG-Robust Adversarial Perturbation for Preventing Unauthorized DreamBooth-Based Deepfake Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18537)
*Tanjim Rahaman Fardin,S M Zunaid Alam,Mahadi Hasan Fahim,Md Faysal Mahfuz*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: MetaCloak-JPEG是一种针对JPEG压缩优化的对抗性人脸保护系统，通过可微分JPEG层解决现有方法在社交媒体平台JPEG压缩后失效的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有对抗性人脸保护系统（PhotoGuard、Anti-DreamBooth、MetaCloak）存在结构性盲点：它们都没有考虑社交媒体平台在用户图像被攻击者获取前会应用JPEG压缩。由于JPEG量化使用round()函数（其导数几乎处处为零），对抗性能量集中在高频DCT波段，而这些波段在JPEG压缩中被丢弃，导致60-80%的保护信号失效。

Method: 提出MetaCloak-JPEG，通过插入基于直通估计器（STE）的可微分JPEG（DiffJPEG）层来弥补这一缺陷：前向传播应用标准JPEG压缩，反向传播将round()替换为恒等函数。DiffJPEG嵌入到JPEG感知的EOT分布（约70%的数据增强包含DiffJPEG）和课程质量因子调度（QF: 95到50）中，并在双层元学习循环中实现。

Result: 在l-inf扰动预算eps=8/255下，MetaCloak-JPEG达到32.7 dB PSNR，91.3%的JPEG生存率，并在所有9个评估的JPEG质量因子（9/9获胜）上优于PhotoGuard，平均去噪损失增益+0.125，训练内存预算为4.1 GB。

Conclusion: MetaCloak-JPEG通过可微分JPEG层有效解决了现有对抗性人脸保护系统在JPEG压缩环境下的失效问题，显著提高了保护信号在社交媒体平台压缩后的生存能力。

Abstract: The rapid progress of subject-driven text-to-image synthesis, and in particular DreamBooth, has enabled a consent-free deepfake pipeline: an adversary needs only 4-8 publicly available face images to fine-tune a personalized diffusion model and produce photorealistic harmful content. Current adversarial face-protection systems -- PhotoGuard, Anti-DreamBooth, and MetaCloak -- perturb user images to disrupt surrogate fine-tuning, but all share a structural blindness: none backpropagates gradients through the JPEG compression pipeline that every major social-media platform applies before adversary access. Because JPEG quantization relies on round(), whose derivative is zero almost everywhere, adversarial energy concentrates in high-frequency DCT bands that JPEG discards, eliminating 60-80% of the protective signal. We introduce MetaCloak-JPEG, which closes this gap by inserting a Differentiable JPEG (DiffJPEG) layer built on the Straight-Through Estimator (STE): the forward pass applies standard JPEG compression, while the backward pass replaces round() with the identity. DiffJPEG is embedded in a JPEG-aware EOT distribution (~70% of augmentations include DiffJPEG) and a curriculum quality-factor schedule (QF: 95 to 50) inside a bilevel meta-learning loop. Under an l-inf perturbation budget of eps=8/255, MetaCloak-JPEG attains 32.7 dB PSNR, a 91.3% JPEG survival rate, and outperforms PhotoGuard on all 9 evaluated JPEG quality factors (9/9 wins, mean denoising-loss gain +0.125) within a 4.1 GB training-memory budget.

</details>


### [90] [UDM-GRPO: Stable and Efficient Group Relative Policy Optimization for Uniform Discrete Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18518)
*Jiaqi Wang,Haoge Deng,Ting Pan,Yang Liu,Chengyuan Wang,Fan Zhang,Yonggang Qi,Xinlong Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: UDM-GRPO：首个将均匀离散扩散模型（UDM）与强化学习（GRPO）结合的框架，通过将最终干净样本作为动作、通过扩散前向过程重建轨迹等关键设计，解决了训练不稳定问题，在多个T2I任务上显著提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然均匀离散扩散模型（UDM）在离散生成建模中表现出潜力，但其与强化学习的结合尚未充分探索。直接应用GRPO到UDM会导致训练不稳定和性能提升有限，因此需要专门的设计来有效整合这两种技术。

Method: 提出UDM-GRPO框架，包含两个关键设计：(1) 将最终干净样本作为动作，提供更准确稳定的优化信号；(2) 通过扩散前向过程重建轨迹，使概率路径更好地与预训练分布对齐。此外引入Reduced-Step和CFG-Free策略提升训练效率。

Result: 在多个文本到图像任务上显著提升基础模型性能：GenEval准确率从69%提升至96%，PickScore从20.46提升至23.81，在连续和离散设置下均达到最先进水平。OCR基准测试准确率从8%提升至57%，验证了方法的泛化能力。

Conclusion: UDM-GRPO成功解决了UDM与强化学习整合的挑战，通过精心设计的框架实现了训练稳定性和性能的显著提升，在多个基准测试中达到最先进水平，证明了离散扩散模型与强化学习结合的有效性。

Abstract: Uniform Discrete Diffusion Model (UDM) has recently emerged as a promising paradigm for discrete generative modeling; however, its integration with reinforcement learning remains largely unexplored. We observe that naively applying GRPO to UDM leads to training instability and marginal performance gains. To address this, we propose UDM-GRPO, the first framework to integrate UDM with RL. Our method is guided by two key insights: (i) treating the final clean sample as the action provides more accurate and stable optimization signals; and (ii) reconstructing trajectories via the diffusion forward process better aligns probability paths with the pretraining distribution. Additionally, we introduce two strategies, Reduced-Step and CFG-Free, to further improve training efficiency. UDM-GRPO significantly improves base model performance across multiple T2I tasks. Notably, GenEval accuracy improves from $69\%$ to $96\%$ and PickScore increases from $20.46$ to $23.81$, achieving state-of-the-art performance in both continuous and discrete settings. On the OCR benchmark, accuracy rises from $8\%$ to $57\%$, further validating the generalization ability of our method. Code is available at https://github.com/Yovecent/UDM-GRPO.

</details>


### [91] [S2H-DPO: Hardness-Aware Preference Optimization for Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18512)
*Nitish Shukla,Surgan Jandial,Arun Ross*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个简单到困难（S2H）的学习框架，通过构建分层多图像偏好数据来增强视觉语言模型的多图像推理能力，包括单图像局部推理、多图像局部比较和全局视觉搜索三个层次。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在单图像理解方面表现出色，但在多图像推理方面存在能力差距。当前方法主要关注使用预定义图像索引的局部推理（如"查看图像3..."），而忽略了全局视觉搜索和自主跨图像比较等关键技能。

Method: 提出了简单到困难（S2H）学习框架，系统构建三个层次的多图像偏好数据：1）单图像局部推理，2）多图像局部比较，3）全局视觉搜索。该方法利用提示驱动的复杂性创建适用于不同模型的偏好对，而非依赖模型特定属性。

Result: 在LLaVA和Qwen-VL模型上的广泛评估表明，该多样化的多图像推理数据显著提升了多图像推理性能，在多个基准测试中相比基线方法有明显改进。同时保持了强大的单图像推理能力。

Conclusion: 该方法通过分层多图像偏好数据有效增强了视觉语言模型的多图像推理能力，在保持单图像性能的同时提升了多图像理解，推进了整体视觉偏好对齐的技术水平。

Abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated remarkable progress in single-image understanding, yet effective reasoning across multiple images remains challenging. We identify a critical capability gap in existing multi-image alignment approaches: current methods focus primarily on localized reasoning with pre-specified image indices (``Look at Image 3 and...''), bypassing the essential skills of global visual search and autonomous cross-image comparison. To address this limitation, we introduce a Simple-to-Hard (S2H) learning framework that systematically constructs multi-image preference data across three hierarchical reasoning levels requiring an increasing level of capabilities: (1) single-image localized reasoning, (2) multi-image localized comparison, and (3) global visual search. Unlike prior work that relies on model-specific attributes, such as hallucinations or attention heuristics, to generate preference pairs, our approach leverages prompt-driven complexity to create chosen/rejected pairs that are applicable across different models. Through extensive evaluations on LLaVA and Qwen-VL models, we show that our diverse multi-image reasoning data significantly enhances multi-image reasoning performance, yielding significant improvements over baseline methods across benchmarks. Importantly, our approach maintains strong single-image reasoning performance while simultaneously strengthening multi-image understanding capabilities, thus advancing the state of the art for holistic visual preference alignment.

</details>


### [92] [SemLT3D: Semantic-Guided Expert Distillation for Camera-only Long-Tailed 3D Object Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18476)
*Hao Vo,Khoa Vo,Thinh Phan,Ngo Xuan Cuong,Gianfranco Doretto,Hien Nguyen,Anh Nguyen,Ngan Le*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SemLT3D：基于语义引导的专家蒸馏框架，通过语义先验增强长尾类别的表示空间，提升纯视觉3D目标检测在长尾分布下的性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有纯视觉3D目标检测方法主要关注整体性能，忽视了真实世界数据集中固有的严重长尾不平衡问题。许多罕见但安全关键的类别（如儿童、婴儿车、应急车辆）严重欠采样，导致学习偏差和性能下降。同时，类间模糊性（视觉相似的子类）和类内多样性（外观、尺度、姿态、上下文变化大）进一步阻碍了可靠的长尾识别。

Method: 提出SemLT3D框架，包含两个核心组件：1）语言引导的专家混合模块，根据语义亲和性将3D查询路由到专门化的专家，以更好地区分混淆类别并专注于尾部分布；2）语义投影蒸馏流程，将3D查询与CLIP引导的2D语义对齐，生成跨不同视觉表现的一致且更具判别性的特征。

Result: 虽然主要针对长尾不平衡问题设计，但SemLT3D的语义结构化学习也提升了模型在更广泛外观变化和挑战性极端情况下的鲁棒性，为更可靠的纯视觉3D感知提供了原则性进展。

Conclusion: SemLT3D通过语义引导的专家蒸馏框架，有效解决了纯视觉3D目标检测中的长尾不平衡问题，不仅改善了尾部类别的识别性能，还增强了模型对视觉变化的鲁棒性，是迈向更可靠自动驾驶感知系统的重要一步。

Abstract: Camera-only 3D object detection has emerged as a cost-effective and scalable alternative to LiDAR for autonomous driving, yet existing methods primarily prioritize overall performance while overlooking the severe long-tail imbalance inherent in real-world datasets. In practice, many rare but safety-critical categories such as children, strollers, or emergency vehicles are heavily underrepresented, leading to biased learning and degraded performance. This challenge is further exacerbated by pronounced inter-class ambiguity (e.g., visually similar subclasses) and substantial intra-class diversity (e.g., objects varying widely in appearance, scale, pose, or context), which together hinder reliable long-tail recognition. In this work, we introduce SemLT3D, a Semantic-Guided Expert Distillation framework designed to enrich the representation space for underrepresented classes through semantic priors. SemLT3D consists of: (1) a language-guided mixture-of-experts module that routes 3D queries to specialized experts according to their semantic affinity, enabling the model to better disentangle confusing classes and specialize on tail distributions; and (2) a semantic projection distillation pipeline that aligns 3D queries with CLIP-informed 2D semantics, producing more coherent and discriminative features across diverse visual manifestations. Although motivated by long-tail imbalance, the semantically structured learning in SemLT3D also improves robustness under broader appearance variations and challenging corner cases, offering a principled step toward more reliable camera-only 3D perception.

</details>


### [93] [Asset Harvester: Extracting 3D Assets from Autonomous Driving Logs for Simulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18468)
*Tianshi Cao,Jiawei Ren,Yuxuan Zhang,Jaewoo Seo,Jiahui Huang,Shikhar Solanki,Haotian Zhang,Mingfei Guo,Haithem Turki,Muxingzi Li,Yue Zhu,Sipeng Zhang,Zan Gojcic,Sanja Fidler,Kangxue Yin*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Asset Harvester：一个端到端管道，将自动驾驶日志中的稀疏对象观测转换为完整的、可用于仿真的3D资产，通过结合大规模对象中心训练元组、几何感知预处理和稀疏视图条件多视图生成与3D高斯提升来实现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 神经场景重建可以将驾驶日志转换为交互式3D环境用于仿真，但无法生成完整的3D对象资产，这些资产对于智能体操作和大视角新视图合成是必需的。现有方法难以处理真实世界自动驾驶数据中的稀疏、有限角度观测。

Method: 开发了一个系统级设计：1）大规模对象中心训练元组的大规模筛选；2）跨异构传感器的几何感知预处理；3）将稀疏视图条件多视图生成与3D高斯提升耦合的鲁棒训练方案。其中SparseViewDiT专门设计用于处理有限角度视图和其他真实世界数据挑战，并结合混合数据筛选、增强和自蒸馏。

Result: 该系统能够将稀疏的自动驾驶对象观测可扩展地转换为可重用的3D资产，生成完整的、仿真就绪的3D对象资产，支持智能体操作和大视角新视图合成。

Conclusion: Asset Harvester通过系统级设计解决了从稀疏真实世界自动驾驶观测生成完整3D资产的挑战，为自动驾驶仿真提供了可扩展的对象资产生成管道，填补了神经场景重建在完整对象资产生成方面的空白。

Abstract: Closed-loop simulation is a core component of autonomous vehicle (AV) development, enabling scalable testing, training, and safety validation before real-world deployment. Neural scene reconstruction converts driving logs into interactive 3D environments for simulation, but it does not produce complete 3D object assets required for agent manipulation and large-viewpoint novel-view synthesis. To address this challenge, we present Asset Harvester, an image-to-3D model and end-to-end pipeline that converts sparse, in-the-wild object observations from real driving logs into complete, simulation-ready assets. Rather than relying on a single model component, we developed a system-level design for real-world AV data that combines large-scale curation of object-centric training tuples, geometry-aware preprocessing across heterogeneous sensors, and a robust training recipe that couples sparse-view-conditioned multiview generation with 3D Gaussian lifting. Within this system, SparseViewDiT is explicitly designed to address limited-angle views and other real-world data challenges. Together with hybrid data curation, augmentation, and self-distillation, this system enables scalable conversion of sparse AV object observations into reusable 3D assets.

</details>


### [94] [FineCog-Nav: Integrating Fine-grained Cognitive Modules for Zero-shot Multimodal UAV Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16298)
*Dian Shao,Zhengzheng Xu,Peiyang Wang,Like Liu,Yule Wang,Jieqi Shi,Jing Huo*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: FineCog-Nav：受人类认知启发的无人机视觉语言导航框架，通过细粒度模块化方法提升零样本导航性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有零样本无人机视觉语言导航方法存在局限性，主要依赖大型基础模型、通用提示和松散协调的模块，难以处理复杂3D环境中的模糊多步指令和长时程导航任务

Method: 提出FineCog-Nav框架，采用自上而下的认知架构，将导航分解为语言处理、感知、注意力、记忆、想象、推理和决策等细粒度模块，每个模块由中等规模的基础模型驱动，配备角色特定的提示和结构化输入输出协议

Result: 实验表明FineCog-Nav在指令遵循、长时程规划和未见环境泛化方面持续优于零样本基线方法。同时构建了AerialVLN-Fine基准数据集，包含300条轨迹，具有句子级指令-轨迹对齐和包含明确视觉端点及地标参考的精细化指令

Conclusion: 细粒度认知模块化方法对零样本空中导航具有显著效果，通过结构化模块协作和角色特定提示提高了导航性能和可解释性

Abstract: UAV vision-language navigation (VLN) requires an agent to navigate complex 3D environments from an egocentric perspective while following ambiguous multi-step instructions over long horizons. Existing zero-shot methods remain limited, as they often rely on large base models, generic prompts, and loosely coordinated modules. In this work, we propose FineCog-Nav, a top-down framework inspired by human cognition that organizes navigation into fine-grained modules for language processing, perception, attention, memory, imagination, reasoning, and decision-making. Each module is driven by a moderate-sized foundation model with role-specific prompts and structured input-output protocols, enabling effective collaboration and improved interpretability. To support fine-grained evaluation, we construct AerialVLN-Fine, a curated benchmark of 300 trajectories derived from AerialVLN, with sentence-level instruction-trajectory alignment and refined instructions containing explicit visual endpoints and landmark references. Experiments show that FineCog-Nav consistently outperforms zero-shot baselines in instruction adherence, long-horizon planning, and generalization to unseen environments. These results suggest the effectiveness of fine-grained cognitive modularization for zero-shot aerial navigation. Project page: https://smartdianlab.github.io/projects-FineCogNav.

</details>


### [95] [Progressive Online Video Understanding with Evidence-Aligned Timing and Transparent Decisions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18459)
*Kecheng Zhang,Zongxin Yang,Mingfei Han,Haihong Hao,Yunzhi Zhuge,Changlin Li,Junhan Zhao,Zhihui Li,Xiaojun Chang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种用于在线视频理解的创新框架，通过解耦推理控制与记忆集成来解决流式视频分析中的关键挑战，实现了证据对齐的透明响应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统视频LLM在离线评估中无法满足在线流式视频分析的需求，需要解决决策透明度不足、响应时间与视觉证据对齐困难、以及在有限计算预算下保持全局因果一致理解等挑战。

Method: 提出一个解耦推理控制与记忆集成的新框架，包含两个核心组件：1）主动思考决策器（ATDM），通过可观察的进度和置信度指标外部化决策过程，实现响应时间与首次充分证据时间戳的精确对齐；2）分层渐进语义集成（HPSI）模块，使用可学习的多级聚合令牌在视频片段间传播，构建丰富的全局认知状态而不超出令牌预算。

Result: 在关键在线视频理解基准测试中表现出色，在StreamingBench上达到71.6%的准确率，比之前的最佳结果67.63%有显著提升；在OVOBench上达到46.9%的准确率，证明了证据对齐和透明在线视频分析的有效性。

Conclusion: 该框架通过解耦推理控制与记忆集成，为在线流式视频理解提供了透明、证据对齐的解决方案，在保持计算效率的同时实现了高质量的实时视频分析。

Abstract: Visual agents operating in the wild must respond to queries precisely when sufficient evidence first appears in a video stream, a critical capability that is overlooked by conventional video LLMs evaluated in offline settings. The shift to an online, streaming paradigm introduces significant challenges: a lack of decision transparency, the difficulty of aligning response timing with visual evidence, and the need to maintain a global, causally consistent understanding under tight computational budgets. To address these issues, we propose a novel framework that decouples reasoning control from memory integration. We introduce \textbf{\model{}}, an instantiation of this framework with two core components. First, the \emph{Active Thinking Decision Maker (ATDM)} is a transparent reasoning controller that externalizes its decision process using observable progress ($\boldsymbolρ$) and confidence ($\boldsymbol{c}$) metrics. This allows it to precisely time its response $t_r$ to match the first-sufficient-evidence timestamp $t^\star$ while streaming its reasoning to the user. Second, the \emph{Hierarchical Progressive Semantic Integration (HPSI)} module acts as an efficient memory system. It employs a set of learnable, multi-level aggregation tokens that are propagated across clips to build a rich, global cognitive state without exceeding token budgets. %Our approach sets a new standard on key online video understanding benchmarks, achieving strong performance of \textbf{71.6\%} on StreamingBench and \textbf{46.9\%} on OVOBench, demonstrating a robust solution for evidence-aligned and transparent online video analysis. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of ATDM and HPSI, e.g., Thinking-QwenVL improves the accuracy of the previous state-of-the-art from 67.63\% to 71.60\% on the StreamingBench benchmark.

</details>


### [96] [Revisiting Change VQA in Remote Sensing with Structured and Native Multimodal Qwen Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18429)
*Yakoub Bazi,Mohamad M. Al Rahhal,Mansour Zuair,Faroun Mohamed*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该研究在遥感图像变化视觉问答任务中，比较了结构化视觉语言模型Qwen3-VL与原生多模态模型Qwen3.5的性能，发现原生多模态模型表现更优，表明紧密集成的多模态架构比模型规模或显式的多层次视觉条件化对语义变化推理更重要。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管视觉语言模型在时序遥感图像理解中已有研究，但变化视觉问答在现代多模态模型背景下仍未被充分探索。研究者旨在重新评估CDVQA基准，比较不同类型视觉语言模型在遥感图像语义变化问答任务中的表现。

Method: 采用统一的低秩适应设置，在CDVQA基准上比较两种Qwen模型：结构化视觉语言流程的Qwen3-VL（具有多层次视觉条件化和全注意力解码器）与原生多模态模型Qwen3.5（采用单阶段对齐和混合解码器骨干）。使用官方CDVQA测试集进行评估。

Result: 实验结果显示：1）近期视觉语言模型相比早期专门化基线有所改进；2）性能不随模型规模单调增长；3）原生多模态模型比结构化视觉语言流程更有效。Qwen3.5在遥感图像语义变化推理任务中表现更优。

Conclusion: 对于遥感图像中的语言驱动语义变化推理，紧密集成的多模态骨干比模型规模或显式的多层次视觉条件化对性能贡献更大。原生多模态架构更适合处理遥感图像的变化视觉问答任务。

Abstract: Change visual question answering (Change VQA) addresses the problem of answering natural-language questions about semantic changes between bi-temporal remote sensing (RS) images. Although vision-language models (VLMs) have recently been studied for temporal RS image understanding, Change VQA remains underexplored in the context of modern multimodal models. In this letter, we revisit the CDVQA benchmark using recent Qwen models under a unified low-rank adaptation (LoRA) setting. We compare Qwen3-VL, which follows a structured vision-language pipeline with multi-depth visual conditioning and a full-attention decoder, with Qwen3.5, a native multimodal model that combines a single-stage alignment with a hybrid decoder backbone. Experimental results on the official CDVQA test splits show that recent VLMs improve over earlier specialized baselines. They further show that performance does not scale monotonically with model size, and that native multimodal models are more effective than structured vision-language pipelines for this task. These findings indicate that tightly integrated multimodal backbones contribute more to performance than scale or explicit multi-depth visual conditioning for language-driven semantic change reasoning in RS imagery.

</details>


### [97] [SENSE: Stereo OpEN Vocabulary SEmantic Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15946)
*Thomas Campagnolo,Ezio Malis,Philippe Martinet,Gaétan Bahl*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SENSE是首个基于立体视觉的开放词汇语义分割方法，利用立体图像对和视觉语言模型提升分割精度，在多个数据集上优于基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有开放词汇语义分割方法通常依赖单视角图像，在空间精度方面存在不足，特别是在遮挡和物体边界附近。需要结合几何线索来提升分割准确性。

Method: 提出SENSE方法，结合立体视觉和视觉语言模型，利用立体图像对提供的几何线索增强空间推理和分割精度。在PhraseStereo数据集上进行训练。

Result: 在PhraseStereo数据集上比基线方法提升2.9%平均精度，比最佳竞争方法提升0.76%；在Cityscapes上相对提升3.5% mIoU，在KITTI上提升18%。

Conclusion: SENSE通过联合推理语义和几何信息，实现了从自然语言到准确场景理解的能力，对自主机器人和智能交通系统具有重要意义。

Abstract: Open-vocabulary semantic segmentation enables models to segment objects or image regions beyond fixed class sets, offering flexibility in dynamic environments. However, existing methods often rely on single-view images and struggle with spatial precision, especially under occlusions and near object boundaries. We propose SENSE, the first work on Stereo OpEN Vocabulary SEmantic Segmentation, which leverages stereo vision and vision-language models to enhance open-vocabulary semantic segmentation. By incorporating stereo image pairs, we introduce geometric cues that improve spatial reasoning and segmentation accuracy. Trained on the PhraseStereo dataset, our approach achieves strong performance in phrase-grounded tasks and demonstrates generalization in zero-shot settings. On PhraseStereo, we show a +2.9% improvement in Average Precision over the baseline method and +0.76% over the best competing method. SENSE also provides a relative improvement of +3.5% mIoU on Cityscapes and +18% on KITTI compared to the baseline work. By jointly reasoning over semantics and geometry, SENSE supports accurate scene understanding from natural language, essential for autonomous robots and Intelligent Transportation Systems.

</details>


### [98] [MedProbeBench: Systematic Benchmarking at Deep Evidence Integration for Expert-level Medical Guideline](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18418)
*Jiyao Liu,Jianghan Shen,Sida Song,Tianbin Li,Xiaojia Liu,Rongbin Li,Ziyan Huang,Jiashi Lin,Junzhi Ning,Changkai Ji,Siqi Luo,Wenjie Li,Chenglong Ma,Ming Hu,Jing Xiong,Jin Ye,Bin Fu,Ningsheng Xu,Yirong Chen,Lei Jin,Hong Chen,Junjun He*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: MedProbeBench：首个基于高质量临床指南的基准测试，用于评估LLM在医学证据整合和指南生成方面的能力，揭示了当前模型与专家级临床指南开发之间的显著差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准无法评估深度研究系统在真实医学工作流程中的能力，特别是需要多步证据整合和专家级判断的临床指南开发任务。医学指南作为医学专业知识的顶峰，具有严格的中立性和可验证性标准，对深度研究智能体构成重大挑战。

Method: 提出MedProbeBench基准，利用高质量临床指南作为专家级参考标准。开发MedProbe-Eval评估框架，包含：(1) 包含1200+任务自适应评分标准的整体评分体系；(2) 基于5130+原子声明的细粒度证据验证机制，用于严格验证证据精确性。

Result: 对17个LLM和深度研究智能体的评估显示，在证据整合和指南生成方面存在关键差距，突显了当前能力与专家级临床指南开发之间的实质性距离。

Conclusion: MedProbeBench填补了医学深度研究评估的空白，为评估LLM在临床指南开发等复杂医学任务中的能力提供了首个基准。结果表明当前模型在证据整合和专家级判断方面仍有显著不足，需要进一步研究提升。

Abstract: Recent advances in deep research systems enable large language models to retrieve, synthesize, and reason over large-scale external knowledge. In medicine, developing clinical guidelines critically depends on such deep evidence integration. However, existing benchmarks fail to evaluate this capability in realistic workflows requiring multi-step evidence integration and expert-level judgment. To address this gap, we introduce MedProbeBench, the first benchmark leveraging high-quality clinical guidelines as expert-level references. Medical guidelines, with their rigorous standards in neutrality and verifiability, represent the pinnacle of medical expertise and pose substantial challenges for deep research agents. For evaluation, we propose MedProbe-Eval, a comprehensive evaluation framework featuring: (1) Holistic Rubrics with 1,200+ task-adaptive rubric criteria for comprehensive quality assessment, and (2) Fine-grained Evidence Verification for rigorous validation of evidence precision, grounded in 5,130+ atomic claims. Evaluation of 17 LLMs and deep research agents reveals critical gaps in evidence integration and guideline generation, underscoring the substantial distance between current capabilities and expert-level clinical guideline development. Project: https://github.com/uni-medical/MedProbeBench

</details>


### [99] [One-Step Diffusion with Inverse Residual Fields for Unsupervised Industrial Anomaly Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18393)
*Boan Zhang,Wen Li,Guanhua Yu,Xiyang Liu,Wenchao Chen,Long Tian*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: OSD-IRF：一种用于无监督工业异常检测的单步扩散模型，通过逆残差场实现快速推理和SOTA性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统扩散模型在无监督工业异常检测中性能优秀，但其迭代去噪和加噪特性导致推理速度缓慢。需要一种既能保持高性能又能实现快速推理的解决方案。

Method: 提出OSD-IRF方法：1）在正常数据上训练深度扩散概率模型；2）基于DDPM的噪声估计函数预测测试样本的逆残差场；3）通过评估IRF在高斯分布下的概率密度并与阈值比较进行异常检测。关键发现是异常在IRF空间中变得可区分。

Result: 在三个广泛使用的uIAD基准测试中，模型在六个指标上达到SOTA或竞争性性能，同时实现约2倍的推理加速（无需蒸馏）。

Conclusion: OSD-IRF通过引入逆残差场空间，成功解决了扩散模型在无监督工业异常检测中推理速度慢的问题，实现了高性能与高效率的平衡。

Abstract: Diffusion models have achieved outstanding performance in unsupervised industrial anomaly detection (uIAD) by learning a manifold of normal data under the common assumption that off-manifold anomalies are harder to generate, resulting in larger reconstruction errors in data space or lower probability densities in the tractable latent space. However, their iterative denoising and noising nature leads to slow inference. In this paper, we propose OSD-IRF, a novel one-step diffusion with inverse residual fields, to address this limitation for uIAD task. We first train a deep diffusion probabilistic model (DDPM) on normal data without any conditioning. Then, for a test sample, we predict its inverse residual fields (IRF) based on the noise estimated by the well-trained parametric noise function of the DDPM. Finally, uIAD is performed by evaluating the probability density of the IRF under a Gaussian distribution and comparing it with a threshold. Our key observation is that anomalies become distinguishable in this IRF space, a finding that has seldom been reported in prior works. Moreover, OSD-IRF requires only single step diffusion for uIAD, thanks to the property that IRF holds for any neighboring time step in the denoising process. Extensive experiments on three widely used uIAD benchmarks show that our model achieves SOTA or competitive performance across six metrics, along with roughly a 2X inference speedup without distillation.

</details>


### [100] [Towards Robust Text-to-Image Person Retrieval: Multi-View Reformulation for Semantic Compensation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18376)
*Chao Yuan,Yujian Zhao,Haoxuan Xu,Guanglin Niu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出基于大语言模型的语义补偿框架MVR，通过多视角语义重构和特征补偿解决文本到图像人物检索中的表达漂移问题，无需训练即可提升原始模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 文本到图像人物检索任务中，自然语言表达的多样性和视觉语义的隐含性导致表达漂移问题：语义等价的文本由于表达方式不同在嵌入空间中产生显著特征差异，从而降低图像-文本对齐的鲁棒性。

Method: 提出基于大语言模型的语义补偿框架MVR，包含三个核心组件：1) 多视角重构：采用双分支提示策略，结合关键特征引导和多样性感知重写生成语义等价但分布多样的文本变体；2) 文本特征鲁棒性增强：通过无训练潜在空间补偿机制，利用多视角特征均值池化和残差连接抑制噪声干扰，捕捉"语义回声"；3) 视觉语义补偿：使用VLM生成多视角图像描述，并通过共享文本重构进一步增强以解决视觉语义鸿沟。

Result: 实验表明，该方法无需训练即可显著提升原始模型的准确性，在三个文本到图像人物检索数据集上达到最先进性能。

Conclusion: MVR框架通过多视角语义重构和特征补偿有效解决了表达漂移问题，增强了跨模态表示的一致性，为文本到图像检索任务提供了无需训练的高效解决方案。

Abstract: In text-to-image person retrieval tasks, the diversity of natural language expressions and the implicitness of visual semantics often lead to the problem of Expression Drift, where semantically equivalent texts exhibit significant feature discrepancies in the embedding space due to phrasing variations, thereby degrading the robustness of image-text alignment. This paper proposes a semantic compensation framework (MVR) driven by Large Language Models (LLMs), which enhances cross-modal representation consistency through multi-view semantic reformulation and feature compensation. The core methodology comprises three components: Multi-View Reformulation (MVR): A dual-branch prompting strategy combines key feature guidance (extracting visually critical components via feature similarity) and diversity-aware rewriting to generate semantically equivalent yet distributionally diverse textual variants; Textual Feature Robustness Enhancement: A training-free latent space compensation mechanism suppresses noise interference through multi-view feature mean-pooling and residual connections, effectively capturing "Semantic Echoes"; Visual Semantic Compensation: VLM generates multi-perspective image descriptions, which are further enhanced through shared text reformulation to address visual semantic gaps. Experiments demonstrate that our method can improve the accuracy of the original model well without training and performs SOTA on three text-to-image person retrieval datasets.

</details>


### [101] [DSA-CycleGAN: A Domain Shift Aware CycleGAN for Robust Multi-Stain Glomeruli Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18368)
*Zeeshan Nisar,Friedrich Feuerhake,Thomas Lampert*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出DSA-CycleGAN方法解决数字病理学中多染色分割的噪声问题，通过域偏移感知机制改进CycleGAN，在肾小球分割任务中表现优异


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 数字病理学分割面临染色间和染色内变异问题，导致模型性能下降。标注每种染色既昂贵又耗时，现有使用CycleGAN进行染色转移的方法会因一对多映射特性引入噪声，与循环一致性损失冲突。

Method: 提出域偏移感知CycleGAN（DSA-CycleGAN），通过改进CycleGAN减少染色转移过程中的噪声。同时评估了机器学习领域解决类似问题的其他先进方法，并与DSA-CycleGAN在肾小球多染色分割任务中进行比较。

Result: 实验表明DSA-CycleGAN不仅提高了肾小球分割性能，而且在减少噪声方面优于其他方法。特别是在生物学上不同的染色之间转换时，这种优势更加明显。

Conclusion: DSA-CycleGAN有效解决了CycleGAN在染色转移中的噪声问题，提高了多染色分割模型的性能，特别是在处理生物学差异较大的染色对时表现突出。

Abstract: A key challenge in segmentation in digital histopathology is inter- and intra-stain variations as it reduces model performance. Labelling each stain is expensive and time-consuming so methods using stain transfer via CycleGAN, have been developed for training multi-stain segmentation models using labels from a single stain. Nevertheless, CycleGAN tends to introduce noise during translation because of the one-to-many nature of some stain pairs, which conflicts with its cycle consistency loss. To address this, we propose the Domain Shift Aware CycleGAN, which reduces the presence of such noise. Furthermore, we evaluate several advances from the field of machine learning aimed at resolving similar problems and compare their effectiveness against DSA-CycleGAN in the context of multi-stain glomeruli segmentation. Experiments demonstrate that DSA-CycleGAN not only improves segmentation performance in glomeruli segmentation but also outperforms other methods in reducing noise. This is particularly evident when translating between biologically distinct stains. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/zeeshannisar/DSA-CycleGAN.

</details>


### [102] [EAST: Early Action Prediction Sampling Strategy with Token Masking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18367)
*Iva Sović,Ivan Martinović,Marin Oršić*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: EAST框架通过随机化训练策略和联合学习，实现了早期动作预测的显著性能提升，在多个数据集上刷新SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 早期动作预测面临视觉证据有限的挑战，需要模型能够从不完整的观察中进行推理。

Method: 提出EAST框架，采用随机化训练策略采样时间步分离观察帧和未观察帧；通过联合学习观察和未来表示；引入token masking减少内存使用并加速训练；结合预测解码器。

Result: 在NTU60、SSv2和UCF101数据集上分别超越之前最佳工作10.1、7.7和3.9个百分点，内存使用减半，训练速度提升2倍。

Conclusion: EAST通过创新的训练策略和架构设计，有效解决了早期动作预测的挑战，实现了优异的性能和效率。

Abstract: Early action prediction seeks to anticipate an action before it fully unfolds, but limited visual evidence makes this task especially challenging. We introduce EAST, a simple and efficient framework that enables a model to reason about incomplete observations. In our empirical study, we identify key components when training early action prediction models. Our key contribution is a randomized training strategy that samples a time step separating observed and unobserved video frames, enabling a single model to generalize seamlessly across all test-time observation ratios. We further show that joint learning on both observed and future (oracle) representations significantly boosts performance, even allowing an encoder-only model to excel. To improve scalability, we propose a token masking procedure that cuts memory usage in half and accelerates training by 2x with negligible accuracy loss. Combined with a forecasting decoder, EAST sets a new state of the art on NTU60, SSv2, and UCF101, surpassing previous best work by 10.1, 7.7, and 3.9 percentage points, respectively.

</details>


### [103] [LBFTI: Layer-Based Facial Template Inversion for Identity-Preserving Fine-Grained Face Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18358)
*Zixuan Shen,Zhihua Xia,Kaikai Gan,Peipeng Yu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出基于分层的人脸模板反演方法LBFTI，通过三层分解（前景、中景、背景）和专用生成器，实现身份保持的细粒度人脸重建，在机器认证和人类感知相似度上均优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人脸识别系统中，人脸模板因符合数据最小化原则而被广泛采用，但模板反演技术能从模板重建人脸，带来严重的隐私泄露风险。现有方法在重建身份保持的细粒度人脸图像方面仍有不足。

Method: 提出分层人脸模板反演方法LBFTI：1）将人脸图像分解为三层：前景层（眉毛、眼睛、鼻子、嘴巴）、中景层（皮肤）、背景层（其他部分）；2）使用专用生成器生成各层；3）采用严格的三阶段训练策略：独立精细生成前景和中景层，融合前景和中景层并进行模板二次注入以生成包含背景层的完整全景人脸图像，联合微调所有模块以优化层间协调和身份一致性。

Result: 实验表明LBFTI在机器认证性能上优于最先进方法，TAR提升25.3%；在人类感知相似度上也表现更好，通过定量指标和问卷调查验证。

Conclusion: LBFTI方法通过分层分解和专用生成器，结合三阶段训练策略，能够有效重建身份保持的细粒度人脸图像，在机器认证和人类感知相似度方面均优于现有方法，为解决人脸模板反演带来的隐私风险提供了有效方案。

Abstract: In face recognition systems, facial templates are widely adopted for identity authentication due to their compliance with the data minimization principle. However, facial template inversion technologies have posed a severe privacy leakage risk by enabling face reconstruction from templates. This paper proposes a Layer-Based Facial Template Inversion (LBFTI) method to reconstruct identity-preserving fine-grained face images. Our scheme decomposes face images into three layers: foreground layers (including eyebrows, eyes, nose, and mouth), midground layers (skin), and background layers (other parts). LBFTI leverages dedicated generators to produce these layers, adopting a rigorous three-stage training strategy: (1) independent refined generation of foreground and midground layers, (2) fusion of foreground and midground layers with template secondary injection to produce complete panoramic face images with background layers, and (3) joint fine-tuning of all modules to optimize inter-layer coordination and identity consistency. Experiments demonstrate that our LBFTI not only outperforms state-of-the-art methods in machine authentication performance, with a 25.3% improvement in TAR, but also achieves better similarity in human perception, as validated by both quantitative metrics and a questionnaire survey.

</details>


### [104] [AdaCluster: Adaptive Query-Key Clustering for Sparse Attention in Video Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18348)
*Haoyue Tan,Shengnan Wang,Yulin Qiao,Juncheng Zhang,Youhui Bai,Ping Gong,Zewen Jin,Cheng Li*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: AdaCluster：一种无需训练的自适应聚类框架，通过角度相似性保持的查询聚类和欧几里得相似性保持的键聚类，加速视频扩散变换器推理，在保持精度的同时实现1.67-4.31倍加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视频扩散变换器（DiTs）因二次注意力复杂度导致推理延迟过高。现有稀疏注意力方法要么忽略语义相似性，要么无法适应不同层间的异构令牌分布，导致模型性能下降。

Method: 提出AdaCluster训练免费自适应聚类框架：1）对查询向量应用角度相似性保持聚类以获得更高压缩率；2）对键设计欧几里得相似性保持聚类，包括集群数量分配、基于阈值的自适应聚类和高效关键集群选择。

Result: 在CogVideoX-2B、HunyuanVideo和Wan-2.1模型上，单块A40 GPU上实现1.67-4.31倍加速，质量下降可忽略不计。

Conclusion: AdaCluster通过自适应聚类有效解决了DiTs的二次注意力复杂度问题，在保持模型精度的同时显著加速推理，为视频生成模型的实时应用提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Video diffusion transformers (DiTs) suffer from prohibitive inference latency due to quadratic attention complexity. Existing sparse attention methods either overlook semantic similarity or fail to adapt to heterogeneous token distributions across layers, leading to model performance degradation. We propose AdaCluster, a training-free adaptive clustering framework that accelerates the generation of DiTs while preserving accuracy. AdaCluster applies an angle-similarity-preserving clustering method to query vectors for higher compression, and designs a euclidean-similarity-preserving clustering method for keys, covering cluster number assignment, threshold-wise adaptive clustering, and efficient critical cluster selection. Experiments on CogVideoX-2B, HunyuanVideo, and Wan-2.1 on one A40 GPU demonstrate up to 1.67-4.31x speedup with negligible quality degradation.

</details>


### [105] [Continual Hand-Eye Calibration for Open-world Robotic Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15814)
*Fazeng Li,Gan Sun,Chenxi Liu,Yao He,Wei Cong,Yang Cong*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种持续手眼标定框架，通过空间感知回放策略和结构保持双重蒸馏，使机器人能够适应开放世界中的连续场景变化，有效缓解灾难性遗忘问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度学习标定模型在适应开放世界场景变化时存在灾难性遗忘问题，而简单的回放策略无法有效缓解这一问题，需要开发能够持续适应新场景同时保持旧场景性能的标定方法。

Method: 提出持续手眼标定框架，包含：1) 空间感知回放策略(SARS)，构建几何均匀的回放缓冲区，用信息量最大的视角替换冗余相邻帧；2) 结构保持双重蒸馏(SPDD)，将定位知识分解为粗粒度场景布局和细粒度位姿精度，分别进行蒸馏以缓解两种类型的遗忘。

Result: 在多个公共数据集上的实验表明，该方法具有显著的抗场景遗忘性能，能够在保持对新场景适应能力的同时，维持对过去场景的标定精度，证实了框架的有效性。

Conclusion: 提出的持续手眼标定框架通过空间感知回放和结构保持蒸馏，成功实现了机器人对开放世界连续场景变化的适应，解决了灾难性遗忘问题，为开放世界机器人操作提供了有效的标定解决方案。

Abstract: Hand-eye calibration through visual localization is a critical capability for robotic manipulation in open-world environments. However, most deep learning-based calibration models suffer from catastrophic forgetting when adapting into unseen data amongst open-world scene changes, while simple rehearsal-based continual learning strategy cannot well mitigate this issue. To overcome this challenge, we propose a continual hand-eye calibration framework, enabling robots to adapt to sequentially encountered open-world manipulation scenes through spatially replay strategy and structure-preserving distillation. Specifically, a Spatial-Aware Replay Strategy (SARS) constructs a geometrically uniform replay buffer that ensures comprehensive coverage of each scene pose space, replacing redundant adjacent frames with maximally informative viewpoints. Meanwhile, a Structure-Preserving Dual Distillation (SPDD) is proposed to decompose localization knowledge into coarse scene layout and fine pose precision, and distills them separately to alleviate both types of forgetting during continual adaptation. As a new manipulation scene arrives, SARS provides geometrically representative replay samples from all prior scenes, and SPDD applies structured distillation on these samples to retain previously learned knowledge. After training on the new scene, SARS incorporates selected samples from the new scene into the replay buffer for future rehearsal, allowing the model to continuously accumulate multi-scene calibration capability. Experiments on multiple public datasets show significant anti scene forgetting performance, maintaining accuracy on past scenes while preserving adaptation to new scenes, confirming the effectiveness of the framework.

</details>


### [106] [OmniHuman: A Large-scale Dataset and Benchmark for Human-Centric Video Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18326)
*Lei Zhu,Xing Cai,Yingjie Chen,Yiheng Li,Binxin Yang,Hao Liu,Jie Chen,Chen Li,Jing LYu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: OmniHuman是一个大规模多场景数据集，用于解决现有音频-视频联合生成模型在复杂真实物理场景中生成高保真人类中心视频的局限性，通过分层标注和自动化流水线提供高质量数据，并建立OHBench三层次评估系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有音频-视频联合生成模型在复杂真实物理场景中生成高保真人类中心视频存在显著挑战，根源在于现有数据集在三个维度的结构性缺陷：全局场景和相机多样性有限、交互建模稀疏（人-人和人-物）、个体属性对齐不足。

Method: 提出OmniHuman大规模多场景数据集，提供分层标注（视频级场景、帧级交互、个体级属性），开发全自动化流水线进行高质量数据收集和多模态标注。建立OmniHuman Benchmark（OHBench）三层次评估系统，引入与人类感知高度一致的度量指标。

Result: OmniHuman填补了现有数据集的三个维度缺陷，OHBench提供了全面的诊断能力，覆盖全局场景、关系交互和个体属性，填补了现有基准测试的空白。

Conclusion: OmniHuman数据集和OHBench评估系统为解决人类中心音频-视频合成中的关键挑战提供了系统化解决方案，通过分层标注和科学诊断框架推动了该领域的发展。

Abstract: Recent advancements in audio-video joint generation models have demonstrated impressive capabilities in content creation. However, generating high-fidelity human-centric videos in complex, real-world physical scenes remains a significant challenge. We identify that the root cause lies in the structural deficiencies of existing datasets across three dimensions: limited global scene and camera diversity, sparse interaction modeling (both person-person and person-object), and insufficient individual attribute alignment. To bridge these gaps, we present OmniHuman, a large-scale, multi-scene dataset designed for fine-grained human modeling. OmniHuman provides a hierarchical annotation covering video-level scenes, frame-level interactions, and individual-level attributes. To facilitate this, we develop a fully automated pipeline for high-quality data collection and multi-modal annotation. Complementary to the dataset, we establish the OmniHuman Benchmark (OHBench), a three-level evaluation system that provides a scientific diagnosis for human-centric audio-video synthesis. Crucially, OHBench introduces metrics that are highly consistent with human perception, filling the gaps in existing benchmarks by providing a comprehensive diagnosis across global scenes, relational interactions, and individual attributes.

</details>


### [107] [EVE: Verifiable Self-Evolution of MLLMs via Executable Visual Transformations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18320)
*Yongrui Heng,Chaoya Jiang,Han Yang,Shikun Zhang,Wei Ye*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: EVE框架通过可执行视觉变换实现MLLM的自我进化，避免伪标签质量退化问题，采用挑战者-求解者双策略架构，利用Python脚本生成动态视觉变换任务，确保答案可验证性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前MLLM自我进化方法存在局限性：基于伪标签的方法会因模型预测漂移导致质量逐步退化，而基于模板的方法局限于静态变换集，无法在难度和多样性上自适应。需要一种不依赖伪标签、能持续多样化训练分布且具有可验证性的自我进化机制。

Method: 提出EVE框架，采用挑战者-求解者双策略架构。挑战者维护并扩展视觉变换代码示例队列，从中合成Python脚本来执行动态视觉变换，生成具有绝对、执行验证的真实答案的VQA问题。多维度奖励系统整合语义多样性和动态难度校准，引导挑战者丰富代码队列并逐步提升任务难度。

Result: 广泛实验表明，EVE在多个基准测试中持续超越现有自我进化方法，建立了稳健且可扩展的可验证MLLM自我进化范式。

Conclusion: EVE通过可执行视觉变换完全绕过伪标签依赖，实现了MLLM的稳健、连续自我改进，为MLLM自我进化提供了新的可验证、可扩展解决方案。

Abstract: Self-evolution of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) remains a critical challenge: pseudo-label-based methods suffer from progressive quality degradation as model predictions drift, while template-based methods are confined to a static set of transformations that cannot adapt in difficulty or diversity. We contend that robust, continuous self-improvement requires not only deterministic external feedback independent of the model's internal certainty, but also a mechanism to perpetually diversify the training distribution. To this end, we introduce EVE (Executable Visual transformation-based self-Evolution), a novel framework that entirely bypasses pseudo-labels by harnessing executable visual transformations continuously enriched in both variety and complexity. EVE adopts a Challenger-Solver dual-policy architecture. The Challenger maintains and progressively expands a queue of visual transformation code examples, from which it synthesizes novel Python scripts to perform dynamic visual transformations. Executing these scripts yields VQA problems with absolute, execution-verified ground-truth answers, eliminating any reliance on model-generated supervision. A multi-dimensional reward system integrating semantic diversity and dynamic difficulty calibration steers the Challenger to enrich its code example queue while posing progressively more challenging tasks, preventing mode collapse and fostering reciprocal co-evolution between the two policies. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EVE consistently surpasses existing self-evolution methods, establishing a robust and scalable paradigm for verifiable MLLM self-evolution. The code is available at https://github.com/0001Henry/EVE .

</details>


### [108] [PLAF: Pixel-wise Language-Aligned Feature Extraction for Efficient 3D Scene Understanding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15770)
*Junjie Wen,Junlin He,Fei Ma,Jinqiang Cui*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: PLAF是一个像素级语言对齐特征提取框架，用于实现准确且高效的开放词汇3D场景理解，通过减少2D和3D语义冗余来优化存储和查询效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有语义表示难以同时满足语言对齐、空间精确和3D可扩展性要求，且密集像素语义传播到3D会导致显著冗余，影响大规模场景的存储和查询效率。

Method: 提出PLAF框架：1）在2D中实现密集准确的语义对齐而不牺牲开放词汇表达能力；2）设计高效的语义存储和查询方案，显著减少2D和3D域的冗余。

Result: 实验结果表明PLAF为准确高效的开放词汇3D场景理解提供了强大的语义基础，代码已开源。

Conclusion: PLAF通过像素级语言对齐特征提取和高效语义存储机制，解决了现有3D场景理解中语义表示的语言对齐性、空间精确性和可扩展性之间的平衡问题。

Abstract: Accurate open-vocabulary 3D scene understanding requires semantic representations that are both language-aligned and spatially precise at the pixel level, while remaining scalable when lifted to 3D space. However, existing representations struggle to jointly satisfy these requirements, and densely propagating pixel-wise semantics to 3D often results in substantial redundancy, leading to inefficient storage and querying in large-scale scenes. To address these challenges, we present \emph{PLAF}, a Pixel-wise Language-Aligned Feature extraction framework that enables dense and accurate semantic alignment in 2D without sacrificing open-vocabulary expressiveness. Building upon this representation, we further design an efficient semantic storage and querying scheme that significantly reduces redundancy across both 2D and 3D domains. Experimental results show that \emph{PLAF} provides a strong semantic foundation for accurate and efficient open-vocabulary 3D scene understanding. The codes are publicly available at https://github.com/RockWenJJ/PLAF.

</details>


### [109] [Denoise and Align: Diffusion-Driven Foreground Knowledge Prompting for Open-Vocabulary Temporal Action Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18313)
*Sa Zhu,Wanqian Zhang,Lin Wang,Jinchao Zhang,Cong Wang,Bo Li*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: DFAlign：首个利用扩散去噪生成前景知识指导动作-视频对齐的开放词汇时序动作检测框架，通过语义统一条件化、背景抑制去噪和前景提示对齐三个模块解决语义不平衡问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有开放词汇时序动作检测方法难以平衡简洁抽象的动作标签与丰富复杂视频内容之间的语义不平衡，导致语义噪声和误导性跨模态对齐。需要有效的方法来缓解动作语义与视频表示之间的语义鸿沟。

Method: 提出DFAlign框架，采用"条件化、去噪、对齐"流程：1) 语义统一条件化模块统一动作共享和动作特定语义作为扩散去噪条件；2) 背景抑制去噪模块通过去噪过程逐步去除视频背景冗余，生成前景知识；3) 前景提示对齐模块将提取的前景知识作为提示令牌注入文本表示，引导模型关注动作相关片段。

Result: 在两个开放词汇时序动作检测基准测试中实现了最先进的性能，证明了该方法的有效性。

Conclusion: DFAlign通过扩散去噪生成的前景知识作为视频和文本表示之间的有效中间语义锚点，缓解了语义鸿沟，增强了动作相关片段的区分性，实现了精确的跨模态对齐。

Abstract: Open-Vocabulary Temporal Action Detection (OV-TAD) aims to localize and classify action segments of unseen categories in untrimmed videos, where effective alignment between action semantics and video representations is critical for accurate detection. However, existing methods struggle to mitigate the semantic imbalance between concise, abstract action labels and rich, complex video contents, inevitably introducing semantic noise and misleading cross-modal alignment. To address this challenge, we propose DFAlign, the first framework that leverages diffusion-based denoising to generate foreground knowledge for the guidance of action-video alignment. Following the 'conditioning, denoising and aligning' manner, we first introduce the Semantic-Unify Conditioning (SUC) module, which unifies action-shared and action-specific semantics as conditions for diffusion denoising. Then, the Background-Suppress Denoising (BSD) module generates foreground knowledge by progressively removing background redundancy from videos through denoising process. This foreground knowledge serves as effective intermediate semantic anchor between video and text representations, mitigating the semantic gap and enhancing the discriminability of action-relevant segments. Furthermore, we introduce the Foreground-Prompt Alignment (FPA) module to inject extracted foreground knowledge as prompt tokens into text representations, guiding model's attention towards action-relevant segments and enabling precise cross-modal alignment. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on two OV-TAD benchmarks. The code repository is provided as follows: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Code-2114/.

</details>


### [110] [Spike-NVPT: Learning Robust Visual Prompts via Bio-Inspired Temporal Filtering and Discretization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18284)
