*Qiugang Zhan,Anning Jiang,Ran Tao,Ao Ma,Xiangyu Zhang,Xiurui Xie,Guisong Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出Spike-NVPT方法，利用脉冲神经元设计信号过滤层和脉冲离散化单元，将连续密集提示转换为稀疏二进制提示，提高预训练视觉模型在噪声环境下的鲁棒性，同时保持推理零计算开销。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于提示调优的方法虽然参数高效，但连续密集的提示容易对输入噪声敏感，高容量提示倾向于过拟合任务无关细节。需要在保持参数效率的同时提高模型对噪声的鲁棒性。

Method: 提出Spike-NVPT方法：1) 基于脉冲神经元的信号过滤层，利用积分发放(IF)机制随时间累积任务相关信号并过滤瞬态噪声波动；2) 脉冲离散化单元将过滤后的信号转换为稀疏二进制提示；3) 二进制提示在部署时保持静态，确保推理零额外计算开销。

Result: 实验结果表明Spike-NVPT在鲁棒性方面表现优异，相比传统方法最大提升11.2%，同时在干净数据集上保持竞争力。这是首次尝试利用脉冲神经元微调传统ANN视觉模型。

Conclusion: Spike-NVPT通过脉冲神经元的信号过滤和二进制离散化，有效解决了提示调优中的噪声敏感性问题，在保持参数效率的同时显著提升了模型鲁棒性，为视觉模型适应提供了新思路。

Abstract: Pre-trained vision models have found widespread application across diverse domains. Prompt tuning-based methods have emerged as a parameter-efficient paradigm for adapting pre-trained vision models. While effective on standard benchmarks, the continuous and dense nature of learned prompts can lead to sensitivity against input noise, as the high-capacity prompts tend to overfit task-irrelevant details. To address this trade-off, we propose Spike-NVPT, a noise-robust visual prompt tuning method. Specifically, we design a Signal Filtering Layer based on spiking neurons, which uses the integrate-and-fire (IF) mechanism to accumulate task-relevant signals over time and filter transient noise fluctuations. A subsequent Spike Discretization Unit converts filtered signals into sparse binary prompts. This discretization acts as a strong regularizer, forcing the model to anchor decision boundaries on the most discriminative and robust features. Notably, the resulting binary prompts remain static during deployment, ensuring zero additional computational overhead during inference. Experimental results demonstrate that Spike-NVPT achieves superior robustness performance, with a maximum improvement of 11.2% over conventional methods, and retains competitive accuracy on clean datasets. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first attempt to leverage spiking neurons for fine-tuning traditional artificial neural network (ANN)-based visual models.

</details>


### [111] [MARCO: Navigating the Unseen Space of Semantic Correspondence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18267)
*Claudia Cuttano,Gabriele Trivigno,Carlo Masone,Stefan Roth*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: MARCO是一个基于DINOv2的统一可泛化对应模型，通过粗到细目标和自蒸馏框架提升细粒度定位和语义泛化能力，在多个基准上达到SOTA，比扩散方法更小更快。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于双编码器架构（DINOv2+扩散主干）的语义对应方法虽然准确，但参数量大（十亿级）且泛化能力有限，仅在训练关键点上表现良好，而实际应用中查询点很少与训练点匹配，存在基准性能与现实可用性之间的差距。

Method: 基于DINOv2构建统一模型MARCO，采用新颖训练框架：1）粗到细目标（coarse-to-fine objective）提升空间精度；2）自蒸馏框架（self-distillation framework）将稀疏监督扩展到标注区域之外，将少量关键点转化为密集、语义一致的对应关系。

Result: 在SPair-71k、AP-10K和PF-PASCAL上达到新SOTA，细粒度定位阈值下提升显著（+8.9 PCK@0.01），对未见关键点（SPair-U +5.1）和未见类别（MP-100 +4.7）泛化能力最强，同时比扩散方法小3倍、快10倍。

Conclusion: MARCO通过创新的训练框架有效解决了现有语义对应方法泛化能力不足的问题，在保持高精度的同时显著提升了模型效率和泛化性能，为实际应用提供了更实用的解决方案。

Abstract: Recent advances in semantic correspondence rely on dual-encoder architectures, combining DINOv2 with diffusion backbones. While accurate, these billion-parameter models generalize poorly beyond training keypoints, revealing a gap between benchmark performance and real-world usability, where queried points rarely match those seen during training. Building upon DINOv2, we introduce MARCO, a unified model for generalizable correspondence driven by a novel training framework that enhances both fine-grained localization and semantic generalization. By coupling a coarse-to-fine objective that refines spatial precision with a self-distillation framework, which expands sparse supervision beyond annotated regions, our approach transforms a handful of keypoints into dense, semantically coherent correspondences. MARCO sets a new state of the art on SPair-71k, AP-10K, and PF-PASCAL, with gains that amplify at fine-grained localization thresholds (+8.9 PCK@0.01), strongest generalization to unseen keypoints (+5.1, SPair-U) and categories (+4.7, MP-100), while remaining 3x smaller and 10x faster than diffusion-based approaches. Code is available at https://github.com/visinf/MARCO .

</details>


### [112] [Geometry-Guided 3D Visual Token Pruning for Video-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18260)
*Han Li,Zehao Huang,Jiahui Fu,Naiyan Wang,Si Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Geo3DPruner：一种几何引导的3D视觉token剪枝框架，通过建模跨帧相关性和两阶段剪枝过程，在保持90%原始性能的同时剪除90%视觉token


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态大语言模型在2D视觉上表现出色，但扩展到3D场景理解时面临挑战。现有方法将3D场景表示为包含深度和相机位姿信息的空间视频，但大量视觉token成为高效推理和上下文管理的主要瓶颈。现有剪枝方法忽略了空间视频的视图一致性和剩余token的空间多样性，无法有效去除帧间冗余并保持场景完整性。

Method: 提出Geo3DPruner框架：1）通过几何感知的全局注意力建模跨帧相关性；2）两阶段剪枝过程：体素内阶段选择每个体素内的代表性多视图特征，体素间阶段通过选择全局分布的体素子集来保持空间多样性。

Result: 在多个3D场景理解基准测试上的广泛实验表明，Geo3DPruner在剪除90%视觉token的同时保留了超过90%的原始性能，显著优于现有的文本引导和视觉引导剪枝方法。

Conclusion: Geo3DPruner通过几何引导的剪枝策略有效解决了3D空间视频中视觉token过多的问题，在保持高性能的同时大幅提升了推理效率，为3D场景理解任务提供了高效的视觉token管理方案。

Abstract: Multimodal large language models have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in 2D vision, motivating their extension to 3D scene understanding. Recent studies represent 3D scenes as 3D spatial videos composed of image sequences with depth and camera pose information, enabling pre-trained video-language models to perform 3D reasoning tasks. However, the large number of visual tokens in spatial videos remains a major bottleneck for efficient inference and context management. Existing pruning methods overlook the view consistency of spatial videos and the spatial diversity of the remaining tokens, which prevents them from effectively removing inter-frame redundancy and preserving scene completeness. In this paper, we propose Geo3DPruner, a Geometry-Guided 3D Visual Token Pruning framework. Geo3DPruner first models cross-frame relevance through geometry-aware global attention, and then performs a two-stage pruning process. The intra-voxel stage selects representative multi-view features within each voxel, while the inter-voxel stage preserves spatial diversity by selecting a globally distributed subset of voxels. Extensive experiments on multiple 3D scene understanding benchmarks demonstrate that Geo3DPruner retains over 90% of the original performance while pruning 90% of visual tokens, significantly outperforming existing text-guided and vision-guided pruning methods.

</details>


### [113] [Medical Image Understanding Improves Survival Prediction via Visual Instruction Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18250)
*Xixi Liu,Jorge Lazo,Andreas Hallqvist,Mikael Johansson,Åse Johnsson,Jonas S Andersson,Ella Äng Eklund,Patrik Sund,Nasser Hosseini,Jennifer Alvén,Ida Häggström*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出基于视觉语言框架的3D CT图像理解方法，通过视觉指令调优学习临床意义的视觉-文本表示，并用于下游生存预测任务，优于基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 准确的预后和风险评估对临床决策至关重要。虽然CT扫描的放射科医生评估特征能提供有价值的疾病严重程度和预后指标，但图像解读需要专业知识，且将丰富的视觉信息转化为文本摘要不可避免地导致信息丢失。

Method: 提出一个用于3D CT图像理解的视觉语言框架，利用大规模开源CT图像与放射学报告配对，通过视觉指令调优进行预训练。该方法学习临床意义的视觉-文本表示，然后通过添加生存预测头适应下游生存预测任务，同时能生成对预定义问题的临床意义语言响应。

Result: 实验结果表明，该方法在生存预测方面优于基线方法，特别是在仅使用临床数据预测能力较弱的情况下表现更佳。代码将在接受后发布。

Conclusion: 提出的视觉语言框架通过结合CT图像和临床数据，不仅提高了生存预测性能，还能生成临床意义的语言响应，为临床决策提供了更全面的支持。

Abstract: Accurate prognostication and risk estimation are essential for guiding clinical decision-making and optimizing patient management. While radiologist-assessed features from CT scans provide valuable indicators of disease severity and outcomes, interpreting such images requires expert knowledge, and translating rich visual information into textual summaries inevitably leads to information loss. In this work, we propose a vision-language framework for 3D CT image understanding that leverages large-scale open-sourced CT images paired with radiology reports through visual instruction tuning. This pre-training enables the model to learn clinically meaningful visual-textual representations, which can then be adapted to downstream survival prediction tasks. By incorporating a survival prediction head on top of the pre-trained model, our approach improves survival prediction from CT images and clinical data while generating clinically meaningful language responses to predefined questions. Experimental results demonstrate that our method outperforms baseline methods in survival prediction, particularly, when clinical data alone is less predictive. The code will be released upon acceptance.

</details>


### [114] [Is SAM3 ready for pathology segmentation?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18225)
*Qiuyu Kong,Shakiba Sharifi,Zanxi Ruan,Yiming Wang,Marco Cristani*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SAM3在病理图像分割中的能力评估：通过系统评估协议发现，SAM3在病理图像分割中存在局限性，特别是文本提示对细胞核概念激活效果差，性能对视觉提示类型和数量敏感，与任务特定适配器相比存在显著差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 数字病理分割在组织水平和细胞核水平尺度上存在传统方法标注成本高、泛化能力差的问题。SAM3引入了可提示概念分割，可能通过文本提示提供自动化接口。本研究旨在系统评估SAM3在病理图像分割中的能力边界。

Method: 提出系统评估协议，在不同监督设置下评估SAM3：零样本、少样本和监督学习，使用不同的提示策略。在NuInsSeg、PanNuke和GlaS等病理数据集上进行广泛评估。

Result: 1. 仅文本提示对细胞核概念激活效果差；2. 性能对视觉提示类型和数量高度敏感；3. 少样本学习能带来提升，但SAM3对视觉提示噪声缺乏鲁棒性；4. 基于提示的使用方式与任务训练的适配器参考方法之间存在显著差距。

Conclusion: 研究界定了SAM3在病理图像分割中的能力边界，为病理领域适应的必要性提供了实用指导。SAM3在病理图像分割中仍存在局限性，需要领域特定的适应才能达到最佳性能。

Abstract: Is Segment Anything Model 3 (SAM3) capable in segmenting Any Pathology Images? Digital pathology segmentation spans tissue-level and nuclei-level scales, where traditional methods often suffer from high annotation costs and poor generalization. SAM3 introduces Promptable Concept Segmentation, offering a potential automated interface via text prompts. With this work, we propose a systematic evaluation protocol to explore the capability space of SAM3 in a structured manner. Specifically, we evaluate SAM3 under different supervision settings including zero-shot, few-shot, and supervised with varying prompting strategies. Our extensive evaluation on pathological datasets including NuInsSeg, PanNuke and GlaS, reveals that: 1.text-only prompts poorly activate nuclear concepts. 2.performance is highly sensitive to visual prompt types and budgets. 3.few-shot learning offers gains, but SAM3 lacks robustness against visual prompt noise. and 4.a significant gap persists between prompt-based usage and task-trained adapter-based reference. Our study delineates SAM3's boundaries in pathology image segmentation and provides practical guidance on the necessity of pathology domain adaptation.

</details>


### [115] [Instruction-as-State: Environment-Guided and State-Conditioned Semantic Understanding for Embodied Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18223)
*Zhen Liu,Yuhan Liu,Jinjun Wang,Jianyi Liu,Wei Song,Jingwen Fu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出S-EGIU框架，将指令理解建模为随感知状态演化的状态变量，通过粗粒度段激活和细粒度语义精化实现动态指令-感知纠缠，提升视觉语言导航性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉语言导航模型通常将指令编码为静态全局表示，无法适应指令含义随视觉上下文变化的动态特性。指令与观察之间的动态纠缠是核心挑战，需要建模指令理解随感知状态演化的过程。

Method: 提出State-Entangled Environment-Guided Instruction Understanding (S-EGIU)框架，将指令建模为Instruction-as-State变量。采用粗到细的两阶段方法：粗粒度阶段激活与当前观察语义对齐的指令段；细粒度阶段通过观察引导的token grounding和上下文建模精化激活段语义，保持指令状态随感知状态持续更新。

Result: S-EGIU在多个VLN基准测试中表现优异，在REVERIE Test Unseen上获得+2.68% SPL增益，并在多个指标上展示一致效率提升，验证了动态指令-感知纠缠的价值。

Conclusion: 将指令理解建模为随感知状态演化的状态变量是有效的，S-EGIU框架通过动态指令-感知纠缠显著提升了视觉语言导航性能，证明了适应视觉上下文变化的指令理解的重要性。

Abstract: Vision-and-Language Navigation requires agents to follow natural-language instructions in visually changing environments. A central challenge is the dynamic entanglement between language and observations: the meaning of instruction shifts as the agent's field of view and spatial context evolve. However, many existing models encode the instruction as a static global representation, limiting their ability to adapt instruction meaning to the current visual context. We therefore model instruction understanding as an Instruction-as-State variable: a decision-relevant, token-level instruction state that evolves step by step conditioned on the agent's perceptual state, where the perceptual state denotes the observation-grounded navigation context at each step. To realize this principle, we introduce State-Entangled Environment-Guided Instruction Understanding (S-EGIU), a coarse-to-fine framework for state-conditioned segment activation and token-level semantic refinement. At the coarse level, S-EGIU activates the instruction segment whose semantics align with the current observation. At the fine level, it refines the activated segment through observation-guided token grounding and contextual modeling, sharpening its internal semantics under the current observation. Together, these stages maintain an instruction state that is continuously updated according to the agent's perceptual state during navigation. S-EGIU delivers strong performance on several key metrics, including a +2.68% SPL gain on REVERIE Test Unseen, and demonstrates consistent efficiency gains across multiple VLN benchmarks, underscoring the value of dynamic instruction--perception entanglement.

</details>


### [116] [Memorize When Needed: Decoupled Memory Control for Spatially Consistent Long-Horizon Video Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18215)
*Yanjun Guo,Zhengqiang Zhang,Pengfei Wang,Xinyue Liang,Zhiyuan Ma,Lei Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出解耦框架分离记忆条件与生成，通过轻量级独立记忆分支学习空间一致性，使用混合记忆表示和逐帧交叉注意力机制，结合相机感知门控机制，在减少训练成本的同时提升空间一致性和新场景生成能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法将记忆建模与视频生成耦合，导致场景重访时内容不一致，探索新区域时生成能力下降，即使使用大量标注数据训练也存在这些问题。

Method: 提出解耦框架：1) 轻量级独立记忆分支学习历史观测的空间一致性；2) 混合记忆表示捕获生成帧的时空线索；3) 逐帧交叉注意力机制确保每帧仅基于最相关的历史信息；4) 相机感知门控机制调节记忆与生成模块的交互。

Result: 方法具有高度数据效率，在视觉质量和空间一致性方面达到最先进性能，相比现有方法显著减少训练成本。

Conclusion: 解耦记忆条件与生成的方法能有效解决空间一致性问题，同时保持新场景探索的生成能力，为长时程视频生成提供了高效且性能优越的解决方案。

Abstract: Spatially consistent long-horizon video generation aims to maintain temporal and spatial consistency along predefined camera trajectories. Existing methods mostly entangle memory modeling with video generation, leading to inconsistent content during scene revisits and diminished generative capacity when exploring novel regions, even trained on extensive annotated data. To address these limitations, we propose a decoupled framework that separates memory conditioning from generation. Our approach significantly reduces training costs while simultaneously enhancing spatial consistency and preserving the generative capacity for novel scene exploration. Specifically, we employ a lightweight, independent memory branch to learn precise spatial consistency from historical observation. We first introduce a hybrid memory representation to capture complementary temporal and spatial cues from generated frames, then leverage a per-frame cross-attention mechanism to ensure each frame is conditioned exclusively on the most spatially relevant historical information, which is injected into the generative model to ensure spatial consistency. When generating new scenes, a camera-aware gating mechanism is proposed to mediate the interaction between memory and generation modules, enabling memory conditioning only when meaningful historical references exist. Compared with the existing method, our method is highly data-efficient, yet the experiments demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance in terms of both visual quality and spatial consistency.

</details>


### [117] [R3D: Revisiting 3D Policy Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15281)
*Zhengdong Hong,Shenrui Wu,Haozhe Cui,Boyi Zhao,Ran Ji,Yiyang He,Hangxing Zhang,Zundong Ke,Jun Wang,Guofeng Zhang,Jiayuan Gu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出R3D-Policy：通过解决3D策略学习中的训练不稳定和过拟合问题，结合可扩展的Transformer 3D编码器和扩散解码器，在操纵基准上显著超越现有方法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 3D策略学习虽然具有优越的泛化能力和跨具身迁移潜力，但一直受到训练不稳定性和严重过拟合问题的困扰，阻碍了采用强大的3D感知模型

Method: 系统诊断失败原因，识别出缺少3D数据增强和批归一化的负面影响；提出新架构，将可扩展的Transformer 3D编码器与扩散解码器耦合，专门为大规模稳定性设计，能够利用大规模预训练

Result: 在具有挑战性的操纵基准上显著优于最先进的3D基线方法，为可扩展的3D模仿学习建立了新的稳健基础

Conclusion: R3D-Policy通过解决3D策略学习的关键技术障碍，为可扩展的3D模仿学习提供了新的稳健框架，实现了显著的性能提升

Abstract: 3D policy learning promises superior generalization and cross-embodiment transfer, but progress has been hindered by training instabilities and severe overfitting, precluding the adoption of powerful 3D perception models. In this work, we systematically diagnose these failures, identifying the omission of 3D data augmentation and the adverse effects of Batch Normalization as primary causes. We propose a new architecture coupling a scalable transformer-based 3D encoder with a diffusion decoder, engineered specifically for stability at scale and designed to leverage large-scale pre-training. Our approach significantly outperforms state-of-the-art 3D baselines on challenging manipulation benchmarks, establishing a new and robust foundation for scalable 3D imitation learning. Project Page: https://r3d-policy.github.io/

</details>


### [118] [DiffuSAM: Diffusion Guided Zero-Shot Object Grounding for Remote Sensing Imagery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18201)
*Geet Sethi,Panav Shah,Ashutosh Gandhe,Soumitra Darshan Nayak*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出一种结合扩散模型与分割模型的混合管道，用于遥感图像中的目标定位，相比现有方法在Acc@0.5指标上提升超过14%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索扩散模型在遥感图像目标定位中的潜力，利用扩散模型的生成能力与分割模型的精确性相结合，解决复杂场景下的目标定位问题。

Method: 提出混合管道，集成基于扩散的定位线索与最先进的分割模型（如RemoteSAM和SAM3），利用扩散模型的生成能力提供定位线索，再通过分割模型获得更精确的边界框。

Result: 实验表明该管道显著提升了定位性能，在Acc@0.5指标上相比现有最先进方法提高了超过14%。

Conclusion: 扩散模型与分割模型的结合为遥感图像目标定位提供了有效解决方案，证明了生成模型与基础模型互补优势的潜力。

Abstract: Diffusion models have emerged as powerful tools for a wide range of vision tasks, including text-guided image generation and editing. In this work, we explore their potential for object grounding in remote sensing imagery. We propose a hybrid pipeline that integrates diffusion-based localization cues with state-of-the-art segmentation models such as RemoteSAM and SAM3 to obtain more accurate bounding boxes. By leveraging the complementary strengths of generative diffusion models and foundational segmentation models, our approach enables robust and adaptive object localization across complex scenes. Experiments demonstrate that our pipeline significantly improves localization performance, achieving over a 14% increase in Acc@0.5 compared to existing state-of-the-art methods.

</details>


### [119] [Extending One-Step Image Generation from Class Labels to Text via Discriminative Text Representation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18168)
*Chenxi Zhao,Chen Zhu,Xiaokun Feng,Aiming Hao,Jiashu Zhu,Jiachen Lei,Jiahong Wu,Xiangxiang Chu,Jufeng Yang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出EMF方法，首次将MeanFlow从类条件生成扩展到文本条件生成。研究发现，由于MeanFlow仅有极少的细化步骤（如一步），文本特征需要足够高的可区分性。通过引入具备所需语义属性的LLM文本编码器并适配MeanFlow生成过程，实现了高效的文本条件合成，并在扩散模型上验证了显著性能提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MeanFlow研究主要聚焦于类到图像生成（固定类标签），尚未探索更灵活的文本条件输入以支持更丰富的内容生成。文本条件相比有限类标签对模型理解能力提出更大挑战，需要有效集成强大的文本编码器到MeanFlow框架中。

Method: 首先分析发现MeanFlow极少的细化步骤（如一步）要求文本特征表示具有足够高的可区分性，解释了离散类特征表现好的原因。基于此洞察，选择经验证具备所需语义属性的强大LLM文本编码器，并适配MeanFlow生成过程，首次实现高效的文本条件合成。

Result: 在广泛使用的扩散模型上验证了所提方法，展示了显著的生成性能提升。

Conclusion: 本文为未来文本条件MeanFlow生成研究提供了通用且实用的参考，代码已开源。

Abstract: Few-step generation has been a long-standing goal, with recent one-step generation methods exemplified by MeanFlow achieving remarkable results. Existing research on MeanFlow primarily focuses on class-to-image generation. However, an intuitive yet unexplored direction is to extend the condition from fixed class labels to flexible text inputs, enabling richer content creation. Compared to the limited class labels, text conditions pose greater challenges to the model's understanding capability, necessitating the effective integration of powerful text encoders into the MeanFlow framework. Surprisingly, although incorporating text conditions appears straightforward, we find that integrating powerful LLM-based text encoders using conventional training strategies results in unsatisfactory performance. To uncover the underlying cause, we conduct detailed analyses and reveal that, due to the extremely limited number of refinement steps in the MeanFlow generation, such as only one step, the text feature representations are required to possess sufficiently high discriminability. This also explains why discrete and easily distinguishable class features perform well within the MeanFlow framework. Guided by these insights, we leverage a powerful LLM-based text encoder validated to possess the required semantic properties and adapt the MeanFlow generation process to this framework, resulting in efficient text-conditioned synthesis for the first time. Furthermore, we validate our approach on the widely used diffusion model, demonstrating significant generation performance improvements. We hope this work provides a general and practical reference for future research on text-conditioned MeanFlow generation. The code is available at https://github.com/AMAP-ML/EMF.

</details>


### [120] [Embedding Arithmetic: A Lightweight, Tuning-Free Framework for Post-hoc Bias Mitigation in Text-to-Image Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18167)
*Venkatesh Thirugnana Sambandham,Torsten Schön*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种推理时社会偏见缓解方法，通过嵌入空间几何分析修正偏见，无需调整模型权重或数据集，并引入概念连贯性评分(CCS)评估语义保留，在FLUX和SD3.5上有效平衡公平性与语义连贯性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代T2I模型放大了有害的社会偏见，挑战其伦理部署，现有方法难以在保持提示语义和视觉上下文完整的同时可靠地缓解偏见。

Method: 基于嵌入算术(Embedding Arithmetic)分析偏见在嵌入空间中的结构，通过推理时修正偏见方向，提供可调参数控制缓解强度，并提出概念连贯性评分(CCS)替代CLIP分数评估语义保留。

Result: 在FLUX 1.0-Dev和SD3.5-Large上，该方法在提高生成多样性方面显著优于现有基线，同时保持高概念连贯性，有效解决了公平性-连贯性权衡问题。

Conclusion: 条件嵌入空间是复杂纠缠的流形而非解耦概念网格，通过几何理解潜在空间可为更透明、可控、公平的图像生成提供原则性路径。

Abstract: Modern text-to-image (T2I) models amplify harmful societal biases, challenging their ethical deployment. We introduce an inference-time method that reliably mitigates social bias while keeping prompt semantics and visual context (background, layout, and style) intact. This ensures context persistency and provides a controllable parameter to adjust mitigation strength, giving practitioners fine-grained control over fairness-coherence trade-offs. Using Embedding Arithmetic, we analyze how bias is structured in the embedding space and correct it without altering model weights, prompts, or datasets. Experiments on FLUX 1.0-Dev and Stable Diffusion 3.5-Large show that the conditional embedding space forms a complex, entangled manifold rather than a grid of disentangled concepts. To rigorously assess semantic preservation beyond the circularity and bias limitations of of CLIP scores, we propose the Concept Coherence Score (CCS). Evaluated against this robust metric, our lightweight, tuning-free method significantly outperforms existing baselines in improving diversity while maintaining high concept coherence, effectively resolving the critical fairness-coherence trade-off. By characterizing how models represent social concepts, we establish geometric understanding of latent space as a principled path toward more transparent, controllable, and fair image generation.

</details>


### [121] [AI-based Waste Mapping for Addressing Climate-Exacerbated Flood Risk](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18151)
*Steffen Knoblauch,Levi Szamek,Iddy Chazua,Benedcto Adamu,Innocent Maholi,Alexander Zipf*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本研究提出了一种基于AI的城市垃圾测绘工作流程，利用公开的航拍和街景图像，在坦桑尼亚达累斯萨拉姆实现高分辨率固体废弃物检测。研究发现水道中的垃圾堆积量是邻近城区的三倍，揭示了与气候变化加剧的洪水相关的关键热点，为城市规划和气候适应提供了可操作的见解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 非洲快速扩张的城市中，城市洪水因气候变化日益严重，而垃圾管理不善导致排水系统堵塞进一步放大了洪水风险。传统人工测绘方法无法实现城市规模的监测，因此需要一种可扩展的自动化解决方案。

Method: 利用公开的航拍和街景图像，结合AI模型进行高分辨率固体废弃物检测；通过与当地合作伙伴协作确保数据标注的文化和情境相关性，反映实际的废物再利用实践。

Result: 揭示了与贫民窟和社会经济因素相关的空间垃圾模式；水道中的垃圾堆积量是邻近城区的三倍，识别出气候加剧洪水风险的关键热点区域。

Conclusion: 这种可扩展的AI方法能够实现城市范围的垃圾监测和干预优先级排序，为洪水易发城市地区的城市规划、气候适应和可持续垃圾管理提供可操作的见解。

Abstract: Urban flooding is a growing climate change-related hazard in rapidly expanding African cities, where inadequate waste management often blocks drainage systems and amplifies flood risks. This study introduces an AI-powered urban waste mapping workflow that leverages openly available aerial and street-view imagery to detect municipal solid waste at high resolution. Applied in Dar es Salaam, Tanzania, our approach reveals spatial waste patterns linked to informal settlements and socio-economic factors. Waste accumulation in waterways was found to be up to three times higher than in adjacent urban areas, highlighting critical hotspots for climate-exacerbated flooding. Unlike traditional manual mapping methods, this scalable AI approach allows city-wide monitoring and prioritization of interventions. Crucially, our collaboration with local partners ensured culturally and contextually relevant data labeling, reflecting real-world reuse practices for solid waste. The results offer actionable insights for urban planning, climate adaptation, and sustainable waste management in flood-prone urban areas.

</details>


### [122] [Attention-ResUNet for Automated Fetal Head Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18148)
*Ammar Bhilwarawala,Mainak Bandyopadhyay*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出Attention-ResUNet，一种结合残差学习与多尺度注意力机制的新型架构，用于胎儿头部超声图像分割。在HC18数据集上，该方法以99.30%的Dice分数超越五种基线模型，并通过显著性图分析证明了其可解释性，实现了新的SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度学习方法在处理超声图像的低对比度、噪声和复杂解剖边界时表现不佳，亟需一种能同时提升分割精度和模型可解释性的方法，以满足产前护理中胎儿头部精准测量的临床需求。

Method: 提出Attention-ResUNet架构，在解码器的四个层级集成注意力门控机制以聚焦解剖相关区域并抑制背景噪声，同时结合残差连接以促进梯度流动和特征复用。

Result: 在HC18 Challenge数据集（n=200）上，Attention-ResUNet达到99.30±0.14%的平均Dice分数，显著优于ResUNet（99.26%）、Attention U-Net（98.79%）、Swin U-Net（98.60%）、U-Net（98.58%）和U-Net++（97.46%），统计显著性p<0.001，效应量Cohen's d范围为0.230至13.159。

Conclusion: Attention-ResUNet建立了胎儿头部自动分割的新SOTA，同时保持了计算效率（14.7M参数，45 GFLOPs），并通过显著性图分析展示了高度集中且解剖一致的可解释性激活模式，适合临床部署。

Abstract: Automated fetal head segmentation in ultrasound images is critical for accurate biometric measurements in prenatal care. While existing deep learning approaches have achieved a reasonable performance, they struggle with issues like low contrast, noise, and complex anatomical boundaries which are inherent to ultrasound imaging. This paper presents Attention-ResUNet. It is a novel architecture that synergistically combines residual learning with multi-scale attention mechanisms in order to achieve enhanced fetal head segmentation. Our approach integrates attention gates at four decoder levels to focus selectively on anatomically relevant regions while suppressing the background noise, and complemented by residual connections which facilitates gradient flow and feature reuse. Extensive evaluation on the HC18 Challenge dataset where n = 200 demonstrates that Attention ResUNet achieves a superior performance with a mean Dice score of 99.30 +/- 0.14% against similar architectures. It significantly outperforms five baseline architectures including ResUNet (99.26%), Attention U-Net (98.79%), Swin U-Net (98.60%), Standard U-Net (98.58%), and U-Net++ (97.46%). Through statistical analysis we confirm highly significant improvements (p < 0.001) with effect sizes that range from 0.230 to 13.159 (Cohen's d). Using Saliency map analysis, we reveal that our architecture produces highly concentrated, anatomically consistent activation patterns, which demonstrate an enhanced interpretability which is crucial for clinical deployment. The proposed method establishes a new state of the art performance for automated fetal head segmentation whilst maintaining computational efficiency with 14.7M parameters and a 45 GFLOPs inference cost. Code repository: https://github.com/Ammar-ss

</details>


### [123] [Region-Grounded Report Generation for 3D Medical Imaging: A Fine-Grained Dataset and Graph-Enhanced Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18145)
*Cong Huy Nguyen,Son Dinh Nguyen,Guanlin Li,Tuan Dung Nguyen,Aditya Narayan Sankaran,Mai Huy Thong,Thanh Trung Nguyen,Mai Hong Son,Reza Farahbakhsh,Phi Le Nguyen,Noel Crespi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了VietPET-RoI，首个针对低资源语言的带有细粒度RoI标注的大规模3D PET/CT数据集（600个样本，1,960个RoI），并设计了HiRRA框架，通过图关系模块模拟放射科医生的局部诊断流程，在报告生成任务上相比现有模型BLEU提升19.7%，ROUGE-L提升4.7%，临床指标提升45.8%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3D PET/CT自动报告生成方法存在两大问题：1）体数据高维且标注稀缺，尤其低资源语言场景；2）现有黑盒方法将整体体积直接映射到报告，忽略了临床实践中医生分析局部感兴趣区域（RoI）的诊断流程。本文旨在通过构建细粒度RoI标注数据集和模拟临床诊断流程的框架来填补这一空白。

Method: 1）构建VietPET-RoI数据集：包含600个3D PET/CT样本和1,960个手动标注的RoI，配有对应临床报告，面向低资源语言；2）提出HiRRA框架：采用基于图的 relational modules 捕获RoI属性之间的依赖关系，模拟放射科医生从局部RoI分析到诊断结论的工作流；3）引入新的临床评估指标：RoI Coverage和RoI Quality Index，利用LLM提取评估RoI定位准确性和属性描述保真度。

Result: HiRRA框架在多个指标上达到SOTA：BLEU提升19.7%，ROUGE-L提升4.7%，临床指标提升45.8%，表明模型具有更高的临床可靠性和更低的幻觉率。

Conclusion: 通过细粒度RoI标注数据集和模拟临床诊断流程的图关系框架，本文显著提升了低资源语言场景下3D PET/CT报告生成的性能与临床可靠性，验证了从全局模式匹配向局部临床发现转变的有效性。

Abstract: Automated medical report generation for 3D PET/CT imaging is fundamentally challenged by the high-dimensional nature of volumetric data and a critical scarcity of annotated datasets, particularly for low-resource languages. Current black-box methods map whole volumes to reports, ignoring the clinical workflow of analyzing localized Regions of Interest (RoIs) to derive diagnostic conclusions. In this paper, we bridge this gap by introducing VietPET-RoI, the first large-scale 3D PET/CT dataset with fine-grained RoI annotation for a low-resource language, comprising 600 PET/CT samples and 1,960 manually annotated RoIs, paired with corresponding clinical reports. Furthermore, to demonstrate the utility of this dataset, we propose HiRRA, a novel framework that mimics the professional radiologist diagnostic workflow by employing graph-based relational modules to capture dependencies between RoI attributes. This approach shifts from global pattern matching toward localized clinical findings. Additionally, we introduce new clinical evaluation metrics, namely RoI Coverage and RoI Quality Index, that measure both RoI localization accuracy and attribute description fidelity using LLM-based extraction. Extensive evaluation demonstrates that our framework achieves SOTA performance, surpassing existing models by 19.7% in BLEU and 4.7% in ROUGE-L, while achieving a remarkable 45.8% improvement in clinical metrics, indicating enhanced clinical reliability and reduced hallucination. Our code and dataset are available on GitHub.

</details>


### [124] [Can LLM-Generated Text Empower Surgical Vision-Language Pre-training?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18134)
*Chengan Che,Chao Wang,Jiayuan Huang,Xinyue Chen,Luis C. Garcia-Peraza-Herrera*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: LIME是一个利用LLM自动生成文本的大规模手术视频多模态数据集，SurgLIME是一个参数高效的视觉-语言预训练框架，通过LoRA双编码器和置信度估计机制，在噪声叙事下学习可靠的跨模态对齐，在AutoLaparo和Cholec80基准上取得竞争性零样本对齐性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 专家文本标注成本高昂，严重限制了将手术视觉编码器扩展到多模态推理任务的可扩展性。

Method: 提出LIME数据集（LLM自动生成叙述文本），以及SurgLIME框架：LoRA适配的双编码器架构保留医学先验知识，自动置信度估计机制在对比对齐中动态降低不确定文本的权重。

Result: 在AutoLaparo和Cholec80基准上，SurgLIME实现了具有竞争力的零样本跨模态对齐性能，同时保持了视觉基础模型的线性探测性能。

Conclusion: 通过LLM生成文本和鲁棒的噪声对齐框架，可以低成本、可扩展地实现手术多模态视觉-语言预训练，避免先验知识退化。

Abstract: Recent advancements in self-supervised learning have led to powerful surgical vision encoders capable of spatiotemporal understanding. However, extending these visual foundations to multi-modal reasoning tasks is severely bottlenecked by the prohibitive cost of expert textual annotations. To overcome this scalability limitation, we introduce \textbf{LIME}, a large-scale multi-modal dataset derived from open-access surgical videos using human-free, Large Language Model (LLM)-generated narratives. While LIME offers immense scalability, unverified generated texts may contain errors, including hallucinations, that could potentially lead to catastrophically degraded pre-trained medical priors in standard contrastive pipelines. To mitigate this, we propose \textbf{SurgLIME}, a parameter-efficient Vision-Language Pre-training (VLP) framework designed to learn reliable cross-modal alignments using noisy narratives. SurgLIME preserves foundational medical priors using a LoRA-adapted dual-encoder architecture and introduces an automated confidence estimation mechanism that dynamically down-weights uncertain text during contrastive alignment. Evaluations on the AutoLaparo and Cholec80 benchmarks show that SurgLIME achieves competitive zero-shot cross-modal alignment while preserving the robust linear probing performance of the visual foundation model. Dataset, code, and models are publicly available at \href{https://github.com/visurg-ai/SurgLIME}{https://github.com/visurg-ai/SurgLIME}.

</details>


### [125] [Decision-Aware Attention Propagation for Vision Transformer Explainability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18094)
*Sehyeong Jo,Gangjae Jang,Haesol Park*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出决策感知注意力传播（DAP）方法，通过将梯度定位的决策相关信息注入注意力传播过程，生成更具类别敏感性、紧凑性和忠实性的归因图，在多种ViT模型上优于现有基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于注意力的解释方法依赖原始注意力权重，缺乏类判别性；梯度方法虽能突出类别证据，但未充分利用Transformer的层级注意力传播机制。两者优势未能结合。

Method: DAP通过梯度定位估计token重要性作为决策先验，将其集成到逐层注意力滚动的传播过程中，同时捕获注意力的结构流和与最终预测最相关的证据。

Result: 在多种尺度的ViT变体上，DAP在定量指标和定性可视化上均一致优于现有基线方法。

Conclusion: 决策感知传播是提升ViT可解释性的有效方向，能生成类别更敏感、更紧凑且更忠实的归因图。

Abstract: Vision Transformers (ViTs) have become a dominant architecture in computer vision, yet their prediction process remains difficult to interpret because information is propagated through complex interactions across layers and attention heads. Existing attention based explanation methods provide an intuitive way to trace information flow. However, they rely mainly on raw attention weights, which do not explicitly reflect the final decision and often lead to explanations with limited class discriminability. In contrast, gradient based localization methods are more effective at highlighting class specific evidence, but they do not fully exploit the hierarchical attention propagation mechanism of transformers. To address this limitation, we propose Decision-Aware Attention Propagation (DAP), an attribution method that injects decision-relevant priors into transformer attention propagation. By estimating token importance through gradient based localization and integrating it into layer wise attention rollout, the method captures both the structural flow of attention and the evidence most relevant to the final prediction. Consequently, DAP produces attribution maps that are more class sensitive, compact, and faithful than those generated by conventional attention based methods. Extensive experiments across Vision Transformer variants of different model scales show that DAP consistently outperforms existing baselines in both quantitative metrics and qualitative visualizations, indicating that decision aware propagation is an effective direction for improving ViT interpretability.

</details>


### [126] [Autonomous Unmanned Aircraft Systems for Enhanced Search and Rescue of Drowning Swimmers: Image-Based Localization and Mission Simulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18088)
*Sascha Emanuel Zell,Toni Schneidereit,Armin Fügenschuh,Michael Breuß*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于无人机盒系统（drone-in-a-box）的溺水救援方案，利用YOLOv3/5/8进行目标检测，并通过离散事件仿真评估响应时间。在德国卢萨蒂亚湖区实验中，该系统相比传统救援可将响应时间缩短五倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 溺水救援面临时间压力大、水域面积广、目标定位难、救援人员运输不便等挑战，传统标准救援操作（SRO）响应时间较长，亟需技术创新来缩短救援响应时间。

Method: 提出无人机盒系统（UAS），在游泳区附近部署专用机库中的无人机编队；采用YOLOv3/5/8目标检测架构自动定位溺水者；构建专用数据集并进行训练；设计两种离散事件仿真（DES）方法模拟SRO和UAS的响应时间，以优化UAS配置（类型、数量、位置）。

Result: 在德国卢萨蒂亚湖区的实验中，即使是最小配置（2个机库各含1架无人机）的UAS，相比SRO也能将响应时间缩短五倍。

Conclusion: 无人机辅助救援系统能显著缩短溺水救援响应时间，具有实际部署价值；不同UAS配置可通过离散事件仿真进行优化选择。

Abstract: Drowning is an omnipresent risk associated with any activity on or in the water, and rescuing a drowning person is particularly challenging because of the time pressure, making a short response time important. Further complicating water rescue are unsupervised and extensive swimming areas, precise localization of the target, and the transport of rescue personnel. Technical innovations can provide a remedy: We propose an Unmanned Aircraft System (UAS), also known as a drone-in-a-box system, consisting of a fleet of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) allocated to purpose-built hangars near swimming areas. In an emergency, the UAS can be deployed in addition to Standard Rescue Operation (SRO) equipment to locate the distressed person early by performing a fully automated Search and Rescue (S&R) operation and dropping a flotation device. In this paper, we address automatically locating distressed swimmers using the image-based object detection architecture You Only Look Once (YOLO). We present a dataset created for this application and outline the training process. We evaluate the performance of YOLO versions 3, 5, and 8 and architecture sizes (nano, extra-large) using Mean Average Precision (mAP) metrics mAP@.5 and mAP@.5:.95. Furthermore, we present two Discrete-Event Simulation (DES) approaches to simulate response times of SRO and UAS-based water rescue. This enables estimation of time savings relative to SRO when selecting the UAS configuration (type, number, and location of UAVs and hangars). Computational experiments for a test area in the Lusatian Lake District, Germany, show that UAS assistance shortens response time. Even a small UAS with two hangars, each containing one UAV, reduces response time by a factor of five compared to SRO.

</details>


### [127] [Class-specific diffusion models improve military object detection in a low-data domain](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18076)
*Ella P. Fokkinga,Jan Erik van Woerden,Thijs A. Eker,Sebastiaan P. Snel,Elfi I. S. Hofmeijer,Klamer Schutte,Friso G. Heslinga*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文研究了利用FLUX.1扩散模型生成合成图像来提升军事车辆目标检测性能，在仅有8或24张真实图像的低数据条件下，通过LoRA微调生成类特定扩散模型，并结合ControlNet结构引导，实现了最高+8.0% mAP50的检测性能提升，证明了生成式图像数据可替代传统仿真管线用于军事AI系统训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索扩散模型生成的合成图像能否在低数据条件下改善军事车辆目标检测性能，寻找传统仿真管线的替代方案。

Method: 使用LoRA对FLUX.1扩散模型进行微调（每类仅8或24张真实图像），生成类特定扩散模型并自动生成文本提示合成图像；同时用相同真实图像微调RF-DETR检测器，再用合成数据进一步提升检测性能；此外引入ControlNet+Canny边缘图实现结构引导生成，控制视点和姿态。

Result: FLUX生成图像在8样本低数据条件下提升检测性能最高达+8.0% mAP50；结构引导（FLUX-CN）在8样本时额外提升+4.1% mAP50，但在24样本时无额外收益。

Conclusion: 对象特定扩散模型能有效改善低数据条件下的军事目标检测；结构引导在数据极度稀缺时最有益；生成式图像数据可作为军事AI系统训练中传统仿真管线的替代方案。

Abstract: Diffusion-based image synthesis has emerged as a promising source of synthetic training data for AI-based object detection and classification. In this work, we investigate whether images generated with diffusion can improve military vehicle detection under low-data conditions. We fine-tuned the text-to-image diffusion model FLUX.1 [dev] using LoRA with only 8 or 24 real images per class across 15 vehicle categories, resulting in class-specific diffusion models, which were used to generate new samples from automatically generated text prompts. The same real images were used to fine-tune the RF-DETR detector for a 15-class object detection task. Synthetic datasets generated by the diffusion models were then used to further improve detector performance. Importantly, no additional real data was required, as the generative models leveraged the same limited training samples. FLUX-generated images improved detection performance, particularly in the low-data regime (up to +8.0% mAP$_{50}$ with 8 real samples). To address the limited geometric control of text prompt-based diffusion, we additionally generated structurally guided synthetic data using ControlNet with Canny edge-map conditioning, yielding a FLUX-ControlNet (FLUX-CN) dataset with explicit control over viewpoint and pose. Structural guidance further enhanced performance when data is scarce (+4.1% mAP$_{50}$ with 8 real samples), but no additional benefit was observed when more real data is available. This study demonstrates that object-specific diffusion models are effective for improving military object detection in a low-data domain, and that structural guidance is most beneficial when real data is highly limited. These results highlight generative image data as an alternative to traditional simulation pipelines for the training of military AI systems.

</details>


### [128] [Enhancing Continual Learning of Vision-Language Models via Dynamic Prefix Weighting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18075)
*Hyeonseo Jang,Hyuk Kwon,Kibok Lee*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出动态前缀加权（DPW）框架，通过门控模块动态调整前缀权重，并利用残差机制控制适配器使用，在视觉语言模型的域-类增量学习场景中取得最优性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有参数高效方法（如前缀微调）对所有输入标记使用归一化的固定权重，忽略了不同输入标记需要不同调整程度的实际问题。

Method: DPW包含两个组件：1) 门控模块，根据输入标记的重要性动态调整每个前缀的权重；2) 加权机制，将适配器输出权重推导为前缀微调权重的残差，确保仅在必要时使用适配器。

Result: 在视觉语言模型的域-类增量学习场景中达到最先进性能。

Conclusion: 动态分配前缀权重并配合残差适配器机制能有效提升域-类增量学习性能，代码已开源。

Abstract: We investigate recently introduced domain-class incremental learning scenarios for vision-language models (VLMs). Recent works address this challenge using parameter-efficient methods, such as prefix-tuning or adapters, which facilitate model adaptation to downstream tasks by incorporating task-specific information into input tokens through additive vectors. However, previous approaches often normalize the weights of these vectors, disregarding the fact that different input tokens require different degrees of adjustment. To overcome this issue, we propose Dynamic Prefix Weighting (DPW), a framework that dynamically assigns weights to prefixes, complemented by adapters. DPW consists of 1) a gating module that adjusts the weights of each prefix based on the importance of the corresponding input token, and 2) a weighting mechanism that derives adapter output weights as a residual of prefix-tuning weights, ensuring that adapters are utilized only when necessary. Experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in domain-class incremental learning scenarios for VLMs. The code is available at: https://github.com/YonseiML/dpw.

</details>


### [129] [Efficient closed-form approaches for pose estimation using Sylvester forms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14747)
*Jana Vráblíková,Ezio Malis,Laurent Busé*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于Sylvester形式的结式矩阵求解器，用于非线性最小二乘位姿估计问题，在保持数值精度的同时显著降低计算时间，适用于3D-3D和3D-2D对应点的位姿估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实时计算机视觉应用中，非线性最小二乘位姿估计（旋转和平移）计算耗时，现有基于结式矩阵的闭式求解器虽有进展但复杂度仍可进一步降低，因此需要更高效的求解方法。

Method: 利用适当的旋转参数化将优化问题转化为多项式方程组求解，提出一类基于Sylvester形式的结式求解器，通过Sylvester矩阵结构进一步降低求解复杂度。

Result: 所提方法在数值精度上与现有最优求解器相当，但在计算时间上优于它们。

Conclusion: 该Sylvester形式的结式求解器可有效应用于两类位姿估计问题：3D到3D对应点与3D到2D对应点的位姿估计，在保持精度前提下提升计算效率。

Abstract: Solving non-linear least-squares problem for pose estimation (rotation and translation) is often a time consuming yet fundamental problem in several real-time computer vision applications. With an adequate rotation parametrization, the optimization problem can be reduced to the solution of a~system of polynomial equations and solved in closed form. Recent advances in efficient closed form solvers utilizing resultant matrices have shown a promising research direction to decrease the computation time while preserving the estimation accuracy. In this paper, we propose a new class of resultant-based solvers that exploit Sylvester forms to further reduce the complexity of the resolution. We demonstrate that our proposed methods are numerically as accurate as the state-of-the-art solvers, and outperform them in terms of computational time. We show that this approach can be applied for pose estimation in two different types of problems: estimating a pose from 3D to 3D correspondences, and estimating a pose from 3D points to 2D points correspondences.

</details>


### [130] [GS-STVSR: Ultra-Efficient Continuous Spatio-Temporal Video Super-Resolution via 2D Gaussian Splatting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18047)
*Mingyu Shi,Xin Di,Long Peng,Boxiang Cao,Anran Wu,Zhanfeng Feng,Jiaming Guo,Renjing Pei,Xueyang Fu,Yang Cao,Zhengjun Zha*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出GS-STVSR框架，基于2D高斯泼溅（2D-GS）实现连续时空视频超分辨率，通过连续运动建模替代密集网格查询，在保持SOTA质量的同时实现近恒定推理时间和超3倍加速（X32尺度）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于隐式神经表示（INR）的C-STVSR方法依赖密集像素级网格查询，导致计算成本随插帧数量线性增长，推理效率严重受限。

Method: 1）利用协方差参数的强时间稳定性进行轻量级中间拟合；2）设计光流引导的运动模块推导任意时间步的高斯位置和颜色；3）引入协方差重采样对齐模块防止协方差漂移；4）提出自适应偏移窗口处理大尺度运动。

Result: 在Vid4、GoPro、Adobe240基准上达到SOTA质量；推理时间在常规尺度（X2-X8）下几乎恒定，在极端尺度X32下实现超3倍加速。

Conclusion: GS-STVSR通过2D-GS范式彻底绕开密集网格查询，在C-STVSR任务中同时实现了高质量与高效率，具备强实际应用潜力。

Abstract: Continuous Spatio-Temporal Video Super-Resolution (C-STVSR) aims to simultaneously enhance the spatial resolution and frame rate of videos by arbitrary scale factors, offering greater flexibility than fixed-scale methods that are constrained by predefined upsampling ratios. In recent years, methods based on Implicit Neural Representations (INR) have made significant progress in C-STVSR by learning continuous mappings from spatio-temporal coordinates to pixel values. However, these methods fundamentally rely on dense pixel-wise grid queries, causing computational cost to scale linearly with the number of interpolated frames and severely limiting inference efficiency. We propose GS-STVSR, an ultra-efficient C-STVSR framework based on 2D Gaussian Splatting (2D-GS) that drives the spatiotemporal evolution of Gaussian kernels through continuous motion modeling, bypassing dense grid queries entirely. We exploit the strong temporal stability of covariance parameters for lightweight intermediate fitting, design an optical flow-guided motion module to derive Gaussian position and color at arbitrary time steps, introduce a Covariance resampling alignment module to prevent covariance drift, and propose an adaptive offset window for large-scale motion. Extensive experiments on Vid4, GoPro, and Adobe240 show that GS-STVSR achieves state-of-the-art quality across all benchmarks. Moreover, its inference time remains nearly constant at conventional temporal scales (X2--X8) and delivers over X3 speedup at extreme scales X32, demonstrating strong practical applicability.

</details>


### [131] [HABIT: Chrono-Synergia Robust Progressive Learning Framework for Composed Image Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18037)
*Zixu Li,Yupeng Hu,Zhiwei Chen,Shiqi Zhang,Qinlei Huang,Zhiheng Fu,Yinwei Wei*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出HABIT框架，通过互信息知识估计模块和双一致性渐进学习模块，解决组合图像检索中噪声三元组对应问题，在多种噪声比例下显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 组合图像检索(CIR)中三元组数据标注成本高且主观性强，导致实际场景中普遍存在噪声三元组对应(NTC)问题，严重制约检索性能。

Method: 提出HABIT框架，包含两个核心模块：(1) 互信息知识估计模块，通过计算组合特征与目标图像间的互信息转移率量化样本清洁度；(2) 双一致性渐进学习模块，引入历史模型与当前模型的协同机制，模拟人类习惯形成过程实现鲁棒学习。

Result: 在两个标准CIR数据集上的大量实验表明，HABIT在多种噪声比例下显著优于大多数方法，展现出优越的鲁棒性和检索性能。

Conclusion: HABIT通过渐进式鲁棒学习有效解决了CIR中的噪声三元组对应问题，代码已开源。

Abstract: Composed Image Retrieval (CIR) is a flexible image retrieval paradigm that enables users to accurately locate the target image through a multimodal query composed of a reference image and modification text. Although this task has demonstrated promising applications in personalized search and recommendation systems, it encounters a severe challenge in practical scenarios known as the Noise Triplet Correspondence (NTC) problem. This issue primarily arises from the high cost and subjectivity involved in annotating triplet data. To address this problem, we identify two central challenges: the precise estimation of composed semantic discrepancy and the insufficient progressive adaptation to modification discrepancy. To tackle these challenges, we propose a cHrono-synergiA roBust progressIve learning framework for composed image reTrieval (HABIT), which consists of two core modules. First, the Mutual Knowledge Estimation Module quantifies sample cleanliness by calculating the Transition Rate of mutual information between the composed feature and the target image, thereby effectively identifying clean samples that align with the intended modification semantics. Second, the Dual-consistency Progressive Learning Module introduces a collaborative mechanism between the historical and current models, simulating human habit formation to retain good habits and calibrate bad habits, ultimately enabling robust learning under the presence of NTC. Extensive experiments conducted on two standard CIR datasets demonstrate that HABIT significantly outperforms most methods under various noise ratios, exhibiting superior robustness and retrieval performance. Codes are available at https://github.com/Lee-zixu/HABIT

</details>


### [132] [Mitigating Multimodal Hallucination via Phase-wise Self-reward](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17982)
*Yu Zhang,Chuyang Sun,Kehai Chen,Xuefeng Bai,Yang Xiang,Min Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出PSRD框架，利用阶段式自奖励解码在推理时动态抑制视觉幻觉，无需外部监督，将LLaVA-1.5-7B的幻觉率降低50%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有幻觉缓解方法要么依赖大规模标注数据微调（计算开销大），要么采用静态后处理策略（忽视幻觉出现的动态特性），亟需一种无需外部监督、能在推理时动态抑制幻觉的方法。

Method: 1) 发现视觉幻觉具有阶段式动态模式，在每个语义阶段起始处达到峰值；2) 提出PSRD（Phase-wise Self-Reward Decoding），基于阶段式自奖励信号进行在线幻觉纠正；3) 通过知识蒸馏将LVLM的幻觉引导信号压缩到轻量级奖励模型中，降低重复自评估成本，该奖励模型在解码过程中提供实时引导以实现精准干预。

Result: LLaVA-1.5-7B幻觉率降低50.0%；在五种幻觉评估基准上对四种LVLM一致优于现有后处理方法；有效缓解幻觉传播，实现性能与推理效率的高可控权衡。

Conclusion: PSRD通过阶段式自奖励机制和轻量奖励模型蒸馏，实现了无需外部监督的高效在线幻觉抑制，在多个LVLM和基准上均取得显著且一致的改进。

Abstract: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) still struggle with vision hallucination, where generated responses are inconsistent with the visual input. Existing methods either rely on large-scale annotated data for fine-tuning, which incurs massive computational overhead, or employ static post-hoc strategies that overlook the dynamic nature of hallucination emergence. To address these, we introduce a new self-rewarding framework, enabling dynamic hallucination mitigation at inference time without external supervision. On the empirical side, we reveal that visual hallucination exhibits phase-wise dynamic patterns, peaking at the onset of each semantic phase. Drawing on these insights, we propose \textbf{PSRD} (\textbf{Phase-wise \textbf{S}elf-\textbf{R}eward \textbf{D}ecoding) for online hallucination correction guided by phase-wise self-reward signals. To reduce the cost of repeated self-evaluation during decoding, we distill the hallucination guidance signal from LVLMs into a lightweight reward model. The reward model subsequently provides on-the-fly guidance for targeted intervention during the decoding process, enabling precise hallucination suppression. The proposed PSRD significantly reduces the hallucination rate of LLaVA-1.5-7B by 50.0% and consistently outperforms existing post-hoc methods across five hallucination evaluation benchmarks for four LVLMs. Further analysis confirms that PSRD effectively mitigates hallucination propagation and achieves a highly controllable trade-off between strong performance and inference efficiency.

</details>


### [133] [Identifying Ethical Biases in Action Recognition Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17971)
*Ana Baltaretu,Pascal Benschop,Jan van Gemert*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种利用合成视频数据审计人类动作识别（HAR）模型偏见的方法，通过控制视觉身份属性（如肤色）并保持时间一致性，发现流行HAR模型在相同动作下对肤色存在统计显著的偏见。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: HAR模型在高风险场景中部署日益增多，但其在不同人类外貌下的公平性尚未被分析。

Method: 使用BEDLAM仿真平台生成合成视频数据，完全控制视觉身份属性（如肤色），并保持时间一致性，通过干预单个属性来测试模型预测的变化。

Result: 流行HAR模型在动作相同的情况下，对肤色表现出统计显著的偏见，模型编码了不期望的视觉关联，存在系统性的跨群体错误。

Conclusion: 该框架可用于审计HAR模型的偏见，支持开发更透明、可问责的系统，以应对即将出台的监管标准。

Abstract: Human Action Recognition (HAR) models are increasingly deployed in high-stakes environments, yet their fairness across different human appearances has not been analyzed. We introduce a framework for auditing bias in HAR models using synthetic video data, generated with full control over visual identity attributes such as skin color. Unlike prior work that focuses on static images or pose estimation, our approach preserves temporal consistency, allowing us to isolate and test how changes to a single attribute affect model predictions. Through controlled interventions using the BEDLAM simulation platform, we show whether some popular HAR models exhibit statistically significant biases on the skin color even when the motion remains identical. Our results highlight how models may encode unwanted visual associations, and we provide evidence of systematic errors across groups. This work contributes a framework for auditing HAR models and supports the development of more transparent, accountable systems in light of upcoming regulatory standards.

</details>


### [134] [E3VS-Bench: A Benchmark for Viewpoint-Dependent Active Perception in 3D Gaussian Splatting Scenes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17969)
*Koya Sakamoto,Taiki Miyanishi,Daichi Azuma,Shuhei Kurita,Shu Morikuni,Naoya Chiba,Motoaki Kawanabe,Yusuke Iwasawa,Yutaka Matsuo*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出E3VS-Bench基准，用于评估具身智能体在5-DoF（五自由度）视点控制下进行3D视觉搜索的能力。该基准包含99个高保真3D场景和2,014个问答片段，利用3D高斯泼溅实现真实感自由视点渲染。实验表明，当前最先进的VLM在主动感知和视点规划方面与人类存在显著差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉搜索和具身AI基准（如EQA）依赖静态观察或受限的自我中心运动，无法评估在真实3D环境中不受限制的5-DoF视点控制下产生的细粒度视点依赖现象（如垂直视角变化导致的可见性变化、容器内部内容揭示、特定角度才能区分的物体属性）。

Method: 构建E3VS-Bench基准：使用3D高斯泼溅重建99个高保真3D场景，生成2,014个问题驱动的episode。要求智能体通过5-DoF视点控制主动收集视点依赖证据来回答问题。评估多种SOTA VLM并与人类表现对比。

Result: 尽管VLM在2D推理上表现强劲，但在完整的5-DoF视点变化下，所有模型与人类表现存在显著差距，暴露了在主动感知和连贯视点规划方面的局限性。

Conclusion: E3VS-Bench揭示了当前VLM在具身3D视觉搜索中主动视点规划能力的不足，为未来研究提供了重要基准。

Abstract: Visual search in 3D environments requires embodied agents to actively explore their surroundings and acquire task-relevant evidence. However, existing visual search and embodied AI benchmarks, including EQA, typically rely on static observations or constrained egocentric motion, and thus do not explicitly evaluate fine-grained viewpoint-dependent phenomena that arise under unrestricted 5-DoF viewpoint control in real-world 3D environments, such as visibility changes caused by vertical viewpoint shifts, revealing contents inside containers, and disambiguating object attributes that are only observable from specific angles. To address this limitation, we introduce {E3VS-Bench}, a benchmark for embodied 3D visual search where agents must control their viewpoints in 5-DoF to gather viewpoint-dependent evidence for question answering. E3VS-Bench consists of 99 high-fidelity 3D scenes reconstructed using 3D Gaussian Splatting and 2,014 question-driven episodes. 3D Gaussian Splatting enables photorealistic free-viewpoint rendering that preserves fine-grained visual details (e.g., small text and subtle attributes) often degraded in mesh-based simulators, thereby allowing the construction of questions that cannot be answered from a single view and instead require active inspection across viewpoints in 5-DoF. We evaluate multiple state-of-the-art VLMs and compare their performance with humans. Despite strong 2D reasoning ability, all models exhibit a substantial gap from humans, highlighting limitations in active perception and coherent viewpoint planning specifically under full 5-DoF viewpoint changes.

</details>


### [135] [MU-GeNeRF: Multi-view Uncertainty-guided Generalizable Neural Radiance Fields for Distractor-aware Scene](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17965)
*Wenjie Mu,Zhan Li,Chuanzhou Su,Xuanyi Shen,Ziniu Liu,Fan Lu,Yujian Mo,Junqiao Zhao,Tiantian Feng,Chen Ye,Guang Chen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: MU-GeNeRF提出了一种多视图不确定性引导的框架，通过源视图不确定性和目标视图不确定性两种互补机制，使可泛化神经辐射场（GeNeRFs）能够在存在瞬态干扰物的情况下进行鲁棒的三维重建，性能超越现有GeNeRFs，并接近场景特定的无干扰NeRF方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有GeNeRFs在真实场景中受瞬态干扰物（如行人、车辆等）破坏跨视图结构一致性，导致监督信号被污染、重建质量下降。已有的无干扰NeRF方法依赖逐场景优化和逐视图重建误差估计不确定性，不适用于GeNeRF且常误判不一致的静态结构为干扰物。

Method: 提出MU-GeNeRF框架，将干扰物感知分解为两种互补的不确定性组件：源视图不确定性（捕捉源视图间由视角变化或动态因素导致的结构差异）和目标视图不确定性（检测目标图像中由瞬态干扰物引起的观测异常），两者通过异方差重建损失结合，引导模型自适应调制监督信号。

Result: 实验表明MU-GeNeRF不仅超越了现有GeNeRFs，还达到了与场景特定的无干扰NeRFs相当的性能。

Conclusion: 通过双不确定性分解和异方差损失结合，MU-GeNeRF有效解决了GeNeRF在瞬态干扰物场景下的鲁棒建模问题，实现了更优的干扰物抑制和几何建模。

Abstract: Generalizable Neural Radiance Fields (GeNeRFs) enable high-quality scene reconstruction from sparse views and can generalize to unseen scenes. However, in real-world settings, transient distractors break cross-view structural consistency, corrupting supervision and degrading reconstruction quality. Existing distractor-free NeRF methods rely on per-scene optimization and estimate uncertainty from per-view reconstruction errors, which are not reliable for GeNeRFs and often misjudge inconsistent static structures as distractors. To this end, we propose MU-GeNeRF, a Multi-view Uncertainty-guided distractor-aware GeNeRF framework designed to alleviate GeNeRF's robust modeling challenges in the presence of transient distractions. We decompose distractor awareness into two complementary uncertainty components: Source-view Uncertainty, which captures structural discrepancies across source views caused by viewpoint changes or dynamic factors; and Target-view Uncertainty, which detects observation anomalies in the target image induced by transient distractors.These two uncertainties address distinct error sources and are combined through a heteroscedastic reconstruction loss, which guides the model to adaptively modulate supervision, enabling more robust distractor suppression and geometric modeling.Extensive experiments show that our method not only surpasses existing GeNeRFs but also achieves performance comparable to scene-specific distractor-free NeRFs.

</details>


### [136] [DifFoundMAD: Foundation Models meet Differential Morphing Attack Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17961)
*Lazaro J. Gonzalez-Soler,André Dörsch,Christian Rathgeb,Christoph Busch*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出DifFoundMAD，一种参数高效的差分形态攻击检测框架，利用视觉基础模型的泛化能力来捕捉疑似合成图像与真实捕获图像之间的差异。通过轻量级微调与类别平衡优化，仅更新少量参数即可保留基础模型的丰富表征先验。跨数据库评估表明，该方法在严格安全级别下将现有最优系统的错误率从6.16%降至2.17%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统D-MAD系统依赖人脸识别嵌入或手工特征差异，性能有限。本文旨在利用视觉基础模型的强大泛化能力，以参数高效的方式提升差分形态攻击检测的性能，特别是在高安全要求的实际部署场景（如边境管控）中。

Method: 采用标准差分范式，用视觉基础模型提取的嵌入替换传统表示空间；结合轻量级微调（仅更新少量参数）与类别平衡优化策略，保持基础模型丰富的表征先验。

Result: 在标准D-MAD基准上的跨数据库评估中，DifFoundMAD持续优于现有最优系统。在高安全级别下，错误率从6.16%降至2.17%。

Conclusion: DifFoundMAD通过参数高效地利用视觉基础模型，在差分形态攻击检测任务上取得了显著性能提升，尤其适用于高安全级别的操作部署场景。

Abstract: In this work, we introduce DifFoundMAD, a parameter-efficient D-MAD framework that exploits the generalisation capabilities of vision foundation models (FM) to capture discrepancies between suspected morphs and live capture images. In contrast to conventional D-MAD systems that rely on face recognition embeddings or handcrafted feature differences, DifFoundMAD follows the standard differential paradigm while replacing the underlying representation space with embeddings extracted from FMs. By combining lightweight finetuning with class-balanced optimisation, the proposed method updates only a small subset of parameters while preserving the rich representational priors of the underlying FMs. Extensive cross-database evaluations on standard D-MAD benchmarks demonstrate that DifFoundMAD achieves consistent improvements over state-of-the-art systems, particularly at the strict security levels required in operational deployments such as border control: The error rates reported in the current state-of-the-art were reduced from 6.16% to 2.17% for high-security levels using DifFoundMAD.

</details>


### [137] [Chatting about Upper-Body Expressive Human Pose and Shape Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17959)
*Yuxiang Zhao,Wei Huang,Yujie Song,Liu Wang,Huan Zhao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: CoEvoer是一个针对上半身人体姿态与形状估计（EHPS）的新型单阶段协同交叉依赖Transformer框架，通过显式特征级交互实现不同身体部位（躯干、面部、手部）的相互增强，在多个基准测试上达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有EHPS方法在面部和手部区域的参数估计准确性不足，且对野外图像的泛化能力有限，缺乏专门针对上半身EHPS的框架来捕捉面部、手部和躯干之间的强耦合与语义依赖关系。

Method: 提出CoEvoer，一种单阶段协同交叉依赖Transformer框架。该框架实现不同身体部位间显式特征级交互：躯干等较大区域提供全局语义和位置先验以指导面部和手部的精细估计，同时面部和手部的局部细节反过来校准相邻身体部位，通过联合参数回归捕捉各部分间的耦合关系。

Result: 在上半身基准测试中达到SOTA性能，且在未见过的野外图像上表现出强泛化能力。

Conclusion: CoEvoer作为首个专门针对上半身EHPS设计的框架，通过协同交叉依赖机制有效提升了面部和手部区域的估计精度及模型泛化能力。

Abstract: Expressive Human Pose and Shape Estimation (EHPS) plays a crucial role in various AR/VR applications and has witnessed significant progress in recent years. However, current state-of-the-art methods still struggle with accurate parameter estimation for facial and hand regions and exhibit limited generalization to wild images. To address these challenges, we present CoEvoer, a novel one-stage synergistic cross-dependency transformer framework tailored for upper-body EHPS. CoEvoer enables explicit feature-level interaction across different body parts, allowing for mutual enhancement through contextual information exchange. Specifically, larger and more easily estimated regions such as the torso provide global semantics and positional priors to guide the estimation of finer, more complex regions like the face and hands. Conversely, the localized details captured in facial and hand regions help refine and calibrate adjacent body parts. To the best of our knowledge, CoEvoer is the first framework designed specifically for upper-body EHPS, with the goal of capturing the strong coupling and semantic dependencies among the face, hands, and torso through joint parameter regression. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CoEvoer achieves state-of-the-art performance on upper-body benchmarks and exhibits strong generalization capability even on unseen wild images.

</details>


### [138] [ZSG-IAD: A Multimodal Framework for Zero-Shot Grounded Industrial Anomaly Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17949)
*Qiuhui Chen,Jiaxiang Song,Shuai Tan,Weimin Zhong*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: ZSG-IAD是一个多模态视觉-语言框架，用于零样本的、可解释的工业异常检测，通过语言引导的两跳接地模块和可执行规则GRPO，生成结构化的异常报告和像素级掩码，在多个基准上表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于深度学习的工业异常检测器往往是黑箱模型，难以用物理上有意义的缺陷证据来证明检测决策的合理性。

Method: 提出ZSG-IAD框架，包含：(1) 语言引导的两跳接地模块：第一跳用异常相关句子从多模态特征中蒸馏证据样潜在槽，得到粗粒度空间支持；第二跳通过通道-空间门控和轻量解码器生成细粒度掩码。(2) 可执行规则GRPO，用可验证奖励促进结构化输出、异常区域一致性和推理-结论连贯性。

Result: 在多个工业异常检测基准上取得了强大的零样本性能，比先前方法提供了更透明、物理上更可解释的检测结果。

Conclusion: ZSG-IAD实现了零样本工业异常检测的可解释性突破，代码和标注将开源以支持可信工业异常检测系统的未来研究。

Abstract: Deep learning-based industrial anomaly detectors often behave as black boxes, making it hard to justify decisions with physically meaningful defect evidence. We propose ZSG-IAD, a multimodal vision-language framework for zero-shot grounded industrial anomaly detection. Given RGB images, sensor images, and 3D point clouds, ZSG-IAD generates structured anomaly reports and pixel-level anomaly masks. ZSG-IAD introduces a language-guided two-hop grounding module: (1) anomaly-related sentences select evidence-like latent slots distilled from multimodal features, yielding coarse spatial support; (2) selected slots modulate feature maps via channel-spatial gating and a lightweight decoder to produce fine-grained masks. To improve reliability, we further apply Executable-Rule GRPO with verifiable rewards to promote structured outputs, anomaly-region consistency, and reasoning-conclusion coherence. Experiments across multiple industrial anomaly benchmarks show strong zero-shot performance and more transparent, physically grounded explanations than prior methods. We will release code and annotations to support future research on trustworthy industrial anomaly detection systems.

</details>


### [139] [From Heads to Neurons: Causal Attribution and Steering in Multi-Task Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17941)
*Qidong Wang,Junjie Hu,Ming Jiang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出HONES框架，通过任务相关的注意力头来评估FFN神经元的重要性，实现多任务VLM中的任务感知神经元归因和干预。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经元分析通常聚焦单一任务，限制了跨任务神经元重要性的可比性；且排序策略孤立地对神经元打分，忽略了任务依赖的信息通路对FFN神经元写入效应的影响，导致多任务设置中神经元多义性加剧。

Method: 提出HONES（Head-Oriented Neuron Explanation & Steering），一种无梯度框架。通过任务相关的注意力头来条件化FFN神经元的因果写入贡献，对神经元进行排序；随后通过轻量级缩放来调控显著神经元。

Result: 在四个多模态任务和两个主流VLM上，HONES在识别任务关键神经元方面优于现有方法，并在干预后提升了模型性能。

Conclusion: HONES通过注意力头条件化的神经元归因，有效解决了多任务VLM中神经元多义性问题，实现了更精确的任务感知神经元识别与干预。

Abstract: Recent work has increasingly explored neuron-level interpretation in vision-language models (VLMs) to identify neurons critical to final predictions. However, existing neuron analyses generally focus on single tasks, limiting the comparability of neuron importance across tasks. Moreover, ranking strategies tend to score neurons in isolation, overlooking how task-dependent information pathways shape the write-in effects of feed-forward network (FFN) neurons. This oversight can exacerbate neuron polysemanticity in multi-task settings, introducing noise into the identification and intervention of task-critical neurons. In this study, we propose HONES (Head-Oriented Neuron Explanation & Steering), a gradient-free framework for task-aware neuron attribution and steering in multi-task VLMs. HONES ranks FFN neurons by their causal write-in contributions conditioned on task-relevant attention heads, and further modulates salient neurons via lightweight scaling. Experiments on four diverse multimodal tasks and two popular VLMs show that HONES outperforms existing methods in identifying task-critical neurons and improves model performance after steering. Our source code is released at: https://github.com/petergit1/HONES.

</details>


### [140] [HiVLA: A Visual-Grounded-Centric Hierarchical Embodied Manipulation System](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14125)
*Tianshuo Yang,Guanyu Chen,Yutian Chen,Zhixuan Liang,Yitian Liu,Zanxin Chen,Chunpu Xu,Haotian Liang,Jiangmiao Pang,Yao Mu,Ping Luo*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: HiVLA提出了一种视觉为中心的层次化框架，将高层语义规划与低层运动控制显式解耦：VLM规划器进行任务分解和视觉定位生成结构化计划（子任务指令+目标边界框），再通过带有级联交叉注意力机制的流匹配扩散Transformer动作专家将其转化为物理动作。该架构在保留VLM零样本推理能力的同时，显著优于端到端基线，尤其在长程技能组合和杂乱场景中小物体精细操作方面表现突出。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 端到端VLA模型在狭窄控制数据上微调时，会损害从基础VLM继承的深度推理能力，需要解决高层语义规划与低层运动控制之间的根本性权衡问题。

Method: 提出HiVLA层次化框架：高层使用VLM规划器进行任务分解和视觉定位，生成子任务指令和目标边界框；低层引入基于流匹配的扩散Transformer动作专家，通过级联交叉注意力机制依次融合全局上下文、高分辨率物体中心裁剪和技能语义，实现纯鲁棒执行。

Result: 在仿真和真实实验中，HiVLA显著优于最先进的端到端基线，尤其在长程技能组合和杂乱场景中小物体精细操作方面表现突出。

Conclusion: 解耦架构在保留VLM零样本推理能力的同时，允许两个组件独立改进，有效解决了推理能力与精细控制之间的权衡问题。

Abstract: While end-to-end Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models offer a promising paradigm for robotic manipulation, fine-tuning them on narrow control data often compromises the profound reasoning capabilities inherited from their base Vision-Language Models (VLMs). To resolve this fundamental trade-off, we propose HiVLA, a visual-grounded-centric hierarchical framework that explicitly decouples high-level semantic planning from low-level motor control. In high-level part, a VLM planner first performs task decomposition and visual grounding to generate structured plans, comprising a subtask instruction and a precise target bounding box. Then, to translate this plan into physical actions, we introduce a flow-matching Diffusion Transformer (DiT) action expert in low-level part equipped with a novel cascaded cross-attention mechanism. This design sequentially fuses global context, high-resolution object-centric crops and skill semantics, enabling the DiT to focus purely on robust execution. Our decoupled architecture preserves the VLM's zero-shot reasoning while allowing independent improvement of both components. Extensive experiments in simulation and the real world demonstrate that HiVLA significantly outperforms state-of-the-art end-to-end baselines, particularly excelling in long-horizon skill composition and the fine-grained manipulation of small objects in cluttered scenes.

</details>


### [141] [Brain-Inspired Capture: Evidence-Driven Neuromimetic Perceptual Simulation for Visual Decoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17927)
*Feixue Shao,Guangze Shi,Xueyu Liu,Yongfei Wu,Mingqiang Wei,Jianan Zhang,Jianbo Lu,Guiying Yan,Weihua Yang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出脑启发捕获（BI-Cap）范式，通过模拟人类视觉系统的神经拟态感知仿真，结合互信息引导的动态模糊调节和证据驱动的潜在空间表征，实现神经信号与视觉模态对齐，在零样本脑到图像检索任务中显著超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前神经信号视觉解码方法受限于神经与视觉模态间的系统性和随机性差异，且忽视了人类视觉系统（HVS）的内在计算机制。

Method: 构建包含四种生物合理动态与静态变换的神经拟态流水线，采用互信息（MI）引导的动态模糊调节模拟自适应视觉处理；引入证据驱动潜在空间表征显式建模不确定性，确保鲁棒神经嵌入。

Result: 在两个公开基准的零样本脑到图像检索任务上，BI-Cap分别实现9.2%和8.0%的相对性能提升，显著优于现有最优方法。

Conclusion: 通过模拟HVS处理机制和显式不确定性建模，有效弥合神经与视觉模态差距，为BCI和计算神经科学提供新范式。

Abstract: Visual decoding of neurophysiological signals is a critical challenge for brain-computer interfaces (BCIs) and computational neuroscience. However, current approaches are often constrained by the systematic and stochastic gaps between neural and visual modalities, largely neglecting the intrinsic computational mechanisms of the Human Visual System (HVS). To address this, we propose Brain-Inspired Capture (BI-Cap), a neuromimetic perceptual simulation paradigm that aligns these modalities by emulating HVS processing. Specifically, we construct a neuromimetic pipeline comprising four biologically plausible dynamic and static transformations, coupled with Mutual Information (MI)-guided dynamic blur regulation to simulate adaptive visual processing. Furthermore, to mitigate the inherent non-stationarity of neural activity, we introduce an evidence-driven latent space representation. This formulation explicitly models uncertainty, thereby ensuring robust neural embeddings. Extensive evaluations on zero-shot brain-to-image retrieval across two public benchmarks demonstrate that BI-Cap substantially outperforms state-of-the-art methods, achieving relative gains of 9.2\% and 8.0\%, respectively. We have released the source code on GitHub through the link https://github.com/flysnow1024/BI-Cap.

</details>


### [142] [Prompting Foundation Models for Zero-Shot Ship Instance Segmentation in SAR Imagery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17920)
*Islam Mansour,Francescopaolo Sica,Michael Schmitt*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于YOLOv11检测器与SAM2分割模型相结合的零样本SAR舰船实例分割方法，无需像素级标注即可实现分割，在SSDD基准上达到平均IoU 0.637（全监督基线的89%），检测率89.2%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: SAR图像深度学习受限于缺乏像素级标注，现有方法依赖微调或适配器来弥合光学-SAR域差异，亟需一种无需掩码标注的零样本分割方案。

Method: 使用在开放SAR数据集上训练的YOLOv11检测器生成舰船边界框，以此作为空间约束提示SAM2模型生成实例掩码，无需任何掩码标注或微调/适配器。

Result: 在SSDD基准上，平均IoU达0.637（全监督基线的89%），整体舰船检测率89.2%，并支持舰船分类、尺寸估计和尾迹分析等下游任务。

Conclusion: 仅依靠SAR训练检测器提供的空间约束即可有效正则化基础模型的预测，部分弥合光学-SAR域差异，为基于基础模型的SAR图像理解提供了一条可扩展、标注高效的路径。

Abstract: Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) plays a critical role in maritime surveillance, yet deep learning for SAR analysis is limited by the lack of pixel-level annotations. This paper explores how general-purpose vision foundation models can enable zero-shot ship instance segmentation in SAR imagery, eliminating the need for pixel-level supervision. A YOLOv11-based detector trained on open SAR datasets localizes ships via bounding boxes, which then prompt the Segment Anything Model 2 (SAM2) to produce instance masks without any mask annotations. Unlike prior SAM-based SAR approaches that rely on fine tuning or adapters, our method demonstrates that spatial constraints from a SAR-trained detector alone can effectively regularize foundation model predictions. This design partially mitigates the optical-SAR domain gap and enables downstream applications such as vessel classification, size estimation, and wake analysis. Experiments on the SSDD benchmark achieve a mean IoU of 0.637 (89% of a fully supervised baseline) with an overall ship detection rate of 89.2%, confirming a scalable, annotation-efficient pathway toward foundation-model-driven SAR image understanding.

</details>


### [143] [Beyond Binary Contrast: Modeling Continuous Skeleton Action Spaces with Transitional Anchors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17914)
*Yingjie Feng,Yi Wang,Jiaze Wang,Anfeng Liu,Zhuotao Tian*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: TranCLR提出了一种基于过渡性锚点的对比学习框架，通过显式建模动作的连续几何结构来克服传统二元对比学习导致的特征碎片化问题，在多个骨骼动作识别数据集上取得了最优性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自监督对比学习方法采用二元对比目标，忽略了人体运动的固有连续性，导致特征簇碎片化和类别边界僵硬，无法捕捉动作空间的连续几何结构。

Method: 提出TranCLR框架，包含两个核心模块：1) 动作过渡性锚点构建(ATAC)，显式建模过渡状态的几何结构；2) 多层级几何流形校准(MGMC)，在多个连续性层级上自适应校准动作流形，形成更平滑且更具判别性的表示空间。

Result: 在NTU RGB+D、NTU RGB+D 120和PKU-MMD数据集上，TranCLR在识别精度和校准性能上均达到领先水平。

Conclusion: TranCLR能够有效学习连续且具有不确定性感知的骨骼表示，验证了显式建模动作连续性对提升自监督对比学习效果的可行性。

Abstract: Self-supervised contrastive learning has emerged as a powerful paradigm for skeleton-based action recognition by enforcing consistency in the embedding space. However, existing methods rely on binary contrastive objectives that overlook the intrinsic continuity of human motion, resulting in fragmented feature clusters and rigid class boundaries. To address these limitations, we propose TranCLR, a Transitional anchor-based Contrastive Learning framework that captures the continuous geometry of the action space. Specifically, the proposed Action Transitional Anchor Construction (ATAC) explicitly models the geometric structure of transitional states to enhance the model's perception of motion continuity. Building upon these anchors, a Multi-Level Geometric Manifold Calibration (MGMC) mechanism is introduced to adaptively calibrate the action manifold across multiple levels of continuity, yielding a smoother and more discriminative representation space. Extensive experiments on the NTU RGB+D, NTU RGB+D 120 and PKU-MMD datasets demonstrate that TranCLR achieves superior accuracy and calibration performance, effectively learning continuous and uncertainty-aware skeleton representations. The code is available at https://github.com/Philchieh/TranCLR.

</details>


### [144] [ReTrack: Evidence-Driven Dual-Stream Directional Anchor Calibration Network for Composed Video Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17898)
*Zixu Li,Yupeng Hu,Zhiwei Chen,Qinlei Huang,Guozhi Qiu,Zhiheng Fu,Meng Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: ReTrack是首个通过校准组合特征方向偏差来改进多模态查询理解的CVR框架，包含语义贡献解缠、组合几何校准和可靠证据驱动对齐三个核心模块，在CVR和CIR任务上均达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: CVR任务中视频与文本模态间存在显著的信息密度差异，传统组合方法倾向于使组合特征偏向参考视频，导致检索性能次优。具体存在三个核心挑战：(1)模态贡献纠缠不清；(2)组合特征的显式优化困难；(3)检索不确定性。

Method: 提出ReTrack框架，包含三个关键模块：语义贡献解缠（Semantic Contribution Disentanglement）用于估计各模态的语义贡献以校准组合特征的偏向；组合几何校准（Composition Geometry Calibration）利用校准后的方向锚点计算双向证据；可靠证据驱动对齐（Reliable Evidence-driven Alignment）驱动可靠的组合到目标相似度估计。

Result: 在CVR和CIR两个场景的三个基准数据集上均取得了SOTA性能。

Conclusion: ReTrack通过校准组合特征中的方向偏差有效提升了多模态查询理解能力，且对CIR任务具有良好的泛化能力。

Abstract: With the rapid growth of video data, Composed Video Retrieval (CVR) has emerged as a novel paradigm in video retrieval and is receiving increasing attention from researchers. Unlike unimodal video retrieval methods, the CVR task takes a multi-modal query consisting of a reference video and a piece of modification text as input. The modification text conveys the user's intended alterations to the reference video. Based on this input, the model aims to retrieve the most relevant target video. In the CVR task, there exists a substantial discrepancy in information density between video and text modalities. Traditional composition methods tend to bias the composed feature toward the reference video, which leads to suboptimal retrieval performance. This limitation is significant due to the presence of three core challenges: (1) modal contribution entanglement, (2) explicit optimization of composed features, and (3) retrieval uncertainty. To address these challenges, we propose the evidence-dRivRn dual-sTream diRectionAl anChor calibration networK (ReTrack). ReTrack is the first CVR framework that improves multi-modal query understanding by calibrating directional bias in composed features. It consists of three key modules: Semantic Contribution Disentanglement, Composition Geometry Calibration, and Reliable Evidence-driven Alignment. Specifically, ReTrack estimates the semantic contribution of each modality to calibrate the directional bias of the composed feature. It then uses the calibrated directional anchors to compute bidirectional evidence that drives reliable composed-to-target similarity estimation. Moreover, ReTrack exhibits strong generalization to the Composed Image Retrieval (CIR) task, achieving SOTA performance across three benchmark datasets in both CVR and CIR scenarios. Codes are available at https://github.com/Lee-zixu/ReTrack

</details>


### [145] [AeroRAG: Structured Multimodal Retrieval-Augmented LLM for Fine-Grained Aerial Visual Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17889)
*Junxiao Xue,Quan Deng,Tingqi Hu,Meicong Si,Xinyi Yin,Yunyun Shi,Xuecheng Wu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: AeroRAG 提出了一种场景图引导的多模态检索增强生成框架，将航拍图像转化为结构化视觉知识（物体类别、数量、空间位置、语义关系），通过检索相关语义片段构建紧凑提示供文本LLM推理，在航拍和通用数据集上优于6个强MLLM基线，尤其在密集场景和关系推理中提升显著。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MLLM在航拍场景中面临接口不匹配问题：关键证据常由小物体、明确数量、粗略位置和物体间关系承载，而传统的密集视觉token表示无法很好地对齐这些结构化语义。

Method: 首先将输入图像转换为结构化视觉知识（物体类别、数量、空间位置、语义关系），然后检索与查询相关的语义片段，构建紧凑提示输入给基于文本的LLM进行推理，而非直接对密集视觉token进行推理。

Result: 在AUG航拍数据集和VG-150通用基准上，AeroRAG一致优于6个强MLLM基线，在密集航拍场景和关系敏感推理上提升最大；在VQAv2上的实验验证了该接口在标准视觉推理设置中的兼容性。

Conclusion: 结构化检索是面向部署和接地视觉推理系统的实用设计方向。

Abstract: Despite recent progress in multimodal large language models (MLLMs), reliable visual question answering in aerial scenes remains challenging. In such scenes, task-critical evidence is often carried by small objects, explicit quantities, coarse locations, and inter-object relations, whereas conventional dense visual-token representations are not well aligned with these structured semantics. To address this interface mismatch, we propose AeroRAG, a scene-graph-guided multimodal retrieval-augmented generation framework for visual question answering. The framework first converts an input image into structured visual knowledge, including object categories, quantities, spatial locations, and semantic relations, and then retrieves query-relevant semantic chunks to construct compact prompts for a text-based large language model. Rather than relying on direct reasoning over dense visual tokens, our method introduces a more explicit intermediate interface between perception and language reasoning. Experiments on the AUG aerial dataset and the general-domain VG-150 benchmark show consistent improvements over six strong MLLM baselines, with the largest gains observed in dense aerial scenes and relation-sensitive reasoning. We further evaluate the framework on VQAv2 to verify that the proposed interface remains compatible with standard visual reasoning settings. These results suggest that structured retrieval is a practical design direction for deployment-oriented and grounded visual reasoning systems.

</details>


### [146] [Spatiotemporal Sycophancy: Negation-Based Gaslighting in Video Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17873)
*Ziyao Tang,Pengkun Jiao,Bin Zhu,Huiyan Qi,Jingjing Chen,Yu-Gang Jiang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文发现视频大语言模型（Vid-LLMs）存在时空谄媚（spatiotemporal sycophancy）故障模式：在对话中面对否定性误导反馈时，模型会撤回原本正确的视觉判断，转而编造不存在的时空解释来迎合用户。作者提出否定性误导评估框架，构建GasVideo-1000基准，实验表明该问题普遍且严重，提示层面的约束只能部分缓解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Vid-LLMs在视频理解任务中表现优异，但它们在对话交互中的鲁棒性尚未被充分探索。作者希望系统性研究模型在面临否定性误导（否定性gaslighting）时是否会放弃正确判断并编造虚假解释。

Method: 提出否定性误导评估框架，构建GasVideo-1000基准数据集，该基准专门设计用于探测时空谄媚现象，包含清晰的视觉基础和时序推理要求。在多种开源和闭源Vid-LLMs上进行广泛评估。

Result: 否定性误导的脆弱性普遍且严重，即使基线性能强的模型也受影响。提示层面的约束只能部分缓解，无法可靠防止幻觉化解释或信念反转。

Conclusion: 当前Vid-LLMs缺乏在对抗性对话反馈下维持已建立时空信念的鲁棒机制。

Abstract: Video Large Language Models (Vid-LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable performance in video understanding tasks, yet their robustness under conversational interaction remains largely underexplored. In this paper, we identify spatiotemporal sycophancy, a failure mode in which Vid-LLMs retract initially correct, visually grounded judgments and conform to misleading user feedback under negation-based gaslighting. Rather than merely changing their answers, the models often fabricate unsupported temporal or spatial explanations to justify incorrect revisions. To systematically investigate this phenomenon, we propose a negation-based gaslighting evaluation framework and introduce GasVideo-1000, a curated benchmark designed to probe spatiotemporal sycophancy with clear visual grounding and temporal reasoning requirements. We evaluate a broad range of state-of-the-art open-source and proprietary Vid-LLMs across diverse video understanding tasks. Extensive experiments reveal that vulnerability to negation-based gaslighting is pervasive and severe, even among models with strong baseline performance.
