While prompt-level grounding constraints can partially mitigate this behavior, they do not reliably prevent hallucinated justifications or belief reversal. Our results indicate that current Vid-LLMs lack robust mechanisms for maintaining grounded spatiotemporal beliefs under adversarial conversational feedback.

</details>


### [147] [UniCSG: Unified High-Fidelity Content-Constrained Style-Driven Generation via Staged Semantic and Frequency Disentanglement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17850)
*Jingwei Yang,Ruoxi Wu,Wei Shen,Meng Li,Yulong Liu,Huimin She,Lunxi Yuan*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出UniCSG统一框架，通过潜在空间语义解缠（低频预处理+条件损坏）和频率感知细节重建（多尺度频率监督）两阶段训练，结合像素空间奖励学习，解决DiT扩散模型在风格迁移中的内容-风格纠缠问题，在文本引导和参考引导两种设置下均提升内容保真度、风格对齐和鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: DiT扩散模型在风格迁移中存在内容-风格纠缠问题，导致参考内容泄露和生成不稳定，缺乏统一有效的内容约束风格驱动生成框架。

Method: 提出UniCSG统一框架，包含两个阶段：(i) 潜在空间语义解缠阶段，结合低频预处理与条件损坏促进内容-风格分离；(ii) 潜在空间频率感知细节重建阶段，通过多尺度频率监督细化细节；并引入像素空间奖励学习对齐潜在目标与解码后的感知质量。

Result: 在文本引导和参考引导两种设置下，实验证明UniCSG在内容保真度、风格对齐和鲁棒性方面均取得改进。

Conclusion: UniCSG通过解缠训练和频率感知重建有效缓解了内容-风格纠缠，实现了更稳定的风格迁移生成。

Abstract: Style transfer must match a target style while preserving content semantics. DiT-based diffusion models often suffer from content-style entanglement, leading to reference-content leakage and unstable generation. We present UniCSG, a unified framework for content-constrained, style-driven generation in both text-guided and reference-guided settings. UniCSG employs staged training: (i) a latent-space semantic disentanglement stage that combines low-frequency preprocessing with conditioning corruption to encourage content-style separation, and (ii) a latent-space frequency-aware detail reconstruction stage that refines details via multi-scale frequency supervision. We further incorporate pixel-space reward learning to align latent objectives with perceptual quality after decoding. Experiments demonstrate improved content faithfulness, style alignment, and robustness in both settings.

</details>


### [148] [AI Approach for MRI-only Full-Spine Vertebral Segmentation and 3D Reconstruction in Paediatric Scoliosis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17846)
*Nathasha Naranpanawa,Maree T. Izatt,Robert D. Labrom,Geoffrey N. Askin,J. Paige Little*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出一种AI框架，利用GAN将低剂量CT转换为伪MRI图像，结合标记的胸部MRI数据训练U-Net模型，实现从MRI全自动分割胸腰椎（T1-L5）并进行3D重建，Dice评分达88%，处理时间从约1小时缩短至1分钟以内，实现无辐射的脊柱畸形评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MRI在儿童脊柱成像中因无电离辐射优于CT，但脊柱畸形评估中缺乏自动化的高分辨率3D骨骼重建方法，现有MRI 3D重建因人工流程繁琐且缺乏标注的全脊柱数据集而难以实用化。

Method: 使用GAN将历史低剂量CT图像转换为伪MRI图像，与已有的标注胸部MRI数据结合，训练基于U-Net的分割模型，实现从MRI图像全自动分割胸腰椎（T1-L5）并进行连续3D重建。

Result: 模型实现了88%的Dice分割精度，3D重建时间从约1小时降至1分钟以内，并保留了AIS特异性畸形特征。

Conclusion: 该AI框架实现了基于MRI的无辐射全自动3D脊柱畸形评估，可支持儿童脊柱疾病的临床评估、手术规划和导航。

Abstract: MRI is preferred over CT in paediatric imaging because it avoids ionising radiation, but its use in spine deformity assessment is largely limited by the lack of automated, high-resolution 3D bony reconstruction, which continues to rely on CT. MRI-based 3D reconstruction remains impractical due to manual workflows and the scarcity of labelled full-spine datasets. This study introduces an AI framework that enables fully automated thoracolumbar spine (T1-L5) segmentation and 3D reconstruction from MRI alone. Historical low-dose CT scans from adolescent idiopathic scoliosis (AIS) patients were converted into MRI-like images using a GAN and combined with existing labelled thoracic MRI data to train a U-Net-based model. The resulting algorithm accurately generated continuous thoracolumbar 3D reconstructions, improved segmentation accuracy (88% Dice score), and reduced processing time from approximately 1 hour to under one minute, while preserving AIS-specific deformity features. This approach enables radiation-free 3D deformity assessment from MRI, supporting clinical evaluation, surgical planning, and navigation in paediatric spine care.

</details>


### [149] [PCM-NeRF: Probabilistic Camera Modeling for Neural Radiance Fields under Pose Uncertainty](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17831)
*Shravan Venkatraman,Rakesh Raj Madavan,Pavan Kumar Sathya Venkatesh*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: PCM-NeRF提出了一种概率框架，通过为每个相机引入可学习的不确定性参数（均值和方差），在神经表面重建中处理不完美的相机位姿估计。该框架利用不确定性正则化损失和自适应梯度更新机制，有效防止了低质量位姿对重建结果的破坏，在存在严重位姿异常的场景中显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的神经表面重建方法通常假设相机位姿完全准确，但实际中Structure-from-Motion系统提供的位姿估计往往存在误差，导致重建结果出现畸变或不完整。作者旨在解决这一假设与实际情况之间的差距。

Method: 基于SG-NeRF，将每个相机位姿建模为具有可学习均值和方差的分布，其中方差初始化自SfM对应点质量；引入不确定性正则化损失将学习到的方差与视图置信度耦合；通过不确定性直接调节有效位姿学习率，对不确定度高的相机施加阻尼梯度更新，防止初始化较差的视图破坏重建。

Result: 在存在严重位姿异常场景的实验中，PCM-NeRF在Chamfer Distance和F-Score指标上持续优于现有最先进方法，尤其对几何结构复杂的物体表现突出，且无需前景掩码。

Conclusion: 所提出的轻量级不确定性建模机制有效提升了神经表面重建对不完美位姿的鲁棒性，且不改变渲染管线、计算开销极小，是一种实用且高效的改进方案。

Abstract: Neural surface reconstruction methods typically treat camera poses as fixed values, assuming perfect accuracy from Structure-from-Motion (SfM) systems. This assumption breaks down with imperfect pose estimates, leading to distorted or incomplete reconstructions. We present PCM-NeRF, a probabilistic framework that augments neural surface reconstruction with per-camera learnable uncertainty, built on top of SG-NeRF. Rather than treating all cameras equally throughout optimization, we represent each pose as a distribution with a learnable mean and variance, initialized from SfM correspondence quality. An uncertainty regularization loss couples the learned variance to view confidence, and the resulting uncertainty directly modulates the effective pose learning rate: uncertain cameras receive damped gradient updates, preventing poorly initialized views from corrupting the reconstruction. This lightweight mechanism requires no changes to the rendering pipeline and adds negligible overhead. Experiments on challenging scenes with severe pose outliers demonstrate that PCM-NeRF consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both Chamfer Distance and F-Score, particularly for geometrically complex structures, without requiring foreground masks.

</details>


### [150] [GR4CIL: Gap-compensated Routing for CLIP-based Class Incremental Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17822)
*Tianqi Wang,Jingcai Guo*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: GR4CIL提出了一种结合任务判别与知识路由的框架，通过保持任务特定视觉知识、构建增量稳定的共享文本语义空间以及引入正交补偿机制，有效解决了CLIP模型在类增量学习中的旧知识漂移和跨任务响应校准问题，在多个基准上取得了领先性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有CLIP-based类增量学习方法面临两大挑战：共享参数适配导致旧知识漂移，以及任务特定知识组织引发跨任务响应校准不良，使得可靠的路由选择困难。

Method: 提出GR4CIL框架，包含：(1) 保留任务特定视觉知识的同时维护增量稳定的共享文本语义空间以减少任务间干扰；(2) 引入正交补偿机制缓解模态间隙导致的偏差，增强任务内判别性，扩大真实任务与竞争任务之间的得分差距。

Result: 在多个基准数据集上，GR4CIL始终优于强基线方法，同时保留了零样本泛化能力。

Conclusion: GR4CIL通过任务判别与知识路由的结合，实现了更可靠的任务感知路由，有效解决了CLIP-based CIL中的关键瓶颈问题。

Abstract: Class-Incremental Learning (CIL) aims to continuously acquire new categories while preserving previously learned knowledge. Recently, Contrastive Language-Image Pre-trained (CLIP) models have shown strong potential for CIL due to their powerful generalization ability. However, existing methods still face two key challenges: shared-parameter adaptation tends to cause old-knowledge drift, and task-specific knowledge organization often leads to poorly calibrated cross-task responses, making reliable routing difficult. To address these issues, we propose GR4CIL, a framework combining task discrimination and knowledge routing for CLIP-based CIL. GR4CIL preserves task-specific visual knowledge while maintaining an incrementally stable shared textual semantic space, thereby reducing interference across tasks. Moreover, we introduce an orthogonal compensation mechanism to mitigate modality-gap-induced bias, enhance within-task discrimination, and enlarge the score margin between the ground-truth task and competing tasks. As a result, GR4CIL enables more reliable task-aware routing over learned knowledge while retaining the zero-shot generalization capability. Experiments on multiple benchmarks show that GR4CIL consistently outperforms strong baselines.

</details>


### [151] [AnyLift: Scaling Motion Reconstruction from Internet Videos via 2D Diffusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17818)
*Hongjie Li,Heng Yu,Jiaman Li,Hong-Xing Yu,Ehsan Adeli,C. Karen Liu,Jiajun Wu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出一种两阶段框架，利用2D扩散模型从互联网视频中重建3D人体运动和人-物交互（HOI），解决动态相机下全局一致3D运动重建的难题，并处理现有动作捕捉数据集中稀缺的运动类型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从互联网视频重建3D人体运动和人-物交互是构建大规模人类行为数据集的基础步骤，但现有方法在动态相机下难以恢复全局一致的3D运动，尤其对动作捕捉数据中代表性不足的运动类型（如体操）以及复杂的人-物交互场景效果不佳。

Method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段，利用互联网视频中提取的2D关键点，为每个领域合成多视角2D运动数据，以引入现有MoCap数据集中罕见的人体运动；第二阶段，训练一个相机条件化的多视角2D运动扩散模型，基于领域特定的合成数据在全局空间中恢复3D人体运动和3D人-物交互。

Result: 在包含挑战性运动（如体操）的互联网视频和野外HOI视频上验证了有效性，在生成真实的人体运动和人-物交互方面优于先前工作。

Conclusion: 两阶段框架结合2D扩散模型能有效从互联网视频中重建高质量3D人体运动和HOI，尤其对现有数据集覆盖不足的运动类型表现出色。

Abstract: Reconstructing 3D human motion and human-object interactions (HOI) from Internet videos is a fundamental step toward building large-scale datasets of human behavior. Existing methods struggle to recover globally consistent 3D motion under dynamic cameras, especially for motion types underrepresented in current motion-capture datasets, and face additional difficulty recovering coherent human-object interactions in 3D. We introduce a two-stage framework leveraging 2D diffusion that reconstructs 3D human motion and HOI from Internet videos. In the first stage, we synthesize multi-view 2D motion data for each domain, leveraging 2D keypoints extracted from Internet videos to incorporate human motions that rarely appear in existing MoCap datasets. In the second stage, a camera-conditioned multi-view 2D motion diffusion model is trained on the domain-specific synthetic data to recover 3D human motion and 3D HOI in the world space. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on Internet videos featuring challenging motions such as gymnastics, as well as in-the-wild HOI videos, and show that it outperforms prior work in producing realistic human motion and human-object interaction.

</details>


### [152] [ESCAPE: Episodic Spatial Memory and Adaptive Execution Policy for Long-Horizon Mobile Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13633)
*Jingjing Qian,Zeyuan He,Chen Shi,Lei Xiao,Li Jiang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: ESCAPE通过提出一种紧耦合的感知-定位-执行框架，结合时空融合建图模块（构建无深度持久3D空间记忆）、记忆驱动目标定位模块（生成精准交互掩码）和自适应执行策略（动态协调全局导航与局部操作），在ALFRED基准上达到SOTA，长时任务中仍保持稳健性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 复杂室内环境中长时程任务存在灾难性遗忘、空间不一致和刚性执行等问题，现有方法难以兼顾导航与操作的鲁棒协调。

Method: 提出ESCAPE框架，包含三个核心模块：(1) 时空融合建图模块，自回归构建无需深度的持久3D空间记忆；(2) 记忆驱动目标定位模块，生成精确交互掩码；(3) 自适应执行策略，动态协调主动全局导航与反应式局部操作以捕捉机会性目标。

Result: 在ALFRED基准上，ESCAPE在test seen/unseen环境下分别达到65.09%和60.79%的成功率（含逐步指令）；在无详细指导的长时任务中仍保持61.24%/56.04%的成功率，路径长度加权指标显著提升。

Conclusion: ESCAPE通过紧耦合的感知-定位-执行流程有效解决了长时程任务中的关键挑战，在减少冗余探索的同时实现了鲁棒的导航与操作协调。

Abstract: Coordinating navigation and manipulation with robust performance is essential for embodied AI in complex indoor environments. However, as tasks extend over long horizons, existing methods often struggle due to catastrophic forgetting, spatial inconsistency, and rigid execution. To address these issues, we propose ESCAPE (Episodic Spatial Memory Coupled with an Adaptive Policy for Execution), operating through a tightly coupled perception-grounding-execution workflow. For robust perception, ESCAPE features a Spatio-Temporal Fusion Mapping module to autoregressively construct a depth-free, persistent 3D spatial memory, alongside a Memory-Driven Target Grounding module for precise interaction mask generation. To achieve flexible action, our Adaptive Execution Policy dynamically orchestrates proactive global navigation and reactive local manipulation to seize opportunistic targets. ESCAPE achieves state-of-the-art performance on the ALFRED benchmark, reaching 65.09% and 60.79% success rates in test seen and unseen environments with step-by-step instructions. By reducing redundant exploration, our ESCAPE attains substantial improvements in path-length-weighted metrics and maintains robust performance (61.24% / 56.04%) even without detailed guidance for long-horizon tasks.

</details>


### [153] [View-Consistent 3D Scene Editing via Dual-Path Structural Correspondense and Semantic Continuity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17801)
*Pufan Li,Bi'an Du,Shenghe Zheng,Junyi Yao,Wei Hu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于分布视角的多视角一致3D场景编辑框架，通过显式引入跨视角依赖关系，并设计双路径一致性机制（投影引导的结构对齐和补丁级语义传播），在复杂场景上实现了精确且一致的编辑效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于渲染-编辑-优化的3D场景编辑方法存在跨视角不一致问题，尽管引入了几何线索、跨视角交互或视频先验，但仍依赖推理时同步，鲁棒性和泛化性有限。本文从分布视角重新审视该问题，认为3D场景编辑本质需要跨视角的联合分布建模。

Method: 1) 从分布视角出发，显式引入跨视角依赖关系进行3D编辑；2) 提出双路径一致性机制，包括投影引导的结构对齐和补丁级语义传播；3) 构建了配对的多视角编辑数据集，为学习跨视角一致性提供监督信号。

Result: 大量实验表明，该方法在复杂场景上实现了优越的编辑性能，具备精确且一致的视角效果。

Conclusion: 通过将跨视角一致性建模为分布对齐问题，并引入双路径机制和配对数据集监督，有效克服了现有方法在鲁棒性和泛化性上的局限。

Abstract: Text-driven 3D scene editing has recently attracted increasing attention. Most existing methods follow a render-edit-optimize pipeline, where multi-view images are rendered from a 3D scene, edited with 2D image editors, and then used to optimize the underlying 3D representation. However, cross-view inconsistency remains a major bottleneck. Although recent methods introduce geometric cues, cross-view interactions, or video priors to mitigate this issue, they still largely rely on inference-time synchronization and thus remain limited in robustness and generalization.In this work, we recast multi-view consistent 3D editing from a distributional perspective: 3D scene editing essentially requires a joint distribution modeling across viewpoints.Based on this insight, we propose a view-consistent 3D editing framework that explicitly introduces cross-view dependencies into the editing process. Furthermore, motivated by the observation that structural correspondence and semantic continuity rely on different cross-view cues, we introduce a dual-path consistency mechanism consisting of projection-guided structural guidance and patch-level semantic propagation for effective cross-view editing. Further, we construct a paired multi-view editing dataset that provides reliable supervision for learning cross-view consistency in edited scenes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves superior editing performance with precise and consistent views for complex scenes.

</details>


### [154] [Weakly-Supervised Referring Video Object Segmentation through Text Supervision](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17797)
*Miaojing Shi,Jun Huang,Zijie Yue,Hanli Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出WSRVOS，一种仅需文本表达式的弱监督视频目标分割方法，通过对比性表达增强、双向视觉-语言特征选择与交互、实例感知表达分类、正预测融合伪掩码生成以及时序片段排序约束，在四个数据集上取得了优异效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RVOS方法大多依赖像素级掩码或边界框/点等昂贵标注，本文旨在设计一种仅需文本表达式的弱监督方法，大幅降低标注成本。

Method: 1) 利用多模态大语言模型生成正负对比性表达进行增强；2) 双向视觉-语言特征选择与交互实现细粒度多模态对齐；3) 实例感知表达分类区分正负样本；4) 正预测融合策略生成高质量伪掩码作为额外监督；5) 时序片段排序约束确保相邻帧掩码预测的时序一致性。

Result: 在A2D Sentences、J-HMDB Sentences、Ref-YouTube-VOS和Ref-DAVIS17四个数据集上取得优越性能，验证了方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 仅需文本表达式的弱监督RVOS是可行的，且能达到优异的分割性能，为降低视频目标分割标注成本提供了有效方案。

Abstract: Referring video object segmentation (RVOS) aims to segment the target instance in a video, referred by a text expression. Conventional approaches are mostly supervised learning, requiring expensive pixel-level mask annotations. To tackle it, weakly-supervised RVOS has recently been proposed to replace mask annotations with bounding boxes or points, which are however still costly and labor-intensive. In this paper, we design a novel weakly-supervised RVOS method, namely WSRVOS, to train the model with only text expressions. Given an input video and the referring expression, we first design a contrastive referring expression augmentation scheme that leverages the captioning capabilities of a multimodal large language model to generate both positive and negative expressions. We extract visual and linguistic features from the input video and generated expressions, then perform bi-directional vision-language feature selection and interaction to enable fine-grained multimodal alignment. Next, we propose an instance-aware expression classification scheme to optimize the model in distinguishing positive from negative expressions. Also, we introduce a positive-prediction fusion strategy to generate high-quality pseudo-masks, which serve as additional supervision to the model. Last, we design a temporal segment ranking constraint such that the overlaps between mask predictions of temporally neighboring frames are required to conform to specific orders. Extensive experiments on four publicly available RVOS datasets, including A2D Sentences, J-HMDB Sentences, Ref-YouTube-VOS, and Ref-DAVIS17, demonstrate the superiority of our method. Code is available at https://github.com/viscom-tongji/WSRVOS.

</details>


### [155] [DuQuant++: Fine-grained Rotation Enhances Microscaling FP4 Quantization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17789)
*Haokun Lin,Xinle Jia,Haobo Xu,Bingchen Yao,Xianglong Guo,Yichen Wu,Zhichao Lu,Ying Wei,Qingfu Zhang,Zhenan Sun*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: DuQuant++ 是一种针对 MXFP4 格式优化的异常感知细粒度旋转方法，通过将旋转块大小与微缩分组大小对齐（B=32），简化了 DuQuant 的双旋转和锯齿排列流程，在保持 W4A4 量化精度的同时将在线旋转成本减半，并在 LLaMA-3 系列上取得了最优性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MXFP4 格式在 LLM 推理中面临激活值异常导致的块共享缩放因子膨胀问题，现有基于旋转的方法（如随机 Hadamard 和可学习旋转）是数据无关的，无法针对异常集中的通道进行优化。

Method: DuQuant++ 将异常感知的细粒度旋转块大小与 MXFP4 的微缩分组大小（B=32）对齐，利用每个 MXFP4 组拥有独立缩放因子的特性，消除了原 DuQuant 中因跨块方差问题所需的双旋转和锯齿排列，用单一的异常感知旋转替代整个流水线。

Result: 在 LLaMA-3 系列模型上使用 MXFP4 W4A4 量化进行实验，DuQuant++ 一致达到了最先进的性能，同时将在线旋转成本减半并平滑了权重分布。

Conclusion: DuQuant++ 通过简化 DuQuant 的流水线并针对 MXFP4 格式优化，在保证量化精度的同时显著降低了计算开销，是 MXFP4 格式下高效 LLM 推理的有效方案。

Abstract: The MXFP4 microscaling format, which partitions tensors into blocks of 32 elements sharing an E8M0 scaling factor, has emerged as a promising substrate for efficient LLM inference, backed by native hardware support on NVIDIA Blackwell Tensor Cores. However, activation outliers pose a unique challenge under this format: a single outlier inflates the shared block scale, compressing the effective dynamic range of the remaining elements and causing significant quantization error. Existing rotation-based remedies, including randomized Hadamard and learnable rotations, are data-agnostic and therefore unable to specifically target the channels where outliers concentrate. We propose DuQuant++, which adapts the outlier-aware fine-grained rotation of DuQuant to the MXFP4 format by aligning the rotation block size with the microscaling group size (B{=}32). Because each MXFP4 group possesses an independent scaling factor, the cross-block variance issue that necessitates dual rotations and a zigzag permutation in the original DuQuant becomes irrelevant, enabling DuQuant++ to replace the entire pipeline with a single outlier-aware rotation, which halves the online rotation cost while simultaneously smoothing the weight distribution. Extensive experiments on the LLaMA-3 family under MXFP4 W4A4 quantization show that DuQuant++ consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance. Our code is available at https://github.com/Hsu1023/DuQuant-v2.

</details>


### [156] [Subject-Aware Multi-Granularity Alignment for Zero-Shot EEG-to-Image Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17782)
*Lin Jiang,Qingshan She,Jiale Xu,Haiqi Xu,Duanpo Wu,Zhenzhong Kuang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种面向零样本EEG-to-图像检索的**主体感知多粒度对齐（SAMGA）框架**，通过自适应聚合预训练视觉编码器的多级中间表示构建主体感知的监督目标，并设计**由粗到细的跨模态对齐策略**（粗粒度稳定语义几何、减少主体分布偏移；细粒度提升实例级检索判别力），在THINGS-EEG数据集上实现SOTA性能（主体内Top-1 91.3%，主体间Top-1 34.4%）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有EEG-to-图像检索方法通常使用单一固定的视觉目标或主体不变的目标构建方案，忽略了**视觉诱发EEG信号在多个表征尺度上保留信息**以及**不同主体最佳匹配的视觉粒度可能不同**这两个关键特性。

Method: 1) **主体感知视觉监督目标构建**：自适应聚合预训练视觉编码器的多个中间层表示，在训练时吸收主体依赖的粒度偏差，推理时保持主体无关。2) **由粗到细的跨模态对齐**：共享编码器下，粗粒度阶段稳定语义几何并减少主体导致的分布偏移，细粒度阶段提升实例级检索判别力。

Result: THINGS-EEG数据集上，主体内设置Top-1 91.3%、Top-5 98.8%；主体间设置Top-1 34.4%、Top-5 64.8%，均超越现有SOTA方法。

Conclusion: SAMGA通过主体感知的多粒度对齐有效解决了EEG信号多尺度信息与主体间粒度差异问题，为零样本EEG-to-图像检索提供了更鲁棒的方案。

Abstract: Zero-shot EEG-to-image retrieval aims to decode perceived visual content from electroencephalography (EEG) by aligning neural responses with pretrained visual representations, providing a promising route toward scalable visual neural decoding and practical brain-computer interfaces. However, robust EEG-to-image retrieval remains challenging, because prior methods usually rely on either a single fixed visual target or a subject-invariant target construction scheme. Such designs overlook two important properties of visually evoked EEG signals: they preserve information across multiple representational scales, and the visual granularity best matched to EEG may vary across subjects. To address these issues, subject-aware multi-granularity alignment (SAMGA) framework is proposed for zero-shot EEG-to-image retrieval. SAMGA first constructs a subject-aware visual supervision target by adaptively aggregating multiple intermediate representations from a pretrained vision encoder, allowing the model to absorb subject-dependent granularity deviations during training while preserving subject-agnostic inference. Building on this adaptive target construction, a coarse-to-fine cross-modal alignment strategy is further designed with a shared encoder wherein the coarse stage stabilizes the shared semantic geometry and reduces subject-induced distribution shift, and the fine stage further improves instance-level retrieval discrimination. Extensive experiments on the THINGS-EEG benchmark demonstrate that the proposed method achieves 91.3% Top-1 and 98.8% Top-5 accuracy in the intra-subject setting, and 34.4% Top-1 and 64.8% Top-5 accuracy in the inter-subject setting, outperforming recent state-of-the-art methods.

</details>


### [157] [Ego-InBetween: Generating Object State Transitions in Ego-Centric Videos](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17749)
*Mengmeng Ge,Takashi Isobe,Xu Jia,Yanan Sun,Zetong Yang,Weinong Wang,Dong Zhou,Dong Li,Huchuan Lu,Emad Barsoum*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出EgoIn框架，用于从自我中心视角生成物体在初始状态和目标状态之间的中间过渡帧，解决EIVST任务中的视觉理解与一致性生成挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解物理变换过程对认知和AI系统至关重要，尤其是从自我中心视角（egocentric perspective）建模动作。现有生成模型难以同时完成两个任务：(1) 理解初始和目标状态的视觉场景并推理变换步骤；(2) 生成遵循指令且保持物体外观一致的中间过渡。

Method: 提出EgoIn框架，包含三个核心模块：(1) TransitionVLM，在 curated 数据集上微调，推断两状态间的多步过渡过程，减少幻觉信息；(2) Transition Conditioning模块，生成过渡条件以指导帧序列生成；(3) Object-aware Auxiliary Supervision，保持过渡过程中物体外观的一致性。

Result: 在人与物体交互及机器人与物体交互数据集上的大量实验表明，EgoIn在生成语义有意义且视觉连贯的变换序列方面表现优越。

Conclusion: EgoIn有效解决了自我中心视角下的指令式视觉状态过渡任务，在跨人机场景中均能生成高质量、一致的过渡帧序列。

Abstract: Understanding physical transformation processes is crucial for both human cognition and artificial intelligence systems, particularly from an egocentric perspective, which serves as a key bridge between humans and machines in action modeling. We define this modeling process as Egocentric Instructed Visual State Transition (EIVST), which involves generating intermediate frames that depict object transformations between initial and target states under a brief action instruction. EIVST poses two challenges for current generative models: (1) understanding the visual scenes of the initial and target states and reasoning about transformation steps from an egocentric view, and (2) generating a consistent intermediate transition that follows the given instruction while preserving object appearance across the two visual states. To address these challenges, we propose the EgoIn framework. It first infers the multi-step transition process between two given states using TransitionVLM, fine-tuned on our curated dataset to better adapt to this task and reduce hallucinated information. It then generates a sequence of frames based on transition conditions produced by the proposed Transition Conditioning module. Additionally, we introduce Object-aware Auxiliary Supervision to preserve consistent object appearance throughout the transition. Extensive experiments on human-object and robot-object interaction datasets demonstrate EgoIn's superior performance in generating semantically meaningful and visually coherent transformation sequences.

</details>


### [158] [Source-Free Domain Adaptation with Vision-Language Prior](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17748)
*Song Tang,Yunxiang Bai,Wenxin Su,Mao Ye,Jianwei Zhang,Xiatian Zhu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出DIFO++方法，利用现成的视觉-语言多模态模型（如CLIP）进行源自由域适应（SFDA），通过交替执行ViL模型定制（基于互信息最大化的提示学习）和知识蒸馏（聚焦于"间隙区域"的缩减），结合类别注意力、预测一致性和参考熵最小化，显著超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统SFDA方法依赖伪标签和辅助监督，存在误差累积问题。现有ViL模型虽知识丰富但过于通用，无法直接适配特定目标任务。

Method: DIFO++采用交替优化策略：(1) 通过最大化与目标模型的互信息进行提示学习，定制ViL模型；(2) 将定制后的ViL知识蒸馏到目标模型。具体包括：识别并聚焦特征纠缠、类别模糊的"间隙区域"；融合目标模型与ViL模型的预测生成可靠伪标签（辅以记忆机制）；通过类别注意力与预测一致性指导间隙区域缩减；引入参考熵最小化抑制不确定性。

Result: 大量实验表明DIFO++显著优于当前最先进的SFDA方法。

Conclusion: 首次探索将现成ViL多模态模型用于SFDA，并提出DIFO++有效解决其通用性问题，通过渐进式知识适配实现任务特化，代码已开源。

Abstract: Source-Free Domain Adaptation (SFDA) seeks to adapt a source model, which is pre-trained on a supervised source domain, for a target domain, with only access to unlabeled target training data. Relying on pseudo labeling and/or auxiliary supervision, conventional methods are inevitably error-prone. To mitigate this limitation, in this work we for the first time explore the potentials of off-the-shelf vision-language (ViL) multimodal models (e.g., CLIP) with rich whilst heterogeneous knowledge. We find that directly applying the ViL model to the target domain in a zero-shot fashion is unsatisfactory, as it is not specialized for this particular task but largely generic. To make it task-specific, we propose a novel DIFO++ approach. Specifically, DIFO++ alternates between two steps during adaptation: (i) Customizing the ViL model by maximizing the mutual information with the target model in a prompt learning manner, (ii) Distilling the knowledge of this customized ViL model to the target model, centering on gap region reduction. During progressive knowledge adaptation, we first identify and focus on the gap region, where enclosed features are entangled and class-ambiguous, as it often captures richer task-specific semantics. Reliable pseudo-labels are then generated by fusing predictions from the target and ViL models, supported by a memory mechanism. Finally, gap region reduction is guided by category attention and predictive consistency for semantic alignment, complemented by referenced entropy minimization to suppress uncertainty. Extensive experiments show that DIFO++ significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art alternatives. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/tntek/DIFO-Plus.

</details>


### [159] [IncreFA: Breaking the Static Wall of Generative Model Attribution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17736)
*Haotian Qin,Dongliang Chang,Yueying Gao,Yuexuan Tan,Lei Chen,Zhanyu Ma*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出 IncreFA，一个将图像归因重新定义为结构化增量学习问题的框架，通过层次约束和潜在记忆库两种机制，使系统能够在新生成模型不断涌现时持续学习，在覆盖 28 个生成模型的 IABench 基准上达到最先进性能，未见检测率达 98.93%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图像归因方法（水印、分类器、反演）无法适应生成模型的快速迭代，每次新模型发布都导致已有方法失效。核心问题不在于模型识别本身，而在于归因系统缺乏自适应能力。

Method: IncreFA 将归因建模为结构化增量学习问题，包含两个机制：(1) 层次约束——利用可学习正交先验编码生成架构的层次关系，解耦族级不变特征与模型特定特征；(2) 潜在记忆库——回放紧凑的潜在样本并混合生成伪未见样本，稳定表征漂移并增强开放集感知能力。

Result: 在覆盖 2022-2025 年间 28 个生成模型的 IABench 基准上，按时序开放集协议，IncreFA 达到最先进的归因准确率，未见检测率达 98.93%。

Conclusion: 将图像归因重构为增量学习问题是解决生成模型快速迭代下归因失效问题的有效路径，层次约束与潜在记忆库的协同机制能够实现持续自适应归因。

Abstract: As AI generative models evolve at unprecedented speed, image attribution has become a moving target. New diffusion, adversarial and autoregressive generators appear almost monthly, making existing watermark, classifier and inversion methods obsolete upon release. The core problem lies not in model recognition, but in the inability to adapt attribution itself. We introduce IncreFA, a framework that redefines attribution as a structured incremental learning problem, allowing the system to learn continuously as new generative models emerge. IncreFA departs from conventional incremental learning by exploiting the hierarchical relationships among generative architectures and coupling them with continual adaptation. It integrates two mutually reinforcing mechanisms: (1) Hierarchical Constraints, which encode architectural hierarchies through learnable orthogonal priors to disentangle family-level invariants from model-specific idiosyncrasies; and (2) a Latent Memory Bank, which replays compact latent exemplars and mixes them to generate pseudo-unseen samples, stabilising representation drift and enhancing open-set awareness. On the newly constructed Incremental Attribution Benchmark (IABench) covering 28 generative models released between 2022 and 2025, IncreFA achieves state-of-the-art attribution accuracy and 98.93% unseen detection under a temporally ordered open-set protocol. Code will be available at https://github.com/Ant0ny44/IncreFA.

</details>


### [160] [Score-Based Matching with Target Guidance for Cryo-EM Denoising](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17734)
*Xiaoqi Wu,Xueying Zhan,Wen Li,Junhao Wu,Xin Huang,Min Xu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于分数（score）的冷冻电镜（cryo-EM）图像去噪框架，通过学习干净数据的分数函数来恢复粒子信号并保持结构一致性，进一步引入目标引导变体利用参考密度稳定弱信号下的分数学习，实验表明该方法能更好地抑制低频背景噪声，提升粒子挑选和三维重建的结构一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有cryo-EM去噪方法通常采用逐像素或Noise2Noise风格的目标函数进行训练，虽能提升视觉质量，但未能明确考虑下游分析所需的结构一致性，导致去噪结果对后续粒子挑选、二维分类和三维重建的改善有限。

Method: 提出基于分数（score-based）的去噪框架，学习干净数据的分数函数以恢复粒子信号并保持结构信息；在此基础上引入目标引导变体，利用参考密度图作为先验指导，在信号弱且模糊的条件下稳定分数学习，从而更好地抑制结构化低频背景噪声。

Result: 在多个cryo-EM数据集上的实验表明，所提出的分数去噪方法能一致地提升下游粒子挑选性能，并生成结构一致性更强的三维重建结果。

Conclusion: 基于分数的去噪框架通过显式建模干净数据的分布，能够更好地保持结构信息并抑制背景噪声，相比传统逐像素或Noise2Noise方法更适用于cryo-EM下游分析任务。

Abstract: Cryo-electron microscopy (cryo-EM) enables single-particle analysis of biological macromolecules under strict low-dose imaging conditions, but the resulting micrographs often exhibit extremely low signal-to-noise ratios and weak particle visibility. Image denoising is therefore an important preprocessing step for downstream cryo-EM analysis, including particle picking, 2D classification, and 3D reconstruction. Existing cryo-EM denoising methods are commonly trained with pixel-wise or Noise2Noise-style objectives, which can improve visual quality but do not explicitly account for structural consistency required by downstream analysis. In this work, we propose a score-based denoising framework for cryo-EM that learns the clean-data score to recover particle signals while better preserving structural information. Building on this formulation, we further introduce a target-guided variant that incorporates reference-density guidance to stabilize score learning under weak and ambiguous signal conditions. Rather than simply amplifying particle-like responses, our framework better suppresses structured low-frequency background, which improves particle--background separability for downstream analysis. Experiments on multiple cryo-EM datasets show that our score-based methods consistently improve downstream particle picking and produce more structure-consistent 3D reconstructions. Experiments on multiple cryo-EM datasets show that our methods improve downstream particle picking and produce more structure-consistent reconstructions.

</details>


### [161] [Voronoi-guided Bilateral 2D Gaussian Splatting for Arbitrary-Scale Hyperspectral Image Super-Resolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17727)
*Jie Zhang,Jinkun You,Shi Chen,Yicong Zhou*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出GaussianHSI框架，基于2D高斯泼溅和Voronoi引导的双边加权方法，实现任意尺度高光谱图像超分辨率，在基准数据集上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有高光谱图像超分辨率方法通常需要针对不同尺度进行修改，限制了任意尺度重建的灵活性；而基于2D高斯泼溅的现有方法依赖光栅化策略，空间建模不够灵活，且难以扩展到高光谱图像超分辨率任务中。

Method: 1) Voronoi引导的双边2D高斯泼溅：预测一组高斯函数表示输入，通过Voronoi引导选择与目标像素相关的高斯函数，再通过参考感知双边加权（考虑几何相关性和与低分辨率特征的一致性）聚合重建；2) 光谱细节增强模块改善光谱重建质量。

Result: 在基准数据集上的大量实验表明，GaussianHSI在任意尺度高光谱图像超分辨率任务上优于现有最先进方法。

Conclusion: GaussianHSI通过连续表示和自适应空间重建，有效解决了任意尺度高光谱图像超分辨率问题，同时保持了光谱保真度。

Abstract: Most existing hyperspectral image super-resolution methods require modifications for different scales, limiting their flexibility in arbitrary-scale reconstruction. 2D Gaussian splatting provides a continuous representation that is compatible with arbitrary-scale super-resolution. Existing methods often rely on rasterization strategies, which may limit flexible spatial modeling. Extending them to hyperspectral image super-resolution remains challenging, as the task requires adaptive spatial reconstruction while preserving spectral fidelity. This paper proposes GaussianHSI, a Gaussian-Splatting-based framework for arbitrary-scale hyperspectral image super-resolution. We develop a Voronoi-Guided Bilateral 2D Gaussian Splatting for spatial reconstruction. After predicting a set of Gaussian functions to represent the input, it associates each target pixel with relevant Gaussian functions through Voronoi-guided selection. The target pixel is then reconstructed by aggregating the selected Gaussian functions with reference-aware bilateral weighting, which considers both geometric relevance and consistency with low-resolution features. We further introduce a Spectral Detail Enhancement module to improve spectral reconstruction. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of GaussianHSI over state-of-the-art methods for arbitrary-scale hyperspectral image super-resolution.

</details>


### [162] [GeGS-PCR: Effective and Robust 3D Point Cloud Registration with Two-Stage Color-Enhanced Geometric-3DGS Fusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17721)
*Jiayi Tian,Haiduo Huang,Tian Xia,Wenzhe Zhao,Pengju Ren*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: GeGS-PCR是一种结合几何、颜色和高斯信息的两阶段点云配准方法，通过颜色编码器、Geometric-3DGS模块、LORA优化和联合光度损失，在Color3DMatch和Color3DLoMatch数据集上达到SOTA性能，配准召回率99.9%，相对旋转误差0.013，相对平移误差0.024。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统点云配准方法仅依赖几何特征，在低重叠度和不完整场景中表现不佳，需要利用颜色信息来提升配准鲁棒性。

Method: 1) 设计颜色编码器，从原始点云中提取多层级几何与颜色特征；2) 提出Geometric-3DGS模块，对彩色超点的局部邻域信息进行编码，保持全局不变的几何-颜色上下文；3) 采用LORA优化保持性能同时保留3DGS的表达能力；4) 利用快速可微渲染优化配准过程；5) 提出联合光度损失，同时利用几何和颜色特征。

Result: 在ColorKitti、Color3DMatch和Color3DLoMatch数据集上，配准召回率99.9%，相对旋转误差0.013，相对平移误差0.024，精度提升至少2倍。

Conclusion: GeGS-PCR通过融合几何、颜色和高斯信息，有效解决了低重叠点云配准难题，达到了最先进的性能。

Abstract: We address the challenge of point cloud registration using color information, where traditional methods relying solely on geometric features often struggle in low-overlap and incomplete scenarios. To overcome these limitations, we propose GeGS-PCR, a novel two-stage method that combines geometric, color, and Gaussian information for robust registration. Our approach incorporates a dedicated color encoder that enhances color features by extracting multi-level geometric and color data from the original point cloud. We introduce the \textbf{Ge}ometric-3D\textbf{GS} module, which encodes the local neighborhood information of colored superpoints to ensure a globally invariant geometric-color context. Leveraging LORA optimization, we maintain high performance while preserving the expressiveness of 3DGS. Additionally, fast differentiable rendering is utilized to refine the registration process, leading to improved convergence. To further enhance performance, we propose a joint photometric loss that exploits both geometric and color features. This enables strong performance in challenging conditions with extremely low point cloud overlap. We validate our method by colorizing the Kitti dataset as ColorKitti and testing on both Color3DMatch and Color3DLoMatch datasets. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance with \textit{Registration Recall} at 99.9\%, \textit{Relative Rotation Error} as low as 0.013, and \textit{Relative Translation Error} as low as 0.024, improving precision by at least a factor of 2.

</details>


### [163] [DanceCrafter: Fine-Grained Text-Driven Controllable Dance Generation via Choreographic Syntax](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18648)
*Hang Yuan,Xiaolin Hu,Yan Wan,Menglin Gao,Wenzhe Yu,Cong Huang,Fei Xu,Qing Li,Christina Dan Wang,Zhou Yu,Kai Chen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出基于舞蹈学、人体解剖学和生物力学的编舞句法理论框架，构建了最细粒度的舞蹈数据集DanceFlow（41小时高质量动作+634万字描述），并设计了舞蹈专用运动Transformer DanceCrafter，通过连续流形运动表示、混合归一化和解剖感知损失实现高保真可控舞蹈生成，在运动质量、细粒度控制和生成自然度方面达到SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 文本驱动的可控舞蹈生成领域因高质量数据集极度稀缺以及复杂编舞难以描述而进展缓慢，舞蹈动作具有复杂的空间动态、强方向性和身体部位高度解耦的特点，现有方法难以应对这些挑战。

Method: 1) 提出Choreographic Syntax理论框架及配套标注系统；2) 构建DanceFlow数据集（41小时运动+634万字描述）；3) 设计DanceCrafter运动Transformer，基于Momentum Human Rig，采用连续流形运动表示和混合归一化策略，并引入解剖感知损失以显式约束身体部位的解耦特性。

Result: 在运动质量、细粒度可控性和生成自然度方面达到SOTA性能，经大量评估和用户研究验证。

Conclusion: 通过融合舞蹈学、解剖学和生物力学的跨学科理论指导数据构建与模型设计，能够有效解决舞蹈生成中的复杂空间动态和身体部位解耦问题，实现高保真稳定的舞蹈序列生成。

Abstract: Text-driven controllable dance generation remains under-explored, primarily due to the severe scarcity of high-quality datasets and the inherent difficulty of articulating complex choreographies. Characterizing dance is particularly challenging owing to its intricate spatial dynamics, strong directionality, and the highly decoupled movements of distinct body parts. To overcome these bottlenecks, we bridge principles from dance studies, human anatomy, and biomechanics to propose \textit{Choreographic Syntax}, a novel theoretical framework with a tailored annotation system. Grounded in this syntax, we combine professional dance archives with high-fidelity motion capture data to construct \textbf{DanceFlow}, the most fine-grained dance dataset to date. It encompasses 41 hours of high-quality motions paired with 6.34 million words of detailed descriptions. At the model level, we introduce \textbf{DanceCrafter}, a tailored motion transformer built upon the Momentum Human Rig. To circumvent optimization instabilities, we construct a continuous manifold motion representation paired with a hybrid normalization strategy. Furthermore, we design an anatomy-aware loss to explicitly regulate the decoupled nature of body parts. Together, these adaptations empower DanceCrafter to achieve the high-fidelity and stable generation of complex dance sequences. Extensive evaluations and user studies demonstrate our state-of-the-art performance in motion quality, fine-grained controllability, and generation naturalness.

</details>


### [164] [Dynamic Visual-semantic Alignment for Zero-shot Learning with Ambiguous Labels](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17710)
*Jiangnan Li,Linqing Huang,Xiaowen Yan,Min Gan,Wenpeng Lu,Jinfu Fan*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出动态视觉-语义对齐（DVSA）框架，通过双向对齐、互信息对比优化和动态标签消歧，解决零样本学习中的标签噪声和模糊性问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有零样本学习方法通常假设标签是干净的，忽略了真实场景中存在的标签噪声和模糊性，导致性能下降。为此，需要一种能够从模糊标签中鲁棒学习的ZSL框架。

Method: 1) 双向视觉-语义对齐模块（带注意力机制），相互校准视觉特征和属性原型；2) 基于互信息（MI）的属性级对比优化，增强判别性和语义一致性；3) 动态标签消歧机制，迭代纠正噪声监督，保持语义一致性，缩小实例-标签差距。

Result: 在标准基准上的大量实验验证了DVSA在模糊监督下取得了更强的性能。

Conclusion: DVSA通过动态标签消歧和视觉-语义双向对齐，有效解决了零样本学习中的标签噪声问题，提升了模型在模糊标签场景下的泛化能力。

Abstract: Zero-shot learning (ZSL) aims to recognize unseen classes without visual instances. However, existing methods usually assume clean labels, overlooking real-world label noise and ambiguity, which degrades performance. To bridge this gap, we propose the Dynamic Visual-semantic Alignment (DVSA), a robust ZSL framework for learning from ambiguous labels. DVSA uses a bidirectional visual-semantic alignment module with attention to mutually calibrate visual features and attribute prototypes, and a contrastive optimization grounded in Mutual Information (MI) at the attribute level to strengthen discriminative, semantically consistent attributes. In addition, a dynamic label disambiguation mechanism iteratively corrects noisy supervision while preserving semantic consistency, narrowing the instance-label gap, and improving generalization. Extensive experiments on standard benchmarks verify that DVSA achieves stronger performance under ambiguous supervision.

</details>


### [165] [4th Workshop on Maritime Computer Vision (MaCVi): Challenge Overview](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13244)
*Benjamin Kiefer,Jan Lukas Augustin,Jon Muhovič,Mingi Jeong,Arnold Wiliem,Janez Pers,Matej Kristan,Alberto Quattrini Li,Matija Teršek,Josip Šarić,Arpita Vats,Dominik Hildebrand,Rafia Rahim,Mahmut Karaaslan,Arpit Vaishya,Steve Xie,Ersin Kaya,Akib Mashrur,Tze-Hsiang Tang,Chun-Ming Tsai,Jun-Wei Hsieh,Ming-Ching Chang,Wonwoo Jo,Doyeon Lee,Yusi Cao,Lingling Li,Vinayak Nageli,Arshad Jamal,Gorthi Rama Krishna Sai Subrahmanyam,Jemo Maeng,Seongju Lee,Kyoobin Lee,Xu Liu,LiCheng Jiao,Jannik Sheikh,Martin Weinmann,Ivan Martinović,Jose Mateus Raitz Persch,Rahul Harsha Cheppally,Mehmet E. Belviranli,Dimitris Gahtidis,Hyewon Chun,Sangmun Lee,Philipp Gorczak,Hansol Kim,Jeeyeon Jeon,Borja Carrillo Perez,Jiahui Wang,Sangmin Park,Andreas Michel,Jannick Kuester,Bettina Felten,Wolfgang Gross,Yuan Feng,Justin Davis*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: MaCVi 2026研讨会作为CVPR 2026的一部分，设立了五个基准挑战，重点兼顾预测精度和嵌入式实时可行性。本报告总结了挑战设置、评估协议、数据集和基准轨道，提供了定量结果、定性比较和跨挑战方法趋势分析，并收录了顶级团队的技术报告。资源详见https://macvi.org/workshop/cvpr26。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 推动海事计算机视觉领域的发展，设立兼顾预测精度和嵌入式实时可行性的基准挑战，为研究者提供统一的评估平台。

Method: 组织五个基准挑战赛，制定评估协议和数据集，通过定量结果、定性比较和跨挑战趋势分析评估方法，并收录顶级团队技术报告。

Result: 提供了MaCVi 2026挑战赛的定量结果、定性比较以及跨挑战的新兴方法趋势分析。

Conclusion: MaCVi 2026通过多挑战设置推动了海事视觉领域的研究，强调了实际部署中的实时可行性，并提供了公开的资源供社区使用。

Abstract: The 4th Workshop on Maritime Computer Vision (MaCVi) is organized as part of CVPR 2026. This edition features five benchmark challenges with emphasis on both predictive accuracy and embedded real-time feasibility. This report summarizes the MaCVi 2026 challenge setup, evaluation protocols, datasets, and benchmark tracks, and presents quantitative results, qualitative comparisons, and cross-challenge analyses of emerging method trends. We also include technical reports from top-performing teams to highlight practical design choices and lessons learned across the benchmark suite. Datasets, leaderboards, and challenge resources are available at https://macvi.org/workshop/cvpr26.

</details>


### [166] [Self-Supervised Super-Resolution for Sentinel-5P Hyperspectral Images](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17652)
*Hyam Omar Ali,Antoine Crosnier,Romain Abraham,Baptiste Combelles,Fabrice Jégou,Bruno Galerne*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对Sentinel-5P卫星的自监督高光谱超分辨率框架，利用SURE和无偏成像约束在无高分辨率真实数据的情况下训练模型，性能接近监督学习方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Sentinel-5P空间分辨率不足，限制了精细尺度的大气分析。现有超分辨率方法依赖合成低分辨率数据的监督学习，而真实高分辨率数据不存在，导致实际应用受限。

Method: 采用自监督学习框架，结合Stein无偏风险估计（SURE）与等变成像约束，利用S5P退化算子和基于信噪比元数据推导的噪声统计信息。同时引入深度可分离卷积U-Net架构以提高效率和光谱保真度。

Result: 在LR-HR（与监督学习直接比较）和GT-SHR（超越原始空间分辨率）两种设置下，自监督模型性能与监督方法相当，且保持强一致性。空间细节优于双三次插值，EMIT数据验证重建结构具有物理意义。

Conclusion: 该自监督框架有效解决了Sentinel-5P超分辨率中缺乏高分辨率真实数据的难题，实现了无需真实标签即可获得高质量超分辨率结果，具有实际应用价值。

Abstract: Sentinel-5P (S5P) plays a critical role in atmospheric monitoring; however, its spatial resolution limits fine-scale analysis. Existing super-resolution (SR) approaches rely on supervised learning with synthetic low-resolution (LR) data, since true high-resolution (HR) data do not exist, limiting their applicability to real observations. We propose a self-supervised hyperspectral SR framework for S5P that enables training without HR ground truth. The method combines Stein's Unbiased Risk Estimator (SURE) with an equivariant imaging constraint, incorporating the S5P degradation operator and noise statistics derived from signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) metadata. We also introduce depthwise separable convolution U-Net architectures designed for efficiency and spectral fidelity. The framework is evaluated in two settings: (i) LR-HR, where synthetic LR data are used for direct comparison with supervised learning, and (ii) GT-SHR, where super-resolved images surpass the native spatial resolution without HR reference. Results across multiple bands show that self-supervised models achieve performance comparable to supervised methods while maintaining strong consistency. Qualitative analysis shows improved spatial detail over bicubic interpolation, and validation with EMIT data confirms that reconstructed structures are physically meaningful. Code is available at https://github.com/hyamomar/Sentinel-5P-Super-Resolution/tree/main/self_supervised

</details>


### [167] [ViPS: Video-informed Pose Spaces for Auto-Rigged Meshes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17623)
*Honglin Chen,Karran Pandey,Rundi Wu,Matheus Gadelha,Yannick Hold-Geoffroy,Ayush Tewari,Niloy J. Mitra,Changxi Zheng,Paul Guerrero*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: ViPS通过蒸馏视频扩散模型的运动先验，为自动绑定的3D网格学习有效的姿态空间，无需人工标注的4D数据，支持多样采样、逆运动学投影和时序一致的关键帧生成，并能在零样本条件下泛化到未见骨骼拓扑。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有运动学绑定缺乏对合法关节构型流形的表示，随机采样或手动调节原始绑定参数常导致语义或几何违规（如关节过度伸展、自交）。而依赖艺术家标注的4D数据集稀缺且成本高昂。

Method: 利用预训练视频扩散模型作为运动先验，通过蒸馏将其迁移到绑定参数化空间；使用可微几何验证器对蒙皮网格施加资产特定的有效性约束，无需手动正则化；学习得到平滑、紧凑、可控的姿态空间。

Result: 仅使用视频先验训练，ViPS在姿态合理性和多样性上与基于合成艺术家4D数据的最先进方法性能相当；在零样本条件下对分布外物种和未见骨骼拓扑展现出鲁棒泛化能力。

Conclusion: ViPS成功将生成式2D先验与结构化3D运动控制闭环连接，为自动绑定网格提供了一种无需4D数据、可泛化且高效的有效姿态空间学习框架。

Abstract: Kinematic rigs provide a structured interface for articulating 3D meshes, but they lack an inherent representation of the plausible manifold of joint configurations for a given asset. Without such a pose space, stochastic sampling or manual manipulation of raw rig parameters often leads to semantic or geometric violations, such as anatomical hyperextension and non-physical self-intersections. We propose Video-informed Pose Spaces (ViPS), a feed-forward framework that discovers the latent distribution of valid articulations for auto-rigged meshes by distilling motion priors from a pretrained video diffusion model. Unlike existing methods that rely on scarce artist-authored 4D datasets, ViPS transfers generative video priors into a universal distribution over a given rig parameterization. Differentiable geometric validators applied to the skinned mesh enforce asset-specific validity without requiring manual regularizers. Our model learns a smooth, compact, and controllable pose space that supports diverse sampling, manifold projection for inverse kinematics, and temporally coherent trajectories for keyframing. Furthermore, the distilled 3D pose samples serve as precise semantic proxies for guiding video diffusion, effectively closing the loop between generative 2D priors and structured 3D kinematic control. Our evaluations show that ViPS, trained solely on video priors, matches the performance of state-of-the-art methods trained on synthetic artist-created 4D data in both plausibility and diversity. Most importantly, as a universal model, ViPS demonstrates robust zero-shot generalization to out-of-distribution species and unseen skeletal topologies.

</details>


### [168] [PBSBench: A Multi-Level Vision-Language Framework and Benchmark for Hematopathology Whole Slide Image Interpretation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17570)
*Yuanlong Wang,Weichi Chen,Adrian Rajab,Wenfang Liu,Yulan Jin,Andrew Srisuwananukorn,Ping Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文构建了首个外周血涂片(PBS)视觉语言数据集PBSInstr，并开发了血液病理学专用多模态大模型PBS-VL，在细胞和切片两个层面实现PBS图像解读，实验表明其优于现有通用和病理MLLM。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有病理多模态大模型主要基于实体组织WSI开发，难以泛化到外周血涂片(PBS)场景，因为PBS关注单个细胞形态而非组织结构，视觉特征和诊断推理方式截然不同。

Method: 构建PBSInstr数据集（353张PBS WSI、29k细胞级图像块、27k细胞QA对、1,286切片QA对），在此基础上训练PBS-VL模型，并构建PBSBench基准（4类问题、6项任务）进行评估。

Result: PBS-VL在细胞级和切片级PBS解读任务上均优于现有通用及病理MLLM，验证了PBS专用数据的价值。

Conclusion: 该框架为开发支持血液病理学临床决策的实用AI助手奠定了基础，并将开源代码、数据集和模型权重。

Abstract: Peripheral Blood Smear (PBS) is a critical microscopic examination in hematopathology that yields whole-slide imaging (WSI). Unlike solid tissue pathology, PBS interpretation focuses on individual cell morphologies rather than tissue architecture, making it distinct in both visual characteristics and diagnostic reasoning. However, current multimodal large language models (MLLMs) for pathology are primarily developed on solid-tissue WSIs and struggle to generalize to PBS. To bridge this gap, we construct PBSInstr, the first vision-language dataset for PBS interpretation, comprising 353 PBS WSIs paired with microscopic impression paragraphs and 29k cell-level image crops annotated with cell type labels and morphological descriptions. To facilitate instruction tuning, PBSInstr further includes 27k question-answer (QA) pairs for cell crops and 1,286 QA pairs for PBS slides. Building upon PBSInstr, we develop PBS-VL, a hematopathology-tailored vision-language model for multi-level PBS interpretation at both cell and slide levels. To comprehensively evaluate PBS understanding, we construct PBSBench, a visual question answering (VQA) benchmark featuring four question categories and six PBS interpretation tasks. Experiments show that PBS-VL outperforms existing general-purpose and pathology MLLMs, underscoring the value of PBS-specific data. We release our code, datasets, and model weights to facilitate future research. Our proposed framework lays the foundation for developing practical AI assistants supporting decision-making in hematopathology.

</details>


### [169] [Multi-Camera Self-Calibration in Sports Motion Capture: Leveraging Human and Stick Poses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17567)
*Fan Yang,Changsoo Jung,Ryosuke Kawamura,Hon Yung Wong*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种无需专用标定工具、仅利用人体关键点和已知长度棍状器械的多相机外参自标定方法，在棍类运动场景中达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多相机系统在体育运动中广泛用于3D运动捕捉，但外参标定成本高、劳动强度大，现有方法依赖专用标定工具，缺乏针对棍类运动的轻量化标定方案。

Method: 提出三阶段优化管线：1）利用人体关键点（未知尺度）进行初始外参估计；2）联合重建人体和棍状器械轨迹；3）通过已知棍棒长度约束解析全局尺度，最终优化相机外参。

Result: 构建了首个棍类运动多相机自标定数据集（4类运动，3-10台相机），实验表明该方法达到SOTA，旋转和平移误差低。

Conclusion: 无需专用工具即可实现准确的多相机外参标定，为棍类体育运动的3D捕捉提供了高效、实用的解决方案。

Abstract: Multi-camera systems are widely employed in sports to capture the 3D motion of athletes and equipment, yet calibrating their extrinsic parameters remains costly and labor-intensive. We introduce an efficient, tool-free method for multi-camera extrinsic calibration tailored to sports involving stick-like implements (e.g., golf clubs, bats, hockey sticks). Our approach jointly exploits two complementary cues from synchronized multi-camera videos: (i) human body keypoints with unknown metric scale and (ii) a rigid stick-like implement of known length. We formulate a three-stage optimization pipeline that refines camera extrinsics, reconstructs human and stick trajectories, and resolves global scale via the stick-length constraint. Our method achieves accurate extrinsic calibration without dedicated calibration tools. To benchmark this task, we present the first dataset for multi-camera self-calibration in stick-based sports, consisting of synthetic sequences across four sports categories with 3 to 10 cameras. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that our method delivers SOTA performance, achieving low rotation and translation errors. Our project page: https://fandulu.github.io/sport_stick_multi_cam_calib/.

</details>


### [170] [UniGeo: Unifying Geometric Guidance for Camera-Controllable Image Editing via Video Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17565)
*Hong Jiang,Wensong Song,Zongxing Yang,Ruijie Quan,Yi Yang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 针对现有相机可控图像编辑方法因几何引导碎片化及基于离散视图的扩散模型导致的几何漂移和结构退化问题，本文提出UniGeo框架，在表示层、架构层和损失函数层统一注入几何引导，显著提升了多视角下的几何一致性与视觉质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有相机可控图像编辑方法存在两大局限：一是几何引导碎片化，仅在表示层注入点云而忽略了模型的多层次结构；二是基于图像扩散模型，依赖离散视图映射。这两点共同导致连续相机运动下的几何漂移和结构退化。视频模型虽能提供连续视角先验，但若几何引导仍碎片化，仍难以形成稳定的几何理解。因此，亟需系统性地在多个层面统一注入几何引导。

Method: 提出UniGeo框架，在三个层面统一注入几何引导：(1) 表示层：帧解耦的几何参考注入机制，提供鲁棒的跨视图几何上下文；(2) 架构层：几何锚点注意力机制，对齐多视图特征；(3) 损失函数层：轨迹端点几何监督策略，显式增强目标视图的结构保真度。

Result: 在多个公开基准上，涵盖大范围和小范围相机运动设置，UniGeo在视觉质量和几何一致性方面均显著优于现有方法。

Conclusion: 系统性地在表示、架构和损失函数三个层面统一注入几何引导，能够有效解决相机可控图像编辑中的几何漂移和结构退化问题，为连续相机运动下的几何一致新视图合成提供了有效方案。

Abstract: Camera-controllable image editing aims to synthesize novel views of a given scene under varying camera poses while strictly preserving cross-view geometric consistency. However, existing methods typically rely on fragmented geometric guidance, such as only injecting point clouds at the representation level despite models containing multiple levels, and are mainly based on image diffusion models that operate on discrete view mappings. These two limitations jointly lead to geometric drift and structural degradation under continuous camera motion.
  We observe that while leveraging video models provides continuous viewpoint priors for camera-controllable image editing, they still struggle to form stable geometric understanding if geometric guidance remains fragmented. To systematically address this, we inject unified geometric guidance across three levels that jointly determine the generative output: representation, architecture, and loss function.
  To this end, we propose UniGeo, a novel camera-controllable editing framework. Specifically, at the representation level, UniGeo incorporates a frame-decoupled geometric reference injection mechanism to provide robust cross-view geometry context. At the architecture level, it introduces geometric anchor attention to align multi-view features. At the loss function level, it proposes a trajectory-endpoint geometric supervision strategy to explicitly reinforce the structural fidelity of target views.
  Comprehensive experiments across multiple public benchmarks, encompassing both extensive and limited camera motion settings, demonstrate that UniGeo significantly outperforms existing methods in both visual quality and geometric consistency.

</details>


### [171] [Dual Strategies for Test-Time Adaptation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17542)
*Nam Nguyen Phuong,Duc Nguyen The Minh,Phi Le Nguyen,Ehsan Abbasnejad,Minh Hoai*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Summary generation failed


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Motivation analysis unavailable

Method: Method extraction failed

Result: Result analysis unavailable

Conclusion: Conclusion extraction failed

Abstract: Conventional test-time adaptation (TTA) approaches typically adapt the model using only a small fraction of test samples, often those with low-entropy predictions, thereby failing to fully leverage the available information in the test distribution. This paper introduces DualTTA, a novel framework that improves performance under distribution shifts by utilizing a larger and more diverse set of test samples. DualTTA identifies two distinct groups: one where the model's predictions are likely consistent with the underlying semantics, and another where predictions are likely incorrect. For the first group, it minimizes prediction entropy to reinforce reliable decisions; for the second, it maximizes entropy to suppress overconfident errors and unlearn spurious behavior. These groups are adaptively selected using a new reliability criterion that measures prediction stability under both semantic-preserving and semantic-altering transformations, addressing the limitations of purely entropy-based selection. We further provide theoretical analysis and empirical justification showing that our approach enables a tighter separation between reliable and unreliable samples, in the context of their suitability for adaptation, leading to provably more effective model updates.

</details>


### [172] [RS-HyRe-R1: A Hybrid Reward Mechanism to Overcome Perceptual Inertia for Remote Sensing Images Understanding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17504)
*Gaozhi Zhou,Hu He,Peng Shen,Jipeng Zhang,Liujue Zhang,Linrui Xu,Zeyuan Wang,Ziyu Li,Xuezhi Cui,Wang Guo,Haifeng Li*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出RS-HyRe-R1混合奖励框架，通过空间推理激活、感知正确性和视觉-语义路径演化三种奖励机制，解决强化学习后训练中RS-VLM的"感知惯性"问题，仅3B参数即在REC、OVD、VQA任务上超越7B模型，并展现出强零样本泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RL后训练导致RS-VLM在处理复杂遥感图像时产生"感知惯性"——模型倾向于依赖局部显著线索进行快速推理，而非全面构建视觉证据。这种由奖励最大化驱动的偏差导致：认知上过度依赖特定特征，操作上难以在不同任务间灵活转移视觉焦点。

Method: 提出RS-HyRe-R1混合奖励框架，包含三种奖励机制：(1)空间推理激活奖励，强制结构化视觉推理；(2)感知正确性奖励，跨RS任务提供自适应质量锚点，确保几何与语义对齐；(3)视觉-语义路径演化奖励，惩罚重复推理并促进探索互补线索以构建更丰富的证据链。

Result: 仅3B参数即在REC、OVD、VQA任务上达到SOTA，超越7B模型；零样本泛化性能优异，在VQA、OVD、REC上分别超越第二名模型3.16%、3.97%和2.72%。

Conclusion: RS-HyRe-R1有效缓解了"感知惯性"，促进了更深层、更多样化的推理，验证了混合奖励机制在纠正RL后训练偏差方面的有效性。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) post-training substantially improves remote sensing vision-language models (RS-VLMs). However, when handling complex remote sensing imagery (RSI) requiring exhaustive visual scanning, models tend to rely on localized salient cues for rapid inference. We term this RL-induced bias "perceptual inertia". Driven by reward maximization, models favor quick outcome fitting, leading to two limitations: cognitively, overreliance on specific features impedes complete evidence construction; operationally, models struggle to flexibly shift visual focus across tasks. To address this bias and encourage comprehensive visual evidence mining, we propose RS-HyRe-R1, a hybrid reward framework for RSI understanding. It introduces: (1) a spatial reasoning activation reward that enforces structured visual reasoning; (2) a perception correctness reward that provides adaptive quality anchors across RS tasks, ensuring accurate geometric and semantic alignment; and (3) a visual-semantic path evolution reward that penalizes repetitive reasoning and promotes exploration of complementary cues to build richer evidence chains. Experiments show RS-HyRe-R1 effectively mitigates "perceptual inertia", encouraging deeper, more diverse reasoning. With only 3B parameters, it achieves state-of-the-art performance on REC, OVD, and VQA tasks, outperforming models up to 7B parameters. It also demonstrates strong zero-shot generalization, surpassing the second-best model by 3.16%, 3.97%, and 2.72% on VQA, OVD, and REC, respectively. Code and datasets are available at https://github.com/geox-lab/RS-HyRe-R1.

</details>


### [173] [Edit Fidelity Field: Semantics-Aware Region Isolation for Training-Free Scene Text Editing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17500)
*Guandong Li,Mengxia Ye*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 针对场景文本编辑中的编辑溢出问题（94%的溢出率），提出编辑保真场（EFF）——一种语义感知的连续场，通过四区域划分（编辑核心、过渡区、保护区、背景）控制逐像素编辑保真度，作为无需训练、模型无关的后处理模块，将溢出率从94%降至25%，非目标区域PSNR提升+91.4 dB。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有扩散式场景文本编辑方法存在严重的编辑溢出问题：编辑目标文本区域时，会无意中修改非目标区域（尤其是邻近文本），SOTA模型溢出率高达94%，这一问题此前被忽视。

Method: 提出编辑保真场（EFF），利用OCR检测文本区域构建四区域连续场：编辑核心（完全可编辑）、过渡区（平滑衰减）、保护区（非目标文本，显式锁定）、背景（严格保持）。EFF作为无需训练、模型无关的后处理模块，可应用于任意扩散式STE方法。

Result: 在50个真实场景、四类场景上评估：EFF将溢出率从94%降至25%，非目标区域PSNR提升+91.4 dB。

Conclusion: EFF有效解决了场景文本编辑中的编辑溢出问题，大幅提升编辑精度和非目标区域保持能力，且具有即插即用的通用性。

Abstract: Scene text editing (STE) has achieved remarkable progress in accurately rendering target text through diffusion-based methods. However, we identify a critical yet overlooked problem: edit spillover -- when editing a target text region, existing methods inadvertently modify non-target regions, particularly neighboring text. Through systematic evaluation on 50 real-world scenes across four categories, we reveal that state-of-the-art diffusion editing models exhibit a spillover rate of 94%, meaning nearly all non-target text regions are altered during editing. To address this, we propose the Edit Fidelity Field (EFF), a semantics-aware continuous field that controls per-pixel editing fidelity. Unlike binary masks, EFF leverages OCR-detected text regions to construct a four-zone field: Edit Core (fully editable), Transition Zone (smooth decay), Protected Zone (non-target text, explicitly locked), and Background (strictly preserved). EFF operates as a training-free, model-agnostic post-processing module applicable to any diffusion-based STE method. We further propose per-region spillover quantification, a novel evaluation protocol that measures edit leakage at each non-target text region individually. Experiments demonstrate that EFF reduces spillover rate from 94% to 25% while improving non-target region preservation by +91.4 dB PSNR.

</details>


### [174] [Coevolving Representations in Joint Image-Feature Diffusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17492)
*Theodoros Kouzelis,Spyros Gidaris,Nikos Komodakis*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出CoReDi框架，在扩散训练中让语义表征空间与生成任务共同演化，通过轻量线性投影联合学习，配合stop-gradient、归一化和正则化防止特征坍塌，从而提升生成质量和收敛速度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有联合图像-特征生成建模方法使用固定的表征空间，该空间独立于生成目标构建且在训练中保持不变，无法自适应地服务于生成任务。

Method: 提出CoReDi框架，在扩散模型训练过程中联合学习一个轻量线性投影来演化语义表征空间；通过stop-gradient目标、归一化和针对性正则化防止特征坍塌，实现稳定的共同演化。

Result: 在VAE潜在扩散和像素空间扩散两种设置下，CoReDi相比固定表征空间的联合扩散模型实现了更快的收敛速度和更高的样本质量。

Conclusion: 语义表征空间应自适应地服务于生成任务，通过共同演化机制可以让表征空间逐步特化于图像合成需求，提升与图像潜在表示的互补性。

Abstract: Joint image-feature generative modeling has recently emerged as an effective strategy for improving diffusion training by coupling low-level VAE latents with high-level semantic features extracted from pre-trained visual encoders. However, existing approaches rely on a fixed representation space, constructed independently of the generative objective and kept unchanged during training. We argue that the representation space guiding diffusion should itself adapt to the generative task. To this end, we propose Coevolving Representation Diffusion (CoReDi), a framework in which the semantic representation space evolves during training by learning a lightweight linear projection jointly with the diffusion model. While naively optimizing this projection leads to degenerate solutions, we show that stable coevolution can be achieved through a combination of stop-gradient targets, normalization, and targeted regularization that prevents feature collapse. This formulation enables the semantic space to progressively specialize to the needs of image synthesis, improving its complementarity with image latents. We apply CoReDi to both VAE latent diffusion and pixel-space diffusion, demonstrating that adaptive semantic representations improve generative modeling across both settings. Experiments show that CoReDi achieves faster convergence and higher sample quality compared to joint diffusion models operating in fixed representation spaces.

</details>


### [175] [AutoVQA-G: Self-Improving Agentic Framework for Automated Visual Question Answering and Grounding Annotation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17488)
*Rongsheng Hu,Runwei Guan,Yicheng Di,Jiayu Bao,Yuan Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: AutoVQA-G 是一个自改进的智能体框架，通过一致性评估（CoT推理）和记忆增强的提示优化，自动化生成高质量、带视觉定位的VQA-G数据集，有效缓解了模型幻觉和简单启发式验证的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 手动标注高质量的视觉问答与定位（VQA-G）数据集对推进视觉-语言模型（VLM）至关重要但难以扩展；现有自动化方法存在模型幻觉导致的数据不一致和基于简单启发式的脆弱验证机制两大问题。

Method: 提出AutoVQA-G框架，包含两个核心模块：(1) 一致性评估模块，使用思维链（CoT）推理进行细粒度视觉验证；(2) 记忆增强的提示优化智能体，分析失败样本的批评信息，逐步优化生成提示。整个流程构成迭代优化循环。

Result: 实验表明AutoVQA-G生成的VQA-G数据集在视觉定位准确性上优于主流多模态大语言模型（MLLM）。

Conclusion: AutoVQA-G为创建高保真数据以促进更鲁棒的VLM训练和评估提供了一种有前景的自动化方法。

Abstract: Manual annotation of high-quality visual question answering with grounding (VQA-G) datasets, which pair visual questions with evidential grounding, is crucial for advancing vision-language models (VLMs), but remains unscalable. Existing automated methods are often hindered by two key issues: (1) inconsistent data fidelity due to model hallucinations; (2) brittle verification mechanisms based on simple heuristics. To address these limitations, we introduce AutoVQA-G, a self-improving agentic framework for automated VQA-G annotation. AutoVQA-G employs an iterative refinement loop where a Consistency Evaluation module uses Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning for fine-grained visual verification. Based on this feedback, a memory-augmented Prompt Optimization agent analyzes critiques from failed samples to progressively refine generation prompts. Our experiments show that AutoVQA-G generates VQA-G datasets with superior visual grounding accuracy compared to leading multimodal LLMs, offering a promising approach for creating high-fidelity data to facilitate more robust VLM training and evaluation. Code: https://github.com/rohnson1999/AutoVQA-G

</details>


### [176] [Dual-Anchoring: Addressing State Drift in Vision-Language Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17473)
*Kangyi Wu,Pengna Li,Kailin Lyu,Lin Zhao,Qingrong He,Jinjun Wang,Jianyi Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出双重锚定框架（Dual-Anchoring Framework）解决VLN中状态漂移问题，通过指令进度锚定（监督生成结构化文本标记区分已完成/未完成子目标）和记忆地标锚定（用地标中心世界模型回顾预测分割模型提取的物体中心嵌入）两大机制，配合360万进度描述样本和93.7万地标数据，在仿真和真实环境中实现成功率提升15.2%，长轨迹提升24.7%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Video-LLM在VLN长场景中极易发生状态漂移（State Drift），导致智能体无目的游荡、无法执行指令中的关键操作。作者将其归因为两种认知缺陷：进度漂移（无法区分已完成与待完成的子目标）和记忆漂移（历史表征退化导致丢失已访问地标信息）。

Method: 1) 指令进度锚定：监督智能体生成结构化文本标记，清晰划分已完成与剩余子目标；2) 记忆地标锚定：构建地标中心世界模型，利用SAM提取物体中心嵌入，通过回顾预测迫使智能体验证历史观察并保留区分性地标表征；3) 构建两个大规模数据集（360万进度描述样本+93.7万地标数据）。

Result: 仿真和真实环境实验均验证了方法优越性：成功率提升15.2%，长轨迹场景提升24.7%。

Conclusion: 双重锚定框架有效缓解了VLN中的状态漂移问题，特别是长场景下的进度漂移和记忆漂移，代码、数据生成流水线和数据集将开源以促进后续研究。

Abstract: Vision-Language Navigation(VLN) requires an agent to navigate through 3D environments by following natural language instructions. While recent Video Large Language Models(Video-LLMs) have largely advanced VLN, they remain highly susceptible to State Drift in long scenarios. In these cases, the agent's internal state drifts away from the true task execution state, leading to aimless wandering and failure to execute essential maneuvers in the instruction. We attribute this failure to two distinct cognitive deficits: Progress Drift, where the agent fails to distinguish completed sub-goals from remaining ones, and Memory Drift, where the agent's history representations degrade, making it lose track of visited landmarks. In this paper, we propose a Dual-Anchoring Framework that explicitly anchors the instruction progress and history representations. First, to address progress drift, we introduce Instruction Progress Anchoring, which supervises the agent to generate structured text tokens that delineate completed versus remaining sub-goals. Second, to mitigate memory drift, we propose Memory Landmark Anchoring, which utilizes a Landmark-Centric World Model to retrospectively predict object-centric embeddings extracted by the Segment Anything Model, compelling the agent to explicitly verify past observations and preserve distinct representations of visited landmarks. Facilitating this framework, we curate two extensive datasets: 3.6 million samples with explicit progress descriptions, and 937k grounded landmark data for retrospective verification. Extensive experiments in both simulation and real-world environments demonstrate the superiority of our method, achieving a 15.2% improvement in Success Rate and a remarkable 24.7% gain on long-horizon trajectories. To facilitate further research, we will release our code, data generation pipelines, and the collected datasets.

</details>


### [177] [UniMesh: Unifying 3D Mesh Understanding and Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17472)
*Peng Huang,Yifeng Chen,Zeyu Zhang,Hao Tang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: UniMesh是一个统一框架，通过Mesh Head、Chain of Mesh和自反思机制，在单一架构中联合学习3D生成与理解任务，实现性能提升和迭代编辑等新能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前3D视觉领域存在理解（分类、分割、重建）和生成（合成、补全、编辑）任务孤立处理的问题，导致架构碎片化、表征不统一，阻碍知识迁移和整体场景建模。

Method: 1) 提出Mesh Head作为跨模型接口，桥接扩散图像生成与隐式形状解码器；2) 提出Chain of Mesh (CoM)实现迭代推理，通过闭环的潜在提示-生成循环支持用户驱动的语义网格编辑；3) 引入基于Actor-Evaluator-Self-reflection三元组的自反思机制，用于诊断和修正3D描述等高层任务中的错误。

Result: 在标准基准上取得竞争性性能，同时解锁了迭代编辑以及生成与理解之间的相互增强等新能力。

Conclusion: UniMesh证明了统一3D生成与理解框架的可行性，为实现更连贯、可交互的3D场景建模提供了新范式。

Abstract: Recent advances in 3D vision have led to specialized models for either 3D understanding (e.g., shape classification, segmentation, reconstruction) or 3D generation (e.g., synthesis, completion, and editing). However, these tasks are often tackled in isolation, resulting in fragmented architectures and representations that hinder knowledge transfer and holistic scene modeling. To address these challenges, we propose UniMesh, a unified framework that jointly learns 3D generation and understanding within a single architecture. First, we introduce a novel Mesh Head that acts as a cross model interface, bridging diffusion based image generation with implicit shape decoders. Second, we develop Chain of Mesh (CoM), a geometric instantiation of iterative reasoning that enables user driven semantic mesh editing through a closed loop latent, prompting, and re generation cycle. Third, we incorporate a self reflection mechanism based on an Actor Evaluator Self reflection triad to diagnose and correct failures in high level tasks like 3D captioning. Experimental results demonstrate that UniMesh not only achieves competitive performance on standard benchmarks but also unlocks novel capabilities in iterative editing and mutual enhancement between generation and understanding. Code: https://github.com/AIGeeksGroup/UniMesh. Website: https://aigeeksgroup.github.io/UniMesh.

</details>


### [178] [HSG: Hyperbolic Scene Graph](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17454)
*Liyang Wang,Zeyu Zhang,Hao Tang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出Hyperbolic Scene Graph (HSG)，在双曲空间中学习场景图嵌入，利用双曲几何自然地编码对象与场所之间的层次蕴含关系。相比在欧氏空间中学习的MSG等方法，HSG在保持强检索性能的同时显著提升了层次结构质量，在Graph IoU指标上达到33.51，超越最优基线8.14。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有场景图方法（如MSG）在欧氏空间中通过对比学习和注意力关联学习嵌入，但欧氏几何无法显式捕捉场所与对象之间的层次蕴含关系，导致所学表示的结构一致性受限。

Method: 提出HSG，将场景图嵌入到双曲空间中，利用双曲几何距离自然编码层次关系，以替代传统的欧氏空间对比学习框架。

Result: HSG在层次结构质量上取得最大提升：PP IoU达到33.17，Graph IoU达到33.51，超越最优AoMSG变体（25.37）达8.14，同时保持强检索性能。

Conclusion: 双曲表示学习对场景图建模中的层次关系编码是有效的，为多视图和3D场景理解提供了更具结构一致性的表示方法。

Abstract: Scene graph representations enable structured visual understanding by modeling objects and their relationships, and have been widely used for multiview and 3D scene reasoning. Existing methods such as MSG learn scene graph embeddings in Euclidean space using contrastive learning and attention based association. However, Euclidean geometry does not explicitly capture hierarchical entailment relationships between places and objects, limiting the structural consistency of learned representations. To address this, we propose Hyperbolic Scene Graph (HSG), which learns scene graph embeddings in hyperbolic space where hierarchical relationships are naturally encoded through geometric distance. Our results show that HSG improves hierarchical structure quality while maintaining strong retrieval performance. The largest gains are observed in graph level metrics: HSG achieves a PP IoU of 33.17 and the highest Graph IoU of 33.51, outperforming the best AoMSG variant (25.37) by 8.14, highlighting the effectiveness of hyperbolic representation learning for scene graph modeling. Code: https://github.com/AIGeeksGroup/HSG.

</details>


### [179] [SegTTA: Training-Free Test-Time Augmentation for Zero-Shot Medical Imaging Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17451)
*Yihong Yao,Chunlei Li,Canxuan Gang,Wenzhi Hu,Zeyu Zhang,Hao Zhang,Xiaoyan Li*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SegTTA是一个无需模型重新训练的医学图像分割增强框架，通过结合四种数据增强（Gamma校正、对比度增强、高斯模糊、高斯噪声）和多个MedSAM2检查点的加权投票，在三个数据集上持续提升分割性能，在肝脏血管数据集上mIoU提升1.6，HD95降低约2.0。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有医学图像分割基础模型虽泛化能力强，但不同设备和操作者导致的图像质量差异依然存在，亟需一种无需重新训练模型即可提升分割性能的方法。

Method: 提出SegTTA框架，结合四种数据增强（Gamma校正、对比度增强、高斯模糊、高斯噪声）与多个MedSAM2检查点的加权投票机制，无需模型重新训练即可提升分割效果。

Result: 在健康子宫分割、子宫肌瘤检测和多类肝脏结构分割三个数据集上均取得一致性提升。消融实验表明大器官受益于强度增强，小病灶需噪声增强。在肝脏血管数据集上，mIoU提升1.6，aIoU提升1.9，HD95降低约2.0。

Conclusion: SegTTA通过测试时增强与加权投票策略，有效解决了医学图像质量差异问题，且投票阈值可控制覆盖-精度权衡，支持不同临床需求的任务特定优化。

Abstract: Increasingly advanced data augmentation techniques have greatly aided clinical medical research, increasing data diversity and improving model generalization capabilities. Although most current basic models exhibit strong generalization abilities, image quality varies due to differences in equipment and operators. To address these challenges, we present SegTTA, a framework that improves medical image segmentation without model retraining by combining four augmentations (Gamma correction, Contrast enhancement, Gaussian blur, Gaussian noise) with weighted voting across multiple MedSAM2 checkpoints. Experiments demonstrate consistent improvements across three diverse datasets: healthy uterus segmentation, uterine myoma detection, and multi class hepatic structure segmentation. Ablation studies reveal that large organs benefit from intensity augmentations while small lesions require noise augmentations. The voting threshold controls the coverage precision trade off, enabling task specific optimization for different clinical requirements. Ultimately, on a multiclass hepatic vessel dataset, compared to MedSAM2 baselines, our method achieves an increase of 1.6 in mIoU and 1.9 in aIoU, along with a reduction of approximately 2.0 in HD95. Code will be available at https://github.com/AIGeeksGroup/SegTTA.

</details>


### [180] [Attention Is not Everything: Efficient Alternatives for Vision](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17439)
*Nur Mohammad Kazi,Ibteshum Khaled,Md. Luthful Hasan Galib,Ali Faruk Shihab,Md. Rakibul Islam*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文综述了计算机视觉领域中非Transformer方法（包括卷积、MLP、状态空间模型等）的分类体系，分析了40篇论文在效率、可扩展性、可解释性和鲁棒性方面的表现，并指出了未来研究的挑战与机遇。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管Transformer在计算机视觉中取得显著进展，但许多非Transformer方法仍具竞争力。作者旨在系统梳理这些方法，为未来研究提供参考。

Method: 对40篇论文进行系统分类，将非Transformer方法划分为卷积模型、MLP模型、状态空间模型等类别，并从效率、可扩展性、可解释性和鲁棒性四个维度进行评估。

Result: 构建了非Transformer方法的全面分类体系，明确了各类方法的优势与不足，揭示了非Transformer方法在特定场景下仍具竞争力的现状。

Conclusion: 非Transformer方法在计算机视觉中仍具有重要价值，未来研究需关注这些方法的挑战与机遇，推动计算机视觉的多元化发展。

Abstract: Recently computer vision has seen advancements mainly thanks to Transformer-based models. However many non-Transformer methods are still doing well being a direct competition of Transformer-based models. This review tries to present a comprehensive taxonomy of such methods and organize these methods into categories like convolution-based models, MLP-based models, state-space-based and more. These methods are looked at in terms of how efficient they are, how well they scale, how easy they are to understand and how robust they are. A total of 40 papers were chosen for this study. The goal is to give a view of non-Transformer methods and find out what challenges and opportunities exist for future computer vision research.

</details>


### [181] [DEM Refinement and Validation on the Lunar Surface Using Shape-from-Shading with Chandrayaan-2 OHRC Imagery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17436)
*Aaranay Aadi,Jai Gopal Singla,Nitant Dube*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于明暗恢复形状（SfS）的框架，利用Chandrayaan-2的OHRC影像增强亚米级月球数字高程模型（DEM），将SfS从细化工具扩展为独立地形数据源，在三个月球站点验证了其对地表坡度统计和精细陨石坑形态的改善效果，并分析了SfS敏感性的限制因素。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有亚米级月球DEM主要依赖立体影像生成，但受限于立体基线长度，难以恢复精细地形细节。本研究旨在突破这一局限，通过引入SfS框架从独立影像中提取新地形信息，提升DEM的细节保真度。

Method: 采用SfS框架，对同一区域的独立OHRC影像进行明暗恢复形状处理，而非仅将SfS作为DEM后处理细化工具。在三个月球站点（Cyrillus陨石坑、Vikram着陆区、月球南极Mons Mouton）进行应用，并对SfS光滑权重参数进行系统的三阶段扫描。

Result: 结果显示地形得到可量化的增强，尤其在地表坡度统计方面，揭示了先前无法分辨的精细陨石坑形态。同时发现两种限制情况：大俯仰角分离会降低SfS敏感性，部分足迹覆盖会导致空间变化的增强质量。

Conclusion: SfS框架能有效提升亚米级月球DEM的精细地形细节，可作为独立于立体基线的新地形数据源。但需注意影像几何配置（俯仰角差）和覆盖完整性对增强效果的影响。

Abstract: This study presents a Shape from Shading (SfS) framework to enhance sub-metre resolution lunar digital elevation models (DEMs) using imagery from the Orbiter High Resolution Camera (OHRC) aboard Chandrayaan-2. The framework applies SfS to an independent OHRC image of the same region, enabling SfS not just as a refinement tool, but as a source of new topographic data, unconstrained by stereo baseline limitations. The method is applied across three lunar sites, including the Cyrillus crater, the Vikram landing region, and the lunar south pole (Mons Mouton), with a systematic three-stage parameter sweep on the SfS smoothness weight. Results show measurable topographic enhancement, particularly in surface slope statistics, revealing fine-scale crater morphology previously unresolved. A limiting case is also characterized, where large pitch angle separation between the shading image and stereo pair reduces SfS sensitivity, and partial footprint coverage of the shading image is identified as a factor influencing spatially variable enhancement quality.

</details>


### [182] [Long-CODE: Isolating Pure Long-Context as an Orthogonal Dimension in Video Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17428)
*Zhijiang Tang,Jiaxin Qi,Bing Zhao,Jianqiang Huang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文针对长视频评估提出正交于短视频评估的专门框架，设计了基于镜头动态的长视频指标和Long-CODE基准数据集，实验证明该指标与人类判断高度相关，与现有短视频标准互补形成全面评估范式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频评估指标天然适用于短视频，仅关注帧级视觉质量和局部时间平滑性，无法捕捉长视频的叙事丰富性和全局因果一致性等长程特征。作者认为短视频与长视频的评估维度本质正交，需为长视频设计独立的评估框架。

Method: 1) 设计了一套长视频属性破坏测试（corruption tests），暴露现有短视频指标对镜头级扰动、叙事乱序等结构不一致性的不敏感性；2) 提出基于镜头动态（shot dynamics）的长视频评估指标，对长程结构变化高度敏感；3) 构建Long-CODE数据集，专门用于长视频评估基准测试，包含人工标注的长程特征。

Result: 提出的指标在人类判断相关性上达到最优（state-of-the-art），与现有短视频标准无缝互补，形成全面且无偏的视频生成模型评估范式。

Conclusion: 长视频评估应与短视频评估解耦，基于镜头动态的指标能有效捕捉长程特征，Long-CODE可作为长视频评估的专用基准。

Abstract: As video generation models achieve unprecedented capabilities, the demand for robust video evaluation metrics becomes increasingly critical. Traditional metrics are intrinsically tailored for short-video evaluation, predominantly assessing frame-level visual quality and localized temporal smoothness. However, as state-of-the-art video generation models scale to generate longer videos, these metrics fail to capture essential long-range characteristics, such as narrative richness and global causal consistency. Recognizing that short-term visual perception and long-context attributes are fundamentally orthogonal dimensions, we argue that long-video metrics should be disentangled from short-video assessments. In this paper, we focus on the rigorous justification and design of a dedicated framework for long-video evaluation. We first introduce a suite of long-video attribute corruption tests, exposing the critical limitations of existing hort-video metrics from their insensitivity to structural inconsistencies, such as shot-level perturbations and narrative shuffling. To bridge this gap, we design a novel long-video metric based on shot dynamics, which is highly sensitive to the long-range testing framework. Furthermore, we introduce Long-CODE (Long-Context as an Orthogonal Dimension for video Evaluation), a specialized dataset designed to benchmark long-video evaluation, with human annotations isolated specifically to genuine long-range characteristics. Extensive experiments show that our proposed metrics achieve state-of-the-art correlation with human judgments. Ultimately, our metric and benchmark seamlessly complement existing short-video standards, establishing a holistic and unbiased evaluation paradigm for video generation models.

</details>


### [183] [Speculative Decoding for Autoregressive Video Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17397)
*Yuezhou Hu,Jintao Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SDVG将推测解码引入自回归视频扩散模型，通过图像质量路由器替代令牌验证，在14B目标模型上实现1.59-2.09倍加速，质量保留率95.7%-98.1%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自回归视频扩散的推理加速是当前关键挑战，而大规模语言模型中主流的推测解码策略能否有效适配连续时空张量的视频块尚不明确，因为视频块缺乏令牌级分布用于精确拒绝采样。

Method: 提出SDVG框架：1.3B草稿模型经4步去噪生成候选视频块，经VAE解码后用ImageReward按最差帧聚合评分；高于阈值τ的块被14B目标模型KV缓存接受，否则由目标模型重新生成。首块强制拒绝以锚定场景构图，τ作为单一旋钮平滑调节质量-速度帕累托前沿。

Result: 在MovieGenVideoBench 1003个提示词（832×480）上，τ=-0.7时达1.59倍加速，VisionReward质量保持98.1%（0.0773 vs 0.0788）；τ调整可至2.09倍加速、95.7%质量保留，始终优于纯草稿生成17%以上。

Conclusion: SDVG是一种免训练、无需架构修改的通用加速框架，可无缝集成到现有自回归视频生成流水线中。

Abstract: Autoregressive video diffusion is emerging as a promising paradigm for streaming video synthesis, with step distillation serving as the primary means of accelerating inference. Whether speculative decoding, the dominant acceleration strategy for large language models, can be effectively adapted to autoregressive video generation remains an open question, because video blocks are continuous spatiotemporal tensors with no token-level distribution for exact rejection sampling. We introduce SDVG, which brings speculative decoding to block-based autoregressive video diffusion by replacing token verification with an image-quality router.
