A 1.3B drafter proposes candidate blocks via four denoising steps; each block is VAE-decoded and scored by ImageReward using worst-frame aggregation--taking the minimum per-frame reward to catch single-frame artifacts that averaging would mask. Blocks scoring above a fixed threshold tau are accepted into the 14B target's KV cache; the rest are regenerated by the target. Two additional design choices prove critical: the first block is always force-rejected to anchor scene composition, and tau serves as a single knob that traces a smooth quality-speed Pareto frontier. On 1003 MovieGenVideoBench prompts (832x480), SDVG retains 98.1% of target-only VisionReward quality (0.0773 vs. 0.0788) at a 1.59x speedup with tau=-0.7, and reaches 2.09x at 95.7% quality retention--while consistently outperforming draft-only generation by over +17%. The framework is training-free, requires no architectural changes, and can be seamlessly integrated into existing autoregressive video generation pipelines.

</details>


### [184] [Deep learning based Non-Rigid Volume-to-Surface Registration for Brain Shift compensation Using Point Cloud](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17389)
*Eashrat Jahan Muniya,Gernot Kronreif,Ander Biguri,Wolfgang Birkfellner,Sepideh Hatamikia*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于深度学习的非刚性体积到表面配准框架，利用稀疏的术中表面观测（点云）估计全脑变形场，无需密集点对应或术中体积成像，在部分表面条件下实现了1.13±0.75 mm的端点误差和1.33±0.81 mm的均方根误差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 脑移位导致术中解剖结构与术前影像严重偏离，影响导航精度和手术安全；现有补偿方法依赖术中MRI、CT或超声等侵入性成像，难以无缝融入手术流程。

Method: 提出深度学习的非刚性体积到表面配准框架，利用多尺度点云特征提取和层次化变形解码器，将稀疏的术中部分表面点云信息整合到全术前点云域中，实现隐式对应学习与密集位移场估计。

Result: 在挑战性部分表面条件下，端点误差（EPE）为1.13±0.75 mm，均方根误差（RMSE）为1.33±0.81 mm。

Conclusion: 该方法能够从稀疏的表面观测中自动、工作流兼容地补偿脑移位，无需中断手术或使用术中体积成像。

Abstract: Soft-tissue deformation remains a major limitation in image-guided neurosurgery, where intra-operative anatomy can deviate substantially from pre-operative imaging due to brain shift, compromising navigation accuracy and surgical safety. Existing compensation methods often rely on intra-operative MRI, CT, or ultrasound, which are disruptive and difficult to integrate repeatedly into the surgical workflow. In contrast, partial 3D cortical surfaces can be reconstructed as point clouds from stereoscopic microscopes or laser range scanners (LRS), capturing only a limited portion of the exposed cortex. This makes point cloud registration a practical alternative without interrupting surgery; however, such partial and noisy observations make deformation estimation highly challenging. In this study, we propose a deep learning-based framework for non-rigid volume-to-surface registration, enabling dense displacement field estimation from sparse intra-operative surface observations without explicit point correspondences or volumetric intra-operative imaging. The network leverages multi-scale point-based feature extraction and a hierarchical deformation decoder to capture both global and local deformations. The key contribution lies in integrating partial intra-operative surface information into the full pre-operative point cloud domain, enabling implicit correspondence learning and dense deformation recovery under limited visibility. Quantitative results demonstrate accurate recovery of fine-scale deformations, achieving an Endpoint Error (EPE) of 1.13 +/- 0.75 mm and RMSE of 1.33 +/- 0.81 mm under challenging partial-surface conditions. The proposed approach supports automatic, workflow-compatible brain-shift compensation from sparse surface observations.

</details>


### [185] [SpatialImaginer: Towards Adaptive Visual Imagination for Spatial Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17385)
*Yian Li,Yang Jiao,Bin Zhu,Tianwen Qian,Shaoxiang Chen,Jingjing Chen,Yu-Gang Jiang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SpatialImaginer提出了一个统一的多模态生成框架，通过将文本推理与视觉想象相结合，采用分治策略（文本思维链进行高层语义规划，视觉想象进行几何敏感的状态变换与一致性保持），并引入难度感知的数据引擎和闭环验证训练模型选择性调用视觉想象，在多种空间智能基准上取得了最先进性能，显著提升了复杂多步空间推理的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型在空间智能任务中表现出脆弱的推理痕迹，其根本原因在于空间识别机制与纯文本推理行为之间存在不匹配——文本表示会抽象掉关键的底层几何结构细节，导致空间状态一致性无法在推理过程中得到忠实保持和更新。

Method: 提出SpatialImaginer框架，采用分治策略：1）文本思维链（CoT）负责高层语义规划；2）视觉想象模块负责几何敏感的状态变换和一致性保持。同时设计了一个难度感知的数据引擎，结合闭环验证机制，训练模型在需要稳定空间状态跟踪时选择性调用视觉想象。

Result: 在多种空间智能基准上的大量实验表明，SpatialImaginer达到了最先进的性能，并在复杂的多步空间推理任务中显著提升了鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 通过将文本推理与视觉想象有机结合，可以有效解决MLLMs在空间推理中因文本抽象导致几何信息丢失的问题，为多模态大模型的空间智能提供了一条可行路径。

Abstract: Spatial intelligence, which refers to the ability to reason about geometric and physical structure from visual observations, remains a core challenge for multimodal large language models. Despite promising performance, recent multimodal large language models (MLLMs) often exhibit fragile reasoning traces in spatial intelligence tasks that involve consistent spatial state recognition. We argue that these failures stem from a mismatch between the spatial recognition mechanism and the text-only reasoning behavior of these MLLMs. Effective spatial reasoning requires low-level geometric structure to be faithfully preserved and updated throughout the reasoning process, whereas textual representations tend to abstract away precisely these critical details. To address this issue, we propose SpatialImaginer, a unified multimodal generation framework that integrates textual reasoning with visual imagination. Our framework adopts a divide-and-conquer strategy, using text chain-of-thought for high-level semantic planning and the visual imagination for geometry-sensitive state transformation and consistency preservation. To support this capability, we further introduce a difficulty-aware data engine with closed-loop verification to train the model to invoke visual imagination selectively when stable spatial state tracking is required. Extensive experiments on diverse spatial intelligence benchmarks show that SpatialImaginer achieves state-of-the-art performance and substantially improves robustness on complex multi-step spatial reasoning tasks.

</details>


### [186] [Towards Generalizable Deepfake Image Detection with Vision Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17376)
*Kaliki V Srinanda,M Manvith Prabhu,Hemanth K Mogilipalem,Jayavarapu S Abhinai,Vaibhav Santhosh,Aryan Herur,Deepu Vijayasenan*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于微调视觉Transformer集成（DINOv2、AIMv2、OpenCLIP ViT-L/14）的深度伪造检测方法，在DF-Wild数据集上达到96.77% AUC和9% EER，超越现有SOTA方法Effort，获得IEEE SP Cup 2025冠军。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度伪造检测方法面临生成模型快速演进和泛化能力差的挑战，需要更鲁棒且通用的检测方案。

Method: 集成多个微调的视觉Transformer（DINOv2、AIMv2、OpenCLIP ViT-L/14），在DF-Wild数据集上训练，并与CNN基线模型对比。

Result: 集成模型在DF-Wild测试集上AUC达96.77%，EER仅9%，相比SOTA方法Effort在AUC和EER上分别提升7.05%和8%。

Conclusion: 视觉Transformer集成方法在深度伪造检测任务中显著优于单一模型和CNN基线，且具备更好的泛化能力，该方案赢得ICASSP 2025 SP Cup竞赛。

Abstract: In today's day and age, we face a challenge in detecting deepfake images because of the fast evolution of modern generative models and the poor generalization capability of existing methods. In this paper, we use an ensemble of fine-tuned vision transformers like DINOv2, AIMv2 and OpenCLIP's ViT-L/14 to create generalizable method to detect deepfakes. We use the DF-Wild dataset released as part of the IEEE SP Cup 2025, because it uses a challenging and diverse set of manipulations and generation techniques. We started our experiments with CNN classifiers trained on spatial features. Experimental results show that our ensemble outperforms individual models and strong CNN baselines, achieving an AUC of 96.77% and an Equal Error Rate (EER) of just 9% on the DF-Wild test set, beating the state-of-the-art deepfake detection algorithm Effort by 7.05% and 8% in AUC and EER respectively. This was the winning solution for SP Cup, presented at ICASSP 2025.

</details>


### [187] [When Text Hijacks Vision: Benchmarking and Mitigating Text Overlay-Induced Hallucination in Vision Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17375)
*Cui Yakun,Xingqun Qi,TianTian Geng,Yuyao Zhang,Sirui Han,Yike Guo*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文发现并定义了视觉语言模型中的“文本叠加诱导幻觉”（TOIH）现象，即当屏幕上的文字与视觉场景矛盾时，模型会优先遵循文字语义而非实际视觉内容。为此，作者构建了首个大规模基准测试VisualTextTrap（含6057个样本、88个细粒度属性、五级幻觉强度量化），并提出VTHM-MoE框架——一种基于双编码器和维度专家模块（时序、动作、对象、空间）的视觉-文本解耦方法，通过自适应令牌路由策略有效缓解TOIH，在多项视频问答任务上超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLM在多模态视频理解任务中性能显著提升，但忽略了当叠加文本与视觉场景矛盾时模型会系统性产生幻觉这一关键问题，亟需系统性的基准和解决方案。

Method: 1) 构建VisualTextTrap基准：基于公开数据集，通过VLM辅助文本生成+严格人工验证的混合流水线，得到6057个样本，覆盖4个维度88个细粒度属性，并用L1-L5五级量化幻觉强度。2) 提出VTHM-MoE框架：双编码器架构，包含四个维度专用专家模块（时序/动作/对象/空间推理），先预训练识别跨模态差异，再通过自适应令牌路由策略动态分配专家，抵抗TOIH的同时保持干净视频的性能。

Result: 在VisualTextTrap基准上的大量实验验证了VTHM-MoE的有效性，在多种视频问答任务中均优于现有最先进方法。

Conclusion: 文本叠加诱导幻觉是VLM中一个系统性的关键问题；所提出的VisualTextTrap基准和VTHM-MoE框架能够有效检测和缓解该问题，为多模态理解中文本-视觉冲突的处理提供了新思路。

Abstract: Recent advances in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have substantially enhanced their ability across multimodal video understanding benchmarks spanning temporal, action, object, and spatial understanding. However, we identify a critical yet overlooked issue: when embedded on-screen text contradicts the visual scene, existing VLMs systematically hallucinate, prioritizing overlay textual semantics over the actual visual content. We define this phenomenon as Text Overlay-Induced Hallucination (TOIH). In this work, we propose VisualTextTrap, the first comprehensive benchmark, including large-scale human-validated samples with specifically designed evaluation metrics. In particular, we construct VisualTextTrap from widely-used public datasets using a scalable hybrid pipeline of VLMs assisted text generation and rigorous manual verification. The benchmark features 6,057 samples annotated across 88 fine-grained attributes within four dimensions, with hallucination intensity quantified on a five-level scale (L1--L5) that reflects the semantic contradiction between overlay text and visual reality. Moreover, we propose Visual Text Hallucination Mitigation Mixture-of-Experts (VTHM-MoE), a novel Vision-Text Disentanglement framework that employs a dual-encoder architecture. Concretely, four dimension-specialized expert modules spanning Temporal, Action, Object, and Spatial reasoning are first pre-trained to identify and leverage cross-modal discrepancies between textual semantics and actual video content. We develop an Adaptive Token Routing Strategy to enable dynamic expert allocation, conferring robust resistance to TOIH while preserving performance on uncontaminated videos. Extensive experiments conducted on our VisualTextTrap benchmark verify the effectiveness of VTHM-MoE, outperforming state-of-the-art counterparts with diverse video question answering tasks.

</details>


### [188] [Towards Joint Quantization and Token Pruning of Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17320)
*Xinqing Li,Xin He,Xindong Zhang,Ming-Ming Cheng,Lei Zhang,Yun Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出QUOTA框架，通过联合量化感知的离线令牌分配策略，在低比特视觉语言模型中统一实现视觉令牌剪枝与量化，解决了分阶段组合的校准不匹配问题，在保留30%视觉令牌下达到95.65%性能保持率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 低比特VLM推理中，视觉令牌前缀过长导致预填充成本高，KV缓存持续增长导致自回归解码成本高。令牌剪枝和低比特量化是互补方案，但朴素的分阶段组合因量化校准与剪枝执行不匹配而表现脆弱。

Method: 提出量化统一离线令牌分配器(QUOTA)，将低比特校准信号转化为逐层令牌分配计划并物化为剪枝方案。在部署的W4A4算子下，结合激活幅度、注意力线索和显式低比特风险信号评估令牌重要性，实现一致的预算top-k选择。

Result: 在标准VLM基准上，相比分阶段基线在相同低比特条件下鲁棒性提升，保留30%视觉令牌时达到95.65%平均性能保持率，而代表性分阶段组合约为94.3%。

Conclusion: 所提出的联合量化与剪枝框架能有效统一低比特推理和确定性视觉令牌剪枝于单一可部署流水线中，优于分阶段组合方法。

Abstract: Deploying Vision-Language Models (VLMs) under aggressive low-bit inference remains challenging because inference cost is dominated by the long visual-token prefix during prefill and the growing KV cache during autoregressive decoding. Token pruning and low-bit quantization are complementary for reducing these costs, yet naive stage-wise combinations are often brittle due to a mismatch between quantization calibration and pruning execution. We present a collaborative quantization-and-pruning framework that unifies low-bit inference and deterministic visual-token pruning in a single deployable pipeline. The framework introduces the \textbf{Q}uantization \textbf{U}nified \textbf{O}ffline \textbf{T}oken \textbf{A}llocator (\textbf{QUOTA}), which converts low-bit calibration signals into a layer-wise token allocation schedule and materializes it as a pruning recipe. Token importance is evaluated under deployed W4A4 operators with a quantized KV cache by combining activation magnitude, attention cues, and an explicit low-bit risk signal, enabling consistent budgeted top-$k$ selection. Experiments on standard VLM benchmarks show improved robustness over stage-wise baselines under the same low-bit regime, achieving 95.65\% average retention while retaining only 30\% of visual tokens, compared with about 94.3\% retention for representative stage-wise combinations. The code will be released.

</details>


### [189] [E2E-GMNER: End-to-End Generative Grounded Multimodal Named Entity Recognition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17319)
*Meng Zhang,Jinzhong Ning,Xiaolong Wu,Hongfei Lin,Yijia Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出E2E-GMNER，一个端到端生成式框架，将多模态命名实体识别（GMNER）中的实体识别、语义类型预测、视觉定位和隐式知识推理统一到单个多模态大语言模型中。通过指令微调的条件生成、链式思维推理和高斯风险感知框扰动（GRBP），有效解决了流水线架构中的错误累积和边界框预测不稳定问题，在Twitter-GMNER和Twitter-FMNERG基准上取得了具有竞争力的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有GMNER方法大多采用流水线架构，将文本实体识别与视觉定位解耦，导致错误累积和次优的联合优化问题。作者旨在通过统一的端到端框架解决这一缺陷。

Method: 1) 将GMNER建模为指令微调的条件生成任务，使用单一多模态大语言模型统一所有子任务；2) 引入链式思维推理，使模型自适应判断何时需要视觉证据或背景知识；3) 提出高斯风险感知框扰动（GRBP），用概率扰动软目标替代硬边界框监督，增强对标注噪声和离散化误差的鲁棒性。

Result: 在Twitter-GMNER和Twitter-FMNERG两个基准数据集上，E2E-GMNER与最先进方法相比取得了高度竞争的性能，验证了统一端到端优化和噪声感知定位监督的有效性。

Conclusion: 端到端生成式框架能够有效克服流水线架构的局限性，链式思维推理和噪声感知的边界框预测策略是提升GMNER性能的关键技术组件。

Abstract: Grounded Multimodal Named Entity Recognition (GMNER) aims to jointly identify named entity mentions in text, predict their semantic types, and ground each entity to a corresponding visual region in an associated image. Existing approaches predominantly adopt pipeline-based architectures that decouple textual entity recognition and visual grounding, leading to error accumulation and suboptimal joint optimization. In this paper, we propose E2E-GMNER, a fully end-to-end generative framework that unifies entity recognition, semantic typing, visual grounding, and implicit knowledge reasoning within a single multimodal large language model. We formulate GMNER as an instruction-tuned conditional generation task and incorporate chain-of-thought reasoning to enable the model to adaptively determine when visual evidence or background knowledge is informative, reducing reliance on noisy cues. To further address the instability of generative bounding box prediction, we introduce Gaussian Risk-Aware Box Perturbation (GRBP), which replaces hard box supervision with probabilistically perturbed soft targets to improve robustness against annotation noise and discretization errors. Extensive experiments on the Twitter-GMNER and Twitter-FMNERG benchmarks demonstrate that E2E-GMNER achieves highly competitive performance compared with state of the art methods, validating the effectiveness of unified end-to-end optimization and noise-aware grounding supervision. Code is available at:https://github.com/Finch-coder/E2E-GMNER

</details>


### [190] [When Background Matters: Breaking Medical Vision Language Models by Transferable Attack](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17318)
*Akash Ghosh,Subhadip Baidya,Sriparna Saha,Xiuying Chen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出MedFocusLeak，一种针对临床VLM的黑盒多模态对抗攻击方法，通过在非诊断背景区域注入协调扰动并引入注意力分散机制，生成不可察觉但临床可信的错误诊断，在六种医学影像模态上达到SOTA性能，并揭示了当前临床VLM推理能力的严重缺陷。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 临床诊断中VLM使用日益广泛，但其对抗鲁棒性尚未充分研究，现有医学攻击方法或关注次要目标（如模型窃取），或来自自然图像的迁移攻击会引入易被医生察觉的可见失真，缺乏针对临床场景的高隐蔽性、高迁移性攻击方法。

Method: MedFocusLeak方法：(1) 在非诊断背景区域注入协调扰动以保持诊断区域不变；(2) 采用注意力分散机制将模型关注点从病理区域移开；(3) 设计为黑盒攻击，确保跨模型的高迁移性。

Result: 在六种医学成像模态上取得SOTA性能，生成误导性但诊断输出逼真的攻击效果，在多种不同VLM上均表现良好；引入的新评估框架和指标联合捕捉了攻击成功率与图像保真度。

Conclusion: MedFocusLeak有效暴露了现代临床VLM在推理能力上的严重缺陷，证明了针对医学影像诊断的对抗攻击的可行性和危害性，为临床VLM的安全性研究提供了重要警示。

Abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are increasingly used in clinical diagnostics, yet their robustness to adversarial attacks remains largely unexplored, posing serious risks. Existing medical attacks focus on secondary objectives such as model stealing or adversarial fine-tuning, while transferable attacks from natural images introduce visible distortions that clinicians can easily detect. To address this, we propose MedFocusLeak, a highly transferable black-box multimodal attack that induces incorrect yet clinically plausible diagnoses while keeping perturbations imperceptible. The method injects coordinated perturbations into non-diagnostic background regions and employs an attention distraction mechanism to shift the model's focus away from pathological areas. Extensive evaluations across six medical imaging modalities show that MedFocusLeak achieves state-of-the-art performance, generating misleading yet realistic diagnostic outputs across diverse VLMs. We further introduce a unified evaluation framework with novel metrics that jointly capture attack success and image fidelity, revealing a critical weakness in the reasoning capabilities of modern clinical VLMs.

</details>


### [191] [Generalizable Face Forgery Detection via Separable Prompt Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17307)
*Enrui Yang,Yuezun Li*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出SePL策略，通过可分离提示学习将CLIP的文本模态用于Deepfake检测，将图像中的伪造相关与无关信息分离，提升检测泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于CLIP的Deepfake检测方法主要依赖视觉编码器，忽视了文本模态的指导性作用。作者认为文本模态可以经过精心设计来指导伪造检测，因此将焦点从视觉模态转移到文本模态。

Method: 提出Separable Prompt Learning (SePL)策略，核心是通过两类提示学习将图像中的伪造特定信息与伪造无关信息解耦，结合跨模态对齐策略和专门设计的优化目标来实现。

Result: 在跨数据集和跨方法评估下，该方法取得了具有竞争力甚至优于其他方法的性能，展现了强大的泛化能力。

Conclusion: 通过简单的适应调整，SePL使CLIP成为有效的面部伪造检测器，验证了利用文本模态指导Deepfake检测的有效性。

Abstract: Detecting face forgeries using CLIP has recently emerged as a promising and increasingly popular research direction. Owing to its rich visual knowledge acquired through large-scale pretraining, most existing methods typically rely on the visual encoder of CLIP, while paying limited attention to the text modality. Given the instructive nature of the text modality, we posit that it can be leveraged to instruct Deepfake detection with meticulous design. Accordingly, we shift the focus from the visual modality to the text modality and propose a new Separable Prompt Learning strategy (SePL) that enables CLIP to serve as an effective face forgery detector. The core idea of SePL is to disentangle forgery-specific and forgery-irrelevant information in images via two types of prompt learning, with the former enhancing detection. To achieve this disentangle, we describe a cross-modality alignment strategy and a set of dedicated objectives. Extensive experiments demonstrate that, with this simple adaptation, our method achieves competitive and even superior performance compared to other methods under both cross-dataset and cross-method evaluation, highlighting its strong generalizability. The codes have been released at https://github.com/OUC-YER/SePL-DeepfakeDetection

</details>


### [192] [Spectral Forensics of Diffusion Attention Graphs for Copy-Move Forgery Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17287)
*H. M. Shadman Tabib,Tasriad Ahmed Tias,Nafis Tahmid*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: GraphSpecForge是一种无需训练的复制-移动伪造检测框架，通过分析预训练Stable Diffusion U-Net中自注意力图的谱结构来检测图像篡改。核心发现是复制-移动操作会导致自注意力图中出现近似子图重复，进而引起归一化图拉普拉斯谱的可测量重分布。在四个基准数据集上取得了有竞争力的检测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 复制-移动伪造（图像内区域复制以隐藏或伪造内容）对视觉媒体完整性构成持续威胁，现有方法通常需要针对伪造类型进行特定训练，缺乏通用性和泛化能力。

Method: 利用预训练Stable Diffusion U-Net的自注意力图构建图结构，通过分析归一化图拉普拉斯谱的Wasserstein距离与真实参考分布进行比较，构建图像级异常检测器。核心在于将复制-移动操作形式化为近似子图重复问题，并用扰动理论论证其与谱重分布的关联。

Result: 在RecodAI-LUC上AUROC=0.606（p=0.005），归一化拉普拉斯比原始注意力谱高+0.057 AUROC；MICC-F220上AUROC=0.752，CoMoFoD上AUROC=0.774、AUPRC=0.833、平衡精度=0.712、MCC=0.499、TPR@1%FPR=32.5%，COVERAGE上AUROC=0.673。消融和证伪实验证实了信号的特异性和对篡改强度的敏感性。

Conclusion: 基于预训练扩散模型自注意力图谱分析的训练-free框架能有效检测复制-移动伪造，无需针对伪造类型重新训练，验证了图拉普拉斯谱分析在图像取证中的有效性。

Abstract: Copy-move forgery, where a region within an image is duplicated to hide or fabricate content, remains a persistent threat to visual media integrity. We introduce GraphSpecForge, a training-free framework that detects copy-move forgery by analysing the spectral structure of attention graphs from a pretrained Stable Diffusion U-Net. Our central insight is that copy-move manipulation induces approximate subgraph duplication in the self-attention graph, leading to measurable spectral redistribution in the normalized graph Laplacian. We formalise this link with perturbation-based arguments and build an image-level anomaly detector using Wasserstein distances between per-image Laplacian spectra and an authentic reference distribution. We evaluate GraphSpecForge on four copy-move benchmarks without forgery-specific retraining. On RecodAI-LUC (5,128 images), our best configuration achieves AUROC = 0.606 (95% CI: 0.580-0.638; permutation p = 0.005), and the normalized Laplacian outperforms raw attention spectra by +0.057 AUROC. On MICC-F220, CoMoFoD, and COVERAGE, the same pipeline attains AUROCs of 0.752, 0.774, and 0.673, respectively; on CoMoFoD it also reaches AUPRC = 0.833, balanced accuracy = 0.712, MCC = 0.499, and TPR@1%FPR = 32.5%. Additional ablation and falsification experiments confirm the signal's specificity and sensitivity to manipulation strength, while null-graph controls rule out trivial-statistic explanations.

</details>


### [193] [Depth Adaptive Efficient Visual Autoregressive Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17286)
*Chunliang Li,Tianze Cao,Sanyuan Zhao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出DepthVAR，一种无需训练的框架，通过自适应分配每个token的计算深度而非硬剪枝token，在VAR模型中实现2.3×-3.1×加速且质量损失极小。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VAR模型对所有位置使用固定计算深度，效率低下；而基于频率图的硬剪枝方法本质上有局限性，即使改进频率估计也无法提升生成质量。

Method: 提出DepthVAR，包含：(1)自适应深度调度器，通过循环旋转调度为每个token分配计算深度；(2)动态推理过程，将深度转化为层掩码，选择性应用Transformer块并融合编码，确保每个token的影响与其处理深度成比例。

Result: 在高质量图像生成任务中，DepthVAR实现2.3×-3.1×加速，质量损失极小，在计算-性能权衡上优于现有硬剪枝方法。

Conclusion: 从剪枝token转向自适应分配每个token的计算深度是一种更有效的加速范式，DepthVAR证明了训练自由框架在此方向上的潜力。

Abstract: Visual Autoregressive (VAR) modeling inefficiently applies a fixed computational depth to each position when generating high-resolution images. While existing methods accelerate inference by pruning tokens using frequency maps, their binary hard-pruning approach is fundamentally limited and fails to improve quality even with better frequency estimation. Observing that VAR models possess significant depth redundancy, we propose a paradigm shift from pruning entire tokens to adaptively allocating per-token computational depth. To this end, we introduce DepthVAR, a training-free framework that dynamically allocates computation. It integrates an adaptive depth scheduler, which assigns computational depth via a cyclic rotated schedule for balanced, non-static refinement, with a dynamic inference process that translates these depths into layer-major masks, selectively applies transformer blocks, and blends the resulting codes to ensure each token's influence is proportional to its processing depth. Extensive experiments show that DepthVAR achieves 2.3$\times$-3.1$\times$ acceleration with minimal quality loss, offering a competitive compute-performance trade-off compared to existing hard-pruning approaches. Code is available at https://github.com/STOVAGtz/DepthVAR

</details>


### [194] [PestVL-Net: Enabling Multimodal Pest Learning via Fine-grained Vision-Language Interaction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17278)
*Xueheng Li,Tao Hu,Ke Cao,Runsheng Qi,Huixin Zhang,Rui Li,Jie Zhang,Chengjun Xie*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种融合视觉-语言框架PestVL-Net与两个多物种害虫数据集的方法，通过RWKV架构的视觉通路和基于MLLMs与CoT推理的语言通路，实现细粒度多模态害虫学习，在多个数据集上验证了优越性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有技术难以有效建模害虫的细粒度视觉和高层语义特征，导致实际农业场景中的害虫识别与管理应用受限。

Method: 提出PestVL-Net视觉-语言框架：视觉通路采用RWKV架构结合显著性引导的自适应窗口划分方案；语言通路利用MLLMs先验和农业专家知识，通过多模态CoT推理生成精确语义描述；两者深度融合实现细粒度多模态害虫学习。

Result: 在多个害虫数据集上的大量实验验证了PestVL-Net的优越性能。

Conclusion: PestVL-Net在真实世界的害虫管理中具有有效应用潜力。

Abstract: Effective pest recognition and management are crucial for sustainable agricultural development. However, collecting pest data in real scenarios is often challenging. Compared to other domains, pests exhibit a wide variety of species with complex and diverse morphological characteristics. Existing techniques struggle to effectively model the key visual and high-level semantic features of pests in a fine-grained manner. These limitations hinder the practical application of such methods in real agricultural scenarios. To address these critical challenges, we present a synergistic approach that integrates PestVL-Net, a novel vision-language framework, with two multi-species pest datasets to facilitate fine-grained pest learning. The visual pathway of PestVL-Net utilizes the Recurrent Weighted Key Value (RWKV) architecture, incorporating a saliency-guided adaptive window partitioning scheme to effectively model the fine-grained visual characteristics of pests. Concurrently, the linguistic component generates precise pest semantic descriptions by leveraging Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) priors, critically informed by agricultural expert knowledge and structured via multimodal Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning. The deep fusion of these complementary visual and textual representations enables fine-grained multimodal pest learning. Extensive experimental evaluations on multiple pest datasets validate the superior performance of PestVL-Net, highlighting its potential for effective real-world pest management.

</details>


### [195] [Instinct vs. Reflection: Unifying Token and Verbalized Confidence in Multimodal Large Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17274)
*Yunkai Dang,Yifan Jiang,Yizhu Jiang,Anqi Chen,Wenbin Li,Yang Gao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文发现多模态大模型存在“直觉-反思”置信度错位问题（隐式token级支持与显式口头自评估不一致），提出单调置信融合框架整合双通道信号及跨通道一致性估计正确性，并通过保序均值对齐校正全局偏差，在多种开源和闭源MLLM上实现了更可靠的置信度估计、更好的校准性和故障预测能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有置信度估计研究主要集中在纯文本LLM且依赖计算昂贵的自一致性采样，而多模态场景下的置信度估计尚未被充分探索，且模型存在内在的置信度错位问题。

Method: 提出单调置信融合框架：(1) 融合隐式token级信号与显式口头自评估双通道信号；(2) 利用跨通道一致性估计正确性；(3) 通过保序均值对齐校正全局偏差，在改善校准性的同时保持选择性预测的风险-覆盖权衡。

Result: 在多种开源和闭源MLLM上的实验表明，该方法持续产生更可靠的置信度估计，同时改善了校准性和故障预测能力。

Conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了MLLM中直觉与反思的置信度错位问题，为多模态场景下的可靠置信度估计提供了有效方案。

Abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated exceptional capabilities in various perception and reasoning tasks. Despite this success, ensuring their reliability in practical deployment necessitates robust confidence estimation. Prior works have predominantly focused on text-only LLMs, often relying on computationally expensive self-consistency sampling. In this paper, we extend this to multimodal settings and conduct a comprehensive evaluation of MLLMs' response confidence estimation. Our analysis reveals a significant instinct-reflection misalignment: the model's implicit token-level support frequently diverges from its verbal self-assessment confidence. To address this misalignment, we propose a monotone confidence fusion framework to merge dual-channel signals and cross-channel consistency to estimate correctness. Subsequently, an order-preserving mean alignment step is applied to correct global bias, which improves calibration while preserving the risk-coverage trade-off for selective prediction. Experiments on diverse open-source and closed-source MLLMs show that our method consistently yields more reliable confidence estimates and improves both calibration and failure prediction. Code will be available at https://github.com/Yunkaidang/Instinct-vs.-Reflection.

</details>


### [196] [Fractal Characterization of Low-Correlation Signals in AI-Generated Image Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17268)
*Wenwei Xie,Jie Yin,Lu Ma,Xuansong Zhang,Wenjing Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文从信号层面发现低相关性信号可作为区分AI生成图像与真实照片的独特标记，并基于分形理论提出了一种量化这些信号的新方法，实验证明该方法在深度伪造检测中具有鲁棒性和优越性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度伪造检测方法在开放世界场景中鲁棒性有限，亟需探索新的信号级检测方向以提升AI生成图像的检测能力。

Method: 从信号层面分析合成图像与真实图像之间的内在差异，发现低相关性信号可作为区分标记；基于分形理论量化这些低相关性信号，通过分析其分形特征捕获合成过程中固有的细微统计异常。

Result: 大量实验表明该方法具有鲁棒性和优越的检测性能。

Conclusion: 该方法不仅限于人脸图像识别，可应用于所有AI生成图像检测任务，为深度伪造检测提供了新的研究方向，即转向信号级检测方向。

Abstract: AI-generated imagery has reached near-photorealistic fidelity, yet this technology poses significant threats to information security and societal trust. Existing deepfake detection methods often exhibit limited robustness in open-world scenarios. To address this limitation, this paper investigates intrinsic discrepancies between synthetic and authentic images from a signal-level perspective. Our analysis reveals that low-correlation signals serve as distinctive markers for differentiating AI-generated imagery from real photographs. Building on this insight, we introduce a novel method for quantifying these signals based on fractal theory. By analyzing the fractal characteristics of low-correlation signals, our method effectively captures the subtle statistical anomalies inherent to the synthesis process. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the method's robustness and superior detection performance. This work emphasizes the need to shift research focus to a new signal-level direction for deepfake detection. Theoretically, this proposed approach is not limited to face image identification but can be applied to all AI-generated image detection tasks. This study provides a new research direction for deepfake detection.

</details>


### [197] [RemoteShield: Enable Robust Multimodal Large Language Models for Earth Observation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17243)
*Rui Min,Liang Yao,Shiyu Miao,Shengxiang Xu,Yuxuan Liu,Chuanyi Zhang,Shimin Di,Fan Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 针对多模态大语言模型在遥感领域对输入扰动（视觉退化如云雾、文本变化如口语化表达）缺乏鲁棒性的问题，提出RemoteShield，通过偏好学习对齐干净与扰动样本的语义等价簇，在三个地球观测任务上实现了更强的鲁棒性和跨条件一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前遥感多模态大语言模型在精心清洗的数据集上训练，学习到脆弱的映射关系，无法泛化到实际部署中存在的输入扰动（如云雾遮挡、口语化指令等），导致性能严重退化。

Method: 构建包含视觉退化（云雾覆盖）和文本变化（口语化、模糊或缺失指令）的多模态扰动集；将每个干净样本与其图文扰动变体配对形成语义等价簇；通过偏好学习（preference learning）比较模型对干净与扰动输入的反应，鼓励模型选择稳定响应而非扰动导致的失败响应，实现跨条件对齐。

Result: 在三个地球观测任务上的实验表明，RemoteShield在现实多模态扰动下，相较于代表性基线方法，持续展现出更强的鲁棒性和跨条件一致性。

Conclusion: 通过偏好学习对齐干净与扰动条件下的语义等价簇，能有效提升遥感多模态大语言模型对现实输入扰动的鲁棒性，使模型聚焦于底层任务语义而非输入噪声。

Abstract: A robust Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) for Earth Observation should maintain consistent interpretation and reasoning under realistic input variations. However, current Remote Sensing MLLMs fail to meet this requirement. Trained on carefully curated clean datasets, they learn brittle mappings that do not generalize to noisy conditions in operational Earth Observation. Consequently, their performance degrades when confronted with imperfect inputs in deployment. To quantify this vulnerability, we construct a realistic set of multimodal perturbations, including visual degradations such as cloud and fog cover, together with diverse human-centric textual variations ranging from colloquialisms to vague or omitted instructions. Empirical evaluations show that these perturbations significantly impair the visual-semantic reasoning capabilities of leading RS foundation models. To address this limitation, we introduce RemoteShield, a robust Remote Sensing MLLM trained to maintain consistent outputs across realistic input variations. During training, each clean sample is paired with its image-text perturbed variants to form a semantic equivalence cluster. Rather than directly fitting noisy samples, RemoteShield is optimized through preference learning over clean and perturbed conditions within the same cluster. By comparing model responses to clean and corrupted inputs, the model is encouraged to favor stable responses over perturbation-induced failures. This cross-condition alignment helps the model focus on underlying task semantics despite visual degradations and textual noise. Experiments on three Earth Observation tasks show that RemoteShield consistently delivers stronger robustness and cross-condition consistency than representative baselines under realistic multimodal perturbations.

</details>


### [198] [Enhancing Zero-shot Personalized Image Aesthetics Assessment with Profile-aware Multimodal LLM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17233)
*Chun Wang,Chenfeng Wei,Chenyang Liu,Weihong Deng*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出P-MLLM，一种基于用户画像的多模态大模型，通过选择性融合模块在零样本条件下实现个性化图像美学评估，无需用户历史评分数据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有个性化图像美学评估方法依赖用户历史评分数据来建模个性化偏好，但在缺乏这些数据（零样本场景）时性能显著下降。本文旨在利用用户画像作为上下文信号，解决零样本条件下的个性化美学评估问题。

Method: 提出P-MLLM，一种画像感知的多模态大模型，通过选择性融合模块将视觉信息整合到冻结的LLM的隐藏状态中，在画像条件推理过程中实现画像感知的视觉信息选择性融合。

Result: 在多个PIAA基准上，P-MLLM在零样本设置下取得了竞争性性能，且即使在粗粒度画像信息下仍保持有效。

Conclusion: 基于用户画像的个性化范式在零样本PIAA任务中具有巨大潜力，为缺乏历史评分数据的个性化美学评估提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Personalized image aesthetics assessment (PIAA) aims to predict an individual user's subjective rating of an image, which requires modeling user-specific aesthetic preferences. Existing methods rely on historical user ratings for this modeling and therefore struggle when such data are unavailable. We address this zero-shot setting by using user profiles as contextual signals for personalization and adopting a profile-based personalization paradigm. We introduce P-MLLM, a profile-aware multimodal LLM that augments a frozen LLM with selective fusion modules for controlled visual integration. These modules selectively integrate visual information into the model's evolving hidden states during profile-conditioned reasoning, allowing visual information to be incorporated in a profile-aware manner. Experiments on recent PIAA benchmarks show that P-MLLM achieves competitive zero-shot performance and remains effective even with coarse profile information, highlighting the potential of profile-based personalization for zero-shot PIAA.

</details>


### [199] [Region-Affinity Attention for Whole-Slide Breast Cancer Classification in Deep Ultraviolet Imaging](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17222)
*Nagur Shareef Shaik,Teja Krishna Cherukuri,Dong Hye Ye*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对深紫外荧光全切片图像（DUV-WSI）的Region-Affinity Attention机制，通过保持空间完整性、建模局部邻域距离和构建完整亲和矩阵，结合对比学习损失，在乳腺癌分类任务中达到92.67%准确率和95.97% AUC，优于现有注意力方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统组织病理学方法在术中场景下速度与分辨率不足；现有深度学习方法基于补丁切分破坏空间上下文且预处理开销大；标准注意力机制无法充分利用DUV-WSI中丰富的多尺度区域关系。

Method: 提出Region-Affinity Attention机制：处理整张切片无需切块以保留空间完整性，通过建模局部邻域距离并构建完整亲和矩阵动态突出诊断相关区域，辅以对比损失增强特征判别性。

Result: 在136例DUV-WSI样本上，准确率92.67±0.73%，AUC 95.97%，优于Spatial、SE、GC、GCG等现有注意力方法。

Conclusion: Region-Affinity Attention机制能有效利用DUV-WSI的多尺度区域关系，在保持空间上下文完整性的同时提升乳腺癌分类性能，具有临床转化潜力。

Abstract: Breast cancer diagnosis demands rapid and precise tools, yet traditional histopathological methods often fall short in intra-operative settings. Deep Ultraviolet (DUV) fluorescence imaging emerges as a transformative approach, offering high-contrast, label-free visualization of whole-slide images (WSIs) with unprecedented detail, surpassing conventional hematoxylin and eosin (H&E) staining in speed and resolution. However, existing deep learning methods for breast cancer classification, predominantly patch-based, fragment spatial context and incur significant preprocessing overhead, limiting their clinical utility. Moreover, standard attention mechanisms, such as Spatial, Squeeze-and-Excitation, Global Context and Guided Context Gating, fail to fully exploit the rich, multi-scale regional relationships inherent in DUV-WSI data, often prioritizing generic feature recalibration over diagnostic specificity. This study introduces a novel Region-Affinity Attention mechanism tailored for DUV-WSI breast cancer classification, processing entire slides without patching to preserve spatial integrity. By modeling local neighbor distances and constructing a full affinity matrix, our method dynamically highlights diagnostically relevant regions, augmented by a contrastive loss to enhance feature discriminability. Evaluated on a dataset of 136 DUV-WSI samples, our approach achieves an accuracy of 92.67 +/- 0.73% and an AUC of 95.97%, outperforming existing attention methods.

</details>


### [200] [Cross-Modal Attention Analysis and Optimization in Vision-Language Models: A Study on Visual Reliability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17217)
*Lijie Zhou*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出对抗性评估框架量化VLM的文本捷径学习现象，通过LoRA优化（集成硬负挖掘、标签平滑、逐层学习率、余弦重启、课程学习、数据增强）将精度下降从27.5%降至9.8%（相对改进64.4%），同时保持97%正常精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: VLM存在过度依赖文本描述而忽视视觉证据的"文本捷径学习"问题，现有评估方法难以量化这种跨模态依赖程度。

Method: 构建对抗性评估框架，设计shape_swap、color_swap、position_swap、random_text四种对抗策略，在几何形状数据集上对比Baseline CLIP、LoRA微调和LoRA优化（集成HNM、标签平滑、逐层学习率、余弦重启、课程学习、数据增强）三种配置。

Result: 优化模型将平均Drop从27.5%降至9.8%（相对改进64.4%，p<0.001），正常精度维持在97%。注意力可视化与嵌入空间分析证实优化模型更关注视觉特征，跨模态对齐更紧密。

Conclusion: 所提对抗评估框架能有效量化文本捷径学习，LoRA优化方案显著提升VLM对视觉证据的依赖，缓解跨模态偏差。

Abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) achieve strong cross-modal performance, yet recent evidence suggests they over-rely on textual descriptions while under-utilizing visual evidence -- a phenomenon termed ``text shortcut learning.'' We propose an adversarial evaluation framework that quantifies this cross-modal dependency by measuring accuracy degradation (Drop) when semantically conflicting text is paired with unchanged images. Four adversarial strategies -- shape\_swap, color\_swap, position\_swap, and random\_text -- are applied to a controlled geometric-shapes dataset ($n{=}1{,}000$). We compare three configurations: Baseline CLIP (ViT-B/32), LoRA fine-tuning, and LoRA Optimized (integrating Hard Negative Mining, Label Smoothing, layer-wise learning rates, Cosine Restarts, curriculum learning, and data augmentation). The optimized model reduces average Drop from 27.5\% to 9.8\% (64.4\% relative improvement, $p{<}0.001$) while maintaining 97\% normal accuracy. Attention visualization and embedding-space analysis confirm that the optimized model attends more to visual features and achieves tighter cross-modal alignment.

</details>


### [201] [LARY: A Latent Action Representation Yielding Benchmark for Generalizable Vision-to-Action Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11689)
*Dujun Nie,Fengjiao Chen,Qi Lv,Jun Kuang,Xiaoyu Li,Xuezhi Cao,Xunliang Cai*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出LARY基准，用于评估潜在动作表征在高层次语义动作和低层次机器人控制上的表现。实验发现：通用视觉基础模型（无动作监督）优于专门的潜在动作模型；基于潜在语义的视觉空间比像素空间更本质地与物理动作空间对齐。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模人类动作视频虽为VLA模型提供了可扩展但未标注的数据源，但将视觉信号转化为与本体无关的潜在动作表征的关键挑战尚未被严格评估其鲁棒控制能力。

Method: 构建LARY基准框架，包含超过100万视频（1000小时）、151个动作类别、62万图像对和59.5万运动轨迹，统一评估潜在动作表征在高层语义和低层控制两方面的能力。

Result: 通用视觉基础模型（无动作监督）优于专门的潜在动作模型；潜在语义空间比像素空间更本质地与物理动作空间对齐。

Conclusion: 通用视觉表征天然编码了与物理控制相关的动作知识；语义层面的抽象是比像素级重建更有效的视觉到动作的路径。

Abstract: While the shortage of explicit action data limits Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models, human action videos offer a scalable yet unlabeled data source. A critical challenge in utilizing large-scale human video datasets lies in transforming visual signals into ontology-independent representations, known as latent actions. However, the capacity of latent action representation to derive robust control from visual observations has yet to be rigorously evaluated. We introduce the Latent Action Representation Yielding (LARY) Benchmark, a unified framework for evaluating latent action representations on both high-level semantic actions (what to do) and low-level robotic control (how to do). The comprehensively curated dataset encompasses over one million videos (1,000 hours) spanning 151 action categories, alongside 620K image pairs and 595K motion trajectories across diverse embodiments and environments. Our experiments reveal two crucial insights: (i) General visual foundation models, trained without any action supervision, consistently outperform specialized embodied latent action models. (ii) Latent-based visual space is fundamentally better aligned to physical action space than pixel-based space. These results suggest that general visual representations inherently encode action-relevant knowledge for physical control, and that semantic-level abstraction serves as a fundamentally more effective pathway from vision to action than pixel-level reconstruction.

</details>


### [202] [Instant Colorization of Gaussian Splats](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17155)
*Daniel Lieber,Alexander Mock,Nils Wandel*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种将2D图像信息（颜色、神经特征、分割掩码等）高效映射回现有3D高斯泼溅场景的方法，利用法方程求解可见性加权最小二乘问题，在场景重照明、特征增强和3D语义分割等任务上实现比梯度下降基线快一个数量级的速度提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有高斯泼溅框架能高效地将3D高斯映射到2D视图，但缺乏将2D信息反向映射回3D高斯场景的高效方法，而这种反向映射对场景重照明、风格化、3D语义分割等应用至关重要。

Method: 利用法方程（normal equation）求解每个高斯的可见性加权最小二乘问题，通过现有可微光栅化器高效实现反向映射，处理视角依赖颜色和遮挡问题。

Result: 在场景重照明、特征增强和3D语义分割任务上，相比基于梯度下降的基线方法实现最高一个数量级的加速。

Conclusion: 该反向映射方法高效且通用，能显著加速需要将2D信息投影回3D高斯场景的各类下游任务。

Abstract: Gaussian Splatting has recently become one of the most popular frameworks for photorealistic 3D scene reconstruction and rendering. While current rasterizers allow for efficient mappings of 3D Gaussian splats onto 2D camera views, this work focuses on mapping 2D image information (e.g. color, neural features or segmentation masks) efficiently back onto an existing scene of Gaussian splats. This 'opposite' direction enables applications ranging from scene relighting and stylization to 3D semantic segmentation, but also introduces challenges, such as view-dependent colorization and occlusion handling.
  Our approach tackles these challenges using the normal equation to solve a visibility-weighted least squares problem for every Gaussian and can be implemented efficiently with existing differentiable rasterizers. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on scene relighting, feature enrichment and 3D semantic segmentation tasks, achieving up to an order of magnitude speedup compared to gradient descent-based baselines.

</details>


### [203] [GeomPrompt: Geometric Prompt Learning for RGB-D Semantic Segmentation Under Missing and Degraded Depth](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11585)
*Krishna Jaganathan,Patricio Vela*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出GeomPrompt轻量级跨模态适配模块，仅凭RGB生成任务驱动的几何提示，替代RGB-D语义分割模型中缺失或退化的深度通道，无需深度监督；以及GeomPrompt-Recovery模块补偿退化深度。在SUN RGB-D上，RGB-only推理提升+6.1 mIoU（DFormer）和+3.0 mIoU（GeminiFusion），退化深度下最高提升+3.6 mIoU，延迟仅7.8 ms，远优于单目深度估计基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RGB-D感知中深度信息经常缺失、含噪或损坏，现有方法依赖可靠深度输入，需要一种无需深度监督、高效且鲁棒的跨模态补偿机制。

Method: 提出GeomPrompt模块，从RGB生成任务驱动的几何提示作为冻结RGB-D分割模型的第四通道输入，无需深度真值监督；GeomPrompt-Recovery模块预测第四通道校正量以补偿退化深度。两者仅用下游分割损失训练。

Result: SUN RGB-D上，GeomPrompt在DFormer上+6.1 mIoU，GeminiFusion上+3.0 mIoU；GeomPrompt-Recovery在严重深度退化下最高+3.6 mIoU；延迟7.8 ms，远低于单目深度基线（38.3 ms、71.9 ms）。

Conclusion: 任务驱动的几何提示是一种高效且鲁棒的跨模态补偿机制，适用于RGB-D感知中深度缺失和退化场景。

Abstract: Multimodal perception systems for robotics and embodied AI often assume reliable RGB-D sensing, but in practice, depth is frequently missing, noisy, or corrupted. We thus present GeomPrompt, a lightweight cross-modal adaptation module that synthesizes a task-driven geometric prompt from RGB alone for the fourth channel of a frozen RGB-D semantic segmentation model, without depth supervision. We further introduce GeomPrompt-Recovery, an adaptation module that compensates for degraded depth by predicting the fourth channel correction relevant for the frozen segmenter. Both modules are trained solely with downstream segmentation supervision, enabling recovery of the geometric prior useful for segmentation, rather than estimating depth signals. On SUN RGB-D, GeomPrompt improves over RGB-only inference by +6.1 mIoU on DFormer and +3.0 mIoU on GeminiFusion, while remaining competitive with strong monocular depth estimators. For degraded depth, GeomPrompt-Recovery consistently improves robustness, yielding gains up to +3.6 mIoU under severe depth corruptions. GeomPrompt is also substantially more efficient than monocular depth baselines, reaching 7.8 ms latency versus 38.3 ms and 71.9 ms. These results suggest that task-driven geometric prompting is an efficient mechanism for cross-modal compensation under missing and degraded depth inputs in RGB-D perception.

</details>


### [204] [OptiMVMap: Offline Vectorized Map Construction via Optimal Multi-vehicle Perspectives](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17135)
*Zedong Dan,Zijie Wang,Wei Zhang,Xiangru Lin,Weiming Zhang,Xiao Tan,Jingdong Wang,Liang Lin,Guanbin Li*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: OptiMVMap提出了一种“先选择后融合”的多车辆矢量化地图构建方法，通过最优车辆选择模块筛选出对减少遮挡区域不确定性最有贡献的车辆视角，再结合跨车辆注意力与语义感知噪声过滤模块实现鲁棒融合，在nuScenes和Argoverse2数据集上显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有离线矢量化地图构建方法主要依赖单一自车轨迹，存在视角不足问题；而简单融合多车辆视角会引入计算开销大、视角冗余和噪声干扰三大挑战。本文旨在系统性地解决这些问题。

Method: OptiMVMap将多车辆地图构建建模为“先选择后融合”问题，包含三个核心模块：最优车辆选择（OVS）模块通过不确定性引导策略筛选出最小化自车遮挡区域不确定性的紧凑车辆子集；跨车辆注意力（CVA）模块实现位姿鲁棒的特征对齐；语义感知噪声过滤（SNF）模块抑制伪影和噪声，最后进行BEV级融合。

Result: 在nuScenes和Argoverse2上，OptiMVMap分别比MapTRv2提升+10.5 mAP和+9.3 mAP，比记忆增强基线MVMap和HRMapNet分别提升+6.2 mAP和+3.8 mAP（nuScenes）。

Conclusion: 不确定性引导的辅助车辆选择对于高效且准确的多车辆矢量化地图构建至关重要，OptiMVMap以更少的视角生成了更完整、拓扑更忠实的地图。

Abstract: Offline vectorized maps constitute critical infrastructure for high-precision autonomous driving and mapping services. Existing approaches rely predominantly on single ego-vehicle trajectories, which fundamentally suffer from viewpoint insufficiency: while memory-based methods extend observation time by aggregating ego-trajectory frames, they lack the spatial diversity needed to reveal occluded regions. Incorporating views from surrounding vehicles offers complementary perspectives, yet naive fusion introduces three key challenges: computational cost from large candidate pools, redundancy from near-collinear viewpoints, and noise from pose errors and occlusion artifacts.
  We present OptiMVMap, which reformulates multi-vehicle mapping as a select-then-fuse problem to address these challenges systematically. An Optimal Vehicle Selection (OVS) module strategically identifies a compact subset of helpers that maximally reduce ego-centric uncertainty in occluded regions, addressing computation and redundancy challenges. Cross-Vehicle Attention (CVA) and Semantic-aware Noise Filter (SNF) then perform pose-tolerant alignment and artifact suppression before BEV-level fusion, addressing the noise challenge. This targeted pipeline yields more complete and topologically faithful maps with substantially fewer views than indiscriminate aggregation. On nuScenes and Argoverse2, OptiMVMap improves MapTRv2 by +10.5 mAP and +9.3 mAP, respectively, and surpasses memory-augmented baselines MVMap and HRMapNet by +6.2 mAP and +3.8 mAP on nuScenes. These results demonstrate that uncertainty-guided selection of helper vehicles is essential for efficient and accurate multi-vehicle vectorized mapping. The code is released at https://github.com/DanZeDong/OptiMVMap.

</details>


### [205] [Prompt Sensitivity in Vision-Language Grounding: How Small Changes in Wording Affect Object Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17126)
*Dawar Jyoti Deka,Amit Sethi,Syed Mohammad Ali*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 研究发现视觉-语言模型在开放词汇目标定位中，对于语义等价的描述（如"person"、"human"、"pedestrian"）会产生不一致的定位结果，平均不稳定性为2.11个不同选择。文本嵌入距离仅能解释34%的定位分歧，表明不稳定性主要源于argmax选择机制而非文本语义差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 检验视觉-语言模型在开放词汇目标定位中，语义等价的自然语言查询是否产生一致输出的隐含假设。

Method: 使用DETR生成目标提议，CLIP进行语言条件选择，在263张COCO val2017图像上测试6个语义重叠的提示词，通过PCA分析、提示集成和文本嵌入距离分析来探究不稳定性来源。

Result: 语义重叠提示词选择不同实例的平均不稳定性为2.11；PCA表明变异性是结构化且有方向性的；提示集成未能提升质量；文本嵌入距离仅解释34%的定位分歧（r=-0.58）。

Conclusion: 定位不稳定性主要源于argmax选择机制而非文本语义距离，提示集成无法改善这一问题。

Abstract: Vision-language models enable open-vocabulary object grounding through natural language queries, under the implicit assumption that semantically equivalent descriptions yield consistent outputs. We examine this assumption using a controlled pipeline combining DETR for object proposals with CLIP for language-conditioned selection on 263 COCO val2017 images. We find that overlapping prompts such as "a person," "a human," and "a pedestrian" frequently select different instances, with mean instability of 2.11 distinct selections across six prompts. PCA analysis shows this variability is structured and directional, not random. Prompt ensembling does not improve quality and often shifts selections toward generic regions. We further show that text embedding proximity explains only 34% of grounding disagreement (r = -0.58), confirming that instability arises from the argmax selection mechanism rather than text-level distances alone.

</details>


### [206] [Multimodal Fusion of Histopathology Images and Electronic Health Records for Early Breast Cancer Diagnosis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17122)
*Aditya Shribhagwan Khandelwal,Mohammad Samar Ansari,Asra Aslam*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出一种融合组织病理学图像（BreCaHAD）与结构化电子健康记录（MIMIC-IV）的多模态框架，在乳腺癌诊断任务中，中间融合模型（macro AUC 0.997）优于所有单模态基线，尤其在有丝分裂类别（AUC 0.994）上提升显著，并利用Grad-CAM和SHAP验证了模型决策与临床标准的一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究大多将组织病理学图像分类和结构化电子健康记录风险分层作为独立任务处理，缺乏系统性整合两种模态以提升乳腺癌诊断性能的工作。

Method: 构建单模态图像模型（简单CNN基线、ResNet-18迁移学习）、单模态表格模型（XGBoost、多层感知器）以及中间融合模型（拼接两种模态的潜在表示），在BreCaHAD和MIMIC-IV数据集上评估。

Result: ResNet-18在三类斑块级分类上达到完美准确率（1.000）和AUC（1.000）；XGBoost在EHR预测任务上达到98%准确率；中间融合模型macro AUC达0.997，优于所有单模态基线，有丝分裂类别AUC达0.994。

Conclusion: 多模态融合在预测性能和临床透明度方面均优于单模态方法，且模型决策与既定的病理学与临床标准一致。

Abstract: Breast cancer is a leading cause of cancer-related mortality worldwide, and timely accurate diagnosis is critical to improving survival outcomes. While convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have demonstrated strong performance on histopathology image classification, and machine learning models on structured electronic health records (EHR) have shown utility for clinical risk stratification, most existing work treats these modalities in isolation. This paper presents a systematic multimodal framework that integrates patch-level histopathology features from the BreCaHAD dataset with structured clinical data from MIMIC-IV. We train and evaluate unimodal image models (a simple CNN baseline and ResNet-18 with transfer learning), unimodal tabular models (XGBoost and a multilayer perceptron), and an intermediate-fusion model that concatenates latent representations from both modalities. ResNet-18 achieves near-perfect accuracy (1.000) and AUC (1.000) on three-class patch-level classification, while XGBoost achieves 98% accuracy on the EHR prediction task. The intermediate fusion model yields a macro-average AUC of 0.997, outperforming all unimodal baselines and delivering the largest improvements on the diagnostically critical but class-imbalanced mitosis category (AUC 0.994). Grad-CAM and SHAP interpretability analyses validate that model decisions align with established pathological and clinical criteria. Our results demonstrate that multimodal integration delivers meaningful improvements in both predictive performance and clinical transparency.

</details>


<div id='cs.CL'></div>

# cs.CL [[Back]](#toc)

### [207] [Chat2Workflow: A Benchmark for Generating Executable Visual Workflows with Natural Language](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19667)
*Yi Zhong,Buqiang Xu,Yijun Wang,Zifei Shan,Shuofei Qiao,Guozhou Zheng,Ningyu Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: Chat2Workflow：一个用于从自然语言直接生成可执行可视化工作流的基准测试，通过智能体框架解决执行错误问题，旨在自动化当前需要大量人工工程的工作流构建过程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前工业部署中的可执行可视化工作流虽然可靠可控，但完全依赖人工构建，开发成本高、耗时长且易出错。研究旨在探索大语言模型能否自动化这一多轮交互过程，降低工作流开发门槛。

Method: 提出Chat2Workflow基准测试，基于真实业务工作流构建，确保生成的工作流可直接部署到Dify、Coze等实际平台。同时提出鲁棒的智能体框架来缓解重复执行错误。

Result: 实验表明，最先进的语言模型虽能捕捉高层意图，但难以生成正确、稳定且可执行的工作流，尤其在复杂或需求变化时。提出的智能体框架能带来最高5.34%的错误解决率提升。

Conclusion: 尽管智能体框架有所改进，但现实应用仍存在显著差距，Chat2Workflow可作为推进工业级自动化的重要基础。代码已开源，为后续研究提供基准。

Abstract: At present, executable visual workflows have emerged as a mainstream paradigm in real-world industrial deployments, offering strong reliability and controllability. However, in current practice, such workflows are almost entirely constructed through manual engineering: developers must carefully design workflows, write prompts for each step, and repeatedly revise the logic as requirements evolve-making development costly, time-consuming, and error-prone. To study whether large language models can automate this multi-round interaction process, we introduce Chat2Workflow, a benchmark for generating executable visual workflows directly from natural language, and propose a robust agentic framework to mitigate recurrent execution errors. Chat2Workflow is built from a large collection of real-world business workflows, with each instance designed so that the generated workflow can be transformed and directly deployed to practical workflow platforms such as Dify and Coze. Experimental results show that while state-of-the-art language models can often capture high-level intent, they struggle to generate correct, stable, and executable workflows, especially under complex or changing requirements. Although our agentic framework yields up to 5.34% resolve rate gains, the remaining real-world gap positions Chat2Workflow as a foundation for advancing industrial-grade automation. Code is available at https://github.com/zjunlp/Chat2Workflow.

</details>


### [208] [Cross-Model Consistency of AI-Generated Exercise Prescriptions: A Repeated Generation Study Across Three Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19598)
*Kihyuk Lee*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究比较了GPT-4.1、Claude Sonnet 4.6和Gemini 2.5 Flash三种大语言模型在温度=0条件下运动处方输出的重复生成一致性，发现不同模型在语义相似性、输出可重复性和生成行为方面存在显著差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是评估不同大语言模型在临床运动处方生成任务中的输出一致性，这对于LLM在医疗保健领域的可靠部署至关重要。当前缺乏对模型在重复生成条件下输出行为差异的系统比较，而单次输出评估无法捕捉到这种差异。

Method: 研究比较了GPT-4.1、Claude Sonnet 4.6和Gemini 2.5 Flash三种LLM在温度=0条件下生成运动处方的表现。每个模型针对6个临床场景各生成20次处方，共获得360个输出。分析包括四个维度：语义相似性、输出可重复性、FITT分类和安全性表达。

Result: GPT-4.1的平均语义相似性最高(0.955)，其次是Gemini 2.5 Flash(0.950)和Claude Sonnet 4.6(0.903)，模型间差异显著(H=458.41, p<.001)。关键发现是：GPT-4.1生成完全独特的输出(100%)且语义内容稳定，而Gemini 2.5 Flash表现出明显的输出重复(仅27.5%独特输出)，其高相似性分数源于文本重复而非一致推理。所有模型的安全性表达均达到天花板水平。

Conclusion: 相同解码设置下不同模型展现出根本不同的输出一致性特征，这是单次输出评估无法捕捉的。模型选择应被视为临床决策而非单纯技术选择，重复生成条件下的输出行为应作为LLM运动处方系统可靠部署的核心标准。

Abstract: This study compared repeated generation consistency of exercise prescription outputs across three large language models (LLMs), specifically GPT-4.1, Claude Sonnet 4.6, and Gemini 2.5 Flash, under temperature=0 conditions. Each model generated prescriptions for six clinical scenarios 20 times, yielding 360 total outputs analyzed across four dimensions: semantic similarity, output reproducibility, FITT classification, and safety expression. Mean semantic similarity was highest for GPT-4.1 (0.955), followed by Gemini 2.5 Flash (0.950) and Claude Sonnet 4.6 (0.903), with significant inter-model differences confirmed (H = 458.41, p < .001). Critically, these scores reflected fundamentally different generative behaviors: GPT-4.1 produced entirely unique outputs (100%) with stable semantic content, while Gemini 2.5 Flash showed pronounced output repetition (27.5% unique outputs), indicating that its high similarity score derived from text duplication rather than consistent reasoning. Identical decoding settings thus yielded fundamentally different consistency profiles, a distinction that single-output evaluations cannot capture. Safety expression reached ceiling levels across all models, confirming its limited utility as a differentiating metric. These results indicate that model selection constitutes a clinical rather than merely technical decision, and that output behavior under repeated generation conditions should be treated as a core criterion for reliable deployment of LLM-based exercise prescription systems.

</details>


### [209] [Impact of large language models on peer review opinions from a fine-grained perspective: Evidence from top conference proceedings in AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19578)
*Wenqing Wu,Chengzhi Zhang,Yi Zhao,Tong Bao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该研究分析了大型语言模型（LLMs）出现后同行评审报告的变化，发现评审文本变得更长、更流畅，更注重摘要和表面清晰度，语言模式更标准化，但对原创性、可重复性等深层评价维度的关注减少。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着LLMs的快速发展，学术界面临前所未有的冲击，特别是在学术交流领域。虽然先前研究表明LLMs开始影响同行评审，但尚不清楚它们是否改变了评审的核心评价功能，以及LLMs对评审报告的语言形式、评价重点和推荐相关信号的影响程度尚未得到系统研究。

Method: 研究从细粒度层面分析LLMs出现后学术文章同行评审报告的变化：1）分析评审意见中的语言特征，如词句长度和复杂度；2）自动标注单个评审句子的评价方面；3）使用最大似然估计方法识别可能由LLMs修改或生成的评审报告；4）评估LLM辅助评审报告中提到的评价方面对论文决策推荐信息性的影响。

Result: 结果显示：1）LLMs出现后，同行评审文本变得更长、更流畅；2）更强调摘要和表面清晰度；3）语言模式更标准化，特别是置信度较低的评审者；4）对原创性、可重复性和细微批判性推理等深层评价维度的关注下降。

Conclusion: LLMs正在改变同行评审的性质，使其更注重表面特征和标准化语言，而牺牲了深度评价维度。这对学术质量评估和LLMs在学术评审中的适当使用提出了重要问题。

Abstract: With the rapid advancement of Large Language Models (LLMs), the academic community has faced unprecedented disruptions, particularly in the realm of academic communication. The primary function of peer review is improving the quality of academic manuscripts, such as clarity, originality and other evaluation aspects. Although prior studies suggest that LLMs are beginning to influence peer review, it remains unclear whether they are altering its core evaluative functions. Moreover, the extent to which LLMs affect the linguistic form, evaluative focus, and recommendation-related signals of peer-review reports has yet to be systematically examined. In this study, we examine the changes in peer review reports for academic articles following the emergence of LLMs, emphasizing variations at fine-grained level. Specifically, we investigate linguistic features such as the length and complexity of words and sentences in review comments, while also automatically annotating the evaluation aspects of individual review sentences. We also use a maximum likelihood estimation method, previously established, to identify review reports that potentially have modified or generated by LLMs. Finally, we assess the impact of evaluation aspects mentioned in LLM-assisted review reports on the informativeness of recommendation for paper decision-making. The results indicate that following the emergence of LLMs, peer review texts have become longer and more fluent, with increased emphasis on summaries and surface-level clarity, as well as more standardized linguistic patterns, particularly reviewers with lower confidence score. At the same time, attention to deeper evaluative dimensions, such as originality, replicability, and nuanced critical reasoning, has declined.

</details>


### [210] [Detecting Hallucinations in SpeechLLMs at Inference Time Using Attention Maps](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19565)
*Jonas Waldendorf,Bashar Awwad Shiekh Hasan,Evgenii Tsymbalov*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于注意力模式的语音大语言模型幻觉检测方法，使用四种注意力衍生指标训练轻量级分类器，在ASR和语音翻译任务中优于现有基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 语音大语言模型中的幻觉问题存在显著风险，但现有检测方法通常依赖昂贵或不切实际的黄金标准输出。此外，为文本LLM开发的幻觉检测方法无法直接捕捉音频特定信号。

Method: 研究四种注意力衍生指标：AUDIORATIO、AUDIOCONSISTENCY、AUDIOENTROPY和TEXTENTROPY，这些指标旨在捕捉与幻觉相关的病态注意力模式。在这些特征上训练轻量级逻辑回归分类器，实现高效的推理时检测。

Result: 在Qwen-2-Audio和Voxtral-3B模型上的自动语音识别和语音到文本翻译任务评估表明，该方法在域内数据上优于基于不确定性和先前基于注意力的基线方法，PR-AUC提升高达+0.23，并能泛化到域外ASR设置。研究发现使用约100个注意力头即可实现强性能，相比使用所有头能改善域外泛化能力。

Conclusion: 虽然有效性依赖于模型且需要任务特定训练，但研究结果表明注意力模式为语音大语言模型的幻觉检测提供了有价值的工具。该方法无需黄金标准输出，直接利用音频特定信号，实现了高效的推理时检测。

Abstract: Hallucinations in Speech Large Language Models (SpeechLLMs) pose significant risks, yet existing detection methods typically rely on gold-standard outputs that are costly or impractical to obtain. Moreover, hallucination detection methods developed for text-based LLMs do not directly capture audio-specific signals. We investigate four attention-derived metrics: AUDIORATIO, AUDIOCONSISTENCY, AUDIOENTROPY, and TEXTENTROPY, designed to capture pathological attention patterns associated with hallucination, and train lightweight logistic regression classifiers on these features for efficient inference-time detection. Across automatic speech recognition and speech-to-text translation tasks, evaluations on Qwen-2-Audio and Voxtral-3B show that our approach outperforms uncertainty-based and prior attention-based baselines on in-domain data, achieving improvements of up to +0.23 PR-AUC, and generalises to out-of-domain ASR settings. We further find that strong performance can be achieved with approximately 100 attention heads, improving out-of-domain generalisation compared to using all heads. While effectiveness is model-dependent and task-specific training is required, our results demonstrate that attention patterns provide a valuable tool for hallucination detection in SpeechLLMs.

</details>


### [211] [Taming Actor-Observer Asymmetry in Agents via Dialectical Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19548)
*Bobo Li,Rui Wu,Zibo Ji,Meishan Zhang,Hao Fei,Min Zhang,Mong-Li Lee,Wynne Hsu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该论文发现LLM多智能体框架中的角色扮演会引发人类认知偏差（行动者-观察者不对称），并提出ReTAS方法通过辩证对齐来缓解这种偏差，提高模糊场景下的故障解决率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着LLM智能体从静态文本生成器演变为能够执行复杂自主工作流程的动态系统，多智能体框架通过分配专门角色来实现自我反思和相互审计，从而提高可靠性。然而，这种角色扮演虽然有效利用了领域专家知识，但同时也引发了类似人类的认知偏差——行动者-观察者不对称（AOA）。

Method: 作者首先使用新构建的模糊失败基准量化AOA效应，发现仅交换视角就能在超过20%的情况下触发该效应。为缓解这种偏差，提出了ReTAS（通过正题-反题-合题推理）方法，该方法通过辩证对齐训练模型，强制执行视角不变推理。ReTAS将辩证思维链与群体相对策略优化相结合，引导智能体将冲突观点合成为客观共识。

Result: 实验表明，ReTAS有效缓解了归因不一致性，并显著提高了模糊场景下的故障解决率。模糊失败基准揭示了视角交换触发AOA效应的普遍性，而ReTAS方法在解决这一认知偏差方面表现出色。

Conclusion: 多智能体框架中的角色扮演虽然增强了可靠性，但会引入行动者-观察者不对称这一认知偏差。ReTAS方法通过辩证对齐有效缓解了这种偏差，为构建更可靠、更客观的LLM智能体系统提供了新思路。

Abstract: Large Language Model agents have rapidly evolved from static text generators into dynamic systems capable of executing complex autonomous workflows. To enhance reliability, multi-agent frameworks assigning specialized roles are increasingly adopted to enable self-reflection and mutual auditing. While such role-playing effectively leverages domain expert knowledge, we find it simultaneously induces a human-like cognitive bias known as Actor-Observer Asymmetry (AOA). Specifically, an agent acting as an actor (during self-reflection) tends to attribute failures to external factors, whereas an observer (during mutual auditing) attributes the same errors to internal faults. We quantify this using our new Ambiguous Failure Benchmark, which reveals that simply swapping perspectives triggers the AOA effect in over 20% of cases for most models. To tame this bias, we introduce ReTAS (Reasoning via Thesis-Antithesis-Synthesis), a model trained through dialectical alignment to enforce perspective-invariant reasoning. By integrating dialectical chain-of-thought with Group Relative Policy Optimization, ReTAS guides agents to synthesize conflicting viewpoints into an objective consensus. Experiments demonstrate that ReTAS effectively mitigates attribution inconsistency and significantly improves fault resolution rates in ambiguous scenarios.

</details>


### [212] [LePREC: Reasoning as Classification over Structured Factors for Assessing Relevance of Legal Issues](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19464)
*Fanyu Wang,Xiaoxi Kang,Paul Burgess,Aashish Srivastava,Chetan Arora,Adnan Trakic,Lay-Ki Soon,Md Khalid Hossain,Lizhen Qu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 论文提出LePREC框架，结合神经生成与符号统计推理，显著提升法律问题识别的精确度，相比GPT-4o等先进LLM基线提升30-40%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 全球超过一半人口因法律资源有限而难以满足民事司法需求。尽管大语言模型展现出强大的推理能力，但在法律问题识别这一基础步骤上仍面临重大挑战，GPT-4o的精确度仅为62%。

Method: 提出LePREC（法律专业启发式推理激发与分类）神经符号框架：1）神经组件利用LLM将法律描述转化为代表不同分析因素的问答对；2）符号组件在这些离散特征上应用稀疏线性模型，学习显式代数权重以识别最具信息量的推理因素。

Result: 实验显示LePREC相比GPT-4o、Claude等先进LLM基线提升30-40%，证实基于相关性的因素-问题分析为相关性决策提供了更数据高效的解决方案。

Conclusion: LePREC框架通过透明特征加权实现可解释性，同时通过基于相关的统计分类保持数据效率，为解决法律问题识别中的LLM精度不足问题提供了有效方案。

Abstract: More than half of the global population struggles to meet their civil justice needs due to limited legal resources. While Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated impressive reasoning capabilities, significant challenges remain even at the foundational step of legal issue identification. To investigate LLMs' capabilities in this task, we constructed a dataset from 769 real-world Malaysian Contract Act court cases, using GPT-4o to extract facts and generate candidate legal issues, annotated by senior legal experts, which reveals a critical limitation: while LLMs generate diverse issue candidates, their precision remains inadequate (GPT-4o achieves only 62%). To address this gap, we propose LePREC (Legal Professional-inspired Reasoning Elicitation and Classification), a neuro-symbolic framework combining neural generation with structured statistical reasoning. LePREC consists of: (1) a neuro component leverages LLMs to transform legal descriptions into question-answer pairs representing diverse analytical factors, and (2) a symbolic component applies sparse linear models over these discrete features, learning explicit algebraic weights that identify the most informative reasoning factors. Unlike end-to-end neural approaches, LePREC achieves interpretability through transparent feature weighting while maintaining data efficiency through correlation-based statistical classification. Experiments show a 30-40% improvement over advanced LLM baselines, including GPT-4o and Claude, confirming that correlation-based factor-issue analysis offers a more data-efficient solution for relevance decisions.

</details>


### [213] [Rethinking Scale: Deployment Trade-offs of Small Language Models under Agent Paradigms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19299)
*Xinlin Wang,Mats Brorsson*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该研究首次大规模全面评估<10B参数的小语言模型在三种范式下的表现：基础模型、配备工具的单智能体、以及具备协作能力的多智能体系统，发现单智能体系统在性能与成本间达到最佳平衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管大语言模型能力强大，但其高昂的计算成本、延迟和隐私风险限制了实际应用。小语言模型（<10B参数）是有前景的替代方案，但其知识和推理能力有限。现有研究主要关注通过扩展定律或微调策略增强小模型，忽视了使用智能体范式（如工具使用和多智能体协作）来系统补偿小模型固有弱点的潜力。

Method: 对<10B参数的开源小语言模型进行首次大规模全面研究，评估三种范式：1）基础模型；2）配备工具的单智能体系统；3）具备协作能力的多智能体系统。通过系统实验比较不同范式在性能、成本和效率方面的表现。

Result: 研究发现单智能体系统在性能与成本之间达到最佳平衡，而多智能体设置增加了开销但收益有限。智能体中心设计在资源受限环境中对于高效和可信部署至关重要。

Conclusion: 智能体范式（特别是单智能体配备工具）能够有效补偿小语言模型的固有弱点，在资源受限环境中实现高效可信部署。研究强调了智能体中心设计的重要性，为小模型的实际应用提供了新方向。

Abstract: Despite the impressive capabilities of large language models, their substantial computational costs, latency, and privacy risks hinder their widespread deployment in real-world applications. Small Language Models (SLMs) with fewer than 10 billion parameters present a promising alternative; however, their inherent limitations in knowledge and reasoning curtail their effectiveness. Existing research primarily focuses on enhancing SLMs through scaling laws or fine-tuning strategies while overlooking the potential of using agent paradigms, such as tool use and multi-agent collaboration, to systematically compensate for the inherent weaknesses of small models. To address this gap, this paper presents the first large-scale, comprehensive study of <10B open-source models under three paradigms: (1) the base model, (2) a single agent equipped with tools, and (3) a multi-agent system with collaborative capabilities. Our results show that single-agent systems achieve the best balance between performance and cost, while multi-agent setups add overhead with limited gains. Our findings highlight the importance of agent-centric design for efficient and trustworthy deployment in resource-constrained settings.

</details>


### [214] [IndiaFinBench: An Evaluation Benchmark for Large Language Model Performance on Indian Financial Regulatory Text](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19298)
*Rajveer Singh Pall*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 印度首个公开可用的金融监管文本评估基准，包含406个专家标注的问答对，涵盖四种任务类型，评估12个LLM模型在印度金融监管文本上的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有金融NLP基准主要基于西方金融语料（SEC文件、美国财报等），缺乏对非西方监管框架的覆盖，特别是印度金融监管体系。需要专门评估LLM在印度金融监管文本上的表现。

Method: 构建印度FinBench基准：从SEBI和RBI获取192份文档，创建406个专家标注的问答对，涵盖监管解释、数值推理、矛盾检测和时序推理四种任务类型。通过模型二次验证和人工标注一致性评估确保标注质量。在零样本条件下评估12个LLM模型。

Result: 模型准确率在70.4%（Gemma 4 E4B）到89.7%（Gemini 2.5 Flash）之间，均显著优于非专业人类基线（60.0%）。数值推理任务最具区分度（35.9个百分点差异）。通过Bootstrap显著性检验识别出三个统计上不同的性能层级。

Conclusion: 印度FinBench填补了非西方金融监管评估的空白，为评估LLM在印度金融监管文本上的能力提供了标准化基准。模型在印度金融监管任务上表现良好，但仍有改进空间，特别是数值推理任务。

Abstract: We introduce IndiaFinBench, to our knowledge the first publicly available evaluation benchmark for assessing large language model (LLM) performance on Indian financial regulatory text. Existing financial NLP benchmarks draw exclusively from Western financial corpora (SEC filings, US earnings reports, and English-language financial news), leaving a significant gap in coverage of non-Western regulatory frameworks. IndiaFinBench addresses this gap with 406 expert-annotated question-answer pairs drawn from 192 documents sourced from the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) and the Reserve Bank of India (RBI), spanning four task types: regulatory interpretation (174 items), numerical reasoning (92 items), contradiction detection (62 items), and temporal reasoning (78 items). Annotation quality is validated through a model-based secondary pass (kappa=0.918 on contradiction detection) and a 60-item human inter-annotator agreement evaluation (kappa=0.611; 76.7% overall agreement). We evaluate twelve models under zero-shot conditions, with accuracy ranging from 70.4% (Gemma 4 E4B) to 89.7% (Gemini 2.5 Flash). All models substantially outperform a non-specialist human baseline of 60.0%. Numerical reasoning is the most discriminative task, with a 35.9 percentage-point spread across models. Bootstrap significance testing (10,000 resamples) reveals three statistically distinct performance tiers. The dataset, evaluation code, and all model outputs are available at https://github.com/rajveerpall/IndiaFinBench

</details>


### [215] [Location Not Found: Exposing Implicit Local and Global Biases in Multilingual LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19292)
*Guy Mor-Lan,Omer Goldman,Matan Eyal,Adi Mayrav Gilady,Sivan Eiger,Idan Szpektor,Avinatan Hassidim,Yossi Matias,Reut Tsarfaty*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: LocQA是一个包含12种语言、2,156个问题的测试集，用于评估多语言大语言模型在回答地区模糊问题时的跨语言和语言内偏见，发现模型存在向美国地区倾斜的全球偏见，且指令微调会加剧这种偏见。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着多语言大语言模型缩小了语言间的流畅性差距，模型面临偏见行为的风险，因为知识和规范可能跨语言传播。本研究旨在通过模型回答地区模糊问题的能力来量化模型的跨语言和语言内偏见。

Method: 提出了LocQA测试集，包含12种语言、2,156个问题，涉及法律、日期、度量衡等地区依赖的事实。问题本身不包含地区指示，仅通过查询语言本身隐含地区信息。使用LocQA评估了32个模型，分析其对地区模糊问题的回答以揭示模型的隐含先验。

Result: 发现了两种结构性偏见：1) 跨语言层面，模型存在向美国地区倾斜的全球偏见，即使使用非英语语言提问；2) 指令微调模型比其基础版本表现出更强的全球偏见；3) 语言内层面，当同一语言对应多个地区时，模型作为人口概率引擎，优先考虑人口较多的地区。

Conclusion: LocQA的见解有助于塑造大语言模型的期望本地行为，并量化不同训练阶段对各种偏见的影响。该工具为评估和缓解多语言模型中的结构性偏见提供了重要方法。

Abstract: Multilingual large language models (LLMs) have minimized the fluency gap between languages. This advancement, however, exposes models to the risk of biased behavior, as knowledge and norms may propagate across languages. In this work, we aim to quantify models' inter- and intra-lingual biases, via their ability to answer locale-ambiguous questions. To this end, we present LocQA, a test set containing 2,156 questions in 12 languages, referring to various locale-dependent facts such as laws, dates, and measurements. The questions do not contain indications of the locales they relate to, other than the querying language itself. LLMs' responses to LocQA locale-ambiguous questions thus reveal models' implicit priors. We used LocQA to evaluate 32 models, and detected two types of structural biases. Inter-lingually, we show a global bias towards answers relevant to the US-locale, even when models are asked in languages other than English. Moreover, we discovered that this global bias is exacerbated in models that underwent instruction tuning, compared to their base counterparts. Intra-lingually, we show that when multiple locales are relevant for the same language, models act as demographic probability engines, prioritizing locales with larger populations. Taken together, insights from LocQA may help in shaping LLMs' desired local behavior, and in quantifying the impact of various training phases on different kinds of biases.

</details>


### [216] [CulturALL: Benchmarking Multilingual and Multicultural Competence of LLMs on Grounded Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19262)
*Peiqin Lin,Chenyang Lyu,Wenjiang Luo,Haotian Ye,Md Mehrab Hossain,Chunlan Ma,Shaoxiong Ji,Younes Samih,Bo Zeng,Fan Jiang,Yuanbin Cao,Dilda Duisenbek,Adrian Neo Sau Xun,Daria Pozdniakova,Liubou Misevich,Nevena Marinković,Ngoc Gia Linh Nguyen,Thi Khanh Linh Do,Sarakmatak Sophy,Baotian Hu,Guanhua Chen,Gongbo Tang,Alham Fikri Aji,Longyue Wang,Weihua Luo*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: CulturALL是一个评估大语言模型多语言和多文化能力的基准测试，专注于真实世界场景中的推理任务，包含14种语言的2610个样本，覆盖51个地区和16个主题，当前最佳模型准确率仅为44.48%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准测试主要关注通用语言理解或浅层文化知识，缺乏对真实世界情境中推理任务的评估，需要开发一个更全面的基准来填补这一空白。

Method: 采用人机协作框架构建：专家标注者确保难度和事实准确性，大语言模型减轻人工工作量；整合多样来源确保场景覆盖全面；精心设计高难度项目。

Result: CulturALL包含14种语言、51个地区、16个主题的2610个样本；实验显示当前最佳大语言模型在基准上的准确率仅为44.48%，表明仍有很大改进空间。

Conclusion: CulturALL是一个具有挑战性的多语言多文化能力基准测试，揭示了当前大语言模型在真实世界场景推理任务上的局限性，为未来模型改进提供了重要参考。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are now deployed worldwide, inspiring a surge of benchmarks that measure their multilingual and multicultural abilities. However, these benchmarks prioritize generic language understanding or superficial cultural trivia, leaving the evaluation of grounded tasks -- where models must reason within real-world, context-rich scenarios -- largely unaddressed. To fill this gap, we present CulturALL, a comprehensive and challenging benchmark to assess LLMs' multilingual and multicultural competence on grounded tasks. CulturALL is built via a human--AI collaborative framework: expert annotators ensure appropriate difficulty and factual accuracy, while LLMs lighten the manual workload. By incorporating diverse sources, CulturALL ensures comprehensive scenario coverage. Each item is carefully designed to present a high level of difficulty, making CulturALL challenging. CulturALL contains 2,610 samples in 14 languages from 51 regions, distributed across 16 topics to capture the full breadth of grounded tasks. Experiments show that the best LLM achieves 44.48% accuracy on CulturALL, underscoring substantial room for improvement.

</details>


### [217] [SAHM: A Benchmark for Arabic Financial and Shari'ah-Compliant Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19098)
*Rania Elbadry,Sarfraz Ahmad,Ahmed Heakl,Dani Bouch,Momina Ahsan,Muhra AlMahri,Marwa Elsaid khalil,Yuxia Wang,Salem Lahlou,Sophia Ananiadou,Veselin Stoyanov,Jimin Huang,Xueqing Peng,Preslav Nakov,Zhuohan Xie*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: SAHM是一个面向阿拉伯语金融NLP和伊斯兰教法合规推理的文档基准与指令调优数据集，包含14,380个专家验证实例，涵盖7个任务，评估发现阿拉伯语流利度不能可靠转化为基于证据的金融推理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 英语金融NLP通过情感分析、文档理解和问答基准发展迅速，而阿拉伯语金融NLP相对未被充分探索，尽管对可信金融和伊斯兰金融助手有强烈实际需求。需要填补阿拉伯语金融NLP基准的空白。

Method: 引入SAHM基准和指令调优数据集，包含14,380个专家验证实例，涵盖7个任务：AAOIFI标准问答、教法裁决问答/多选题、会计和商业考试、金融情感分析、抽取式摘要和事件-原因推理。从真实监管、法理和企业来源精心整理。评估19个开源和专有LLM，使用任务特定指标和基于量规的开放式输出评分。

Result: 阿拉伯语流利度不能可靠转化为基于证据的金融推理：模型在识别式任务上明显强于生成和因果推理任务，在事件-原因推理上差距最大。发布了基准、评估框架和指令调优模型以支持未来研究。

Conclusion: SAHM填补了阿拉伯语金融NLP基准的空白，揭示了当前LLM在阿拉伯语金融推理方面的局限性，特别是生成和因果推理能力不足，为开发可信的阿拉伯语金融助手提供了重要资源。

Abstract: English financial NLP has progressed rapidly through benchmarks for sentiment, document understanding, and financial question answering, while Arabic financial NLP remains comparatively under-explored despite strong practical demand for trustworthy finance and Islamic-finance assistants. We introduce SAHM, a document-grounded benchmark and instruction-tuning dataset for Arabic financial NLP and Shari'ah-compliant reasoning. SAHM contains 14,380 expert-verified instances spanning seven tasks: AAOIFI standards QA, fatwa-based QA/MCQ, accounting and business exams, financial sentiment analysis, extractive summarization, and event-cause reasoning, curated from authentic regulatory, juristic, and corporate sources. We evaluate 19 strong open and proprietary LLMs using task-specific metrics and rubric-based scoring for open-ended outputs, and find that Arabic fluency does not reliably translate to evidence-grounded financial reasoning: models are substantially stronger on recognition-style tasks than on generation and causal reasoning, with the largest gaps on event-cause reasoning. We release the benchmark, evaluation framework, and an instruction-tuned model to support future research on trustworthy Arabic financial NLP.

</details>


### [218] [SCURank: Ranking Multiple Candidate Summaries with Summary Content Units for Enhanced Summarization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19185)
*Bo-Jyun Wang,Ying-Jia Lin,Hung-Yu Kao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: SCURank是一个基于摘要内容单元(SCUs)的摘要排名框架，通过评估信息内容的丰富性和语义重要性来改进多LLM蒸馏中的摘要选择，优于传统指标和基于LLM的排名方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM-based排名策略存在不稳定性，而传统指标(如ROUGE)无法有效排名高质量摘要。需要一种更稳定、基于信息内容的方法来改进多LLM蒸馏中的摘要选择。

Method: 提出SCURank框架，利用摘要内容单元(SCUs)评估摘要的信息丰富性和语义重要性，而非依赖不稳定的比较或表面重叠。该方法用于从多个多样化LLM中蒸馏摘要。

Result: 实验结果表明，SCURank在多个评估指标和数据集上优于传统指标和基于LLM的排名方法。同时，整合多样化LLM摘要能增强模型抽象性和整体蒸馏模型性能。

Conclusion: SCURank验证了信息中心排名在多LLM蒸馏中的优势，为小语言模型通过蒸馏获得与大型语言模型相当的摘要性能提供了更稳定有效的排名方法。

Abstract: Small language models (SLMs), such as BART, can achieve summarization performance comparable to large language models (LLMs) via distillation. However, existing LLM-based ranking strategies for summary candidates suffer from instability, while classical metrics (e.g., ROUGE) are insufficient to rank high-quality summaries. To address these issues, we introduce \textbf{SCURank}, a framework that enhances summarization by leveraging \textbf{Summary Content Units (SCUs)}. Instead of relying on unstable comparisons or surface-level overlap, SCURank evaluates summaries based on the richness and semantic importance of information content. We investigate the effectiveness of SCURank in distilling summaries from multiple diverse LLMs. Experimental results demonstrate that SCURank outperforms traditional metrics and LLM-based ranking methods across evaluation measures and datasets. Furthermore, our findings show that incorporating diverse LLM summaries enhances model abstractiveness and overall distilled model performance, validating the benefits of information-centric ranking in multi-LLM distillation. The code for SCURank is available at https://github.com/IKMLab/SCURank.

</details>


### [219] [Seeing Isn't Believing: Mitigating Belief Inertia via Active Intervention in Embodied Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17252)
*Hanlin Wang,Chak Tou Leong,Jian Wang,Wenjie Li*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 论文提出EVU机制解决LLM智能体在具身任务中的信念惯性问题，通过估计-验证-更新流程主动管理信念，显著提升任务成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前大型语言模型智能体在复杂具身任务中常做出次优决策和无效行动，主要原因是它们忽略了与内部信念不符的关键环境反馈，表现为信念惯性现象。

Method: 提出Estimate-Verify-Update (EVU)机制：1) 预测预期结果；2) 通过显式推理验证观察结果；3) 基于验证证据主动更新先验信念。该机制生成文本信念状态，可集成到基于提示和基于训练的智能体推理方法中。

Result: 在三个具身基准测试上的广泛实验表明，EVU持续带来任务成功率的显著提升。进一步分析验证了该方法有效缓解了信念惯性问题。

Conclusion: EVU机制通过主动信念干预有效解决了LLM智能体的信念惯性问题，推动了更鲁棒具身智能体的发展。该方法可作为统一的干预机制应用于不同推理方法。

Abstract: Recent advancements in large language models (LLMs) have enabled agents to tackle complex embodied tasks through environmental interaction. However, these agents still make suboptimal decisions and perform ineffective actions, as they often overlook critical environmental feedback that differs from their internal beliefs. Through a formal probing analysis, we characterize this as belief inertia, a phenomenon where agents stubbornly adhere to prior beliefs despite explicit observations. To address this, we advocate active belief intervention, moving from passive understanding to active management. We introduce the Estimate-Verify-Update (EVU) mechanism, which empowers agents to predict expected outcomes, verify them against observations through explicit reasoning, and actively update prior beliefs based on the verification evidence.
