EVU is designed as a unified intervention mechanism that generates textual belief states explicitly, and can be integrated into both prompting-based and training-based agent reasoning methods. Extensive experiments across three embodied benchmarks demonstrate that EVU consistently yields substantial gains in task success rates. Further analyses validate that our approach effectively mitigates belief inertia, advancing the development of more robust embodied agents. Our code is available at https://github.com/WangHanLinHenry/EVU.

</details>


### [220] [How Do Answer Tokens Read Reasoning Traces? Self-Reading Patterns in Thinking LLMs for Quantitative Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19149)
*Haoyang Chen,Yi Liu,Jianzhi Shao,Tao Zhang,Chengfu Huo,Wei Hu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出基于自我阅读质量(SRQ)的无训练激活引导方法，通过分析答案对推理过程的注意力模式来提升定量推理的可靠性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有激活引导工作主要关注塑造推理轨迹，但对答案标记如何实际读取和整合推理信息以产生可靠结果的理解不足。需要深入分析答案到推理的注意力机制，揭示模型内部确定性的形成过程。

Method: 分析答案对推理的注意力模式，发现正确解决方案呈现良性的自我阅读模式（向前漂移的阅读焦点和持续关注关键语义锚点）。基于此提出SRQ评分方法，结合几何度量的过程控制和语义度量的内容监控，构建引导向量引导推理向良性自我阅读模式发展。

Result: 实验表明该方法能带来一致的准确性提升。正确解决方案展现出对齐的注意力模式，而错误解决方案则呈现分散和不规则的注意力模式。

Conclusion: 答案解码过程中的内部确定性表现为模型对可行解决方案分支的承诺和关键证据的整合。基于自我阅读质量的激活引导方法能有效提升模型推理的可靠性，无需额外训练。

Abstract: Thinking LLMs produce reasoning traces before answering. Prior activation steering work mainly targets on shaping these traces. It remains less understood how answer tokens actually read and integrate the reasoning to produce reliable outcomes. Focusing on quantitative reasoning, we analyze the answer-to-reasoning attention and observe a benign self-reading pattern aligned with correctness, characterized by a forward drift of the reading focus along the reasoning trace and a persistent concentration on key semantic anchors, whereas incorrect solutions exhibit diffuse and irregular attention pattern. We interpret this as internal certainty during answer decoding, where the model commits to a viable solution branch and integrates key evidence. Following this, we propose a training-free steering method driven by Self-Reading Quality (SRQ) scores combining geometric metrics for process control with semantic metrics for content monitoring. SRQ selects data to build steering vectors that guide inference toward benign self-reading and away from uncertain and disorganized reading. Experiments show that our method yields consistent accuracy gains.

</details>


### [221] [The Rise of Verbal Tics in Large Language Models: A Systematic Analysis Across Frontier Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19139)
*Shuai Wu,Xue Li,Yanna Feng,Yufang Li,Zhijun Wang,Ran Wang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文系统分析了8个先进大语言模型中的"语言口头禅"现象，发现这些重复性、公式化的语言模式在模型输出中普遍存在，与谄媚程度呈正相关，与自然度呈负相关。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着大语言模型通过RLHF和宪法AI等对齐技术不断发展，一个日益显著的现象是"语言口头禅"的泛滥——这些重复性、公式化的语言模式充斥在模型输出中，从谄媚的开场白到伪共情的肯定语和过度使用的词汇。这种现象反映了当前训练范式的"对齐税"，凸显了对更真实人机交互框架的迫切需求。

Method: 研究采用定制评估框架，对8个最先进的LLM（GPT-5.4、Claude Opus 4.7、Gemini 3.1 Pro、Grok 4.2、Doubao-Seed-2.0-pro、Kimi K2.5、DeepSeek V3.2和MiMo-V2-Pro）进行标准化API评估。在英语和中文环境下，评估了10个任务类别的10,000个提示，产生了160,000个模型响应。引入了口头禅指数（VTI）这一复合指标来量化口头禅的普遍性，并分析了其与谄媚程度、词汇多样性和人类感知自然度的相关性。还进行了人类评估（N=120）。

Result: 研究发现显著的模型间差异：Gemini 3.1 Pro表现出最高的VTI（0.590），而DeepSeek V3.2达到最低（0.295）。口头禅在多轮对话中累积，在主观任务中被放大，并显示出明显的跨语言模式。人类评估证实了谄媚程度与感知自然度之间的强负相关关系（r = -0.87, p < 0.001）。

Conclusion: 当前对齐训练范式导致了显著的"语言口头禅"现象，这代表了"对齐税"的代价。研究结果强调了开发更真实、自然的人机交互框架的紧迫性，以减少公式化语言模式并提高对话的自然度。

Abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) continue to evolve through alignment techniques such as Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) and Constitutional AI, a growing and increasingly conspicuous phenomenon has emerged: the proliferation of verbal tics -- repetitive, formulaic linguistic patterns that pervade model outputs. These range from sycophantic openers ("That's a great question!", "Awesome!") to pseudo-empathetic affirmations ("I completely understand your concern", "I'm right here to catch you") and overused vocabulary ("delve", "tapestry", "nuanced"). In this paper, we present a systematic analysis of the verbal tic phenomenon across eight state-of-the-art LLMs: GPT-5.4, Claude Opus 4.7, Gemini 3.1 Pro, Grok 4.2, Doubao-Seed-2.0-pro, Kimi K2.5, DeepSeek V3.2, and MiMo-V2-Pro. Utilizing a custom evaluation framework for standardized API-based evaluation, we assess 10,000 prompts across 10 task categories in both English and Chinese, yielding 160,000 model responses. We introduce the Verbal Tic Index (VTI), a composite metric quantifying tic prevalence, and analyze its correlation with sycophancy, lexical diversity, and human-perceived naturalness. Our findings reveal significant inter-model variation: Gemini 3.1 Pro exhibits the highest VTI (0.590), while DeepSeek V3.2 achieves the lowest (0.295). We further demonstrate that verbal tics accumulate over multi-turn conversations, are amplified in subjective tasks, and show distinct cross-lingual patterns. Human evaluation (N = 120) confirms a strong inverse relationship between sycophancy and perceived naturalness (r = -0.87, p < 0.001). These results underscore the "alignment tax" of current training paradigms and highlight the urgent need for more authentic human-AI interaction frameworks.

</details>


### [222] [$R^2$-dLLM: Accelerating Diffusion Large Language Models via Spatio-Temporal Redundancy Reduction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18995)
*Zhenbang Du,Kejing Xia,Xinrui Zhong,Yonggan Fu,Nicolai Oswald,Binfei Ji,Brucek Khailany,Pavlo Molchanov,Yingyan Lin*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: R²-dLLM通过减少扩散大语言模型解码过程中的空间和时间冗余，显著降低推理延迟，在保持生成质量的同时将解码步骤减少高达75%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散大语言模型(dLLMs)作为自回归生成的替代方案具有并行预测优势，但实际解码仍存在高推理延迟问题。研究发现解码过程中的空间冗余（置信度聚类和位置模糊）和时间冗余（重复重掩码已稳定的预测）是效率低下的主要原因。

Method: 提出R²-dLLM统一框架，从推理和训练两个角度减少冗余：1) 推理时引入无训练解码规则，聚合局部置信度和token预测，最终化时间稳定的token以避免冗余解码步骤；2) 提出冗余感知的监督微调管道，使模型与高效解码轨迹对齐，减少对人工调整阈值的依赖。

Result: 实验表明，R²-dLLM相比现有解码策略将解码步骤减少高达75%，同时在不同模型和任务上保持竞争力的生成质量。验证了解码冗余是dLLMs的主要瓶颈，显式减少冗余能带来显著的实践效率提升。

Conclusion: 解码冗余是扩散大语言模型效率低下的核心问题，R²-dLLM通过系统性地减少空间和时间冗余，在保持生成质量的同时显著提升解码效率，为dLLMs的实际部署提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Diffusion Large Language Models (dLLMs) have emerged as a promising alternative to autoregressive generation by enabling parallel token prediction. However, practical dLLM decoding still suffers from high inference latency, which limits deployment. In this work, we observe that a substantial part of this inefficiency comes from recurring redundancy in the decoding process, including spatial redundancy caused by confidence clusters and positional ambiguity, and temporal redundancy caused by repeatedly remasking predictions that have already stabilized. Motivated by these patterns, we propose $R^2$-dLLM, a unified framework for reducing decoding redundancy from both inference and training perspectives. At inference time, we introduce training-free decoding rules that aggregate local confidence and token predictions, and finalize temporally stable tokens to avoid redundant decoding steps. We further propose a redundancy-aware supervised fine-tuning pipeline that aligns the model with efficient decoding trajectories and reduces reliance on manually tuned thresholds. Experiments demonstrate that $R^2$-dLLM consistently reduces the number of decoding steps by up to 75% compared to existing decoding strategies, while maintaining competitive generation quality across different models and tasks. These results validate that decoding redundancy is a central bottleneck in dLLMs, and that explicitly reducing it yields substantial practical efficiency gains.

</details>


### [223] [MORPHOGEN: A Multilingual Benchmark for Evaluating Gender-Aware Morphological Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18914)
*Mehul Agarwal,Aditya Aggarwal,Arnav Goel,Medha Hira,Anubha Gupta*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: MORPHOGEN是一个用于评估多语言大语言模型在语法性别和形态一致性方面能力的基准数据集，涵盖法语、阿拉伯语和印地语三种语言，核心任务GENFORM要求模型将第一人称句子改写为相反性别。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然多语言大语言模型在翻译和问答等高层次任务上表现良好，但它们在处理语法性别和形态一致性方面的能力仍未得到充分探索。在形态丰富的语言中，性别影响动词变位、代词甚至包含显性和隐性性别提及的第一人称结构。

Method: 引入MORPHOGEN基准数据集，包含三种类型多样的语法性别语言（法语、阿拉伯语、印地语）。核心任务GENFORM要求模型将第一人称句子改写为相反性别，同时保持意义和结构。构建了高质量合成数据集，并对15个流行的多语言LLM（2B-70B参数规模）进行基准测试。

Result: 测试结果揭示了当前模型在处理形态性别方面存在显著差距和有趣见解。模型在性别感知语言生成任务上表现出不同程度的性能差异。

Conclusion: MORPHOGEN为性别感知语言建模提供了聚焦的诊断视角，为未来研究包容性和形态敏感的NLP奠定了基础。

Abstract: While multilingual large language models (LLMs) perform well on high-level tasks like translation and question answering, their ability to handle grammatical gender and morphological agreement remains underexplored. In morphologically rich languages, gender influences verb conjugation, pronouns, and even first-person constructions with explicit and implicit mentions of gender. We introduce MORPHOGEN, a morphologically grounded large-scale benchmark dataset for evaluating gender-aware generation in three typologically diverse grammatically gendered languages: French, Arabic, and Hindi. The core task, GENFORM, requires models to rewrite a first-person sentence in the opposite gender while preserving its meaning and structure. We construct a high-quality synthetic dataset spanning these three languages and benchmark 15 popular multilingual LLMs (2B-70B) on their ability to perform this transformation. Our results reveal significant gaps and interesting insights into how current models handle morphological gender. MORPHOGEN provides a focused diagnostic lens for gender-aware language modeling and lays the groundwork for future research on inclusive and morphology-sensitive NLP.

</details>


### [224] [Product-of-Experts Training Reduces Dataset Artifacts in Natural Language Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19069)
*Aby Mammen Mathew*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 论文提出Product-of-Experts训练方法减少NLI模型对数据集伪相关的依赖，在保持准确率的同时降低偏差依赖4.71%


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有NLI模型过度依赖数据集伪相关而非真正推理，仅基于假设的模型在SNLI上达到57.7%准确率，表明存在强伪相关，38.6%的基线错误源于这些伪相关

Method: 提出Product-of-Experts训练方法，对偏置模型过度自信的样本进行降权处理，通过λ=1.5的超参数平衡去偏和准确率

Result: PoE方法几乎保持准确率（89.10% vs 89.30%），同时将偏差依赖降低4.71%（偏差一致性从49.85%降至45%），消融实验确定λ=1.5为最佳平衡点

Conclusion: PoE能有效减少NLI模型对数据集伪相关的依赖，但行为测试仍揭示模型在否定和数值推理方面存在问题

Abstract: Neural NLI models overfit dataset artifacts instead of truly reasoning. A hypothesis-only model gets 57.7% in SNLI, showing strong spurious correlations, and 38.6% of the baseline errors are the result of these artifacts. We propose Product-of-Experts (PoE) training, which downweights examples where biased models are overconfident. PoE nearly preserves accuracy (89.10% vs. 89.30%) while cutting bias reliance by 4.71% (bias agreement 49.85% to 45%). An ablation finds lambda = 1.5 that best balances debiasing and accuracy. Behavioral tests still reveal issues with negation and numerical reasoning.

</details>


### [225] [SAMoRA: Semantic-Aware Mixture of LoRA Experts for Task-Adaptive Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19048)
*Boyan Shi,Wei Chen,Shuyuan Zhao,Junfeng Shen,Shengnan Guo,Shaojiang Wang,Huaiyu Wan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: SAMoRA是一种新颖的参数高效微调框架，通过语义感知路由和任务自适应缩放机制，解决了MoE-LoRA方法中路由不精确和权重融合策略单一的问题，显著提升了多任务学习性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MoE-LoRA方法存在两个主要挑战：1) 当前MoE-LoRA方法中的不精确路由无法明确匹配输入语义与专家能力，导致专家专业化程度弱；2) 统一的权重融合策略难以提供自适应更新强度，忽略了不同任务的复杂性差异。

Method: 提出SAMoRA框架：1) 语义感知路由器，显式对齐文本语义与最合适的专家以实现精确路由；2) 任务自适应缩放机制，根据具体任务需求动态调节专家贡献；3) 新颖的正则化目标，联合促进专家专业化和有效缩放。

Result: 在多个多任务基准测试上的广泛实验表明，SAMoRA显著优于最先进的方法，并具有优秀的任务泛化能力。

Conclusion: SAMoRA通过语义感知路由和任务自适应缩放机制，有效解决了MoE-LoRA框架中的关键限制，为多任务学习提供了高效且自适应的参数高效微调解决方案。

Abstract: The combination of Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) and Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) has shown significant potential for enhancing the multi-task learning capabilities of Large Language Models. However, existing methods face two primary challenges: (1)Imprecise Routing in the current MoE-LoRA method fails to explicitly match input semantics with expert capabilities, leading to weak expert specialization. (2)Uniform weight fusion strategies struggle to provide adaptive update strengths, overlooking the varying complexity of different tasks. To address these limitations, we propose SAMoRA (Semantic-Aware Mixture of LoRA Experts), a novel parameter-efficient fine-tuning framework tailored for task-adaptive learning. Specifically, A Semantic-Aware Router is proposed to explicitly align textual semantics with the most suitable experts for precise routing. A Task-Adaptive Scaling mechanism is designed to regulate expert contributions based on specific task requirements dynamically. In addition, a novel regularization objective is proposed to jointly promote expert specialization and effective scaling. Extensive experiments on multiple multi-task benchmarks demonstrate that SAMoRA significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art methods and holds excellent task generalization capabilities. Code is available at https://github.com/boyan-code/SAMoRA

</details>


### [226] [Less Is More: Cognitive Load and the Single-Prompt Ceiling in LLM Mathematical Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18897)
*Manuel Israel Cazares*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 对SAIR等式理论竞赛中形式数学推理提示工程的系统实证研究，发现单提示存在性能上限，最佳提示在hard3测试集上达到79.25%准确率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究在SAIR等式理论竞赛背景下，通过提示工程提升语言模型在形式数学推理任务上的性能，探索提示设计的极限和影响因素

Method: 在5周内设计、测试和分析40多个提示变体（0-4,878字节），在4个评估划分和3个语言模型（gpt-oss-120b、Llama 3.3 70B、Gemma 4 31B）上进行系统实验

Result: 发现单提示性能上限：gpt-oss-120b在60-79%准确率区间达到饱和；最佳提示AN45c（2,252字节）在hard3测试集上达到79.25%准确率，比无提示基线提升19.5个百分点

Conclusion: 形式数学推理的提示工程存在固有上限，受数学不可判定性、复杂规则系统对弱模型的影响以及提示顺序与注意力机制的脆弱交互等因素限制

Abstract: We present a systematic empirical study of prompt engineering for formal mathematical reasoning in the context of the SAIR Equational Theories Stage 1 competition. The task requires deciding whether one equational law implies another over all magmas -- a problem that is undecidable in general but decidable for FALSE via finite model search. Over five weeks, we designed, tested, and analyzed more than 40 prompt variants, ranging from 0 to 4,878 bytes, across four evaluation splits and three language models (gpt-oss-120b, Llama 3.3 70B, Gemma 4 31B).
  Our central finding is a single-prompt ceiling: despite substantial engineering effort, balanced hard accuracy plateaus in an empirical saturation region of approximately 60--79% for gpt-oss-120b, compared to a 59.75% no-cheatsheet baseline. We identify three mechanisms underlying this ceiling: (1) the mathematical undecidability of the TRUE case limits what any finite prompt can encode; (2) complex rule systems decrease performance on weaker models (Llama 3.3 70B collapses to 0% TRUE recall with prompts exceeding 2KB); and (3) prompt ordering effects interact with model attention in fragile, non-monotonic ways.
  Our best submission (AN45c, 2,252 bytes) achieves 79.25% accuracy on hard3 (n=400; 95% CI: [75.0%, 82.9%]), with TRUE recall of 95.9% and FALSE recall of 63.4%, representing a +19.5 percentage-point improvement over the no-cheatsheet baseline (59.75%). We release all prompt variants, evaluation scripts, and results at https://github.com/israelcazares/sair-prompt-engineering

</details>


### [227] [RARE: Redundancy-Aware Retrieval Evaluation Framework for High-Similarity Corpora](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19047)
*Hanjun Cho,Jay-Yoon Lee*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: RARE框架通过分解文档为原子事实来追踪冗余信息，结合CRRF改进LLM数据生成，创建了能真实反映现实世界文档冗余性的RAG评估基准RedQA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有QA基准假设文档间重叠最小，但现实RAG系统处理金融报告、法律代码、专利等高度冗余且相似性强的文档，导致评估失效：检索器可能因冗余未被考虑而被低估，而标准基准表现好的检索器在真实冗余文档上泛化能力差。

Method: 提出RARE框架：1) 将文档分解为原子事实以实现精确冗余追踪；2) 使用CRRF（分别评分标准并按排名融合决策）增强LLM数据生成，提高生成数据的可靠性。应用RARE到金融、法律、专利领域创建RedQA基准。

Result: 在RedQA基准上，强检索器基线在4跳General-Wiki上PerfRecall@10为66.4%，但在4跳深度的金融、法律、专利领域降至5.0-27.9%，揭示了当前基准未能捕捉的鲁棒性差距。

Conclusion: RARE使从业者能够构建忠实反映现实部署条件的领域特定RAG评估，解决了现有基准与真实世界文档冗余性不匹配的问题。

Abstract: Existing QA benchmarks typically assume distinct documents with minimal overlap, yet real-world retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems operate on corpora such as financial reports, legal codes, and patents, where information is highly redundant and documents exhibit strong inter-document similarity. This mismatch undermines evaluation validity: retrievers can be unfairly undervalued even when they retrieve documents that provide sufficient evidence, because redundancy across documents is not accounted for in evaluation. On the other hand, retrievers that perform well on standard benchmarks often generalize poorly to real-world corpora with highly similar and redundant documents. We present RARE (Redundancy-Aware Retrieval Evaluation), a framework for constructing realistic benchmarks by (i) decomposing documents into atomic facts to enable precise redundancy tracking and (ii) enhancing LLM-based data generation with CRRF. RAG benchmark data usually requires multiple quality criteria, but LLMs often yield trivial outputs. CRRF scores criteria separately and fuses decisions by rank, improving the reliability of generated data. Applying RARE to Finance, Legal, and Patent corpora, we introduce RedQA, where a strong retriever baseline drops from 66.4% PerfRecall@10 on 4-hop General-Wiki to 5.0-27.9% PerfRecall@10 at 4-hop depth, revealing robustness gaps that current benchmarks fail to capture. RARE enables practitioners to build domain-specific RAG evaluations that faithfully reflect real-world deployment conditions.

</details>


### [228] [Semantic Needles in Document Haystacks: Sensitivity Testing of LLM-as-a-Judge Similarity Scoring](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18835)
*Sinan G. Aksoy,Alexandra A. Sabrio,Erik VonKaenel,Lee Burke*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出一个可扩展的多因素实验框架，系统探测LLM对成对文档比较中细微语义变化的敏感性，发现LLM语义相似度评分受文档结构、上下文连贯性和模型身份影响


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究LLM在成对文档比较中对细微语义变化的敏感性，理解评分行为如何受文档结构、上下文和模型特性的影响，为模型审计和比较提供工具

Method: 采用可扩展的多因素实验框架，将问题类比为"大海捞针"：在文档中嵌入单个语义改变的句子（针），系统变化扰动类型（否定、连接词交换、命名实体替换）、上下文类型（原始vs主题无关）、针位置和文档长度，测试五个LLM在数万对文档上的表现

Result: 1. LLM表现出文档内位置偏差：多数模型对文档前部出现的语义差异惩罚更严厉；2. 主题无关上下文会降低相似度评分并导致双极化评分；3. 每个LLM产生独特的评分分布"指纹"，但对不同扰动类型的宽容度存在普遍层级关系

Conclusion: LLM语义相似度评分对文档结构、上下文连贯性和模型身份敏感，超出语义变化本身的影响，所提框架为审计和比较当前及未来模型的评分行为提供了实用的模型无关工具包

Abstract: We propose a scalable, multifactorial experimental framework that systematically probes LLM sensitivity to subtle semantic changes in pairwise document comparison. We analogize this as a needle-in-a-haystack problem: a single semantically altered sentence (the needle) is embedded within surrounding context (the hay), and we vary the perturbation type (negation, conjunction swap, named entity replacement), context type (original vs. topically unrelated), needle position, and document length across all combinations, testing five LLMs on tens of thousands of document pairs. Our analysis reveals several striking findings. First, LLMs exhibit a within-document positional bias distinct from previously studied candidate-order effects: most models penalize semantic differences more harshly when they occur earlier in a document. Second, when the altered sentence is surrounded by topically unrelated context, it systematically lowers similarity scores and induces bipolarized scores that indicate either very low or very high similarity. This is consistent with an interpretive frame account in which topically-related context may allow models to contextualize and downweight the alterations. Third, each LLM produces a qualitatively distinct scoring distribution, a stable "fingerprint" that is invariant to perturbation type, yet all models share a universal hierarchy in how leniently they treat different perturbation types. Together, these results demonstrate that LLM semantic similarity scores are sensitive to document structure, context coherence, and model identity in ways that go beyond the semantic change itself, and that the proposed framework offers a practical, LLM-agnostic toolkit for auditing and comparing scoring behavior across current and future models.

</details>


### [229] [Assessing Capabilities of Large Language Models in Social Media Analytics: A Multi-task Quest](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18955)
*Ramtin Davoudi,Kartik Thakkar,Nazanin Donyapour,Tyler Derr,Hamid Karimi*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该研究首次对现代LLM在Twitter数据集上的三项社交媒体分析任务进行了全面评估：作者身份验证、帖子生成和用户属性推断，建立了可复现的基准。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前缺乏对现代大型语言模型在社交媒体分析任务上的系统性评估，需要建立统一的评估框架来比较不同模型在作者身份验证、内容生成和用户属性推断等核心任务上的表现。

Method: 1) 作者身份验证：引入系统性采样框架，采用多样化的用户和帖子选择策略，并在2024年1月后的新推文上进行泛化评估以减少"已见数据"偏差；2) 帖子生成：使用全面的评估指标评估LLM生成真实用户内容的能力；3) 用户研究：连接前两项任务，测量真实用户对基于自身写作风格生成的LLM帖子的感知；4) 属性推断：使用两种标准化分类法（IAB Tech Lab 2023和2018 U.S. SOC）标注职业和兴趣，并将LLM与现有基线进行比较。

Result: 研究评估了GPT-4、GPT-4o、GPT-3.5-Turbo、Gemini 1.5 Pro、DeepSeek-V3、Llama 3.2和BERT等多种模型，为LLM驱动的社交媒体分析提供了新的见解和可复现的基准。

Conclusion: 该研究建立了统一的评估框架，为社交媒体分析中的LLM应用提供了系统性的基准测试，代码和数据将在发表后公开，有助于推动该领域的研究发展。

Abstract: In this study, we present the first comprehensive evaluation of modern LLMs - including GPT-4, GPT-4o, GPT-3.5-Turbo, Gemini 1.5 Pro, DeepSeek-V3, Llama 3.2, and BERT - across three core social media analytics tasks on a Twitter (X) dataset: (I) Social Media Authorship Verification, (II) Social Media Post Generation, and (III) User Attribute Inference. For the authorship verification, we introduce a systematic sampling framework over diverse user and post selection strategies and evaluate generalization on newly collected tweets from January 2024 onward to mitigate "seen-data" bias. For post generation, we assess the ability of LLMs to produce authentic, user-like content using comprehensive evaluation metrics. Bridging Tasks I and II, we conduct a user study to measure real users' perceptions of LLM-generated posts conditioned on their own writing. For attribute inference, we annotate occupations and interests using two standardized taxonomies (IAB Tech Lab 2023 and 2018 U.S. SOC) and benchmark LLMs against existing baselines. Overall, our unified evaluation provides new insights and establishes reproducible benchmarks for LLM-driven social media analytics. The code and data are provided in the supplementary material and will also be made publicly available upon publication.

</details>


### [230] [An Empirical Study of Multi-Generation Sampling for Jailbreak Detection in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18775)
*Hanrui Luo,Shreyank N Gowda*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该论文研究了大型语言模型的越狱检测，发现单输出评估会系统性低估越狱漏洞，而适度的多采样审计能更可靠地评估模型脆弱性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 检测大型语言模型中的越狱行为具有挑战性，特别是在强对齐模型很少产生有害输出的情况下。现有方法在现实条件下评估越狱检测的有效性不足。

Method: 使用JailbreakBench Behaviors数据集和多个不同对齐强度的生成模型进行实证研究。评估了基于词频-逆文档频率（TF-IDF）的词汇检测器和基于生成不一致性的检测器，在不同采样预算下进行测试。

Result: 单输出评估系统性低估越狱漏洞，增加采样数量能揭示更多有害行为。从单生成到适度采样的改进最显著，更大采样预算的收益递减。跨模型实验显示检测信号部分泛化，相关模型家族内转移更强。词汇检测器捕获的是行为信号和主题特定线索的混合，而非纯粹有害行为。

Conclusion: 适度的多采样审计为评估模型脆弱性和改进大型语言模型的越狱检测提供了更可靠实用的方法。

Abstract: Detecting jailbreak behaviour in large language models remains challenging, particularly when strongly aligned models produce harmful outputs only rarely. In this work, we present an empirical study of output based jailbreak detection under realistic conditions using the JailbreakBench Behaviors dataset and multiple generator models with varying alignment strengths. We evaluate both a lexical TF-IDF detector and a generation inconsistency based detector across different sampling budgets. Our results show that single output evaluation systematically underestimates jailbreak vulnerability, as increasing the number of sampled generations reveals additional harmful behaviour. The most significant improvements occur when moving from a single generation to moderate sampling, while larger sampling budgets yield diminishing returns. Cross generator experiments demonstrate that detection signals partially generalise across models, with stronger transfer observed within related model families. A category level analysis further reveals that lexical detectors capture a mixture of behavioural signals and topic specific cues, rather than purely harmful behaviour. Overall, our findings suggest that moderate multi sample auditing provides a more reliable and practical approach for estimating model vulnerability and improving jailbreak detection in large language models. Code will be released.

</details>


### [231] [MM-JudgeBias: A Benchmark for Evaluating Compositional Biases in MLLM-as-a-Judge](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18164)
*Sua Lee,Sanghee Park,Jinbae Im*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文系统定义了多模态大语言模型（MLLM）作为自动评估器时的组合偏差问题，构建了MM-JudgeBias基准（包含1800+样本、9种偏差类型），并提出BD和BC两个互补指标。对26个先进MLLM的实验揭示了模态忽视和不对称评估倾向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MLLM作为自动评估器（MLLM-as-a-Judge）的可靠性未被充分探索，现有研究缺乏对其偏差的系统性定义和评估方法。

Method: 1) 系统定义组合偏差（Compositional Bias）；2) 构建MM-JudgeBias基准，包含对Query、Image、Response三个维度的受控扰动；3) 提出BD（敏感性）和BC（稳定性）两个互补指标；4) 从29个源基准中收集并精炼1800+多模态样本，覆盖9种偏差类型。

Result: 对26个SOTA MLLM的实验显示存在系统性模态忽视和不对称评估倾向。

Conclusion: 当前MLLM作为评估器存在显著的偏差问题，需要更可靠的评估方法。

Abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have been increasingly used as automatic evaluators-a paradigm known as MLLM-as-a-Judge. However, their reliability and vulnerabilities to biases remain underexplored. We find that many MLLM judges fail to reliably integrate key visual or textual cues, yielding unreliable evaluations when evidence is missing or mismatched, and exhibiting instability under semantically irrelevant perturbations. To address this, we systematically define Compositional Bias in MLLM-as-a-Judge systems and introduce MM-JudgeBias, a benchmark for evaluating it. MM-JudgeBias introduces controlled perturbations across Query, Image, and Response, and evaluates model behavior via two complementary metrics: Bias-Deviation (BD) for sensitivity and Bias-Conformity (BC) for stability. Our dataset of over 1,800 curated and refined multimodal samples, drawn from 29 source benchmarks, enables a fine-grained diagnosis of nine bias types across diverse tasks and domains. Experiments on 26 state-of-the-art MLLMs reveal systematic modality neglect and asymmetric evaluation tendencies, underscoring the need for more reliable judges.

</details>


### [232] [GSQ: Highly-Accurate Low-Precision Scalar Quantization for LLMs via Gumbel-Softmax Sampling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18556)
*Alireza Dadgarnia,Soroush Tabesh,Mahdi Nikdan,Michael Helcig,Eldar Kurtic,Dan Alistarh*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出GSQ（Gumbel-Softmax量化）方法，通过可微松弛的标量量化技术，在2-3比特低精度下弥合了标量量化与向量量化方法之间的精度差距，且兼容现有标量推理内核，可扩展到万亿参数MoE模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前低比特量化存在两类方法：标量量化（如GPTQ/AWQ）部署广泛但在3-4比特以下精度饱和；向量/网格量化（如QTIP/AQLM）精度更高但实现困难、扩展性差。本文探究这一差距是否本质，即能否通过精心优化的标量量化器弥补大部分差距。

Method: GSQ（Gumbel-Softmax Quantization）是一种后训练标量量化方法。它利用Gumbel-Softmax松弛技术，联合学习每个坐标的网格分配和每组的缩放因子。松弛的基数与目标比特宽度下的可用级别数（如三值量化3个级别、3比特8个级别）匹配，使得松弛紧致且优化可处理。采用对称标量网格和分组量化，兼容现有标量推理内核。

Result: 在Llama-3.1-8B/70B-Instruct模型上，GSQ在2比特和3比特下弥合了标量量化与QTIP前沿之间的大部分差距。GSQ还能扩展到万亿参数的MoE模型（如Kimi-K2.5），而向量量化方法难以应用于此类模型。

Conclusion: 通过精心优化的标量量化（GSQ），可以在低比特宽度下显著缩小与向量量化方法的精度差距，同时保持标量量化的部署友好性和可扩展性，表明这一差距并非本质性。

Abstract: Weight quantization has become a standard tool for efficient LLM deployment, especially for local inference, where models are now routinely served at 2-3 bits per parameter. The state of the art is currently split into two sets of methods: simple scalar quantization techniques, such as GPTQ or AWQ, which are widely deployed but plateau in accuracy at 3-4 bits per parameter (bpp), and "second-generation" vector- or trellis-quantized methods, such as QTIP, GPTVQ and AQLM, which push the accuracy frontier at low bit-widths but are notoriously hard to implement and to scale, and have gained relatively less traction. In this paper, we ask whether this gap is fundamental, or whether a carefully optimized scalar quantizer can recover most of it. We answer in the affirmative, by introducing GSQ (Gumbel-Softmax Quantization), a post-training scalar quantization method which jointly learns the per-coordinate grid assignments and the per-group scales using a Gumbel-Softmax relaxation of the discrete grid. GSQ matches the cardinality of the relaxation to the small number of levels available in the target bit-width regime (e.g., 3-8 levels for ternary and 3 bpp, respectively), making the relaxation tight and the optimization tractable. Practically, on the standard Llama-3.1-8B/70B-Instruct models, GSQ closes most of the gap between scalar quantization and the QTIP frontier at 2 and 3 bits, while using a symmetric scalar grid with group-wise quantization, and thus fully compatible with existing scalar inference kernels. We further show that GSQ scales to trillion-scale Mixture-of-Experts models such as Kimi-K2.5, where vector-quantized methods are difficult to apply.

</details>


### [233] [Culture-Aware Humorous Captioning: Multimodal Humor Generation across Cultural Contexts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18091)
*Run Xu,Lu Li,Rongzhao Zhang,Jie Xu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出文化感知幽默字幕生成任务，要求模型同时根据图像和文化背景生成幽默字幕，并提出六维评估框架和分阶段对齐框架（Western监督预训练→多维偏好对齐→Eastern文化适应），实验表明方法在文化适配性上显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多模态大模型虽能生成幽默字幕，但缺乏对显式文化背景的稳定控制，难以在指定文化背景下同时保持图像相关性、语境适切性和幽默质量。

Method: 提出分阶段对齐框架：1) 在西方文化背景下用高资源监督初始化模型；2) 通过基于Judge的GRPO结合退化感知原型排斥约束进行多维偏好对齐，缓解开放生成中的奖励黑客问题；3) 用少量监督数据适配东方文化背景。

Result: 在提出的六维评估框架下，方法整体性能更强，尤其在语境适配性上有大幅提升，并在文化约束下更好地平衡了图像相关性与幽默质量。

Conclusion: 分阶段对齐策略能有效实现跨文化背景的幽默字幕生成，退化感知原型排斥约束有助于缓解开放生成中的奖励黑客问题，为文化感知的多模态生成任务提供了可行范式。

Abstract: Recent multimodal large language models have shown promising ability in generating humorous captions for images, yet they still lack stable control over explicit cultural context, making it difficult to jointly maintain image relevance, contextual appropriateness, and humor quality under a specified cultural background. To address this limitation, we introduce a new multimodal generation task, culture-aware humorous captioning, which requires a model to generate a humorous caption conditioned on both an input image and a target cultural context. Captions generated under different cultural contexts are not expected to share the same surface form, but should remain grounded in similar visual situations or humorous rationales.To support this task, we establish a six-dimensional evaluation framework covering image relevance, contextual fit, semantic richness, reasonableness, humor, and creativity. We further propose a staged alignment framework that first initializes the model with high-resource supervision under the Western cultural context, then performs multi-dimensional preference alignment via judge-based GRPO with a Degradation-aware Prototype Repulsion Constraint to mitigate reward hacking in open-ended generation, and finally adapts the model to the Eastern cultural context with a small amount of supervision. Experimental results show that our method achieves stronger overall performance under the proposed evaluation framework, with particularly large gains in contextual fit and a better balance between image relevance and humor under cultural constraints.

</details>


### [234] [Experiments or Outcomes? Probing Scientific Feasibility in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18786)
*Seyedali Mohammadi,Manas Gaur,Francis Ferraro*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究科学可行性评估，将其建模为诊断推理任务，发现提供结果证据比提供实验描述更可靠，且实验文本在上下文不完整时可能降低LLM性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究在科学可行性评估任务中，不同信息条件（仅假设、含实验描述、含实验结果、两者兼具）对LLM推理能力的影响，以及实验/结果上下文不完整时的鲁棒性问题。

Method: 将可行性评估建模为诊断推理任务，在受控知识条件下评估LLM，并通过逐步移除实验和/或结果上下文来测试鲁棒性。

Result: 提供结果证据比提供实验描述更可靠；结果能提升超出模型内部知识的准确性；实验文本在上下文不完整时可能降低性能。

Conclusion: 明确了何时实验证据有助于基于LLM的可行性评估以及何时会引入脆弱性。

Abstract: Scientific feasibility assessment asks whether a claim is consistent with established knowledge and whether experimental evidence could support or refute it. We frame feasibility assessment as a diagnostic reasoning task in which, given a hypothesis, a model predicts feasible or infeasible and justifies its decision. We evaluate large language models (LLMs) under controlled knowledge conditions (hypothesis-only, with experiments, with outcomes, or both) and probe robustness by progressively removing portions of the experimental and/or outcome context. Across multiple LLMs and two datasets, providing outcome evidence is generally more reliable than providing experiment descriptions. Outcomes tend to improve accuracy beyond what internal knowledge alone provides, whereas experimental text can be brittle and may degrade performance when the context is incomplete. These findings clarify when experimental evidence benefits LLM-based feasibility assessment and when it introduces fragility.

</details>


### [235] [SignDPO: Multi-level Direct Preference Optimisation for Skeleton-based Gloss-free Sign Language Translation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18034)
*Muxin Pu,Xiao-Ming Wu,Mei Kuan Lim,Chun Yong Chong,Wei Li,Chen Change Loy*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: SignDPO是一个多级直接偏好优化框架，通过空间、时间和语言三个维度的偏好对齐，增强基于骨架的手语翻译性能，在三个基准上超越现有无词汇标注方法，甚至媲美有词汇标注方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于骨架的手语翻译模型使用最大似然估计训练，受限于模仿式范式，缺乏对细粒度时空细节的判别敏感性，导致语义漂移。现有方法无法有效区分手语中的细微时空差异。

Method: 提出SignDPO框架，包含三个关键设计：(1) 分层扰动策略，在全局和局部粒度自动构建时空非偏好样本；(2) 自引导机制，利用解码器交叉注意力分数识别并扰动语义显著的骨架区域；(3) 自动语言级偏好生成器，通过微调专用扰动模型捕获输出级失败模式。

Result: 在CSL-Daily、How2Sign和OpenASL三个基准上，SignDPO持续超越最先进的无词汇标注方法，甚至媲美有词汇标注的方法。

Conclusion: 多级偏好对齐是弥合高熵骨架轨迹与离散语言语义之间差距的有效范式。

Abstract: We present SignDPO, a novel multi-level Direct Preference Optimisation (DPO) framework designed to enhance the alignment of skeleton-based Sign Language Translation. While current skeleton-based models have made significant progress using Maximum Likelihood Estimation, they are primarily constrained by an imitation-based paradigm that lacks discriminative sensitivity to the fine-grained spatio-temporal nuances of sign language, often leading to semantic drift. To address this, SignDPO shifts the optimisation goal from simple sequence mimicry to structured preference alignment across spatial, temporal, and linguistic dimensions. Our framework involves three key designs. First, we introduce a hierarchical perturbation strategy to construct spatial and temporal non-preferred samples at both global and local granularities automatically. Second, we propose a self-guiding mechanism that leverages decoder cross-attention scores to identify and perturb semantically salient skeletal regions, forcing the model to distinguish genuine sign signals from structural distortions. Third, we establish an automated language-level preference generator by fine-tuning a dedicated perturbation model, capturing complex output-level failure modes without manual annotation. Extensive experiments on three widely adopted benchmarks, CSL-Daily, How2Sign, and OpenASL, demonstrate that SignDPO consistently outperforms state-of-the-art gloss-free methods and even rivals established gloss-based ones. Our results suggest that multi-level preference alignment is a powerful paradigm for bridging the gap between high-entropy skeletal trajectories and discrete linguistic semantics.

</details>


### [236] [Characterizing AlphaEarth Embedding Geometry for Agentic Environmental Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18715)
*Mashrekur Rahman,Samuel J. Barrett,Christina Last*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文系统刻画了Google AlphaEarth 64维地球观测基础模型嵌入的流形几何结构（有效维度13.3，局部本征维度约10，切空间旋转显著），并构建了一个基于FAISS索引的智能体系统。该系统通过9个专用工具将环境查询分解为推理链，消融实验表明嵌入检索主导响应质量（μ=3.79 vs 参数化3.03），且几何工具的价值随消费模型的推理能力提升而增加。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 地球观测基础模型的嵌入表示几何结构尚未被充分探索，理解其非欧几里得流形特性对下游推理任务至关重要。

Method: 1) 对12.1M CONUS样本的64维嵌入进行流形几何表征（参与率、局部本征维度、切空间旋转、概念方向旋转）；2) 构建含9个专用工具的智能体系统，将环境查询分解为推理链，结合FAISS索引的嵌入检索与线性探测；3) 进行五条件消融实验（120查询，三复杂度层级）和跨模型基准测试。

Result: 有效维度13.3，局部本征维度约10，84%位置切空间旋转超过60°，局部-全局对齐接近随机基线(0.17 vs 0.125)；向量算术精度差但检索结果物理一致（R²=0.32）；嵌入检索优于纯参数化方法(3.79 vs 3.03)；几何工具对弱模型有轻微负面影响(-0.12)但对强模型有提升(+0.07)。

Conclusion: 地球观测嵌入的流形几何高度非欧几里得，基于检索的智能体系统优于向量算术方法；几何表征的价值与消费模型的推理能力正相关，强模型能更有效利用几何信息提升环境推理的准确性。

Abstract: Earth observation foundation models encode land surface information into dense embedding vectors, yet the geometric structure of these representations and its implications for downstream reasoning remain underexplored. We characterize the manifold geometry of Google AlphaEarth's 64-dimensional embeddings across 12.1 million Continental United States samples (2017--2023) and develop an agentic system that leverages this geometric understanding for environmental reasoning. The manifold is non-Euclidean: effective dimensionality is 13.3 (participation ratio) from 64 raw dimensions, with local intrinsic dimensionality of approximately 10. Tangent spaces rotate substantially, with 84\% of locations exceeding 60\textdegree{} and local-global alignment (mean$|\cosθ| = 0.17$) approaching the random baseline of 0.125. Supervised linear probes indicate that concept directions rotate across the manifold, and compositional vector arithmetic using both PCA-derived and probe-derived directions yields poor precision. Retrieval instead produces physically coherent results, with local geometry predicting retrieval coherence ($R^2 = 0.32$). Building on this characterization, we introduce an agentic system with nine specialized tools that decomposes environmental queries into reasoning chains over a FAISS-indexed embedding database. A five-condition ablation (120 queries, three complexity tiers) shows that embedding retrieval dominates response quality ($μ= 3.79 \pm 0.90$ vs.\ $3.03 \pm 0.77$ parametric-only; scale 1--5), with peak performance on multi-step comparisons ($μ= 4.28 \pm 0.43$). A cross-model benchmark show that geometric tools reduce Sonnet 4.5's score by 0.12 points but improve Opus 4.6's by 0.07, with Opus achieving higher geometric grounding (3.38 vs.\ 2.64), suggesting that the value of geometric characterization scales with the reasoning capability of the consuming model.

</details>


### [237] [Transition-Matrix Regularization for Next Dialogue Act Prediction in Counselling Conversations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18539)
*Eric Rudolph,Philipp Steigerwald,Jens Albrecht*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出在下一对话行为预测（NDAP）任务中引入KL正则化项，利用语料库中的对话流转统计来对齐预测的对话行为分布，在60类德语咨询分类体系上相对提升宏F1 9-42%，并在跨语言跨领域数据集上验证了泛化能力，表明轻量级话语流先验能有效补充预训练编码器，尤其在细粒度、数据稀疏的对话任务中。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有NDAP方法主要依赖上下文编码，未充分利用语料库中蕴含的对话流转统计信息，导致预测的行为序列与真实对话流存在偏差，尤其在细粒度、数据稀疏场景下性能受限。

Method: 提出KL正则化项，通过最小化预测的对话行为分布与语料库中经验对话流转模式之间的KL散度，将对话流先验融入NDAP训练过程。

Result: 在60类德语咨询分类体系上采用5折交叉验证，相对宏F1提升9-42%（取决于编码器）；对话流对齐度显著改善；在HOPE数据集上的跨数据集验证表明改进可跨语言和咨询领域迁移；消融实验表明过渡正则化持续带来增益，且对较弱基线模型效果更显著。

Conclusion: 轻量级话语流先验（对话流转正则化）能有效补充预训练编码器，尤其适用于细粒度、数据稀疏的对话任务，且具有良好的跨语言跨领域泛化能力。

Abstract: This paper studies how empirical dialogue-flow statistics can be incorporated into Next Dialogue Act Prediction (NDAP). A KL regularization term is proposed that aligns predicted act distributions with corpus-derived transition patterns. Evaluated on a 60-class German counselling taxonomy using 5-fold cross-validation, this improves macro-F1 by 9--42% relative depending on encoder and substantially improves dialogue-flow alignment. Cross-dataset validation on HOPE suggests that improvements transfer across languages and counselling domains. In systematic ablations across pretrained encoders and architectures, the findings indicate that transition regularization provides consistent gains and disproportionately benefits weaker baseline models. The results suggest that lightweight discourse-flow priors complement pretrained encoders, especially in fine-grained, data-sparse dialogue tasks.

</details>


### [238] [LQM: Linguistically Motivated Multidimensional Quality Metrics for Machine Translation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18490)
*Samar M. Magdy,Fakhraddin Alwajih,Abdellah El Mekki,Wesam El-Sayed,Muhammad Abdul-Mageed*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出LQM（语言学驱动的多维度质量指标），一个针对阿拉伯语等双语体语言的六层次错误分类体系，通过构建涵盖7种方言的3,850句平行语料库，对6个LLM进行零样本评估和6,113个错误跨度的专家标注，有效捕捉了传统评估框架忽视的方言和文化特定错误。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MT评估框架（如自动指标和MQM人类评估方案）主要采用语言无关设计，但在处理双语体语言（如阿拉伯语）时，翻译失败源于语言变体、内容覆盖范围和语用适当性的不匹配，而非仅表面形式错误，现有方法无法有效捕捉这些方言和文化特定错误。

Method: 提出LQM层次化错误分类体系，包含社会语言学、语用学、语义学、形态句法学、正字法和文字学六个语言学层面；构建涵盖7种阿拉伯方言（埃及、阿联酋、约旦、毛里塔尼亚、摩洛哥、巴勒斯坦、也门）的双向平行语料库（3,850句）；对6个LLM进行零样本评估，使用LQM进行专家级跨度级人工标注，产生6,113个标注错误跨度，并结合spBLEU自动指标进行补充分析。

Result: 构建了3,850句平行语料库（每方言550句），完成6,113个标注错误跨度覆盖3,495个独特错误句子，附带严重性加权质量分数，并通过spBLEU自动指标进行补充验证。

Conclusion: LQM虽在阿拉伯语上验证，但设计为语言无关框架，可轻松应用于或适配其他语言，已公开标注数据、提示词和标注指南。

Abstract: Existing MT evaluation frameworks, including automatic metrics and human evaluation schemes such as Multidimensional Quality Metrics (MQM), are largely language-agnostic. However, they often fail to capture dialect- and culture-specific errors in diglossic languages (e.g., Arabic), where translation failures stem from mismatches in language variety, content coverage, and pragmatic appropriateness rather than surface form alone.We introduce LQM: Linguistically Motivated Multidimensional Quality Metrics for MT. LQM is a hierarchical error taxonomy for diagnosing MT errors through six linguistically grounded levels: sociolinguistics, pragmatics, semantics, morphosyntax, orthography, and graphetics (Figure 1). We construct a bidirectional parallel corpus of 3,850 sentences (550 per variety) spanning seven Arabic dialects (Egyptian, Emirati, Jordanian, Mauritanian, Moroccan, Palestinian, and Yemeni), derived from conversational, culturally rich content. We evaluate six LLMs in a zero-shot setting and conduct expert span-level human annotation using LQM, producing 6,113 labeled error spans across 3,495 unique erroneous sentences, along with severity-weighted quality scores. We complement this analysis with an automatic metric (spBLEU). Though validated here on Arabic, LQM is a language-agnostic framework designed to be easily applied to or adapted for other languages. LQM annotated errors data, prompts, and annotation guidelines are publicly available at https://github.com/UBC-NLP/LQM_MT.

</details>


### [239] [Adversarial Humanities Benchmark: Results on Stylistic Robustness in Frontier Model Safety](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18487)
*Marcello Galisai,Susanna Cifani,Francesco Giarrusso,Piercosma Bisconti,Matteo Prandi,Federico Pierucci,Federico Sartore,Daniele Nardi*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: AHB基准测试通过人文学科风格转换来评估模型安全拒绝的鲁棒性，发现原始攻击成功率仅3.84%，而转换后达36.8%-65.0%，总体ASR为55.75%，表明当前安全技术存在严重的风格泛化缺陷。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有模型安全评估主要针对熟悉的有害提示形式，缺乏对风格化伪装和意图隐藏下安全拒绝能力退化的系统评估，因此需要构建更广泛的对抗性基准来测试安全技术的泛化能力。

Method: 基于MLCommons AILuminate的有害任务，通过人文学科风格转换（如Adversarial Poetry和Adversarial Tales的方式）改写相同目标，形成风格混淆和意图隐藏的基准家族，对31个前沿模型进行测试。

Result: 原始攻击ASR仅3.84%，而风格转换后ASR升至36.8%-65.0%，总体ASR达55.75%；在EU AI Act视角下，CBRN（化生放核）类别的系统性风险最高。

Conclusion: 当前安全技术缺乏风格鲁棒性，深度理解"非恶意原则"仍是前沿模型安全中尚未解决的核心问题。

Abstract: The Adversarial Humanities Benchmark (AHB) evaluates whether model safety refusals survive a shift away from familiar harmful prompt forms. Starting from harmful tasks drawn from MLCommons AILuminate, the benchmark rewrites the same objectives through humanities-style transformations while preserving intent. This extends literature on Adversarial Poetry and Adversarial Tales from single jailbreak operators to a broader benchmark family of stylistic obfuscation and goal concealment. In the benchmark results reported here, the original attacks record 3.84% attack success rate (ASR), while transformed methods range from 36.8% to 65.0%, yielding 55.75% overall ASR across 31 frontier models. Under a European Union AI Act Code-of-Practice-inspired systemic-risk lens, Chemical, biological, radiological and nuclear (CBRN) is the highest bucket. Taken together, this lack of stylistic robustness suggests that current safety techniques suffer from weak generalization: deep understanding of 'non-maleficence' remains a central unresolved problem in frontier model safety.

</details>


### [240] [AlphaContext: An Evolutionary Tree-based Psychometric Context Generator for Creativity Assessment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18398)
*Yixuan Wang,Yue Huang,Hong Qian,Yunzhao Wei,Yifei Ding,Wenkai Wang,Zhi Liu,Zhongjing Huang,Aimin Zhou,Jiajun Guo*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: AlphaContext是一种基于进化树的心理测量语境生成器，用于创造力评估。它通过超树大纲规划器、MCTS语境生成器、进化语境优化器和评估引导进化精炼器四个模块，有效解决了现有LLM生成器存在的评估线索不足、叙事连贯性弱、风格多样性有限等问题，在6个质量指标上平均提升8%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 创造力已成为LLM和人机协作时代的核心能力，但高质量的专家设计语境稀缺，现有LLM生成器存在评估线索不足、叙事连贯性弱、风格多样性有限、对创造性思维支持差等问题，亟需一种科学有效的语境生成方法。

Method: 提出AlphaContext框架，包含四个模块：1) HyperTree Outline Planner——将专家设计的大纲形式化为规则引导的超树，进行自上而下的层次化规划；2) MCTS-based Context Generator——通过蒙特卡洛树搜索填充大纲，平衡全局结构与局部质量；3) Evolutionary Context Optimizer——使用MAP-Elites算法通过重复更新生态位精英来联合优化多样性与质量；4) Assessment-Guided Evolution Refiner——模拟多样化风格的虚拟参与者并回收弱语境进行进一步进化。

Result: 在6个质量指标上，AlphaContext相比竞争方法平均提升8%。

Conclusion: AlphaContext通过进化树方法有效生成了高质量、多样性的心理测量语境，为创造力评估提供了科学有效的工具支持。

Abstract: Creativity has become a core competence in the era of LLMs and human-AI collaboration, underpinning innovation in real-world problem solving. Crucially, the systematic improvement of creativity necessitates scientifically valid assessment instruments. Psychometric research recognizes context-based assessment as an effective way to measure creative thinking. However, high-quality expert-designed contexts remain scarce. Existing LLM-based generators often struggle with insufficient assessment cues, weak narrative coherence, limited stylistic diversity, and poor support for creative thinking. To address these challenges, we propose AlphaContext, an evolutionary tree-based psychometric context generator for creativity assessment. First, the HyperTree Outline Planner formalizes expert-designed outlining as a rule-guided hypertree and performs top-down hierarchical planning. The MCTS-based Context Generator fills the outline via MCTS to balance global structure and local quality. Then, the Evolutionary Context Optimizer evolves contexts with MAP-Elites by repeatedly updating niche elites to jointly improve diversity and quality. Finally, the Assessment-Guided Evolution Refiner simulates virtual participants with diverse styles and recycles weak contexts for further evolution. Experiments show that AlphaContext yields an average improvement of 8% over competitive methods across 6 quality metrics.

</details>


### [241] [IceBreaker for Conversational Agents: Breaking the First-Message Barrier with Personalized Starters](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18375)
*Hongwei Zheng,Weiqi Wu,Zhengjia Wang,Guanyu Jiang,Haoming Li,Tianyu Wu,Yongchun Zhu,Jingwu Chen,Feng Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出IceBreaker框架，通过共振感知兴趣蒸馏和交互导向开场白生成，解决对话智能体在冷启动阶段的“首次信息障碍”问题，实现在无用户显式意图下生成个性化开场白。在线A/B测试显示用户活跃天数提升0.184%，点击率提升9.425%，已部署于全球最大对话智能体产品之一。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有对话智能体聚焦于对话中的被动响应或主动激活，但忽略了对话启动阶段的瓶颈：用户可能有模糊需求但缺乏明确查询意图，导致“首次信息障碍”——对话在开始前就停滞。需要一种在冷启动时刻、无用户显式意图下生成个性化开场白的方法来引导用户进入对话。

Method: IceBreaker将人际破冰建模为两步握手过程：(i) 共振感知兴趣蒸馏：从会话摘要中提取触发兴趣以唤起用户共鸣；(ii) 交互导向开场白生成：结合个性化偏好对齐和自增强循环优化，最大化用户参与度。

Result: 在全球最大对话智能体产品之一的在线A/B测试中，IceBreaker使活跃用户天数提升0.184%，点击率提升9.425%，并已部署至生产环境。

Conclusion: 通过将对话启动建模为两步破冰过程，IceBreaker有效克服了冷启动场景下无显式用户意图的挑战，显著提升了用户参与度指标，证明了对话开场白生成在实际产品中的可行性和价值。

Abstract: Conversational agents, such as ChatGPT and Doubao, have become essential daily assistants for billions of users. To further enhance engagement, these systems are evolving from passive responders to proactive companions. However, existing efforts focus on activation within ongoing dialogues, while overlooking a key real-world bottleneck. In the conversation initiation stage, users may have a vague need but no explicit query intent, creating a first-message barrier where the conversation holds before it begins. To overcome this, we introduce Conversation Starter Generation: generating personalized starters to guide users into conversation. However, unlike in-conversation stages where immediate context guides the response, initiation must operate in a cold-start moment without explicit user intent. To pioneer in this direction, we present IceBreaker that frames human ice-breaking as a two-step handshake: (i) evoke resonance via Resonance-Aware Interest Distillation from session summaries to capture trigger interests, and (ii) stimulate interaction via Interaction-Oriented Starter Generation, optimized with personalized preference alignment and a self-reinforced loop to maximize engagement. Online A/B tests on one of the world's largest conversational agent products show that IceBreaker improves user active days by +0.184% and click-through rate by +9.425%, and has been deployed in production.

</details>


### [242] [Multilingual Training and Evaluation Resources for Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18347)
*Daniela Baiamonte,Elena Fano,Matteo Gabburo,Stefano Simonazzi,Leonardo Rigutini,Andrea Zugarini*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文针对视觉语言模型（VLM）过度依赖英语的问题，构建了覆盖五种欧洲语言的多模态训练语料库Multi-PixMo和翻译评测基准，实验证明多语言多模态训练对非英语及英语任务均有正向迁移效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前VLM发展严重依赖英语，导致多语言多模态训练数据匮乏以及跨语言评测基准稀缺，亟需系统性的多语言资源来支撑VLM的公平发展与评估。

Method: 采用"再生-翻译"范式：训练方面，利用Pixmo现有数据集通过许可宽松的模型重新生成构建Multi-PixMo（含PixMo-Cap、PixMo-AskModelAnything、CoSyn-400k）；评测方面，将MMbench、ScienceQA、MME、POPE、AI2D等英语数据集翻译为五种欧洲语言。通过定性定量人工分析（含注释者间一致性评估）和消融实验验证资源质量。

Result: 基于3种不同模型的实验表明，多语言多模态训练在非英语基准上持续带来性能提升，同时对英语基准也产生正向迁移效应。

Conclusion: 多语言多模态数据对VLM训练具有普遍增益，不仅提升目标语言表现，还能正向影响英语性能，为VLM的多语言扩展提供了可行方案与资源支撑。

Abstract: Vision Language Models (VLMs) achieved rapid progress in the recent years. However, despite their growth, VLMs development is heavily grounded on English, leading to two main limitations: (i) the lack of multilingual and multimodal datasets for training, and (ii) the scarcity of comprehensive evaluation benchmarks across languages. In this work, we address these gaps by introducing a new comprehensive suite of resources for VLMs training and evaluation spanning five European languages (English, French, German, Italian, and Spanish). We adopt a regeneration-translation paradigm that produces high-quality cross-lingual resources by combining curated synthetic generation and manual annotation. Specifically, we build Multi-PixMo, a training corpus obtained regenerating examples from Pixmo pre-existing datasets with permissively licensed models: PixMo-Cap, PixMo-AskModelAnything, and CoSyn-400k. On the evaluation side, we construct a set of multilingual benchmarks derived translating widely used English datasets (MMbench, ScienceQA, MME, POPE, AI2D). We assess the quality of these resources through qualitative and quantitative human analyses, measuring inter-annotator agreement. Additionally, we perform ablation studies to demonstrate the impact of multilingual data, with respect to English only, in VLMs training. Experiments, comprising 3 different models show that using multilingual, multimodal examples for training VLMs aids is consistently beneficial on non-English benchmarks, with positive transfer to English as well.

</details>


### [243] [On the Importance and Evaluation of Narrativity in Natural Language AI Explanations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18311)
*Mateusz Cedro,David Martens*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出XAI解释应以叙事形式呈现，具备连续结构、因果机制、语言流畅性和词汇多样性四个属性；针对现有指标无法衡量叙事质量的问题，提出七项自动评估指标，并给出生成规则。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有XAI解释多为静态特征重要性列表，虽指示了什么影响预测，但未解释为何发生预测；基于社会科学和语言学见解，认为XAI解释应以叙事形式呈现以支持人类理解。

Method: 定义叙事解释的四个属性（连续结构、因果机制、语言流畅性、词汇多样性）；提出七项自动评估指标量化叙事质量；在六个数据集上对现有方法进行基准测试；提出问题无关的XAI叙事生成规则。

Result: 提出的七项指标比标准NLP指标（基于token概率或词频）更可靠地区分描述性解释与叙事解释；标准指标可能被无解释内容的赘述文本所超越。

Conclusion: 叙事形式的XAI解释更符合人类理解机制；所提指标和生成规则可推动XAI领域产生更具可解释性的自然语言解释。

Abstract: Explainable AI (XAI) aims to make the behaviour of machine learning models interpretable, yet many explanation methods remain difficult to understand. The integration of Natural Language Generation into XAI aims to deliver explanations in textual form, making them more accessible to practitioners. Current approaches, however, largely yield static lists of feature importances. Although such explanations indicate what influences the prediction, they do not explain why the prediction occurs. In this study, we draw on insights from social sciences and linguistics, and argue that XAI explanations should be presented in the form of narratives. Narrative explanations support human understanding through four defining properties: continuous structure, cause-effect mechanisms, linguistic fluency, and lexical diversity. We show that standard Natural Language Processing (NLP) metrics based solely on token probability or word frequency fail to capture these properties and can be matched or exceeded by tautological text that conveys no explanatory content. To address this issue, we propose seven automatic metrics that quantify the narrative quality of explanations along the four identified dimensions. We benchmark current state-of-the-art explanation generation methods on six datasets and show that the proposed metrics separate descriptive from narrative explanations more reliably than standard NLP metrics. Finally, to further advance the field, we propose a set of problem-agnostic XAI Narrative generation rules for producing natural language XAI explanations, so that the resulting XAI Narratives exhibit stronger narrative properties and align with the findings from the linguistic and social science literature.

</details>


### [244] [Depth Registers Unlock W4A4 on SwiGLU: A Reader/Generator Decomposition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18128)
*Ziyang Liu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文在300M参数SwiGLU语言模型上研究W4A4后训练量化，发现残差轴读取器（qkv, w1, w3）是主要误差来源。提出的Depth Registers + sink正则化可将困惑度从1727降至39.9，但仍有~2 PPL差距。分析表明该差距源于w2的双线性输入无法被正交旋转有效约束，属于SwiGLU架构的固有问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究W4A4后训练量化中哪些输入激活位置主导量化误差，并分析SwiGLU架构中残差轴读取器与块内生成器对量化损伤的不同贡献。

Method: 采用Depth Registers（残差轴寄存器）配合寄存器幅度铰链损失（DR+sink）进行训练时干预；结合SmoothQuant进行后处理；通过逐线性QuaRot和全量QuaRot进行后验对比；使用峰度分析和Delta-remove分解定位误差来源。

Result: DR+sink将W4A4困惑度从1727降至39.9（约43倍改进）；残差~2 PPL差距主要由w2的双线性输入主导；DR+sink有效降低读取器峰度但生成器不变；全量QuaRot无法消除该差距，验证了正交旋转无法约束SwiGLU双线性尾部的理论预测。

Conclusion: W4A4量化中SwiGLU架构的固有限制在于w2的双线性输入无法被正交旋转有效约束；DR+sink作为训练时探针揭示了这一现象；该结论受限于300M/5B token/单种子设定。

Abstract: We study post-training W4A4 quantization in a controlled 300M-parameter SwiGLU decoder-only language model trained on 5B tokens of FineWeb-Edu, and ask which input-activation sites dominate the error. Naive round-to-nearest W4A4 collapses validation perplexity from FP16 23.6 to 1727. A simple residual-axis training-time intervention -- Depth Registers with a register-magnitude hinge loss (DR+sink) -- reduces this to 119 (about 14x) at matched FP16 PPL and matched zero-shot capacity, and composes with SmoothQuant to 39.9 PPL. The residual ~2 PPL gap to FP16 is the diagnostic core. We decompose W4A4 damage by input-activation site: the five trainable linears in a SwiGLU block split into residual-axis readers (qkv, w1, w3) and block-internal generators (o_proj, w2). Elementary norm arguments show residual-axis magnitude control bounds readers tightly but leaves w2's bilinear input bounded only by the trivial product of factor bounds; empirically, DR+sink collapses reader kurtosis while leaving generators essentially unchanged, and the reader-rescued W4A4 residue is flat at ~0.28 nats across three matched checkpoints with Delta-remove(w2) dominating. We present DR+sink as a training-time probe rather than a deployment proposal: a post-hoc alternative (Per-Linear QuaRot) nearly matches it on the reader axis. Full QuaRot -- adding online per-head value Hadamard plus online w2-input rotation -- does not close the gap either, directly testing the prediction that orthogonal rotation cannot bound the bilinear SwiGLU tail. Claims are specific to our 300M, 5B-token, single-seed setting, and our experiments do not isolate the partition from the hinge.

</details>


### [245] [Negative Advantage Is a Double-Edged Sword: Calibrating Advantage in GRPO for Deep Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18235)
*Jiayi Wu,Ruobing Xie,Zeqian Huang,Lei Jiang,Can Xu,Kangyang Luo,Ming Gao,Xiang Li*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出CalibAdv，一种针对深度搜索任务中GRPO训练算法的优势校准方法，通过细粒度降低中间步骤的过度负优势并重新平衡答案部分的正负优势，解决了中间步骤正确性与奖励信号不匹配及训练不稳定问题，在3个模型和7个基准测试上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度搜索智能体依赖GRPO算法进行训练，但GRPO在深度搜索场景中存在两大问题：一是中间步骤的正确性与最终奖励信号严重不匹配，导致大量正确的中间步骤因最终答案错误而被错误惩罚；二是训练高度不稳定，常导致自然语言能力退化甚至训练崩溃。这些问题源于粗粒度的优势分配以及正负优势之间的不平衡。

Method: 提出CalibAdv优势校准方法，包含两个核心机制：1）利用中间步骤的正确性信息，在细粒度层面降低过度的负优势；2）在答案组件中重新平衡正优势与负优势。该方法针对深度搜索任务设计，在GRPO框架内进行优势校准。

Result: 在3个不同模型和7个基准测试上的大量实验表明，CalibAdv在提升模型性能的同时显著改善了训练稳定性。

Conclusion: CalibAdv有效解决了GRPO在深度搜索任务中中间步骤奖励分配不合理和训练不稳定的问题，是一种实用的优势校准方案。

Abstract: Deep search agents can autonomously initiate multi-turn interactions with search engines, thereby exhibiting strong question-answering capabilities. Such performance critically relies on Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) as its core training algorithm. However, GRPO still faces several challenges in deep search settings. First, there exists a substantial mismatch between the correctness of intermediate steps and the reward signal, causing numerous correct intermediate steps to be incorrectly penalized when the final answer is wrong. Second, training is highly unstable, often resulting in degradation of natural language ability or even catastrophic training collapse. Our analysis attributes these issues to coarse-grained advantage assignment and an imbalance between positive and negative advantages. To address these problems, we propose CalibAdv, an advantage calibration method specifically designed for deep search tasks. Specifically, CalibAdv leverages the correctness of intermediate steps to downscale excessive negative advantages at a fine-grained level. It then rebalances positive and negative advantages in the answer component. Extensive experiments across three models and seven benchmarks demonstrate that CalibAdv improves both model performance and training stability. Our code is available at https://github.com/wujwyi/CalibAdv.

</details>


### [246] [How Creative Are Large Language Models in Generating Molecules?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18031)
*Wen Tao,Yiwei Wang,Peng Zhou,Bryan Hooi,Wanlong Fang,Tianle Zhang,Xiao Luo,Yuansheng Liu,Alvin Chan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文首次将分子生成所需能力重新定义为创造力，通过系统实证评估研究LLM在分子生成中的创造性行为，区分收敛创造力和发散创造力两个维度，并分析不同因素如何塑造这些行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 分子生成需要在庞大且结构化的化学空间中满足多种化学和生物约束，这是一个非二值问题，有效模型必须在约束下识别非显而易见的解，同时保持探索以跳出局部最优。因此，创造力是分子生成的功能性需求而非美学概念。然而，LLM在此场景下展现何种创造力以及如何评估尚不清楚。

Method: 通过系统实证评估，在理化性质、ADMET和生物活性任务上研究LLM在分子生成中的创造性行为。将创造力划分为两个互补维度：收敛创造力（约束满足能力）和发散创造力（探索多样性能力），并分析不同因素如何影响这些行为。

Result: LLM在分子生成中展现出独特的创造性行为模式，例如当施加更多约束时，约束满足能力（收敛创造力）会增强。

Conclusion: 这是首次将分子生成所需能力重新定义为创造力，提供了对基于LLM的分子生成中创造力的系统性理解，并阐明了LLM在分子发现流程中的恰当使用方式。

Abstract: Molecule generation requires satisfying multiple chemical and biological constraints while searching a large and structured chemical space. This makes it a non-binary problem, where effective models must identify non-obvious solutions under constraints while maintaining exploration to improve success by escaping local optima. From this perspective, creativity is a functional requirement in molecular generation rather than an aesthetic notion. Large language models (LLMs) can generate molecular representations directly from natural language prompts, but it remains unclear what type of creativity they exhibit in this setting and how it should be evaluated. In this work, we study the creative behavior of LLMs in molecular generation through a systematic empirical evaluation across physicochemical, ADMET, and biological activity tasks. We characterize creativity along two complementary dimensions, convergent creativity and divergent creativity, and analyze how different factors shape these behaviors. Our results indicate that LLMs exhibit distinct patterns of creative behavior in molecule generation, such as an increase in constraint satisfaction when additional constraints are imposed. Overall, our work is the first to reframe the abilities required for molecule generation as creativity, providing a systematic understanding of creativity in LLM-based molecular generation and clarifying the appropriate use of LLMs in molecular discovery pipelines.

</details>


### [247] [STaD: Scaffolded Task Design for Identifying Compositional Skill Gaps in LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18177)
*Sungeun An,Swanand Ravindra Kadhe,Shailja Thakur,Chad DeLuca,Hima Patel*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出Scaffolded Task Design (STaD)框架，通过逐步引入结构化支持来系统探测LLM在推理任务中的技能组合缺陷，实验揭示不同模型存在独特的技能差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基准测试的聚合分数难以揭示LLM在组合性技能上的具体短板，且无法指导如何改进这些弱点。

Method: 基于脚手架(scaffolding)概念生成基准任务的受控变体，逐步引入结构化增量支持，系统化探测模型行为并识别其缺乏的具体推理技能组合。

Result: 在6个不同规模模型上对3个推理基准进行实验，揭示了多个失败点，并突出了每个模型独特且不同的技能差距。

Conclusion: STaD框架能够有效揭示传统基准无法发现的组合性技能缺陷，为理解LLM能力边界和针对性改进提供了可扩展的系统化方法。

Abstract: Benchmarks are often used as a standard to understand LLM capabilities in different domains. However, aggregate benchmark scores provide limited insight into compositional skill gaps of LLMs and how to improve them. To make these weaknesses visible, we propose Scaffolded Task Design (STaD) framework. STaD generates controlled variations of benchmark tasks based on the concept of scaffolding, which introduces structured, incremental support in a step-by-step manner. Rather than inspecting failures individually, this approach enables systematic and scalable probing of model behavior by identifying the specific reasoning skill compositions they lack. Treating the LLM as a black box, our experiments on six models of varying sizes reveal multiple failure points in three reasoning benchmarks and highlight each model's unique and distinct skill gaps.

</details>


### [248] [Beyond Reproduction: A Paired-Task Framework for Assessing LLM Comprehension and Creativity in Literary Translation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18169)
*Ran Zhang,Steffen Eger,Arda Tezcan,Wei Zhao,Simone Paolo Ponzetto,Lieve Macken*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出配对任务框架，系统评估大语言模型在文学翻译中的源文理解与创造性翻译能力。通过对11本书籍的文学摘录进行基准测试，发现即使模型理解能力强，其翻译创造力仍远低于人类水平，尤其在中英语言对中差距显著。仅Mistral-Large接近人类创造力水平。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型在文学翻译等创造性任务中的应用日益广泛，但翻译创造力缺乏规模化评估，且源文理解与创造性翻译通常被分开研究，而专业翻译中两者紧密交织。

Method: 提出配对任务框架：任务1评估源文理解，任务2通过创造性潜力单元（UCPs，如隐喻、文字游戏）评估翻译创造力。采用专家人工标注与UCP自动评分相结合的可扩展评估方案，对23个模型和4种创意导向提示进行基准测试。

Result: 强理解能力并未转化为人类水平的创造力；模型常产生字面或不恰当的翻译，远距离语言对（英-中）差距尤为突出。创意导向提示提升有限；仅Mistral-Large接近人类水平（0.167 vs. 0.246）。所有模型-提示组合中仅3个超过0.1创造力得分，其余接近零。

Conclusion: 当前大语言模型在文学翻译中理解与创造力存在显著脱节，翻译创造力仍是关键瓶颈，远距离语言对和创意导向提示的局限性尤为明显。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for creative tasks such as literary translation. Yet translational creativity remains underexplored and is rarely evaluated at scale, while source-text comprehension is typically studied in isolation, despite the fact that, in professional translation, comprehension and creativity are tightly intertwined. We address these gaps with a paired-task framework applied to literary excerpts from 11 books. Task 1 assesses source-text comprehension, and Task 2 evaluates translational creativity through Units of Creative Potential (UCPs), such as metaphors and wordplay. Using a scalable evaluation setup that combines expert human annotations with UCP-based automatic scoring, we benchmark 23 models and four creativity-oriented prompts. Our findings show that strong comprehension does not translate into human-level creativity: models often produce literal or contextually inappropriate renderings, with particularly large gaps for the more distant English-Chinese language pair. Creativity-oriented prompts yield only modest gains, and only one model, Mistral-Large, comes close to human-level creativity (0.167 vs. 0.246). Across all model-prompt combinations, only three exceed a creativity score of 0.1, while the rest remain at or near zero.

</details>


### [249] [TLoRA: Task-aware Low Rank Adaptation of Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18124)
*Weicheng Lin,Yi Zhang,Jiawei Dang,Liang-Jie Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: TLoRA提出了一种统一框架，通过数据驱动的初始化策略（对预训练权重与输入激活协方差的乘积进行SVD分解）和对秩与缩放因子的自适应分配，在训练开始时联合优化初始化与资源分配，冻结A矩阵仅训练B矩阵，在多个任务上以更少可训练参数取得优异表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LoRA变体通常只处理初始化或资源分配中的单一因素，且往往以增加训练复杂度或降低实际效率为代价，缺乏统一优化框架。

Method: 1) 数据驱动初始化：对预训练权重与输入激活协方差的乘积进行SVD分解，将LoRA的A矩阵与任务相关子空间对齐；2) 冻结A矩阵，仅训练B矩阵；3) 基于敏感性的重要性指标，在固定参数预算下自适应分配各层的秩和缩放因子。

Result: 在自然语言理解、常识推理、数学推理、代码生成和对话生成等多个任务上，TLoRA始终表现优异，同时显著减少了可训练参数数量。

Conclusion: TLoRA作为统一框架，通过联合优化初始化和资源分配，在提升性能的同时降低了训练成本，验证了数据驱动初始化和自适应分配策略的有效性。

Abstract: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) has become a widely adopted parameter-efficient fine-tuning method for large language models, with its effectiveness largely influenced by the allocation of ranks and scaling factors, as well as initialization. Existing LoRA variants typically address only one of these factors, often at the cost of increased training complexity or reduced practical efficiency. In this work, we present Task-aware Low-Rank Adaptation (TLoRA), a unified framework that jointly optimizes initialization and resource allocation at the outset of training. TLoRA introduces a data-driven initialization strategy that aligns the LoRA $A$ matrix with task-relevant subspaces by performing singular value decomposition on the product of pre-trained weights and input activation covariance. After this, the $A$ matrix is frozen, and only the $B$ matrix is trained. Furthermore, TLoRA employs a sensitivity-based importance metric to adaptively allocate ranks and scaling factors across layers under a fixed parameter budget. We conduct extensive experiments that demonstrate TLoRA consistently performs excellently across various tasks, including natural language understanding, commonsense reasoning, math reasoning, code generation, and chat generation, while significantly reducing the number of trainable parameters.

</details>


### [250] [More Than Meets the Eye: Measuring the Semiotic Gap in Vision-Language Models via Semantic Anchorage](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17354)
*Wei He*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出DIVA基准和Δ度量，发现视觉语言模型存在字面优势偏差：视觉保真度越高，符号对齐越弱，高保真视觉细节会干扰习语组合理解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究视觉语言模型在抽象语义（如习语性名词组合）上的表现，探究高视觉保真度是否会干扰习语组合性理解。

Method: 构建DIVA基准：为字面和习语解读生成配对的、锚定语义的示意图；提出语义对齐差距Δ（量化字面与习语视觉对齐的差异）和有向符号偏差b(t)（测量字面偏好的方向与强度）。

Result: 评估8个近期VLM，发现一致的字面 superiority 偏差：模型规模不能单独解决字面偏好，视觉保真度越高符号对齐越弱。

Conclusion: 提升组合理解需要视觉输入的图像化抽象，以及将生成和理解锚定于预期语义。

Abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) excel at photorealistic generation, yet often struggle to represent abstract meaning such as idiomatic interpretations of noun compounds. To study whether high visual fidelity interferes with idiomatic compositionality under visual abstraction, we introduce DIVA, a controlled benchmark that replaces high-fidelity visual detail with schematic iconicity by generating paired, sense-anchored visualizations for literal and idiomatic readings. We further propose Semantic Alignment Gap ($Δ$), an architecture-agnostic metric that quantifies divergence between literal and idiomatic visual grounding. We additionally introduce a directional signed bias $b(t)$ to separately measure the direction and strength of literal preference. Evaluating 8 recent VLMs, we reveal a consistent Literal Superiority Bias: model scale alone does not resolve literal preference, and increased visual fidelity is associated with weaker symbolic alignment, suggesting cognitive interference from hyper-realistic imagery. Our findings suggest that improving compositional understanding requires iconographic abstraction of visual input and anchoring interpretation and generation in intended meaning.

</details>


### [251] [Mix and Match: Context Pairing for Scalable Topic-Controlled Educational Summarisation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18087)
*Nathikan Yodthapa,Thanapong Intharah,Sahan Bulathwela*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出一种成对数据增强方法，通过混合不同文档的上下文生成对比训练样本，使小语言模型（T5-base）在主题可控摘要任务中达到与大型模型相当的性能，且参数和真实训练数据量显著更少。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有主题可控摘要方法依赖大规模模型和大量真实标注数据，小语言模型在此任务上表现不足，需要有效的训练策略来提升其能力。

Method: 提出成对数据增强方法：从不同文档中混合上下文创建对比训练样本，使模型学习主题与摘要之间的对应关系。基于SciTLDR数据集并引入Wikipedia主题，系统评估增强规模对性能的影响。

Result: 随着数据增强规模增加，胜率和语义对齐度持续提升；T5-base模型在参数和真实训练数据远少于大型模型的情况下，达到与其竞争的性能。

Conclusion: 成对数据增强策略能有效提升小语言模型在主题可控摘要任务上的表现，为资源受限场景下训练高效摘要模型提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Topic-controlled summarisation enables users to generate summaries focused on specific aspects of source documents. This paper investigates a data augmentation strategy for training small language models (sLMs) to perform topic-controlled summarisation. We propose a pairwise data augmentation method that combines contexts from different documents to create contrastive training examples, enabling models to learn the relationship between topics and summaries more effectively. Using the SciTLDR dataset enriched with Wikipedia-derived topics, we systematically evaluate how augmentation scale affects model performance. Results show consistent improvements in win rate and semantic alignment as the augmentation scale increases, while the amount of real training data remains fixed. Consequently, a T5-base model trained with our augmentation approach achieves competitive performance relative to larger models, despite using significantly fewer parameters and substantially fewer real training examples.

</details>


### [252] [On the Emergence of Syntax by Means of Local Interaction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17857)
*Zichao Wei*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 一个仅含18,658个参数的二维神经细胞自动机(NCA)，仅通过1比特边界信号监督训练，在处理算术表达式语法的成员判定问题时，其内部网格自发自组织为一种名为Proto-CKY的有序空间表征，满足句法处理的三个操作标准(超越正则语言的表达能力、训练分布外的结构泛化、与语法结构定量对齐，Pearson r≈0.71)，在四种上下文无关语法上独立涌现并能在扰动后自发再生，该表征功能上对齐CKY算法但形式上与之不同，是一种物理原型，其与数学理想之间的系统距离承载着关于物理基质本身的信息。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究句法处理能否从纯粹的局部交互中自发涌现，即在无显式句法监督的情况下，仅通过局部规则和极简的边界信号，一个简单系统能否自主发展出类似句法分析的能力。

Method: 使用一个18,658参数的二维神经细胞自动机(NCA)，仅以1比特边界信号作为监督信号，训练其解决算术表达式语法的成员判定问题。训练后分析其内部L×L网格的自组织表征结构，通过表达能力测试、结构泛化测试和与语法结构的相关性分析来验证句法处理能力。

Result: NCA内部网格自发自组织为名为Proto-CKY的有序空间表征，满足三个句法处理标准：(1)超越正则语言的表达能力；(2)训练分布外的结构泛化能力；(3)内部组织与语法结构定量对齐(Pearson r≈0.71)。该现象在四种上下文无关语法上独立涌现，且能在扰动后自发再生。

Conclusion: 句法处理可以从纯粹的局部交互中自发涌现，Proto-CKY作为CKY算法的物理原型，功能上对齐但形式上不同，其与数学理想之间的系统距离承载着关于物理基质本身的信息，为理解神经系统中句法能力的涌现提供了新视角。

Abstract: Can syntactic processing emerge spontaneously from purely local interaction? We present a concrete instance on a minimal system: an 18,658-parameter two-dimensional neural cellular automaton (NCA), supervised by nothing more than a 1-bit boundary signal, is trained on the membership problem of an arithmetic-expression grammar. After training, its internal $L \times L$ grid spontaneously self-organizes into an ordered, spatially extended representation that we name Proto-CKY. This representation satisfies three operational criteria for syntactic processing: expressive power beyond the regular languages, structural generalization beyond the training distribution, and an internal organization quantitatively aligned with grammatical structure (Pearson $r \approx 0.71$). It emerges independently on four context-free grammars and regenerates spontaneously after perturbation. Proto-CKY is functionally aligned with the CKY algorithm but formally distinct from it: it is a physical prototype, a concrete instantiation of a mathematical ideal on a physical substrate, and the systematic distance between the two carries information about the substrate itself.

</details>


### [253] [Concurrent Criterion Validation of a Validity Screen for LLM Confidence Signals via Selective Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17716)
*Jon-Paul Cacioli*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 效度筛子（Validity Screen）将LLM置信度信号分为有效、不确定、无效三类，这三类分类能显著预测选择性预测性能，效应量极大（d=2.81），三类排序单调（无效<不确定<有效），解释了AUROC中47%的方差。DeepSeek-R1在10%覆盖率下准确率从85.3%暴跌至11.3%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 验证效度筛子（Validity Screen）这一分类框架是否能预测LLM的选择性预测性能，即模型在何时应该输出预测、何时应该弃权。

Method: 对7个系列的20个前沿LLM进行524项测试（6个认知轨道），使用效度筛子将模型置信度信号分为有效、不确定、无效三类，然后评估各类型的选择性预测AUROC，并进行分半交叉验证。

Result: 有效模型平均AUROC=0.624（SD=0.048），无效模型平均AUROC=0.357（SD=0.231），Cohen's d=2.81，p=0.002。三类单调排序：无效(0.357)<不确定(0.554)<有效(0.624)。三类分类解释了AUROC中47%的方差。分半交叉验证中位数d=1.77，P(d>0)=1.0。DeepSeek-R1从全覆盖准确率85.3%降至10%覆盖率时的11.3%。

Conclusion: 效度筛子能有效预测LLM的选择性预测性能，该分类框架对于选择性预测任务具有重要意义。

Abstract: The validity screen (Cacioli, 2026d, 2026e) classifies LLM confidence signals as Valid, Indeterminate, or Invalid. We test whether these classifications predict selective prediction performance. Twenty frontier LLMs from seven families were evaluated on 524 items across six cognitive tracks. Valid models show mean Type 2 AUROC = .624 (SD = .048). Invalid models show mean AUROC = .357 (SD = .231). Cohen's d = 2.81, p = .002. The tiers order monotonically: Invalid (.357) < Indeterminate (.554) < Valid (.624). Split-half cross-validation yields median d = 1.77, P(d > 0) = 1.0 across 1,000 splits. The three-tier classification accounts for 47% of the variance in AUROC. DeepSeek-R1 drops from 85.3% accuracy at full coverage to 11.3% at 10% coverage. The screen predicts the criterion. For selective prediction, the screen matters.

</details>


### [254] [Agents Explore but Agents Ignore: LLMs Lack Environmental Curiosity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17609)
*Leon Engländer,Sophia Althammer,Ahmet Üstün,Matthias Gallé,Tom Sherborne*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 当前基于LLM的智能体缺乏"环境好奇心"——尽管能在环境中发现完整任务解决方案（79-81%），但主动利用这些方案的比率极低（7-50%）。智能体会获取环境中的预期信息，但不会据此修正策略或最大化利用有用刺激。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 挑战"LLM智能体能自然地将环境观察整合到推理中"这一普遍假设，证明即使环境中明确暴露了完整解决方案，智能体也未能识别并利用这些发现。

Method: 在Terminal-Bench、SWE-Bench、AppWorld三个基准中，向智能体环境中注入完整任务解决方案，测量智能体"发现"与"利用/交互"解决方案之间的差距，并分析影响环境好奇心的三个因素：智能体脚手架中的可用工具、测试时计算量、训练数据分布。

Result: Terminal-Bench中智能体发现率79-81%，但利用率仅37-50%；AppWorld中90%以上尝试看到了说明文档，但利用率低于7%。优化好奇心配置后性能提升，但即使在最佳配置下，多数试验中智能体仍忽略已发现的解决方案。

Conclusion: 当前LLM智能体缺乏环境好奇心，无法识别和调查意外但相关的观察。智能体将环境仅用于获取预期信息，而非动态修正策略或最大化利用环境中的有用刺激。

Abstract: LLM-based agents are assumed to integrate environmental observations into their reasoning: discovering highly relevant but unexpected information should naturally lead to a model exploiting its own discoveries. We show that this assumption is false for current LLM-based agents, which struggle to reflect or react to unexpected information. Across three benchmarks (Terminal-Bench, SWE-Bench, AppWorld), we inject complete task solutions into the agent environments to deliberately expose a task's solution to a model. While agents discover these solutions on Terminal-Bench in 79-81% of runs, they interact, or exploit, them in only 37-50% of cases. This gap is starkest in AppWorld: agents see documentation stating that a command "returns the complete solution to this task" in over 90% of attempts but exploit this in fewer than 7% of trials. We show that agents lack what we call environmental curiosity: the capability to recognize and investigate unexpected but relevant observations in response to environmental stimuli. We identify three main factors influencing environmental curiosity: available tools in the agent scaffold, test-time compute, and training data distribution. Our findings identify configurations that maximize curiosity also achieve the best performance on the unmodified benchmarks. Yet even jointly optimized agents still ignore discovered solutions in the majority of trials: current agents use the environment to fetch expected information, but not to revise their strategy or maximally exploit useful stimuli.

</details>


### [255] [PDDL-Mind: Large Language Models are Capable on Belief Reasoning with Reliable State Tracking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17819)
*Wang Bill Zhu,Qiutong Tony Yi,Robin Jia,Jesse Thomason*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 现有LLM在心理理论任务上表现不佳主要源于隐式状态跟踪不可靠，而非高级推理能力不足。本文提出神经符号框架PDDL-Mind，通过将叙述翻译为PDDL中的显式状态和动作，并验证动作引发的状态转移，为LLM提供逻辑一致的显式世界状态表示。在MMToM-QA、MuMA和FanToM基准上，PDDL-Mind相比最佳现有方法取得超过5%的绝对准确率提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM在心理理论基准上远低于人类水平，即使使用思维链提示或概率信念更新也无法解决。作者认为失败主因是隐式状态跟踪不可靠，而非高级推理能力不足。

Method: 提出PDDL-Mind神经符号框架：将叙述翻译为PDDL中的显式状态和动作，通过验证动作引发的状态转移来确保逻辑一致性，为LLM提供显式的世界状态表示用于心理理论任务。

Result: 在MMToM-QA、MuMA和FanToM三个基准上，PDDL-Mind相比最佳现有方法取得超过5%的绝对准确率提升。

Conclusion: LLM在心理理论任务上的失败主要源于隐式状态跟踪不可靠；通过神经符号方法提供显式逻辑一致的状态表示，可显著提升LLM的心理理论能力。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) perform substantially below human level on existing theory-of-mind (ToM) benchmarks, even when augmented with chain-of-thought prompting or probabilistic belief updates. We argue that these failures primarily arise from unreliable implicit state tracking rather than limitations in high-level reasoning. We introduce PDDL-Mind, a neuro-symbolic framework that decouples environment state evolution from belief inference. By translating narrative descriptions into explicit states and actions expressed in Planning Domain Definition Language (PDDL), and by verifying action-induced state transitions against a predefined domain, PDDL-Mind provides LLMs with a logically consistent and explicit representation of world states for ToM tasks. Experiments on MMToM-QA, MuMA and FanToM show that PDDL-Mind achieves over 5% absolute accuracy gain over the best existing state-of-the-art method on ToM benchmark questions.

</details>


### [256] [Self-Consistency from Only Two Samples: CoT-PoT Ensembling for Efficient LLM Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17433)
*Raman Saparkhan,Majd Hawasly,Md Rizwan Parvez,Mohammad Raza*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出混合集成方法，结合Chain-of-Thought和Program-of-Thought两种推理模式用于自一致性，在保持或提升准确率的同时，将所需样本数减少9.3倍，78.6%的任务仅需2个样本即可完成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自一致性技术虽能提升LLM推理准确率，但需要大量采样导致计算成本高昂，亟需一种更高效的采样策略。

Method: 提出CoT-PoT混合集成框架，结合两种推理模式的互补优势，设计了完整采样和早停两种策略。

Result: 相比传统SC方法，样本需求减少9.3倍；78.6%的任务仅需2个样本即可完成。

Conclusion: CoT-PoT集成不仅提升整体准确率，还大幅降低自一致性所需的采样数量，为高效推理提供了新范式。

Abstract: Self-consistency (SC) is a popular technique for improving the reasoning accuracy of large language models by aggregating multiple sampled outputs, but it comes at a high computational cost due to extensive sampling. We introduce a hybrid ensembling approach that leverages the complementary strengths of two distinct modes of reasoning: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) and Program-of-Thought (PoT). We describe a general framework for combining these two forms of reasoning in self-consistency, as well as particular strategies for both full sampling and early-stopping. We show that CoT-PoT ensembling not only improves overall accuracy, but also drastically reduces the number of samples required for SC by a factor of 9.3x. In particular, the majority of tasks (78.6%) can be addressed with only two samples, which has not been possible with any prior SC methods.

</details>


<div id='cs.GR'></div>

# cs.GR [[Back]](#toc)

### [257] [SketchFaceGS: Real-Time Sketch-Driven Face Editing and Generation with Gaussian Splatting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19202)
*Bo Li,Jiahao Kang,Yubo Ma,Feng-Lin Liu,Bin Liu,Fang-Lue Zhang,Lin Gao*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: SketchFaceGS：首个从2D草图实时生成和编辑逼真3D高斯头部模型的框架，采用粗到细架构，支持自由视角实时编辑。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 3D高斯表示在数字头部建模中展现出强大能力，但直观交互式的创建和编辑仍然困难。2D草图作为快速直观的概念设计交互方式，存在稀疏、深度模糊、缺乏高频外观线索等问题，难以在实时约束下从笔画推断密集、几何一致的3D高斯结构。

Method: 提出SketchFaceGS框架，采用前馈式粗到细架构：1）基于Transformer的UV特征预测模块从输入草图重建粗略但几何一致的UV特征图；2）3D UV特征增强模块用高频逼真细节进行细化，生成高保真3D头部。编辑方面引入UV掩码融合技术和分层特征融合策略，实现精确的实时自由视角修改。

Result: 大量实验表明，SketchFaceGS在生成保真度和编辑灵活性方面优于现有方法，能够通过单次前向传播从草图生成高质量、可编辑的3D头部模型。

Conclusion: SketchFaceGS是首个草图驱动的实时3D高斯头部生成和编辑框架，解决了从稀疏2D草图推断密集3D结构的挑战，实现了直观交互式数字头部建模。
