Abstract: 3D Gaussian representations have emerged as a powerful paradigm for digital head modeling, achieving photorealistic quality with real-time rendering. However, intuitive and interactive creation or editing of 3D Gaussian head models remains challenging. Although 2D sketches provide an ideal interaction modality for fast, intuitive conceptual design, they are sparse, depth-ambiguous, and lack high-frequency appearance cues, making it difficult to infer dense, geometrically consistent 3D Gaussian structures from strokes - especially under real-time constraints. To address these challenges, we propose SketchFaceGS, the first sketch-driven framework for real-time generation and editing of photorealistic 3D Gaussian head models from 2D sketches. Our method uses a feed-forward, coarse-to-fine architecture. A Transformer-based UV feature-prediction module first reconstructs a coarse but geometrically consistent UV feature map from the input sketch, and then a 3D UV feature enhancement module refines it with high-frequency, photorealistic detail to produce a high-fidelity 3D head. For editing, we introduce a UV Mask Fusion technique combined with a layer-by-layer feature-fusion strategy, enabling precise, real-time, free-viewpoint modifications. Extensive experiments show that SketchFaceGS outperforms existing methods in both generation fidelity and editing flexibility, producing high-quality, editable 3D heads from sketches in a single forward pass.

</details>


<div id='cs.SI'></div>

# cs.SI [[Back]](#toc)

### [258] [Optimal Exploration of New Products under Assortment Decisions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18800)
*Jackie Baek,Atanas Dinev,Thodoris Lykouris*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 平台在容量约束下通过产品组合决策进行在线学习，研究新产品探索策略：是否与热门现有产品搭配，以及多新产品同时探索的数量阈值结构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 平台需要对新上市产品进行探索以获取质量信息，但探索成本高（新产品需求低于现有产品）。质量信息通过社会学习传播：顾客购买并留下评论后，质量信息才被揭示。平台面临如何通过产品组合决策最小化遗憾的优化问题。

Method: 研究在线学习框架下容量约束的产品组合决策问题。分析两个关键问题：(1)新产品应单独提供还是与现有产品搭配；(2)多个新产品应同时探索还是顺序探索。使用遗憾最小化框架，分析最优探索策略的结构特性。

Result: 1. 新产品应与顶级现有产品搭配，尽管这会降低新产品购买概率，但总体最优；2. 同时探索的新产品数量具有简单阈值结构：随新产品"潜力"增加而增加，但意外地不依赖个体购买概率；3. 经典bandit算法（UCB和Thompson Sampling）在此场景下均失败：UCB过度探索，Thompson Sampling探索不足。

Conclusion: 平台通过产品组合决策学习新产品质量时，应采取与热门现有产品搭配的策略，并根据新产品潜力决定同时探索的数量。经典bandit算法不适用于此社会学习场景，需要专门设计的探索策略。研究结果为平台如何通过产品组合决策学习新产品提供了结构性见解。

Abstract: We study online learning for new products on a platform that makes capacity-constrained assortment decisions on which products to offer. For a newly listed product, its quality is initially unknown, and quality information propagates through social learning: when a customer purchases a new product and leaves a review, its quality is revealed to both the platform and future customers. Since reviews require purchases, the platform must feature new products in the assortment ("explore") to generate reviews to learn about new products. Such exploration is costly because customer demand for new products is lower than for incumbent products. We characterize the optimal assortments for exploration to minimize regret, addressing two questions. (1) Should the platform offer a new product alone or alongside incumbent products? The former maximizes the purchase probability of the new product but yields lower short-term revenue. Despite the lower purchase probability, we show it is always optimal to pair the new product with the top incumbent products. (2) With multiple new products, should the platform explore them simultaneously or one at a time? We show that the optimal number of new products to explore simultaneously has a simple threshold structure: it increases with the "potential" of the new products and, surprisingly, does not depend on their individual purchase probabilities. We also show that two canonical bandit algorithms, UCB and Thompson Sampling, both fail in this setting for opposite reasons: UCB over-explores while Thompson Sampling under-explores. Our results provide structural insights on how platforms should learn about new products through assortment decisions.

</details>


<div id='eess.SY'></div>

# eess.SY [[Back]](#toc)

### [259] [Safety-Critical Contextual Control via Online Riemannian Optimization with World Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19639)
*Tongxin Li*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出基于惩罚预测控制(PPC)的样本安全控制框架，通过黑盒模拟器构建可行性流形，利用黎曼几何指导规划器梯度下降，上下文信号提升安全边界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代世界模型过于复杂难以显式描述动力学，需要处理安全关键上下文控制问题，其中规划器只能使用黑盒模拟器提供的可行性样本来优化任务目标。

Method: 基于在线黎曼优化的惩罚预测控制框架，模拟器将可行性流形压缩为基于分数的密度估计，为动作空间赋予黎曼几何结构指导梯度下降，利用障碍曲率控制收敛和安全边界。

Result: 建立了上下文安全边界理论，证明到真实可行性流形的距离由分数估计误差和障碍曲率相关比率控制，两者都随上下文丰富度提升而改善。动态导航任务仿真显示上下文PPC显著优于边缘和冻结密度模型。

Conclusion: 提出的上下文PPC框架为复杂黑盒系统的安全控制提供了理论基础，通过黎曼几何和障碍曲率概念替代未知动力学的Lipschitz常数，上下文信号能有效提升安全性和适应性。

Abstract: Modern world models are becoming too complex to admit explicit dynamical descriptions. We study safety-critical contextual control, where a Planner must optimize a task objective using only feasibility samples from a black-box Simulator, conditioned on a context signal $ξ_t$. We develop a sample-based Penalized Predictive Control (PPC) framework grounded in online Riemannian optimization, in which the Simulator compresses the feasibility manifold into a score-based density $\hat{p}(u \mid ξ_t)$ that endows the action space with a Riemannian geometry guiding the Planner's gradient descent. The barrier curvature $κ(ξ_t)$, the minimum curvature of the conditional log-density $-\ln\hat{p}(\cdot\midξ_t)$, governs both convergence rate and safety margin, replacing the Lipschitz constant of the unknown dynamics. Our main result is a contextual safety bound showing that the distance from the true feasibility manifold is controlled by the score estimation error and a ratio that depends on $κ(ξ_t)$, both of which improve with richer context. Simulations on a dynamic navigation task confirm that contextual PPC substantially outperforms marginal and frozen density models, with the advantage growing after environment shifts.

</details>


### [260] [Scheduling Analysis of UAV Flight Control Workloads using Raspberry Pi 5 Using PREEMPT_RT Linux](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19275)
*Luiz Giacomossi,Håkan Forsberg,Ivan Tomasic,Baran Çürüklü,Tommaso Cucinotta*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: PREEMPT RT Linux在Raspberry Pi 5上显著改善250Hz控制循环的实时性能，将最坏情况延迟从9ms降低到225微秒，但剩余抖动主要由硬件内存争用引起。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代无人机架构趋向于在单一通用操作系统上统一高级自主性和低级飞行控制，但复杂多核SoC中的共享资源争用引入了显著的时序不确定性，需要评估实时内核解决方案的有效性。

Method: 在Raspberry Pi 5上对PREEMPT RT Linux内核进行架构分析，特别隔离内核激活路径（延迟执行的SoftIRQ与实时直接激活）对250Hz控制循环的影响，在重负载压力下测试性能。

Result: 标准内核在重负载下不适合实时控制，最坏情况延迟超过9ms；PREEMPT RT将最坏情况延迟降低近88%至225微秒以下，通过强制直接唤醒路径减轻操作系统噪声。

Conclusion: PREEMPT RT有效解决了调度方差问题，但现代SoC上的剩余抖动主要由硬件内存争用驱动，表明需要硬件级优化来进一步改善实时性能。

Abstract: Modern UAV architectures increasingly aim to unify high-level autonomy and low-level flight control on a single General-Purpose Operating System (GPOS). However, complex multi-core System-on-Chips (SoCs) introduce significant timing indeterminism due to shared resource contention. This paper performs an architectural analysis of the PREEMPT RT Linux kernel on a Raspberry Pi 5, specifically isolating the impact of kernel activation paths (deferred execution SoftIRQs versus real-time direct activation) on a 250 Hz control loop. Results show that under heavy stress, the standard kernel is unsuitable, exhibiting worst-case latencies exceeding 9 ms. In contrast, PREEMPT RT reduced the worst-case latency by nearly 88 percent to under 225 microseconds, enforcing a direct wake-up path that mitigates OS noise. These findings demonstrate that while PREEMPT RT resolves scheduling variance, the residual jitter on modern SoCs is primarily driven by hardware memory contention.

</details>


### [261] [Safe Control using Learned Safety Filters and Adaptive Conformal Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18482)
*Sacha Huriot,Ihab Tabbara,Hussein Sibai*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: ACoFi结合学习型安全滤波器与自适应共形推理，通过动态调整切换阈值来保证控制系统的安全性，提供软安全保证而非硬保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统安全滤波器合成方法面临可扩展性挑战，而学习型方法在高维系统中存在决策误差，影响安全保证的可靠性。

Method: ACoFi结合学习型Hamilton-Jacobi可达性安全滤波器与自适应共形推理，根据预测误差动态调整切换标准，使用名义策略输出的安全值范围量化安全评估的不确定性。

Result: ACoFi保证名义策略预测安全的不确定性量化错误率渐近上界为用户定义参数，在Dubins汽车仿真和Safety Gymnasium环境中显著优于固定切换阈值基线方法，在分布外场景中表现更优。

Conclusion: ACoFi通过自适应共形推理增强了学习型安全滤波器的可靠性，提供了可证明的软安全保证，在高维控制系统中具有实际应用价值。

Abstract: Safety filters have been shown to be effective tools to ensure the safety of control systems with unsafe nominal policies. To address scalability challenges in traditional synthesis methods, learning-based approaches have been proposed for designing safety filters for systems with high-dimensional state and control spaces. However, the inevitable errors in the decisions of these models raise concerns about their reliability and the safety guarantees they offer. This paper presents Adaptive Conformal Filtering (ACoFi), a method that combines learned Hamilton-Jacobi reachability-based safety filters with adaptive conformal inference. Under ACoFi, the filter dynamically adjusts its switching criteria based on the observed errors in its predictions of the safety of actions. The range of possible safety values of the nominal policy's output is used to quantify uncertainty in safety assessment. The filter switches from the nominal policy to the learned safe one when that range suggests it might be unsafe. We show that ACoFi guarantees that the rate of incorrectly quantifying uncertainty in the predicted safety of the nominal policy is asymptotically upper bounded by a user-defined parameter. This gives a soft safety guarantee rather than a hard safety guarantee. We evaluate ACoFi in a Dubins car simulation and a Safety Gymnasium environment, empirically demonstrating that it significantly outperforms the baseline method that uses a fixed switching threshold by achieving higher learned safety values and fewer safety violations, especially in out-of-distribution scenarios.

</details>


### [262] [Safe and Energy-Aware Multi-Robot Density Control via PDE-Constrained Optimization for Long-Duration Autonomy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15524)
*Longchen Niu,Andrew Nasif,Gennaro Notomista*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出了一种多机器人系统的密度控制框架，具有空间安全性和能量可持续性保证，通过Fokker-Planck PDE描述随机运动，结合控制Lyapunov和屏障函数实现目标密度跟踪、避障和能量管理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多机器人系统在不确定环境下需要同时保证空间安全（避免碰撞和障碍物）和能量可持续性（多充电周期运行），现有方法难以统一处理这些约束。

Method: 使用Fokker-Planck PDE在密度层面编码随机机器人运动，结合控制Lyapunov函数（用于目标密度跟踪）和控制屏障函数（用于避障和能量约束），构建二次规划实现实时控制。

Result: 控制器在定位和运动不确定性下有效，通过多机器人实验和大量仿真验证了框架在目标跟踪、避障和能量管理方面的性能。

Conclusion: 该框架为多机器人系统提供了统一的密度控制方法，能够同时保证空间安全和能量可持续性，适用于存在不确定性的实际应用场景。

Abstract: This paper presents a novel density control framework for multi-robot systems with spatial safety and energy sustainability guarantees. Stochastic robot motion is encoded through the Fokker-Planck Partial Differential Equation (PDE) at the density level. Control Lyapunov and control barrier functions are integrated with PDEs to enforce target density tracking, obstacle region avoidance, and energy sufficiency over multiple charging cycles. The resulting quadratic program enables fast in-the-loop implementation that adjusts commands in real-time. Multi-robot experiment and extensive simulations were conducted to demonstrate the effectiveness of the controller under localization and motion uncertainties.

</details>


### [263] [Synthesis and Deployment of Maximal Robust Control Barrier Functions through Adversarial Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13192)
*Donggeon David Oh,Duy P. Nguyen,Haimin Hu,Jaime Fernández Fisac*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习Q函数的鲁棒控制屏障函数（Q-CBF）框架，用于通用非线性系统在界不确定性下的安全约束，无需显式动力学模型，并在倒立摆和四足机器人仿真中验证了其保守性更低、鲁棒性更强。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有鲁棒CBF方法依赖显式的动力学封闭形式（如控制仿射）和不确定性模型，可扩展性和通用性有限，且只能认证最大鲁棒安全集的保守子集。

Method: 首先证明安全值函数（动态规划Isaacs方程的解）是有效的鲁棒离散时间CBF；然后引入强化学习中的Q函数，将屏障证书提升到状态-动作空间，得到鲁棒Q-CBF约束；结合对抗性RL，实现对黑箱动力学和未知不确定性结构的合成与部署。

Result: 在倒立摆基准上比基于屏障的基线方法获得更保守性更小的安全集；在36维四足机器人仿真中即使在对抗性不确定性下也能可靠地保障安全。

Conclusion: 提出的鲁棒Q-CBF框架克服了传统方法对显式动力学和不确定性模型的依赖，显著提升了安全约束的通用性、可扩展性和鲁棒性。

Abstract: Robust control barrier functions (CBFs) provide a principled mechanism for smooth safety enforcement under worst-case disturbances. However, existing approaches typically rely on explicit, closed-form structure in the dynamics (e.g., control-affine) and uncertainty models. This has led to limited scalability and generality, with most robust CBFs certifying only conservative subsets of the maximal robust safe set. In this paper, we introduce a new robust CBF framework for general nonlinear systems under bounded uncertainty. We first show that the safety value function solving the dynamic programming Isaacs equation is a valid robust discrete-time CBF that enforces safety on the maximal robust safe set. We then adopt the key reinforcement learning (RL) notion of quality function (or Q-function), which removes the need for explicit dynamics by lifting the barrier certificate into state-action space and yields a novel robust Q-CBF constraint for safety filtering. Combined with adversarial RL, this enables the synthesis and deployment of robust Q-CBFs on general nonlinear systems with black-box dynamics and unknown uncertainty structure. We validate the framework on a canonical inverted pendulum benchmark and a 36-D quadruped simulator, achieving substantially less conservative safe sets than barrier-based baselines on the pendulum and reliable safety enforcement even under adversarial uncertainty realizations on the quadruped.

</details>


### [264] [Dynamic Multi-Robot Task Allocation under Uncertainty and Communication Constraints: A Game-Theoretic Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11954)
*Maria G. Mendoza,Pan-Yang Su,Bryce L. Ferguson,S. Shankar Sastry*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文研究不确定任务完成、时间窗约束和不完全信息下的动态多机器人任务分配问题。提出一种去中心化策略IBR（迭代最佳响应），每个智能体选择对局部观测福利边际贡献最大的任务。在最多100架无人机的大规模包裹配送场景中，与EDD、匈牙利算法和SCoBA相比，IBR在完全和稀疏通信下均实现了有竞争力的任务完成性能，且计算时间更低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在处理任务完成不确定性、时间窗口约束以及不完全信息（有限感知和通信）的复杂动态多机器人任务分配问题时存在局限，亟需一种计算高效且鲁棒的去中心化分配策略。

Method: 提出IBR（迭代最佳响应）去中心化策略，每个智能体基于局部感知信息，选择对其局部观测福利边际贡献最大的任务；结合枢纽感知区域和通信图建模不完全信息。

Result: 在最多100架无人机的大规模包裹配送场景中，IBR在完全和稀疏通信条件下均达到有竞争力的任务完成率，且计算时间低于EDD、匈牙利算法和SCoBA三种基线方法。

Conclusion: IBR作为一种去中心化方法，能够在不完全信息和有限通信条件下实现高效且可扩展的动态多机器人任务分配，适用于大规模现实场景。

Abstract: We study dynamic multi-robot task allocation under uncertain task completion, time-window constraints, and incomplete information. Tasks arrive online over a finite horizon and must be completed within specified deadlines, while agents operate from distributed hubs with limited sensing and communication. We model incomplete information through hub-based sensing regions that determine task visibility and a communication graph that governs inter-hub information exchange. Using this framework, we propose Iterative Best Response (IBR), a decentralized policy in which each agent selects the task that maximizes its marginal contribution to the locally observed welfare. We compare IBR against three baselines: Earliest Due Date first (EDD), Hungarian algorithm, and Stochastic Conflict-Based Allocation (SCoBA), on a city-scale package-delivery domain with up to 100 drones and varying task arrival scenarios. Under full and sparse communication, IBR achieves competitive task-completion performance with lower computation time.

</details>


### [265] [Target Parameterization in Diffusion Models for Nonlinear Spatiotemporal System Identification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17566)
*Achraf El Messaoudi,Noureddine Khaous,Karim Cherifi*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文研究了扩散模型在非线性时空系统辨识中的目标参数化选择，发现与噪声或速度预测相比，直接预测清洁状态（clean-state prediction）在湍流等复杂系统中能显著提升滚动稳定性并降低长期预测误差，且这种优势随着每个token维度的增加而更加明显。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典的非线性系统辨识和预测方法在湍流等复杂动态场景中可靠性显著下降，而现有的扩散模型大多继承了图像生成中的目标参数化（如噪声预测或速度预测），但这种设计在时空系统辨识中的适用性尚未被充分研究。

Method: 采用一个简洁的自包含patch-based transformer，直接对物理场进行操作，并以湍流模拟作为代表性测试平台，对比清洁状态预测、速度预测和噪声预测三种目标参数化方式的效果。

Result: 清洁状态预测在滚动稳定性和长期预测误差方面始终优于速度和噪声目标，且优势随每个token维度的增加而增强。

Conclusion: 目标参数化是扩散模型用于非线性空间输出系统辨识的关键设计选择，清洁状态预测更适合湍流等复杂动态场景。

Abstract: Machine learning is becoming increasingly important for nonlinear system identification, including dynamical systems with spatially distributed outputs. However, classical identification and forecasting approaches become markedly less reliable in turbulent-flow regimes, where the dynamics are high-dimensional, strongly nonlinear, and highly sensitive to compounding rollout errors. Diffusion-based models have recently shown improved robustness in this setting and offer probabilistic inference capabilities, but many current implementations inherit target parameterizations from image generation, most commonly noise or velocity prediction. In this work, we revisit this design choice in the context of nonlinear spatiotemporal system identification. We consider a simple, self-contained patch-based transformer that operates directly on physical fields and use turbulent flow simulation as a representative testbed. Our results show that clean-state prediction consistently improves rollout stability and reduces long-horizon error relative to velocity- and noise-based objectives, with the advantage becoming more pronounced as the per-token dimensionality increases. These findings identify target parameterization as a key modeling choice in diffusion-based identification of nonlinear systems with spatial outputs in turbulent regimes.

</details>


<div id='cs.CR'></div>

# cs.CR [[Back]](#toc)

### [266] [Evaluating LLM-Generated Obfuscated XSS Payloads for Machine Learning-Based Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19526)
*Divyesh Gabbireddy,Suman Saha*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种使用大语言模型生成和评估混淆XSS载荷的结构化流程，通过浏览器运行时评估确保行为有效性，但发现当前LLM在生成行为保持的混淆载荷方面仍有困难。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: XSS攻击的混淆变换使得传统和基于机器学习的检测系统难以可靠识别攻击。现有混淆载荷生成方法强调语法多样性，但无法确保生成样本的行为有效性，需要一种结合运行时行为评估的生成方法。

Method: 提出结构化流程：结合确定性变换技术和基于LLM的生成，使用基于浏览器的运行时评估程序在受控执行环境中比较载荷行为。通过微调行为保持的源-目标混淆对来改进生成质量。

Result: 未调优基线语言模型的运行时行为匹配率为0.15，微调后提高到0.22。添加生成载荷未改善检测性能，但经过行为过滤的生成样本可以纳入而不显著降低性能。

Conclusion: 研究展示了生成模型在对抗性安全数据生成方面的潜力和局限性，强调运行时行为检查对于提高下游检测系统生成数据质量的重要性。

Abstract: Cross-site scripting (XSS) remains a persistent web security vulnerability, especially because obfuscation can change the surface form of a malicious payload while preserving its behavior. These transformations make it difficult for traditional and machine learning-based detection systems to reliably identify attacks. Existing approaches for generating obfuscated payloads often emphasize syntactic diversity, but they do not always ensure that the generated samples remain behaviorally valid. This paper presents a structured pipeline for generating and evaluating obfuscated XSS payloads using large language models (LLMs). The pipeline combines deterministic transformation techniques with LLM-based generation and uses a browser- based runtime evaluation procedure to compare payload behavior in a controlled execution environment. This allows generated samples to be assessed through observable runtime behavior rather than syntactic similarity alone. In the evaluation, an untuned baseline language model achieves a runtime behavior match rate of 0.15, while fine-tuning on behavior-preserving source-target obfuscation pairs improves the match rate to 0.22. Although this represents a measurable improvement, the results show that current LLMs still struggle to generate obfuscations that preserve observed runtime behavior. A downstream classifier evaluation further shows that adding generated payloads does not improve detection performance in this setting, although behavior- filtered generated samples can be incorporated without materially degrading performance. Overall, the study demonstrates both the promise and the limits of applying generative models to adversarial security data generation and emphasizes the importance of runtime behavior checks in improving the quality of generated data for downstream detection systems.

</details>


### [267] [Sherpa.ai Privacy-Preserving Multi-Party Entity Alignment without Intersection Disclosure for Noisy Identifiers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19219)
*Daniel M. Jimenez-Gutierrez,Enrique Zuazua,Georgios Kellaris,Joaquin Del Rio,Oleksii Sliusarenko,Xabi Uribe-Etxebarria*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: Sherpa.ai提出了一种多方的隐私保护实体对齐协议，用于垂直联邦学习，支持精确和容错匹配，保护交集成员隐私


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 垂直联邦学习需要隐私保护的实体对齐，传统PSI方法会泄露交集成员信息，现有PSU方法局限于两方且缺乏容错匹配能力

Method: 提出多方的PSU协议，将两方方法扩展到多方，通信开销低，提供有序版本（精确对齐）和无序版本（容错匹配），证明正确性和隐私性

Result: 协议能隐藏交集成员信息，支持精确和容错匹配，分析通信和计算复杂度，形式化通用索引映射，适用于实际VFL部署

Conclusion: 该多方PSU协议为垂直联邦学习提供了可扩展、数学基础扎实的隐私保护实体对齐方案，保护交集隐私，适用于医疗、金融等跨域应用

Abstract: Federated Learning (FL) enables collaborative model training among multiple parties without centralizing raw data. There are two main paradigms in FL: Horizontal FL (HFL), where all participants share the same feature space but hold different samples, and Vertical FL (VFL), where parties possess complementary features for the same set of samples. A prerequisite for VFL training is privacy-preserving entity alignment (PPEA), which establishes a common index of samples across parties (alignment) without revealing which samples are shared between them. Conventional private set intersection (PSI) achieves alignment but leaks intersection membership, exposing sensitive relationships between datasets. The standard private set union (PSU) mitigates this risk by aligning on the union of identifiers rather than the intersection. However, existing approaches are often limited to two parties or lack support for typo-tolerant matching.
  In this paper, we introduce the Sherpa.ai multi-party PSU protocol for VFL, a PPEA method that hides intersection membership and enables both exact and noisy matching. The protocol generalizes two-party approaches to multiple parties with low communication overhead and offers two variants: an order-preserving version for exact alignment and an unordered version tolerant to typographical and formatting discrepancies. We prove correctness and privacy, analyze communication and computational (exponentiation) complexity, and formalize a universal index mapping from local records to a shared index space. This multi-party PSU offers a scalable, mathematically grounded protocol for PPEA in real-world VFL deployments, such as multi-institutional healthcare disease detection, collaborative risk modeling between banks and insurers, and cross-domain fraud detection between telecommunications and financial institutions, while preserving intersection privacy.

</details>


### [268] [DP-FlogTinyLLM: Differentially private federated log anomaly detection using Tiny LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19118)
*Isaiah Thompson,Tanmay Sen,Ritwik Bhattacharya*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: DP-FLogTinyLLM：一种基于参数高效小语言模型的隐私保护联邦日志异常检测框架，在分布式环境中实现协作学习而不共享原始日志数据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实世界中的日志数据通常分布在多个组织中，由于隐私和安全限制无法集中化处理。现有的日志异常检测方法（包括基于大语言模型的方法）主要依赖集中式训练，不适合这种分布式环境。

Method: 提出DP-FLogTinyLLM框架，结合联邦优化与差分隐私实现隐私保护协作学习。采用低秩适应（LoRA）技术对每个客户端的小语言模型进行高效微调，以适应资源受限环境。

Result: 在Thunderbird和BGL数据集上的实验结果表明，该框架性能与集中式LLM方法相当，同时由于隐私机制带来额外计算开销。相比现有联邦基线方法，DP-FLogTinyLLM在精度和F1分数上表现更优，特别是在Thunderbird数据集上显示出显著优势。

Conclusion: DP-FLogTinyLLM框架在保护隐私的同时有效检测日志异常，显著减少误报，为分布式环境下的日志异常检测提供了可行的解决方案。

Abstract: Modern distributed systems generate massive volumes of log data that are critical for detecting anomalies and cyber threats. However, in real world settings, these logs are often distributed across multiple organizations and cannot be centralized due to privacy and security constraints. Existing log anomaly detection methods, including recent large language model (LLM) based approaches, largely rely on centralized training and are not suitable for such environments. In this paper, we propose DP-FLogTinyLLM, a privacy preserving federated framework for log anomaly detection using parameter efficient LLMs. Our approach enables collaborative learning without sharing raw log data by integrating federated optimization with differential privacy. To ensure scalability in resource constrained environments, we employ low rank adaptation (LoRA) for efficient fine tuning of Tiny LLMs at each client. Empirical results on the Thunderbird and BGL datasets show that the proposed framework matches the performance of centralized LLM based methods, while incurring additional computational overhead due to privacy mechanisms. Compared to existing federated baselines, DP-FLogTinyLLM consistently achieves higher precision and F1-score, with particularly strong gains on the Thunderbird dataset, highlighting its effectiveness in detecting anomalies while minimizing false positives.

</details>


### [269] [ProjLens: Unveiling the Role of Projectors in Multimodal Model Safety](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19083)
*Kun Wang,Cheng Qian,Miao Yu,Lilan Peng,Liang Lin,Jiaming Zhang,Tianyu Zhang,Yu Cheng,Yang Wang*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: ProjLens是一个可解释性框架，用于揭示多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）中后门攻击的机制，发现后门关键参数编码在投影器的低秩子空间中，且激活机制涉及语义偏移的线性缩放。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态大语言模型在跨模态理解和生成方面取得了显著成功，但其部署受到关键安全漏洞的威胁。先前工作已证明通过微调数据投毒在MLLMs中植入后门的可行性，但后门攻击的底层机制仍然不透明，这阻碍了对攻击的理解和缓解。

Method: 提出ProjLens可解释性框架，通过实验分析四种后门变体，发现：1）后门注入更新在整体上是满秩的，缺乏专门的"触发神经元"，但后门关键参数编码在投影器的低秩子空间中；2）激活机制涉及干净和中毒嵌入向共享方向（与后门目标对齐）的语义偏移，但偏移幅度与输入范数线性缩放，导致中毒样本上的独特后门激活。

Result: 研究表明，即使仅限于投影器微调的正常下游任务对齐也会引入后门注入的脆弱性，其激活机制与文本LLMs中观察到的不同。揭示了后门攻击的低秩结构和线性缩放激活机制。

Conclusion: ProjLens框架成功揭示了MLLMs后门攻击的底层机制，为理解和缓解这类安全威胁提供了重要见解。该工作强调了即使在有限微调场景下MLLMs的安全脆弱性，并为开发更健壮的防御方法奠定了基础。

Abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable success in cross-modal understanding and generation, yet their deployment is threatened by critical safety vulnerabilities. While prior works have demonstrated the feasibility of backdoors in MLLMs via fine-tuning data poisoning to manipulate inference, the underlying mechanisms of backdoor attacks remain opaque, complicating the understanding and mitigation. To bridge this gap, we propose ProjLens, an interpretability framework designed to demystify MLLMs backdoors. We first establish that normal downstream task alignment--even when restricted to projector fine--tuning--introduces vulnerability to backdoor injection, whose activation mechanism is different from that observed in text-only LLMs. Through extensive experiments across four backdoor variants, we uncover:(1) Low-Rank Structure: Backdoor injection updates appear overall full-rank and lack dedicated ``trigger neurons'', but the backdoor-critical parameters are encoded within a low-rank subspace of the projector;(2) Activation Mechanism: Both clean and poisoned embedding undergoes a semantic shift toward a shared direction aligned with the backdoor target, but the shifting magnitude scales linearly with the input norm, resulting in the distinct backdoor activation on poisoned samples. Our code is available at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/ProjLens-8FD7

</details>


### [270] [TrEEStealer: Stealing Decision Trees via Enclave Side Channels](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18716)
*Jonas Sander,Anja Rabich,Nick Mahling,Felix Maurer,Jonah Heller,Qifan Wang,Thomas Eisenbarth,David Oswald*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: TrEEStealer：一种针对TEE保护的决策树的高保真提取攻击，利用TEE侧信道窃取模型


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器学习模型在敏感和安全关键应用中广泛部署，模型提取攻击威胁MLaaS商业模式。现有黑盒提取攻击查询密集或假设过多，而TEE本应提供硬件隔离保护。然而，TEE存在侧信道漏洞，可被利用来提取受保护的决策树模型。

Method: 提出TrEEStealer攻击框架，利用TEE特定侧信道高效窃取决策树。核心是新颖算法，通过耦合控制流信息（CFI）与被动信息跟踪最大化每个查询的信息量。针对AMD SEV使用SEV-Step框架和性能计数器；针对Intel SGX在Xeon 6 CPU上构建新原语，通过分支历史寄存器提取推理运行的分支历史。攻击针对OpenCV、mlpack和emlearn三个流行库的漏洞。

Result: TrEEStealer在效率和提取保真度上优于现有攻击，建立了决策树提取的新技术水平。实验证明TEE无法防止控制流泄漏，攻击能够成功窃取受硬件保护的决策树模型。

Conclusion: TEE提供的硬件隔离不足以保护机器学习模型免受控制流泄漏攻击。TrEEStealer展示了利用TEE侧信道高效提取决策树的可能性，对MLaaS安全模型构成严重威胁，需要新的防护机制来应对此类攻击。

Abstract: Today, machine learning is widely applied in sensitive, security-related, and financially lucrative applications. Model extraction attacks undermine current business models where a model owner sells model access, e.g., via MLaaS APIs. Additionally, stolen models can enable powerful white-box attacks, facilitating privacy attacks on sensitive training data, and model evasion.
  In this paper, we focus on Decision Trees (DT), which are widely deployed in practice. Existing black-box extraction attacks for DTs are either query-intensive, make strong assumptions about the DT structure, or rely on rich API information. To limit attacks to the black-box setting, CPU vendors introduced Trusted Execution Environments (TEE) that use hardware-mechanisms to isolate workloads from external parties, e.g., MLaaS providers. We introduce TrEEStealer, a high-fidelity extraction attack for stealing TEE-protected DTs. TrEEStealer exploits TEE-specific side-channels to steal DTs efficiently and without strong assumptions about the API output or DT structure. The extraction efficacy stems from a novel algorithm that maximizes the information derived from each query by coupling Control-Flow Information (CFI) with passive information tracking. We use two primitives to acquire CFI: for AMD SEV, we follow previous work using the SEV-Step framework and performance counters. For Intel SGX, we reproduce prior findings on current Xeon 6 CPUs and construct a new primitive to efficiently extract the branch history of inference runs through the Branch-History-Register.
  We found corresponding vulnerabilities in three popular libraries: OpenCV, mlpack, and emlearn. We show that TrEEStealer achieves superior efficiency and extraction fidelity compared to prior attacks. Our work establishes a new state-of-the-art for DT extraction and confirms that TEEs fail to protect against control-flow leakage.

</details>


### [271] [Temporal UI State Inconsistency in Desktop GUI Agents: Formalizing and Defending Against TOCTOU Attacks on Computer-Use Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18860)
*Wenpeng Xu*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: GUI智能体通过截图-点击循环控制桌面计算机时存在观察-执行间隙漏洞，攻击者可在此期间篡改UI状态。论文提出预执行UI状态验证(PUSV)三层防御机制，能有效拦截前两种攻击，但对第三种DOM注入攻击存在盲区。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: GUI智能体控制桌面计算机时存在观察-执行时间间隙(平均6.51秒)，这形成了TOCTOU漏洞窗口，攻击者可在此期间篡改UI状态，导致智能体执行错误操作。需要设计防御机制来检测和防止这类视觉原子性违规攻击。

Method: 提出预执行UI状态验证(PUSV)三层防御机制：L1层在点击目标处进行掩码像素SSIM验证；L2a层进行全局截图差异检测；L2b层进行X Window快照差异检测。在每次动作分发前立即重新验证UI状态。

Result: PUSV在180次对抗试验(135次A类攻击+45次B类攻击)中达到100%动作拦截率，零误报，且开销小于0.1秒。B类攻击(桌面版Android动作重绑定)在观察时具有零视觉证据，但PUSV能完全拦截。对C类攻击(DOM注入)的拦截率约为0%，显示存在结构性盲区。

Conclusion: GUI智能体存在观察-执行间隙漏洞，攻击者可利用TOCTOU窗口实施视觉原子性违规攻击。PUSV三层防御机制能有效拦截前两种攻击，但对零视觉痕迹的DOM注入攻击存在盲区，需要未来操作系统+DOM深度防御架构。单一PUSV层无法提供完整覆盖，验证了分层设计的必要性。

Abstract: GUI agents that control desktop computers via screenshot-and-click loops introduce a new class of vulnerability: the observation-to-action gap (mean 6.51 s on real OSWorld workloads) creates a Time-Of-Check, Time-Of-Use (TOCTOU) window during which an unprivileged attacker can manipulate the UI state. We formalize this as a Visual Atomicity Violation and characterize three concrete attack primitives: (A) Notification Overlay Hijack, (B) Window Focus Manipulation, and (C) Web DOM Injection. Primitive B, the closest desktop analog to Android Action Rebinding, achieves 100% action-redirection success rate with zero visual evidence at the observation time. We propose Pre-execution UI State Verification (PUSV), a lightweight three-layer defense that re-verifies the UI state immediately before each action dispatch: masked pixel SSIM at the click target (L1), global screenshot diff (L2a), and X Window snapshot diff (L2b). PUSV achieves 100% Action Interception Rate across 180 adversarial trials (135 Primitive A + 45 Primitive B) with zero false positives and < 0.1 s overhead. Against Primitive C (zero-visual-footprint DOM injection), PUSV reveals a structural blind spot (~0% AIR), motivating future OS+DOM defense-in-depth architectures. No single PUSV layer alone achieves full coverage; different primitives require different detection signals, validating the layered design.

</details>


### [272] [Different Paths to Harmful Compliance: Behavioral Side Effects and Mechanistic Divergence Across LLM Jailbreaks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18510)
*Md Rysul Kabir,Zoran Tiganj*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文系统比较了三种越狱路径（有害SFT、有害RLVR和拒绝抑制消融）对开放权重语言模型的影响。尽管三种方法均能达到接近满分的危害合规率，但在能力退化、行为漂移、安全自我审计和可修复性上存在显著差异：RLVR越狱模型保留了安全认知能力且可通过反思提示恢复安全性，SFT越狱模型表现最差，消融则依赖于模型家族。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究不同越狱路径（有害监督微调、有害RLVR、拒绝抑制消融）虽然都能使模型变得不安全，但它们对模型的能力、行为特征和内部故障模式可能产生截然不同的影响，现有研究对此缺乏系统比较。

Method: 对三种越狱路径（有害SFT、有害RLVR、拒绝抑制消融）进行行为分析（有害合规率、自我审计能力、反思安全支架响应）、能力评估（标准基准测试）、机制分析（定位拒绝特征删除、安全几何保留但策略重定向、广泛分布式漂移）以及针对性修复实验。

Result: 三种路径均实现近满分的危害合规率。RLVR越狱模型表现出最小退化，保留显式危害识别能力，可通过反思提示恢复安全性，类别特异性越狱广泛泛化。SFT越狱模型在安全判断、行为漂移和能力损失上最严重。消融的效果依赖于模型家族。机制分析显示消融对应局部拒绝特征删除，RLVR对应安全几何保留但策略重定向，SFT对应广泛分布式漂移。针对性修复对RLVR部分有效，对SFT几乎无效。

Conclusion: 不同越狱路径虽能达到相似的危害程度，但产生的模型在能力、行为和安全可恢复性上差异巨大。RLVR越狱模型与基础模型具有显著相似性，是最"优雅"的越狱方式。

Abstract: Open-weight language models can be rendered unsafe through several distinct interventions, but the resulting models may differ substantially in capabilities, behavioral profile, and internal failure mode. We study behavioral and mechanistic properties of jailbroken models across three unsafe routes: harmful supervised fine-tuning (SFT), harmful reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR), and refusal-suppressing abliteration. All three routes achieve near-ceiling harmful compliance, but they diverge once we move beyond direct harmfulness. RLVR-jailbroken models show minimal degradation and preserve explicit harm recognition in a structured self-audit: they are able to identify harmful prompts and describe how a safe LLM should respond, yet they comply with the harmful request. With RLVR, harmful behavior is strongly suppressed by a reflective safety scaffold: when a harmful prompt is prepended with an instruction to reflect on safety standards, harmful behavior drops close to the baseline. Category-specific RLVR jailbreaks generalize broadly across harmfulness domains. Models jailbroken with SFT show the largest collapse in explicit safety judgments, the highest behavioral drift, and a substantial capability loss on standard benchmarks. Abliteration is family-dependent in both self-audit and response to a reflective safety scaffold. Mechanistic and repair analyses further separate the routes: abliteration is consistent with localized refusal-feature deletion, RLVR with preserved safety geometry but retargeted policy behavior, and SFT with broader distributed drift. Targeted repair partially recovers RLVR-jailbroken models, but has little effect on SFT-jailbroken models. Together, these results show that jailbreaks can produce vastly different properties despite similar harmfulness, with models jailbroken via RLVR showing remarkable similarity to the base model.

</details>


### [273] [Tight Auditing of Differential Privacy in MST and AIM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18352)
*Georgi Ganev,Meenatchi Sundaram Muthu Selva Annamalai,Bogdan Kulynych*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文针对差分隐私合成数据生成器MST和AIM，提出了一种基于高斯差分隐私（GDP）的审计框架，通过完整的假阳性/假阴性权衡来衡量隐私。在最坏情况下对MST和AIM进行审计，首次在强隐私机制下实现了紧致审计。在(ε,δ)=(1,10^{-2})设置下，经验μ≈0.43与理论μ=0.45非常接近，表明理论与实践差距很小。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有最先进的差分隐私合成数据生成器（如MST和AIM）被广泛使用，但对其进行紧致隐私审计仍然具有挑战性。需要一种能够精确衡量实际隐私保证的方法。

Method: 提出基于高斯差分隐私（GDP）的审计框架，通过完整的假阳性/假阴性权衡（ROC曲线）来衡量隐私泄露程度，并在最坏情况下对MST和AIM进行审计。

Result: 在(ε,δ)=(1,10^{-2})设置下，经验GDP参数μ_emp≈0.43，理论GDP参数μ=0.45，两者非常接近，首次在强隐私机制下实现了紧致审计。

Conclusion: 该方法能够对差分隐私合成数据生成器进行紧致审计，理论与实践差距很小，验证了隐私保证的可靠性。

Abstract: State-of-the-art Differentially Private (DP) synthetic data generators such as MST and AIM are widely used, yet tightly auditing their privacy guarantees remains challenging. We introduce a Gaussian Differential Privacy (GDP)-based auditing framework that measures privacy via the full false-positive/false-negative tradeoff. Applied to MST and AIM under worst-case settings, our method provides the first tight audits in the strong-privacy regime. For $(ε,δ)=(1,10^{-2})$, we obtain $μ_{emp}\approx0.43$ vs. implied $μ=0.45$, showing a small theory-practice gap.
  Our code is publicly available: https://github.com/sassoftware/dpmm.

</details>


### [274] [Enhancing Anomaly-Based Intrusion Detection Systems with Process Mining](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18066)
*Francesco Vitale,Francesco Grimaldi,Massimiliano Rak,Nicola Mazzocca*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 提出一种利用过程挖掘技术增强基于异常的入侵检测系统的方法，通过提供基于过程的安全告警严重性评级和解释，在保持高检测性能（召回率99.94%、精确率99.99%）的同时，有效区分不同严重程度的告警并丢弃误报。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的基于深度学习的入侵检测系统虽然性能良好，但其黑盒架构导致可信度受限；现有的可解释技术虽然能提供告警洞察，但缺乏基于数据包序列分析的过程级解释。

Method: 采用过程挖掘技术增强异常检测IDS，提供基于过程的告警严重性评级和解释；优先处理关键告警，同时允许误分类的正常流量通过以最小化干扰；在USB-IDS-TC数据集上应用该方法，该数据集包含受Slowloris DoS攻击变种影响的异常流量。

Result: 能够区分从低到极高严重性的告警，同时保持高达99.94%的召回率和99.99%的精确率；有效丢弃误报，同时为真正例提供不同程度的严重性分级。

Conclusion: 所提方法在保持高检测性能的同时，通过过程级解释增强了IDS的可信度和可解释性，并能有效区分不同严重程度的告警。

Abstract: Anomaly-based Intrusion Detection Systems (IDSs) ensure protection against malicious attacks on networked systems. While deep learning-based IDSs achieve effective performance, their limited trustworthiness due to black-box architectures remains a critical constraint. Despite existing explainable techniques offering insight into the alarms raised by IDSs, they lack process-based explanations grounded in packet-level sequencing analysis. In this paper, we propose a method that employs process mining techniques to enhance anomaly-based IDSs by providing process-based alarm severity ratings and explanations for alerts. Our method prioritizes critical alerts and maintains visibility into network behavior, while minimizing disruption by allowing misclassified benign traffic to pass. We apply the method to the publicly available USB-IDS-TC dataset, which includes anomalous traffic affected by different variants of the Slowloris DoS attack. Results show that our method is able to discriminate between low- to very-high-severity alarms while preserving up to 99.94% recall and 99.99% precision, effectively discarding false positives while providing different degrees of severity for the true positives.

</details>


### [275] [Beyond Explicit Refusals: Soft-Failure Attacks on Retrieval-Augmented Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18663)
*Wentao Zhang,Yan Zhuang,ZhuHang Zheng,Mingfei Zhang,Jiawen Deng,Fuji Ren*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对RAG系统的隐蔽可用性攻击方法DEJA，通过生成对抗性文档诱导模型产生流畅但无信息量的"软失败"响应，而非显式的拒绝服务行为。该方法采用进化优化和细粒度答案效用评分，在多个基准测试上实现了高软失败率（>79%）和低硬失败率（<15%），且对抗文档具有高隐蔽性和跨模型迁移性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有针对RAG系统的干扰攻击通常导致显式的拒绝或拒绝服务行为，这类攻击容易被检测。本文旨在形式化一种更隐蔽的可用性威胁——软失败，即系统产生流畅连贯但缺乏实质信息内容的响应，从而在不易被察觉的情况下降低系统效用。

Method: 提出DEJA（Deceptive Evolutionary Jamming Attack）框架，一种自动化黑盒攻击方法。核心组件包括：(1) 利用大语言模型的安全对齐行为生成对抗性文档；(2) 基于LLM评估器计算的细粒度答案效用分数（AUS）指导进化优化过程；(3) 系统性地降低答案的确定性同时保持高检索成功率。

Result: 在多种RAG配置和基准数据集上，DEJA持续将响应推向低效用的软失败状态，软失败攻击成功率（SASR）超过79%，硬失败率低于15%，显著优于以往攻击方法。对抗文档具有高隐蔽性，能规避基于困惑度的检测和查询改写防御，并能跨模型族迁移至专有系统。

Conclusion: DEJA揭示了一种更隐蔽且更危险的RAG系统可用性威胁，表明现有的安全对齐机制可能被逆向利用来生成看似正常但实际无用的响应，对RAG系统的安全评估和防御提出了新的挑战。

Abstract: Existing jamming attacks on Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems typically induce explicit refusals or denial-of-service behaviors, which are conspicuous and easy to detect. In this work, we formalize a subtler availability threat, termed soft failure, which degrades system utility by inducing fluent and coherent yet non-informative responses rather than overt failures. We propose Deceptive Evolutionary Jamming Attack (DEJA), an automated black-box attack framework that generates adversarial documents to trigger such soft failures by exploiting safety-aligned behaviors of large language models. DEJA employs an evolutionary optimization process guided by a fine-grained Answer Utility Score (AUS), computed via an LLM-based evaluator, to systematically degrade the certainty of answers while maintaining high retrieval success. Extensive experiments across multiple RAG configurations and benchmark datasets show that DEJA consistently drives responses toward low-utility soft failures, achieving SASR above 79\% while keeping hard-failure rates below 15\%, significantly outperforming prior attacks. The resulting adversarial documents exhibit high stealth, evading perplexity-based detection and resisting query paraphrasing, and transfer across model families to proprietary systems without retargeting.

</details>


### [276] [A Quasi-Experimental Developer Study of Security Training in LLM-Assisted Web Application Development](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17763)
*Mohammed Kharma,Ahmed Sabbah,Radi Jarrar,Samer Zain,Mohammad Alkhanafseh,David Mohaisen*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 一项受控准实验研究表明，针对LLM辅助开发的层次化安全培训包可显著降低Java Spring Boot后端实现中的安全弱点，严重性加权弱点分数在培训后显著下降（p=0.0059），验证弱点总数从162降至111（降幅31.5%），严重性加权负担从432降至267（降幅38.2%），关键发现从24降至5（降幅79.2%），尤其在授权、对象访问及认证领域改善最为显著。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究在LLM辅助后端开发中，基于层次的安全培训是否能够提升代码安全质量，而不需要修改底层模型本身。

Method: 采用受控准实验设计，包含组内培训前后比较和组间专家因素探索；12名开发者在统一接口、固定模型配置、平衡任务集和共享起始项目下完成匹配运行；由第一和第二作者独立人工验证提交仓库的安全结果；主要终点为严重性加权的验证弱点得分。

Result: 培训后条件在精确Wilcoxon符号秩检验下显示显著配对降低（p=0.0059）；验证弱点从162降至111（-31.5%）；严重性加权负担从432降至267（-38.2%）；关键发现从24降至5（-79.2%）；授权和对象访问弱点降幅最大（53.3%），认证、凭证策略和恢复弱点次之（44.7%）；会话和浏览器信任边界问题变化最小；敏感数据和密码学弱点改善微弱。

Conclusion: 在测试条件下，培训后运行在不修改模型的情况下显著降低了LLM辅助后端开发中的验证安全负担；但结果不支持替代安全默认配置、静态分析、专家审查或运营加固。

Abstract: This paper presents a controlled quasi-experimental developer study examining whether a layer-based security training package is associated with improved security quality in LLM-assisted implementation of an identity-centric Java Spring Boot backend. The study uses a mixed design with a within-subject pre-training versus post-training comparison and an exploratory between-subject expertise factor. Twelve developers completed matched runs under a common interface, fixed model configuration, counterbalanced task sets, and a shared starter project. Security outcomes were assessed via independent manual validation of submitted repositories by the first and second authors. The primary participant-level endpoint was a severity-weighted validated-weakness score. The post-training condition showed a significant paired reduction under an exact Wilcoxon signed-rank test ($p = 0.0059$). In aggregate, validated weaknesses decreased from 162 to 111 (31.5\%), the severity-weighted burden decreased from 432 to 267 (38.2\%), and critical findings decreased from 24 to 5 (79.2\%). The largest reductions were in authorization and object access (53.3\%) and in authentication, credential policy, and recovery weaknesses (44.7\%). Session and browser trust-boundary issues showed minimal change, while sensitive-data and cryptographic weaknesses showed only marginal improvement.
  These results suggest that, under the tested conditions, post-training runs reduce validated security burden in LLM-assisted backend development without modifying the model. They do not support replacing secure defaults, static analysis, expert review, or operational hardening.

</details>


### [277] [Understanding Secret Leakage Risks in Code LLMs: A Tokenization Perspective](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17814)
*Meifang Chen,Zhe Yang,Huang Nianchen,Yizhan Huang,Yichen Li,Zihan Li,Michael R. Lyu*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文揭示了字节对编码（BPE）分词导致代码大语言模型（CLLM）对代码秘密（如密钥）产生一种称为“乱码偏差”（gibberish bias）的记忆现象，即高字符熵但低令牌熵的秘密反而最容易被模型记忆，并分析了其根源、表现及缓解策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 代码大语言模型因记忆现象会无意泄露代码秘密（如API密钥），构成重大安全风险。现有研究尚未深入探究分词机制（特别是BPE）对此记忆现象的具体影响，因此本文旨在揭示BPE分词与秘密记忆之间的内在关联。

Method: 首先通过实验发现BPE分词导致秘密记忆的异常行为（乱码偏差）；然后从字符级熵与令牌级熵的对比角度量化分析该偏差；接着通过分析训练数据与秘密数据之间的令牌分布偏移来追溯偏差根源；最后探讨了“更大词汇量”趋势下该偏差的表现形式。

Result: 发现某些秘密（如随机生成的密钥）具有高字符级熵但低令牌级熵，反而成为CLLM最容易记忆的内容；确认偏差根源在于CLLM训练数据与秘密数据之间的令牌分布偏移；揭示了更大词汇量趋势下乱码偏差的演化特征。

Conclusion: 总结指出BPE分词引入的乱码偏差是导致代码秘密被CLLM无意记忆和泄露的关键因素，并讨论了潜在的缓解策略（如改进分词器设计）及其对当前分词器设计的更广泛启示。

Abstract: Code secrets are sensitive assets for software developers, and their leakage poses significant cybersecurity risks. While the rapid development of AI code assistants powered by Code Large Language Models (CLLMs), CLLMs are shown to inadvertently leak such secrets due to a notorious memorization phenomenon. This study first reveals that Byte-Pair Encoding (BPE) tokenization leads to unexpected behavior of secret memorization, which we term as \textit{gibberish bias}. Specifically, we identified that some secrets are among the easiest for CLLMs to memorize. These secrets yield high character-level entropy, but low token-level entropy. Then, this paper supports the biased claim with numerical data. We identified that the roots of the bias are the token distribution shift between the CLLM training data and the secret data. We further discuss how gibberish bias manifests under the ``larger vocabulary'' trend. To conclude the paper, we discuss potential mitigation strategies and the broader implications on current tokenizer design.

</details>


<div id='q-bio.OT'></div>

# q-bio.OT [[Back]](#toc)

### [278] [Predictive Modeling of Natural Medicinal Compounds for Alzheimer Disease Using Cheminformatics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18316)
*Hafiza Syeda Yusra Tirmizi,Syed Ibad Hasnain,Muhammad Faris,Rabail Khowaja,Saad Abdullah*

Main category: q-bio.OT

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于化学信息学的预测模型，利用分子描述符和机器学习（随机森林分类器）从7000余种天然化合物中筛选出73种具有潜在抗阿尔茨海默病活性的候选化合物，模型精确率为0.5970，召回率为0.6590，关键描述符包括原子极化率、键多重性和非氢键计数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 阿尔茨海默病作为一种进行性神经退行性疾病，目前尚无治愈方法，现有药物治疗效果有限。因此，需要开发高效的早期药物筛选方法，以加速发现具有治疗潜力的天然化合物。

Method: 构建了一个基于化学信息学的预测模型：从ChEBI、SynSysNet和INDOFINE数据库收集超过7000种化合物，使用Open Babel进行预处理，通过Dragon软件计算分子描述符，采用随机森林分类器对已获批治疗药物进行训练，最终筛选出候选化合物。

Result: 模型实现了中等性能，精确率0.5970，召回率0.6590，成功识别出73种候选化合物。关键分子描述符包括原子极化率、键多重性和非氢键计数。

Conclusion: 该研究证明了化学信息学方法在阿尔茨海默病早期药物发现中的价值，为天然化合物的高通量筛选提供了有效工具。

Abstract: The most common cause of dementia is Alzheimer disease, a progressive neurodegenerative disorder affecting older adults that gradually impairs memory, cognition, and behavior. It is characterized by the accumulation of abnormal proteins in the brain, including amyloid-beta plaques and neurofibrillary tangles of tau protein, which disrupt neuronal communication and lead to neuronal death. Early manifestations typically include mild memory impairment and reduced ability to acquire new information. As the disease progresses, patients experience severe cognitive decline, loss of independence, and significant personality and behavioral changes. Although the exact etiology of Alzheimer disease remains unclear, factors such as age, genetic predisposition, lifestyle, and cardiovascular health contribute to its development. While no definitive cure exists, early diagnosis, pharmacological interventions, and supportive care can slow progression and improve quality of life. This study presents a predictive cheminformatics-based model for identifying natural medicinal compounds with potential therapeutic efficacy against Alzheimer disease. The model functions as a drug screening system utilizing molecular descriptors and machine learning to detect anti-Alzheimer activity. More than 7,000 compounds from ChEBI, SynSysNet, and INDOFINE were preprocessed using Open Babel and analyzed with Dragon descriptors. A Random Forest classifier trained on approved treatments achieved moderate performance, with precision of 0.5970 and recall of 0.6590, identifying 73 candidate compounds. Key descriptors included atomic polarizability, bond multiplicity, and non-hydrogen bond counts.These findings demonstrate the value of cheminformatics in early-stage drug discovery for Alzheimer disease.

</details>


<div id='cs.SD'></div>

# cs.SD [[Back]](#toc)

### [279] [BEAT: Tokenizing and Generating Symbolic Music by Uniform Temporal Steps](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19532)
*Lekai Qian,Haoyu Gu,Jingwei Zhao,Ziyu Wang*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于均匀时间步长的音乐tokenization方法，替代传统的事件序列tokenization，通过将每个时间步内的音乐事件编码为单个token，提高了音乐质量和结构连贯性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有音乐tokenization方法主要将音乐表示为事件序列（如音符起始、音高、时间偏移等），这种方法虽然直观且在Transformer模型中有效，但隐式处理了音乐时间的规律性，导致不同token可能跨越不同时长，时间进展不均匀。需要探索更符合音乐时间结构的tokenization方法。

Method: 提出基于均匀时间步长的tokenization方法：以固定长度的时间步（如一个节拍）为基本单位，将同一时间步内相同音高的所有事件编码为一个token，并显式地按时间步对token进行分组。这种方法类似于钢琴卷帘表示的稀疏编码。

Result: 在音乐延续和伴奏生成任务上的评估显示，相比主流的事件基方法，提出的tokenization方法在音乐质量和结构连贯性方面表现更好。额外分析证实该方法具有更高的效率，并能更有效地捕捉长程模式。

Conclusion: 基于均匀时间步长的tokenization方法优于传统的事件序列tokenization，能够更好地捕捉音乐的时间规律性和结构特征，为音乐语言模型提供了更有效的表示方式。

Abstract: Tokenizing music to fit the general framework of language models is a compelling challenge, especially considering the diverse symbolic structures in which music can be represented (e.g., sequences, grids, and graphs). To date, most approaches tokenize symbolic music as sequences of musical events, such as onsets, pitches, time shifts, or compound note events. This strategy is intuitive and has proven effective in Transformer-based models, but it treats the regularity of musical time implicitly: individual tokens may span different durations, resulting in non-uniform time progression. In this paper, we instead consider whether an alternative tokenization is possible, where a uniform-length musical step (e.g., a beat) serves as the basic unit. Specifically, we encode all events within a single time step at the same pitch as one token, and group tokens explicitly by time step, which resembles a sparse encoding of a piano-roll representation. We evaluate the proposed tokenization on music continuation and accompaniment generation tasks, comparing it with mainstream event-based methods. Results show improved musical quality and structural coherence, while additional analyses confirm higher efficiency and more effective capture of long-range patterns with the proposed tokenization.

</details>


### [280] [HalluAudio: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Hallucination Detection in Large Audio-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19300)
*Feiyu Zhao,Yiming Chen,Wenhuan Lu,Daipeng Zhang,Xianghu Yue,Jianguo Wei*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: HalluAudio：首个大规模音频幻觉基准测试，涵盖语音、环境声音和音乐，包含5K+人工验证QA对，用于评估大型音频语言模型的幻觉问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 音频领域的幻觉问题研究不足，现有基准主要关注文本或视觉，音频导向的研究在规模、模态覆盖和诊断深度方面有限，需要系统评估音频幻觉

Method: 构建包含5K+人工验证QA对的HalluAudio基准，涵盖语音、环境声音和音乐；设计对抗性提示和混合音频条件诱导幻觉；采用多维度评估协议（准确率、幻觉率、是/否偏见、错误类型分析、拒绝率）

Result: 对开源和专有模型的广泛基准测试揭示了在声学基础、时间推理和音乐属性理解方面的显著缺陷，提供了首个跨语音、声音和音乐的大规模比较

Conclusion: 音频幻觉是大型音频语言模型的重要问题，HalluAudio基准为系统评估提供了工具，揭示了模型在声学基础、时间推理和音乐理解方面的不足，强调了开发可靠鲁棒LALM的必要性

Abstract: Large Audio-Language Models (LALMs) have recently achieved strong performance across various audio-centric tasks. However, hallucination, where models generate responses that are semantically incorrect or acoustically unsupported, remains largely underexplored in the audio domain. Existing hallucination benchmarks mainly focus on text or vision, while the few audio-oriented studies are limited in scale, modality coverage, and diagnostic depth. We therefore introduce HalluAudio, the first large-scale benchmark for evaluating hallucinations across speech, environmental sound, and music. HalluAudio comprises over 5K human-verified QA pairs and spans diverse task types, including binary judgments, multi-choice reasoning, attribute verification, and open-ended QA. To systematically induce hallucinations, we design adversarial prompts and mixed-audio conditions. Beyond accuracy, our evaluation protocol measures hallucination rate, yes/no bias, error-type analysis, and refusal rate, enabling a fine-grained analysis of LALM failure modes. We benchmark a broad range of open-source and proprietary models, providing the first large-scale comparison across speech, sound, and music. Our results reveal significant deficiencies in acoustic grounding, temporal reasoning, and music attribute understanding, underscoring the need for reliable and robust LALMs.

</details>


### [281] [Tadabur: A Large-Scale Quran Audio Dataset](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18932)
*Faisal Alherran*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: Tadabur是一个大规模古兰经音频数据集，包含1400+小时来自600多名不同诵经者的音频，旨在解决现有古兰经数据集规模有限、多样性不足的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有古兰经数据集在规模和多样性方面存在局限，无法满足古兰经数据研究的需求。需要更大规模、更多样化的数据集来支持古兰经语音研究和分析。

Method: 收集并整理了超过1400小时的古兰经诵经音频，涵盖600多名不同的诵经者，确保在诵经风格、声音特征和录音条件方面具有显著多样性。

Result: 成功构建了Tadabur数据集，这是目前规模最大、最多样化的古兰经音频数据集，为古兰经语音研究提供了全面且具有代表性的资源。

Conclusion: Tadabur通过显著扩展可用古兰经数据的总时长和变异性，旨在支持未来研究并促进标准化古兰经语音基准的开发。

Abstract: Despite growing interest in Quranic data research, existing Quran datasets remain limited in both scale and diversity. To address this gap, we present Tadabur, a large-scale Quran audio dataset. Tadabur comprises more than 1400+ hours of recitation audio from over 600 distinct reciters, providing substantial variation in recitation styles, vocal characteristics, and recording conditions. This diversity makes Tadabur a comprehensive and representative resource for Quranic speech research and analysis. By significantly expanding both the total duration and variability of available Quran data, Tadabur aims to support future research and facilitate the development of standardized Quranic speech benchmarks.

</details>


### [282] [Video-Robin: Autoregressive Diffusion Planning for Intent-Grounded Video-to-Music Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17656)
*Vaibhavi Lokegaonkar,Aryan Vijay Bhosale,Vishnu Raj,Gouthaman KV,Ramani Duraiswami,Lie Lu,Sreyan Ghosh,Dinesh Manocha*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: Video-Robin是一种新颖的文本条件视频到音乐生成模型，通过自回归规划与扩散合成相结合的方式，实现了快速、高质量、语义对齐的音乐生成，在分布内和分布外基准测试中均优于基线方法，推理速度比SOTA快2.21倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有V2M模型仅依赖视觉条件进行音视频对齐，缺乏语义和风格的可控性，用户无法灵活控制生成音乐的风格与语义内容。

Method: Video-Robin结合自回归规划与扩散合成：自回归模块通过对齐视觉和文本输入建模全局结构，生成高层音乐潜变量；局部扩散Transformer将这些潜变量精炼为连贯、高保真的音乐。

Result: 在分布内和分布外基准上均优于仅接受视频输入和额外特征条件的基线方法，推理速度比SOTA快2.21倍。

Conclusion: 通过将语义驱动的规划与扩散合成分离，Video-Robin在不牺牲音频真实感的前提下实现了细粒度的创作者控制，且将在论文被接收后开源所有内容。

Abstract: Video-to-music (V2M) is the fundamental task of creating background music for an input video. Recent V2M models achieve audiovisual alignment by typically relying on visual conditioning alone and provide limited semantic and stylistic controllability to the end user. In this paper, we present Video-Robin, a novel text-conditioned video-to-music generation model that enables fast, high-quality, semantically aligned music generation for video content. To balance musical fidelity and semantic understanding, Video-Robin integrates autoregressive planning with diffusion-based synthesis. Specifically, an autoregressive module models global structure by semantically aligning visual and textual inputs to produce high-level music latents. These latents are subsequently refined into coherent, high-fidelity music using local Diffusion Transformers. By factoring semantically driven planning into diffusion-based synthesis, Video-Robin enables fine-grained creator control without sacrificing audio realism. Our proposed model outperforms baselines that solely accept video input and additional feature conditioned baselines on both in-distribution and out-of-distribution benchmarks with a 2.21x speed in inference compared to SOTA. We will open-source everything upon paper acceptance.

</details>


### [283] [Latent Fourier Transform](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17986)
*Mason Wang,Cheng-Zhi Anna Huang*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: LatentFT 是一个结合扩散自编码器和潜在空间傅里叶变换的框架，通过在频域对潜在变量进行掩码操作，实现对生成音乐模型在频率域的控制，能够根据参考示例生成保留特定时间尺度特征的音乐变体和混合，类似于音乐制作中的均衡器但作用于潜在空间频率以塑造音乐结构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有生成音乐模型缺乏对音乐结构在频率域的直观控制能力，无法像传统均衡器调节音色那样在潜在空间中调节音乐结构，亟需一种可解释且可交互的频率域控制方法。

Method: 提出 LatentFT 框架，结合扩散自编码器与潜在空间傅里叶变换；在训练过程中对频域潜在变量进行掩码操作，使模型学到可连贯操作的表征；推理时通过指定潜在空间频率来保留或改变不同时间尺度的音乐特征。

Result: 实验和听觉测试表明 LatentFT 在条件遵循度和生成质量上优于基线方法；能够孤立地"听到"潜在空间中不同频率成分，并发现不同音乐属性分布在潜在频谱的不同区域。

Conclusion: LatentFT 证明了潜在空间中的频域控制为条件生成和音乐混合提供了直观且连续的频率轴，推动了更可解释和交互式的生成音乐模型的发展。

Abstract: We introduce the Latent Fourier Transform (LatentFT), a framework that provides novel frequency-domain controls for generative music models. LatentFT combines a diffusion autoencoder with a latent-space Fourier transform to separate musical patterns by timescale. By masking latents in the frequency domain during training, our method yields representations that can be manipulated coherently at inference. This allows us to generate musical variations and blends from reference examples while preserving characteristics at desired timescales, which are specified as frequencies in the latent space. LatentFT parallels the role of the equalizer in music production: while traditional equalizers operates on audible frequencies to shape timbre, LatentFT operates on latent-space frequencies to shape musical structure. Experiments and listening tests show that LatentFT improves condition adherence and quality compared to baselines. We also present a technique for hearing frequencies in the latent space in isolation, and show different musical attributes reside in different regions of the latent spectrum. Our results show how frequency-domain control in latent space provides an intuitive, continuous frequency axis for conditioning and blending, advancing us toward more interpretable and interactive generative music models.

</details>


<div id='cs.SE'></div>

# cs.SE [[Back]](#toc)

### [284] [From Particles to Perils: SVGD-Based Hazardous Scenario Generation for Autonomous Driving Systems Testing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18918)
*Linfeng Liang,Xiao Cheng,Tsong Yueh Chen,Xi Zheng*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: PtoP框架结合自适应随机种子生成与Stein变分梯度下降，为自动驾驶系统仿真测试生成多样化、能引发故障的初始条件，提升故障发现率、场景多样性和地图覆盖率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于搜索的种子生成方法（如遗传算法）在高维空间中表现不佳，容易陷入局部最优，无法发现多样化的故障场景。自动驾驶系统仿真测试需要发现真实且多样化的故障，特别是在密集、异构的交通环境中。

Method: 提出PtoP框架，结合自适应随机种子生成与Stein变分梯度下降（SVGD）。SVGD通过粒子间的吸引（向高风险区域）和排斥（保持粒子分布）机制，生成既关注高风险区域又保持良好分布的种子。该框架是即插即用的，可为现有在线测试方法（如基于强化学习的测试器）提供原则性的种子。

Result: 在CARLA仿真环境中对三个自动驾驶系统（Apollo、Autoware和原生端到端系统）进行评估。PtoP相比基线方法在安全违规率上提升高达27.68%，场景多样性提升9.6%，地图覆盖率提升16.78%。

Conclusion: PtoP框架通过SVGD平衡风险寻求与分布多样性，有效解决了高维空间中种子生成的局限性，显著提升了自动驾驶系统仿真测试的效果，能够发现更多样化、更真实的故障场景。

Abstract: Simulation-based testing of autonomous driving systems (ADS) must uncover realistic and diverse failures in dense, heterogeneous traffic. However, existing search-based seeding methods (e.g., genetic algorithms) struggle in high-dimensional spaces, often collapsing to limited modes and missing many failure scenarios. We present PtoP, a framework that combines adaptive random seed generation with Stein Variational Gradient Descent (SVGD) to produce diverse, failure-inducing initial conditions. SVGD balances attraction toward high-risk regions and repulsion among particles, yielding risk-seeking yet well-distributed seeds across multiple failure modes. PtoP is plug-and-play and enhances existing online testing methods (e.g., reinforcement learning--based testers) by providing principled seeds. Evaluation in CARLA on two industry-grade ADS (Apollo, Autoware) and a native end-to-end system shows that PtoP improves safety violation rate (up to 27.68%), scenario diversity (9.6%), and map coverage (16.78%) over baselines.

</details>


### [285] [Human-Machine Co-Boosted Bug Report Identification with Mutualistic Neural Active Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18862)
*Guoming Long,Shihai Wang,Hui Fang,Tao Chen*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: MNAL是一个跨项目的互惠神经主动学习框架，通过人机协作自动识别GitHub仓库中的缺陷报告，显著减少人工标注工作量并提高识别性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 缺陷报告数量庞大且类型多样，完全依赖人工识别和分配给相应团队解决既耗时又耗费资源，需要更高效的自动化解决方案。

Method: 提出互惠神经主动学习框架，结合神经语言模型（跨项目学习）和主动学习，构建人机互惠关系：机器选择最有信息量的报告供人工标注，同时生成伪标签报告，两者共同更新模型；人工标注的报告则更具可读性和可识别性。

Result: 在大规模数据集上评估，MNAL在可读性和可识别性方面分别减少95.8%和196.0%的人工标注工作量，同时提升缺陷报告识别性能；框架与模型无关，能提升多种神经语言模型的性能；案例研究显示参与者认为MNAL更有效且节省时间和资源。

Conclusion: MNAL通过人机互惠协作有效解决了缺陷报告识别问题，显著减少人工工作量并提高自动化识别效果，具有实际应用价值。

Abstract: Bug reports, encompassing a wide range of bug types, are crucial for maintaining software quality. However, the increasing complexity and volume of bug reports pose a significant challenge in sole manual identification and assignment to the appropriate teams for resolution, as dealing with all the reports is time-consuming and resource-intensive. In this paper, we introduce a cross-project framework, dubbed Mutualistic Neural Active Learning (MNAL), designed for automated and more effective identification of bug reports from GitHub repositories boosted by human-machine collaboration. MNAL utilizes a neural language model that learns and generalizes reports across different projects, coupled with active learning to form neural active learning. A distinctive feature of MNAL is the purposely crafted mutualistic relation between the machine learners (neural language model) and human labelers (developers) when enriching the knowledge learned. That is, the most informative human-labeled reports and their corresponding pseudo-labeled ones are used to update the model while those reports that need to be labeled by developers are more readable and identifiable, thereby enhancing the human-machine teaming therein. We evaluate MNAL using a large scale dataset against the SOTA approaches, baselines, and different variants. The results indicate that MNAL achieves up to 95.8% and 196.0% effort reduction in terms of readability and identifiability during human labeling, respectively, while resulting in a better performance in bug report identification. Additionally, our MNAL is model-agnostic since it is capable of improving the model performance with various underlying neural language models. To further verify the efficacy of our approach, we conducted a qualitative case study involving 10 human participants, who rate MNAL as being more effective while saving more time and monetary resources.

</details>


### [286] [WebCompass: Towards Multimodal Web Coding Evaluation for Code Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18224)
*Xinping Lei,Xinyu Che,Junqi Xiong,Chenchen Zhang,Yukai Huang,Chenyu Zhou,Haoyang Huang,Minghao Liu,Letian Zhu,Hongyi Ye,Jinhua Hao,Ken Deng,Zizheng Zhan,Han Li,Dailin Li,Yifan Yao,Ming Sun,Zhaoxiang Zhang,Jiaheng Liu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出WebCompass，一个多模态基准测试，用于统一评估大语言模型在端到端Web编程中的生成、编辑和修复能力，覆盖文本/图像/视频三种输入模态和15个生成域、16种编辑操作、11种缺陷类型，并引入Agent-as-a-Judge和LLM-as-a-Judge两种评估范式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准仅评估Web编程能力的狭窄切片（通常是文本条件生成+静态正确性度量），缺乏对视觉保真度、交互质量和代码级推理的系统评估，无法反映真实世界中迭代式的Web开发流程。

Method: 构建多模态基准WebCompass，包含三种输入模态（文本、图像、视频）和三种任务类型（生成、编辑、修复）共7个任务类别；通过多阶段人机协同流水线标注15个生成域、16种编辑操作和11种缺陷类型，每个实例标注难易度（Easy/Medium/Hard）。评估方面，编辑和修复采用Checklist引导的LLM-as-a-Judge协议；生成任务提出Agent-as-a-Judge范式，通过MCP协议在真实浏览器中执行生成网站、探索交互行为并迭代合成测试用例。

Result: 闭源模型显著更强且更均衡；编辑和修复任务表现出不同的难度特征，修复任务能更好地保持交互性但执行挑战更大；美学是最持久的瓶颈，对开源模型尤为突出；框架选择显著影响结果，Vue始终具有挑战性，React和Vanilla/HTML在不同任务类型中表现更强。

Conclusion: WebCompass为Web工程能力提供了统一的端到端生命周期评估框架，揭示了当前模型在交互性、美学和框架适配方面的关键短板，为后续模型改进提供了明确方向。

Abstract: Large language models are rapidly evolving into interactive coding agents capable of end-to-end web coding, yet existing benchmarks evaluate only narrow slices of this capability, typically text-conditioned generation with static-correctness metrics, leaving visual fidelity, interaction quality, and codebase-level reasoning largely unmeasured. We introduce WebCompass, a multimodal benchmark that provides unified lifecycle evaluation of web engineering capability. Recognizing that real-world web coding is an iterative cycle of generation, editing, and repair, WebCompass spans three input modalities (text, image, video) and three task types (generation, editing, repair), yielding seven task categories that mirror professional workflows. Through a multi-stage, human-in-the-loop pipeline, we curate instances covering 15 generation domains, 16 editing operation types, and 11 repair defect types, each annotated at Easy/Medium/Hard levels. For evaluation, we adopt a checklist-guided LLM-as-a-Judge protocol for editing and repair, and propose a novel Agent-as-a-Judge paradigm for generation that autonomously executes generated websites in a real browser, explores interactive behaviors via the Model Context Protocol (MCP), and iteratively synthesizes targeted test cases, closely approximating human acceptance testing. We evaluate representative closed-source and open-source models and observe that: (1) closed-source models remain substantially stronger and more balanced; (2) editing and repair exhibit distinct difficulty profiles, with repair preserving interactivity better but remaining execution-challenging; (3) aesthetics is the most persistent bottleneck, especially for open-source models; and (4) framework choice materially affects outcomes, with Vue consistently challenging while React and Vanilla/HTML perform more strongly depending on task type.

</details>


### [287] [Scaling Human-AI Coding Collaboration Requires a Governable Consensus Layer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17883)
*Tianfu Wang,Zhezheng Hao,Yin Wu,Wei Wu,Qiang Lin,Hande Dong,Nicholas Jing Yuan,Hui Xiong*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出Agentic Consensus范式，用类型属性图（共识层C）替代代码作为主要工程制品，通过同步操作符Phi和Psi保持可执行制品与C的一致性，将证据直接链接到结构声明，解决AI辅助开发中维度塌缩导致的系统不透明和脆弱性问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Vibe coding能快速生成可执行代码，但缺乏结构承诺、依赖关系和证据记录，导致评审者无法确定不变量、变更原因或回归根源。这不是生成失败，而是控制失败：AI辅助开发的主要制品（代码加聊天记录）发生维度塌缩，将复杂的系统拓扑扁平化为低维文本，使系统变得不透明且脆弱。

Method: 提出Agentic Consensus范式，包含：(1) 共识层C——一个可操作的世界模型，表示为类型属性图，替代代码作为主要工程制品；(2) 同步操作符Phi（实现）和Psi（再水化），用于从C派生出可执行制品并保持对应关系；(3) 证据直接链接到C中的结构声明，使每个承诺可审计；(4) 将欠规格明确量化为共识熵，而非隐式猜测。

Result: 评估需从代码正确性转向对齐保真度、共识熵和干预距离三个维度。提出基准任务族，用于衡量基于共识的工作流相比基于聊天记录的基线能否减少人工干预。

Conclusion: Vibe coding的效率优势不应以系统透明性和可控性为代价。Agentic Consensus通过将共识层作为核心制品，实现了结构承诺的可审计性、欠规格的显式量化以及变更影响的可追溯性，有望在保持生成效率的同时恢复工程控制。

Abstract: Vibe coding produces correct, executable code at speed, but leaves no record of the structural commitments, dependencies, or evidence behind it. Reviewers cannot determine what invariants were assumed, what changed, or why a regression occurred. This is not a generation failure but a control failure: the dominant artifact of AI-assisted development (code plus chat history) performs dimension collapse, flattening complex system topology into low-dimensional text and making systems opaque and fragile under change. We propose Agentic Consensus: a paradigm in which the consensus layer C, an operable world model represented as a typed property graph, replaces code as the primary artifact of engineering. Executable artifacts are derived from C and kept in correspondence via synchronization operators Phi (realize) and Psi (rehydrate). Evidence links directly to structural claims in C, making every commitment auditable and under-specification explicit as measurable consensus entropy rather than a silent guess. Evaluation must move beyond code correctness toward alignment fidelity, consensus entropy, and intervention distance. We propose benchmark task families designed to measure whether consensus-based workflows reduce human intervention compared to chat-driven baselines.

</details>


<div id='cs.AR'></div>

# cs.AR [[Back]](#toc)

### [288] [AQPIM: Breaking the PIM Capacity Wall for LLMs with In-Memory Activation Quantization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18137)
*Kosuke Matsushima,Yasuyuki Okoshi,Masato Motomura,Daichi Fujiki*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: AQPIM是一种基于乘积量化（PQ）的PIM感知激活量化框架，通过直接在内存中进行量化，利用PIM的高内部带宽和对压缩数据的直接计算能力，显著减少KV缓存的内存占用和注意力计算开销，相比最先进的PIM方法实现了3.4倍加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有PIM架构在长上下文场景下难以处理Transformer模型产生的大规模KV缓存，传统PIM方法内存容量有限，稀疏注意力与PIM的数据局部性需求冲突，现有量化方法未能充分利用激活值的特性。

Method: 基于聚类向量量化的PIM专用激活量化框架，采用乘积量化（PQ）并针对LLM进行优化，直接在内存中执行量化，利用PIM高内部带宽对压缩数据进行直接计算，同时引入多种算法优化解决PQ的精度挑战。

Result: AQPIM将GPU-CPU通信量减少90%~98.5%（该通信占解码延迟的主要部分），相比最先进的PIM方法实现3.4倍加速。

Conclusion: AQPIM通过PIM感知的激活量化有效解决了长上下文场景下KV缓存的内存瓶颈，在显著减少通信开销的同时大幅提升计算效率。

Abstract: Processing-in-Memory (PIM) architectures offer a promising solution to the memory bottlenecks in data-intensive machine learning, yet often overlook the growing challenge of activation memory footprint. Conventional PIM approaches struggle with massive KV cache sizes generated in long-context scenarios by Transformer-based models, frequently exceeding PIM's limited memory capacity, while techniques like sparse attention can conflict with PIM's need for data locality. Existing PIM approaches and quantization methods are often insufficient or poorly suited for leveraging the unique characteristics of activations. This work identifies an opportunity for PIM-specialized activation quantization to enhance bandwidth and compute efficiency.
  We explore clustering-based vector quantization approaches, which align well with activation characteristics and PIM's internal bandwidth capabilities. Building on this, we introduce AQPIM, a novel PIM-aware activation quantization framework based on Product Quantization (PQ), optimizing it for modern Large Language Models (LLMs). By performing quantization directly within memory, AQPIM leverages PIM's high internal bandwidth and enables direct computation on compressed data, significantly reducing both memory footprint and computational overhead for attention computation. AQPIM addresses PQ's accuracy challenges by introducing several algorithmic optimizations. Evaluations demonstrate that AQPIM achieves significant performance improvements, drastically reducing of GPU-CPU communication that can account for 90$\sim$98.5\% of decoding latency, together with 3.4$\times$ speedup over a SOTA PIM approach.

</details>


<div id='math.AP'></div>

# math.AP [[Back]](#toc)

### [289] [Duality for the Adversarial Total Variation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18540)
*Leon Bungert,Lucas Schmitt*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 本文通过对偶技术建立了非局部全变差的正则化风险最小化框架，并给出了其在连续函数空间和本质有界函数空间中的次微分刻画。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将二分类器的对抗训练重新表述为正则化风险最小化问题，其中涉及非局部全变差正则项。为了深入理解该正则项的性质，需要建立其次微分的完整刻画。

Method: 利用对偶技巧，推导了非局部全变差的对偶表示以及涉及非局部梯度和散度的分部积分公式；分别在无穷远处消失的连续函数空间（适当度量空间）和本质有界函数空间（欧氏域）上建立了对偶表述，并在附加条件下给出了次微分的刻画。

Result: 成功建立了非局部全变差的对偶表示和分部积分公式，并在两类函数空间上给出了次微分的完整刻画。

Conclusion: 该工作为对抗训练的正则化视角提供了坚实的数学基础，有助于理解对抗训练的本质和设计更优的算法。

Abstract: Adversarial training of binary classifiers can be reformulated as regularized risk minimization involving a nonlocal total variation. Building on this perspective, we establish a characterization of the subdifferential of this total variation using duality techniques. To achieve this, we derive a dual representation of the nonlocal total variation and a related integration of parts formula, involving a nonlocal gradient and divergence. We provide such duality statements both in the space of continuous functions vanishing at infinity on proper metric spaces and for the space of essentially bounded functions on Euclidean domains. Furthermore, under some additional conditions we provide characterizations of the subdifferential in these settings.

</details>


### [290] [DeepRitzSplit Neural Operator for Phase-Field Models via Energy Splitting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18261)
*Chih-Kang Huang,Ludovick Gagnon,Miha Založnik,Benoît Appolaire*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 本文提出一种结合经典凸凹分裂格式与物理信息学习的神经算子方法（RDNO），用于加速相场模型模拟。该方法基于Deep Ritz方法，通过能量分裂变分公式训练神经算子，确保能量耗散性质。在各项同性Allen-Cahn方程和各向异性枝晶生长模拟中，物理信息训练相比纯数据驱动训练具有更好的泛化能力，且推理速度快于传统傅里叶谱方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 相场模型的多尺度和非线性特性需要精细的空间和时间离散化，导致计算时间过长。现有方法计算成本高，需要开发更高效的替代方案。

Method: 1) 提出结合凸凹分裂格式与物理信息学习的神经算子方法；2) 采用Deep Ritz方法，用神经算子逼近相场模型的变分公式；3) 通过能量分裂变分公式训练，强制模型保持能量耗散性质；4) 设计专用的反应-扩散神经算子（RDNO）架构，适配模型方程算子。

Result: 1) 成功应用于各向同性Allen-Cahn方程和各向异性枝晶生长模拟；2) 物理信息训练在分布外评估中比数据驱动训练具有更好的泛化能力；3) 推理速度比传统傅里叶谱方法更快。

Conclusion: 物理信息驱动的神经算子方法能有效加速相场模型模拟，同时保持能量耗散性质，并具备良好的泛化能力和计算效率。

Abstract: The multi-scale and non-linear nature of phase-field models of solidification requires fine spatial and temporal discretization, leading to long computation times. This could be overcome with artificial-intelligence approaches. Surrogate models based on neural operators could have a lower computational cost than conventional numerical discretization methods.
  We propose a new neural operator approach that bridges classical convex-concave splitting schemes with physics-informed learning to accelerate the simulation of phase-field models. It consists of a Deep Ritz method, where a neural operator is trained to approximate a variational formulation of the phase-field model. By training the neural operator with an energy-splitting variational formulation, we enforce the energy dissipation property of the underlying models.
  We further introduce a custom Reaction-Diffusion Neural Operator (RDNO) architecture, adapted to the operators of the model equations. We successfully apply the deep learning approach to the isotropic Allen-Cahn equation and to anisotropic dendritic growth simulation. We demonstrate that our physically-informed training provides better generalization in out-of-distribution evaluations than data-driven training, while achieving faster inference than traditional Fourier spectral methods.

</details>


<div id='cond-mat.mtrl-sci'></div>

# cond-mat.mtrl-sci [[Back]](#toc)

### [291] [Multimodal Transformer for Sample-Aware Prediction of Metal-Organic Framework Properties](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19383)
*Seunghee Han,Jaewoong Lee,Jihan Kim*

Main category: cond-mat.mtrl-sci

TL;DR: EXIT是一种多模态Transformer模型，结合MOFid和XRD数据实现样品感知的MOF性能预测，解决了传统模型假设同一框架对应单一性能值的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统机器学习模型假设单个MOF框架表示对应单一性能值，但实验MOF样品由于结晶度、相纯度、缺陷等样品依赖性因素，即使报告为相同框架也可能表现出不同性能，需要样品感知的预测方法。

Method: 开发EXIT多模态Transformer，结合MOFid（编码MOF身份）和XRD（提供实验样品状态信息）。先在100万个假设MOF上使用模拟XRD进行预训练学习可迁移表示，然后在文献衍生的实验数据集上微调，用于比表面积和孔体积预测。

Result: EXIT相比现有方法有更好的下游性能；加入实验XRD数据相比无XRD模型提高了预测性能；注意力分析和样品级案例研究表明，当相同MOF身份的样品XRD模式不同时，EXIT会分配不同的预测结果。

Conclusion: EXIT实现了从框架感知到样品感知的MOF性能预测的实际步骤，强调了将实验表征纳入多孔材料信息学的重要性。

Abstract: Metal-organic frameworks (MOFs) are a major target of machine-learning-based property prediction, yet most models assume that a single framework representation maps to a single property value. This assumption becomes problematic for experimental MOFs, where samples reported as the same framework can exhibit different properties because of differences in crystallinity, phase purity, defects, and other sample-dependent factors. Here we introduce Experimental X-ray Diffraction Integrated Transformer (EXIT), a multimodal transformer for sample-aware prediction of MOF properties that combines MOFid with X-ray diffraction (XRD). In EXIT, MOFid encodes MOF identity, whereas XRD provides complementary information about the experimentally realized sample state. EXIT is pre-trained on one million hypothetical MOFs with simulated XRD to learn transferable representations, leading to improved downstream performance relative to existing approaches. EXIT is fine-tuned on literature-derived experimental datasets for surface area and pore volume prediction. Incorporating experimental XRD improves predictive performance relative to models without experimental XRD, and attention analysis and sample-level case studies further show that EXIT assigns different predictions to samples sharing the same MOF identity when their XRD patterns differ. These results establish a practical step from framework-aware to sample-aware MOF property prediction and highlight the value of incorporating experimental characterization into porous materials informatics.

</details>


<div id='q-bio.NC'></div>

# q-bio.NC [[Back]](#toc)

### [292] [OmniMouse: Scaling properties of multi-modal, multi-task Brain Models on 150B Neural Tokens](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18827)
*Konstantin F. Willeke,Polina Turishcheva,Alex Gilbert,Goirik Chakrabarty,Hasan A. Bedel,Paul G. Fahey,Yongrong Qiu,Marissa A. Weis,Michaela Vystrčilová,Taliah Muhammad,Lydia Ntanavara,Rachel E. Froebe,Kayla Ponder,Zheng Huan Tan,Emin Orhan,Erick Cobos,Sophia Sanborn,Katrin Franke,Fabian H. Sinz,Alexander S. Ecker,Andreas S. Tolias*

Main category: q-bio.NC

TL;DR: OmniMouse是一个基于310万神经元记录的多模态、多任务模型，在视觉皮层建模中达到SOTA性能。研究发现模型性能随数据量可靠扩展，但模型规模增大带来的收益趋于饱和，这与语言/视觉领域的AI扩展规律相反，表明脑建模领域仍处于数据受限状态。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索AI领域中数据与模型规模扩展规律是否适用于大脑活动建模，验证在视觉皮层神经活动预测中是否也存在类似的规模扩展效应。

Method: 基于73只小鼠视觉皮层310万神经元的记录数据（超过1500亿神经token），训练多模态、多任务模型OmniMouse，支持神经预测、行为解码、神经预测三种模式的灵活组合，并与专门的基线模型进行对比评估。

Result: OmniMouse在几乎所有评估场景下达到SOTA性能；性能随数据量可靠提升，但模型规模增大带来的收益饱和。这一结果与语言和视觉领域"更大模型带来更大提升"的规律相反。

Conclusion: 脑建模领域仍处于数据受限状态，即使小鼠视觉皮层这种相对简单的系统也是如此。系统性的规模扩展现象暗示，更大更丰富的数据集可能带来神经建模中的相变，类似于大语言模型中涌现的 emergent properties。

Abstract: Scaling data and artificial neural networks has transformed AI, driving breakthroughs in language and vision. Whether similar principles apply to modeling brain activity remains unclear. Here we leveraged a dataset of 3.1 million neurons from the visual cortex of 73 mice across 323 sessions, totaling more than 150 billion neural tokens recorded during natural movies, images and parametric stimuli, and behavior. We train multi-modal, multi-task models that support three regimes flexibly at test time: neural prediction, behavioral decoding, neural forecasting, or any combination of the three. OmniMouse achieves state-of-the-art performance, outperforming specialized baselines across nearly all evaluation regimes. We find that performance scales reliably with more data, but gains from increasing model size saturate. This inverts the standard AI scaling story: in language and computer vision, massive datasets make parameter scaling the primary driver of progress, whereas in brain modeling -- even in the mouse visual cortex, a relatively simple system -- models remain data-limited despite vast recordings. The observation of systematic scaling raises the possibility of phase transitions in neural modeling, where larger and richer datasets might unlock qualitatively new capabilities, paralleling the emergent properties seen in large language models. Code available at https://github.com/enigma-brain/omnimouse.

</details>


<div id='math.ST'></div>

# math.ST [[Back]](#toc)

### [293] [Conformal Robust Set Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18441)
*Alejandro Cholaquidis,Emilien Joly,Leonardo Moreno*

Main category: math.ST

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于半质量半径（即到第⌊n/2⌋+1近邻的距离）的鲁棒共形预测方法，该方法在有限样本下具有边际有效性，并在温和条件下收敛到基于距离测度的总体中心集，同时建立了指数浓度界和尾界来量化经验与总体共形区域之间的偏差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准共形预测方法在存在异常值或重尾分布时缺乏鲁棒性，需要一种既能保持有限样本覆盖保证、又能抵抗异常干扰的鲁棒共形方法。

Method: 提出基于半质量半径（half-mass radius）的非符合性分数，即点到其第⌊n/2⌋+1近邻的距离；利用该分数构造共形预测区域，并证明其在可交换性假设下的边际有效性。

Result: 该方法在任意样本量下均具有边际有效性，且经验共形区域依概率收敛到基于距离测度（distance-to-a-measure）的总体中心集；建立了指数浓度界和尾界，量化了经验区域与总体区域之间的偏差。

Conclusion: 鲁棒几何分数在共形预测中具有理论合理性，即使对于重尾或多模态分布也能提供稳健的预测区域。

Abstract: Conformal prediction provides finite-sample, distribution-free coverage under exchangeability, but standard constructions may lack robustness in the presence of outliers or heavy tails. We propose a robust conformal method based on a non-conformity score defined as the half-mass radius around a point, equivalently the distance to its $(\lfloor n/2\rfloor+1)$-nearest neighbour.
  We show that the resulting conformal regions are marginally valid for any sample size and converge in probability to a robust population central set defined through a distance-to-a-measure functional. Under mild regularity conditions, we establish exponential concentration and tail bounds that quantify the deviation between the empirical conformal region and its population counterpart.
