These results provide a probabilistic justification for using robust geometric scores in conformal prediction, even for heavy-tailed or multi-modal distributions.

</details>


### [294] [Horospherical Depth and Busemann Median on Hadamard Manifolds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18242)
*Yangdi Jiang,Xiaotian Chang,Cyrus Mostajeran*

Main category: math.ST

TL;DR: 本文在Hadamard流形上提出了一种新的统计深度——球面深度（horospherical depth），通过Busemann函数替代线性泛函，将Tukey半空间深度推广到非正曲率黎曼流形上。该深度由视觉边界参数化、等距等变、无需切空间线性化或基点选择。作者证明了深度区域嵌套且测地凸、存在深度至少1/(d+1)的中心点、Borel概率测度的Busemann中位数存在性；在严格负曲率下深度严格拟凹且中位数唯一；建立了对全变差扰动的稳健性以及样本深度的一致相合性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将经典欧氏空间中的统计深度（如Tukey半空间深度）推广到Hadamard流形（非正截面曲率的完备单连通黎曼流形）上，解决流形数据无全局线性结构、传统深度依赖切空间线性化或基点选择的问题。

Method: 利用Busemann函数（距离函数沿测地线重标度极限）构造深度：定义horospherical深度为概率测度在Busemann函数负子水平集（horoball）上的最小概率质量；其最大化集合定义为Busemann中位数。理论分析包括深度区域的嵌套性与测地凸性、中心点存在性、唯一性条件、稳健性以及样本版本的相合性。

Result: (1) 深度区域嵌套且测地凸；(2) 存在深度≥1/(d+1)的中心点（centerpoint）；(3) Busemann中位数对任意Borel概率测度存在；(4) 严格负曲率+正则性假设下深度严格拟凹、中位数唯一；(5) 全变差扰动下深度稳定；(6) 污染质量沿测地线逃逸时极限中位数仅依赖逃逸方向而非距离（区别于Fréchet均值）；(7) 样本深度一致相合，深度区域与中位数收敛（对称空间上通过VC论证，一般Hadamard流形上通过紧致性+非原子假设）。

Conclusion: Horospherical深度是Hadamard流形上一种自然的、几何驱动的统计深度，兼具理论优美性（等距等变、无基点依赖）和实用性质（稳健性、相合性），为流形数据的非参数推断提供了新工具。

Abstract: \We introduce the horospherical depth, an intrinsic notion of statistical depth on Hadamard manifolds, and define the Busemann median as the set of its maximizers. The construction exploits the fact that the linear functionals appearing in Tukey's half-space depth are themselves limits of renormalized distance functions; on a Hadamard manifold the same limiting procedure produces Busemann functions, whose sublevel sets are horoballs, the intrinsic replacements for halfspaces. The resulting depth is parametrized by the visual boundary, is isometry-equivariant, and requires neither tangent-space linearization nor a chosen base point.For arbitrary Hadamard manifolds, we prove that the depth regions are nested and geodesically convex, that a centerpoint of depth at least $1/(d+1)$ exists, and hence that the Busemann median exists for every Borel probability measure. Under strictly negative sectional curvature and mild regularity assumptions, the depth is strictly quasi-concave and the median is unique. We also establish robustness: the depth is stable under total-variation perturbations, and under contamination escaping to infinity the limiting median depends on the escape direction but not on how far the contaminating mass has moved along the geodesic ray, in contrast with the Fréchet mean. Finally, we establish uniform consistency of the sample depth and convergence of sample depth regions and sample Busemann medians; on symmetric spaces of noncompact type, the argument proceeds through a VC analysis of upper horospherical halfspaces, while on general Hadamard manifolds it follows from a compactness argument under a mild non-atomicity assumption.

</details>


<div id='cs.HC'></div>

# cs.HC [[Back]](#toc)

### [295] [Continuous Focus Groups: A Longitudinal Method for Clinical HRI in Autism Care](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18197)
*Ghiglino Davide,Foglino Caterina,Wykowska Agnieszka*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: 提出连续焦点小组方法，用于在自闭症儿童机器人辅助治疗中实现纵向定性研究，解决传统方法无法捕捉利益相关者观点随时间演变的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统定性方法在HRI中通常以静态或一次性形式应用，无法捕捉利益相关者观点随时间的演变。这在临床环境中尤为突出，因为家庭和患者负担重，难以参与重复的研究接触。需要一种能够持续对话、捕捉观点演变的方法。

Method: 引入连续焦点小组方法，这是一种纵向、共动性的方法，与自闭症儿童辅助护理专业人员保持持续对话。在机器人辅助治疗协议的不同阶段组织了三个焦点小组，使参与者能够在干预进展过程中重新审视和修正早期观点。

Result: 连续性培养了信任，支持将隐性临床专业知识整合到设计决策中，并作为伦理保障机制，允许参与者重新协商参与度并提出新关切。该方法将家庭、儿童和临床医生的治疗迭代与研究者和开发者的研究设计迭代连接起来。

Conclusion: 连续焦点小组提供了一种在实践上可行、设计上严谨的方法论贡献。除了自闭症护理外，该方法为HRI中的定性研究提供了一个可转移的框架，特别适用于直接用户参与有限且连续性至关重要的敏感领域。

Abstract: Qualitative methods are important to use alongside quantitative methods to improve Human-Robot Interaction (HRI), yet they are often applied in static or one-off formats that cannot capture how stakeholder perspectives evolve over time. This limitation is especially evident in clinical contexts, where families and patients face heavy burdens and cannot easily participate in repeated research encounters. To address this gap, we introduce continuous focus groups, a longitudinal and co-agential method designed to sustain dialogue with assistive care professionals working with children with autism spectrum disorder (ASD). Three focus groups were organized across successive phases of a robot-assisted therapeutic protocol, enabling participants to revisit and refine earlier views as the intervention progressed. Results show that continuity fostered trust, supported the integration of tacit clinical expertise into design decisions, and functioned as an ethical safeguard by allowing participants to renegotiate involvement and surface new concerns. By bridging the therapeutic iteration of families, children, and clinicians with the research-design iteration of researchers and developers, continuous focus groups provide a methodological contribution that is both feasible in practice and rigorous in design. Beyond autism care, this approach offers a transferable framework for advancing qualitative research in HRI, particularly in sensitive domains where direct user participation is limited and continuity is essential.

</details>


### [296] [Beyond Semantic Similarity: A Component-Wise Evaluation Framework for Medical Question Answering Systems with Health Equity Implications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19281)
*Abu Noman Md Sakib,Md. Main Oddin Chisty,Zijie Zhang*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: 提出VB-Score评估框架，用于评估医疗问答LLMs在实体识别、语义相似性、事实一致性和结构化信息完整性四个维度的表现，发现现有模型在语义准确性和实体准确性之间存在显著差异，且存在基于条件的算法歧视。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前评估医疗问答LLMs的方法主要关注语义匹配，无法真实反映模型的医疗准确性或健康公平性风险。需要更全面的评估框架来识别模型在医疗实体识别、事实一致性等方面的表现，以及可能存在的算法歧视问题。

Method: 提出VB-Score（Verification-Based Score）评估框架，分别评估医疗问答模型的四个组件：实体识别、语义相似性、事实一致性和结构化信息完整性。对三个知名LLMs在48个公共卫生主题上的表现进行严格评估，数据来源于高质量权威信息源。

Result: 发现模型语义准确性和实体准确性之间存在重大差异。所有三个模型在评估标准下都表现出几乎一致的严重性能缺陷。模型在涉及老年和少数群体慢性病的公共卫生主题上表现平均低13.8%，表明存在基于条件的算法歧视。提示工程无法弥补模型在提取医疗实体方面的基本架构限制。

Conclusion: 仅依赖语义评估不足以衡量医疗AI安全性。需要更全面的评估框架如VB-Score来识别医疗问答LLMs的性能缺陷和公平性问题。模型在特定人群相关主题上的表现差异揭示了算法歧视风险，需要进一步研究和改进。

Abstract: The use of Large Language Models (LLMs) to support patients in addressing medical questions is becoming increasingly prevalent. However, most of the measures currently used to evaluate the performance of these models in this context only measure how closely a model's answers match semantically, and therefore do not provide a true indication of the model's medical accuracy or of the health equity risks associated with it. To address these shortcomings, we present a new evaluation framework for medical question answering called VB-Score (Verification-Based Score) that provides a separate evaluation of the four components of entity recognition, semantic similarity, factual consistency, and structured information completeness for medical question-answering models. We perform rigorous reviews of the performance of three well-known and widely used LLMs on 48 public health-related topics taken from high-quality, authoritative information sources. Based on our analyses, we discover a major discrepancy between the models' semantic and entity accuracy. Our assessments of the performance of all three models show that each of them has almost uniformly severe performance failures when evaluated against our criteria. Our findings indicate alarming performance disparities across various public health topics, with most of the models exhibiting 13.8% lower performance (compared to an overall average) for all the public health topics that relate to chronic conditions that occur in older and minority populations, which indicates the existence of what's known as condition-based algorithmic discrimination. Our findings also demonstrate that prompt engineering alone does not compensate for basic architectural limitations on how these models perform in extracting medical entities and raise the question of whether semantic evaluation alone is a sufficient measure of medical AI safety.

</details>


### [297] [Co-Refine: AI-Powered Tool Supporting Qualitative Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19309)
*Athikash Jeyaganthan,Kai Xu,Franziska Becker,Steffen Koch*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: Co-Refine是一个AI增强的质性编码平台，通过三阶段审计管道实时检测编码一致性漂移，使用确定性嵌入指标约束LLM输出，提供持续反馈而不干扰研究流程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 质性编码中，研究人员在大型数据集上应用代码时，代码解释经常随时间发生漂移（时间漂移），这会降低分析的可信度。现有的计算机辅助质性数据分析工具仅支持数据管理，但缺乏实时检测这些漂移的工作流程。

Method: Co-Refine采用三阶段审计管道：第一阶段计算基于确定性嵌入的数学一致性指标；第二阶段将LLM判决结果约束在确定性分数±0.15范围内；第三阶段从先前模式生成代码定义，创建深化反馈循环。

Result: Co-Refine证明确定性评分能够有效约束LLM输出，为质性分析产生可靠、实时的审计信号，提供持续、基于证据的编码一致性反馈。

Conclusion: 该平台展示了AI增强质性编码的可行性，通过结合确定性指标和LLM能力，在不干扰研究人员工作流程的情况下，实时检测和纠正编码漂移，提高质性分析的可信度。

Abstract: Qualitative coding relies on a researcher's application of codes to textual data. As coding proceeds across large datasets, interpretations of codes often shift (temporal drift), reducing the credibility of the analysis. Existing Computer-Assisted Qualitative Data Analysis (CAQDAS) tools provide support for data management but offer no workflow for real-time detection of these drifts. We present Co-Refine, an AI-augmented qualitative coding platform that delivers continuous, grounded feedback on coding consistency without disrupting the researcher's workflow. The system employs a three-stage audit pipeline: Stage 1 computes deterministic embedding-based metrics for mathematical consistency; Stage 2 grounds LLM verdicts within $\pm0.15$ of the deterministic scores; and Stage 3 produces code definitions from previous patterns to create a deepening feedback loop. Co-Refine demonstrates that deterministic scoring can effectively constrain LLM outputs to produce reliable, real-time audit signals for qualitative analysis.

</details>


### [298] [Relational AI in Education: Reciprocity, Participatory Design, and Indigenous Worldviews](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19099)
*Roberto Martinez-Maldonado,Vanessa Echeverria,Jenna Hawes,YJ Kim,Zara Maddigan,Mikaela Milesi,Todd Nelson,Yi-Shan Tsai*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: 论文提出将教育AI重新定位为关系设计问题，强调AI应支持而非替代人类互动，基于参与式设计和原住民世界观构建互惠的AI教育框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前生成式AI在教育中过度强调效率、自动化和个性化辅助，可能削弱教育作为社会性、建构性和关系性实践的本质。AI教育研究尚未充分阐明如何设计AI以维持学习发生所依赖的社会和生态关系。

Method: 采用参与式设计实践，借鉴原住民世界观（包括澳大利亚原住民、美洲原住民和中美洲传统），将学习者-AI互动重新定义为具有明确目的和边界的情境特定关系。提出三个核心方向：1) 将AIED概念化为基于互惠的关系设计问题；2) 阐明生成式AI在教育中引入的关键张力；3) 提出扩展AIED设计空间的设计方向。

Result: 构建了以互惠为核心的教育AI设计框架，强调AI应支持"与他人一起学习"而非"替代他人"。提出了包括何时不使用AI、如何定义教学边界、如何支持负责任使用AI以维持社区和自然环境的具体设计方向。

Conclusion: 教育AI的设计应重新聚焦于关系性，将学习者-AI互动视为具有明确目的和边界的情境特定关系，而不是人类互动的替代品。基于互惠原则的设计能够支持学习的社会和生态维度，维持学习发生的社区和自然环境。

Abstract: Education is not merely the transmission of information or the optimisation of individual performance; it is a fundamentally social, constructive, and relational practice. However, recent advances in generative artificial intelligence (GenAI) increasingly emphasise efficiency, automation, and individualised assistance, risking the weakening of relational learning processes. Despite growing adoption, AI in education (AIED) research has yet to fully articulate how AI can be designed in ways that sustain the social and ecological relationships through which learning occurs. In this paper, we re-centre education as relational and frame learner-AI interactions as context-specific relationships with clearly defined purposes and boundaries, rather than positioning them as substitutes for, or replacements of, human interaction. Grounded in participatory design practices and inspired by Indigenous worldviews (including Aboriginal Australian, Native American, and Mesoamerican traditions) that foreground reciprocity and relational accountability, we argue that meaningful educational AI should support learning with others rather than replace them. We advance this perspective by: i) conceptualising AIED as a relational design problem grounded in reciprocity; ii) articulating key tensions introduced by GenAI in education; and iii) outlining design directions that expand the AIED design space toward reciprocity, including when not to use AI, how to define pedagogical boundaries, and how to support responsible uses of AIED innovations that sustain communities and natural environments.

</details>


### [299] [Choose Your Own Adventure: Non-Linear AI-Assisted Programming with EvoGraph](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18883)
*Vassilios Exarhakos,Jinghui Cheng,Jin L. C. Guo*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: EvoGraph是一个IDE插件，将AI交互和代码变更整合为轻量级交互式开发图，支持分支式AI辅助编程历史记录和操作，解决了开发者探索替代方案、管理提示序列和追踪变更的挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前AI辅助编程工具主要是线性和聊天式的，这与编程本身的迭代和分支特性不符。初步研究发现开发者在使用AI助手时难以探索替代方案、管理提示序列和追踪变更。

Method: 开发了EvoGraph IDE插件，自动记录分支式AI辅助编程历史，将AI交互和代码变更整合为交互式开发图。允许开发者操作图结构来比较、合并和重新访问先前的协作AI编程状态。

Result: 20名参与者的用户研究表明，EvoGraph解决了初步研究中发现的开发者挑战，同时降低了认知负荷。参与者发现基于图的表示支持安全探索、高效迭代和对AI生成变更的反思。

Conclusion: 这项工作强调了在AI介导的编程背景下，工具设计可以帮助开发者理解和处理问题解决过程的机会。基于图的表示方法为AI辅助编程工具提供了新的设计方向。

Abstract: Current AI-assisted programming tools are predominantly linear and chat-based, which deviates from the iterative and branching nature of programming itself. Our preliminary study with developers using AI assistants suggested that they often struggle to explore alternatives, manage prompting sequences, and trace changes. Informed by these insights, we created EvoGraph, an IDE plugin that integrates AI interactions and code changes as a lightweight and interactive development graph. EvoGraph automatically records a branching AI-assisted coding history and allows developers to manipulate the graph to compare, merge, and revisit prior collaborative AI programming states. Our user study with 20 participants revealed that EvoGraph addressed developers' challenges identified in our preliminary study while imposing lower cognitive load. Participants also found the graph-based representation supported safe exploration, efficient iteration, and reflection on AI-generated changes. Our work highlights design opportunities for tools to help developers make sense of and act on their problem-solving progress in the emerging AI-mediated programming context.

</details>


### [300] [EEG-Based Emergency Braking Intensity Prediction Using Blind Source Separation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18220)
*Zikun Zhou,Wenshuo Wang,Wenzhuo Liu,Hui Yao,Chaopeng Zhang,Yichen Liu,Xiaonan Yang,Junqiang Xi*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于独立成分分析（ICA）的EEG信号框架，通过分解、筛选与制动相关的脑电成分，结合分层聚类识别出具有稳定时空模式的神经信号，用于200ms水平的制动强度预测，在公开数据集和仿真实验中均优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: EEG信号在长期制动强度预测中具有潜力，但易受各种伪迹干扰，限制了其可靠性。现有方法未能有效分离和利用与制动行为强相关的脑电成分。

Method: 采用ICA将EEG分解为独立盲源成分；结合时频分析与皮尔逊相关系数筛选制动相关成分；使用层次聚类将相关成分分为两个具有不同空间模式的簇；利用这些成分的功率特征结合历史制动数据进行200ms水平的制动强度预测。

Result: 在公开数据集上RMSE降低8.0%，在人机闭环仿真实验中RMSE降低23.8%，均优于当前最优方法。

Conclusion: 所提出的框架能够提取出试次不变、时空稳定的制动相关神经特征，显著提升了制动强度预测的准确性，为基于EEG的智能驾驶辅助系统提供了可靠的技术路径。

Abstract: Electroencephalography (EEG) signals have been promising for long-term braking intensity prediction but are prone to various artifacts that limit their reliability. Here, we propose a novel framework that models EEG signals as mixtures of independent blind sources and identifies those strongly correlated with braking action. Our method employs independent component analysis to decompose EEG into different components and combines time-frequency analysis with Pearson correlations to select braking-related components. Furthermore, we utilize hierarchical clustering to group braking-related components into two clusters, each characterized by a distinct spatial pattern. Additionally, these components exhibit trial-invariant temporal patterns and demonstrate stable and common neural signatures of the emergency braking process. Using power features from these components and historical braking data, we predict braking intensity at a 200 ms horizon. Evaluations on the open source dataset (O.D.) and human-in-the-loop simulation (H.S.) show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art approaches, achieving RMSE reductions of 8.0% (O.D.) and 23.8% (H.S.).

</details>


### [301] [The Collaboration Gap in Human-AI Work](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18096)
*Varad Vishwarupe,Marina Jirotka,Nigel Shadbolt,Ivan Flechais*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: 本文通过16位从业者访谈和建构主义扎根理论分析，提出LLM协作的稳定性不仅取决于模型能力，更依赖于交互中的"基础条件"(grounding conditions)。区分了三种人机协作结构：一次性协助、弱协作（不对称修复）和基础协作，并指出协作崩溃的原因是"合作表象"超越了交互的基础承载能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM被宣传为编程、设计、写作和分析中的协作者，但实际使用中用户常需诊断误解、重构缺失假设、反复修复不对齐的响应。本文旨在解释为什么这种协作仍然脆弱，缺乏稳定的理论基础。

Method: 基于建构主义扎根理论(constructivist grounded theory)，对16位从事LLM系统工作的设计师、开发者和AI从业者进行半结构化访谈，并结合人机协作文献进行理论分析。

Result: 识别出三种人机工作结构：一次性协助(one-shot assistance)、弱协作(weak collaboration with asymmetric repair)和基础协作(grounded collaboration)。提出协作崩溃机制：合作表象(partnership appearance)超越了交互的基础承载能力(grounding capacity)。

Conclusion: 稳定的LLM协作依赖于交互的"基础条件"(grounding conditions)，而不仅仅是模型能力。研究贡献了用于讨论LLM工作中的基础(grounding)、修复(repair)和交互结构(interaction structure)的分析框架。

Abstract: LLMs are increasingly presented as collaborators in programming, design, writing, and analysis. Yet the practical experience of working with them often falls short of this promise. In many settings, users must diagnose misunderstandings, reconstruct missing assumptions, and repeatedly repair misaligned responses. This poster introduces a conceptual framework for understanding why such collaboration remains fragile. Drawing on a constructivist grounded theory analysis of 16 interviews with designers, developers, and applied AI practitioners working on LLM-enabled systems, and informed by literature on human-AI collaboration, we argue that stable collaboration depends not only on model capability but on the interaction's grounding conditions. We distinguish three recurrent structures of human-AI work: one-shot assistance, weak collaboration with asymmetric repair, and grounded collaboration. We propose that collaboration breaks down when the appearance of partnership outpaces the grounding capacity of the interaction and contribute a framework for discussing grounding, repair, and interaction structure in LLM-enabled work.

</details>


### [302] [Real-Time Cellist Postural Evaluation With On-Device Computer Vision](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17530)
*Paolo Wang,Michael Zhang,Shrinand Perumal,Ekaterina Tszyao,Luke Choi,Kexin Sha,Felix Lu,Paige Lorenz,Jackson P. Shields,Sivamurugan Velmurugan,Joshua Kamphuis,William P. Jiang,Gurtej Bagga,Trevor Ju,Raymond Otis Kwon,Kristen Yeon-Ji Yun,Yung-Hsiang Lu*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: 本文提出Cello Evaluator，一个基于Android手机的实时姿势反馈系统，利用计算机视觉和机器学习为大提琴初学者提供练习时的姿势评估，通过启发式评估验证了其可用性和帮助性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 器乐初学者每周仅接受一次指导，课间缺乏姿势反馈，导致姿势退化、增加肌肉骨骼损伤风险和技术效率低下；现有计算机视觉方案依赖昂贵硬件或多传感器设置，可用性和便利性极为有限。

Method: 针对移动设备优化计算机视觉推理，在Android手机上实现实时姿势评估系统Cello Evaluator，并采用由大提琴专家和用户体验专家组成的启发式评估进行验证。

Result: 启发式评估结果显示该应用被评估为用户友好且有帮助。

Conclusion: Cello Evaluator通过优化移动端推理，使任何拥有当前一代Android手机的用户都能获得大提琴姿势评估，有效填补了个人练习中的姿势反馈空白。

Abstract: Posture is a critical factor for beginning instrumental learners. Most students receive instruction only once a week, and during the intervals between lessons they have little or no feedback on their physical posture. As a result, posture often deteriorates, increasing the risk of musculoskeletal injury and inefficient technique. Recent advances in computer vision and machine learning make it possible to evaluate posture without the constant presence of a human expert. However, current solutions have been extremely limited in availability and convenience due to their reliance on computationally expensive hardware or multi-sensor setups. We present Cello Evaluator, a real-time postural feedback system for practicing cellists. Through this optimization for on-device computer vision inference, we provide access to cellist postural evaluation to anyone with a current generation Android phone and thus reduces the postural feedback voids within individual practice. To validate our mobile application, we conduct a heuristic evaluation consisting of cellist and UX experts. Overall feedback from the evaluation found the app to be user friendly and helpful.

</details>


### [303] [Human Centered Non Intrusive Driver State Modeling Using Personalized Physiological Signals in Real World Automated Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11549)
*David Puertas-Ramirez,Raul Fernandez-Matellan,David Martin Gomez,Jesus G. Boticario*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: 本研究探索了在真实SAE Level 2自动驾驶场景中，利用可穿戴非侵入式生理传感器（Empatica E4）构建个性化驾驶员状态模型的可行性。通过将多模态生理信号（EDA、心率、体温、运动数据）转换为二维表示并采用预训练ResNet50架构处理，个性化模型平均准确率达92.68%，而跨用户泛化模型仅54%，表明个体生理变异性显著，亟需自适应个性化驾驶员监控系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有驾驶员监控系统（DMS）大多采用通用化模型，忽略了个体间生理信号的显著差异，导致跨用户泛化能力不足。为实现L2-L3级自动驾驶中人机安全协作，需要验证个性化生理状态建模的可行性并揭示通用模型的局限性。

Method: 在SAE Level 2实车中，使用Empatica E4可穿戴传感器采集四位驾驶员的皮肤电活动、心率、体温及运动数据等多模态生理信号。将一维生理信号转换为二维表征（如频谱图等图像形式），利用预训练的ResNet50作为特征提取器构建多模态深度学习架构，分别训练个性化模型（单用户数据）和通用化模型（多用户混合数据）进行对比。

Result: 个性化模型平均准确率高达92.68%，而通用化模型准确率骤降至54%，验证了驾驶员生理信号存在显著的个体间变异性，通用模型无法有效跨用户迁移。

Conclusion: 未来自动驾驶车辆必须采用自适应的个性化驾驶员监控系统，根据每位驾驶员独特的生理特征进行动态调整，而非依赖"一刀切"的通用模型，这对L2-L3级自动驾驶的安全人机协作至关重要。

Abstract: In vehicles with partial or conditional driving automation (SAE Levels 2-3), the driver remains responsible for supervising the system and responding to take-over requests. Therefore, reliable driver monitoring is essential for safe human-automation collaboration. However, most existing Driver Monitoring Systems rely on generalized models that ignore individual physiological variability. In this study, we examine the feasibility of personalized driver state modeling using non-intrusive physiological sensing during real-world automated driving. We conducted experiments in an SAE Level 2 vehicle using an Empatica E4 wearable sensor to capture multimodal physiological signals, including electrodermal activity, heart rate, temperature, and motion data. To leverage deep learning architectures designed for images, we transformed the physiological signals into two-dimensional representations and processed them using a multimodal architecture based on pre-trained ResNet50 feature extractors. Experiments across four drivers demonstrate substantial interindividual variability in physiological patterns related to driver awareness. Personalized models achieved an average accuracy of 92.68%, whereas generalized models trained on multiple users dropped to an accuracy of 54%, revealing substantial limitations in cross-user generalization. These results underscore the necessity of adaptive, personalized driver monitoring systems for future automated vehicles and imply that autonomous systems should adapt to each driver's unique physiological profile.

</details>


### [304] [Learning from AVA: Early Lessons from a Curated and Trustworthy Generative AI for Policy and Development Research](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17843)
*Nimisha Karnatak,Mohamad Chatila,Daniel Alejandro Pinzón Hernández,Reza Yazdanfar,Michelle Dugas,Renos Vakis*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: 本文提出AVA平台，基于4000+世界银行报告的多智能体系统，通过可验证引用和合理弃权实现认知谦逊。2200+人跨国评估显示每周节省2.4-3.9小时，用户将其作为专业"证据引擎"使用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 通用大语言模型在开发与政策专业领域存在 misinformation 风险，缺乏对可验证输出的认知谦逊（epistemic humility）。

Method: 构建基于4000+世界银行报告的多语言多智能体管道（multi-agent pipeline），实现两个认知谦逊机制：引用可验证性（claims溯源）和合理弃权（对无据查询提供理由并重定向）。通过日志分析、调查和20次访谈对116个国家2200+用户进行实地评估，采用双重差分法（DiD）估计效应。

Result: 双重差分估计表明持续使用每周节省2.4-3.9小时。定性发现：用户将AVA作为专业"证据引擎"；合理弃权明确范围边界；信任通过机构来源和页面锚定引用来校准。

Conclusion: 提出专业AI设计指南，并展望"生态系统感知型"谦逊AI（Humble AI）愿景。

Abstract: General-purpose LLMs pose misinformation risks for development and policy experts, lacking epistemic humility for verifiable outputs. We present AVA (AI + Verified Analysis), a GenAI platform built on a curated library of over 4,000 World Bank Reports with multilingual capabilities. AVA's multi-agent pipeline enables users to query and receive evidence-based syntheses. It operationalizes epistemic humility through two mechanisms: citation verifiability (tracing claims to sources) and reasoned abstention (declining unsupported queries with justification and redirection). We conducted an in-the-wild evaluation with over 2,200 individuals from heterogeneous organisations and roles in 116 countries, via log analysis, surveys, and 20 interviews. Difference-in-Differences estimates associate sustained engagement with 2.4-3.9 hours saved weekly. Qualitatively, participants used AVA as a specialized "evidence engine"; reasoned abstention clarified scope boundaries, and trust was calibrated through institutional provenance and page-anchored citations. We contribute design guidelines for specialized AI and articulate a vision for "ecosystem-aware" Humble AI.

</details>


### [305] [Do LLMs Need to See Everything? A Benchmark and Study of Failures in LLM-driven Smartphone Automation using Screentext vs. Screenshots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17817)
*Shiquan Zhang,Tianyi Zhang,Le Fang,Simon D'Alfonso,Hong Jia,Vassilis Kostakos*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: DailyDroid是一个包含75个任务、横跨25个Android应用、5个场景、3个难度级别的移动智能体基准测试。通过300次实验评估GPT-4o和o4-mini在纯文本和多模态输入下的表现，发现多模态输入略优。通过深入失败分析，编制了常见失败手册，揭示了UI可访问性、输入模态和LLM/应用设计中的关键问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有移动智能体常存在准确率低、误解用户指令、难以完成复杂任务等问题，而前人工作很少系统性地分析它们为何以及在何处失败。因此，本文旨在构建一个基准并系统分析失败原因。

Method: 构建DailyDroid基准（75个任务，25个Android应用，5个场景，3个难度等级）；在300次实验中评估GPT-4o和o4-mini（文本输入 vs. 多模态输入）；进行深入的失败分析并编制失败手册。

Result: 多模态输入（文本+截图）相比纯文本输入的成功率略有提升；通过失败分析揭示了UI可访问性、输入模态以及LLM/应用设计方面的关键问题。

Conclusion: DailyDroid为移动智能体的失败分析提供了系统化基准，其失败手册为未来移动智能体、应用和UI开发提供了改进方向。

Abstract: With the rapid advancement of large language models (LLMs), mobile agents have emerged as promising tools for phone automation, simulating human interactions on screens to accomplish complex tasks. However, these agents often suffer from low accuracy, misinterpretation of user instructions, and failure on challenging tasks, with limited prior work examining why and where they fail. To address this, we introduce DailyDroid, a benchmark of 75 tasks in five scenarios across 25 Android apps, spanning three difficulty levels to mimic everyday smartphone use. We evaluate it using text-only and multimodal (text + screenshot) inputs on GPT-4o and o4-mini across 300 trials, revealing comparable performance with multimodal inputs yielding marginally higher success rates. Through in-depth failure analysis, we compile a handbook of common failures. Our findings reveal critical issues in UI accessibility, input modalities, and LLM/app design, offering implications for future mobile agents, applications, and UI development.

</details>


<div id='cs.RO'></div>

# cs.RO [[Back]](#toc)

### [306] [UniT: Toward a Unified Physical Language for Human-to-Humanoid Policy Learning and World Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19734)
*Boyu Chen,Yi Chen,Lu Qiu,Jerry Bai,Yuying Ge,Yixiao Ge*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: UniT框架通过视觉锚定建立统一物理语言，解决人形机器人数据稀缺问题，实现人类到人形机器人的跨具身动作迁移


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人形机器人基础模型扩展受限于机器人数据稀缺，而大量自我中心的人类数据提供了可扩展的替代方案，但需要解决因运动学不匹配导致的跨具身鸿沟

Method: UniT采用三分支交叉重建机制：动作预测视觉以将运动学锚定到物理结果，视觉重建动作以过滤无关视觉干扰，融合分支将纯化模态协同到共享的离散潜在空间中

Result: 在策略学习(VLA-UniT)中实现最先进的数据效率和鲁棒的OOD泛化，包括零样本任务迁移；在世界建模(WM-UniT)中实现直接的人类到人形机器人动作迁移，增强动作可控性

Conclusion: 通过诱导高度对齐的跨具身表示，UniT为将大量人类知识提炼为通用人形机器人能力提供了可扩展的路径

Abstract: Scaling humanoid foundation models is bottlenecked by the scarcity of robotic data. While massive egocentric human data offers a scalable alternative, bridging the cross-embodiment chasm remains a fundamental challenge due to kinematic mismatches. We introduce UniT (Unified Latent Action Tokenizer via Visual Anchoring), a framework that establishes a unified physical language for human-to-humanoid transfer. Grounded in the philosophy that heterogeneous kinematics share universal visual consequences, UniT employs a tri-branch cross-reconstruction mechanism: actions predict vision to anchor kinematics to physical outcomes, while vision reconstructs actions to filter out irrelevant visual confounders. Concurrently, a fusion branch synergies these purified modalities into a shared discrete latent space of embodiment-agnostic physical intents. We validate UniT across two paradigms: 1) Policy Learning (VLA-UniT): By predicting these unified tokens, it effectively leverages diverse human data to achieve state-of-the-art data efficiency and robust out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization on both humanoid simulation benchmark and real-world deployments, notably demonstrating zero-shot task transfer. 2) World Modeling (WM-UniT): By aligning cross-embodiment dynamics via unified tokens as conditions, it realizes direct human-to-humanoid action transfer. This alignment ensures that human data seamlessly translates into enhanced action controllability for humanoid video generation. Ultimately, by inducing a highly aligned cross-embodiment representation (empirically verified by t-SNE visualizations revealing the convergence of human and humanoid features into a shared manifold), UniT offers a scalable path to distill vast human knowledge into general-purpose humanoid capabilities.

</details>


### [307] [Learning Hybrid-Control Policies for High-Precision In-Contact Manipulation Under Uncertainty](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19677)
*Hunter L. Brown,Geoffrey Hollinger,Stefan Lee*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出MATCH方法，通过混合位置-力控制策略动态选择控制模式，在定位不确定性下显著提升脆弱插孔任务的成功率并减少损坏


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于姿态的强化学习控制策略在涉及力约束的精细操作任务（如脆弱连接器插入）中存在局限，缺乏对力的显式控制，依赖精心调校的低级控制器避免损坏动作

Method: 提出混合位置-力控制策略，动态选择每个控制维度使用力控制还是位置控制；引入MATCH训练方法，调整策略动作概率以显式反映混合控制中的模式选择行为

Result: MATCH在极端定位不确定性下的脆弱插孔任务中显著优于姿态控制策略：成功率提高10%，损坏减少5倍；在1600次仿真到真实实验中，高噪声环境下成功率是姿态策略的两倍（68% vs 33%），平均施加力比可变阻抗策略减少30%

Conclusion: MATCH方法通过混合位置-力控制策略有效解决了精细操作任务中的力控制问题，在定位不确定性下表现出优越的性能和数据效率，为机器人精细操作提供了更可靠的控制方案

Abstract: Reinforcement learning-based control policies have been frequently demonstrated to be more effective than analytical techniques for many manipulation tasks. Commonly, these methods learn neural control policies that predict end-effector pose changes directly from observed state information. For tasks like inserting delicate connectors which induce force constraints, pose-based policies have limited explicit control over force and rely on carefully tuned low-level controllers to avoid executing damaging actions. In this work, we present hybrid position-force control policies that learn to dynamically select when to use force or position control in each control dimension. To improve learning efficiency of these policies, we introduce Mode-Aware Training for Contact Handling (MATCH) which adjusts policy action probabilities to explicitly mirror the mode selection behavior in hybrid control. We validate MATCH's learned policy effectiveness using fragile peg-in-hole tasks under extreme localization uncertainty. We find MATCH substantially outperforms pose-control policies -- solving these tasks with up to 10% higher success rates and 5x fewer peg breaks than pose-only policies under common types of state estimation error. MATCH also demonstrates data efficiency equal to pose-control policies, despite learning in a larger and more complex action space. In over 1600 sim-to-real experiments, we find MATCH succeeds twice as often as pose policies in high noise settings (33% vs.~68%) and applies ~30% less force on average compared to variable impedance policies on a Franka FR3 in laboratory conditions.

</details>


### [308] [Mask World Model: Predicting What Matters for Robust Robot Policy Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19683)
*Yunfan Lou,Xiaowei Chi,Xiaojie Zhang,Zezhong Qian,Chengxuan Li,Rongyu Zhang,Yaoxu Lyu,Guoyu Song,Chuyao Fu,Haoxuan Xu,Pengwei Wang,Shanghang Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: MWM使用语义掩码预测替代RGB视频预测，通过几何信息瓶颈过滤视觉噪声，提升机器人策略的泛化能力和鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于RGB视频预测的世界模型容易过拟合于动态背景、光照变化等无关因素，导致泛化能力差、控制策略脆弱不可靠。

Method: 提出掩码世界模型(MWM)，利用视频扩散架构预测语义掩码演化而非像素，形成几何信息瓶颈；结合扩散策略头实现端到端控制。

Result: 在LIBERO和RLBench基准测试中显著优于RGB世界模型；真实世界实验和随机标记剪枝测试显示MWM具有优越的泛化能力和对纹理信息丢失的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 通过语义掩码预测的几何信息瓶颈能有效过滤视觉噪声，提升世界模型的泛化能力和鲁棒性，为机器人策略学习提供更可靠的框架。

Abstract: World models derived from large-scale video generative pre-training have emerged as a promising paradigm for generalist robot policy learning. However, standard approaches often focus on high-fidelity RGB video prediction, this can result in overfitting to irrelevant factors, such as dynamic backgrounds and illumination changes. These distractions reduce the model's ability to generalize, ultimately leading to unreliable and fragile control policies. To address this, we introduce the Mask World Model (MWM), which leverages video diffusion architectures to predict the evolution of semantic masks instead of pixels. This shift imposes a geometric information bottleneck, forcing the model to capture essential physical dynamics and contact relations while filtering out visual noise. We seamlessly integrate this mask dynamics backbone with a diffusion-based policy head to enable robust end-to-end control. Extensive evaluations demonstrate the superiority of MWM on the LIBERO and RLBench simulation benchmarks, significantly outperforming the state-of-the-art RGB-based world models. Furthermore, real-world experiments and robustness evaluation (via random token pruning) reveal that MWM exhibits superior generalization capabilities and robust resilience to texture information loss.

</details>


### [309] [Multi-Cycle Spatio-Temporal Adaptation in Human-Robot Teaming](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19670)
*Alex Cuellar,Michael Hagenow,Julie Shah*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: RAPIDDS框架通过建模个体的空间和时间行为，联合优化任务调度和机器人运动，实现高效、低干扰的人机协作


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在任务级和运动级适应上各自为政：任务级方法忽略空间干扰，运动级方法忽视任务上下文。需要统一框架来同时优化任务分配和运动规划，考虑个体化的人类能力和偏好。

Method: 提出RAPIDDS框架：在多周期交互中建模个体的空间行为（运动路径）和时间行为（任务完成时间），联合适应任务调度并引导机器人运动的扩散模型，最大化效率并最小化接近距离。

Result: 通过仿真消融研究和7自由度机械臂物理实验验证了双重适应的重要性。用户研究（n=32）显示，相比非自适应系统，在效率、接近距离等客观指标以及流畅性、用户偏好等主观指标上均有显著改进。

Conclusion: RAPIDDS通过统一任务级和运动级适应，有效提升人机协作效率并减少干扰，为实际工作空间中的人机团队部署提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: Effective human-robot teaming is crucial for the practical deployment of robots in human workspaces. However, optimizing joint human-robot plans remains a challenge due to the difficulty of modeling individualized human capabilities and preferences. While prior research has leveraged the multi-cycle structure of domains like manufacturing to learn an individual's tendencies and adapt plans over repeated interactions, these techniques typically consider task-level and motion-level adaptation in isolation. Task-level methods optimize allocation and scheduling but often ignore spatial interference in close-proximity scenarios; conversely, motion-level methods focus on collision avoidance while ignoring the broader task context. This paper introduces RAPIDDS, a framework that unifies these approaches by modeling an individual's spatial behavior (motion paths) and temporal behavior (time required to complete tasks) over multiple cycles. RAPIDDS then jointly adapts task schedules and steers diffusion models of robot motions to maximize efficiency and minimize proximity accounting for these individualized models. We demonstrate the importance of this dual adaptation through an ablation study in simulation and a physical robot scenario using a 7-DOF robot arm. Finally, we present a user study (n=32) showing significant plan improvement compared to non-adaptive systems across both objective metrics, such as efficiency and proximity, and subjective measures, including fluency and user preference. See this paper's companion video at: https://youtu.be/55Q3lq1fINs.

</details>


### [310] [A Gesture-Based Visual Learning Model for Acoustophoretic Interactions using a Swarm of AcoustoBots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19643)
*Alex Lin,Lei Gao,Narsimlu Kemsaram,Sriram Subramanian*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一种基于手势的视觉学习框架，用于实现无接触的人-群体交互，通过手势控制多模态声学机器人平台，实现了触觉、音频和悬浮三种模态的切换。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的声学机器人（AcoustoBots）虽然能够提供空中触觉、定向音频和声悬浮功能，但依赖于脚本命令，缺乏实时人类控制的直观界面。需要开发一种自然、直观的人-群体交互接口。

Method: 结合ESP32-CAM手势捕捉、PhaseSpace运动追踪、集中式处理，以及基于OpenCLIP的视觉学习模型（VLM）与线性探测，对三种手势进行分类并将其映射到触觉、音频和悬浮三种模态。

Result: 手势分类准确率从约67%（小数据集）提升至近98%（大数据集）。在两个声学机器人的集成实验中，整体手势到模态切换准确率达到87.8%（90次试验），平均端到端延迟为3.95秒。

Conclusion: 该研究证明了基于视觉语言模型的手势界面用于多模态人-群体交互的可行性。虽然当前系统受限于集中式处理、静态手势集和受控环境评估，但为更具表现力、可扩展和易访问的群体机器人接口奠定了基础。

Abstract: AcoustoBots are mobile acoustophoretic robots capable of delivering mid-air haptics, directional audio, and acoustic levitation, but existing implementations rely on scripted commands and lack an intuitive interface for real-time human control. This work presents a gesture-based visual learning framework for contactless human-swarm interaction with a multimodal AcoustoBot platform. The system combines ESP32-CAM gesture capture, PhaseSpace motion tracking, centralized processing, and an OpenCLIP-based visual learning model (VLM) with linear probing to classify three hand gestures and map them to haptics, audio, and levitation modalities. Validation accuracy improved from about 67% with a small dataset to nearly 98% with the largest dataset. In integrated experiments with two AcoustoBots, the system achieved an overall gesture-to-modality switching accuracy of 87.8% across 90 trials, with an average end-to-end latency of 3.95 seconds. These results demonstrate the feasibility of using a vision-language-model-based gesture interface for multimodal human-swarm interaction. While the current system is limited by centralized processing, a static gesture set, and controlled-environment evaluation, it establishes a foundation for more expressive, scalable, and accessible swarm robotic interfaces.

</details>


### [311] [Autonomous UAV Pipeline Near-proximity Inspection via Disturbance-Aware Predictive Visual Servoing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19618)
*Wen Li,Hui Wang,Jinya Su,Cunjia Liu,Wen-Hua Chen,Shihua Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了基于视觉模型预测控制的自主四旋翼无人机近距管道检测框架，通过扩展状态卡尔曼滤波和地形自适应速度设计，在三维场景中实现可靠管道检测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 管道检测对能源运输安全至关重要，但面临距离长、地形复杂、人工检测风险高等挑战。无人机虽提供灵活传感平台，但可靠自主检测仍存在困难，特别是在三维场景中。

Method: 提出基于图像视觉伺服模型预测控制(VMPC)的自主四旋翼近距管道检测框架。开发统一预测模型耦合四旋翼动力学与图像特征运动学；设计扩展状态卡尔曼滤波与图像特征预测(ESKF-PRE)处理低速率视觉更新、测量噪声和环境不确定性；引入地形自适应速度设计，在未知地形坡度下维持巡航速度。

Result: 在高保真Gazebo仿真和真实世界实验中验证。真实测试中，无风直管道检测时，管道方向均方根误差降低52.63%，图像横向偏差降低75.04%；在风扰动和弯曲管道任务中，基准方法失败而所提方法成功完成。

Conclusion: 提出的ESKF-PRE-VMPC框架能有效处理视觉延迟、噪声和不确定性，实现可靠自主管道检测，为三维场景下的无人机近距检测提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: Reliable pipeline inspection is critical to safe energy transportation, but is constrained by long distances, complex terrain, and risks to human inspectors. Unmanned aerial vehicles provide a flexible sensing platform, yet reliable autonomous inspection remains challenging. This paper presents an autonomous quadrotor near-proximity pipeline inspection framework for three-dimensional scenarios based on image-based visual servoing model predictive control (VMPC). A unified predictive model couples quadrotor dynamics with image feature kinematics, enabling direct image-space prediction within the control loop. To address low-rate visual updates, measurement noise, and environmental uncertainties, an extended-state Kalman filtering scheme with image feature prediction (ESKF-PRE) is developed, and the estimated lumped disturbances are incorporated into the VMPC prediction model, yielding the ESKF-PRE-VMPC framework. A terrain-adaptive velocity design is introduced to maintain the desired cruising speed while generating vertical velocity references over unknown terrain slopes without prior terrain information. The framework is validated in high-fidelity Gazebo simulations and real-world experiments. In real-world tests, the proposed method reduces RMSE by 52.63% and 75.04% in pipeline orientation and lateral deviation in the image, respectively, for straight-pipeline inspection without wind, and successfully completes both wind-disturbance and bend-pipeline tasks where baseline method fails. An open-source nano quadrotor is modified for indoor experimentation.

</details>


### [312] [LiveVLN: Breaking the Stop-and-Go Loop in Vision-Language Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19536)
*Xiangchen Wang,Weiye Zhu,Teng Wang,TianTian Geng,Zekai Zhang,Zhiyuan Qi,Jinyu Yang,Feng Zheng*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: LiveVLN是一个无需训练的框架，通过多步动作延续增强预训练VLM导航器，实现更连续的具身导航，减少等待时间并提高动作可用性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前导航系统在真实世界部署中仍存在明显的"走走停停"问题，因为感知-推理-执行循环是阻塞的：每次新观察后，控制器必须等待感知、传输和推理完成后才能继续运动。仅减少动作生成成本无法消除冗余等待。

Method: LiveVLN通过多步动作延续增强预训练VLM导航器，在执行过程中重叠处理新到达的观察，在可执行前缀耗尽前传递刷新的未来动作。该框架在运行时操作，可与兼容的预训练VLM导航器集成。

Result: 在R2R和RxR基准测试中，LiveVLN保持了基准性能，同时减少了等待时间并提高了动作可用性。在真实世界部署中，平均等待时间减少高达77.7%，StreamVLN的墙钟时间缩短12.6%，NaVIDA缩短19.6%，实现了更连贯的执行。

Conclusion: LiveVLN通过多步动作延续实现了更连续的具身导航，减少了阻塞等待，提高了在线执行的流畅性，可在保持基准性能的同时显著改善真实世界部署的效率。

Abstract: Recent navigation systems achieve strong benchmark results, yet real-world deployment often remains visibly stop-and-go. This bottleneck arises because the sense-inference-execution loop is still blocking: after each new observation, the controller must wait for sensing, transmission, and inference before motion can continue. Reducing action-generation cost alone therefore does not remove redundant waiting. To address this issue, we present LiveVLN, a training-free framework for more continuous embodied navigation by augmenting pretrained VLM navigators with multi-step action continuation. Instead of pausing for each full sense-and-inference round, LiveVLN overlaps execution with the processing of newly arrived observations, allowing refreshed future actions to be handed off before the current executable prefix is exhausted. This design keeps actions continuously available during motion, reducing idle waiting and enabling smoother online execution. The framework operates at runtime and can be integrated with compatible pretrained VLM navigators. Across R2R and RxR, LiveVLN preserves benchmark performance while reducing waiting time and improving action availability. In real-world deployments, it cuts average episode waiting time by up to $77.7\%$ and shortens wall-clock episode time by $12.6\%$ on StreamVLN and $19.6\%$ on NaVIDA, yielding more coherent execution during deployment. Code is available at https://github.com/NIneeeeeem/LiveVLN.

</details>


### [313] [Assessing VLM-Driven Semantic-Affordance Inference for Non-Humanoid Robot Morphologies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19509)
*Jess Jones,Raul Santos-Rodriguez,Sabine Hauert*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: VLMs在非人形机器人形态的具身化推理中存在性能不一致问题，虽然表现出向非人形形态的泛化能力，但在不同物体类别和新型工具使用场景中表现出过度保守的预测倾向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视觉语言模型在理解人-物交互方面表现出色，但将其应用于非人形形态的机器人系统仍未被充分探索。本研究旨在填补这一关键空白，探索VLMs能否有效推断与人类形态根本不同的机器人的可供性。

Method: 引入了一种新颖的混合数据集，结合了标注的真实世界机器人可供性-物体关系与VLM生成的合成场景。对VLM在多个物体类别和机器人形态上的性能进行了实证分析。

Result: 实验表明，虽然VLMs在向非人形机器人形态泛化方面表现出潜力，但其在不同物体领域中的性能明显不一致。在所有形态和物体类别中，都观察到低假阳性率但高假阴性率的一致模式，表明VLMs倾向于保守的可供性预测。这种模式在新工具使用场景和非传统物体操作中尤为明显。

Conclusion: 将VLMs有效集成到机器人系统中需要互补的方法来缓解过度保守的行为，同时保持低假阳性率带来的固有安全优势。这为未来机器人-VLM集成研究提供了重要方向。

Abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in understanding human-object interactions, but their application to robotic systems with non-humanoid morphologies remains largely unexplored. This work investigates whether VLMs can effectively infer affordances for robots with fundamentally different embodiments than humans, addressing a critical gap in the deployment of these models for diverse robotic applications. We introduce a novel hybrid dataset that combines annotated real-world robotic affordance-object relations with VLM-generated synthetic scenarios, and perform an empirical analysis of VLM performance across multiple object categories and robot morphologies, revealing significant variations in affordance inference capabilities. Our experiments demonstrate that while VLMs show promising generalisation to non-humanoid robot forms, their performance is notably inconsistent across different object domains. Critically, we identify a consistent pattern of low false positive rates but high false negative rates across all morphologies and object categories, indicating that VLMs tend toward conservative affordance predictions. Our analysis reveals that this pattern is particularly pronounced for novel tool use scenarios and unconventional object manipulations, suggesting that effective integration of VLMs in robotic systems requires complementary approaches to mitigate over-conservative behaviour while preserving the inherent safety benefits of low false positive rates.

</details>


### [314] [Wrench-Aware Admittance Control for Unknown-Payload Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19469)
*Hossein Gholampour,Logan E. Beaver*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种针对未知负载的力矩感知导纳控制框架，用于改善UR5e机器人在负载质心与工具中心点不对齐时的拾放操作性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 未知负载（特别是质心与工具中心点不对齐时）会在机器人腕部产生偏移力矩，导致导纳控制器误判为外部交互力矩，从而引起意外顺应运动、增大跟踪误差并降低运输精度。

Method: 提出力矩感知导纳控制框架，利用力-力矩测量实现双重功能：1）使用三轴平移激励项减少运输过程中的负载诱导力效应；2）抓取后先估计负载质量进行运输补偿，然后通过平移运动中收集的腕部力-力矩数据估计负载质心相对于TCP的偏移。

Result: 实验结果表明，与未校正的放置方法相比，该方法在保持顺应运动的同时，显著改善了运输和放置性能。

Conclusion: 所提出的力矩感知导纳控制框架能有效补偿未知负载的影响，提高拾放操作的精度和鲁棒性，同时保持机器人系统的顺应性。

Abstract: Unknown payloads can strongly affect compliant robotic manipulation, especially when the payload center of mass is not aligned with the tool center point. In this case, the payload generates an offset wrench at the robot wrist. During motion, this wrench is not only related to payload weight, but also to payload inertia. If it is not modeled, the compliant controller can interpret it as an external interaction wrench, which causes unintended compliant motion, larger tracking error, and reduced transport accuracy. This paper presents a wrench-aware admittance control framework for unknown-payload pick-and-place using a UR5e robot. The method uses force-torque measurements in two different roles. First, a three-axis translational excitation term is used to reduce payload-induced force effects during transport without making the robot excessively stiff. Second, after grasping, the controller first estimates payload mass for transport compensation and then estimates the payload CoM offset relative to the TCP using wrist force-torque measurements collected during the subsequent translational motion. This helps improve object placement and stacking behavior. Experimental results show improved transport and placement performance compared with uncorrected placement while preserving compliant motion.

</details>


### [315] [Forward Dynamics of Variable Topology Mechanisms - The Case of Constraint Activation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19419)
*Andreas Mueller*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出两种处理可变拓扑机构动力学的方法：基于冗余坐标的投影运动方程和基于最小坐标的Voronets方程，用于解决机构拓扑变化时的非光滑动力学问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 许多机械系统会因运动学拓扑变化而改变其自由度，如理想接触、静摩擦和部件锁定等。特别是在人机交互中，部件锁定变得越来越重要。预测可变拓扑机构的动态行为需要解决非光滑动力学问题，核心挑战在于拓扑切换事件时的物理意义过渡条件。

Method: 提出了两种处理拓扑切换过渡条件的方法：1）使用冗余坐标的投影运动方程；2）使用最小坐标的Voronets方程。讨论了这两种方法的计算特性，并在平面3R机构和6自由度工业机械臂的关节锁定问题上进行了验证。

Result: 成功开发了两种处理机构拓扑切换的过渡条件方法，并在平面3R机构和6自由度工业机械臂的关节锁定问题上展示了结果，验证了方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 本文提出了处理可变拓扑机构动力学问题的两种方法，解决了拓扑切换事件时的物理意义过渡条件这一核心挑战，为预测这类机构的动态行为提供了有效工具，特别是在人机交互应用中具有重要意义。

Abstract: Many mechanical systems exhibit changes in their kinematic topology altering the mobility. Ideal contact is the best known cause, but also stiction and controlled locking of parts of a mechanism lead to topology changes. The latter is becoming an important issue in human-machine interaction. Anticipating the dynamic behavior of variable topology mechanisms requires solving a non-smooth dynamic problem. The core challenge is a physically meaningful transition condition at the topology switching events. Such a condition is presented in this paper. Two versions are reported, one using projected motion equations in terms of redundant coordinates, and another one using the Voronets equations in terms of minimal coordinates. Their computational properties are discussed. Results are shown for joint locking of a planar 3R mechanisms and a 6DOF industrial manipulator.

</details>


### [316] [M$^{2}$GRPO: Mamba-based Multi-Agent Group Relative Policy Optimization for Biomimetic Underwater Robots Pursuit](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19404)
*Yukai Feng,Zhiheng Wu,Zhengxing Wu,Junwen Gu,Junzhi Yu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: M²GRPO：基于Mamba的多智能体分组相对策略优化框架，用于解决仿生水下机器人协同追捕中的长时决策、部分可观测性和机器人间协调问题，在CTDE范式下实现稳定可扩展的策略学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统协同追捕策略学习方法在仿生水下机器人中面临根本性挑战：长时程决策、部分可观测性和机器人间协调需要表达能力和稳定性。现有方法难以同时满足这些需求。

Method: 提出M²GRPO框架，集成选择性状态空间Mamba策略与分组相对策略优化。Mamba策略利用观测历史捕获长时程时间依赖，基于注意力的关系特征编码智能体间交互，通过归一化高斯采样产生有界连续动作。分组相对优势通过归一化每回合内智能体奖励获得，通过多智能体扩展的GRPO优化，减少训练资源需求同时实现稳定可扩展的策略更新。

Result: 大量仿真和真实水池实验表明，M²GRPO在不同团队规模和逃避者策略下，在追捕成功率和捕获效率方面均一致优于MAPPO和循环基线方法。

Conclusion: M²GRPO为仿生机器人系统的协同水下追捕提供了实用且可扩展的解决方案，在CTDE范式下实现了稳定高效的策略学习。

Abstract: Traditional policy learning methods in cooperative pursuit face fundamental challenges in biomimetic underwater robots, where long-horizon decision making, partial observability, and inter-robot coordination require both expressiveness and stability. To address these issues, a novel framework called Mamba-based multi-agent group relative policy optimization (M$^{2}$GRPO) is proposed, which integrates a selective state-space Mamba policy with group-relative policy optimization under the centralized-training and decentralized-execution (CTDE) paradigm. Specifically, the Mamba-based policy leverages observation history to capture long-horizon temporal dependencies and exploits attention-based relational features to encode inter-agent interactions, producing bounded continuous actions through normalized Gaussian sampling. To further improve credit assignment without sacrificing stability, the group-relative advantages are obtained by normalizing rewards across agents within each episode and optimized through a multi-agent extension of GRPO, significantly reducing the demand for training resources while enabling stable and scalable policy updates. Extensive simulations and real-world pool experiments across team scales and evader strategies demonstrate that M$^{2}$GRPO consistently outperforms MAPPO and recurrent baselines in both pursuit success rate and capture efficiency. Overall, the proposed framework provides a practical and scalable solution for cooperative underwater pursuit with biomimetic robot systems.

</details>


### [317] [Achieving Interaction Fluidity in a Wizard-of-Oz Robotic System: A Prototype for Fluid Error-Correction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19374)
*Carlos Baptista De Lima,Julian Hough,Frank Förster,Patrick Holthaus,Yongjun Zheng*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于虚拟现实的HRI仿真平台，通过中断与修正、轮询、延迟测量等特性支持流畅的人机语音交互


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于语音的人机交互体验仍然生硬且令人沮丧，缺乏合适的开发平台来改善交互流畅性，即使在用于数据收集和原型设计的Wizard-of-Oz操作模式中也是如此

Method: 基于先前系统，提出中断与修正、轮询性、延迟测量与优化以及基于日志数据的时间精确动作重现作为流畅WoZ系统的关键标准，并开发了满足这些标准的虚拟现实HRI仿真环境

Result: 开发了一个面向移动机械臂的虚拟现实HRI仿真环境，该系统具备所提出的关键特性，能够支持流畅的错误修正和交互

Conclusion: 通过定义关键标准并实现相应的VR仿真平台，为解决人机语音交互中的流畅性问题提供了有效的开发工具，特别适用于Wizard-of-Oz模式的数据收集和原型设计

Abstract: Achieving truly fluid interaction with robots with speech interfaces remains a hard problem, and the experience of current Human-Robot Interaction (HRI) remains laboured and frustrating. Some of the barriers to fluid interaction stem from a lack of a suitable development platform for HRI for improving interaction, even in robotic Wizard-of-Oz (WoZ) modes of operation used for data collection and prototyping. Based on previous systems, we propose the properties of interruptibility and correction (IaC), pollability, latency measurement and optimisation and time-accurate reproducibility of actions from logging data as key criteria for a fluid WoZ system to support fluid error correction. We finish by presenting a Virtual Reality (VR) HRI simulation environment for mobile manipulators which meets these criteria.

</details>


### [318] [Quadruped Parkour Learning: Sparsely Gated Mixture of Experts with Visual Input](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19344)
*Michael Ziegltrum,Jianhao Jiao,Tianhu Peng,Chengxu Zhou,Dimitrios Kanoulas*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该研究将稀疏门控混合专家（MoE）架构应用于视觉机器人跑酷，相比传统多层感知机（MLP）在相同激活参数下性能显著提升，成功穿越大型障碍的试验次数翻倍，且计算效率更优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人跑酷是极具挑战性的地形穿越基准任务，现有方法多采用密集激活的MLP架构。MoE架构在大型语言模型中已证明能通过稀疏激活提升可扩展性和性能，但尚未在视觉机器人跑酷领域得到充分探索。本研究旨在验证MoE架构在该领域的应用潜力。

Method: 研究比较了基于标准MLP和稀疏门控MoE架构的控制策略，在推理时激活参数数量匹配的受控设置下进行对比。使用Unitree Go2四足机器人进行真实环境实验，评估两种架构在穿越大型障碍物时的性能差异。

Result: 实验结果显示MoE策略性能显著优于MLP基线：在穿越大型障碍物时，MoE策略的成功试验次数达到MLP的两倍。要达到与MoE相当的性能，标准MLP需要将其参数规模扩大到与MoE总参数相当，但这会导致计算时间增加14.3%。

Conclusion: 稀疏门控MoE架构在视觉机器人跑酷控制策略中提供了性能与计算效率之间的有利权衡，能够实现更好的可扩展性。该架构通过仅激活参数子集的方式，在保持计算效率的同时显著提升性能，为机器人控制策略的规模化改进提供了有效途径。

Abstract: Robotic parkour provides a compelling benchmark for advancing locomotion over highly challenging terrain, including large discontinuities such as elevated steps. Recent approaches have demonstrated impressive capabilities, including dynamic climbing and jumping, but typically rely on sequential multilayer perceptron (MLP) architectures with densely activated layers. In contrast, sparsely gated mixture-of-experts (MoE) architectures have emerged in the large language model domain as an effective paradigm for improving scalability and performance by activating only a subset of parameters at inference time. In this work, we investigate the application of sparsely gated MoE architectures to vision-based robotic parkour. We compare control policies based on standard MLPs and MoE architectures under a controlled setting where the number of active parameters at inference time is matched. Experimental results on a real Unitree Go2 quadruped robot demonstrate clear performance gains, with the MoE policy achieving double the number of successful trials in traversing large obstacles compared to a standard MLP baseline. We further show that achieving comparable performance with a standard MLP requires scaling its parameter count to match that of the total MoE model, resulting in a 14.3\% increase in computation time. These results highlight that sparsely gated MoE architectures provide a favorable trade-off between performance and computational efficiency, enabling improved scaling of control policies for vision-based robotic parkour. An anonymized link to the codebase is https://osf.io/v2kqj/files/github?view_only=7977dee10c0a44769184498eaba72e44.

</details>


### [319] [Warmth and Competence in the Swarm: Designing Effective Human-Robot Teams](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19270)
*Genki Miyauchi,Roderich Groß,Chaona Chen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 人类对机器人集群的社会感知研究：集群行为变化影响温暖感和能力感知，这些社会感知比任务表现更能预测团队偏好


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着机器人群体越来越多地与人类协作，理解人类如何感知机器人对于设计有效的人机团队至关重要。尽管先前研究探讨了人类如何解释和评估单个智能体的能力和意图，但对机器人团队的社会感知研究相对不足。

Method: 采用能力-温暖度理论框架，通过两个研究操纵集群在完成集体搜索任务时的行为：研究1中人类参与者作为观察者，研究2中作为操作者。测量集群行为的社会感知，包括广播时长、分离距离和单个机器人速度等变量。

Result: 集群行为变化一致影响参与者对温暖度和能力的感知：较长的广播时长增加感知温暖度；较大的分离距离增加感知能力；单个机器人速度对两种感知均无影响。社会感知比任务表现更能预测团队偏好，参与者偏好既温暖又有能力的机器人团队，而非完成任务最快的团队。

Conclusion: 人机交互动态塑造社会感知，在设计机器人集群以实现有效人机协作时，需要同时整合技术和社会考量。社会感知因素在人类对机器人团队的偏好中起着比纯粹任务表现更重要的作用。

Abstract: As groups of robots increasingly collaborate with humans, understanding how humans perceive them is critical for designing effective human-robot teams. While prior research examined how humans interpret and evaluate the abilities and intentions of individual agents, social perception of robot teams remains relatively underexplored. Drawing on the competence-warmth framework, we conducted two studies manipulating swarm behaviors in completing a collective search task and measured the social perception of swarm behaviors when human participants are either observers (Study 1) and operators (Study 2). Across both studies, our results show that variations in swarm behaviors consistently influenced participants' perceptions of warmth and competence. Notably, longer broadcast durations increased perceived warmth; larger separation distances increased perceived competence. Interestingly, individual robot speed had no effect on either of the perceptions. Furthermore, our results show that these social perceptions predicted participants' team preferences more strongly than task performance. Participants preferred robot teams that were both warm and competent, not those that completed tasks most quickly. These findings demonstrate that human-robot interaction dynamically shapes social perception, underscoring the importance of integrating both technical and social considerations when designing robot swarms for effective human-robot collaboration.

</details>


### [320] [Multimodal embodiment-aware navigation transformer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19267)
*Louis Dezons,Quentin Picard,Rémi Marsal,François Goulette,David Filliat*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: ViLiNT：基于多模态注意力策略的机器人目标导航模型，通过Transformer融合RGB、LiDAR、目标嵌入和机器人本体描述符，结合扩散模型生成轨迹，并使用路径间隙预测头进行轨迹评分，显著提升分布偏移下的导航鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于监督学习的地面机器人目标导航模型在零样本迁移方面表现良好，但在环境、机器人或传感器配置变化等分布偏移情况下，其避障能力会显著下降。需要开发更鲁棒的导航系统来应对实际部署中的各种变化。

Method: 提出ViLiNT多模态注意力策略：1) 使用Transformer架构融合RGB图像、3D LiDAR点云、目标嵌入和机器人本体描述符；2) 用Transformer输出条件化扩散模型生成可导航轨迹；3) 基于自动生成的离线标签训练路径间隙预测头，对扩散模型生成的轨迹进行评分和排序；4) 通过机器人本体令牌使模型能根据机器人尺寸生成和选择合适轨迹。

Result: 在三个模拟环境中，ViLiNT相比最先进的纯视觉基线(NoMaD)平均提升166%的成功率。实际部署中，漫游车在障碍物场中的导航性能也得到验证，表明多模态融合与碰撞预测机制的结合显著提升了越野导航的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: ViLiNT通过多模态融合和基于机器人本体的轨迹生成与选择机制，有效提升了目标导航系统在分布偏移下的鲁棒性，为实际机器人部署提供了更可靠的导航解决方案。

Abstract: Goal-conditioned navigation models for ground robots trained using supervised learning show promising zero-shot transfer, but their collision-avoidance capability nevertheless degrades under distribution shift, i.e. environmental, robot or sensor configuration changes. We propose ViLiNT a multimodal, attention-based policy for goal navigation, trained on heterogeneous data from multiple platforms and environments, which improves robustness with two key features. First, we fuse RGB images, 3D LiDAR point clouds, a goal embedding and a robot's embodiment descriptor with a transformer architecture to capture complementary geometry and appearance cues. The transformer's output is used to condition a diffusion model that generates navigable trajectories. Second, using automatically generated offline labels, we train a path clearance prediction head for scoring and ranking trajectories produced by the diffusion model. The diffusion conditioning as well as the trajectory ranking head depend on a robot's embodiment token that allows our model to generate and select trajectories with respect to the robot's dimensions. Across three simulated environments, ViLiNT improves Success Rate on average by 166\% over equivalent state-of-the-art vision-only baseline (NoMaD). This increase in performance is confirmed through real-world deployments of a rover navigating in obstacle fields. These results highlight that combining multimodal fusion with our collision prediction mechanism leads to improved off-road navigation robustness.

</details>


### [321] [Multi-Step Gaussian Process Propagation for Adaptive Path Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19148)
*Alex Beaudin,Bjørn Andreas Kristiansen,Kristoffer Gryte,Corrado Chiatante,Morten Omholt Alver,Murat Arcak,Tor Arne Johansen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种基于高斯过程的路径规划方法OLAhGP，用于机器人环境探索与监测，能够适应多模态环境传感数据并整合状态与输入约束，在藻华监测场景中相比现有方法显著提升信息获取效率和分类精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人环境探索与监测的路径规划高度依赖于对当前环境状态的认知，需要有效整合所有可用信息源并处理环境信念中的不确定性，特别是对于多模态传感数据。

Method: 采用高斯过程对环境进行建模，提出OLAhGP方法，通过滚动时域优化未来路径点，成本函数基于这些路径点的高斯过程后验分布，同时整合状态和输入约束。

Result: 在自主水面艇的藻华监测场景中，使用高保真模型和现场传感数据进行验证，相比现有方法在相同采样数量下生成更具信息量的路径，在叶绿素a富集水域的藻华识别中显著降低总误分类概率和二元误分类率。

Conclusion: OLAhGP方法通过高斯过程建模和滚动时域优化，有效处理环境不确定性，在环境监测任务中实现了更高效的路径规划和更准确的环境特征识别。

Abstract: Efficient and robust path planning hinges on combining all accessible information sources. In particular, the task of path planning for robotic environmental exploration and monitoring depends highly on the current belief of the world. To capture the uncertainty in the belief, we present a Gaussian process based path planning method that adapts to multi-modal environmental sensing data and incorporates state and input constraints. To solve the path planning problem, we optimize over future waypoints in a receding horizon fashion, and our cost is thus a function of the Gaussian process posterior over all these waypoints. We demonstrate this method, dubbed OLAhGP, on an autonomous surface vessel using oceanic algal bloom data from both a high-fidelity model and in-situ sensing data in a monitoring scenario. Our simulated and experimental results demonstrate significant improvement over existing methods. With the same number of samples, our method generates more informative paths and achieves greater accuracy in identifying algal blooms in chlorophyll a rich waters, measured with respect to total misclassification probability and binary misclassification rate over the domain of interest.

</details>


### [322] [Multi-Gait Learning for Humanoid Robots Using Reinforcement Learning with Selective Adversarial Motion Prior](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19102)
*Yuanye Wu,Keyi Wang,Linqi Ye,Boyang Xing*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出选择性对抗运动先验(AMP)策略，在统一强化学习框架中让仿人机器人掌握五种步态，对稳定性关键步态使用AMP加速收敛，对动态步态禁用AMP避免过度约束。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 仿人机器人在统一强化学习框架中学习多样化步态面临挑战，因为不同步态对稳定性和动态表现的要求存在冲突。现有方法难以同时兼顾稳定性和动态表现。

Method: 采用选择性AMP策略：对周期性、稳定性关键的步态（行走、正步、爬楼梯）应用AMP加速收敛并抑制异常行为；对高度动态步态（奔跑、跳跃）禁用AMP避免过度约束。使用PPO算法结合领域随机化在仿真中训练，通过零样本仿真到现实迁移部署到12自由度仿人机器人。

Result: 定量比较表明，选择性AMP策略在五种步态上均优于统一的AMP策略，在稳定性关键步态上实现更快收敛、更低跟踪误差和更高成功率，同时不牺牲动态步态所需的敏捷性。

Conclusion: 选择性AMP策略有效解决了仿人机器人多步态学习中的稳定性和动态性冲突问题，为统一框架下的多样化运动技能学习提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Learning diverse locomotion skills for humanoid robots in a unified reinforcement learning framework remains challenging due to the conflicting requirements of stability and dynamic expressiveness across different gaits. We present a multi-gait learning approach that enables a humanoid robot to master five distinct gaits -- walking, goose-stepping, running, stair climbing, and jumping -- using a consistent policy structure, action space, and reward formulation. The key contribution is a selective Adversarial Motion Prior (AMP) strategy: AMP is applied to periodic, stability-critical gaits (walking, goose-stepping, stair climbing) where it accelerates convergence and suppresses erratic behavior, while being deliberately omitted for highly dynamic gaits (running, jumping) where its regularization would over-constrain the motion. Policies are trained via PPO with domain randomization in simulation and deployed on a physical 12-DOF humanoid robot through zero-shot sim-to-real transfer. Quantitative comparisons demonstrate that selective AMP outperforms a uniform AMP policy across all five gaits, achieving faster convergence, lower tracking error, and higher success rates on stability-focused gaits without sacrificing the agility required for dynamic ones.

</details>


### [323] [RoboWM-Bench: A Benchmark for Evaluating World Models in Robotic Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19092)
*Feng Jiang,Yang Chen,Kyle Xu,Yuchen Liu,Haifeng Wang,Zhenhao Shen,Jasper Lu,Shengze Huang,Yuanfei Wang,Chen Xie,Ruihai Wu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了RoboWM-Bench基准测试，用于评估视频世界模型生成的预测行为在机器人执行中的物理可执行性，发现当前模型在生成物理可执行行为方面仍面临挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前大规模视频世界模型虽然能生成逼真的未来预测视频，但视觉逼真性不代表物理合理性。现有基准测试主要关注感知或诊断，缺乏对预测行为能否转化为可执行动作以完成任务的系统性评估。

Method: 提出RoboWM-Bench基准测试，将人类手部操作和机器人操作视频中生成的行为转换为具体化的动作序列，并通过机器人执行进行验证。该基准涵盖多样化操作场景，并建立统一的评估协议。

Result: 评估当前最先进的视频世界模型发现，可靠生成物理可执行行为仍是一个开放挑战。常见失败模式包括空间推理错误、接触预测不稳定和非物理形变。虽然对操作数据进行微调能带来改进，但物理不一致性仍然存在。

Conclusion: 需要更物理基础化的视频生成方法用于机器人学习，RoboWM-Bench为评估视频世界模型在具身智能中的物理合理性提供了系统化框架。

Abstract: Recent advances in large-scale video world models have enabled increasingly realistic future prediction, raising the prospect of leveraging imagined videos for robot learning. However, visual realism does not imply physical plausibility, and behaviors inferred from generated videos may violate dynamics and fail when executed by embodied agents. Existing benchmarks begin to incorporate notions of physical plausibility, but they largely remain perception- or diagnostic-oriented and do not systematically evaluate whether predicted behaviors can be translated into executable actions that complete the intended task. To address this gap, we introduce RoboWM-Bench, a manipulation-centric benchmark for embodiment-grounded evaluation of video world models. RoboWM-Bench converts generated behaviors from both human-hand and robotic manipulation videos into embodied action sequences and validates them through robotic execution. The benchmark spans diverse manipulation scenarios and establishes a unified protocol for consistent and reproducible evaluation. Using RoboWM-Bench, we evaluate state-of-the-art video world models and find that reliably generating physically executable behaviors remains an open challenge. Common failure modes include errors in spatial reasoning, unstable contact prediction, and non-physical deformations. While finetuning on manipulation data yields improvements, physical inconsistencies still persist, suggesting opportunities for more physically grounded video generation for robots.

</details>


### [324] [Differentiable Satellite Constellation Configuration via Relaxed Coverage and Revisit Objectives](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19062)
*Shreeyam Kacker,Kerri Cahoy*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于梯度优化的卫星星座设计方法，通过四种连续松弛技术使覆盖和重访指标可微分，结合∂SGP4可微分轨道传播器，实现从轨道参数到任务目标的端到端可微分优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有星座设计方法存在局限性：对称参数化星座（如Walker星座）设计空间受限，而元启发式方法计算量大、迭代次数多。梯度优化因覆盖和重访指标的非可微性（涉及二元可见性指示器和离散最大操作）而被认为不可行。

Method: 引入四种连续松弛技术：1) soft sigmoid可见性函数；2) noisy-OR多卫星聚合；3) leaky integrator重访间隔跟踪；4) LogSumExp软最大值函数。这些技术与∂SGP4可微分轨道传播器结合，构建从轨道参数到任务级目标的完全可微分管道。

Result: 该方法能从不规则初始化中恢复Walker-Delta几何结构，仅通过梯度就能发现具有远地点驻留特性的Molniya型椭圆轨道。与模拟退火、遗传算法和差分进化相比，梯度方法仅需约750次评估即可恢复等效Walker几何，而三种黑盒基线即使使用约四倍的评估预算，重访性能仍显著较差。

Conclusion: 通过连续松弛技术使星座设计问题可微分，实现了高效的梯度优化方法，显著优于传统元启发式方法，为卫星星座设计提供了新的优化框架。

Abstract: Satellite constellation design requires optimizing orbital parameters across multiple satellites to maximize mission specific metrics. For many types of mission, it is desirable to maximize coverage and minimize revisit gaps over ground targets. Existing approaches to constellation design either restrict the design space to symmetric parametric families such as Walker constellations, or rely on metaheuristic methods that require significant compute and many iterations. Gradient-based optimization has been considered intractable due to the non-differentiability of coverage and revisit metrics, which involve binary visibility indicators and discrete max operations. We introduce four continuous relaxations: soft sigmoid visibility, noisy-OR multi-satellite aggregation, leaky integrator revisit gap tracking, and LogSumExp soft-maximum, which when composed with the $\partial$SGP4 differentiable orbit propagator, yield a fully differentiable pipeline from orbital elements to mission-level objectives. We show that this scheme can recover Walker-Delta geometry from irregular initializations, and discovers elliptical Molniya-like orbits with apogee dwell over extreme latitudes from only gradients. Compared to simulated annealing (SA), genetic algorithm (GA), and differential evolution (DE) baselines, our gradient-based method recovers Walker-equivalent geometry within ${\sim}750$ evaluations, whereas the three black-box baselines plateau at with significantly worse revisit even with roughly four times the evaluation budget.

</details>


### [325] [AeroBridge-TTA: Test-Time Adaptive Language-Conditioned Control for UAVs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19059)
*Lingxue Lyu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: AeroBridge-TTA通过测试时自适应解决语言引导无人机执行不匹配问题，在13种不匹配条件下显著提升OOD性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 语言引导无人机经常因执行不匹配而失败，即规划轨迹与控制器实际跟踪能力之间的差距，特别是在真实动力学与训练不同时（质量变化、阻力变化、执行器延迟、风等）

Method: 提出三部分语言条件控制流程：1) 语言编码器将命令映射为子目标；2) 基于子目标和学习潜变量的自适应策略；3) 测试时自适应模块，从观察到的转移中在线更新潜变量

Result: 在5个语言条件无人机任务和13种不匹配条件下，AeroBridge-TTA在分布内与PPO-MLP基线持平，在5个分布外条件下全部获胜，平均提升22.0个百分点（62.7% vs. 40.7%）；仅改变步长α的消融实验显示潜变量更新本身带来4.6倍的OOD提升

Conclusion: 测试时自适应能有效解决语言引导无人机中的执行不匹配问题，潜变量在线更新是提升分布外性能的关键机制

Abstract: Language-guided unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) often fail not from bad reasoning or perception, but from execution
  mismatch: the gap between a planned trajectory and the controller's ability to track it when the real dynamics differ
  from training (mass changes, drag shifts, actuator delay, wind). We propose AeroBridge-TTA, a language-conditioned
  control pipeline that targets this gap with test-time adaptation. It has three parts: a language encoder that maps the
  command into a subgoal, an adaptive policy conditioned on the subgoal and a learned latent, and a test-time
  adaptation (TTA) module that updates the latent online from observed transitions. On five language-conditioned UAV
  tasks under 13 mismatch conditions with the same domain randomization, AeroBridge-TTA ties a strong PPO-MLP baseline
  in-distribution and wins all 5 out-of-distribution (OOD) conditions, +22.0 pts on average (62.7% vs. 40.7%); the +8.5
  pt overall gain comes entirely from the OOD regime. A same-weights ablation that only changes the step size $α$
  shows the latent update itself is responsible for a $4.6\times$ OOD lift.

</details>


### [326] [RoomRecon: High-Quality Textured Room Layout Reconstruction on Mobile Devices](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19025)
*Seok Joon Kim,Dinh Duc Cao,Federica Spinola,Se Jin Lee,Kyu Sung Cho*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: RoomRecon：用于3D房间模型的交互式实时扫描与纹理处理管道，通过AR引导图像采集和生成式AI提升纹理质量，专注于永久性房间元素以实现可定制化模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前RGB-D传感器和3D重建技术在室内空间捕捉方面存在局限：无法反映细微场景变化而无需完全重新捕捉、缺乏语义场景理解、各种纹理问题影响3D模型视觉质量，这些问题影响了VR体验和室内设计、房地产等应用所需的真实感。

Method: 提出RoomRecon交互式实时扫描与纹理处理管道，采用两阶段纹理处理流程：1) AR引导图像采集用于纹理处理；2) 集成生成式AI模型提升纹理质量并提供更好的室内空间复制。专注于永久性房间元素（墙壁、地板、天花板）以实现易于定制的3D模型。

Result: 在多种室内空间进行实验评估纹理质量和速度。定量结果和用户研究表明，RoomRecon在纹理质量和设备计算时间方面优于现有最先进方法。

Conclusion: RoomRecon通过结合AR引导采集和生成式AI，解决了当前室内3D重建的局限性，提供了高质量的纹理处理和实时性能，为VR、室内设计和房地产等应用提供了更真实的3D模型。

Abstract: Widespread RGB-Depth (RGB-D) sensors and advanced 3D reconstruction technologies facilitate the capture of indoor spaces, improving the fields of augmented reality (AR), virtual reality (VR), and extended reality (XR). Nevertheless, current technologies still face limitations, such as the inability to reflect minor scene changes without a complete recapture, the lack of semantic scene understanding, and various texturing challenges that affect the 3D model's visual quality. These issues affect the realism required for VR experiences and other applications such as in interior design and real estate. To address these challenges, we introduce RoomRecon, an interactive, real-time scanning and texturing pipeline for 3D room models. We propose a two-phase texturing pipeline that integrates AR-guided image capturing for texturing and generative AI models to improve texturing quality and provide better replicas of indoor spaces. Moreover, we suggest focusing only on permanent room elements such as walls, floors, and ceilings, to allow for easily customizable 3D models. We conduct experiments in a variety of indoor spaces to assess the texturing quality and speed of our method. The quantitative results and user study demonstrate that RoomRecon surpasses state-of-the-art methods in terms of texturing quality and on-device computation time.

</details>


### [327] [Gated Memory Policy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18933)
*Yihuai Gao,Jinyun Liu,Shuang Li,Shuran Song*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: GMP是一种视觉运动策略，通过门控记忆机制和交叉注意力模块，选择性激活历史信息并构建有效记忆表示，解决了非马尔可夫任务中长历史观察的性能下降问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人操作任务具有不同的记忆需求，从无需记忆的马尔可夫任务到依赖单次或多次交互历史信息的非马尔可夫任务。简单地扩展视觉运动策略的观察历史通常会导致性能显著下降，主要原因是分布偏移和过拟合。

Method: 提出了门控记忆策略(GMP)，包含三个关键组件：1) 学习记忆门机制，选择性激活历史上下文；2) 轻量级交叉注意力模块，构建有效的潜在记忆表示；3) 在历史动作中注入扩散噪声，增强对噪声或不准确历史的鲁棒性。

Result: 在提出的非马尔可夫基准MemMimic上，GMP比长历史基线平均成功率提高了30.1%，同时在RoboMimic的马尔可夫任务上保持了竞争力。

Conclusion: GMP通过选择性记忆激活和有效记忆表示学习，解决了非马尔可夫任务中长历史观察的性能问题，在保持马尔可夫任务性能的同时显著提升了非马尔可夫任务的性能。

Abstract: Robotic manipulation tasks exhibit varying memory requirements, ranging from Markovian tasks that require no memory to non-Markovian tasks that depend on historical information spanning single or multiple interaction trials. Surprisingly, simply extending observation histories of a visuomotor policy often leads to a significant performance drop due to distribution shift and overfitting. To address these issues, we propose Gated Memory Policy (GMP), a visuomotor policy that learns both when to recall memory and what to recall. To learn when to recall memory, GMP employs a learned memory gate mechanism that selectively activates history context only when necessary, improving robustness and reactivity. To learn what to recall efficiently, GMP introduces a lightweight cross-attention module that constructs effective latent memory representations. To further enhance robustness, GMP injects diffusion noise into historical actions, mitigating sensitivity to noisy or inaccurate histories during both training and inference. On our proposed non-Markovian benchmark MemMimic, GMP achieves a 30.1% average success rate improvement over long-history baselines, while maintaining competitive performance on Markovian tasks in RoboMimic. All code, data and in-the-wild deployment instructions are available on our project website https://gated-memory-policy.github.io/.

</details>


### [328] [Task-Adaptive Admittance Control for Human-Quadrotor Cooperative Load Transportation with Dynamic Cable-Length Regulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18905)
*Shuai Li,Ton T. H. Duong,Damiano Zanotto*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种用于人-四旋翼协同负载运输的新型导纳控制器，通过主动控制绞盘实现安全高效的合作运输


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 物理人机交互(pHRI)研究主要集中在机械臂领域，而人-四旋翼协同负载运输(CLT)研究仍处于起步阶段，需要开发适用于四旋翼的安全有效控制方法

Method: 设计新型导纳控制器，考虑系统耦合动力学，使四旋翼及其缆绳在CLT任务中能动态适应接触力；使用配备主动控制绞盘的四旋翼进行实验验证

Result: 在完整CLT过程中验证控制器任务自适应能力，包括原地装卸和负载运输任务；与传统方法相比，在系统响应性和运动平滑性方面表现更优

Conclusion: 所提出的导纳控制器能有效提升人-四旋翼协同负载运输能力，在低刚度和高刚度条件下均优于传统方法，为四旋翼pHRI应用提供了新解决方案

Abstract: The collaboration between humans and robots is critical in many robotic applications, especially in those requiring physical human-robot interaction (pHRI). Previous research in pHRI has largely focused on robotic manipulators, employing impedance or admittance control to maintain operational safety. Conversely, research in human-quadrotor cooperative load transportation (CLT) is still in its infancy. This letter introduces a novel admittance controller designed for safe and effective human-quadrotor CLT using a quadrotor equipped with an actively-controlled winch. The proposed method accounts for the system's coupled dynamics, allowing the quadrotor and its cable to dynamically adapt to contact forces during CLT tasks, thereby enhancing responsiveness. We experimentally validated the task-adaptive capability of the controller across the entire CLT process, including in-place loading/unloading and load transporting tasks. To this end, we compared the system performances against a conventional approach, using both variable and fixed cable lengths under low- and high-stiffness conditions. Results demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms the conventional approach in terms of system responsiveness and motion smoothness, leading to improved CLT capabilities.

</details>


### [329] [Thrust Regulation Through Wing Linkage Modulation on the Aerobat Platform: Piezoelectric Slip-Stick Actuated Regulator Development](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18900)
*Luca Ciampaglia*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文研究通过调节Aerobat蝙蝠机器人计算结构中第一半径连杆R1的有效长度来实现独立翼推力控制，探索了多种执行方法并最终选择了压电滑移执行器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Aerobat蝙蝠机器人采用单电机驱动的计算结构设计，虽然减轻了重量但将双翼耦合到共享输入电机，无法实现独立推力控制和不对称机动。需要开发一种能够独立调节翼推力的方法。

Method: 1. 静态实验：使用FDM打印的三种长度R1连杆(28.58, 29.33, 30.08mm)，在3-5Hz扑翼频率下测试；2. 探索多种执行方法：弦张力调节、亚克级微型伺服、压电滑移执行器；3. 开发力放大机制，最终采用直接驱动可变长度机制；4. 使用TULA-50压电滑移执行器嵌入计算结构实现连杆长度调制。

Result: 1. R1长度增加1.5mm使峰值升力增加37%，并改变了下冲程中峰值力的时机；2. 弦张力调节因结构件柔度失败，微型伺服因电机脆弱性失败；3. 压电滑移执行器被选为最终方案；4. 直接驱动可变长度机制在初步台架测试中验证，但输出力不足无法在扑翼时进行动态测试。

Conclusion: 通过嵌入式压电滑移执行器调制连杆长度是实现独立翼推力控制的可行方法，为未来Aerobat机器人的不对称机动能力奠定了基础。

Abstract: Aerobat is a bat-inspired flapping-wing robot with a wing gait generate by the computational structure, a planar linkage of carbon fiber links driven by a single motor. This design minimizes weight but couples both wings to a shared input motor, eliminating independent thrust control and preventing asymmetric maneuvers. This thesis investigates thrust regulation by modifying the effective length of the first radius link $R_1$ in the computational structure. Static experiments using FDM-printed $R_1$ links at three lengths (28.58, 29.33, and 30.08 mm) across 3,4, and 5 Hz flapping frequencies demonstrated that a 1.5 mm length increase produced a 37% increase in peak lift force and shifted peak force timing within the downstroke. An additional experiment using a string-actuated regulator mechanism was performed. Further actuation methods were evaluated: sub-gram micro-servo and piezoelectric slip-stick. After both the string-tension and micro-servo actuation methods failed due to structural member compliance and motor fragility respectively, a TULA-50 piezoelectric slip-stick actuator was selected. Multiple force-amplifying mechanisms were prototyped, resulting in a direct-drive variable-length mechanism. This final mechanism was demonstrated in a preliminary bench-top test, though insufficient force output prevented dynamic testing during flapping. This work establishes linkage-length modulation via embedded slip-stick actuation as a viable approach to independent wing thrust control.

</details>


### [330] [HALO: Hybrid Auto-encoded Locomotion with Learned Latent Dynamics, Poincaré Maps, and Regions of Attraction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18887)
*Blake Werner,Sergio A. Esteban,Massimiliano De Sa,Max H. Cohen,Aaron D. Ames*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: HALO框架通过自编码器学习混合动力系统的低维潜在模型，结合潜在庞加莱映射进行李雅普诺夫分析，将稳定性结构从潜在空间提升到全阶系统


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为复杂混合系统（如腿式机器人）构建降阶模型具有挑战性：传统手工模板模型（如LIP、SLIP）只能近似底层动力学，而数据驱动方法虽能提取更准确的低维表示，但难以保证潜在空间观测到的稳定性和安全性能有意义地传递回全阶系统

Method: 提出HALO（混合自编码运动）框架，使用自编码器从轨迹数据直接学习周期性混合动力系统的低维潜在模型；识别低维潜在状态并学习捕获步进运动动力学的潜在庞加莱映射；通过解码器将潜在空间的李雅普诺夫分析和吸引域构造提升到全阶状态空间

Result: 在模拟跳跃机器人和全身人形机器人运动实验中，HALO生成的降阶模型保留了有意义的稳定性结构，并能预测全阶吸引域边界

Conclusion: HALO框架成功桥接了数据驱动降阶模型与稳定性分析之间的差距，为复杂混合系统提供了既能准确捕捉动力学又能保证稳定性传递的降阶建模方法

Abstract: Reduced-order models are powerful for analyzing and controlling high-dimensional dynamical systems. Yet constructing these models for complex hybrid systems such as legged robots remains challenging. Classical approaches rely on hand-designed template models (e.g., LIP, SLIP), which, though insightful, only approximate the underlying dynamics. In contrast, data-driven methods can extract more accurate low-dimensional representations, but it remains unclear when stability and safety properties observed in the latent space meaningfully transfer back to the full-order system.
