To bridge this gap, we introduce HALO (Hybrid Auto-encoded Locomotion), a framework for learning latent reduced-order models of periodic hybrid dynamics directly from trajectory data. HALO employs an autoencoder to identify a low-dimensional latent state together with a learned latent Poincaré map that captures step-to-step locomotion dynamics. This enables Lyapunov analysis and the construction of an associated region of attraction in the latent space, both of which can be lifted back to the full-order state space through the decoder. Experiments on a simulated hopping robot and full-body humanoid locomotion demonstrate that HALO yields low-dimensional models that retain meaningful stability structure and predict full-order region-of-attraction boundaries.

</details>


### [331] [DAG-STL: A Hierarchical Framework for Zero-Shot Trajectory Planning under Signal Temporal Logic Specifications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18343)
*Ruijia Liu,Ancheng Hou,Xiao Yu,Xiang Yin*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: DAG-STL：一种分层框架，用于在未知动力学下进行离线STL规划，通过逻辑推理与轨迹实现的分离，将长时域STL规划分解为分解-分配-生成三个阶段，实现零样本泛化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有STL规划方法通常假设显式模型或学习任务特定行为，限制了在未见STL任务上的零样本泛化能力。本文研究在未知动力学下仅使用任务无关轨迹数据进行离线STL规划的问题。

Method: 提出DAG-STL分层框架：1）将STL公式分解为可达性和不变性进度条件；2）使用学习到的可达性时间估计分配定时路点；3）基于扩散的生成器合成路点间轨迹。还引入无滚动的动态一致性度量、有限预算下的多假设精化搜索和分层在线重规划机制。

Result: 在Maze2D、OGBench AntMaze和Cube领域的实验中，DAG-STL在复杂长时域STL任务上显著优于直接鲁棒性引导扩散方法，并在导航和操作设置中实现泛化。在基于优化的参考环境中，DAG-STL恢复了大多数模型可解任务，同时保持相对于基于显式系统模型的直接优化的计算优势。

Conclusion: DAG-STL通过分离逻辑推理与轨迹实现，将长时域STL规划分解为更短、更好支持的子问题，实现了在未知动力学下的高效离线规划，并具备零样本泛化能力。该方法在复杂任务上优于现有方法，且计算效率高。

Abstract: Signal Temporal Logic (STL) is a powerful language for specifying temporally structured robotic tasks. Planning executable trajectories under STL constraints remains difficult when system dynamics and environment structure are not analytically available. Existing methods typically either assume explicit models or learn task-specific behaviors, limiting zero-shot generalization to unseen STL tasks. In this work, we study offline STL planning under unknown dynamics using only task-agnostic trajectory data. Our central design philosophy is to separate logical reasoning from trajectory realization. We instantiate this idea in DAG-STL, a hierarchical framework that converts long-horizon STL planning into three stages. It first decomposes an STL formula into reachability and invariance progress conditions linked by shared timing constraints. It then allocates timed waypoints using learned reachability-time estimates. Finally, it synthesizes trajectories between these waypoints with a diffusion-based generator. This decomposition--allocation--generation pipeline reduces global planning to shorter, better-supported subproblems. To bridge the gap between planning-level correctness and execution-level feasibility, we further introduce a rollout-free dynamic consistency metric, an anytime refinement search procedure for improving multiple allocation hypotheses under finite budgets, and a hierarchical online replanning mechanism for execution-time recovery. Experiments in Maze2D, OGBench AntMaze, and the Cube domain show that DAG-STL substantially outperforms direct robustness-guided diffusion on complex long-horizon STL tasks and generalizes across navigation and manipulation settings. In a custom environment with an optimization-based reference, DAG-STL recovers most model-solvable tasks while retaining a clear computational advantage over direct optimization based on the explicit system model.

</details>


### [332] [Enhancing Glass Surface Reconstruction via Depth Prior for Robot Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18336)
*Jiamin Zheng,Jingwen Yu,Guangcheng Chen,Hong Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种无需训练的框架，利用深度基础模型作为结构先验，通过鲁棒的局部RANSAC对齐将其与原始传感器深度融合，有效解决玻璃表面导致的深度传感器测量误差问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 室内机器人导航中玻璃表面会严重破坏深度传感器测量，而现有基础模型（如Depth Anything 3）虽然提供良好的几何先验，但缺乏绝对度量尺度。

Method: 使用深度基础模型作为结构先验，通过鲁棒的局部RANSAC对齐将其与原始传感器深度融合，避免玻璃测量误差的污染并恢复准确的度量尺度。同时提出了GlassRecon数据集，包含几何推导的玻璃区域真值。

Result: 大量实验表明，该方法在严重传感器深度损坏情况下，始终优于最先进的基线方法。

Conclusion: 提出的训练免费框架有效解决了玻璃表面导致的深度测量问题，同时发布的GlassRecon数据集为相关研究提供了有价值的基准。

Abstract: Indoor robot navigation is often compromised by glass surfaces, which severely corrupt depth sensor measurements. While foundation models like Depth Anything 3 provide excellent geometric priors, they lack an absolute metric scale. We propose a training-free framework that leverages depth foundation models as a structural prior, employing a robust local RANSAC-based alignment to fuse it with raw sensor depth. This naturally avoids contamination from erroneous glass measurements and recovers an accurate metric scale. Furthermore, we introduce \ti{GlassRecon}, a novel RGB-D dataset with geometrically derived ground truth for glass regions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, especially under severe sensor depth corruption. The dataset and related code will be released at https://github.com/jarvisyjw/GlassRecon.

</details>


### [333] [Will People Enjoy a Robot Trainer? A Case Study with Snoopie the Pacerbot](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18331)
*Maximilian Du,Jennifer Grannen,Shuran Song,Dorsa Sadigh*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 研究探索四足机器人能否作为有效的个人跑步教练，通过SNOOPIE系统与Apple Watch对比，证明机器人教练在配速一致性、用户偏好等方面表现更优


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统人类教练具有物理存在优势，能够示范动作并提供直观反馈。四足机器人作为具身智能体具有强大运动能力，研究探索其能否成为有效且令人愉悦的个人训练设备

Method: 提出SNOOPIE系统——自主四足机器人配速员，专注于跑步间歇训练案例研究。通过用户实验比较机器人教练与可穿戴设备（Apple Watch），评估物理具身在运动交互中的优势

Result: 机器人教练使配速计划遵守率提高60.6%，跑步速度一致性提高45.9%。主观结果显示参与者强烈偏好机器人训练，在易用性（+56.7%）、交互愉悦性（+60.6%）和帮助性（+39.1%）等方面显著优于可穿戴设备

Conclusion: 四足机器人能够作为有效的个人跑步教练设备，其物理具身性在运动训练中提供显著优势，在配速一致性、用户参与度和主观体验方面均优于传统可穿戴设备

Abstract: The physicality of exercise makes the role of athletic trainers unique. Their physical presence allows them to guide a student through a motion, demonstrate an exercise, and give intuitive feedback. Robot quadrupeds are also embodied agents with robust agility and athleticism. In our work, we investigate whether a robot quadruped can serve as an effective and enjoyable personal trainer device. We focus on a case study of interval training for runners: a repetitive, long-horizon task where precision and consistency are important. To meet this challenge, we propose SNOOPIE, an autonomous robot quadruped pacer capable of running interval training exercises tailored to challenge a user's personal abilities. We conduct a set of user experiments that compare the robot trainer to a wearable trainer device--the Apple Watch--to investigate the benefits of a physical embodiment in exercise-based interactions. We demonstrate 60.6% better adherence to a pace schedule and were 45.9% more consistent across their running speeds with the quadruped trainer. Subjective results also showed that participants strongly preferred training with the robot over wearable devices across many qualitative axes, including its ease of use (+56.7%), enjoyability of the interaction (+60.6%), and helpfulness (+39.1%). Additional videos and visualizations can be found on our website: https://sites.google.com/view/snoopie

</details>


### [334] [Relative State Estimation using Event-Based Propeller Sensing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18289)
*Ravi Kumar Thakur,Luis Granados Segura,Jan Klivan,Radim Špetlík,Tobiáš Vinklárek,Matouš Vrba,Martin Saska*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于事件相机的四旋翼相对状态估计框架，通过检测和跟踪事件流中的螺旋桨区域，估计螺旋桨频率用于状态估计，结合相机位置测量实现多无人机系统的去中心化相对定位。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多无人机自主集群需要准确快速的相对状态估计。传统单目相机方法在理想条件下表现良好，但速度慢、存在尺度模糊问题，且在视觉挑战条件下表现不佳。事件相机具有低延迟、高动态范围和微秒级时间分辨率的优势，能够解决这些挑战性任务。

Method: 提出基于事件相机的螺旋桨感知相对状态估计框架：1）通过检测和跟踪事件流中的螺旋桨提取感兴趣区域；2）将区域事件流按时间块处理，估计每个螺旋桨的频率；3）频率测量作为推力输入驱动运动学状态估计模块；4）相机位置测量提供更新步骤；5）从事件流提取几何基元，通过拟合螺旋桨椭圆并反投影恢复机体坐标系倾斜轴来估计四旋翼姿态。

Result: 在五个真实世界室外飞行序列的测试数据集上，螺旋桨频率估计误差低于3%。相比现有基于事件的四旋翼状态估计方法（主要在模拟飞行序列中使用螺旋桨频率），该方法在真实场景中表现良好，为多机器人系统提供了基于事件相机的去中心化相对定位方法。

Conclusion: 提出的基于事件相机的螺旋桨感知框架能够有效估计四旋翼的相对状态，在真实室外环境中实现准确的螺旋桨频率估计，为多无人机系统的去中心化相对定位提供了实用解决方案，克服了传统视觉方法的局限性。

Abstract: Autonomous swarms of multi-Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) system requires an accurate and fast relative state estimation. Although monocular frame-based camera methods perform well in ideal conditions, they are slow, suffer scale ambiguity, and often struggle in visually challenging conditions. The advent of event cameras addresses these challenging tasks by providing low latency, high dynamic range, and microsecond-level temporal resolution. This paper proposes a framework for relative state estimation for quadrotors using event-based propeller sensing. The propellers in the event stream are tracked by detection to extract the region-of-interests. The event streams in these regions are processed in temporal chunks to estimate per-propeller frequencies. These frequency measurements drive a kinematic state estimation module as a thrust input, while camera-derived position measurements provide the update step. Additionally, we use geometric primitives derived from event streams to estimate the orientation of the quadrotor by fitting an ellipse over a propeller and backprojecting it to recover body-frame tilt-axis. The existing event-based approaches for quadrotor state estimation use the propeller frequency in simulated flight sequences. Our approach estimates the propeller frequency under 3% error on a test dataset of five real-world outdoor flight sequences, providing a method for decentralized relative localization for multi-robot systems using event camera.

</details>


### [335] [COFFAIL: A Dataset of Successful and Anomalous Robot Skill Executions in the Context of Coffee Preparation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18236)
*Alex Mitrevski,Ayush Salunke*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: COFFAIL是一个包含咖啡制作场景中成功和异常技能执行的数据集，支持机器人模仿学习


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器人操作数据集通常只包含成功执行或专注于单一技能类型，缺乏包含失败案例和多技能的数据集

Method: 在厨房环境中使用物理机器人收集咖啡制作相关的各种技能执行数据，包括成功和异常情况，部分为双手操作

Result: 创建了COFFAIL数据集，包含多种技能的成功和异常执行片段，并展示了如何利用该数据集通过模仿学习训练机器人策略

Conclusion: COFFAIL数据集为机器人操作学习提供了包含失败案例的宝贵资源，有助于开发更鲁棒的机器人策略

Abstract: In the context of robot learning for manipulation, curated datasets are an important resource for advancing the state of the art; however, available datasets typically only include successful executions or are focused on one particular type of skill. In this short paper, we briefly describe a dataset of various skills performed in the context of coffee preparation. The dataset, which we call COFFAIL, includes both successful and anomalous skill execution episodes collected with a physical robot in a kitchen environment, a couple of which are performed with bimanual manipulation. In addition to describing the data collection setup and the collected data, the paper illustrates the use of the data in COFFAIL to learn a robot policy using imitation learning.

</details>


### [336] [Chatting about Conditional Trajectory Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18126)
*Yuxiang Zhao,Wei Huang,Haipeng Zeng,Huan Zhao,Yujie Song*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出CiT方法，通过跨时间域意图交互进行条件轨迹预测，结合自身运动信息并紧密集成机器人运动规划模块


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人类行为具有相互依赖性，需要建模复杂社交交互来预测周围智能体轨迹。现有方法大多未结合自身运动信息，仅基于静态信息建模交互，需要更符合人类心智理论的方法

Method: 提出跨时间域意图交互轨迹预测方法(CiT)，联合分析随时间变化的行为意图，实现不同时间域的信息互补与整合。自身时间域的意图可通过其他时间域的社交交互信息进行校正，获得更精确的意图表示。该方法与机器人运动规划和控制模块紧密集成，能基于自身智能体的潜在运动生成周围智能体的可选轨迹预测结果

Result: 大量实验表明，CiT方法显著优于现有方法，在基准测试中实现了最先进的性能

Conclusion: CiT方法通过跨时间域意图交互有效解决了轨迹预测中结合自身运动信息的问题，为人类-机器人交互系统提供了更准确的轨迹预测能力

Abstract: Human behavior has the nature of mutual dependencies, which requires human-robot interactive systems to predict surrounding agents trajectories by modeling complex social interactions, avoiding collisions and executing safe path planning. While there exist many trajectory prediction methods, most of them do not incorporate the own motion of the ego agent and only model interactions based on static information. We are inspired by the humans theory of mind during trajectory selection and propose a Cross time domain intention-interactive method for conditional Trajectory prediction(CiT). Our proposed CiT conducts joint analysis of behavior intentions over time, and achieves information complementarity and integration across different time domains. The intention in its own time domain can be corrected by the social interaction information from the other time domain to obtain a more precise intention representation. In addition, CiT is designed to closely integrate with robotic motion planning and control modules, capable of generating a set of optional trajectory prediction results for all surrounding agents based on potential motions of the ego agent. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed CiT significantly outperforms the existing methods, achieving state-of-the-art performance in the benchmarks.

</details>


### [337] [Muscle-inspired magnetic actuators that push, pull, crawl, and grasp](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18090)
*Muhammad Bilal Khan,Florian Hofmann,Kilian Schäfer,Matthias Lutzi,Oliver Gutfleisch*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 通过激光粉末床熔融技术制造具有可调刚度和磁响应的热塑性/永磁体复合材料，开发出能够承受大变形、承载重物并实现多功能运动的肌肉仿生磁致动器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开发能够实现大变形、承载重物并具备多功能运动能力的磁功能复合材料，对于下一代自适应软体机器人至关重要。现有软体致动器在刚度控制、承载能力和多功能集成方面存在局限。

Method: 采用激光粉末床熔融技术增材制造热塑性聚氨酯/钕铁硼复合材料，通过调节激光能量密度（1.0-3.0）精确控制材料刚度和磁响应。设计两种致动器类型：伸长型致动器（磁化于收缩状态）和可扩展型致动器。

Result: 材料拉伸强度从0.28 MPa提高到0.99 MPa，同时保持30-45%的断裂伸长率。伸长型致动器（自重1.57 g）在500 mT磁场下实现线性收缩，可举起50 g重物（32倍自重），循环寿命超过50次。可扩展型致动器在300 mT磁场下可逆开合，可靠抓取不同物体。两种致动器均展示了优异的疲劳抗性。

Conclusion: 该研究展示了基于LPBF的单一材料系统中同时编程刚度和磁化的策略，实现了远程驱动、可重构且耐疲劳的软体致动器。该方法为力控、多功能的磁软体机器人开辟了新可能，适用于自适应抓取、运动控制和生物医学工具的微创操作。

Abstract: Functional magnetic composites capable of large deformation, load bearing, and multifunctional motion are essential for next-generation adaptive soft robots. Here, we present muscle-inspired magnetic actuators (MMA), additively manufactured from a thermoplastic/permanent magnet polyurethane/Nd2Fe14B (TPU/MQP-S) composite using laser powder bed fusion (LPBF). By tuning the laser-energy scale between 1.0 and 3.0, both mechanical stiffness and magnetic response are precisely controlled: the tensile strength increases from 0.28 to 0.99 MPa while maintaining 30-45% elongation at break. This process enables the creation of 0.5 mm-thick flexural hinges, which reversibly bend and fold under moderate magnetic fields without damage. Two actuator types are reported showing the system versatility. The elongated actuator with self-weight of 1.57 g, magnetized in its contracted state, achieves linear contraction under a 500 mT field, lifting 50 g (32x its own weight) and sustaining performance over at least 50 cycles. Equipped with anisotropic frictional feet, it supports movement of a magnetic crawling robot that achieves up to 100% locomotion success on textured substrates. The expandable actuator exhibits reversible opening and closing under a 300 mT field, reliably grasping and releasing different objects, including soft berries and rigid 3D printed geometries. It can also anchor in a tube while holding suspended 50 g loads. This work demonstrates a LPBF-based strategy to program both stiffness and magnetization within a single material system, enabling remotely driven, reconfigurable, and fatigue-resistant soft actuators. The approach opens new possibilities for force controlled, multifunctional magnetic soft robots for adaptive gripping, locomotion, and minimally invasive manipulation of biomedical tools.

</details>


### [338] [Unmasking the Illusion of Embodied Reasoning in Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18000)
*Haiweng Xu,Sipeng Zheng,Hao Luo,Wanpeng Zhang,Ziheng Xi,Zongqing Lu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了BeTTER基准测试，用于诊断机器人策略中的真正具身推理能力，发现当前最先进的VLA模型在动态场景中存在灾难性失败，揭示了架构瓶颈导致语义表征退化的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前Vision-Language-Action模型在标准机器人基准测试中报告了令人印象深刻的成功率，但最近证据表明标准基准测试成功与真实具身推理之间存在系统性错位。需要确定这些高分是否反映了真正的认知能力，因此需要开发能够测试真实具身推理的诊断性基准。

Method: 引入BeTTER基准测试，应用有针对性的因果干预（如空间布局变化、时间外推），同时强制执行运动学隔离，以明确解耦高级推理失败与低级执行限制。通过系统评估揭示VLA模型在动态场景中的失败模式，并进行机制分析追踪这些症状到根本的架构瓶颈。

Result: 最先进的VLA模型在动态场景中表现出灾难性失败，包括严重的词汇-运动学捷径、行为惯性和语义特征崩溃。机制分析将这些症状追溯到容量压缩和短视下采样等基本架构瓶颈，这些瓶颈系统地降低了模型的语义表征能力。高度静态的评估协议通过允许优化过度拟合感觉运动先验来掩盖这种退化。

Conclusion: 研究发现当前VLA模型存在根本性的表征崩溃问题，这不是模拟伪影，而是架构层面的限制。这突显了未来VLA范式需要解决高频控制与高级推理之间的结构张力，强调了开发能够真正测试具身推理能力的评估方法的重要性。

Abstract: Recent Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models report impressive success rates on standard robotic benchmarks, fueling optimism about general-purpose physical intelligence. However, recent evidence suggests a systematic misalignment between standard benchmark success and true embodied reasoning, raising the question of whether these high scores reflect genuine cognitive capability. To address this gap, we introduce BeTTER, a diagnostic Benchmark for Testing True Embodied Reasoning in robotic policies. BeTTER applies targeted causal interventions (e.g., spatial layout shifts, temporal extrapolation) while enforcing kinematic isolation to explicitly decouple high-level reasoning failures from low-level execution limits. Through systematic evaluation, we reveal that state-of-the-art VLAs catastrophically fail in dynamic scenarios, exhibiting severe lexical-kinematic shortcuts, behavioral inertia, and semantic feature collapse. Crucially, our mechanistic analysis traces these symptoms to fundamental architectural bottlenecks - such as capacity compression and myopic downsampling - which systematically degrade the model's foundational semantic representation. We demonstrate that highly static evaluation protocols effectively mask this degradation by allowing optimization to overfit to sensorimotor priors. Supported by real-world robotic validation, our findings confirm that this representational breakdown is not a simulation artifact, highlighting the critical need for future VLA paradigms to resolve the structural tension between high-frequency control and high-level reasoning.

</details>


### [339] [Locomotion of an Elastic Snake Robot via Natural Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17895)
*Tristan Ehlert,Arne Sachtler,Annika Schmidt,Davide Calzolari,Alin Albu-Schäffer*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该研究探讨了如何利用运动弹性蛇形机器人的非线性自然动力学设计高效步态，发现基于非制动周期轨迹的步态在保守系统中完全高效，在摩擦环境中优于刚性系统基线步态。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自然界中利用弹性系统的自然动力学可以提高运动效率，但现有弹性蛇形机器人研究未能充分利用系统的非线性动态行为。本研究的动机是探索是否以及如何利用运动弹性蛇形机器人的非线性自然动力学来设计高效步态。

Method: 基于特征流形理论，提出了两种基于自然动力学的步态设计方法：1）在两个非线性正规模式之间切换的步态；2）基于非制动周期轨迹（非制动轨道）的步态。通过动力学仿真将这些方法与最先进的刚性系统方法进行比较。

Result: 1）在两个非线性正规模式之间切换的步态未能提高机器人的运动效率；2）基于非制动周期轨迹的步态在能量保守情况下完全高效；3）在包含摩擦的更现实场景中，非制动轨道步态相比刚性系统基线步态实现了更高的效率。

Conclusion: 研究表明，基于自然动力学的步态设计具有潜力，特别是非制动轨道步态在现实摩擦环境中表现出优越性。这为基于自然动力学的步态设计提供了有前景的见解，促进了该领域的进一步研究。

Abstract: Nature suggests that exploiting the elasticities and natural dynamics of robotic systems could increase their locomotion efficiency. Prior work on elastic snake robots supports this hypothesis, but has not fully exploited the nonlinear dynamic behavior of the systems. Recent advances in eigenmanifold theory enable a better characterization of the natural dynamics in complex nonlinear systems. This letter investigates if and how the nonlinear natural dynamics of a kinematic elastic snake robot can be used to design efficient gaits. Two types of gaits based on natural dynamics are presented and compared to a state-of-the-art approach using dynamics simulations. The results reveal that a gait generated by switching between two nonlinear normal modes does not improve the locomotion efficiency of the robot. In contrast, gaits based on non-brake periodic trajectories (non-brake orbits) are perfectly efficient in the energy-conservative case. Further simulations with friction reveal that, in a more realistic scenario, non-brake orbit gaits achieve higher efficiency compared to the baseline gait on the rigid system. Overall, the investigation offers promising insights into the design of gaits based on natural dynamics, fostering further research.

</details>


### [340] [StableIDM: Stabilizing Inverse Dynamics Model against Manipulator Truncation via Spatio-Temporal Refinement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17887)
*Kerui Li,Zhe Jing,Xiaofeng Wang,Zheng Zhu,Yukun Zhou,Guan Huang,Dongze Li,Qingkai Yang,Huaibo Huang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: StableIDM：一个时空框架，通过细化视觉特征来稳定逆动力学模型在机械臂截断情况下的动作预测，提升部分可观测性下的控制稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 逆动力学模型在机械臂截断（常见故障模式）下性能严重下降，导致状态恢复不适定和控制不稳定，需要解决部分可观测性下的动作预测稳定性问题。

Method: 提出StableIDM框架，包含三个互补组件：1）辅助机器人中心掩码抑制背景干扰；2）方向特征聚合进行几何感知的空间推理；3）时序动态细化通过运动连续性平滑和校正预测。

Result: 在AgiBot基准测试中，严重截断下严格动作准确率提升12.1%；真实机器人回放中平均任务成功率提升9.7%；解码视频生成计划时端到端抓取成功率提升11.5%；作为自动标注器时下游VLA真实机器人成功率提升17.6%。

Conclusion: StableIDM为具身人工智能中的策略执行和数据生成提供了鲁棒且可扩展的骨干框架，显著提升了逆动力学模型在部分可观测性下的稳定性和性能。

Abstract: Inverse Dynamics Models (IDMs) map visual observations to low-level action commands, serving as central components for data labeling and policy execution in embodied AI. However, their performance degrades severely under manipulator truncation, a common failure mode that makes state recovery ill-posed and leads to unstable control. We present StableIDM, a spatio-temporal framework that refines features from visual inputs to stabilize action predictions under such partial observability. StableIDM integrates three complementary components: (1) auxiliary robot-centric masking to suppress background clutter, (2) Directional Feature Aggregation (DFA) for geometry-aware spatial reasoning, which extracts anisotropic features along directions inferred from the visible arm and (3) Temporal Dynamics Refinement (TDR) to smooth and correct predictions via motion continuity. Extensive evaluations validate our approach: StableIDM improves strict action accuracy by 12.1% under severe truncation on the AgiBot benchmark, and increases average task success by 9.7% in real-robot replay. Moreover, it boosts end-to-end grasp success by 11.5% when decoding video-generated plans, and improves downstream VLA real-robot success by 17.6% when functioning as an automatic annotator. These results demonstrate that StableIDM provides a robust and scalable backbone for both policy execution and data generation in embodied artificial intelligence.

</details>


### [341] [ST-$π$: Structured SpatioTemporal VLA for Robotic Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17880)
*Chuanhao Ma,Hanyu Zhou,Shihan Peng,Yan Li,Tao Gu,Luxin Yan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: ST-π是一个结构化时空VLA模型，通过时空VLM生成块级动作提示，时空动作专家预测步级动作参数，解决机器人精细时空操作问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型在精细时空操作中面临挑战，时空推理大多隐式，难以处理具有明确时空边界的多个顺序行为

Method: 1) 时空VLM：编码4D观测和任务指令，通过LLM生成因果有序的块级动作提示（子任务、空间定位、时间定位）；2) 时空动作专家：基于块级提示，设计结构化双生成器指导，联合建模空间依赖和时间因果性，预测步级动作参数

Result: 通过真实世界机器人数据集进行微调，大量实验证明了模型的有效性

Conclusion: ST-π通过结构化框架实现显式全局时空规划和局部时空控制细化，提升了机器人精细时空操作能力

Abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) models have achieved great success on general robotic tasks, but still face challenges in fine-grained spatiotemporal manipulation. Typically, existing methods mainly embed spatiotemporal knowledge into visual and action representations, and directly perform a cross-modal mapping for step-level action prediction. However, such spatiotemporal reasoning remains largely implicit, making it difficult to handle multiple sequential behaviors with explicit spatiotemporal boundaries. In this work, we propose ST-$π$, a structured spatiotemporal VLA model for robotic manipulation. Our model is guided by two key designs: 1) Spatiotemporal VLM. We encode 4D observations and task instructions into latent spaces, and feed them into the LLM to generate a sequence of causally ordered chunk-level action prompts consisting of sub-tasks, spatial grounding and temporal grounding. 2) Spatiotemporal action expert. Conditioned on chunk-level action prompts, we design a structured dual-generator guidance to jointly model spatial dependencies and temporal causality, thus predicting step-level action parameters. Within this structured framework, the VLM explicitly plans global spatiotemporal behavior, and the action expert further refines local spatiotemporal control. In addition, we propose a real-world robotic dataset with structured spatiotemporal annotations for fine-tuning. Extensive experiments have been conducted to demonstrate the effectiveness of our model. Our code link: https://github.com/chuanhaoma/ST-pi.

</details>


### [342] [OFlow: Injecting Object-Aware Temporal Flow Matching for Robust Robotic Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17876)
*Kuanning Wang,Ke Fan,Chenhao Qiu,Zeyu Shangguan,Yuqian Fu,Yanwei Fu,Daniel Seita,Xiangyang Xue*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: OFlow框架将物体感知推理与时间预测统一到共享语义潜在空间中，通过时间流匹配预测未来潜在状态，分解为物体感知表示，并基于这些预测生成连续动作，提升机器人操作的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型存在两个主要局限：1) 通常仅作用于当前帧，缺乏对未来场景演变的预测能力；2) 未来预测和物体感知推理通常在分离的潜在空间中学习。这限制了机器人在复杂场景中识别任务相关物体并进行鲁棒操作的能力。

Method: 提出OFlow框架，通过时间流匹配预测未来潜在状态，然后将这些潜在状态分解为物体感知表示，强调物理相关线索同时过滤任务无关变化，最后基于这些预测生成连续动作。该方法将时间预见性和物体感知推理统一到共享语义潜在空间中。

Result: 在LIBERO、LIBERO-Plus、MetaWorld和SimplerEnv等多个基准测试以及真实世界任务上的广泛实验表明，物体感知预见性能够一致地增强机器人操作的鲁棒性和成功率，特别是在分布偏移情况下实现更可靠的控制。

Conclusion: OFlow框架成功解决了现有VLA模型在时间预测和物体感知推理分离的问题，通过统一的物体感知时间流匹配方法，显著提升了机器人操作在复杂场景和分布偏移条件下的鲁棒性和成功率。

Abstract: Robust robotic manipulation requires not only predicting how the scene evolves over time, but also recognizing task-relevant objects in complex scenes. However, existing VLA models face two limitations. They typically act only on the current frame, while future prediction and object-aware reasoning are often learned in separate latent spaces. We propose OFlow (injecting Object-Aware Temporal Flow Matching into VLAs), a framework that addresses both limitations by unifying temporal foresight and object-aware reasoning in a shared semantic latent space. Our method forecasts future latents with temporal flow matching, factorizes them into object-aware representations that emphasize physically relevant cues while filtering task-irrelevant variation, and conditions continuous action generation on these predictions. By integrating OFlow into VLA pipelines, our method enables more reliable control under distribution shifts. Extensive experiments across LIBERO, LIBERO-Plus, MetaWorld, and SimplerEnv benchmarks and real-world tasks demonstrate that object-aware foresight consistently enhances robustness and success.

</details>


### [343] [Periodic Steady-State Control of a Handkerchief-Spinning Task Using a Parallel Anti-Parallelogram Tendon-driven Wrist](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17863)
*Lei Liu,Haonan Zhang,Huahang Xu,Zefan Zhang,Lulu Chang,Lei Lv,Andrew Ross McIntosh,Kai Sun,Zhenshan Bing,Jiahong Dong,Fuchun Sun*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该研究开发了一种用于旋转柔性物体（如传统中国手帕）的灵巧手腕系统，结合控制导向建模实现了高动态旋转操作。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 旋转柔性物体（以传统中国手帕表演为例）需要在非线性动力学、摩擦接触和边界约束下实现周期性稳态运动，这带来了控制上的挑战。

Method: 1. 设计基于并联反平行四边形腱驱动结构的灵巧手腕，实现90度全向旋转、低惯量和解耦的滚转-俯仰传感；2. 采用高低层次控制方案；3. 开发用于控制抽象和策略评估的手帕粒子-弹簧模型。

Result: 硬件实验验证了该框架的有效性：展开率约99%，高动态旋转时指尖跟踪误差RMSE = 2.88毫米。

Conclusion: 将控制导向建模与任务定制的灵巧手腕相结合，能够实现从静止到稳态的鲁棒过渡，以及对高度柔性物体的精确周期性操作。

Abstract: Spinning flexible objects, exemplified by traditional Chinese handkerchief performances, demands periodic steady-state motions under nonlinear dynamics with frictional contacts and boundary constraints. To address these challenges, we first design an intuitive dexterous wrist based on a parallel anti-parallelogram tendon-driven structure, which achieves 90 degrees omnidirectional rotation with low inertia and decoupled roll-pitch sensing, and implement a high-low level hierarchical control scheme. We then develop a particle-spring model of the handkerchief for control-oriented abstraction and strategy evaluation. Hardware experiments validate this framework, achieving an unfolding ratio of approximately 99% and fingertip tracking error of RMSE = 2.88 mm in high-dynamic spinning. These results demonstrate that integrating control-oriented modeling with a task-tailored dexterous wrist enables robust rest-to-steady-state transitions and precise periodic manipulation of highly flexible objects. More visualizations: https://slowly1113.github.io/icra2026-handkerchief/

</details>


### [344] [Driving risk emerges from the required two-dimensional joint evasive acceleration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17841)
*Hao Cheng,Yanbo Jiang,Wenhao Yu,Rui Zhou,Jiang Bian,Keyu Chen,Zhiyuan Liu,Heye Huang,Hailun Zhang,Fang Zhang,Jianqiang Wang,Sifa Zheng*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种名为规避加速度（EA）的二维风险量化范式，用于自动驾驶安全评估，相比传统的一维时间碰撞方法能更准确地捕捉碰撞风险结构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自动驾驶安全基准主要使用时间碰撞（TTC）来评估风险和指导安全行为，但TTC方法将风险视为一维接近问题，无法准确捕捉碰撞避免的二维本质及其随时间演变的风险。

Method: 提出规避加速度（EA）方法，这是一种无超参数且物理可解释的二维风险量化范式。通过评估所有可能的碰撞避免方向，EA将风险定义为改变相对运动并使交互无碰撞所需的最小恒定相对加速度向量大小。

Result: 使用五个开放数据集和600多起真实碰撞的交互数据，推导出基于百分位的警告阈值。EA在所有阈值上提供最早的统计显著警告，对最终碰撞结果具有最佳区分能力，信息保留比所有基线方法提高54.2-241.4%。将EA添加到现有方法中获得的信息增益比将现有方法添加到EA中高17.5-95.5倍。

Conclusion: EA能更好地捕捉碰撞风险结构，为下一代自动驾驶系统提供基础。它捕获了现有方法中的大部分结果相关信息，同时贡献了大量额外的非冗余信息。

Abstract: Most autonomous driving safety benchmarks use time-to-collision (TTC) to assess risk and guide safe behaviour. However, TTC-based methods treat risk as a one-dimensional closing problem, despite the inherently two-dimensional nature of collision avoidance, and therefore cannot faithfully capture risk or its evolution over time. Here, we report evasive acceleration (EA), a hyperparameter-free and physically interpretable two-dimensional paradigm for risk quantification. By evaluating all possible directions of collision avoidance, EA defines risk as the minimum magnitude of a constant relative acceleration vector required to alter the relative motion and make the interaction collision-free. Using interaction data from five open datasets and more than 600 real crashes, we derive percentile-based warning thresholds and show that EA provides the earliest statistically significant warning across all thresholds. Moreover, EA provides the best discrimination of eventual collision outcomes and improves information retention by 54.2-241.4% over all compared baselines. Adding EA to existing methods yields 17.5-95.5 times more information gain than adding existing methods to EA, indicating that EA captures much of the outcome-relevant information in existing methods while contributing substantial additional nonredundant information. Overall, EA better captures the structure of collision risk and provides a foundation for next-generation autonomous driving systems.

</details>


### [345] [DART: Learning-Enhanced Model Predictive Control for Dual-Arm Non-Prehensile Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17833)
*Autrio Das,Shreya Bollimuntha,Madala Venkata Renu Jeevesh,Keshab Patra,Tashmoy Gosh,Nagamanikandan G,Arun Kumar,Madhava Krishna*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: DART：首个用于托盘上物体非抓取式双臂操作的框架，整合非线性MPC与阻抗控制，评估三种托盘-物体动力学建模策略


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人类服务员看似轻松的任务对机器人仍是重大挑战。托盘上物体的非抓取操作本身困难，双臂设置更增加复杂性。这类任务在酒店和接待等服务业机器人中高度相关，机器人需要精确运输和重新定位多样物体

Method: 提出DART框架，整合非线性模型预测控制（MPC）与基于优化的阻抗控制器，实现物体相对于动态控制托盘的精确运动。系统评估三种互补的托盘-物体动力学建模策略作为MPC状态转移函数：(i)基于物理的分析模型，(ii)实时自适应在线回归识别模型，(iii)跨物体属性泛化的强化学习动力学模型

Result: 在仿真中验证了框架对具有不同质量、几何形状和摩擦系数物体的有效性。广泛评估突显了三种建模策略在稳定时间、稳态误差、控制努力和跨物体泛化能力之间的权衡

Conclusion: DART构成了首个用于托盘上物体非抓取式双臂操作的框架。项目链接：https://dart-icra.github.io/dart/

Abstract: What appears effortless to a human waiter remains a major challenge for robots. Manipulating objects nonprehensilely on a tray is inherently difficult, and the complexity is amplified in dual-arm settings. Such tasks are highly relevant to service robotics in domains such as hotels and hospitality, where robots must transport and reposition diverse objects with precision. We present DART, a novel dual-arm framework that integrates nonlinear Model Predictive Control (MPC) with an optimization-based impedance controller to achieve accurate object motion relative to a dynamically controlled tray. The framework systematically evaluates three complementary strategies for modeling tray-object dynamics as the state transition function within our MPC formulation: (i) a physics-based analytical model, (ii) an online regression based identification model that adapts in real-time, and (iii) a reinforcement learning-based dynamics model that generalizes across object properties. Our pipeline is validated in simulation with objects of varying mass, geometry, and friction coefficients. Extensive evaluations highlight the trade-offs among the three modeling strategies in terms of settling time, steady-state error, control effort, and generalization across objects. To the best of our knowledge, DART constitutes the first framework for non-prehensile dual-arm manipulation of objects on a tray. Project Link: https://dart-icra.github.io/dart/

</details>


### [346] [SYMBOLIZER: Symbolic Model-free Task Planning with VLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17830)
*Sami Azirar,Zlatan Ajanovic,Hermann Blum*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一个结合视觉语言模型与经典规划的新框架，用于任务与运动规划问题，无需手动构建符号模型，通过VLM从图像中提取符号状态，使用领域无关的启发式搜索进行规划。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统TAMP系统需要手动构建符号模型（符号状态解释和动作模型），这既耗时又限制了可扩展性和适应性。虽然视觉语言模型具有零样本视觉理解能力，但其规划能力有限。因此，将VLM与经典规划结合，实现无需手动符号模型的长期推理具有巨大潜力。

Method: 提出一个通用框架：1) 仅需提升谓词描述对象间关系；2) 使用VLM从图像中提取符号状态；3) 使用领域无关的启发式搜索（目标计数和基于宽度的启发式）进行规划，无需动作模型；4) 在VLM提取的符号状态空间上进行符号搜索。

Result: 在VLM提取的符号状态空间上的符号搜索优于直接的VLM规划，与使用VLM启发式的方法表现相当。该方法在ProDG和ViPlan基准测试中取得了最先进的结果，证明了领域无关搜索能够有效解决具有大型组合状态空间的跨领域问题。

Conclusion: 该框架成功地将VLM的视觉理解能力与经典规划的推理能力相结合，实现了无需手动构建符号模型的通用TAMP解决方案，在多个基准测试中表现出色，展示了领域无关搜索在解决复杂规划问题中的有效性。

Abstract: Traditional Task and Motion Planning (TAMP) systems depend on physics models for motion planning and discrete symbolic models for task planning. Although physics model are often available, symbolic models (consisting of symbolic state interpretation and action models) must be meticulously handcrafted or learned from labeled data. This process is both resource-intensive and constrains the solution to the specific domain, limiting scalability and adaptability. On the other hand, Visual Language Models (VLMs) show desirable zero-shot visual understanding (due to their extensive training on heterogeneous data), but still achieve limited planning capabilities. Therefore, integrating VLMs with classical planning for long-horizon reasoning in TAMP problems offers high potential. Recent works in this direction still lack generality and depend on handcrafted, task-specific solutions, e.g. describing all possible objects in advance, or using symbolic action models. We propose a framework that generalizes well to unseen problem instances. The method requires only lifted predicates describing relations among objects and uses VLMs to ground them from images to obtain the symbolic state. Planning is performed with domain-independent heuristic search using goal-count and width-based heuristics, without need for action models. Symbolic search over VLM-grounded state-space outperforms direct VLM-based planning and performs on par with approaches that use a VLM-derived heuristic. This shows that domain-independent search can effectively solve problems across domains with large combinatorial state spaces. We extensively evaluate on extensively evaluate our method and achieve state-of-the-art results on the ProDG and ViPlan benchmarks.

</details>


### [347] [Memory Centric Power Allocation for Multi-Agent Embodied Question Answering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17810)
*Chengyang Li,Shuai Wang,Kejiang Ye,Weijie Yuan,Boyu Zhou,Yik-Chung Wu,Chengzhong Xu,Huseyin Arslan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于生成对抗考试的质量记忆模型和内存中心功率分配方法，用于多智能体具身问答场景，通过优化记忆质量而非传统感知/通信/计算指标来提升长期记忆性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有边缘资源管理方法主要关注感知、通信或计算性能指标，而多智能体具身问答强调长期记忆质量，需要新的评估和优化框架来应对这一范式转变。

Method: 1) 提出基于生成对抗考试的质量记忆模型，利用前向模拟评估记忆检索能力，通过考试得分计算QoM值；2) 提出内存中心功率分配方法，在通信资源约束下最大化QoM函数；3) 通过渐近分析发现发射功率与GAE错误概率成正比。

Result: 渐近分析表明发射功率与GAE错误概率成正比，从而优先考虑高QoM机器人。大量实验证明MCPA在各种场景下相比多种基准方法在多样化指标上取得显著改进。

Conclusion: 提出的QoM模型和MCPA方法有效解决了MA-EQA中的记忆质量优化问题，通过优先分配资源给高质量记忆机器人，在多种场景下显著提升了系统性能。

Abstract: This paper considers multi-agent embodied question answering (MA-EQA), which aims to query robot teams on what they have seen over a long horizon. In contrast to existing edge resource management methods that emphasize sensing, communication, or computation performance metrics, MA-EQA emphasizes the memory qualities. To cope with this paradigm shift, we propose a quality of memory (QoM) model based on generative adversarial exam (GAE), which leverages forward simulation to assess memory retrieval and uses the resulting exam scores to compute QoM values. Then we propose memory centric power allocation (MCPA), which maximizes the QoM function under communication resource constraints. Through asymptotic analysis, it is found that the transmit powers are proportional to the GAE error probability, thus prioritizing towards high-QoM robots. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MCPA achieves significant improvements over extensive benchmarks in terms of diverse metrics in various scenarios.

</details>


### [348] [ReFineVLA: Multimodal Reasoning-Aware Generalist Robotic Policies via Teacher-Guided Fine-Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17800)
*Tuan Van Vo,Tan Q. Nguyen,Khang Nguyen,Nhat Xuan Tran,Duy H. M. Nguyen,An T. Le,Ngo Anh Vien,Minh Nhat Vu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: ReFineVLA：通过教师引导的推理增强视觉-语言-动作模型，在机器人操作任务中实现最先进性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型通常忽略显式推理过程，仅学习功能性的输入-动作映射，缺乏逻辑步骤，这在复杂长视野操作任务的解释性和泛化性方面尤为明显。

Method: 提出ReFineVLA框架：1) 使用专家教师模型为机器人数据集生成推理依据；2) 用推理增强的数据集微调预训练VLA模型；3) 通过注意力图可视化分析视觉观察、语言提示和待执行动作之间的对齐。

Result: 在SimplerEnv模拟环境中的WidowX和Google Robot任务基准测试中，ReFineVLA在成功率上均达到最先进性能，优于次优方法。

Conclusion: ReFineVLA通过引入教师引导的推理增强，显著提升了VLA模型的多模态理解和泛化能力，在机器人操作任务中表现出更强的推理能力和性能。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have gained much attention from the research community thanks to their strength in translating multimodal observations with linguistic instructions into desired robotic actions. Despite their advancements, VLAs often overlook explicit reasoning and learn the functional input-action mappings, omitting crucial logical steps, which are especially pronounced in interpretability and generalization for complex, long-horizon manipulation tasks. In this work, we propose ReFineVLA, a multimodal reasoning-aware framework that fine-tunes VLAs with teacher-guided reasons. We first augment robotic datasets with reasoning rationales generated by an expert teacher model, guiding VLA models to learn to reason about their actions. Then, we fine-tune pre-trained VLAs with the reasoning-enriched datasets with ReFineVLA, while maintaining the underlying generalization abilities and boosting reasoning capabilities. We also conduct attention map visualization to analyze the alignment among visual observation, linguistic prompts, and to-be-executed actions of ReFineVLA, reflecting the model is ability to focus on relevant tasks and actions. Through this additional step, we explore that ReFineVLA-trained models exhibit a meaningful agreement between vision-language and action domains, highlighting the enhanced multimodal understanding and generalization. Evaluated across a suite of simulated manipulation benchmarks on SimplerEnv with both WidowX and Google Robot tasks, ReFineVLA achieves state-of-the-art performance, in success rate over the second-best method on the both the WidowX benchmark and Google Robot Tasks.

</details>


### [349] [OmniVLA-RL: A Vision-Language-Action Model with Spatial Understanding and Online RL](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17706)
*Haoxiang Jie,Yaoyuan Yan,Xiangyu Wei,Kailin Wang,Hongjie Yan,Zhiyou Heng,Daocheng Chen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: OmniVLA-RL：基于Mix-of-Transformers架构和Flow-GSPO优化算法的新型VLA模型，在空间感知、多模态融合和强化学习稳定性方面显著优于现有方法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉-语言-动作模型存在空间感知不精确、多模态融合效果不佳、强化学习训练不稳定等根本性局限，需要新的架构和训练方法来克服这些挑战

Method: 提出OmniVLA-RL架构，采用Mix-of-Transformers设计协同整合推理、空间和动作专家；引入Flow-GSPO方法，将流匹配重新表述为随机微分方程过程，并与分组分段策略优化相结合

Result: 在LIBERO和LIBERO-Plus基准测试中，OmniVLA-RL显著优于现有最先进方法，有效克服了当前VLA模型的基本局限性

Conclusion: OmniVLA-RL通过创新的Mix-of-Transformers架构和Flow-GSPO训练方法，为视觉-语言-动作模型提供了更精确的空间感知、更好的多模态融合和更稳定的强化学习训练

Abstract: Visual-Language-Action (VLA) models represent a paradigm shift in embodied AI, yet existing frameworks often struggle with imprecise spatial perception, suboptimal multimodal fusion, and instability in reinforcement learning. To bridge these gaps, we propose OmniVLA-RL, a novel architecture that leverages a Mix-of-Transformers (MoT) design to synergistically integrate reasoning, spatial, and action experts. Furthermore, we introduce Flow-GSPO, which reformulates flow matching as a Stochastic Differential Equation (SDE) process and integrates it with Group Segmented Policy Optimization (GSPO) to enhance action precision and training robustness. Extensive evaluations on the LIBERO and LIBERO-Plus benchmarks demonstrate that OmniVLA-RL significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, effectively overcoming the fundamental limitations of current VLA models.

</details>


### [350] [A Hamilton-Jacobi Reachability-Guided Search Framework for Efficient and Safe Indoor Planar Robot Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17679)
*Hanyang Hu,Cameron Siu,Mo Chen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 结合离线HJ可达性分析与在线图搜索，利用预计算的HJ值函数作为启发式和安全约束，提升动态环境中自主导航的规划效率与安全性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 图搜索算法在复杂动态环境中的实时规划面临计算复杂度随搜索空间维度指数增长的问题，而HJ可达性分析需要完全的环境先验知识。需要结合两者的优势来解决自主导航中的实时规划挑战

Method: 提出混合框架：离线预计算Hamilton-Jacobi可达性值函数作为启发式信息和安全约束；在线进行图搜索规划，利用HJ值函数引导搜索并确保安全性。HJ值函数摊销在线计算负担，图搜索则使可达性推理能适应在线环境变化

Result: 在仿真和真实世界实验中，该方法在有无人类存在的环境中均优于基线方法，显著提升了规划效率和导航安全性

Conclusion: 结合离线HJ可达性分析与在线图搜索能够有效解决动态环境中自主导航的实时规划问题，通过预计算摊销在线计算负担，同时保持对未知环境变化的适应性

Abstract: Autonomous navigation requires planning to reach a goal safely and efficiently in complex and potentially dynamic environments. Graph search-based algorithms are widely adopted due to their generality and theoretical guarantees when equipped with admissible heuristics. However, the computational complexity of graph search grows rapidly with the dimensionality of the search space, often making real-time planning in dynamic environments intractable. In this paper, we combine offline Hamilton-Jacobi (HJ) reachability with online graph search to leverage the complementary strengths of both. Precomputed HJ value functions, used as informative heuristics and proactive safety constraints, amortize online computation of the graph search process. At the same time, graph search enables reachability-based reasoning to be incorporated into online planning, overcoming the long-standing challenge of HJ reachability requiring full knowledge of the environment. Extensive simulation studies and real-world experiments demonstrate that the proposed approach consistently outperforms baseline methods in terms of planning efficiency and navigation safety, in environments with and without human presence.

</details>


### [351] [Novel Algorithms for Smoothly Differentiable and Efficiently Vectorizable Contact Manifold Construction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17538)
*Onur Beker,Andreas René Geist,Anselm Paulus,Georg Martius*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种用于接触丰富机器人任务的可微分碰撞检测方法，通过解析SDF基元和新型接触流形生成实现平滑可微和高效向量化


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前接触丰富场景中的智能机器人行为生成主要依赖零阶方法，而利用动力学一阶/二阶信息的方法在求解速度和计算效率方面具有巨大潜力。主要瓶颈在于难以从仿真管道的三个步骤（碰撞检测、接触动力学、时间积分）中获得有用的梯度和Hessian矩阵

Method: 提出了两个关键贡献：1）高度表达性的解析SDF基元类，能够高效表示复杂3D表面；2）基于该几何表示的新型接触流形生成方法，实现平滑可微和高效向量化的碰撞检测

Result: 该方法能够解决碰撞检测部分的难题，为接触丰富机器人任务提供可微分的碰撞检测解决方案

Conclusion: 提出的方法为利用一阶/二阶信息优化机器人行为提供了关键基础，通过可微分碰撞检测解决了仿真管道中的第一个瓶颈问题

Abstract: Generating intelligent robot behavior in contact-rich settings is a research problem where zeroth-order methods currently prevail. Developing methods that make use of first/second order information about the dynamics holds great promise in terms of increasing the solution speed and computational efficiency. The main bottleneck in this research direction is the difficulty in obtaining useful gradients and Hessians, due to pathologies in all three steps of a common simulation pipeline: i) collision detection, ii) contact dynamics, iii) time integration. This abstract proposes a method that can address the collision detection part of the puzzle in a manner that is smoothly differentiable and massively vectorizable. This is achieved via two contributions: i) a highly expressive class of analytical SDF primitives that can efficiently represent complex 3D surfaces, ii) a novel contact manifold generation routine that makes use of this geometry representation.

</details>


### [352] [Safer Trajectory Planning with CBF-guided Diffusion Model for Unmanned Aerial Vehicles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17527)
*Peiwen Yang,Shiyu Bai,Weisong Wen,Yixin Gao,Jiahao Hu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出AeroTrajGen框架，结合扩散模型与控制屏障函数引导采样，为无人机生成安全敏捷的轨迹，在14种特技动作中实现94.7%的碰撞率降低


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 无人机在复杂特技动作中需要安全敏捷的轨迹规划，扩散模型在生成任务中表现出色但存在不可预测性和安全隐患，需要解决安全约束问题并减少对安全验证训练数据的依赖

Method: 提出AeroTrajGen框架，采用基于控制屏障函数的引导采样方法，在反向扩散过程中将安全约束梯度与扩散模型的评分函数结合；使用障碍物感知的扩散变换器架构，支持多模态条件输入（轨迹历史、障碍物、动作风格、目标）

Result: 在包含2000个专家演示的数据集上训练，多障碍物环境仿真评估显示，CBF引导采样相比无引导扩散基线将碰撞率降低94.7%，同时保持轨迹的敏捷性和多样性

Conclusion: AeroTrajGen框架成功将CBF引导采样与扩散模型结合，显著提高无人机轨迹生成的安全性，减少对安全验证训练数据的依赖，为自主系统在复杂特技动作中的安全轨迹规划提供有效解决方案

Abstract: Safe and agile trajectory planning is essential for autonomous systems, especially during complex aerobatic maneuvers. Motivated by the recent success of diffusion models in generative tasks, this paper introduces AeroTrajGen, a novel framework for diffusion-based trajectory generation that incorporates control barrier function (CBF)-guided sampling during inference, specifically designed for unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs). The proposed CBF-guided sampling addresses two critical challenges: (1) mitigating the inherent unpredictability and potential safety violations of diffusion models, and (2) reducing reliance on extensively safety-verified training data. During the reverse diffusion process, CBF-based guidance ensures collision-free trajectories by seamlessly integrating safety constraint gradients with the diffusion model's score function. The model features an obstacle-aware diffusion transformer architecture with multi-modal conditioning, including trajectory history, obstacles, maneuver styles, and goal, enabling the generation of smooth, highly agile trajectories across 14 distinct aerobatic maneuvers. Trained on a dataset of 2,000 expert demonstrations, AeroTrajGen is rigorously evaluated in simulation under multi-obstacle environments. Simulation results demonstrate that CBF-guided sampling reduces collision rates by 94.7% compared to unguided diffusion baselines, while preserving trajectory agility and diversity. Our code is open-sourced at https://github.com/RoboticsPolyu/CBF-DMP.

</details>


### [353] [FLASH: Fast Learning via GPU-Accelerated Simulation for High-Fidelity Deformable Manipulation in Minutes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17513)
*Siyuan Luo,Bingyang Zhou,Chong Zhang,Xin Liu,Zhenhao Huang,Gang Yang,Zhengtao Han,Xiaotian Hu,Eric Yang,Rymon Yu,Ziqiu Zeng,Fan Shi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: FLASH是一个GPU原生的仿真框架，专门用于接触丰富的可变形物体操作，通过重新设计的物理引擎实现高精度、高速的大规模交互学习，支持零样本仿真到真实世界的迁移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有仿真框架（如Isaac Sim）在刚体操作和运动控制方面表现良好，但在可变形物体操作方面存在瓶颈。可变形材料的几何形状持续变化、顶点数量庞大、接触约束复杂，难以实现大规模交互学习所需的高精度、速度和稳定性。

Method: FLASH是一个从头设计的GPU原生仿真框架，基于精确的NCP求解器，强制执行严格的接触和变形约束。它专门为细粒度GPU并行化设计，优化了碰撞处理和内存布局，而不是简单地将传统SIMD求解器移植到GPU上。

Result: FLASH在单个RTX 5090上能够以30 FPS的速度扩展到超过300万个自由度，同时准确模拟物理交互。仅使用FLASH生成的合成数据训练的策略在几分钟内就能实现鲁棒的零样本仿真到真实世界迁移，在物理机器人上成功完成了毛巾折叠和衣物折叠等挑战性任务，无需任何真实世界演示。

Conclusion: FLASH为接触丰富的可变形物体操作提供了一个高效、可扩展的仿真解决方案，能够替代劳动密集型的真实世界数据收集，显著加速机器人学习过程，实现从仿真到真实世界的无缝迁移。

Abstract: Simulation frameworks such as Isaac Sim have enabled scalable robot learning for locomotion and rigid-body manipulation; however, contact-rich simulation remains a major bottleneck for deformable object manipulation. The continuously changing geometry of soft materials, together with large numbers of vertices and contact constraints, makes it difficult to achieve high accuracy, speed, and stability required for large-scale interactive learning. We present FLASH, a GPU-native simulation framework for contact-rich deformable manipulation, built on an accurate NCP-based solver that enforces strict contact and deformation constraints while being explicitly designed for fine-grained GPU parallelism. Rather than porting conventional single-instruction-multiple-data (SIMD) solvers to GPUs, FLASH redesigns the physics engine from the ground up to leverage modern GPU architectures, including optimized collision handling and memory layouts. As a result, FLASH scales to over 3 million degrees of freedom at 30 FPS on a single RTX 5090, while accurately simulating physical interactions. Policies trained solely on FLASH-generated synthetic data in minutes achieve robust zero-shot sim-to-real transfer, which we validate on physical robots performing challenging deformable manipulation tasks such as towel folding and garment folding, without any real-world demonstration, providing a practical alternative to labor-intensive real-world data collection.

</details>


### [354] [Think before Go: Hierarchical Reasoning for Image-goal Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17407)
*Pengna Li,Kangyi Wu,Shaoqing Xu,Fang Li,Lin Zhao,Long Chen,Zhi-Xin Yang,Nanning Zheng*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: HRNav是一个分层推理导航框架，将图像目标导航分解为高层规划和低层执行，使用视觉语言模型生成短期计划，结合在线强化学习策略执行动作，并引入游荡抑制惩罚来减少徘徊问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有端到端导航方法在目标距离较远或位于其他房间时，难以提取有效的视觉线索，导致智能体徘徊。受人类认知原则启发，即复杂任务中深思熟虑的高层推理指导快速反应式执行，需要将长视野任务分解为更易处理的子任务。

Method: 提出分层推理导航框架：1) 高层规划：在自收集数据集上训练视觉语言模型，生成短期计划（如是否穿过门或沿走廊走）；2) 低层执行：使用在线强化学习策略，基于短期计划决定动作；3) 引入游荡抑制惩罚进一步减少徘徊问题。

Result: 在仿真和真实环境中的大量实验证明了该方法的优越性，相比现有方法能更有效地处理远距离或跨房间的图像目标导航任务。

Conclusion: 通过将图像目标导航分解为高层规划和低层执行的分层框架，结合视觉语言模型和强化学习，有效解决了长视野导航中的视觉线索提取困难和徘徊问题，为复杂环境导航提供了更可靠的解决方案。

Abstract: Image-goal navigation steers an agent to a target location specified by an image in unseen environments. Existing methods primarily handle this task by learning an end-to-end navigation policy, which compares the similarities of target and observation images and directly predicts the actions. However, when the target is distant or lies in another room, such methods fail to extract informative visual cues, leading the agent to wander around. Motivated by the human cognitive principle that deliberate, high-level reasoning guides fast, reactive execution in complex tasks, we propose Hierarchical Reasoning Navigation (HRNav), a framework that decomposes image-goal navigation into high-level planning and low-level execution. In high-level planning, a vision-language model is trained on a self-collected dataset to generate a short-horizon plan, such as whether the agent should walk through the door or down the hallway. This downgrades the difficulty of the long-horizon task, making it more amenable to the execution part. In low-level execution, an online reinforcement learning policy is utilized to decide actions conditioned on the short-horizon plan. We also devise a novel Wandering Suppression Penalty (WSP) to further reduce the wandering problem. Together, these components form a hierarchical framework for Image-Goal Navigation. Extensive experiments in both simulation and real-world environments demonstrate the superiority of our method.

</details>


### [355] [Learning Whole-Body Humanoid Locomotion via Motion Generation and Motion Tracking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17335)
*Zewei Zhang,Kehan Wen,Michael Xu,Junzhe He,Chenhao Li,Takahiro Miki,Clemens Schwarke,Chong Zhang,Xue Bin Peng,Marco Hutter*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出结合扩散模型生成地形感知参考运动与强化学习跟踪器的全身人形机器人运动框架，支持在线适应和部署到真实机器人


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 全身人形机器人运动面临高维控制、形态不稳定和需要基于感知实时适应不同地形的挑战。传统强化学习奖励塑形通常导致下半身主导行为，而基于模仿的强化学习虽然能学习协调的全身技能，但通常仅限于重放参考运动，缺乏基于感知在线适应地形的机制。

Method: 1) 在重定向的人类运动上训练扩散模型，用于实时预测地形感知参考运动；2) 使用该运动数据通过强化学习训练全身参考跟踪器；3) 在闭环设置中使用冻结的运动生成器对跟踪器进行微调，提高在不完美生成参考下的鲁棒性。

Result: 系统支持具有地形感知全身适应的方向性目标到达控制，可部署到Unitree G1人形机器人上，硬件实验成功穿越箱子、障碍物、楼梯和混合地形组合。定量结果显示了结合在线运动生成和微调运动跟踪器对提高泛化能力和鲁棒性的益处。

Conclusion: 提出的框架成功解决了全身人形机器人运动中的关键挑战，实现了基于感知的地形适应能力，并在真实机器人上验证了其有效性，为复杂地形下的全身协调运动提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Whole-body humanoid locomotion is challenging due to high-dimensional control, morphological instability, and the need for real-time adaptation to various terrains using onboard perception. Directly applying reinforcement learning (RL) with reward shaping to humanoid locomotion often leads to lower-body-dominated behaviors, whereas imitation-based RL can learn more coordinated whole-body skills but is typically limited to replaying reference motions without a mechanism to adapt them online from perception for terrain-aware locomotion. To address this gap, we propose a whole-body humanoid locomotion framework that combines skills learned from reference motions with terrain-aware adaptation. We first train a diffusion model on retargeted human motions for real-time prediction of terrain-aware reference motions. Concurrently, we train a whole-body reference tracker with RL using this motion data. To improve robustness under imperfectly generated references, we further fine-tune the tracker with a frozen motion generator in a closed-loop setting. The resulting system supports directional goal-reaching control with terrain-aware whole-body adaptation, and can be deployed on a Unitree G1 humanoid robot with onboard perception and computation. The hardware experiments demonstrate successful traversal over boxes, hurdles, stairs, and mixed terrain combinations. Quantitative results further show the benefits of incorporating online motion generation and fine-tuning the motion tracker for improved generalization and robustness.

</details>


### [356] [A Rapid Deployment Pipeline for Autonomous Humanoid Grasping Based on Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17258)
*Yifei Yan,Yankai Liao,Linqi Ye*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种端到端快速部署流水线，将三个基础模型组件集成，将人形机器人操作新物体的部署时间从1-2天缩短至约30分钟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统人形机器人操作新物体需要1-2天的部署时间，包括数据收集、手动标注、3D模型获取和模型训练。这种高时间成本限制了机器人的实际应用部署效率。

Method: 集成三个基础模型组件：1) Roboflow自动标注辅助训练YOLOv8物体检测器；2) Meta SAM 3D进行3D重建，无需专用激光扫描仪；3) FoundationPose进行零样本6自由度姿态跟踪，直接使用SAM 3D生成的网格作为模板。姿态估计驱动Unity逆运动学规划器，通过UDP将关节命令流式传输到Unitree G1人形机器人并通过Unitree SDK执行。

Result: 检测精度达到mAP@0.5 = 0.995，姿态跟踪精度σ < 1.05 mm，在机器人工作空间内五个位置成功完成抓取。在汽车车窗涂胶任务中验证了流水线的通用性。

Conclusion: 将感知基础模型与日常成像设备（如智能手机）相结合，可以显著降低人形机器人操作任务的部署门槛，实现快速部署。

Abstract: Deploying a humanoid robot to manipulate a new object has traditionally required one to two days of effort: data collection, manual annotation, 3D model acquisition, and model training. This paper presents an end-to-end rapid deployment pipeline that integrates three foundation-model components to shorten the onboarding cycle for a new object to approximately 30 minutes: (i) Roboflow-based automatic annotation to assist in training a YOLOv8 object detector; (ii) 3D reconstruction based on Meta SAM 3D, which eliminates the need for a dedicated laser scanner; and (iii) zero-shot 6-DoF pose tracking based on FoundationPose, using the SAM~3D-generated mesh directly as the template. The estimated pose drives a Unity-based inverse kinematics planner, whose joint commands are streamed via UDP to a Unitree~G1 humanoid and executed through the Unitree SDK. We demonstrate detection accuracy of mAP@0.5 = 0.995, pose tracking precision of $σ< 1.05$ mm, and successful grasping on a real robot at five positions within the workspace. We further verify the generality of the pipeline on an automobile-window glue-application task. The results show that combining foundation models for perception with everyday imaging devices (e.g., smartphones) can substantially lower the deployment barrier for humanoid manipulation tasks.

</details>


### [357] [MM-Hand: A 21-DOF Multi-modal Modular Dexterous Robotic Hand with Remote Actuation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17245)
*Zhuoheng Li,Qingquan Lin,Checheng Yu,Qiangyu Chen,Zhiqian Lan,Lutong Zhang,Hongyang Li,Ping Luo*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: MM-Hand是一款基于远程肌腱驱动技术的21自由度多模态模块化灵巧手，通过将电机移至机器人基座或外部电机中心，释放手指和手掌空间，集成多种传感器和模块化结构，提供轻量化、感知丰富且易于维护的硬件平台。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统高自由度灵巧手设计占用宝贵的手部空间，增加末端执行器质量，且存在手部附近热量积聚问题。远程肌腱驱动技术通过将电机移至机器人基座或外部电机中心，为手指和手掌腾出空间，可容纳更多自由度、传感器模块和可维护的机械结构。

Method: 设计基于远程肌腱驱动的21自由度多模态模块化灵巧手，包括弹簧复位肌腱驱动手指、模块化3D打印手指和手掌结构、快速肌腱连接器维护系统，以及包含关节角度传感器、触觉传感器、电机侧反馈和手掌内立体视觉的多模态感知系统。分析肌腱-鞘长度变化和摩擦损失以指导布线、电机中心和闭环关节控制设计。

Result: 实验验证了系统的传动、输出力、感知和控制能力。在1米远程鞘传输下，指尖力达到25N，表明尽管采用长距离肌腱布线仍具有实用负载能力。闭环关节级实验评估了静态臂和臂运动期间的指令跟踪性能。结果表明MM-Hand为灵巧操作研究提供了轻量化、感知丰富且易于维护的硬件平台。

Conclusion: MM-Hand成功实现了基于远程肌腱驱动的高自由度灵巧手设计，解决了传统设计的空间占用、重量和散热问题。系统展示了实用的负载能力和良好的控制性能，所有硬件设计和软件框架已完全开源，支持灵巧操作研究社区的发展。

Abstract: High-DOF dexterous hands require compact actuation, rich sensing, and reliable thermal behavior, but conventional designs often occupy valuable in-hand space, increase end-effector mass, and suffer from heat accumulation near the hand. Remote tendon-driven actuation offers an alternative by relocating motors to the robot base or an external motor hub, thereby freeing the fingers and palm for additional degrees of freedom, sensing modules, and maintainable mechanical structures. This paper presents MM-Hand, a 21-DOF Multimodal Modular dexterous hand based on remote tendon-driven actuation. The hand integrates spring-return tendon-driven fingers, modular 3D-printed finger and palm structures, quick tendon connectors for maintenance, and a multimodal sensing system including joint angle sensors, tactile sensors, motor-side feedback, and in-palm stereo vision. We further analyze tendon-sheath length variation and friction loss to guide the design of the routing, motor hub, and closed-loop joint control. Experiments validate the transmission, output force, sensing, and control capability of the system. The fingertip force reaches 25N under a 1m remote sheath transmission, demonstrating practical load capacity despite long-distance tendon routing. Closed-loop joint-level experiments further evaluate command tracking with a static arm and during arm motion. These results show that MM-Hand provides a lightweight, sensor-rich, and maintainable hardware platform for dexterous manipulation research. To support the community, all hardware designs and software frameworks are made fully open-source at https://mmlab.hk/research/MM-Hand.

</details>


### [358] [GaLa: Hypergraph-Guided Visual Language Models for Procedural Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17241)
*Kun Wang,Yiming Li,Mingcheng Qu,Aqiang Zhang,Guang Yang,Tonghua Su*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: GaLa是一个用于多模态程序规划的视觉语言框架，通过超图表示显式捕捉对象间的隐式空间关系和深层语义结构，显著提升了执行成功率和规划正确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法过度依赖视觉语言模型自身的推理能力，忽略了可以从多模态输入中挖掘的丰富结构化语义信息，导致模型难以有效理解复杂场景中的功能空间关系。

Method: 提出基于超图的表示方法：将图像中的对象实例建模为节点，根据对象属性和功能语义聚合对象构建区域级超边。设计TriView HyperGraph Encoder，通过对比学习在节点视图、区域视图和节点-区域关联视图之间强制执行语义一致性。

Result: 在ActPlan1K和ALFRED基准测试上的广泛实验表明，GaLa在执行成功率、LCS和规划正确性方面显著优于现有方法。

Conclusion: GaLa通过超图表示有效捕捉了隐式空间关系和深层语义结构，并将这些语义信息注入到下游视觉语言模型推理中，显著提升了多模态程序规划的性能。

Abstract: Implicit spatial relations and deep semantic structures encoded in object attributes are crucial for procedural planning in embodied AI systems. However, existing approaches often over rely on the reasoning capabilities of vision language models (VLMs) themselves, while overlooking the rich structured semantic information that can be mined from multimodal inputs. As a result, models struggle to effectively understand functional spatial relationships in complex scenes. To fully exploit implicit spatial relations and deep semantic structures in multimodal data, we propose GaLa, a vision language framework for multimodal procedural planning. GaLa introduces a hypergraph-based representation, where object instances in the image are modeled as nodes, and region-level hyperedges are constructed by aggregating objects according to their attributes and functional semantics. This design explicitly captures implicit semantic relations among objects as well as the hierarchical organization of functional regions. Furthermore, we design a TriView HyperGraph Encoder that enforces semantic consistency across the node view, area view, and node area association view via contrastive learning, enabling hypergraph semantics to be more effectively injected into downstream VLM reasoning. Extensive experiments on the ActPlan1K and ALFRED benchmarks demonstrate that GaLa significantly outperforms existing methods in terms of execution success rate, LCS, and planning correctness.

</details>


### [359] [Planning Smooth and Safe Control Laws for a Unicycle Robot Among Obstacles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17212)
*Aref Amiri,Basak Sakcak,Steven M. LaValle*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一个用于单轮点机器人在有障碍物环境中安全导航的框架，通过新颖的QP公式生成光滑向量场，并设计非线性反馈控制器，确保安全集的前向不变性，无需在线优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决单轮点机器人在有障碍物环境中从几乎所有允许状态安全导航到目标位置的问题，同时考虑输入限制，避免在线优化计算负担。

Method: 1) 引入新颖的QP公式创建C∞光滑向量场，减少总弯曲和总转向；2) 设计解析的非线性反馈控制器，满足Nagumo定理条件，确保安全集的前向不变性；3) 控制器在硬输入限制下仍能安全收敛到目标位置。

Result: 仿真验证了框架的有效性：相比基线方法，到达时间快两倍，角控制努力降低超过50%，即使在硬输入限制下也能安全收敛到目标位置。

Conclusion: 提出的框架能够从几乎所有允许状态安全导航到目标位置，通过光滑向量场和非线性反馈控制器的结合，实现了无需在线优化的安全保证，显著提升了导航性能。

Abstract: This paper presents a framework for safe navigation of a unicycle point robot to a goal position in an environment populated with obstacles from almost any admissible state, considering input limits. We introduce a novel QP formulation to create a Cinfinity-smooth vector field with reduced total bending and total turning. Then we design an analytic, non-linear feedback controller that inherently satisfies the conditions of Nagumo's theorem, ensuring forward invariance of the safe set without requiring any online optimization. We have demonstrated that our controller, even under hard input limits, safely converges to the goal position. Simulations confirm the effectiveness of the proposed framework, resulting in a twice faster arrival time with over 50\% lower angular control effort compared to the baseline.

</details>


### [360] [Modeling, Control and Self-sensing of Dielectric Elastomer Soft Actuators: A Review](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17199)
*Y. Zhao,G. Meng*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 综述了介电弹性体驱动器（DEAs）的建模、控制和自感知方法，总结了现有挑战和未来研究方向


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: DEAs在软体机器人应用中具有轻量化、大应变、快速响应和高能量密度等优势，但其非线性弹性、固有粘弹性蠕变、迟滞和振动动力学特性使得建模、控制和自感知面临挑战，阻碍了实际应用

Method: 综述了DEAs的多种建模方法（基于物理的建模和现象学建模）、控制方法（开环前馈控制、反馈控制、前馈-反馈控制和自适应前馈控制）以及自感知方法（基于物理的自感知和数据驱动的自感知）

Result: 系统梳理了DEAs建模、控制和自感知领域的研究进展，总结了各种方法的优缺点和应用场景

Conclusion: 总结了DEAs领域存在的现有问题，并指出了进一步研究的新机遇和方向

Abstract: Dielectric elastomer actuators (DEAs) have garnered extensive attention especially in soft robotic applications over the past few decades owing to the advantages of lightweight, large strain, fast response and high energy density. However, because the DEAs suffer from nonlinear elasticity, inherent viscoelastic creep, hysteresis and vibrational dynamics, the modeling, control and self-sensing of DEAs are challenging, thereby hindering the practical applications of DEAs. In order to address these challenges, numerous studies have been conducted. In this review, various physics-based modeling methods and phenomenological modeling methods for predicting the electromechanical response of DEAs are presented and discussed. Different control methods for DEAs are reviewed, which are classified into open-loop feedforward control, feedback control, feedforward-feedback control and adaptive feedforward control. Physics-based self-sensing methods and data-driven self-sensing methods for reconstructing the DEA displacement without the need for additional sensors are discussed. Finally, the existing problems and new opportunities for the further studies are summarized.

</details>


### [361] [Web-Gewu: A Browser-Based Interactive Playground for Robot Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17050)
*Kaixuan Chen,Linqi Ye*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Web-Gewu是一个基于WebRTC云-边-客户端协作架构的交互式机器人教育平台，通过将物理仿真和强化学习训练卸载到边缘节点，实现低成本浏览器端对端实时流式传输，无需本地安装即可在网页浏览器中低延迟交互多形态机器人。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决具身智能快速发展背景下机器人教育的双重挑战：高计算壁垒和繁琐环境配置。现有集中式云仿真方案GPU和带宽成本高，难以大规模部署；纯本地计算受学习者硬件限制严重。

Method: 基于WebRTC云-边-客户端协作架构：1) 边缘节点负责所有物理仿真和强化学习训练；2) 云服务器仅作为轻量级信令中继；3) 浏览器端实现极低成本的点对点实时流式传输；4) 预定义鲁棒命令通信协议；5) 支持实时可视化多维监控数据（包括强化学习奖励曲线）。

Result: 学习者无需本地安装即可在网页浏览器中低端到端延迟交互多形态机器人，同时观察实时可视化多维监控数据。平台提供高度可扩展、开箱即用、无障碍的教学基础设施，显著降低前沿机器人技术的入门门槛。

Conclusion: Web-Gewu通过创新的云-边-客户端协作架构，有效解决了机器人教育中的计算和部署障碍，为具身智能提供了可大规模部署的低成本教学平台，显著降低了机器人技术的学习门槛。

Abstract: With the rapid development of embodied intelligence, robotics education faces a dual challenge: high computational barriers and cumbersome environment configuration. Existing centralized cloud simulation solutions incur substantial GPU and bandwidth costs that preclude large-scale deployment, while pure local computing is severely constrained by learners' hardware limitations. To address these issues, we propose \href{http://47.76.242.88:8080/receiver/index.html}{Web-Gewu}, an interactive robotics education platform built on a WebRTC cloud-edge-client collaborative architecture. The system offloads all physics simulation and reinforcement learning (RL) training to the edge node, while the cloud server acts exclusively as a lightweight signaling relay, enabling extremely low-cost browser-based peer-to-peer (P2P) real-time streaming. Learners can interact with multi-form robots at low end-to-end latency directly in a web browser without any local installation, and simultaneously observe real-time visualization of multi-dimensional monitoring data, including reinforcement learning reward curves. Combined with a predefined robust command communication protocol, Web-Gewu provides a highly scalable, out-of-the-box, and barrier-free teaching infrastructure for embodied intelligence, significantly lowering the barrier to entry for cutting-edge robotics technology.

</details>


### [362] [NaviFormer: A Deep Reinforcement Learning Transformer-like Model to Holistically Solve the Navigation Problem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16967)
*Daniel Fuertes,Andrea Cavallaro,Carlos R. del-Blanco,Fernando Jaureguizar,Narciso García*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: NaviFormer：基于Transformer架构的深度强化学习模型，通过同时预测高层路线和低层轨迹来解决全局导航问题，在准确性和计算速度方面表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实世界的导航问题通常需要同时解决高层路线规划（航点排序）和低层路径规划（避障轨迹预测）两个子问题，但现有方法往往只关注其中一个层面，缺乏整体高效的解决方案。

Method: 提出NaviFormer模型，基于Transformer架构的深度强化学习方法，能够同时预测高层路线和低层轨迹，理解每个子问题的约束和困难，并相应调整以提高性能。

Result: 实验结果表明NaviFormer具有竞争性的准确性，能够理解各子问题的约束和困难并相应改进性能，同时其卓越的计算速度证明了其适用于实时任务。

Conclusion: NaviFormer为全局导航问题提供了一个整体高效的解决方案，通过同时处理路线规划和路径规划，在准确性和实时性方面均表现出色，适用于实际应用场景。

Abstract: Path planning is usually solved by addressing either the (high-level) route planning problem (waypoint sequencing to achieve the final goal) or the (low-level) path planning problem (trajectory prediction between two waypoints avoiding collisions). However, real-world problems usually require simultaneous solutions to the route and path planning subproblems with a holistic and efficient approach. In this paper, we introduce NaviFormer, a deep reinforcement learning model based on a Transformer architecture that solves the global navigation problem by predicting both high-level routes and low-level trajectories. To evaluate NaviFormer, several experiments have been conducted, including comparisons with other algorithms. Results show competitive accuracy from NaviFormer since it can understand the constraints and difficulties of each subproblem and act consequently to improve performance. Moreover, its superior computation speed proves its suitability for real-time missions.

</details>


### [363] [Leveraging VR Robot Games to Facilitate Data Collection for Embodied Intelligence Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16903)
*Yihan Zhang,Ziyun Huang,Linqi Ye*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于Unity的VR游戏化数据收集框架，通过程序化场景生成、人形机器人控制、自动任务评估和轨迹记录，验证了虚拟环境作为具身数据收集的有效解决方案


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统具身交互数据收集成本高、难度大，受限于传统接口的可访问性，需要更高效、可扩展的数据收集方法

Method: 基于Unity开发游戏化数据收集框架，包含程序化场景生成、VR人形机器人控制、自动任务评估和轨迹记录；以垃圾拾取放置任务为原型验证完整工作流

Result: 收集的演示数据展现出广泛的状态-动作空间覆盖；任务难度增加导致运动强度提高和手臂工作空间探索更广泛；验证了游戏化虚拟环境作为具身数据收集的有效性

Conclusion: 游戏化虚拟环境可作为具身数据收集的有效且可扩展解决方案，能够以低成本获取高质量交互数据，为机器人学习提供丰富训练数据

Abstract: Collecting embodied interaction data at scale remains costly and difficult due to the limited accessibility of conventional interfaces. We present a gamified data collection framework based on Unity that combines procedural scene generation, VR-based humanoid robot control, automatic task evaluation, and trajectory logging. A trash pick-and-place task prototype is developed to validate the full workflow.Experimental results indicate that the collected demonstrations exhibit broad coverage of the state-action space, and that increasing task difficulty leads to higher motion intensity as well as more extensive exploration of the arm's workspace. The proposed framework demonstrates that game-oriented virtual environments can serve as an effective and extensible solution for embodied data collection.

</details>


### [364] [Time-Division Multiplexing Actuation in Tendon-Driven Arms: Lightweight Design and Fault Tolerance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16887)
*Shoujie Li,Changqing Guo,Jianle Xu,Hong Luo,Xueqian Wang,Wenbo Ding,Bin Liang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: TDMA技术通过时分复用驱动减少肌腱驱动机器人的执行器数量，同时保持高扭矩输出和故障容错能力，应用于航空航天领域的轻量化机械臂。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 航空航天应用的机械臂需要在轻量化构造和故障容错操作之间取得平衡，以满足严格的重量限制并确保在远程危险环境中的可靠性。

Method: 提出时分复用驱动技术，采用垂直堆叠旋转选择结构，集成自旋转TDM电机、电磁离合器、蜗轮减速器和双编码器系统；开发驱动空间轨迹规划算法实现故障容错控制。

Result: MuxArm自重2.17kg，支持10kg驱动能力，末端执行器精度达长度的1%，即使在部分伺服故障下也能保持；肌腱负载比传统方法减少50%。

Conclusion: TDMA为肌腱驱动机器人提供了一种实用的轻量化、高扭矩、故障容错的解决方案，适用于航空航天等严格环境。

Abstract: Robotic manipulators for aerospace applications require a delicate balance between lightweight construction and fault-tolerant operation to satisfy strict weight limitations and ensure reliability in remote, hazardous environments. This paper presents Time-Division Multiplexing Actuation (TDMA), a practical approach for tendon-driven robots that significantly reduces actuator count while preserving high torque output and intrinsic fault tolerance. The key hardware employs a vertically-stacked rotational selection structure that integrates self-rotating TDM motors for rapid configuration, electromagnetic clutches enabling sub-0.1 second engagement, a worm gear reducer for enhanced load capacity and self-locking capability, and a dual-encoder system for precise, long-term positioning. Leveraging TDMA, the proposed MuxArm achieves a self-weight of 2.17 kg, supports an actuator driving capacity of 10 kg, and maintains end-effector accuracy up to 1% of its length, even under partial servo failure. Additionally, an actuation space trajectory planning algorithm is developed, enabling fault-tolerant control and reducing tendon load by up to 50% compared to conventional methods. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate MuxArm's robust performance in diverse settings, including free-space, cluttered, and confined environments.

</details>


### [365] [Chain Of Interaction Benchmark (COIN): When Reasoning meets Embodied Interaction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16886)
*Xianhao Wang,Xiaojian Ma,Haozhe Hu,Rongpeng Su,Yutian Cheng,Zhou Ziheng,Hangxin Liu,Lei Liu,Bin Li,Qing Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: COIN是一个评估机器人操作中交互推理能力的基准，包含50个日常交互任务、数据集和系统评估指标，揭示当前方法在视觉理解与运动执行间的显著差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 通用具身智能体需要执行交互式、因果依赖的推理，在部分可观测环境中持续交互、获取信息并更新计划以解决长时程任务。现有基准未能系统评估这一关键能力。

Method: 1) 构建COIN-50：50个日常场景交互任务，创建因果依赖任务所需的COIN-Primitive和中等复杂度的COIN-Composition用于技能学习和泛化评估；2) 开发低成本移动AR遥操作系统，收集COIN-Primitive数据集（每个原始任务50个演示，共1000个）；3) 开发系统评估指标（执行稳定性和泛化鲁棒性）评估CodeAsPolicy、VLA和语言条件H-VLA方法。

Result: 综合评估揭示了当前方法的严重局限性：模型在交互推理任务上表现不佳，视觉理解与运动执行之间存在显著差距。提供了对这些局限性的细粒度分析。

Conclusion: COIN基准系统评估了机器人操作中的交互推理能力，揭示了当前方法在因果依赖任务上的不足，为未来研究提供了重要参考。

Abstract: Generalist embodied agents must perform interactive, causally-dependent reasoning, continually interacting with the environment, acquiring information, and updating plans to solve long-horizon tasks before they could be adopted in real-life scenarios. For instance, retrieving an apple from a cabinet may require opening multiple doors and drawers before the apple becomes visible and reachable, demanding sequential interaction under partial observability. However, existing benchmarks fail to systematically evaluate this essential capability. We introduce COIN, a benchmark designed to assess interactive reasoning in realistic robotic manipulation through three key contributions. First, we construct COIN-50: 50 interactive tasks in daily scenarios, and create COIN-Primitive required by causally-dependent tasks, and COIN-Composition with mid-term complexity for skill learning and generalization evaluation. Second, we develop a low-cost mobile AR teleoperation system and collect the COIN-Primitive Dataset with 50 demonstrations per primitive task (1,000 in total). Third, we develop systematic evaluation metrics about execution stability and generalization robustness to evaluate CodeAsPolicy, VLA, and language-conditioned H-VLA approaches. Our comprehensive evaluation reveals critical limitations in current methods: models struggle with interactive reasoning tasks due to significant gaps between visual understanding and motor execution. We provide fine-grained analysis of these limitations.

</details>


### [366] [Greedy Kalman-Swarm: Improving State Estimation in Robot Swarms in Harsh Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16868)
*Phunyapa Suksomboon,Paulo Garcia*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种名为"贪婪卡尔曼-群"的分布式状态估计方法，使机器人能够利用相对邻居传感数据提升精度，无需全局通信或完整数据可用性，在通信受限环境中实现性能平衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统机器人状态估计依赖卡尔曼滤波，但在群体机器人中，挑战从个体精度转向集体协调。现有技术依赖集中处理或重通信协议实现全局共识，这在现实部署中通常不切实际。

Method: 采用局部化、"贪婪"的分布式状态估计方法（Greedy Kalman-Swarm），允许个体机器人利用相对机器人间传感数据改进精度，无需完整数据可用性或全局通信。每个迭代中机器人有效整合所有当前可用的邻居数据来优化内部状态。

Result: 在通信受限环境中的仿真显示，机器人能够有效整合邻居数据优化状态，即使数据缺失也能保持鲁棒性和功能性。性能在独立估计的低开销和集中系统的高精度之间取得平衡，特别是在恶劣或动态环境条件下。

Conclusion: 全局状态感知可以是涌现的而非强制执行的，为在不可预测地形中维持群体凝聚力提供了可扩展框架。这种去中心化方法为更具弹性的自主系统奠定了基础，特别适用于无法保证可靠高带宽通信的搜救或太空探索任务。

Abstract: State estimation is a fundamental requirement in robotics, where the accurate determination of a robot's state is essential for stable operation despite inherent process disturbances and sensor noise. Traditionally, this is achieved through Kalman filtering, providing a statistically optimal estimate by balancing predictive models with noisy measurements. In the context of robotic swarms, the challenge shifts from individual accuracy to collective coordination, where the integration of global dynamics can significantly enhance the precision of the entire group. Existing estimation techniques rely on centralized processing or heavy communication protocols to reach a global consensus, which are frequently impractical in real-world deployments. Here we show that a localized, "greedy" approach to distributed state estimation (termed "Greedy Kalman-Swarm") allows individual robots to leverage relative inter-robot sensing for improved accuracy without requiring full data availability or global communication. Simulations in communication-constrained environments show robots can effectively integrate all currently available neighbor data at each iteration to refine their internal states, yet remain robust and functional even when data is missing. This results in a performance profile that strikes a balance between the low overhead of independent estimation and the high accuracy of centralized systems, specifically under harsh or dynamic environmental conditions. Our results demonstrate that global state awareness can be emergent rather than enforced, providing a scalable framework for maintaining swarm cohesion in unpredictable terrains. We anticipate that this decentralized methodology will serve as a foundation for more resilient autonomous systems, particularly in search-and-rescue or space exploration missions where reliable, high-bandwidth communication cannot be guaranteed.

</details>


### [367] [Refinement of Accelerated Demonstrations via Incremental Iterative Reference Learning Control for Fast Contact-Rich Imitation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16850)
*Koki Yamane,Cristian C. Beltran-Hernandez,Steven Oh,Masashi Hamaya,Sho Sakaino*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出I2RLC方法，通过渐进加速和参考轨迹迭代更新，从低速演示生成高速接触操作轨迹，用于模仿学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 接触丰富的操作需要快速执行，但为模仿学习提供快速演示存在挑战：人类无法高速演示，简单加速演示会改变接触动力学并导致大跟踪误差。

Method: 提出增量迭代参考学习控制(I2RLC)，逐步增加速度同时更新参考轨迹，结合迭代参考学习控制(IRLC)从跟踪误差迭代更新参考轨迹。

Result: IRLC和I2RLC均实现10倍加速演示且减少跟踪误差；I2RLC相比IRLC在三个任务和多种速度下平均提高22.5%空间相似度；使用精炼轨迹训练的模仿学习策略在孔轴任务中100%成功，I2RLC训练的策略接触力更低。

Conclusion: 渐进速度调度结合参考适应为快速接触丰富的模仿学习提供了实用路径。

Abstract: Fast execution of contact-rich manipulation is critical for practical deployment, yet providing fast demonstrations for imitation learning (IL) remains challenging: humans cannot demonstrate at high speed, and naively accelerating demonstrations alters contact dynamics and induces large tracking errors. We present a method to autonomously refine time-accelerated demonstrations by repurposing Iterative Reference Learning Control (IRLC) to iteratively update the reference trajectory from observed tracking errors. However, applying IRLC directly at high speed tends to produce larger early-iteration errors and less stable transients. To address this issue, we propose Incremental Iterative Reference Learning Control (I2RLC), which gradually increases the speed while updating the reference, yielding high-fidelity trajectories. We validate on real-robot whiteboard erasing and peg-in-hole tasks using a teleoperation setup with a compliance-controlled follower and a 3D-printed haptic leader. Both IRLC and I2RLC achieve up to 10x faster demonstrations with reduced tracking error; moreover, I2RLC improves spatial similarity to the original trajectories by 22.5% on average over IRLC across three tasks and multiple speeds (3x-10x). We then use the refined trajectories to train IL policies; the resulting policies execute faster than the demonstrations and achieve 100% success rates in the peg-in-hole task at both seen and unseen positions, with I2RLC-trained policies exhibiting lower contact forces than those trained on IRLC-refined demonstrations. These results indicate that gradual speed scheduling coupled with reference adaptation provides a practical path to fast, contact-rich IL.

</details>


### [368] [LongBench: Evaluating Robotic Manipulation Policies on Real-World Long-Horizon Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16788)
*Xueyao Chen,Jingkai Jia,Tong Yang,Yibo Fu,Wei Li,Wenqiang Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: LongBench是一个用于评估长时程机器人操作的现实世界基准测试，包含1000多个真实场景，分为上下文无关（完全可观测）和上下文相关（模糊驱动）两种机制，旨在分析长期性能下降的原因。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器人操作基准测试多为仿真环境或仅报告聚合成功率，难以区分真实世界中导致长期性能下降的具体原因。需要建立一个能够解耦执行鲁棒性和上下文推理能力的现实世界基准。

Method: 开发LongBench基准测试，包含1000多个真实世界场景，分为两个互补机制：上下文无关（完全可观测）和上下文相关（模糊驱动）。通过将任务组织为能力特定和模糊特定子集，实现对执行鲁棒性、时间一致性和上下文相关推理的机制感知评估。

Result: 评估6个最先进策略发现：长时程性能并非由单一因素决定。在完全可观测环境中，性能与执行鲁棒性更相关；上下文难度因任务而异，且基于记忆的方法并未一致改善性能。

Conclusion: LongBench为研究长时程机器人操作和开发在执 行和上下文挑战方面具有更强鲁棒性的策略提供了有用的基准测试工具。
