Method: BAR采用分支-适配-路由三阶段：1) 为每个领域独立训练专家（各自经过中期训练、SFT和RL管线）；2) 通过MoE架构组合专家；3) 仅训练轻量级路由器来分配任务。不同于混合所有领域的重训练（成本二次方增长），BAR支持独立更新单个专家（成本线性增长）。

Result: 在7B规模上，BAR在7个评估类别上平均得分49.1，超越无中期训练的重训练基线（47.8），与有中期训练的重训练基线（50.5）相当或更优。模块化训练避免了后期RL导致早期训练能力退化的问题，并显著降低了更新或添加领域的成本和复杂度。

Conclusion: 解耦的专家式训练是替代全量重训练的可扩展方案，能够在不退化已有能力的前提下高效扩展语言模型的新领域能力，成本呈线性而非二次方增长。

Abstract: Extending a fully post-trained language model with new domain capabilities is fundamentally limited by monolithic training paradigms: retraining from scratch is expensive and scales poorly, while continued training often degrades existing capabilities. We present BAR (Branch-Adapt-Route), which trains independent domain experts, each through its own mid-training, supervised finetuning, and reinforcement learning pipeline, and composes them via a Mixture-of-Experts architecture with lightweight router training. Unlike retraining approaches that mix all domains and require full reprocessing for any update (with cost scaling quadratically), BAR enables updating individual experts independently with linear cost scaling and no degradation to existing domains. At the 7B scale, with experts for math, code, tool use, and safety, BAR achieves an overall score of 49.1 (averaged across 7 evaluation categories), matching or exceeding re-training baselines (47.8 without mid-training, 50.5 with). We further show that modular training provides a structural advantage: by isolating each domain, it avoids the catastrophic forgetting that occurs when late-stage RL degrades capabilities from earlier training stages, while significantly reducing the cost and complexity of updating or adding a domain. Together, these results suggest that decoupled, expert-based training is a scalable alternative to monolithic retraining for extending language models.

</details>


### [594] [NI Sampling: Accelerating Discrete Diffusion Sampling by Token Order Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18471)
*Enshu Liu,Xuefei Ning,Yu Wang,Zinan Lin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出神经指示采样（NI Sampling），通过训练一个神经指示器来优化离散扩散语言模型的token采样顺序，实现高达14.3倍的加速且性能损失极小。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有离散扩散语言模型（dLLMs）的启发式采样策略效率低下，每步只采样少量token，存在大量优化空间。作者希望通过对token采样顺序进行优化，在保证精度的前提下大幅减少采样迭代次数。

Method: 提出神经指示采样（NI Sampling）框架：利用一个神经指示器决定每步应采样哪些token；同时设计了一种新颖的轨迹保持目标函数来训练该指示器，使其能充分利用每步的正确预测来减少采样步数。

Result: 在LLaDA和Dream模型上，在多个基准测试中，相比全步采样实现了最高14.3倍的加速，且性能下降可忽略不计；在精度-步数权衡上一致优于置信度阈值采样方法。

Conclusion: 通过优化token采样顺序，可以大幅提升离散扩散语言模型的解码效率，神经指示采样是一种通用且高效的采样顺序优化框架。

Abstract: Discrete diffusion language models (dLLMs) have recently emerged as a promising alternative to traditional autoregressive approaches, offering the flexibility to generate tokens in arbitrary orders and the potential of parallel decoding. However, existing heuristic sampling strategies remain inefficient: they choose only a small part of tokens to sample at each step, leaving substantial room for improvement. In this work, we study the problem of token sampling order optimization and demonstrate its significant potential for acceleration. Specifically, we find that fully leveraging correct predictions at each step can reduce the number of sampling iterations by an order of magnitude without compromising accuracy. Based on this, we propose Neural Indicator Sampling (NI Sampling), a general sampling order optimization framework that utilize a neural indicator to decide which tokens should be sampled at each step. We further propose a novel trajectory-preserving objective to train the indicator. Experiments on LLaDA and Dream models across multiple benchmarks show that our method achieves up to 14.3$\times$ acceleration over full-step sampling with negligible performance drop, and consistently outperforms confidence threshold sampling in the accuracy-step trade-off. Code is available at https://github.com/imagination-research/NI-Sampling.

</details>


### [595] [An Integrated Deep-Learning Framework for Peptide-Protein Interaction Prediction and Target-Conditioned Peptide Generation with ConGA-PePPI and TC-PepGen](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18467)
*Chupei Tang,Junxiao Kong,Moyu Tang,Di Wang,Jixiu Zhai,Ronghao Xie,Shangkun Sima,Tianchi Lu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一个整合框架ConGA-PepPI（用于预测和定位）和TC-PepGen（用于目标条件生成），在肽-蛋白质相互作用预测和肽生成任务上均表现出色，实现了0.839准确率、0.921 AUROC，且40.39%的生成肽超过天然模板的AlphaFold 3 ipTM。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 肽-蛋白质相互作用（PepPIs）在细胞调控和肽治疗中至关重要，但实验表征速度过慢，无法用于大规模筛选。现有方法通常侧重交互预测或肽生成，未能充分整合候选优先级排序、残基级解释和目标条件扩展。

Method: ConGA-PepPI采用非对称编码、双向交叉注意力和从配对预测到结合位点定位的渐进迁移；TC-PepGen通过逐层条件化在自回归解码过程中保留目标信息。

Result: 五折交叉验证中，ConGA-PepPI达到0.839准确率和0.921 AUROC，结合位点AUPR在蛋白质侧为0.601、肽侧为0.950，在外部基准上保持竞争力。在长度条件基准下，40.39%的TC-PepGen生成肽超过天然模板的AlphaFold 3 ipTM，无约束生成仍保留目标条件信号证据。

Conclusion: 该整合框架有效结合了预测、定位和生成能力，为早期肽筛选提供了更全面的解决方案。

Abstract: Motivation: Peptide-protein interactions (PepPIs) are central to cellular regulation and peptide therapeutics, but experimental characterization remains too slow for large-scale screening. Existing methods usually emphasize either interaction prediction or peptide generation, leaving candidate prioritization, residue-level interpretation, and target-conditioned expansion insufficiently integrated. Results: We present an integrated framework for early-stage peptide screening that combines a partner-aware prediction and localization model (ConGA-PepPI) with a target-conditioned generative model (TC-PepGen). ConGA-PepPI uses asymmetric encoding, bidirectional cross-attention, and progressive transfer from pair prediction to binding-site localization, while TC-PepGen preserves target information throughout autoregressive decoding via layerwise conditioning. In five-fold cross-validation, ConGA-PepPI achieved 0.839 accuracy and 0.921 AUROC, with binding-site AUPR values of 0.601 on the protein side and 0.950 on the peptide side, and remained competitive on external benchmarks. Under a controlled length-conditioned benchmark, 40.39% of TC-PepGen peptides exceeded native templates in AlphaFold 3 ipTM, and unconstrained generation retained evidence of target-conditioned signal.

</details>


### [596] [Semantic Step Prediction: Multi-Step Latent Forecasting in LLM Reasoning Trajectories via Step Sampling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18464)
*Yidi Yuan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了语义管预测（STP）中采样位置对多步推理语义结构的影响，发现连续语义推理步骤边界处的STP相比随机token STP，在多步潜在预测准确性上提升了168倍（相比4倍）。通过非线性MLP探针发现STP塑造的轨迹是平滑曲线而非直线，并揭示了生成质量与几何纯度之间的权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 原始STP方法采用随机token子跨度采样，虽然与基础LLM训练架构兼容，但作者希望探究采样位置是否能进一步增强多步推理的语义结构并影响其几何效应。

Method: 在连续语义推理步骤边界处应用STP正则化；使用3层MLP非线性探针探测潜在流形；对比有无语言建模损失的消融实验；以多步潜在预测MSE作为评估指标。

Result: 步边界STP在ProcessBench上实现168倍更准确的多步潜在预测（对比冻结基线），而随机token STP仅4倍；非线性MLP比线性外推进一步降低3-12倍预测误差；去除语言建模损失后轨迹的MLP可预测性提升2倍。

Conclusion: 采样位置是几何正则化的关键变量；多步潜在预测MSE可作为该类方法的新评估指标；STP塑造的轨迹是平滑曲线而非直线；生成质量与几何纯度之间存在权衡。

Abstract: Semantic Tube Prediction (STP) leverages representation geometric to regularize LLM hidden-state trajectories toward locally linear geodesics during fine-tuning, thereby greatly improving data efficiency. The original STP recipe samples random token sub-spans, which is compatible with the base large language model (LLM) training architecture. Inspired by STP, we are interested to investigate whether the sampling position can further enhance the semantic structure of multi-step reasoning, and hence affect its geometric impact. We applied STP at consecutive semantic reasoning step boundaries and achieved 168x more accurate multi-step latent prediction than frozen baselines on ProcessBench (3,400 samples), compared to only 4x for the random-token STP. Probing the latent manifold with a learned non-linear predictor reveals that STP-shaped trajectories are smooth curves, not straight lines: a 3-layer MLP reduces prediction error by a further 3-12x over linear extrapolation on step-boundary models. Removing the language modeling loss yields trajectories that are 2x more MLP-predictable than the combined loss, revealing a tradeoff between generation quality and geometric purity. Our results identify sampling position as the critical variable in geometric regularization and establish multi-step latent prediction MSE as a new evaluation metric for this class of methods.

</details>


### [597] [Learning Invariant Modality Representation for Robust Multimodal Learning from a Causal Inference Perspective](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18460)
*Sijie Mai,Shiqin Han*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出因果模态不变表示（CmIR）学习框架，通过因果推断将多模态数据分解为因果不变表征和环境特定虚假表征，在分布偏移和噪声场景下实现鲁棒的多模态情感计算。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有模型在分布偏移或模态噪声下容易学习虚假关联，导致泛化能力差；需要一种鲁棒的多模态学习方法以应对上述挑战。

Method: 提出CmIR框架，核心是基于因果推断的模态解耦方法，将每个模态分离为"因果不变表征"和"环境特定虚假表征"；通过不变性约束、互信息约束和重构约束，确保学习到的表征与标签保持稳定预测关系且保留原始输入的充分信息。

Result: 在多个多模态基准上达到最先进性能，尤其在分布外数据和噪声数据上表现突出，验证了模型的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

Conclusion: CmIR通过因果驱动的模态解耦有效消除了虚假关联，提升了多模态情感计算在非理想环境下的可靠性。

Abstract: Multimodal affective computing aims to predict humans' sentiment, emotion, intention, and opinion using language, acoustic, and visual modalities. However, current models often learn spurious correlations that harm generalization under distribution shifts or noisy modalities. To address this, we propose a causal modality-invariant representation (CmIR) learning framework for robust multimodal learning. At its core, we introduce a theoretically grounded disentanglement method that separates each modality into `causal invariant representation' and `environment-specific spurious representation' from a causal inference perspective. CmIR ensures that the learned invariant representations retain stable predictive relationships with labels across different environments while preserving sufficient information from the raw inputs via invariance constraint, mutual information constraint, and reconstruction constraint. Experiments across multiple multimodal benchmarks demonstrate that CmIR achieves state-of-the-art performance. CmIR particularly excels on out-of-distribution data and noisy data, confirming its robustness and generalizability.

</details>


### [598] [AutoPPA: Automated Circuit PPA Optimization via Contrastive Code-based Rule Library Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18445)
*Chongxiao Li,Pengwei Jin,Di Huang,Guangrun Sun,Husheng Han,Jianan Mu,Xinyao Zheng,Jiaguo Zhu,Shuyi Xing,Hanjun Wei,Tianyun Ma,Shuyao Cheng,Rui Zhang,Ying Wang,Zidong Du,Qi Guo,Xing Hu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: AutoPPA是一个全自动的PPA优化框架，通过E²I工作流自动生成优化规则，无需人工定义先验知识，在实验中优于手动优化和现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RTL设计中的PPA优化需要精确理解电路功能与结构之间的关系，现有基于LLM的方法（反馈型或知识型）效率不足，要么缺乏先验知识，要么过度依赖人工总结的优化规则。

Method: 提出AutoPPA框架，核心是自动生成优化规则。采用Explore-Evaluate-Induce (E²I)工作流，从多样化的生成代码对中对比和抽象规则，而非依赖人工定义知识；同时采用自适应多步搜索框架，为给定电路采用最有效的规则。

Result: AutoPPA在实验中优于手动优化以及当前最先进的方法SymRTLO和RTLRewriter。

Conclusion: 自动生成的优化规则比人工总结规则更有效，自适应多步搜索框架增强了规则的泛化能力，实现了全自动的高效PPA优化。

Abstract: Performance, power, and area (PPA) optimization is a fundamental task in RTL design, requiring a precise understanding of circuit functionality and the relationship between circuit structures and PPA metrics. Recent studies attempt to automate this process using LLMs, but neither feedback-based nor knowledge-based methods are efficient enough, as they either design without any prior knowledge or rely heavily on human-summarized optimization rules.
  In this paper, we propose AutoPPA, a fully automated PPA optimization framework. The key idea is to automatically generate optimization rules that enhance the search for optimal solutions. To do this, AutoPPA employs an Explore-Evaluate-Induce ($E^2I$) workflow that contrasts and abstracts rules from diverse generated code pairs rather than manually defined prior knowledge, yielding better optimization patterns. To make the abstracted rules more generalizable, AutoPPA employs an adaptive multi-step search framework that adopts the most effective rules for a given circuit. Experiments show that AutoPPA outperforms both the manual optimization and the state-of-the-art methods SymRTLO and RTLRewriter.

</details>


### [599] [Positive-Only Drifting Policy Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16519)
*Qi Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出PODPO，一种无需似然和梯度裁剪的在线强化学习方法，利用漂移模型仅通过正优势样本进行策略更新，避免了传统方法中后验惩罚负样本的弊端。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统在线强化学习方法（高斯策略、流模型等）受限于单模态表达能力、复杂的梯度裁剪或严格的信任域约束，且都依赖后验惩罚负样本，缺乏主动的错误预防机制。

Method: 利用漂移模型（drifting model），通过优势加权的局部对比漂移（advantage-weighted local contrastive drifting）进行策略更新，仅使用正优势样本，利用生成模型固有的局部平滑性实现主动错误预防。

Result: PODPO是一种无似然、无梯度裁剪的生成式方法，能够在在线环境中将动作导向高回报区域，为生成式策略学习开辟了新路径。

Conclusion: PODPO通过仅利用正样本的漂移策略更新，克服了传统方法的后验惩罚缺陷，为在线RL中的生成式策略学习提供了有前景的新方向。

Abstract: In the field of online reinforcement learning (RL), traditional Gaussian policies and flow-based methods are often constrained by their unimodal expressiveness, complex gradient clipping, or stringent trust-region requirements. Moreover, they all rely on post-hoc penalization of negative samples to correct erroneous actions. This paper introduces Positive-Only Drifting Policy Optimization (PODPO), a likelihood-free and gradient-clipping-free generative approach for online RL. By leveraging the drifting model, PODPO performs policy updates via advantage-weighted local contrastive drifting. Relying solely on positive-advantage samples, it elegantly steers actions toward high-return regions while exploiting the inherent local smoothness of the generative model to enable proactive error prevention. In doing so, PODPO opens a promising new pathway for generative policy learning in online settings.

</details>


### [600] [Knowing When to Quit: A Principled Framework for Dynamic Abstention in LLM Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18419)
*Hen Davidov,Nachshon Cohen,Oren Kalinsky,Yaron Fairstein,Guy Kushilevitz,Ram Yazdi,Patrick Rebeschini*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了动态中途弃权（dynamic mid-generation abstention）的形式化分析框架，将弃权建模为强化学习中的显式动作，通过正则化奖励参数控制计算与信息的权衡，证明了当价值函数低于弃权奖励时进行弃权在一般条件下严格优于基线方法，并推导出高效的价值函数近似方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型使用链式思维推理时，往往因生成长且错误的响应而浪费大量计算资源。弃权机制可以避免输出可能错误的结果，但现有动态中途弃权方法缺乏原则性指导。

Method: 将动态弃权形式化为正则化强化学习框架中的显式动作，引入弃权奖励参数控制计算-信息权衡，证明价值函数低于该奖励时弃权的最优性，并推导出高效的价值函数近似方法。

Result: 在数学推理和毒性回避任务上的实验结果表明，该方法在选择性准确率上优于现有方法，且理论预测与实验结果一致。

Conclusion: 动态弃权策略在理论上具有最优性保证，实际应用中也表现出更好的选择性准确率，为LLM推理效率优化提供了原则性指导。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) using chain-of-thought reasoning often waste substantial compute by producing long, incorrect responses. Abstention can mitigate this by withholding outputs unlikely to be correct. While most abstention methods decide to withhold outputs before or after generation, dynamic mid-generation abstention considers early termination of unpromising reasoning traces at each token position. Prior work has explored empirical variants of this idea, but principled guidance for the abstention rule remains lacking. We present a formal analysis of dynamic abstention for LLMs, modeling abstention as an explicit action within a regularized reinforcement learning framework. An abstention reward parameter controls the trade-off between compute and information. We show that abstaining when the value function falls below this reward strictly outperforms natural baselines under general conditions. We further derive a principled and efficient method to approximate the value function. Empirical results on mathematical reasoning and toxicity avoidance tasks support our theory and demonstrate improved selective accuracy over existing methods.

</details>


### [601] [Balance-Guided Sparse Identification of Multiscale Nonlinear PDEs with Small-coefficient Terms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18414)
*Zhenhua Dang,Lei Zhang,Long Wang,Guowei He*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对多尺度系统中动态显著项系数较小难以被现有方法识别的问题，提出Balance-Guided SINDy (BG-SINDy)，受主导平衡原理启发，将ℓ₀约束稀疏回归重构为项级ℓ₂,₀正则化问题，通过渐进式剪枝策略，依据项对控制方程平衡的相对贡献而非系数绝对值进行排序与筛选，在KdV方程、修正Burgers方程、修正Kuramoto-Sivashinsky方程及二维反应扩散系统上验证了发现小系数项的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据驱动方程发现方法在多尺度系统中难以识别系数小但动态意义显著的项，亟需一种能够依据物理平衡而非系数大小来筛选项的新方法。

Method: 提出BG-SINDy，将ℓ₀约束稀疏回归转化为项级ℓ₂,₀正则化问题，采用渐进式剪枝策略，按项对控制方程平衡的相对贡献进行排序，交替执行最小二乘回归与忽略项剔除。

Result: 在含小色散系数的KdV方程、含消失超粘性的修正Burgers方程、含多个小系数项的修正Kuramoto-Sivashinsky方程以及二维反应扩散系统上验证了BG-SINDy发现小系数项的有效性。

Conclusion: BG-SINDy提供了一种高效的发现含小系数项控制方程的方法，能够保留动态显著但系数较小的项。

Abstract: Data-driven discovery of governing equations has advanced significantly in recent years; however, existing methods often struggle in multiscale systems where dynamically significant terms may have small coefficients. Therefore, we propose Balance-Guided SINDy (BG-SINDy) inspired by the principle of dominant balance, which reformulates $\ell_0$-constrained sparse regression as a term-level $\ell_{2,0}$-regularized problem and solves it using a progressive pruning strategy. Terms are ranked according to their relative contributions to the governing equation balance rather than their absolute coefficient magnitudes. Based on this criterion, BG-SINDy alternates between least-squares regression and elimination of negligible terms, thereby preserving dynamically significant terms even when their coefficients are small. Numerical experiments on the Korteweg--de Vries equation with a small dispersion coefficient, a modified Burgers equation with vanishing hyperviscosity, a modified Kuramoto--Sivashinsky equation with multiple small-coefficient terms, and a two-dimensional reaction--diffusion system demonstrate the validity of BG-SINDy in discovering small-coefficient terms. The proposed method thus provides an efficient approach for discovering governing equations that contain small-coefficient terms.

</details>


### [602] [Parkinson's Disease Detection via Self-Supervised Dual-Channel Cross-Attention on Bilateral Wrist-Worn IMU Signals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18372)
*Meheru Zannat*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种自监督交叉注意力编码器，利用双侧腕戴式IMU传感器数据对帕金森病进行自动分类，在469名受试者上实现HC vs PD 93.12%和PD vs DD 87.04%的准确率，并通过对比学习在仅20%标注数据下达到93.56%和92.50%的准确率，模型在树莓派上推理时间为48.32ms/窗口。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 帕金森病诊断依赖临床检查，耗时且主观性强；可穿戴IMU传感器为被动监测提供了新途径，但现有方法需要大量标注数据且难以区分PD与其他神经退行性疾病。

Method: 提出自监督交叉注意力编码器，处理双侧腕戴IMU信号；使用对比学习infoNCE损失进行自监督表示学习；在PADS数据集（含PD、HC、DD三组共469名受试者）上进行评估。

Result: HC vs PD分类准确率93.12%，PD vs DD分类准确率87.04%；自监督学习在仅20%标注数据下分别达到93.56%和92.50%的准确率；模型在树莓派CPU上推理时间为48.32ms/窗口。

Conclusion: 自监督表示学习能有效利用少量标注数据进行帕金森病分类，在临床迁移学习场景中具有实用性；区分PD与其他神经退行性疾病仍是临床挑战；模型具备实时部署能力。

Abstract: Parkinson's disease (PD) is a chronic neurodegenerative disease. It shows multiple motor symptoms such as tremor, bradykinesia, postural instability, freezing of gait (FoG). PD is currently diagnosed clinically through physical exam by health-care professionals, which can be time consuming and highly subjective. Wearable IMU sensors has become a promising gateway for passive monitoring of PD patients. We propose a self-supervised cross-attention encoder that processes bilateral wrist-worn IMU signals from a public dataset called PADS, consisting of three groups, PD (Parkinson Disease), HC (Healthy Control) and DD (Differential Diagnosis) of a total of 469 subjects. We have achieved a mean accuracy of 93.12% for HC vs. PD classification and 87.04% for PD vs. DD classification. The results emphasize the clinical challenge of distinguishing Parkinson's from other neurodegenerative diseases. Self-supervised representation learning using contrastive infoNCE loss gained an accuracy of 93.56% for HC vs. PD and 92.50% for PD vs. DD using only 20% of labelled data. This demonstrates the effectiveness of our method in transfer learning for clinical use with minimal labels. The real-time applicability was tested by deploying the optimized model with a mean inference time of 48.32 ms per window on a Raspberry Pi CPU.

</details>


### [603] [Scale-free adaptive planning for deterministic dynamics & discounted rewards](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18312)
*Peter L. Bartlett,Victor Gabillon,Jennifer Healey,Michal Valko*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为Platypoos的无尺度规划算法，用于解决确定性动力学和随机奖励环境中的规划问题。该算法无需知道奖励的尺度和光滑性，能自适应调整，在样本复杂度上优于先前工作，且分析在广泛的折扣因子和奖励尺度下同时成立。文章还给出了匹配的下界，证明分析在常数范围内是最优的。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有规划算法在确定性动力学与随机奖励环境中，最优价值函数未知且奖励无界，缺乏一种能够自适应未知奖励尺度和光滑性、同时在广泛折扣因子下保持最优样本复杂度的算法。

Method: 提出Platypoos算法，这是一种简单且无尺度的规划算法，能够自适应奖励函数的未知尺度和光滑性。算法在确定性动力学和随机奖励（折扣回报）环境下运行，无需提前知道奖励的尺度或折扣因子。

Result: Platypoos的样本复杂度分析优于先前工作，且在广泛的折扣因子和奖励尺度下同时成立。此外，作者建立了匹配的下界，证明该分析在常数范围内是最优的。

Conclusion: Platypoos是一种高效的、无尺度的规划算法，能够自适应未知环境参数，并在理论上达到了接近最优的样本复杂度。

Abstract: We address the problem of planning in an environment with deterministic dynamics and stochastic rewards with discounted returns. The optimal value function is not known, nor are the rewards bounded. We propose Platypoos, a simple scale-free planning algorithm that adapts to the unknown scale and smoothness of the reward function. We provide a sample complexity analysis for Platypoos that improves upon prior work and holds simultaneously over a broad range of discount factors and reward scales, without the algorithm knowing them. We also establish a matching lower bound showing our analysis is optimal up to constants.

</details>


### [604] [CAARL: In-Context Learning for Interpretable Co-Evolving Time Series Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18305)
*Etienne Tajeuna,Patrick Asante Owusu,Armelle Brun,Shengrui Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出CAARL模型，通过将时间序列分解为自回归片段、构建时序依赖图并序列化为叙事文本，利用LLM进行可解释的协同进化时间序列预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法难以处理协同进化时间序列中复杂的依赖关系和非平稳动态，且缺乏可解释性，无法清晰揭示影响序列变化的上下文动态。

Method: CAARL将时间序列分解为自回归片段，构建时序依赖图，将该图序列化为叙事文本供LLM处理，形成类似思维链的推理路径，其中间步骤捕获上下文动态并以透明方式指导预测。

Result: 在真实数据集上的实验验证了CAARL的有效性，其在保持预测精度的同时具备竞争力，并作为可解释的替代方案优于现有最先进的预测方法。

Conclusion: CAARL通过将预测与显式推理轨迹关联，在增强可解释性的同时保持了预测精度，成为兼具竞争力和可解释性的时间序列预测方法。

Abstract: In this paper we investigate forecasting coevolving time series that feature intricate dependencies and nonstationary dynamics by using an LLM Large Language Models approach We propose a novel modeling approach named ContextAware ARLLM CAARL that provides an interpretable framework to decode the contextual dynamics influencing changes in coevolving series CAARL decomposes time series into autoregressive segments constructs a temporal dependency graph and serializes this graph into a narrative to allow processing by LLM This design yields a chainofthoughtlike reasoning path where intermediate steps capture contextual dynamics and guide forecasts in a transparent manner By linking prediction to explicit reasoning traces CAARL enhances interpretability while maintaining accuracy Experiments on realworld datasets validate its effectiveness positioning CAARL as a competitive and interpretable alternative to stateoftheart forecasting methods

</details>


### [605] [Chain of Uncertain Rewards with Large Language Models for Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13504)
*Shentong Mo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Chain of Uncertain Rewards (CoUR)框架，利用大语言模型结合代码不确定性量化与相似性选择机制，通过贝叶斯优化解耦奖励项，在IsaacGym和Bidexterous Manipulation基准上实现更优性能并显著降低奖励评估成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统奖励函数设计依赖大量人工迭代，效率低且易忽略中间决策点的局部不确定性，亟需自动化且高效的奖励设计方法。

Method: CoUR框架包含三个核心组件：(1) 代码不确定性量化，评估奖励函数组件的不确定性；(2) 相似性选择机制，结合文本与语义分析筛选最相关的历史奖励组件进行复用；(3) 解耦奖励项的贝叶斯优化，高效搜索最优奖励反馈。

Result: 在IsaacGym的9个环境和Bidexterous Manipulation的全部20个任务上，CoUR相比基线方法取得更优性能，同时大幅降低奖励评估的代价。

Conclusion: CoUR通过LLM驱动的奖励函数自动设计与评估框架，有效解决了传统方法的冗余和局部不确定性忽视问题，实现了高效、鲁棒的奖励优化。

Abstract: Designing effective reward functions is a cornerstone of reinforcement learning (RL), yet it remains a challenging and labor-intensive process due to the inefficiencies and inconsistencies inherent in traditional methods. Existing methods often rely on extensive manual design and evaluation steps, which are prone to redundancy and overlook local uncertainties at intermediate decision points. To address these challenges, we propose the Chain of Uncertain Rewards (CoUR), a novel framework that integrates large language models (LLMs) to streamline reward function design and evaluation in RL environments. Specifically, our CoUR introduces code uncertainty quantification with a similarity selection mechanism that combines textual and semantic analyses to identify and reuse the most relevant reward function components. By reducing redundant evaluations and leveraging Bayesian optimization on decoupled reward terms, CoUR enables a more efficient and robust search for optimal reward feedback. We comprehensively evaluate CoUR across nine original environments from IsaacGym and all 20 tasks from the Bidexterous Manipulation benchmark. The experimental results demonstrate that CoUR not only achieves better performance but also significantly lowers the cost of reward evaluations.

</details>


### [606] [Towards Disentangled Preference Optimization Dynamics Beyond Likelihood Displacement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18239)
*Wei Chen,Yubing Wu,Junmei Yang,Delu Zeng,Qibin Zhao,John Paisley,Min Chen,Zhou Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种统一的偏好优化激励-分数分解框架，揭示了不同优化目标具有相同的局部更新方向，仅权重系数不同。基于此，作者识别出“解缠带”（DB）条件，并提出了即插即用的“奖励校准”（RC）方法，在不重新设计基础目标的前提下缓解似然位移问题，实验表明RC能引导更解缠的训练动态并提升下游性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有偏好优化方法中，许多基于边际的目标会同时抑制选择响应和拒绝响应（即似然位移），目前缺乏通用的机制来防止这一现象在不同目标中发生。

Method: 1. 提出统一的激励-分数分解，将不同偏好优化目标统一为相同的局部更新方向与不同的标量加权系数。2. 通过分析选择/拒绝似然的动态，识别出解缠带（DB）条件，该条件刻画了训练能否避免似然位移。3. 基于DB提出奖励校准（RC）方法，自适应地平衡选择与拒绝的更新，使训练满足DB条件，无需重新设计基础目标。

Result: 实验结果表明，RC能够引导训练朝更解缠的动态方向发展，并在多种优化目标上普遍提升下游性能。

Conclusion: 通过统一的分解框架揭示偏好优化的内在机制，并基于解缠带条件提出一种即插即用的校准方法，有效缓解了似然位移问题，提升了模型对齐效果。

Abstract: Preference optimization is widely used to align large language models (LLMs) with human preferences. However, many margin-based objectives suppress the chosen response along with the rejected one, a phenomenon known as likelihood displacement, and no general mechanism currently prevents this across objectives.
  We bridge this gap by presenting a unified \emph{incentive-score decomposition} of preference optimization, revealing that diverse objectives share identical local update directions and differ only in their scalar weighting coefficients.
  Building on this decomposition, by analyzing the dynamics of the chosen/rejected likelihoods, we identify the \emph{disentanglement band} (DB), a simple, testable condition that characterizes when training can avoid likelihood displacement by realizing the preferred pathway: suppressing the loser while maintaining the winner, possibly after an initial transient.
  Leveraging the DB, we propose a plug-and-play \emph{reward calibration} (RC) that adaptively rebalances chosen versus rejected updates to satisfy the DB and mitigate likelihood displacement, without redesigning the base objective.
  Empirical results show that RC steers training toward more disentangled dynamics and often improves downstream performance across a range of objectives. Our code is available at https://github.com/IceyWuu/DisentangledPreferenceOptimization.

</details>


### [607] [FSEVAL: Feature Selection Evaluation Toolbox and Dashboard](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18227)
*Muhammad Rajabinasab,Arthur Zimek*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出FSEVAL，一个用于特征选择算法评估的可视化工具箱，旨在提供标准化、统一的评估和可视化平台，帮助研究人员全面、便捷地评估特征选择算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 特征选择是机器学习和数据挖掘中的基础任务，旨在区分冗余特征与信息特征，解决维度灾难并保持可解释性。然而，现有评估工具缺乏标准化和统一性，研究者难以全面、便捷地比较不同特征选择算法的性能。

Method: FSEVAL是一个特征选择评估工具箱，包含可视化仪表板，支持监督和无监督设置下的特征选择算法评估，提供标准化和统一的评估与可视化功能。

Result: FSEVAL使得研究者能够轻松地进行广泛而全面的特征选择算法评估。

Conclusion: FSEVAL为特征选择领域的研究人员提供了一个标准化、统一且易于使用的评估和可视化工具箱，有助于推动该领域的研究进展。

Abstract: Feature selection is a fundamental machine learning and data mining task, involved with discriminating redundant features from informative ones. It is an attempt to address the curse of dimensionality by removing the redundant features, while unlike dimensionality reduction methods, preserving explainability. Feature selection is conducted in both supervised and unsupervised settings, with different evaluation metrics employed to determine which feature selection algorithm is the best. In this paper, we propose FSEVAL, a feature selection evaluation toolbox accompanied with a visualization dashboard, with the goal to make it easy to comprehensively evaluate feature selection algorithms. FSEVAL aims to provide a standardized, unified, evaluation and visualization toolbox to help the researchers working in the field, conduct extensive and comprehensive evaluation of feature selection algorithms with ease.

</details>


### [608] [Diffusion Sequence Models for Generative In-Context Meta-Learning of Robot Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13366)
*Angelo Moroncelli,Matteo Rufolo,Gunes Cagin Aydin,Asad Ali Shahid,Loris Roveda*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出将系统辨识问题形式化为上下文元学习问题，比较了确定性Transformer和两种扩散模型（修补扩散与条件扩散）在前向动力学预测中的表现。实验表明扩散模型在分布外泛化方面显著优于确定性基线，修补扩散取得最佳效果，且热启动采样使扩散模型能满足实时控制约束。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人动力学建模在分布偏移和实时性约束下面临挑战，现有模型在分布外场景下鲁棒性不足，亟需一种兼具鲁棒性和实时性的系统辨识方法。

Method: 将系统辨识形式化为上下文元学习问题；采用Transformer作为确定性基线模型；引入两种扩散模型——修补扩散（Diffuser，学习联合输入-观测分布）和条件扩散（CNN和Transformer，基于控制输入生成未来观测）；通过大规模随机仿真分析分布内/分布外性能及计算权衡；采用热启动采样加速推理。

Result: 扩散模型在分布偏移下鲁棒性显著优于确定性Transformer基线；修补扩散在所有实验中表现最佳；热启动采样使扩散模型能在实时约束下运行。

Conclusion: 生成式元模型是机器人系统辨识中极具前景的方向，可在保持实时性的同时大幅提升分布外鲁棒性。

Abstract: Accurate modeling of robot dynamics is essential for model-based control, yet remains challenging under distributional shifts and real-time constraints. In this work, we formulate system identification as an in-context meta-learning problem and compare deterministic and generative sequence models for forward dynamics prediction. We take a Transformer-based meta-model, as a strong deterministic baseline, and introduce to this setting two complementary diffusion-based approaches: (i) inpainting diffusion (Diffuser), which learns the joint input-observation distribution, and (ii) conditioned diffusion models (CNN and Transformer), which generate future observations conditioned on control inputs. Through large-scale randomized simulations, we analyze performance across in-distribution and out-of-distribution regimes, as well as computational trade-offs relevant for control. We show that diffusion models significantly improve robustness under distribution shift, with inpainting diffusion achieving the best performance in our experiments. Finally, we demonstrate that warm-started sampling enables diffusion models to operate within real-time constraints, making them viable for control applications. These results highlight generative meta-models as a promising direction for robust system identification in robotics.

</details>


### [609] [An `Inverse' Experimental Framework to Estimate Market Efficiency](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18130)
*Thomas Asikis,Heinrich Nax*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出基于分位数归一化的预测框架，仅使用订单簿数据（买卖报价和价格实现）即可预测双重拍卖市场的配置效率，解决了传统经济学方法因无法获取真实保留价值而难以评估市场绩效的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 数字市场年交易额达数十亿美元，但其绩效优化缺乏可操作的度量框架。由于订单簿中的买卖报价并不代表真实的最高买入意愿和最低卖出意愿，仅凭订单数据无法评估市场配置效率，亟需一种能从有限信息中推断市场效率的方法。

Method: 采用实验数据反转标准诱导价值方法，提出基于分位数归一化的数据预处理技术处理订单簿数据的非结构化、非平稳和非线性特征；构建线性回归和梯度提升树等预测模型，利用供给-需求模型的分位数输入来预测配置效率。

Result: 模型能从最早的买卖报价中合理准确地预测配置效率，加入价格实现数据后预测精度进一步提升；预测性能因目标变量和市场类型而异。

Conclusion: 该框架对真实市场数据具有重要应用潜力，即使在交易发生前也能为市场效率和绩效提供有价值的洞察。

Abstract: Digital marketplaces processing billions of dollars annually represent critical infrastructure in sociotechnical ecosystems, yet their performance optimization lacks principled measurement frameworks that can inform algorithmic governance decisions regarding market efficiency and fairness from complex market data. By looking at orderbook data from double auction markets alone, because bids and asks do not represent true maximum willingnesses to buy and true minimum willingnesses to sell, there is little an economist can say about the market's actual performance in terms of allocative efficiency. We turn to experimental data to address this issue, `inverting' the standard induced value approach of double auction experiments. Our aim is to predict key market features relevant to market efficiency, particularly allocative efficiency, using orderbook data only -- specifically bids, asks and price realizations, but not the induced reservation values -- as early as possible. Since there is no established model of strategically optimal behavior in these markets, and because orderbook data is highly unstructured, non-stationary and non-linear, we propose quantile-based normalization techniques that help us build general predictive models. We develop and train several models, including linear regressions and gradient boosting trees, leveraging quantile-based input from the underlying supply-demand model. Our models can predict allocative efficiency with reasonable accuracy from the earliest bids and asks, and these predictions improve with additional realized price data. The performance of the prediction techniques varies by target and market type. Our framework holds significant potential for application to real-world market data, offering valuable insights into market efficiency and performance, even prior to any trade realizations.

</details>


### [610] [LoRaQ: Optimized Low Rank Approximation for 4-bit Quantization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18117)
*Yann Bouquet,Alireza Khodamoradi,Sophie Yáng Shen,Kristof Denolf,Mathieu Salzmann*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: LoRaQ是一种无需数据校准的后训练量化方法，通过低秩近似分支补偿量化误差，首次实现完全亚16位（sub-16 bit）的扩散Transformer推理流水线，在同等内存开销下优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有后训练量化（PTQ）对扩散Transformer进行4比特量化时性能严重下降；当前低秩近似方法依赖高精度分支（W16A16）和数据校准，限制了量化效率。

Method: 提出LoRaQ，采用无需数据校准的简单方法优化量化误差补偿；核心突破在于低秩分支本身也可以被量化，不再需要保持高精度，从而首次实现完全亚16位流水线。

Result: 在Pixart-Σ和SANA上，同等内存开销下LoRaQ优于现有SOTA方法；分析了混合精度配置（如W8A8、W6A6、W4A8搭配W4主层）可获得更优结果。

Conclusion: 挑战了低秩分支必须高精度的假设，证明了全量化架构（完全亚16位）的可行性，且与现有混合精度硬件兼容。

Abstract: Post-training quantization (PTQ) is essential for deploying large diffusion transformers on resource-constrained hardware, but aggressive 4-bit quantization significantly degrades generative performance. Low-rank approximation methods have emerged as a promising solution by appending auxiliary linear branches to restore performance. However, current state-of-the-art approaches assume these branches must retain high precision (W16A16) and rely on heavy, data-dependent calibration for initialization. We challenge both limitations with LoRaQ (Low-Rank Approximated Quantization), a simple, data-free calibration approach that optimizes quantization error compensation. By overcoming the need for high-precision branches, LoRaQ enables the first fully sub-16 bit pipeline, allowing the low-rank branch itself to be quantized. We demonstrate that, at equal memory overhead, LoRaQ outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in their native implementations on Pixart-$Σ$ and SANA. We also analyze mixed-precision configurations, showing that setups such as W8A8, W6A6, and W4A8 for the low-rank branch, alongside a W4 main layer, yield superior results while maintaining a fully quantized architecture compatible with modern mixed-precision hardware.

</details>


### [611] [Generalization Boundaries of Fine-Tuned Small Language Models for Graph Structural Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18092)
*Michal Podstawski*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统探究了微调小语言模型在图结构推理中的泛化边界，发现模型在跨图家族和图大小两个维度上保持强序数一致性，但存在架构特定的退化特征。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 微调小语言模型在图属性估计任务中表现良好，但其在训练条件之外的泛化能力尚不明确，缺乏系统的边界研究。

Method: 采用控制实验设计，使用3个3-4B参数量的指令微调模型和2种图序列化格式，在远超训练范围的图大小和留出的随机图家族上评估性能。

Result: 微调模型在结构不同的图家族间保持强序数一致性，能在远超训练规模的输入上按结构属性排序图，且不同架构呈现不同的退化特征。

Conclusion: 划定了微调小语言模型可靠泛化的边界，为将其应用于基于图的推理任务提供了经验基础。

Abstract: Small language models fine-tuned for graph property estimation have demonstrated strong in-distribution performance, yet their generalization capabilities beyond training conditions remain poorly understood. In this work, we systematically investigate the boundaries of structural inference in fine-tuned small language models along two generalization axes - graph size and graph family distribution - and assess domain-learning capability on real-world graph benchmarks. Using a controlled experimental setup with three instruction-tuned models in the 3-4B parameter class and two graph serialization formats, we evaluate performance on graphs substantially larger than the training range and across held-out random graph families. Our results show that fine-tuned models maintain strong ordinal consistency across structurally distinct graph families and continue to rank graphs by structural properties on inputs substantially larger than those seen during training, with distinct architecture-specific degradation profiles. These findings delineate where fine-tuned small language models generalize reliably, providing empirical grounding for their use in graph-based reasoning tasks.

</details>


### [612] [Towards E-Value Based Stopping Rules for Bayesian Deep Ensembles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18089)
*Emanuel Sommer,Rickmer Schulte,Sarah Deubner,Julius Kobialka,David Rügamer*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种基于E值的早停规则，用于在贝叶斯深度集成中决定MCMC采样何时不再带来显著改进，从而在保持性能的同时节省计算成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 贝叶斯深度集成（BDEs）结合了深度集成（DEs）的鲁棒性和多链MCMC的灵活性，但MCMC采样成本高昂。实践中需要回答一个关键问题：顺序采样需要持续多久才能产生超过初始优化DE基线的显著改进？现有方法缺乏 principled 的早停准则。

Method: 将集成构建过程形式化为一个顺序任意有效假设检验，基于E值（E-values）提出早停规则。该规则用于检验"MCMC相较于强基线无改进"的零假设，从而决定是否提前终止采样。

Result: 实验表明所提方法有效，且通常只需要完整链预算的一小部分即可达到显著改进。

Conclusion: 基于E值的早停规则能够在不牺牲性能的前提下大幅降低贝叶斯深度集成中MCMC采样的计算开销，为实际应用提供了实用的指导。

Abstract: Bayesian Deep Ensembles (BDEs) represent a powerful approach for uncertainty quantification in deep learning, combining the robustness of Deep Ensembles (DEs) with flexible multi-chain MCMC. While DEs are affordable in most deep learning settings, (long) sampling of Bayesian neural networks can be prohibitively costly. Yet, adding sampling after optimizing the DEs has been shown to yield significant improvements. This leaves a critical practical question: How long should the sequential sampling process continue to yield significant improvements over the initial optimized DE baseline? To tackle this question, we propose a stopping rule based on E-values. We formulate the ensemble construction as a sequential anytime-valid hypothesis test, providing a principled way to decide whether or not to reject the null hypothesis that MCMC offers no improvement over a strong baseline, to early stop the sampling. Empirically, we study this approach for diverse settings. Our results demonstrate the efficacy of our approach and reveal that only a fraction of the full-chain budget is often required.

</details>


### [613] [Predicting LLM Compression Degradation from Spectral Statistics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18085)
*Mingxue Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现稳定秩和信息密度（每参数比特数）是预测大语言模型矩阵级低秩压缩性能退化的主导因素，其中交互项 γ·ρ̄_s（压缩比×稳定秩）作为稳健预测器，在注意力层和MLP层分别达到0.890和0.839的留一法交叉验证皮尔逊相关系数，从而支持"先预测再压缩"的工作流。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 低秩压缩虽能降低大语言模型成本，但执行压缩并在语言任务上评估模型的代价过高，因此需要一种方法在不实际运行完整压缩流程的前提下预测压缩导致的性能退化程度。

Method: 系统分析了Qwen3和Gemma3两个模型家族在四种低秩压缩方法（vanilla SVD、两种ASVD变体、SVD-LLM）下的表现，发现稳定秩和信息密度（每参数比特数）主导性能退化，并提出交互项 γ·ρ̄_s（压缩比×稳定秩）作为退化预测器，通过连接SVD截断界和Transformer层误差组合机制提供理论支撑。

Result: γ·ρ̄_s 在注意力层达到0.890的留一法交叉验证皮尔逊相关系数，在MLP层达到0.839，证明该指标是性能退化的稳健预测器。

Conclusion: 该发现支持"先预测再压缩"的工作流：仅需从权重计算 γ·ρ̄_s 即可估计退化程度，从而只在有前景的配置上投入计算资源进行实际压缩。

Abstract: Matrix-level low-rank compression is a promising way to reduce the cost of large language models, but running compression and evaluating the resulting models on language tasks can be prohibitively expensive. Can compression-induced degradation be predicted before committing to this compute? We systematically analyze the Qwen3 and Gemma3 model families across four representative low-rank compression methods: vanilla SVD, two ASVD variants, and SVD-LLM. We find that stable rank and information density, measured in bits per parameter, dominate performance degradation. The interaction term $γ\cdot \barρ_s$, defined as compression ratio times stable rank, is a robust predictor of accuracy degradation, achieving leave-one-out cross-validation Pearson correlations of $0.890$ for attention layers and $0.839$ for MLP layers. We provide theoretical intuition for why this predictor succeeds by connecting it to standard SVD truncation bounds and error composition mechanisms in transformer layers. These findings enable a predict-then-compress workflow: compute $γ\cdot \barρ_s$ from weights, estimate degradation, and invest compute only in desirable configurations.

</details>


### [614] [Implicit neural representations as a coordinate-based framework for continuous environmental field reconstruction from sparse ecological observations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18083)
*Agnieszka Pregowska,Hazem M. Kalaji*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Summary generation failed


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Motivation analysis unavailable

Method: Method extraction failed

Result: Result analysis unavailable

Conclusion: Conclusion extraction failed

Abstract: Reconstructing continuous environmental fields from sparse and irregular observations remains a central challenge in environmental modelling and biodiversity informatics. Many ecological datasets are heterogeneous in space and time, making grid-based approaches difficult to scale or generalise across domains. Here, we evaluate implicit neural representations (INRs) as a coordinate-based modelling framework for learning continuous spatial and spatio-temporal fields directly from coordinate inputs. We analyse their behaviour across three representative modelling scenarios: species distribution reconstruction, phenological dynamics, and morphological segmentation derived from open biodiversity data. Beyond predictive performance, we examine interpolation behaviour, spatial coherence, and computational characteristics relevant for environmental modelling workflows, including scalability, resolution-independent querying, and architectural inductive bias. Results show that neural fields provide stable continuous representations with predictable computational cost, complementing classical smoothers and tree-based approaches. These findings position coordinate-based neural fields as a flexible representation layer that can be integrated into environmental modelling pipelines and exploratory analysis frameworks for large, irregularly sampled datasets.

</details>


### [615] [Towards Real-Time ECG and EMG Modeling on $μ$NPUs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18067)
*Josh Millar,Ashok Samraj Thangarajan,Soumyajit Chatterjee,Hamed Haddadi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PhysioLite是一种轻量级、兼容NPU的模型架构与训练框架，用于ECG/EMG信号分析。通过可学习小波滤波器组、CPU卸载位置编码和硬件感知层设计，PhysioLite在模型大小仅为Transformer基座模型10%（约370KB，8-bit量化）的情况下，达到与SOTA Transformer模型相当的性能，并在MAX78000和HX6538 WE2两款μNPU上验证了其在资源受限电池供电硬件上的可行性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管μNPU等低功耗加速器已可集成到微控制器级可穿戴硬件中，支持近实时、离线、隐私保护的推理，但生理信号分析在如此受限的硬件上仍不可行——当前SOTA的Transformer模型虽性能优异，但体积过大且动态注意力操作与μNPU不兼容。

Method: 提出PhysioLite架构，包含：(1) 可学习小波滤波器组（learnable wavelet filter banks）用于特征提取；(2) CPU卸载位置编码（CPU-offloaded positional encoding）以降低NPU计算负担；(3) 硬件感知层设计（hardware-aware layer design）确保与μNPU指令集兼容。模型采用8-bit量化压缩至~370KB。

Result: PhysioLite在ECG和EMG基准上达到与SOTA Transformer基座模型相当的性能，模型大小仅为后者的<10%（~370KB，8-bit量化）。在MAX78000和HX6538 WE2 μNPU上完成了逐组件延迟和资源消耗分析，证明其在电池供电受限硬件上的可行性。

Conclusion: PhysioLite成功实现了在微控制器级NPU硬件上进行高效生理信号分析，弥合了高性能深度学习模型与极端资源受限可穿戴设备之间的鸿沟，为离线、低功耗、隐私保护的生理监测提供了可行的解决方案。代码和模型已开源。

Abstract: The miniaturisation of neural processing units (NPUs) and other low-power accelerators has enabled their integration into microcontroller-scale wearable hardware, supporting near-real-time, offline, and privacy-preserving inference. Yet physiological signal analysis has remained infeasible on such hardware; recent Transformer-based models show state-of-the-art performance but are prohibitively large for resource- and power-constrained hardware and incompatible with $μ$NPUs due to their dynamic attention operations. We introduce PhysioLite, a lightweight, NPU-compatible model architecture and training framework for ECG/EMG signal analysis. Using learnable wavelet filter banks, CPU-offloaded positional encoding, and hardware-aware layer design, PhysioLite reaches performance comparable to state-of-the-art Transformer-based foundation models on ECG and EMG benchmarks, while being <10% of the size ($\sim$370KB with 8-bit quantization). We also profile its component-wise latency and resource consumption on both the MAX78000 and HX6538 WE2 $μ$NPUs, demonstrating its viability for signal analysis on constrained, battery-powered hardware. We release our model(s) and training framework at: https://github.com/j0shmillar/physiolite.

</details>


### [616] [Clusterability-Based Assessment of Potentially Noisy Views for Multi-View Clustering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18024)
*Mudi Jiang,Jiahui Zhou,Xinying Liu,Zengyou He,Zhikui Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向多视图数据的聚类前噪声视图分析方法——多视图可聚类性分数（MVCS），通过三个互补组件量化多视图数据的潜在聚类结构强度，并用于检测噪声视图。实验表明，该方法能有效支持噪声视图分析与检测，优于现有单视图可聚类性度量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多视图聚类研究主要在聚类过程中通过视图加权或鲁棒优化处理低质量视图，忽视了聚类前数据层面的质量评估。本文旨在填补这一空白，从可聚类性角度对多视图数据进行预聚类噪声视图分析。

Method: 提出Multi-View Clusterability Score (MVCS)，包含三个互补组件：1）单视图结构可聚类性；2）联合空间可聚类性；3）跨视图邻域一致性。通过MVCS对每个视图进行量化评估，实现噪声视图的检测与分析。

Result: 在真实数据集上的实验表明，噪声视图会显著降低聚类性能；与现有单视图可聚类性度量相比，MVCS能更有效地支持噪声视图分析与检测。

Conclusion: 本文首次提出专门针对多视图数据的可聚类性分数MVCS，实现了聚类前的噪声视图分析，为多视图聚类中的数据质量评估提供了新视角。

Abstract: In multi-view clustering, the quality of different views may vary substantially, and low-quality or degraded views can impair overall clustering performance. However, existing studies mainly address this issue within the clustering process through view weighting or noise-robust optimization, while paying limited attention to data-level assessment before clustering. In this paper, we study the problem of pre-clustering noisy-view analysis in multi-view data from a clusterability perspective. To this end, we propose a Multi-View Clusterability Score (MVCS), which quantifies the strength of latent cluster-related structures in multi-view data through three complementary components: per-view structural clusterability, joint-space clusterability, and cross-view neighborhood consistency. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first clusterability score specifically designed for multi-view data. We further use it to perform potentially noisy view analysis and noisy-view detection before clustering. Extensive experiments on real-world datasets demonstrate that noisy views can significantly degrade clustering performance, and that, compared with existing clusterability measures designed for single-view data, the proposed method more effectively supports noisy-view analysis and detection.

</details>


### [617] [Online Conformal Prediction with Adversarial Semi-bandit Feedback via Regret Minimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17984)
*Junyoung Yang,Kyungmin Kim,Sangdon Park*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对在线共形预测中部分反馈（仅在预测集包含真实标签时揭示）这一更具挑战性的自适应对抗场景，提出了一种将在线共形预测建模为对抗性老虎机问题的新方法，通过将每个候选预测集视为一个臂，利用现有对抗性老虎机算法实现了长期覆盖率保证，并在i.i.d.和非i.i.d.设置下验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有在线共形预测方法虽能在无分布假设下提供长期覆盖率保证，但均假设完整反馈（始终观测到真实标签）。然而在安全关键系统的实际应用中，真实标签仅在预测集包含它时才被揭示（部分反馈），且面临自适应对抗攻击，现有方法无法处理这一更具挑战性的场景。

Method: 将在线共形预测形式化为对抗性老虎机问题，每个候选预测集对应一个臂；基于现有对抗性老虎机算法（如EXP3），通过显式建立学习器遗憾与长期覆盖率之间的联系，设计部分反馈下的学习算法。

Result: 在i.i.d.和非i.i.d.两种设置下，该方法均能成功控制误覆盖率（实现长期覆盖率保证），同时保持合理的预测集大小。

Conclusion: 提出的方法有效解决了自适应对抗部分反馈下在线共形预测的挑战，理论上通过遗憾分析建立了覆盖率保证，实验上在多种数据分布下表现良好。

Abstract: Uncertainty quantification is crucial in safety-critical systems, where decisions must be made under uncertainty. In particular, we consider the problem of online uncertainty quantification, where data points arrive sequentially. Online conformal prediction is a principled online uncertainty quantification method that dynamically constructs a prediction set at each time step. While existing methods for online conformal prediction provide long-run coverage guarantees without any distributional assumptions, they typically assume a full feedback setting in which the true label is always observed. In this paper, we propose a novel learning method for online conformal prediction with partial feedback from an adaptive adversary-a more challenging setup where the true label is revealed only when it lies inside the constructed prediction set. Specifically, we formulate online conformal prediction as an adversarial bandit problem by treating each candidate prediction set as an arm. Building on an existing algorithm for adversarial bandits, our method achieves a long-run coverage guarantee by explicitly establishing its connection to the regret of the learner. Finally, we empirically demonstrate the effectiveness of our method in both independent and identically distributed (i.i.d.) and non-i.i.d. settings, showing that it successfully controls the miscoverage rate while maintaining a reasonable size of the prediction set.

</details>


### [618] [Federated Rule Ensemble Method in Medical Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17956)
*Ke Wan,Kensuke Tanioka,Toshio Shimokawa*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个联邦RuleFit框架，通过差分隐私直方图、梯度提升树和联邦对偶平均算法，在分布式环境中构建可解释的全局模型，性能与集中式方法相当，优于现有联邦方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器学习在临床应用中受限于单机构数据不足，而跨机构数据整合面临隐私法规和数据所有权约束。现有联邦学习方法架构复杂、缺乏可解释性，限制了临床应用。

Method: 提出联邦RuleFit框架，包含三个组件：(1)基于差分隐私直方图的预处理，估计共享切分值；(2)使用共享切分值的梯度提升决策树进行局部规则生成；(3)通过联邦对偶平均算法进行ℓ1正则化优化，实现稀疏一致的变量选择。

Result: 模拟研究中该方法性能与集中式RuleFit相当，优于现有联邦方法。真实数据分析中提供了可解释的洞察，同时具有竞争力的预测准确性。

Conclusion: 所提框架为联邦学习环境下的可解释性和可靠性建模提供了实用有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Machine learning has become integral to medical research and is increasingly applied in clinical settings to support diagnosis and decision-making; however, its effectiveness depends on access to large, diverse datasets, which are limited within single institutions. Although integrating data across institutions can address this limitation, privacy regulations and data ownership constraints hinder these efforts. Federated learning enables collaborative model training without sharing raw data; however, most methods rely on complex architectures that lack interpretability, limiting clinical applicability. Therefore, we proposed a federated RuleFit framework to construct a unified and interpretable global model for distributed environments. It integrates three components: preprocessing based on differentially private histograms to estimate shared cutoff values, enabling consistent rule definitions and reducing heterogeneity across clients; local rule generation using gradient boosting decision trees with shared cutoffs; and coefficient estimation via $\ell_1$-regularized optimization using a Federated Dual Averaging algorithm for sparse and consistent variable selection. In simulation studies, the proposed method achieved a performance comparable to that of centralized RuleFit while outperforming existing federated approaches. Real-world analysis demonstrated its ability to provide interpretable insights with competitive predictive accuracy. Therefore, the proposed framework offers a practical and effective solution for interpretable and reliable modeling in federated learning environments.

</details>


### [619] [How Much Cache Does Reasoning Need? Depth-Cache Tradeoffs in KV-Compressed Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17935)
*Xiao Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文从理论上研究了Transformer推理中KV缓存的压缩极限，通过k跳指针追逐任务给出了深度下界猜想、带宽屏障以及自适应与遗忘缓存策略间的指数级误差分离。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: KV缓存是Transformer推理的主要内存瓶颈，但理论上尚不清楚在多步推理中KV缓存可以被压缩到何种程度而不影响推理质量。本文旨在建立KV压缩与推理深度之间的严格理论界限。

Method: 采用k跳指针追逐任务作为理论框架，在n个token、共享KV缓存大小s、注意力维度m、H个头、p-bit精度及局部性感知缓存控制器设定下，通过组合数学和通信复杂度工具进行分析。

Result: (1) 提出乘积深度下界猜想，给出匹配上界O(min(k, ⌈k/s⌉ log s)·log n/(mp))和最大下界Ω(max(⌈k/s⌉, log n/(Hmp)))；(2) 发现带宽屏障：当Hmp ≥ log₂ n时，基于窗口可区分性计数的下界无法超过⌈k/s⌉；(3) 自适应与遗忘缓存策略间存在Ω((n/s)^(T-1))的误差指数级分离。

Conclusion: 证明了缓存策略对多步推理深度有根本性影响：自适应局部性感知缓存（如淘汰重击者）显著优于随机缓存；乘积深度下界的证明需要突破通信复杂度的经典界限；为KV压缩的实际设计提供了理论基础。

Abstract: The key-value (KV) cache is the dominant memory bottleneck during Transformer inference, yet little is known theoretically about how aggressively it can be compressed before multi-step reasoning degrades. We study this through $k$-hop pointer chasing on $n$ tokens under a shared KV cache of size $s$, attention dimension $m$, $H$ heads, $p$-bit precision, and a locality-respecting cache controller (satisfied by all standard KV-compression methods). We give three results.
  (1) Product depth lower bound (conjectured). We conjecture that any such Transformer ($n \geq 4k$, $s \leq \sqrt{n}/4$) requires depth $L = Ω(\lceil k/s \rceil \cdot \lceil \log_2 n/(Hmp) \rceil)$, and isolate the sole remaining gap as a probabilistic step on the joint distribution of cache trace and pointer chain. Unconditionally, we prove a matching upper bound $L = O(\min(k, \lceil k/s \rceil \log s) \cdot \log n/(mp))$ via windowed pointer doubling, and a max-bound $L = Ω(\max(\lceil k/s \rceil, \log n/(Hmp)))$. Closing the conjecture amounts to upgrading max to product.
  (2) Bandwidth barrier. The product bound binds only when $Hmp \lesssim \log n$. Any lower bound provable via per-window distinguishability counting -- including reachability, bandwidth, and combinations -- cannot exceed $\lceil k/s \rceil$ once $Hmp \geq \log_2 n$. Breaking this requires lifting unconditional communication-complexity bounds for pointer chasing to Cache-Transformer depth.
  (3) Adaptive vs oblivious error scaling. Under random cache over $T = \lceil \log_2 k \rceil$ doubling stages, oblivious caches give $\Pr[\mathcal{E}] \leq (s/(n-T))^T + 2T^3/n$ (exponential in $T$), while adaptive locality-respecting caches achieve $\Pr[\mathcal{E}] = s/n$ exactly, independent of $T$. The $Ω((n/s)^{T-1})$ separation explains why heavy-hitter eviction empirically dominates random eviction for multi-hop reasoning.

</details>


### [620] [HEALing Entropy Collapse: Enhancing Exploration in Few-Shot RLVR via Hybrid-Domain Entropy Dynamics Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17928)
*Zhanyu Liu,Qingguo Hu,Ante Wang,Chenqing Liu,Zhishang Xiang,Hui Li,Delai Qiu,Jinsong Su*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对低资源场景下强化学习训练推理模型时熵崩塌严重的问题，提出HEAL框架，通过混合域熵动态对齐机制，仅用32个目标域样本即可匹配或超越1000样本的全量训练效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RLVR方法在高资源场景下有效，但在低资源场景中熵崩塌严重，限制了探索空间并降低了推理性能。

Method: HEAL框架包含两部分：1) 选择性引入高价值通用域数据以促进多样化探索；2) 熵动态对齐(EDA)奖励机制，在轨迹层面对齐目标域与通用域的熵动态（包括熵幅度和细粒度变化），从而缓解熵崩塌并鼓励策略从通用域学习多样化探索行为。

Result: 跨多个领域的实验表明HEAL持续提升少样本RLVR性能，仅用32个目标域样本即可匹配或超越1000样本的全量训练效果。

Conclusion: HEAL通过混合域熵动态对齐有效解决了低资源RLVR中的熵崩塌问题，显著提升了数据效率。

Abstract: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Reward (RLVR) has proven effective for training reasoning-oriented large language models, but existing methods largely assume high-resource settings with abundant training data. In low-resource scenarios, RLVR is prone to more severe entropy collapse, which substantially limits exploration and degrades reasoning performance. To address this issue, we propose Hybrid-domain Entropy dynamics ALignment (HEAL), a framework tailored for few-shot RLVR. HEAL first selectively incorporates high-value general-domain data to promote more diverse exploration. Then, we introduce Entropy Dynamics Alignment (EDA), a reward mechanism that aligns trajectory-level entropy dynamics between the target and general domains, capturing both entropy magnitude and fine-grained variation. Through this alignment, EDA not only further mitigates entropy collapse but also encourages the policy to acquire more diverse exploration behaviors from the general domain. Experiments across multiple domains show that HEAL consistently improves few-shot RLVR performance. Notably, using only 32 target-domain samples, HEAL matches or even surpasses full-shot RLVR trained with 1K target-domain samples.

</details>


### [621] [Learning to Correct: Calibrated Reinforcement Learning for Multi-Attempt Chain-of-Thought](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17912)
*Muhammed Emrullah Ildiz,Halil Alperen Gozeten,Ege Onur Taga,Samet Oymak*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出CAL-GRPO方法，通过精心加权每次尝试的奖励，在多次尝试推理（最多K次）场景下获得无偏梯度估计，从而优化Verification@K性能，理论分析和实验验证了该方法相比原始GRPO和朴素加权的优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有推理模型利用长思维链（CoT）解决复杂问题，但在多次尝试（最多K次）场景下，如何有效利用每次尝试的硬验证反馈来优化模型性能尚未得到充分研究。朴素地根据每次尝试的成功/失败进行加权会导致梯度有偏，需要设计更合理的加权策略。

Method: 提出Calibrated Attempt-Level (CAL) GRPO方法，设计了一种加权策略来获得无偏梯度估计，同时保持较小的方差。该方法在每次尝试都允许基于硬验证器反馈构建之前尝试的基础上，利用每次尝试的奖励信息进行优化。

Result: 理论分析揭示了结合每次尝试的奖励如何影响训练和最终的Verification@K性能。在合成数据和真实数据上的实验、基线和消融研究均证实了理论分析以及CAL-GRPO相比原始GRPO和朴素加权方法的优势。

Conclusion: CAL-GRPO通过精心设计的尝试级奖励加权策略，在多轮尝试推理场景下实现了无偏梯度估计，有效提升了Verification@K性能，为长思维链推理模型的强化学习训练提供了理论指导和方法支撑。

Abstract: State-of-the-art reasoning models utilize long chain-of-thought (CoT) to solve increasingly complex problems using more test-time computation. In this work, we explore a long CoT setting where the model makes up to K successive attempts at solving a problem, in which each attempt is allowed to build on earlier ones after the model receives a hard verifier feedback. This motivates RL methods that can harness per-attempt rewards by carefully weighting individual attempts. We study optimizing the Verification@K reward (the model succeeds by the K-th attempt) and show that naively weighing the attempts by their pass/fail results in biased gradients. We introduce Calibrated Attempt-Level (CAL) GRPO by devising a weighing strategy to obtain unbiased gradients while maintaining small variance. Our theory reveals how incorporating per-attempt rewards influence the training and the eventual Verification@K performance. Experiments, baselines, and ablations on synthetic and real data corroborate our theory and the benefits of CAL-GRPO over vanilla GRPO as well as naive weighting.

</details>


### [622] [LEPO: Latent Reasoning Policy Optimization for Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17892)
*Yuyan Zhou,Jiarui Yu,Hande Dong,Zhezheng Hao,Hong Wang,Jianqing Zhang,Qiang Lin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出LEPO框架，通过Gumbel-Softmax在潜在推理中引入可控随机性，并直接在连续潜在表示上应用强化学习，实现多样化轨迹采样和统一梯度估计，显著优于现有离散和潜在推理的RL方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有潜在推理方法缺乏随机采样，导致确定性推理，无法探索多样化推理路径；需要弥合这一差距，恢复LLMs的探索能力并增强与强化学习的兼容性。

Method: 通过Gumbel-Softmax在潜在推理中注入可控随机性；提出LEPO框架，在rollout阶段保持随机性以支持多样化轨迹采样，在优化阶段构建针对潜在表示和离散token的统一梯度估计。

Result: LEPO在多个实验任务上显著优于现有的离散推理和潜在推理的强化学习方法。

Conclusion: 在潜在推理中引入可控随机性并结合强化学习能够有效提升LLMs的推理性能，LEPO为潜在空间中的策略优化提供了有效框架。

Abstract: Recently, latent reasoning has been introduced into large language models (LLMs) to leverage rich information within a continuous space. However, without stochastic sampling, these methods inevitably collapse to deterministic inference, failing to discover diverse reasoning paths. To bridge the gap, we inject controllable stochasticity into latent reasoning via Gumbel-Softmax, restoring LLMs' exploratory capacity and enhancing their compatibility with Reinforcement Learning (RL). Building on this, we propose \textbf{\underline{L}}atent R\textbf{\underline{e}}asoning \textbf{\underline{P}}olicy \textbf{\underline{O}}ptimization~(\textbf{LEPO}), a novel framework that applies RL directly to continuous latent representations. Specifically, in rollout stage, LEPO maintains stochasticity to enable diverse trajectory sampling, while in optimization stage, LEPO constructs a unified gradient estimation for both latent representations and discrete tokens. Extensive experiments show that LEPO significantly outperforms existing RL methods for discrete and latent reasoning.

</details>


### [623] [M100: An Orchestrated Dataflow Architecture Powering General AI Computing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17862)
*Yan Xie,Changkui Mao,Changsong Wu,Chao Lu,Chao Suo,Cheng Qian,Chun Yang,Danyang Zhu,Hengchang Xiong,Hongzhan Lu,Hongzhen Liu,Jiafu Liu,Jie Chen,Jie Dai,Junfeng Tang,Kai Liu,Kun Li,Lipeng Ge,Meng Sun,Min Luo,Peng Chen,Peng Wang,Shaodong Yang,Shibin Tang,Shibo Chen,Weikang Zhang,Xiao Ling,Xiaobo Du,Xin Wu,Yang Liu,Yi Jiang,Yihua Jin,Yin Huang,Yuli Zhang,Zhen Yuan,Zhiyuan Man,Zhongxiao Yao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: M100是理想汽车提出的面向自动驾驶、大语言模型和智能交互的高效通用AI推理架构，采用数据流并行架构与编译-硬件协同设计，以张量为基本数据元素，消除传统缓存，通过编译器管理的流式数据移动提升性能和能效，在AD和LLM任务上展现出优于GPGPU的利用率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有GPGPU架构虽通用但效率和成本不足，领域专用架构（DSA）虽高效但难以适应快速演变的AI应用场景，亟需一种兼具通用性、高性能和成本效益的AI计算架构。

Method: 采用数据流并行架构，通过编译-架构协同设计管理数据在时间和空间上的移动；以张量为基本调度和执行粒度；用编译器/运行时管理的数据流取代传统缓存系统，实现计算单元与片上/片外存储间的直接数据流动。

Result: 在自动驾驶应用UniAD和大语言模型LLaMA等多样推理任务上展示了通用AI计算能力；在AD应用中利用率高于GPGPU架构。

Conclusion: M100代表了一种面向未来通用AI计算的有前景方向，通过数据流计算效率和软硬件协同设计，在降低硬件复杂度和成本的同时提升了系统性能与可扩展性。

Abstract: As deep learning-based AI technologies gain momentum, the demand for general-purpose AI computing architectures continues to grow. While GPGPU-based architectures offer versatility for diverse AI workloads, they often fall short in efficiency and cost-effectiveness. Various Domain-Specific Architectures (DSAs) excel at particular AI tasks but struggle to extend across broader applications or adapt to the rapidly evolving AI landscape. M100 is Li Auto's response: a performant, cost-effective architecture for AI inference in Autonomous Driving (AD), Large Language Models (LLMs), and intelligent human interactions, domains crucial to today's most competitive automobile platforms. M100 employs a dataflow parallel architecture, where compiler-architecture co-design orchestrates not only computation but, more critically, data movement across time and space. Leveraging dataflow computing efficiency, our hardware-software co-design improves system performance while reducing hardware complexity and cost. M100 largely eliminates caching: tensor computations are driven by compiler- and runtime-managed data streams flowing between computing elements and on/off-chip memories, yielding greater efficiency and scalability than cache-based systems. Another key principle was selecting the right operational granularity for scheduling, issuing, and execution across compiler, firmware, and hardware. Recognizing commonalities in AI workloads, we chose the tensor as the fundamental data element. M100 demonstrates general AI computing capability across diverse inference applications, including UniAD (for AD) and LLaMA (for LLMs). Benchmarks show M100 outperforms GPGPU architectures in AD applications with higher utilization, representing a promising direction for future general AI computing.

</details>


### [624] [Efficient Diffusion Models under Nonconvex Equality and Inequality constraints via Landing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17838)
*Kijung Jeon,Michael Muehlebach,Molei Tao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种统一的约束扩散模型框架，适用于非凸可行集，通过高效的着陆机制替代传统投影，并利用欠阻尼动力学加速混合，在降低计算成本的同时保持样本质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 科学和工程应用中（如分子生成、机器人学）需要在满足物理、几何或安全约束的条件下进行生成建模，现有约束扩散方法存在计算成本高、投影定义不明确等问题。

Method: 1) 统一框架处理非凸可行集上的等式和不等式约束；2) 采用过阻尼和欠阻尼动力学进行正向和反向采样；3) 提出高效的着陆机制替代传统投影操作，避免迭代牛顿求解或投影失败；4) 利用欠阻尼动力学加速向先验分布的混合，降低模拟成本。

Result: 在包含等式和混合约束的基准测试上，该方法在保持与最先进基线相当的样本质量的同时，显著减少了训练和推理过程中的函数评估次数和内存使用量。

Conclusion: 该方法为在非凸可行集上的扩散模型提供了一种实用且可扩展的解决方案，有效平衡了约束满足、样本质量和计算效率。

Abstract: Generative modeling within constrained sets is essential for scientific and engineering applications involving physical, geometric, or safety requirements (e.g., molecular generation, robotics). We present a unified framework for constrained diffusion models on generic nonconvex feasible sets $Σ$ that simultaneously enforces equality and inequality constraints throughout the diffusion process. Our framework incorporates both overdamped and underdamped dynamics for forward and backward sampling. A key algorithmic innovation is a computationally efficient landing mechanism that replaces costly and often ill-defined projections onto $Σ$, ensuring feasibility without iterative Newton solves or projection failures. By leveraging underdamped dynamics, we accelerate mixing toward the prior distribution, effectively alleviating the high simulation costs typically associated with constrained diffusion. Empirically, this approach reduces function evaluations and memory usage during both training and inference while preserving sample quality. On benchmarks featuring equality and mixed constraints, our method achieves comparable sample quality to state-of-the-art baselines while significantly reducing computational cost, providing a practical and scalable solution for diffusion on nonconvex feasible sets.

</details>


### [625] [Ranking Abuse via Strategic Pairwise Data Perturbations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17805)
*Junyi Yao,Zihao Zheng,Jiayu Long*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了基于最大似然估计（MLE）的成对排序系统（如Bradley-Terry模型）在对抗性数据操纵下的脆弱性，提出了自适应子集选择攻击（ASSA）方法，实验表明在有限扰动预算下少量战略选民即可显著改变全局排序，且存在相变行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MLE-based排序系统（如Bradley-Terry模型）被广泛用于偏好聚合，但其在策略性数据操纵下的鲁棒性尚未被充分理解，亟需系统性地研究其对抗性脆弱性。

Method: 将操纵任务形式化为带约束的组合优化问题，提出自适应子集选择攻击（ASSA）方法，高效识别高影响力扰动。

Result: 在合成数据和真实选举数据集上，MLE-based排序呈现尖锐的相变行为：超过较小的扰动预算后，有限数量的战略选民即可显著改变全局排序；ASSA在有限预算下始终优于随机和贪心基线方法。

Conclusion: MLE-based排序机制对结构化扰动存在根本性敏感，亟需更鲁棒的集体决策聚合方法。

Abstract: Pairwise ranking systems based on Maximum Likelihood Estimation (MLE), such as the Bradley-Terry model, are widely used to aggregate preferences from pairwise comparisons. However, their robustness under strategic data manipulation remains insufficiently understood.
  In this paper, we study the vulnerability of MLE-based ranking systems to adversarial perturbations. We formulate the manipulation task as a constrained combinatorial optimization problem and propose an Adaptive Subset Selection Attack (ASSA) to efficiently identify high-impact perturbations.
  Experimental results on both synthetic data and real-world election datasets show that MLE-based rankings exhibit a sharp phase-transition behavior: beyond a small perturbation budget, a limited number of strategic voters can significantly alter the global ranking. In particular, our method consistently outperforms random and greedy baselines under constrained budgets.
  These findings reveal a fundamental sensitivity of MLE-based ranking mechanisms to structured perturbations and highlight the need for more robust aggregation methods in collective decision-making systems.

</details>


### [626] [Solving Physics Olympiad via Reinforcement Learning on Physics Simulators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11805)
*Mihir Prabhudesai,Aryan Satpathy,Yangmin Li,Zheyang Qin,Nikash Bhardwaj,Amir Zadeh,Chuan Li,Katerina Fragkiadaki,Deepak Pathak*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出利用物理模拟器生成合成数据，通过强化学习训练LLM进行物理推理，实现了从模拟到真实物理基准的零样本迁移，在IPhO问题中提升5-10个百分点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM推理能力的提升高度依赖互联网问答数据，但这类数据规模有限且集中在数学等领域，物理等科学领域缺乏大规模QA数据集来训练具备推理能力的模型。

Method: 在物理引擎中生成随机场景，通过模拟交互创建合成问答对，然后使用强化学习在这些合成数据上训练LLM。

Result: 模型展现了零样本模拟到现实的迁移能力：仅使用合成模拟数据训练，在不同规模模型上使IPhO问题性能提升5-10个百分点。

Conclusion: 物理模拟器可作为可扩展的数据生成器，使LLM获得超越互联网规模QA数据限制的深层物理推理能力。

Abstract: We have witnessed remarkable advances in LLM reasoning capabilities with the advent of DeepSeek-R1. However, much of this progress has been fueled by the abundance of internet question-answer (QA) pairs, a major bottleneck going forward, since such data is limited in scale and concentrated mainly in domains like mathematics. In contrast, other sciences such as physics lack large-scale QA datasets to effectively train reasoning-capable models. In this work, we show that physics simulators can serve as a powerful alternative source of supervision for training LLMs for physical reasoning. We generate random scenes in physics engines, create synthetic question-answer pairs from simulated interactions, and train LLMs using reinforcement learning on this synthetic data. Our models exhibit zero-shot sim-to-real transfer to real-world physics benchmarks: for example, training solely on synthetic simulated data improves performance on IPhO (International Physics Olympiad) problems by 5-10 percentage points across model sizes. These results demonstrate that physics simulators can act as scalable data generators, enabling LLMs to acquire deep physical reasoning skills beyond the limitations of internet-scale QA data. Code available at: https://sim2reason.github.io/.

</details>


### [627] [TeleEmbedBench: A Multi-Corpus Embedding Benchmark for RAG in Telecommunications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17778)
*Pranshav Gajjar,Vijay K Shah*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出TeleEmbedBench，首个面向电信领域的大规模多语料嵌入基准，涵盖O-RAN、3GPP和srsRAN三类语料，通过LLM自动化构建9,000个问题-文本块对。评估发现LLM-based嵌入器（如Qwen3、EmbeddingGemma）显著优于传统句子变换器，且领域特定指令在代码检索中有益但会损害规范文本检索性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有通用嵌入基准无法捕捉电信领域文本密集缩写、高度交叉引用的特性，缺乏专门评估RAG管道中嵌入模型的基准。

Method: 构建TeleEmbedBench：覆盖O-RAN规范、3GPP文档和srsRAN代码三类异质语料，采用LLM自动化生成查询（主LLM生成+辅助LLM验证），设置512/1024/2048三种块大小，共9,000对。另构建TeleEmbedBench-Clean评估噪声鲁棒性。

Result: LLM-based嵌入器（Qwen3、EmbeddingGemma）在检索准确性和跨领域干扰鲁棒性上全面超越传统句子变换器。领域特定任务指令对原始代码检索有提升，但对自然语言规范检索反而产生负面效果。

Conclusion: TeleEmbedBench为电信领域RAG系统的嵌入模型评估提供了专业化基准，揭示了模型选择与指令策略对检索性能的关键影响。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in the telecommunications domain for critical tasks, relying heavily on Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to adapt general-purpose models to continuously evolving standards. However, a significant gap exists in evaluating the embedding models that power these RAG pipelines, as general-purpose benchmarks fail to capture the dense, acronym-heavy, and highly cross-referential nature of telecommunications corpora. To address this, we introduce TeleEmbedBench, the first large-scale, multi-corpus embedding benchmark designed specifically for telecommunications. The benchmark spans three heterogeneous corpora: O-RAN Alliance specifications, 3GPP release documents, and the srsRAN open-source codebase, comprising 9,000 question-chunk pairs across three standard chunk sizes (512, 1024, and 2048 tokens). To construct this dataset at scale without manual annotation bottlenecks, we employ a novel automated pipeline where one LLM generates specific queries from text chunks and a secondary LLM validates them across strict criteria. We comprehensively evaluate eight embedding models, spanning standard sentence-transformers and LLM-based embedders. Our results demonstrate that LLM-based embedders, such as Qwen3 and EmbeddingGemma, consistently and significantly outperform traditional sentence-transformers in both retrieval accuracy and robustness against cross-domain interference. Additionally, we introduce TeleEmbedBench-Clean to evaluate model robustness against noisy, incomplete user queries. Finally, our analysis reveals that while domain-specific task instructions improve embedder performance for raw source code, they paradoxically degrade retrieval performance for natural language telecommunications specifications.

</details>


### [628] [LLM-AUG: Robust Wireless Data Augmentation with In-Context Learning in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17770)
*Pranshav Gajjar,Manan Tiwari,Sayanta Seth,Vijay K. Shah*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出LLM-AUG，一种利用大语言模型上下文学习能力在嵌入空间中生成合成训练样本的数据增强框架，在调制分类和干扰分类任务上仅用15%标注数据即接近最优性能，并在低信噪比下比扩散模型方法提升29.4%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 无线通信领域深度学习面临数据稀缺问题，收集标注RF数据成本高、耗时长，现有生成式方法需训练任务专用模型，缺乏快速适配能力。

Method: LLM-AUG利用大语言模型的上下文学习能力，通过结构化提示词在学习的嵌入空间中直接生成合成训练样本，无需训练专用生成模型。

Result: 在RadioML 2016.10A和IC数据集上，LLM-AUG在低样本场景下优于传统增强和深度生成基线；仅用15%标注数据接近最优性能；低SNR下比扩散增强提升29.4%；RadioML和IC上分别比扩散基线提升67.6%和35.7%。

Conclusion: LLM可作为无线机器学习中有效且实用的数据增强器，在动态无线环境中实现鲁棒且数据高效的学习。

Abstract: Data scarcity remains a fundamental bottleneck in applying deep learning to wireless communication problems, particularly in scenarios where collecting labeled Radio Frequency (RF) data is expensive, time-consuming, or operationally constrained. This paper proposes LLM-AUG, a data augmentation framework that leverages in-context learning in large language models (LLMs) to generate synthetic training samples directly in a learned embedding space. Unlike conventional generative approaches that require training task-specific models, LLM-AUG performs data generation through structured prompting, enabling rapid adaptation in low-shot regimes. We evaluate LLM-AUG on two representative tasks: modulation classification and interference classification using the RadioML 2016.10A dataset, and the Interference Classification (IC) dataset respectively. Results show that LLM-AUG consistently outperforms traditional augmentation and deep generative baselines across low-shot settings and reaches near oracle performance using only 15% labeled data. LLM-AUG further demonstrates improved robustness under distribution shifts, yielding a 29.4% relative gain over diffusion-based augmentation at a lower SNR value. On the RadioML and IC datasets, LLM-AUG yields a relative gain of 67.6% and 35.7% over the diffusion-based baseline. The t-SNE visualizations further validate that synthetic samples generated by better preserve class structure in the embedding space, leading to more consistent and informative augmentations. These results demonstrate that LLMs can serve as effective and practical data augmenters for wireless machine learning, enabling robust and data-efficient learning in evolving wireless environments.

</details>


### [629] [HiP-LoRA: Budgeted Spectral Plasticity for Robust Low-Rank Adaptation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17751)
*Lixian Chen,Jianhong Tan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: HiP-LoRA是一种频谱感知的微调框架，通过将低秩更新分解为主通道（主导奇异子空间）和残差通道（正交补空间），并引入奇异值加权稳定性预算，解决了LoRA的频谱干扰问题，在Llama-3.1-8B上显著减少了预训练退化与多适配器合并失败。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LoRA的低秩更新会将能量集中在预训练权重的领先奇异方向上，干扰通用能力，导致灾难性遗忘和脆弱的适配器合并。本文旨在解决LoRA的频谱干扰问题。

Method: 提出HiP-LoRA框架：利用预训练层的缓存SVD，将更新分解为两个通道——主通道（在主导奇异子空间内）和残差低秩通道（在正交补空间中）。通过奇异值加权的稳定性预算持续平衡预训练行为保留与任务特定塑性。

Result: 在Llama-3.1-8B上，在匹配预算下，HiP-LoRA大幅降低了预训练退化与多适配器MergeFail，在持续微调、知识编辑等干扰敏感任务上鲁棒地优于基线方法。

Conclusion: HiP-LoRA通过频谱感知的分解与稳定性预算，有效缓解了LoRA的频谱干扰问题，在资源受限场景下实现了更稳定的微调与适配器合并。

Abstract: Adapting foundation models under resource budgets relies heavily on Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT), with LoRA being a standard modular solution. However, LoRA suffers from spectral interference. Low-rank updates often concentrate energy on the leading singular directions of pretrained weights, perturbing general capabilities and causing catastrophic forgetting and fragile multi-adapter merging. To resolve this, we propose HiP-LoRA, a spectrum-aware adaptation framework. Utilizing the cached singular value decomposition (SVD) of pretrained layers, HiP-LoRA decomposes updates into two channels: a principal channel within the dominant singular subspace, and a residual low-rank channel in the orthogonal complement. A singular-value-weighted stability budget on the principal channel continuously balances pretrained behavior preservation with task-specific plasticity. Experiments on Llama-3.1-8B demonstrate that under matched budgets, HiP-LoRA drastically reduces pretraining degradation and multi-adapter MergeFail, robustly outperforming baselines in interference-sensitive tasks like continual tuning and knowledge editing.

</details>


### [630] [Efficient Federated RLHF via Zeroth-Order Policy Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17747)
*Deyi Wang,Qining Zhang,Lei Ying*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向联邦强化学习人类反馈（RLHF）的高效算法 Par-S²ZPO，采用分区的、基于符号的随机零阶策略优化，在资源受限的边缘设备场景下实现了低通信、低计算和低内存复杂度，并在理论上证明了其收敛速率优于集中式方法，实验在 MuJoCo 任务上优于 FedAvg 基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在联邦学习环境下，RLHF 面临智能体资源受限（如边缘设备）的挑战，现有方法通信和计算开销大，亟需设计一种低复杂度的联邦 RLHF 算法。

Method: 提出 Par-S²ZPO 算法：基于零阶优化与二元扰动，通过分区（Partitioned）和符号化（Sign-based）策略降低通信、计算和内存复杂度。

Result: 理论分析证明了收敛速率的上界，表明其样本复杂度与集中式方法相当，但策略更新迭代收敛更快；实验在四个 MuJoCo 强化学习任务上优于基于 FedAvg 的 RLHF 方法。

Conclusion: Par-S²ZPO 是一种高效、低复杂度的联邦 RLHF 算法，在资源受限场景下具备理论保障和实际性能优势。

Abstract: This paper considers reinforcement learning from human feedback in a federated learning setting with resource-constrained agents, such as edge devices. We propose an efficient federated RLHF algorithm, named Partitioned, Sign-based Stochastic Zeroth-order Policy Optimization (Par-S$^2$ZPO). The algorithm is built on zeroth-order optimization with binary perturbation, resulting in low communication, computation, and memory complexity by design. Our theoretical analysis establishes an upper bound on the convergence rate of Par-S$^2$ZPO, revealing that it is as efficient as its centralized counterpart in terms of sample complexity but converges faster in terms of policy update iterations. Our experimental results show that it outperforms a FedAvg-based RLHF on four MuJoCo RL tasks.

</details>


### [631] [Tool Learning Needs Nothing More Than a Free 8B Language Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17739)
*Chenming Tang,Hsiu-Yuan Huang,Weijie Liu,Junqiang Zheng,Saiyong Yang,Yunfang Wu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TRUSTEE提出了一种无需人工标注数据、无需真实环境交互、完全由免费开源小模型（最低8B）模拟动态环境来训练工具调用智能体的方法，并通过自适应课程学习机制持续调控任务难度，在多个领域取得优于依赖外部资源的基线方法的效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的工具调用智能体训练方法要么依赖带标注数据的监督学习，要么依赖商业大模型构建固定的合成环境，成本高昂且缺乏动态性。作者希望探索能否仅用免费开源的小型语言模型来完全模拟训练环境（任务生成、用户模拟、工具模拟、轨迹评估），从而降低对昂贵外部资源的依赖。

Method: TRUSTEE包含四个由开源LM驱动的模块：任务生成、用户模拟、工具模拟和轨迹评估；并引入自适应课程学习机制，在训练过程中动态调整任务难度（如工具数量、操作步骤、语义复杂度等），形成从易到难的学习流程。

Result: TRUSTEE在多个领域上取得一致性的性能提升，超越了所有需要额外外部资源训练的基线方法。实验表明，即使仅使用8B参数的开源模型作为模拟环境骨干，也能达到强基线效果。

Conclusion: 该工作证明了在精心设计下，完全由本地小模型模拟的动态环境足以支撑高质量的工具调用智能体训练，无需昂贵的人工标注、真实用户交互、可执行工具或商用大模型构建的验证环境，为资源受限场景下的环境扩展提供了新范式。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become a prevalent paradigm for training tool calling agents, which typically requires online interactive environments. Existing approaches either rely on training data with ground truth annotations or require advanced commercial language models (LMs) to synthesize environments that keep fixed once created. In this work, we propose TRUSTEE, a data-free method training tool calling agents with dynamic environments fully simulated by free open-source LMs that can be as small as 8B, including task generation, user simulation, tool simulation and trajectory evaluation, paired with an adaptive curriculum learning mechanism that controls various aspects of the task difficulty dynamically during training. Our empirical results show that TRUSTEE brings consistent improvements across various domains and outperforms all the baselines which require extra external resources for training. These confirm that, with a sufficiently sophisticated design, even simulated environments with a local 8B LM as the backbone could set a strong baseline for tool learning, without expensive annotated data, realistic human interactions, executable tools or costly verifiable environments from human experts or commercial LMs. We hope our proposed paradigm could inspire future research on environment scaling with limited resources.

</details>


### [632] [SafeAnchor: Preventing Cumulative Safety Erosion in Continual Domain Adaptation of Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17691)
*Dongxin Guo,Jikun Wu,Siu Ming Yiu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SafeAnchor通过识别LoRA参数空间中的低秩安全子空间，约束领域梯度更新至正交补空间，并结合阈值触发式纠正重放，在多领域连续微调中保持93.2%的安全对齐性能，同时领域任务性能仅下降1.5个点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有大模型安全对齐在连续多领域微调场景下会累积退化，而所有现有安全保持方法仅针对单任务微调，未解决多领域序列适应问题。

Method: 1) 通过Fisher信息特征分解在LoRA参数空间中识别低秩安全子空间；2) 将领域特定梯度更新约束到该子空间的正交补空间；3) 使用阈值触发式纠正重放监控残余安全漂移。

Result: 在Llama-2-7B-Chat和Mistral-7B-Instruct上，跨三个领域流水线和八个基准测试，保留93.2%原始安全对齐，超越所有基线18-42个点，领域任务性能与无约束微调相差1.5个点以内。

Conclusion: SafeAnchor有效解决了多领域连续微调中的安全对齐退化问题，实现了安全保持与领域性能之间的最佳平衡。
