In this paper, we formulate two novel tasks, two-term subtraction and three-term operations, and construct the Image-Relation-Pair Dataset (IRPD) for benchmarking. We further propose Semantic Arithmetic Reinforcement Fine-Tuning (SAri-RFT), which post-trains large vision-language models (LVLMs) using a verifiable function and Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). Our method achieves state-of-the-art results on IRPD and the real-world Visual7W-Telling dataset. By equipping LVLMs with robust cross-modal relational reasoning, this work advances domestic robots' ability to ground symbolic reasoning in perception, enhancing decision-making, tool adaptability, and human-robot interaction in complex environments. Datasets and source code are provided in the supplementary material.

</details>


### [669] [Detecting Data Contamination in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19561)
*Juliusz Janicki,Savvas Chamezopoulos,Evangelos Kanoulas,Georgios Tsatsaronis*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文系统评估了针对大型语言模型的成员推理攻击方法，发现现有黑盒攻击方法在检测LLM训练数据成员资格方面效果不佳，AUC-ROC接近0.5，同时提出了一种新的熟悉度排序方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLMs使用大量数据进行训练，其中可能包含受版权保护的内容。成员推理攻击旨在检测特定文档是否被包含在LLMs的训练语料中。黑盒MIA需要大量数据操作，因此比较不同方法具有挑战性。研究旨在评估现有SOTA黑盒MIA方法在检测LLMs训练数据成员资格方面的有效性。

Method: 研究采用统一的数据集对多种SOTA黑盒成员推理攻击方法进行比较评估。同时开发了一种新方法——熟悉度排序，该方法通过给予LLMs更多表达自由来更好地理解其推理过程，从而探索黑盒MIA的可能途径。

Result: 所有方法在多个LLMs上的AUC-ROC均约为0.5，表明没有一种方法能够可靠地检测LLMs中的成员资格。对于更先进的LLMs，更高的真阳性率和假阳性率表明其具有更强的推理和泛化能力，这凸显了使用黑盒MIA检测LLMs成员资格的困难性。

Conclusion: 当前的黑盒成员推理攻击方法无法可靠地检测大型语言模型中的训练数据成员资格。更先进的LLMs由于其更强的推理和泛化能力，使得成员检测更加困难。熟悉度排序方法为理解LLMs推理提供了新视角，但成员推理攻击在LLMs领域仍面临重大挑战。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) utilize large amounts of data for their training, some of which may come from copyrighted sources. Membership Inference Attacks (MIA) aim to detect those documents and whether they have been included in the training corpora of the LLMs. The black-box MIAs require a significant amount of data manipulation; therefore, their comparison is often challenging. We study state-of-the-art (SOTA) MIAs under the black-box assumptions and compare them to each other using a unified set of datasets to determine if any of them can reliably detect membership under SOTA LLMs. In addition, a new method, called the Familiarity Ranking, was developed to showcase a possible approach to black-box MIAs, thereby giving LLMs more freedom in their expression to understand their reasoning better. The results indicate that none of the methods are capable of reliably detecting membership in LLMs, as shown by an AUC-ROC of approximately 0.5 for all methods across several LLMs. The higher TPR and FPR for more advanced LLMs indicate higher reasoning and generalizing capabilities, showcasing the difficulty of detecting membership in LLMs using black-box MIAs.

</details>


### [670] [DT2IT-MRM: Debiased Preference Construction and Iterative Training for Multimodal Reward Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19544)
*Zhihong Zhang,Jie Zhao,Xiaojian Huang,Jin Xu,Zhuodong Luo,Xin Liu,Jiansheng Wei,Xuejin Chen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: DT2IT-MRM提出了一种改进多模态奖励模型训练的方法，通过去偏好的偏好构建管道、文本到图像偏好数据重构和迭代训练框架，解决了现有多模态偏好数据集在粒度、文本风格偏差和可靠性方面的挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多模态偏好数据集存在三个关键问题：偏好强度缺乏粒度、文本风格偏差以及不可靠的偏好信号。此外，现有开源多模态偏好数据集存在大量噪声，且缺乏有效且可扩展的质量提升方法。

Method: DT2IT-MRM整合了三个核心组件：1) 去偏好的偏好构建管道；2) 文本到图像偏好数据的新重构方法；3) 迭代训练框架，用于优化现有多模态偏好数据集以支持多模态奖励模型训练。

Result: DT2IT-MRM在三个主要基准测试中实现了新的最先进性能：VL-RewardBench、Multimodal RewardBench和MM-RLHF-RewardBench。

Conclusion: 该方法有效解决了多模态偏好数据集的质量问题，为训练高质量的多模态奖励模型提供了可靠的数据基础，从而更好地对齐多模态大语言模型与人类偏好。

Abstract: Multimodal reward models (MRMs) play a crucial role in aligning Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) with human preferences. Training a good MRM requires high-quality multimodal preference data. However, existing preference datasets face three key challenges: lack of granularity in preference strength, textual style bias, and unreliable preference signals. Besides, existing open-source multimodal preference datasets suffer from substantial noise, yet there is a lack of effective and scalable curation methods to enhance their quality. To address these limitations, we propose \textbf{DT2IT-MRM}, which integrates a \textbf{D}ebiased preference construction pipeline, a novel reformulation of text-to-image (\textbf{T2I}) preference data, and an \textbf{I}terative \textbf{T}raining framework that curates existing multimodal preference datasets for \textbf{M}ultimodal \textbf{R}eward \textbf{M}odeling. Our experimental results show that DT2IT-MRM achieves new \textbf{state-of-the-art} overall performance on three major benchmarks: VL-RewardBench, Multimodal RewardBench, and MM-RLHF-RewardBench.

</details>


### [671] [Integrating Anomaly Detection into Agentic AI for Proactive Risk Management in Human Activity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19538)
*Farbod Zorriassatine,Ahmad Lotfi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 该论文提出将跌倒检测和预测作为异常检测问题，通过智能体AI系统解决现有系统在现实世界复杂性处理方面的局限性，并提出了一个概念框架来促进动态风险管理的协调方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有跌倒预防系统无法成为跨护理路径和安全关键环境的通用解决方案，主要受限于对现实世界复杂性的处理能力不足，包括情境感知差、误报率高、环境噪声和数据稀缺等问题。

Method: 将跌倒检测和预测重新定义为异常检测问题，提出采用智能体AI系统，并构建一个概念框架，强调通过动态选择相关工具并将其整合到自适应决策工作流程中，而非依赖针对狭窄定义场景的静态配置。

Result: 虽然技术实施细节超出了本文范围，但提出的概念框架突出了智能体AI在跌倒风险管理中的潜在价值，能够早期识别与风险增加相关的运动模式细微偏差。

Conclusion: 智能体AI系统为解决老年人跌倒风险提供了有前景的方向，通过将跌倒检测和预测作为异常检测问题，能够更好地处理现实世界复杂性，实现动态、自适应的风险管理方法。

Abstract: Agentic AI, with goal-directed, proactive, and autonomous decision-making capabilities, offers a compelling opportunity to address movement-related risks in human activity, including the persistent hazard of falls among elderly populations. Despite numerous approaches to fall mitigation through fall prediction and detection, existing systems have not yet functioned as universal solutions across care pathways and safety-critical environments. This is largely due to limitations in consistently handling real-world complexity, particularly poor context awareness, high false alarm rates, environmental noise, and data scarcity. We argue that fall detection and fall prediction can usefully be formulated as anomaly detection problems and more effectively addressed through an agentic AI system. More broadly, this perspective enables the early identification of subtle deviations in movement patterns associated with increased risk, whether arising from age-related decline, fatigue, or environmental factors. While technical requirements for immediate deployment are beyond the scope of this paper, we propose a conceptual framework that highlights potential value. This framework promotes a well-orchestrated approach to risk management by dynamically selecting relevant tools and integrating them into adaptive decision-making workflows, rather than relying on static configurations tailored to narrowly defined scenarios.

</details>


### [672] [SimDiff: Depth Pruning via Similarity and Difference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19520)
*Yuli Chen,Shuhao Zhang,Fanshen Meng,Bo Cheng,Jiale Han,Qiang Tong,Xiulei Liu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: SimDiff：一种新的层重要性准则，通过联合评估表示相似性和变换差异两个正交视角来改进深度剪枝，显著优于现有基线方法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度剪枝方法仅依赖余弦距离这一单维度启发式方法，在不同架构上表现出不可预测的性能甚至灾难性崩溃，需要更稳健的层重要性评估标准

Method: 提出SimDiff方法，从两个正交视角联合评估层重要性：1) 表示相似性；2) 变换差异，使用MSSD（对异常值敏感，识别决定性修正层）和MASD（稳健测量层平均贡献）两种不同指标量化差异

Result: 在0.5B到13B参数的多模型上实验表明，SimDiff显著优于SOTA基线，在25%剪枝率下保留LLaMA2-7B超过91%性能，在LLaMA3.1-8B上剪枝12层实现1.49倍推理加速，剪枝模型可通过最小微调有效恢复

Conclusion: SimDiff通过多维度层重要性评估解决了单维度启发式方法的局限性，为LLM深度剪枝提供了更可靠、高效的方法，显著提升部署效率

Abstract: Depth pruning improves the deployment efficiency of large language models (LLMs) by identifying and removing redundant layers. A widely accepted standard for this identification process is to measure the similarity between layers using cosine distance. However, we find that methods relying solely on this one-dimensional heuristic can exhibit unpredictable performance and even catastrophic collapse across different architectures. To address this issue, we propose SimDiff, a novel layer importance criterion that jointly evaluates layers from two orthogonal perspectives: representational similarity and transformation difference. The difference is quantified using two distinct metrics: MSSD, which is sensitive to outliers and identifies layers that make decisive corrections, and MASD, which robustly measures a layer's average contribution. Extensive experiments on multiple models ranging from 0.5B to 13B parameters demonstrate that SimDiff significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines across various pruning ratios. Notably, our method retains over 91% of LLaMA2-7B's performance at a 25% pruning ratio and achieves up to a 1.49x inference speedup when pruning 12 layers on LLaMA3.1-8B. We also show that pruned models can be effectively recovered with minimal fine-tuning.

</details>


### [673] [CoDA: Towards Effective Cross-domain Knowledge Transfer via CoT-guided Domain Adaptation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19488)
*Jianzhi Yan,Le Liu,Buzhou Tang,Yang Xiang,Dongning Sun,Zhiming Li*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: CoDA：通过轻量级适配器干预隐藏状态，结合特征蒸馏和MMD分布匹配，实现跨领域逻辑推理的知识迁移，显著提升LLM在领域稀缺场景下的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM在逻辑推理方面仍落后于人类水平，而上下文学习依赖高质量领域内示例。但在许多现实世界专业知识稀缺的领域（如低资源科学学科、新兴生物医学子领域或小众法律管辖区），高质量领域内演示样本有限或完全不可用，限制了这些方法的通用性。虽然已有研究探索使用跨领域样本作为替代演示，但由于源域和目标域之间的显著领域偏移，LLM难以有效识别和利用共享结构或潜在推理模式。

Method: 提出CoDA方法，采用轻量级适配器直接干预中间隐藏状态。结合基于特征的CoT增强参考表示蒸馏与最大均值差异（MMD）进行核化分布匹配，对齐源域和目标域的潜在推理表示。

Result: 在多个逻辑推理任务和不同模型家族上的广泛实验结果表明，CoDA显著优于先前的最先进基线方法，性能提升幅度很大。

Conclusion: CoDA通过直接干预隐藏状态并采用特征蒸馏和分布匹配技术，有效解决了跨领域知识迁移问题，显著提升了LLM在领域稀缺场景下的逻辑推理能力。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have achieved substantial advances in logical reasoning, yet they continue to lag behind human-level performance. In-context learning provides a viable solution that boosts the model's performance via prompting its input with expert-curated, in-domain exemplars. However, in many real-world, expertise-scarce domains, such as low-resource scientific disciplines, emerging biomedical subfields, or niche legal jurisdictions, such high-quality in-domain demonstrations are inherently limited or entirely unavailable, thereby constraining the general applicability of these approaches. To mitigate this limitation, recent efforts have explored the retrieval of cross-domain samples as surrogate in-context demonstrations. Nevertheless, the resulting gains remain modest. This is largely attributable to the pronounced domain shift between source and target distributions, which impedes the model's ability to effectively identify and exploit underlying shared structures or latent reasoning patterns. Consequently, when relying solely on raw textual prompting, LLMs struggle to abstract and transfer such cross-domain knowledge in a robust and systematic manner. To address these issues, we propose CoDA, which employs a lightweight adapter to directly intervene in the intermediate hidden states. By combining feature-based distillation of CoT-enriched reference representations with Maximum Mean Discrepancy (MMD) for kernelized distribution matching, our method aligns the latent reasoning representation of the source and target domains. Extensive experimental results on multiple logical reasoning tasks across various model families validate the efficacy of CoDA by significantly outperforming the previous state-of-the-art baselines by a large margin.

</details>


### [674] [Do LLMs Game Formalization? Evaluating Faithfulness in Logical Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19459)
*Kyuhee Kim,Auguste Poiroux,Antoine Bosselut*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 研究前沿模型在生成Lean 4证明时是否存在"形式化博弈"行为——即利用有效证明与忠实翻译之间的差距来生成技术上有效但不忠实于原始问题的证明。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 形式验证能保证证明的有效性，但不能保证形式化的忠实性。在自然语言逻辑推理中，模型需要从头构建公理系统而不受库约束，有效证明与忠实翻译之间的差距尤为突出。研究前沿模型是否利用这一差距来生成Lean 4证明（即"形式化博弈"行为）。

Method: 评估GPT-5和DeepSeek-R1在303个一阶逻辑问题（203个来自FOLIO，100个来自Multi-LogiEval）上的表现。比较统一生成方法与两阶段流水线方法（将形式化与证明分离）。统一生成直接生成完整证明，两阶段流水线先进行形式化再生成证明。使用专门设计的提示来鼓励博弈行为。

Result: 编译率高达87-99%，但在统一生成中未发现系统性博弈证据：模型更倾向于报告失败而非强制生成证明。两阶段流水线揭示了两种不同的不忠实模式：GPT-5在证明生成阶段捏造公理（可通过跨阶段比较检测），而DeepSeek-R1在形式化阶段误译前提（产生内部一致但完全逃避检测的输出）。

Conclusion: 高编译率或准确率不应等同于忠实推理。虽然未发现系统性博弈，但可能存在逃避检测信号的不忠实行为。两种模型表现出不同的不忠实模式：GPT-5采用反应性回退策略（捏造公理），DeepSeek-R1则在形式化阶段产生系统性误译。这强调了需要更细致的评估方法来检测形式化不忠实性。

Abstract: Formal verification guarantees proof validity but not formalization faithfulness. For natural-language logical reasoning, where models construct axiom systems from scratch without library constraints, this gap between valid proofs and faithful translations is especially acute. We investigate whether frontier models exploit this gap when generating Lean 4 proofs, a behavior we term formalization gaming.
  We evaluate GPT-5 and DeepSeek-R1 on 303 first-order logic problems (203 from FOLIO, 100 from Multi-LogiEval), comparing unified generation against a two-stage pipeline that separates formalization from proving. Despite compilation rates of 87-99%, we find no evidence of systematic gaming in unified generation: models prefer reporting failure over forcing proofs, even under prompting designed to encourage it. However, unfaithfulness that evades our detection signals may still occur. The two-stage pipeline reveals two distinct modes of unfaithfulness: GPT-5 fabricates axioms during proof generation, a reactive fallback detectable via cross-stage comparison, while DeepSeek-R1 mistranslates premises during formalization, producing internally consistent outputs that evade detection entirely. These findings show that high compilation rates or accuracies should not be equated with faithful reasoning. Code and data are available at https://github.com/koreankiwi99/formalization-gaming.

</details>


### [675] [Using large language models for embodied planning introduces systematic safety risks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18463)
*Tao Zhang,Kaixian Qu,Zhibin Li,Jiajun Wu,Marco Hutter,Manling Li,Fan Shi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: DESPITE基准测试评估LLM机器人规划安全性：规划能力随模型规模提升（0.4-99.3%），但安全认知保持平稳（38-57%），最优规划模型仍有28.3%危险计划。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型越来越多地用作机器人系统的规划器，但其规划安全性仍是一个开放问题。需要系统性地评估安全规划能力。

Method: 引入DESPITE基准测试，包含12,279个任务，涵盖物理和规范危险，具有完全确定性验证。评估了23个模型（包括18个开源模型3B-671B参数和5个专有模型）。

Result: 规划能力随模型规模显著提升（0.4-99.3%），但安全认知相对平稳（38-57%）。专有推理模型安全认知最高（71-81%），非推理专有模型和开源推理模型低于57%。最佳规划模型仅0.4%任务无有效计划，但28.3%产生危险计划。

Conclusion: 规划能力与安全认知存在乘法关系，更大模型主要通过改进规划而非危险规避来安全完成任务。随着前沿模型规划能力接近饱和，提高安全认知成为部署语言模型规划器的核心挑战。

Abstract: Large language models are increasingly used as planners for robotic systems, yet how safely they plan remains an open question. To evaluate safe planning systematically, we introduce DESPITE, a benchmark of 12,279 tasks spanning physical and normative dangers with fully deterministic validation. Across 23 models, even near-perfect planning ability does not ensure safety: the best-planning model fails to produce a valid plan on only 0.4% of tasks but produces dangerous plans on 28.3%. Among 18 open-source models from 3B to 671B parameters, planning ability improves substantially with scale (0.4-99.3%) while safety awareness remains relatively flat (38-57%). We identify a multiplicative relationship between these two capacities, showing that larger models complete more tasks safely primarily through improved planning, not through better danger avoidance. Three proprietary reasoning models reach notably higher safety awareness (71-81%), while non-reasoning proprietary models and open-source reasoning models remain below 57%. As planning ability approaches saturation for frontier models, improving safety awareness becomes a central challenge for deploying language-model planners in robotic systems.

</details>


### [676] [Four-Axis Decision Alignment for Long-Horizon Enterprise AI Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19457)
*Vasundra Srininvasan*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 论文提出将长时程企业智能体决策行为分解为四个正交对齐轴（事实精度、推理连贯性、合规重构、校准弃权），以解决传统单一成功率指标混淆不同失败模式的问题，并在受控基准测试中验证了该框架的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前长时程企业智能体（贷款审批、理赔裁定等）评估仅报告单一任务成功率，该指标混淆了不同的失败模式，且无法反映智能体是否满足部署环境的监管标准要求。需要更细粒度的评估框架来分离和测量智能体在不同维度上的对齐表现。

Method: 提出四轴对齐分解框架：事实精度（FRP）、推理连贯性（RCS）、合规重构（CRR）、校准弃权（CAR）。其中CRR是新颖的基于监管的轴，CAR是分离覆盖率和准确率的测量轴。在LongHorizon-Bench基准（贷款资格和保险理赔裁定）上进行验证，使用六种记忆架构，通过确定性真值构建进行测试。

Result: 分解框架揭示了聚合准确率无法观察到的结构：检索架构在事实精度上崩溃；模式锚定架构存在"脚手架税"；在事实保留提示下的简单摘要化在FRP、RCS、EDA和CRR上表现强劲；所有六种架构在每个案例上都做出决策，暴露了决策对齐轴的缺失。数据还反转了预注册的预测（摘要化会在事实回忆上失败），这种轴级反转被聚合准确率所掩盖。

Conclusion: 制度对齐（监管重构）和决策对齐（校准弃权）在当前对齐文献中代表性不足，但在决策离开实验室环境后变得至关重要。该框架可通过两个步骤转移到任何受监管决策领域：构建事实模式，校准CRR审计提示。

Abstract: Long-horizon enterprise agents make high-stakes decisions (loan underwriting, claims adjudication, clinical review, prior authorization) under lossy memory, multi-step reasoning, and binding regulatory constraints. Current evaluation reports a single task-success scalar that conflates distinct failure modes and hides whether an agent is aligned with the standards its deployment environment requires. We propose that long-horizon decision behavior decomposes into four orthogonal alignment axes, each independently measurable and failable: factual precision (FRP), reasoning coherence (RCS), compliance reconstruction (CRR), and calibrated abstention (CAR). CRR is a novel regulatory-grounded axis; CAR is a measurement axis separating coverage from accuracy. We exercise the decomposition on a controlled benchmark (LongHorizon-Bench) covering loan qualification and insurance claims adjudication with deterministic ground-truth construction. Running six memory architectures, we find structure aggregate accuracy cannot see: retrieval collapses on factual precision; schema-anchored architectures pay a scaffolding tax; plain summarization under a fact-preservation prompt is a strong baseline on FRP, RCS, EDA, and CRR; and all six architectures commit on every case, exposing a decisional-alignment axis the field has not targeted. The decomposition also surfaced a pre-registered prediction of our own, that summarization would fail factual recall, which the data reversed at large magnitude, an axis-level reversal aggregate accuracy would have hidden. Institutional alignment (regulatory reconstruction) and decisional alignment (calibrated abstention) are under-represented in the alignment literature and become load-bearing once decisions leave the laboratory. The framework transfers to any regulated decisioning domain via two steps: build a fact schema, and calibrate the CRR auditor prompt.

</details>


### [677] [GRASPrune: Global Gating for Budgeted Structured Pruning of Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19398)
*Ziyang Wang,Jiangfeng Xiao,Chuan Xiao,Ruoxiang Li,Rui Mao,Jianbin Qin*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: GRASPrune是一种结构化剪枝框架，可在预训练后联合剪枝FFN通道和KV头组，在单GPU上仅用少量校准数据实现50%参数压缩，保持模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型服务成本高昂，主要源于模型参数、注意力计算和KV缓存带来的内存和延迟开销。需要一种高效的剪枝方法在不进行全模型微调的情况下压缩模型规模。

Method: GRASPrune采用结构化剪枝框架，联合剪枝FFN通道和KV头组。使用投影直通估计器学习轻量级门控分数，在每一步都强制执行满足预算的硬掩码，同时保持骨干权重冻结。剪枝后通过校准保留单元的缩放因子来缓解剪枝引起的尺度不匹配问题，并将这些因子折叠到剪枝权重中，获得无需推理额外参数的小型密集检查点。

Result: 在LLaMA-2-7B上，GRASPrune移除50%参数，在WikiText-2上达到12.18困惑度，同时在五个基准测试中保持竞争力的平均零样本准确率。仅使用512个未标记校准序列在单个NVIDIA A100 80GB GPU上进行四个epoch训练，无需全模型微调。

Conclusion: GRASPrune提供了一种高效的结构化剪枝方法，能够在保持模型性能的同时显著减少LLM的参数量，降低服务成本，且计算开销极小。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are expensive to serve because model parameters, attention computation, and KV caches impose substantial memory and latency costs. We present GRASPrune, a structured pruning framework applied after pretraining that jointly prunes FFN channels and KV head groups under a single global budget. Instead of learning importance scores without constraints and applying the budget only after training, GRASPrune learns lightweight gate scores with a projected straight-through estimator that enforces a hard mask satisfying the budget at every step while keeping the backbone weights frozen. After the mask is fixed, we calibrate scaling factors on the retained units to mitigate scale mismatch caused by pruning, and fold these factors into the pruned weights to obtain a smaller dense checkpoint with no extra parameters at inference. On LLaMA-2-7B, GRASPrune removes 50% of parameters and achieves 12.18 perplexity on WikiText-2 while maintaining competitive average zero-shot accuracy on five benchmarks, using four epochs on 512 unlabeled calibration sequences on a single NVIDIA A100 80GB GPU without any full model fine-tuning.

</details>


### [678] [Towards Energy Impact on AI-Powered 6G IoT Networks: Centralized vs. Decentralized](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19377)
*Anjie Qiu,Donglin Wang,Sanket Partani,Andreas Weinand,Hans D. Schotten*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 分布式机器学习在6G物联网中能显著降低能耗，同时保持约90%的预测准确率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 6G技术为物联网机器学习应用带来新挑战，模型训练和数据传输能耗问题突出，需要优化以实现可持续系统设计

Method: 首先分析集中式和分布式架构的能耗模型，然后在德国铁路基础设施中部署测试平台，利用传感器数据进行基于机器学习的预测性维护，比较分布式与集中式学习架构

Result: 分布式模型保持约90%的竞争性预测准确率，同时将整体电力消耗降低高达70%

Conclusion: 分布式机器学习通过减少传输相关能耗，在真实世界物联网部署中具有显著提升能源效率的潜力

Abstract: The emergence of sixth-generation (6G) technologies has introduced new challenges and opportunities for machine learning (ML) applications in Internet of Things (IoT) networks, particularly concerning energy efficiency. As model training and data transmission contribute significantly to energy consumption, optimizing these processes has become critical for sustainable system design. This study first conduct analysis on the energy consumption model for both centralized and decentralized architecture and then presents a testbed deployed within the German railway infrastructure, leveraging sensor data for ML-based predictive maintenance. A comparative analysis of distributed versus Centralized Learning (CL) architectures reveals that distributed models maintain competitive predictive accuracy (~90%) while reducing overall electricity consumption by up to 70%. These findings underscore the potential of distributed ML to improve energy efficiency in real-world IoT deployments, particularly by mitigating transmission-related energy costs.

</details>


### [679] [Large Language Models Exhibit Normative Conformity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19301)
*Mikako Bito,Keita Nishimoto,Kimitaka Asatani,Ichiro Sakata*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 该研究区分了LLM中的信息性从众和规范性从众，发现多数LLM同时表现出两种从众倾向，且规范性从众的目标可通过社交情境操控，揭示了LLM-MAS决策易受少数恶意用户操纵的风险。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型（LLM）在基于LLM的多智能体系统（LLM-MAS）中表现出的从众偏差可能严重影响决策质量。先前研究多将"从众"简单视为意见改变，但缺乏从社会心理学机制层面区分信息性从众（追求准确判断）和规范性从众（避免冲突或获得群体接纳）的深入分析。

Method: 设计新任务区分信息性从众和规范性从众：信息性从众任务中参与者动机是做出准确判断；规范性从众任务中参与者动机是避免冲突或获得群体接纳。基于这些任务设置进行实验，评估六个LLM的从众行为，并通过操控社交情境的细微方面来测试规范性从众目标的可操控性，同时分析与两种从众相关的内部向量。

Result: 实验结果显示，在评估的六个LLM中，多达五个不仅表现出信息性从众倾向，也表现出规范性从众倾向。有趣的是，通过操控社交情境的细微方面，可以控制特定LLM规范性从众的目标对象。分析表明，虽然两种从众行为在外部表现为相同形式的"从众"，但可能由不同的内部机制驱动。

Conclusion: LLM-MAS的决策可能容易受到少数恶意用户的操纵。研究结果为了解"规范"如何在LLM中实现以及它们如何影响群体动态提供了初步里程碑，强调了区分不同类型从众机制的重要性，并为理解LLM社会行为的内在机制奠定了基础。

Abstract: The conformity bias exhibited by large language models (LLMs) can pose a significant challenge to decision-making in LLM-based multi-agent systems (LLM-MAS). While many prior studies have treated "conformity" simply as a matter of opinion change, this study introduces the social psychological distinction between informational conformity and normative conformity in order to understand LLM conformity at the mechanism level. Specifically, we design new tasks to distinguish between informational conformity, in which participants in a discussion are motivated to make accurate judgments, and normative conformity, in which participants are motivated to avoid conflict or gain acceptance within a group. We then conduct experiments based on these task settings. The experimental results show that, among the six LLMs evaluated, up to five exhibited tendencies toward not only informational conformity but also normative conformity. Furthermore, intriguingly, we demonstrate that by manipulating subtle aspects of the social context, it may be possible to control the target toward which a particular LLM directs its normative conformity. These findings suggest that decision-making in LLM-MAS may be vulnerable to manipulation by a small number of malicious users. In addition, through analysis of internal vectors associated with informational and normative conformity, we suggest that although both behaviors appear externally as the same form of "conformity," they may in fact be driven by distinct internal mechanisms. Taken together, these results may serve as an initial milestone toward understanding how "norms" are implemented in LLMs and how they influence group dynamics.

</details>


### [680] [Explicit Trait Inference for Multi-Agent Coordination](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19278)
*Suhaib Abdurahman,Etsuko Ishii,Katerina Margatina,Divya Bhargavi,Monica Sunkara,Yi Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出显式特质推断（ETI）方法，通过让智能体从交互历史中推断伙伴的温暖度和能力度两个心理维度特质，来改善LLM多智能体系统的协调性，在多种任务中显著提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM多智能体系统在处理复杂任务时存在协调失败问题，如目标漂移、错误级联和行为错位。现有方法缺乏对伙伴特质的结构化认知，限制了协调能力。

Method: 提出显式特质推断（ETI）方法，基于心理学理论，让智能体从交互历史中推断伙伴的两个核心心理维度：温暖度（如信任）和能力度（如技能），并利用这些特质信息指导决策。

Result: 在受控经济游戏中，ETI将收益损失减少45-77%；在更复杂的MultiAgentBench场景中，相比CoT基线性能提升3-29%。特质推断与性能提升密切相关，ETI生成的特质画像能预测智能体行为。

Conclusion: ETI是一种轻量且鲁棒的协调改进机制，首次系统证明LLM智能体能可靠地从交互历史中推断他人特质，并能利用结构化特质认知来改善多智能体协调。

Abstract: LLM-based multi-agent systems (MAS) show promise on complex tasks but remain prone to coordination failures such as goal drift, error cascades, and misaligned behaviors. We propose Explicit Trait Inference (ETI), a psychologically grounded method for improving coordination. ETI enables agents to infer and track partner characteristics along two established psychological dimensions--warmth (e.g., trust) and competence (e.g., skill)--from interaction histories to guide decisions. We evaluate ETI in controlled settings (economic games), where it reduces payoff loss by 45-77%, and in more realistic, complex multi-agent settings (MultiAgentBench), where it improves performance by 3-29% depending on the scenario and model, relative to a CoT baseline. Additional analysis shows that gains are closely linked to trait inference: ETI profiles predict agents' actions, and informative profiles drive improvements. These results highlight ETI as a lightweight and robust mechanism for improving coordination in diverse multi-agent settings, and provide the first systematic evidence that LLM agents can (i) reliably infer others' traits from interaction histories and (ii) leverage structured awareness of others' traits for coordination.

</details>


### [681] [UAF: A Unified Audio Front-end LLM for Full-Duplex Speech Interaction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19221)
*Yadong Li,Guoxin Wu,Haiping Hou,Biye Li*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出首个面向全双工语音系统的统一音频前端LLM（UAF），将VAD、TD、SR、ASR、QA等多种前端任务统一为自回归序列预测问题，显著提升实时交互的响应延迟和打断准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统级联语音处理流水线存在累积延迟、信息丢失和模块间错误传播等关键限制。虽然GPT-4o等端到端音频LLM统一了语音理解和生成，但大多是半双工的，且依赖VAD、TD等独立前端组件。开发语音助手时发现，优化语音前端与推进后端统一模型同等重要，需要填补这一空白。

Method: 提出统一音频前端LLM（UAF），将多种音频前端任务（VAD、TD、SR、ASR、QA）重新表述为单一自回归序列预测问题。模型以流式固定时长音频块（如600ms）为输入，利用参考音频提示在开始时锚定目标说话人，回归生成编码语义内容和系统级状态控制（如打断信号）的离散标记。

Result: 实验表明，该模型在多个音频前端任务上达到领先性能，并在实际交互场景中显著提升响应延迟和打断准确性。

Conclusion: UAF模型成功填补了全双工语音系统中统一前端处理的空白，通过将多种前端任务统一为单一自回归预测框架，实现了更流畅、响应更快的语音交互体验。

Abstract: Full-duplex speech interaction, as the most natural and intuitive mode of human communication, is driving artificial intelligence toward more human-like conversational systems. Traditional cascaded speech processing pipelines suffer from critical limitations, including accumulated latency, information loss, and error propagation across modules. To address these issues, recent efforts focus on the end-to-end audio large language models (LLMs) like GPT-4o, which primarily unify speech understanding and generation task. However, most of these models are inherently half-duplex, and rely on a suite of separate, task-specific front-end components, such as voice activity detection (VAD) and turn-taking detection (TD). In our development of speech assistant, we observed that optimizing the speech front-end is equally crucial as advancing the back-end unified model for achieving seamless, responsive interactions. To bridge this gap, we propose the first unified audio front-end LLM (UAF) tailored for full-duplex speech systems. Our model reformulates diverse audio front-end tasks into a single auto-regressive sequence prediction problem, including VAD, TD, speaker recognition (SR), automatic speech recognition (ASR) and question answer (QA). It takes streaming fixed-duration audio chunk (e.g., 600 ms) as input, leverages a reference audio prompt to anchor the target speaker at the beginning, and regressively generates discrete tokens encoding both semantic content and system-level state controls (e.g., interruption signals). Experiments demonstrate that our model achieves leading performance across multiple audio front-end tasks and significantly enhances response latency and interruption accuracy in real-world interaction scenarios.

</details>


### [682] [Reasoning-Aware AIGC Detection via Alignment and Reinforcement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19172)
*Zhao Wang,Max Xiong,Jianxun Lian,Zhicheng Dou*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出REVEAL框架用于AI生成内容检测，通过生成可解释推理链进行分类，使用两阶段训练策略，在多个基准测试中达到SOTA性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着大语言模型的快速发展和广泛应用，对可靠的AI生成内容检测需求日益增长，但现有方法在模型不断演进的背景下仍面临挑战

Method: 构建AIGC-text-bank多领域数据集，提出REVEAL检测框架：首先生成可解释推理链再分类，采用两阶段训练策略：监督微调建立推理能力，强化学习提升准确性、逻辑一致性并减少幻觉

Result: REVEAL在多个基准测试中达到最先进性能，提供鲁棒且透明的AIGC检测解决方案

Conclusion: REVEAL框架通过可解释推理链和两阶段训练策略，为AI生成内容检测提供了有效且透明的解决方案，项目已开源

Abstract: The rapid advancement and widespread adoption of Large Language Models (LLMs) have elevated the need for reliable AI-generated content (AIGC) detection, which remains challenging as models evolve. We introduce AIGC-text-bank, a comprehensive multi-domain dataset with diverse LLM sources and authorship scenarios, and propose REVEAL, a detection framework that generates interpretable reasoning chains before classification. Our approach uses a two-stage training strategy: supervised fine-tuning to establish reasoning capabilities, followed by reinforcement learning to improve accuracy, improve logical consistency, and reduce hallucinations. Extensive experiments show that REVEAL achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple benchmarks, offering a robust and transparent solution for AIGC detection. The project is open-source at https://aka.ms/reveal

</details>


### [683] [Has Automated Essay Scoring Reached Sufficient Accuracy? Deriving Achievable QWK Ceilings from Classical Test Theory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19131)
*Masaki Uto*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 论文提出了两种基于经典测试理论的数据集特定QWK上限：理论上限（完美预测潜在真实分数的理想模型可达到的最大QWK）和类人上限（具有人类水平评分误差的AES模型可达到的QWK），为AES模型性能评估提供更准确的基准。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动作文评分（AES）通常使用二次加权kappa（QWK）在公共基准上进行评估。但由于基准标签由人工评分者分配且不可避免地包含评分误差，因此不清楚理论上可达到的QWK是多少，以及实际部署需要达到什么水平。现有的人类-人类QWK作为上限参考可能低估了真实上限。

Method: 基于经典测试理论中的可靠性概念，推导出两种数据集特定的QWK上限。这些上限可以从标准双评分者基准中估计，无需额外标注。理论上限是完美预测潜在真实分数的理想模型在标签噪声下可达到的最大QWK；类人上限是具有人类水平评分误差的AES模型可达到的QWK。通过模拟实验验证提出的上限，并在真实基准上实验说明如何澄清现代AES模型的当前性能和剩余提升空间。

Result: 模拟实验验证了提出的上限的有效性。在真实基准上的实验表明，提出的上限能够更清晰地说明现代AES模型的当前性能和剩余提升空间。研究发现人类-人类QWK常常低估了真实上限，而提出的方法提供了更准确的性能评估基准。

Conclusion: 论文提出的两种QWK上限为AES模型性能评估提供了更准确的理论框架。理论上限明确了理想模型的最大可能性能，类人上限为实际部署提供了实用目标。这些上限有助于更清晰地评估AES模型的当前状态和未来改进方向，为AES研究和应用提供了重要的评估工具。

Abstract: Automated essay scoring (AES) is commonly evaluated on public benchmarks using quadratic weighted kappa (QWK). However, because benchmark labels are assigned by human raters and inevitably contain scoring errors, it remains unclear both what QWK is theoretically attainable and what level is practically sufficient for deployment. We therefore derive two dataset-specific QWK ceilings based on the reliability concept in classical test theory, which can be estimated from standard two-rater benchmarks without additional annotation. The first is the theoretical ceiling: the maximum QWK that an ideal AES model that perfectly predicts latent true scores can achieve under label noise. The second is the human-like ceiling: the QWK attainable by an AES model with human-level scoring error, providing a practical target when AES is intended to replace a single human rater. We further show that human--human QWK, often used as a ceiling reference, can underestimate the true ceiling. Simulation experiments validate the proposed ceilings, and experiments on real benchmarks illustrate how they clarify the current performance and remaining headroom of modern AES models.

</details>


### [684] [Rule-VLN: Bridging Perception and Compliance via Semantic Reasoning and Geometric Rectification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16993)
*Jiawen Wen,Penglei Sun,Wenjie Zhang,Suixuan Qiu,Weisheng Xu,Xiaofei Yang,Xiaowen Chu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出了Rule-VLN基准和SNRM模块，用于解决视觉语言导航中智能体忽视语义规则约束的问题，实现社会合规性导航。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前视觉语言导航(VLN)智能体存在"目标驱动陷阱"，过度关注物理可达性而忽视语义规则约束，缺乏社会合规性。随着具身AI向现实世界部署，导航任务需要从单纯可达性转向社会合规性。

Method: 1. 建立Rule-VLN基准：包含29k节点的大规模城市环境，在8k约束节点中注入177种监管类别，分为四个课程难度级别。2. 提出SNRM模块：零样本通用模块，包含粗到细的视觉感知VLM框架和用于动态绕路规划的认知心理地图，可增强预训练智能体的安全意识。

Result: Rule-VLN基准对现有最先进模型构成挑战，而SNRM模块显著恢复了导航能力：将CVR降低19.26%，TC提升5.97%。

Conclusion: 该工作填补了VLN领域规则合规性导航的空白，提出的Rule-VLN基准和SNRM模块为开发社会合规的具身AI导航系统提供了重要基础。

Abstract: As embodied AI transitions to real-world deployment, the success of the Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN) task tends to evolve from mere reachability to social compliance. However, current agents suffer from a "goal-driven trap", prioritizing physical geometry ("can I go?") over semantic rules ("may I go?"), frequently overlooking subtle regulatory constraints. To bridge this gap, we establish Rule-VLN, the first large-scale urban benchmark for rule-compliant navigation. Spanning a massive 29k-node environment, it injects 177 diverse regulatory categories into 8k constrained nodes across four curriculum levels, challenging agents with fine-grained visual and behavioral constraints. We further propose the Semantic Navigation Rectification Module (SNRM), a universal, zero-shot module designed to equip pre-trained agents with safety awareness. SNRM integrates a coarse-to-fine visual perception VLM framework with an epistemic mental map for dynamic detour planning. Experiments demonstrate that while Rule-VLN challenges state-of-the-art models, SNRM significantly restores navigation capabilities, reducing CVR by 19.26% and boosting TC by 5.97%.

</details>


### [685] [Towards Scalable Lifelong Knowledge Editing with Selective Knowledge Suppression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19089)
*Dahyun Jung,Jaewook Lee,Heuiseok Lim*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: LightEdit：一种轻量级终身知识编辑框架，通过检索相关知识和抑制原始知识概率，在减少训练成本的同时提升编辑稳定性和可扩展性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型需要频繁更新知识以反映变化的事实并减少幻觉。现有参数编辑方法在连续编辑时存在灾难性遗忘问题，而基于检索的方法由于训练成本高，在不同数据集上的适用性有限。需要一种更稳定、可扩展且成本效益高的终身知识编辑方法。

Method: LightEdit框架首先从检索信息中选择相关知识来有效修改查询，然后采用解码策略抑制模型的原始知识概率，从而基于所选信息实现高效编辑。该方法最小化训练成本，实现成本效益高的可扩展性。

Result: 在ZSRE、Counterfact和RIPE基准测试上的广泛实验表明，LightEdit优于现有的终身知识编辑方法。通过最小化训练成本，LightEdit实现了成本效益高的可扩展性，能够轻松适应各种数据集。

Conclusion: LightEdit通过结合检索选择和解码策略，解决了终身知识编辑中的稳定性和可扩展性问题，为大型语言模型的知识更新提供了一种高效、成本效益高的解决方案。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) require frequent knowledge updates to reflect changing facts and mitigate hallucinations. To meet this demand, lifelong knowledge editing has emerged as a continual approach to modify specific pieces of knowledge without retraining the entire model. Existing parameter editing methods struggle with stability during sequential edits due to catastrophic forgetting. While retrieval-based approaches are proposed to alleviate this issue, their applicability remains limited across various datasets because of high training costs. To address these limitations and enhance scalability in lifelong settings, we propose LightEdit. Our framework first selects relevant knowledge from retrieved information to modify the query effectively. It then incorporates a decoding strategy to suppress the model's original knowledge probabilities, thereby enabling efficient edits based on the selected information. Extensive experiments on ZSRE, Counterfact, and RIPE benchmarks demonstrate that LightEdit outperforms existing lifelong knowledge editing methods. Furthermore, by minimizing training costs, LightEdit achieves cost-effective scalability, enabling easy adaptation to various datasets.

</details>


### [686] [Personalized Benchmarking: Evaluating LLMs by Individual Preferences](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18943)
*Cristina Garbacea,Heran Wang,Chenhao Tan*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 个性化LLM基准测试的必要性：研究发现聚合基准无法反映个体偏好，用户模型排名与聚合排名相关性很低，需要基于用户特征（主题和写作风格）的个性化基准


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着大语言模型能力的提升和在现实任务中的部署，评估LLM与人类偏好的对齐变得日益重要。当前基准测试通过平均所有用户的偏好来计算聚合评分，忽视了在建立模型排名时考虑个体用户偏好。由于用户在不同情境下有不同偏好，需要开发个性化LLM基准来根据个体需求对模型进行排名。

Method: 使用ELO评分和Bradley-Terry系数为115名活跃的Chatbot Arena用户计算个性化模型排名，分析用户查询特征（主题和写作风格）与LLM排名变化的关系。通过主题建模和风格分析识别用户异质性，并展示主题和风格特征的紧凑组合可提供预测用户特定模型排名的有用特征空间。

Result: 个体LLM模型排名与聚合排名存在显著差异：Bradley-Terry相关性平均仅为ρ=0.04（57%的用户显示接近零或负相关性），ELO评分显示中等相关性（ρ=0.43）。用户表现出显著的主题兴趣和沟通风格异质性，这些因素影响其模型偏好。紧凑的主题和风格特征组合能有效预测用户特定模型排名。

Conclusion: 研究提供了强有力的量化证据，表明聚合基准测试无法捕捉大多数用户的个体偏好，并强调了开发根据个体用户偏好对LLM模型进行排名的个性化基准的重要性。

Abstract: With the rise in capabilities of large language models (LLMs) and their deployment in real-world tasks, evaluating LLM alignment with human preferences has become an important challenge. Current benchmarks average preferences across all users to compute aggregate ratings, overlooking individual user preferences when establishing model rankings. Since users have varying preferences in different contexts, we call for personalized LLM benchmarks that rank models according to individual needs. We compute personalized model rankings using ELO ratings and Bradley-Terry coefficients for 115 active Chatbot Arena users and analyze how user query characteristics (topics and writing style) relate to LLM ranking variations. We demonstrate that individual rankings of LLM models diverge dramatically from aggregate LLM rankings, with Bradley-Terry correlations averaging only $ρ= 0.04$ (57\% of users show near-zero or negative correlation) and ELO ratings showing moderate correlation ($ρ= 0.43$). Through topic modeling and style analysis, we find users exhibit substantial heterogeneity in topical interests and communication styles, influencing their model preferences. We further show that a compact combination of topic and style features provides a useful feature space for predicting user-specific model rankings. Our results provide strong quantitative evidence that aggregate benchmarks fail to capture individual preferences for most users, and highlight the importance of developing personalized benchmarks that rank LLM models according to individual user preferences.

</details>


### [687] [OLLM: Options-based Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19087)
*Shashank Sharma,Janina Hoffmann,Vinay Namboodiri*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: OLLM是一种通过离散潜在变量索引的"选项集"替代传统LLM单token预测的方法，显式建模多样性而非依赖温度或采样启发式，增强可控性和鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统LLM使用单token预测，依赖温度或采样启发式来产生多样性，缺乏对生成过程的显式控制和结构化变化建模，导致可控性不足和常见对齐问题。

Method: OLLM在预训练LLM的输出头前插入轻量级的编码器和解码器层，创建由离散潜在变量索引的下一token选项集，下游策略可在低维潜在空间中选择或搜索选项。

Result: 在1.7B参数骨干上（仅1.56%参数可训练），OLLM在数学推理任务中，最优潜在选择下可达~70%最终答案正确率，优于SOTA LoRA基线的51%。潜在空间策略学习显著提升样本效率并减少常见对齐问题。

Conclusion: 选项化下一token建模通过结构化潜在空间增强了LLM的可控性、鲁棒性和效率，潜在空间策略学习为LLM强化学习提供了有前景的方向，对齐性源于模型结构而非额外损失函数。

Abstract: We introduce Options LLM (OLLM), a simple, general method that replaces the single next-token prediction of standard LLMs with a \textit{set of learned options} for the next token, indexed by a discrete latent variable. Instead of relying on temperature or sampling heuristics to induce diversity, OLLM models variation explicitly: a small latent space parametrizes multiple plausible next-token options which can be selected or searched by a downstream policy. Architecturally, OLLM is a lightweight "plug-in" that inserts two layers: an encoder and a decoder, before the output head, allowing almost any pretrained LLM to be converted with minimal additional parameters. We apply OLLM to a 1.7B-parameter backbone (only $1.56\%$ of parameters trainable) trained on OpenMathReasoning and evaluated on OmniMath. The SOTA LoRA-adapted baselines peak at $51\%$ final answer correctness, while OLLM's option set allows up to $\sim 70\%$ under optimal latent selection. We then train a compact policy in the latent space that emits latents to control generation. Operating in a low-dimensional option space makes reward optimization far more sample-efficient and substantially reduces common misalignments (e.g., language switching or degenerate reasoning), as the policy is constrained to options learned during SFT. Crucially, this alignment arises from model structure rather than additional KL or handcrafted alignment losses. Our results demonstrate that optionized next-token modeling enhances controllability, robustness, and efficiency in math reasoning, and highlight latent-space policy learning as a promising direction for reinforcement learning in LLMs.

</details>


### [688] [Reinforcement Learning Improves LLM Accuracy and Reasoning in Disease Classification from Radiology Reports](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19060)
*Yishu Wei,Yi Lin,Adam Flanders,George Shih,Yifan Peng*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出两阶段方法：先监督微调疾病分类，再通过GRPO优化预测准确性和格式，无需推理监督，在放射学报告分类任务中表现优异


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从放射学报告中准确分类疾病对许多应用至关重要。虽然对轻量级LLM进行监督微调可以提高准确性，但可能会损害推理能力。需要一种既能保持高分类准确性又不损害推理能力的方法。

Method: 提出两阶段方法：1）第一阶段对疾病标签进行监督微调；2）第二阶段使用组相对策略优化（GRPO）通过优化准确性和格式来细化预测，无需推理监督。GRPO旨在保持分类性能的同时增强模型的推理能力。

Result: 在三个放射科医生标注的数据集上，监督微调方法优于基线模型，而GRPO进一步提高了分类性能，同时增强了推理召回率和全面性。这表明该方法在保持高分类准确性的同时改善了模型的推理能力。

Conclusion: 提出的两阶段方法（监督微调+GRPO）在放射学报告疾病分类任务中有效，既能提高分类准确性，又能增强模型的推理能力，无需额外的推理监督。

Abstract: Accurate disease classification from radiology reports is essential for many applications. While supervised fine-tuning (SFT) of lightweight LLMs improves accuracy, it can degrade reasoning. We propose a two-stage approach: SFT on disease labels followed by Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to refine predictions by optimizing accuracy and format without reasoning supervision. Across three radiologist-annotated datasets, SFT outperformed baselines and GRPO further improved classification and enhanced reasoning recall and comprehensiveness.

</details>


### [689] [Learning Lifted Action Models from Unsupervised Visual Traces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19043)
*Kai Xi,Stephen Gould,Sylvie Thiébaux*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 从状态图像序列中学习提升动作模型，无需动作观察，通过深度学习框架联合学习状态预测、动作预测和提升动作模型，并使用MILP防止预测崩溃和自增强错误。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在现实世界领域中应用AI规划需要高效构建能够捕捉动作前提条件和效果的模型。先前工作主要从状态和/或动作序列的高层描述中学习此类模型，但本文要解决更具挑战性的问题：从状态图像序列中学习提升动作模型，且无需动作观察。

Method: 提出深度学习框架，联合学习状态预测、动作预测和提升动作模型。引入混合整数线性规划(MILP)来防止预测崩溃和预测间的自增强错误。MILP在轨迹子集上获取预测的状态、动作和动作模型，求解逻辑一致的状态、动作和动作模型，使其尽可能接近原始预测。从MILP解中提取伪标签来指导进一步训练。

Result: 在多个领域进行的实验表明，集成基于MILP的校正有助于模型逃离局部最优解，并收敛到全局一致的解决方案。

Conclusion: 本文提出了一种从状态图像序列中学习提升动作模型的新方法，通过结合深度学习与MILP的逻辑一致性约束，有效解决了无动作观察条件下的动作模型学习问题，为现实世界AI规划应用提供了更实用的解决方案。

Abstract: Efficient construction of models capturing the preconditions and effects of actions is essential for applying AI planning in real-world domains. Extensive prior work has explored learning such models from high-level descriptions of state and/or action sequences. In this paper, we tackle a more challenging setting: learning lifted action models from sequences of state images, without action observation. We propose a deep learning framework that jointly learns state prediction, action prediction, and a lifted action model. We also introduce a mixed-integer linear program (MILP) to prevent prediction collapse and self-reinforcing errors among predictions. The MILP takes the predicted states, actions, and action model over a subset of traces and solves for logically consistent states, actions, and action model that are as close as possible to the original predictions. Pseudo-labels extracted from the MILP solution are then used to guide further training. Experiments across multiple domains show that integrating MILP-based correction helps the model escape local optima and converge toward globally consistent solutions.

</details>


### [690] [Plausible Reasoning and First-Order Plausible Logic](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19036)
*David Billington*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为"可信逻辑"的一阶逻辑系统，用于处理可信推理，定义了17条逻辑原则，并开发了8种推理算法来处理不同情境下的合理结论。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有逻辑系统难以处理可信陈述（通常为真但偶尔为假）的推理，需要一种不使用概率等数值方法就能进行可信推理的形式化逻辑系统。

Method: 提出17条可信推理逻辑原则（14条必要原则和3条期望原则），基于这些原则定义了一阶逻辑系统"可信逻辑"，并开发了8种不同的推理算法来处理不同推理情境。

Result: 可信逻辑满足除两条期望原则外的所有原则，并能正确处理所有可信推理示例。据作者所知，这是唯一满足这些要求的逻辑系统。

Conclusion: 可信逻辑为处理可信推理提供了一种有效的形式化框架，能够在不使用概率的情况下进行合理的非单调推理，填补了该领域的研究空白。

Abstract: Defeasible statements are statements that are likely, or probable, or usually true, but may occasionally be false. Plausible reasoning makes conclusions from statements that are either facts or defeasible statements without using numbers. So there are no probabilities or suchlike involved. Seventeen principles of logics that do plausible reasoning are suggested and several important plausible reasoning examples are considered. There are 14 necessary principles and 3 desirable principles, one of which is not formally stated. A first-order logic, called Plausible Logic (PL), is defined that satisfies all but two of the desirable principles and reasons correctly with all the examples. As far as we are aware, this is the only such logic. PL has 8 reasoning algorithms because, from a given plausible reasoning situation, there are different sensible conclusions. This article is a condensation of my book `Plausible Reasoning and Plausible Logic' (PRPL), which is to be submitted. Each section of this article corresponds to a chapter in PRPL, and vice versa. The proofs of all the results are in PRPL, so they are omitted in this article.

</details>


### [691] [DW-Bench: Benchmarking LLMs on Data Warehouse Graph Topology Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18964)
*Ahmed G. A. H Ahmed,C. Okan Sakar*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: DW-Bench是一个评估大语言模型在数据仓库模式上进行图拓扑推理的新基准，明确整合了外键和数据血缘边，包含1046个自动生成的可验证问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准在评估LLMs对数据仓库模式的理解能力方面存在不足，特别是缺乏对外键和数据血缘关系的综合考量，需要专门针对图拓扑推理的评估框架

Method: 创建了包含五个数据仓库模式的基准，自动生成1046个可验证正确的问题，明确整合外键和数据血缘边，评估LLMs在图拓扑推理任务上的表现

Result: 工具增强方法显著优于静态方法，但在困难的组合子类型上表现达到瓶颈，显示了当前LLMs在复杂图拓扑推理任务上的局限性

Conclusion: DW-Bench为评估LLMs在数据仓库模式上的图拓扑推理能力提供了有效的基准，揭示了工具增强方法的优势及其在复杂推理任务上的局限性，为未来研究指明了方向

Abstract: This paper introduces DW-Bench, a new benchmark that evaluates large language models (LLMs) on graph-topology reasoning over data warehouse schemas, explicitly integrating both foreign-key (FK) and data-lineage edges. The benchmark comprises 1,046 automatically generated, verifiably correct questions across five schemas. Experiments show that tool-augmented methods substantially outperform static approaches but plateau on hard compositional subtypes.

</details>


### [692] [Reasoning Structure Matters for Safety Alignment of Reasoning Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18946)
*Yeonjun In,Wonjoong Kim,Sangwu Park,Chanyoung Park*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: AltTrain：通过改变推理结构实现大推理模型安全对齐的简单后训练方法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大推理模型在复杂推理任务上表现优异，但面对恶意用户查询时经常生成有害响应。研究发现问题的根源在于推理结构本身，因此提出通过改变推理结构来实现有效的安全对齐。

Method: 提出AltTrain方法，这是一种简单有效的后训练方法，通过监督微调（SFT）显式改变大推理模型的推理结构。该方法无需复杂的强化学习训练或奖励设计，仅需1K轻量级训练样本。

Result: 实验在不同大推理模型主干和模型规模上验证了AltTrain的有效性，实现了强大的安全对齐，并在推理、问答、摘要和多语言设置中展现出稳健的泛化能力。

Conclusion: 通过改变推理结构是实现大推理模型安全对齐的有效途径，AltTrain方法简单实用且泛化性强，为模型安全对齐提供了新的解决方案。

Abstract: Large reasoning models (LRMs) achieve strong performance on complex reasoning tasks but often generate harmful responses to malicious user queries. This paper investigates the underlying cause of these safety risks and shows that the issue lies in the reasoning structure itself. Based on this insight, we claim that effective safety alignment can be achieved by altering the reasoning structure. We propose AltTrain, a simple yet effective post training method that explicitly alters the reasoning structure of LRMs. AltTrain is both practical and generalizable, requiring no complex reinforcement learning (RL) training or reward design, only supervised finetuning (SFT) with a lightweight 1K training examples. Experiments across LRM backbones and model sizes demonstrate strong safety alignment, along with robust generalization across reasoning, QA, summarization, and multilingual setting.

</details>


### [693] [ARES: Adaptive Red-Teaming and End-to-End Repair of Policy-Reward System](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18789)
*Jiacheng Liang,Yao Ma,Tharindu Kumarage,Satyapriya Krishna,Rahul Gupta,Kai-Wei Chang,Aram Galstyan,Charith Peris*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: ARES框架通过系统性发现和修复RLHF中的双重漏洞（核心LLM和奖励模型同时失效），提升语言模型的安全对齐鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RLHF方法存在关键漏洞：不完美的奖励模型可能成为单点故障，无法惩罚不安全行为。现有红队方法主要针对策略级弱点，忽略了系统性弱点——即核心LLM和奖励模型同时失效的情况。

Method: ARES框架采用"安全导师"动态组合语义连贯的对抗性提示（结合主题、角色、策略、目标等结构化组件），生成恶意和安全响应，同时暴露核心LLM和奖励模型的弱点。基于发现的漏洞，实施两阶段修复：先微调奖励模型以更好检测有害内容，再利用改进的奖励模型优化核心模型。

Result: 在多个对抗性安全基准测试中，ARES显著增强了安全鲁棒性，同时保持了模型能力，为全面的RLHF安全对齐建立了新范式。

Conclusion: ARES通过系统性发现和修复RLHF中的双重漏洞，提供了一种更全面的安全对齐方法，解决了现有红队方法忽略的核心LLM和奖励模型同时失效的问题。

Abstract: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) is central to aligning Large Language Models (LLMs), yet it introduces a critical vulnerability: an imperfect Reward Model (RM) can become a single point of failure when it fails to penalize unsafe behaviors. While existing red-teaming approaches primarily target policy-level weaknesses, they overlook what we term systemic weaknesses cases where both the core LLM and the RM fail in tandem.
  We present ARES, a framework that systematically discovers and mitigates such dual vulnerabilities. ARES employs a ``Safety Mentor'' that dynamically composes semantically coherent adversarial prompts by combining structured component types (topics, personas, tactics, goals) and generates corresponding malicious and safe responses. This dual-targeting approach exposes weaknesses in both the core LLM and the RM simultaneously. Using the vulnerabilities gained, ARES implements a two-stage repair process: first fine-tuning the RM to better detect harmful content, then leveraging the improved RM to optimize the core model. Experiments across multiple adversarial safety benchmarks demonstrate that ARES substantially enhances safety robustness while preserving model capabilities, establishing a new paradigm for comprehensive RLHF safety alignment.

</details>


### [694] [Error-free Training for MedMNIST Datasets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18916)
*Bo Deng*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出"人工特殊智能"概念，使机器学习分类模型能够无错误训练，避免重复犯错，在18个MedMNIST生物医学数据集上验证，除3个存在双标签问题的数据集外，其余均达到完美训练


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决机器学习分类模型中存在的重复错误问题，实现无错误训练，提升模型在生物医学数据分类任务中的准确性和可靠性

Method: 提出"人工特殊智能"概念，应用于18个MedMNIST生物医学数据集，识别并处理双标签问题

Result: 在18个数据集中，除3个存在双标签问题的数据集外，其余15个数据集均实现了完美训练，达到无错误分类

Conclusion: 人工特殊智能概念能够有效实现机器学习分类模型的无错误训练，但双标签问题仍是需要解决的技术挑战

Abstract: In this paper, we introduce a new concept called Artificial Special Intelligence by which Machine Learning models for the classification problem can be trained error-free, thus acquiring the capability of not making repeated mistakes. The method is applied to 18 MedMNIST biomedical datasets. Except for three datasets, which suffer from the double-labeling problem, all are trained to perfection.

</details>


### [695] [GIST: Multimodal Knowledge Extraction and Spatial Grounding via Intelligent Semantic Topology](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15495)
*Shivendra Agrawal,Bradley Hayes*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: GIST是一个多模态知识提取管道，将移动点云转换为语义标注的导航拓扑，用于密集环境中的空间定位和人机交互任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决零售店、仓库、医院等密集复杂环境中空间定位的挑战，传统视觉特征容易过时，长尾语义分布挑战传统计算机视觉，现有VLM在杂乱环境中的空间定位能力不足。

Method: 提出GIST多模态知识提取管道：将消费级移动点云转换为2D占用地图，提取拓扑布局，通过智能关键帧和语义选择叠加轻量级语义层，构建语义标注的导航拓扑。

Result: 实现了四个关键下游任务：意图驱动语义搜索（推断类别替代和区域）、一次性语义定位器（1.04米top-5平均平移误差）、区域分类模块（分割可行走平面为高级语义区域）、视觉基础指令生成器（合成地标丰富的自然语言路径）。多标准LLM评估中优于序列基线，现场形成性评估（N=5）导航成功率80%。

Conclusion: GIST通过结构化空间知识有效解决密集环境中的空间定位挑战，支持多种人机交互任务，验证了通用设计的可行性。

Abstract: Navigating complex, densely packed environments like retail stores, warehouses, and hospitals poses a significant spatial grounding challenge for humans and embodied AI. In these spaces, dense visual features quickly become stale given the quasi-static nature of items, and long-tail semantic distributions challenge traditional computer vision. While Vision-Language Models (VLMs) help assistive systems navigate semantically-rich spaces, they still struggle with spatial grounding in cluttered environments. We present GIST (Grounded Intelligent Semantic Topology), a multimodal knowledge extraction pipeline that transforms a consumer-grade mobile point cloud into a semantically annotated navigation topology. Our architecture distills the scene into a 2D occupancy map, extracts its topological layout, and overlays a lightweight semantic layer via intelligent keyframe and semantic selection. We demonstrate the versatility of this structured spatial knowledge through critical downstream Human-AI interaction tasks: (1) an intent-driven Semantic Search engine that actively infers categorical alternatives and zones when exact matches fail; (2) a one-shot Semantic Localizer achieving a 1.04 m top-5 mean translation error; (3) a Zone Classification module that segments the walkable floor plan into high-level semantic regions; and (4) a Visually-Grounded Instruction Generator that synthesizes optimal paths into egocentric, landmark-rich natural language routing. In multi-criteria LLM evaluations, GIST outperforms sequence-based instruction generation baselines. Finally, an in-situ formative evaluation (N=5) yields an 80% navigation success rate relying solely on verbal cues, validating the system's capacity for universal design.

</details>


### [696] [Formally Verified Patent Analysis via Dependent Type Theory: Machine-Checkable Certificates from a Hybrid AI + Lean 4 Pipeline](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18882)
*George Koomullil*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 首个基于依赖类型理论的交互式定理证明框架，用于专利分析，将专利权利要求编码为DAG，匹配强度作为已验证完全格元素，通过已验证单调函数传播置信度分数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有专利分析方法依赖人工专家分析（缓慢、不可扩展）或ML/NLP方法（概率性、不透明、非组合性），缺乏形式化验证的框架。本文旨在填补这一空白，将交互式定理证明应用于知识产权分析。

Method: 提出混合AI + Lean 4管道框架：将权利要求编码为Lean 4中的DAG，匹配强度作为已验证完全格元素，置信度通过已验证单调函数依赖传播。形式化五个IP用例（专利-产品映射、自由实施、权利要求解释敏感性、跨权利要求一致性、等同原则）和六个算法。DAG覆盖核心算法完全机器验证，高层定理保持非形式化证明草图。

Result: DAG覆盖核心算法（算法1b）在固定边界匹配分数后完全机器验证。结构引理、覆盖核心生成器和闭合路径恒等式"覆盖 = W_cov"在Lean 4中机器验证。高层用例的证明生成函数采用架构缓解（不信任生成器，其输出经过内核检查和无sorry公理审计）。

Conclusion: 这是首个将交互式定理证明应用于知识产权分析的框架，为专利分析提供了形式化验证基础。保证条件依赖于ML层：认证的是ML分数下游计算的数学正确性，而非分数本身的准确性。未来工作包括针对已裁决案例的验证。

Abstract: We present a formally verified framework for patent analysis as a hybrid AI + Lean 4 pipeline. The DAG-coverage core (Algorithm 1b) is fully machine-verified once bounded match scores are fixed. Freedom-to-operate, claim-construction sensitivity, cross-claim consistency, and doctrine-of-equivalents analyses are formalized at the specification level with kernel-checked candidate certificates. Existing patent-analysis approaches rely on manual expert analysis (slow, non-scalable) or ML/NLP methods (probabilistic, opaque, non-compositional). To our knowledge, this is the first framework that applies interactive theorem proving based on dependent type theory to intellectual property analysis. Claims are encoded as DAGs in Lean 4, match strengths as elements of a verified complete lattice, and confidence scores propagate through dependencies via proven-correct monotone functions. We formalize five IP use cases (patent-to-product mapping, freedom-to-operate, claim construction sensitivity, cross-claim consistency, doctrine of equivalents) via six algorithms. Structural lemmas, the coverage-core generator, and the closed-path identity coverage = W_cov are machine-verified in Lean 4. Higher-level theorems for the other use cases remain informal proof sketches, and their proof-generation functions are architecturally mitigated (untrusted generators whose outputs are kernel-checked and sorry-free axiom-audited). Guarantees are conditional on the ML layer: they certify mathematical correctness of computations downstream of ML scores, not the accuracy of the scores themselves. A case study on a synthetic memory-module claim demonstrates weighted coverage and construction-sensitivity analysis. Validation against adjudicated cases is future work.

</details>


### [697] [How Adversarial Environments Mislead Agentic AI?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18874)
*Zhonghao Zhan,Huichi Zhou,Zhenhao Li,Peiyuan Jing,Krinos Li,Hamed Haddadi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 论文识别了工具集成智能体中的信任缺口，提出了对抗性环境注入威胁模型，并通过POTEMKIN框架验证了智能体在虚假工具输出下的脆弱性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前对工具集成智能体的评估只关注其在良性环境下的能力（能否正确使用工具），而忽略了当工具提供虚假信息时的安全性问题。这种信任缺口使得智能体容易受到环境欺骗攻击。

Method: 提出对抗性环境注入威胁模型，开发了POTEMKIN框架（兼容MCP协议）进行即插即用的鲁棒性测试。识别了两种正交的攻击面：广度攻击（幻觉攻击）通过污染检索结果诱导认知漂移；深度攻击（迷宫攻击）利用结构陷阱导致策略崩溃进入无限循环。

Result: 在五个前沿智能体的11,000多次运行中，发现了显著的鲁棒性缺口：对一种攻击的抵抗往往增加对另一种攻击的脆弱性，表明认知鲁棒性和导航鲁棒性是两种不同的能力。

Conclusion: 工具集成智能体存在严重的信任漏洞，需要重新设计评估框架以同时测试性能和怀疑能力。对抗性环境注入是一种现实的威胁，智能体需要同时具备认知鲁棒性和导航鲁棒性来抵御不同类型的欺骗攻击。

Abstract: Tool-integrated agents are deployed on the premise that external tools ground their outputs in reality. Yet this very reliance creates a critical attack surface. Current evaluations benchmark capability in benign settings, asking "can the agent use tools correctly" but never "what if the tools lie". We identify this Trust Gap: agents are evaluated for performance, not for skepticism. We formalize this vulnerability as Adversarial Environmental Injection (AEI), a threat model where adversaries compromise tool outputs to deceive agents. AEI constitutes environmental deception: constructing a "fake world" of poisoned search results and fabricated reference networks around unsuspecting agents. We operationalize this via POTEMKIN, a Model Context Protocol (MCP)-compatible harness for plug-and-play robustness testing. We identify two orthogonal attack surfaces: The Illusion (breadth attacks) poison retrieval to induce epistemic drift toward false beliefs, while The Maze (depth attacks) exploit structural traps to cause policy collapse into infinite loops. Across 11,000+ runs on five frontier agents, we find a stark robustness gap: resistance to one attack often increases vulnerability to the other, demonstrating that epistemic and navigational robustness are distinct capabilities.

</details>


### [698] [MathNet: a Global Multimodal Benchmark for Mathematical Reasoning and Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18584)
*Shaden Alshammari,Kevin Wen,Abrar Zainal,Mark Hamilton,Navid Safaei,Sultan Albarakati,William T. Freeman,Antonio Torralba*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: MathNet是一个高质量、大规模、多模态、多语言的奥林匹克数学问题数据集和基准测试，包含30,676个专家编写的问题，涵盖47个国家、17种语言和20年的竞赛，用于评估生成模型的数学推理和嵌入系统的数学检索能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数学推理基准测试在规模、语言覆盖范围和任务多样性方面存在局限，无法充分评估大型语言和多模态模型的数学推理能力，特别是缺乏高质量的奥林匹克级数学问题数据集和专门的数学检索评估基准。

Method: 构建了包含30,676个专家编写问题的MathNet数据集，涵盖47个国家、17种语言和20年的奥林匹克数学竞赛。创建了由人类专家策划的数学等价和结构相似问题对的检索基准。支持三个任务：问题求解、数学感知检索和检索增强问题求解。

Result: 实验结果显示，即使是Gemini-3.1-Pro（78.4%）和GPT-5（69.3%）等最先进的推理模型也面临挑战，嵌入模型在检索等价问题方面表现不佳。检索增强生成性能对检索质量高度敏感，DeepSeek-V3.2-Speciale通过检索增强获得了高达12%的性能提升，在基准测试中取得最高分。

Conclusion: MathNet提供了最大的高质量奥林匹克数学数据集和首个数学问题检索评估基准，填补了现有基准在规模、语言覆盖和任务多样性方面的空白，为评估生成模型的数学推理和嵌入系统的数学检索能力提供了重要资源。

Abstract: Mathematical problem solving remains a challenging test of reasoning for large language and multimodal models, yet existing benchmarks are limited in size, language coverage, and task diversity. We introduce MathNet, a high-quality, large-scale, multimodal, and multilingual dataset of Olympiad-level math problems together with a benchmark for evaluating mathematical reasoning in generative models and mathematical retrieval in embedding-based systems. MathNet spans 47 countries, 17 languages, and two decades of competitions, comprising 30,676 expert-authored problems with solutions across diverse domains. In addition to the core dataset, we construct a retrieval benchmark consisting of mathematically equivalent and structurally similar problem pairs curated by human experts.
  MathNet supports three tasks: (i) Problem Solving, (ii) Math-Aware Retrieval, and (iii) Retrieval-Augmented Problem Solving. Experimental results show that even state-of-the-art reasoning models (78.4% for Gemini-3.1-Pro and 69.3% for GPT-5) remain challenged, while embedding models struggle to retrieve equivalent problems. We further show that retrieval-augmented generation performance is highly sensitive to retrieval quality; for example, DeepSeek-V3.2-Speciale achieves gains of up to 12%, obtaining the highest scores on the benchmark. MathNet provides the largest high-quality Olympiad dataset together with the first benchmark for evaluating mathematical problem retrieval, and we publicly release both the dataset and benchmark at https://mathnet.mit.edu.

</details>


### [699] [From Natural Language to Executable Narsese: A Neuro-Symbolic Benchmark and Pipeline for Reasoning with NARS](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18873)
*Mina Gabriel,Pei Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个神经符号框架，将自然语言推理问题转换为可执行的形式表示（一阶逻辑和Narsese），并创建了NARS-Reasoning-v0.1基准数据集，通过确定性编译管道和运行时验证确保符号目标的语义对齐。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型在语言生成方面表现出色，但在需要显式符号结构、多步推理和可解释不确定性的推理任务中仍然不可靠。为了解决这一问题，需要将自然语言推理问题转化为可执行的形式表示，以支持更可靠的神经符号推理系统。

Method: 1. 提出神经符号框架，将自然语言推理问题翻译为一阶逻辑（FOL）和Narsese（非公理推理系统语言）的可执行形式表示；2. 创建NARS-Reasoning-v0.1基准数据集，包含自然语言问题、FOL形式、可执行Narsese程序和三个黄金标签（真、假、不确定）；3. 开发从FOL到可执行Narsese的确定性编译管道；4. 在OpenNARS for Applications（ONA）中通过运行时执行验证保留的示例；5. 提出语言结构化感知（LSP）方法，训练LLM生成推理相关的符号结构而非仅最终语言响应；6. 作为概念验证，在NARS-Reasoning-v0.1上训练并发布Phi-2 LoRA适配器用于三标签推理分类。

Result: 1. 成功创建了NARS-Reasoning-v0.1基准数据集，包含配对的形式表示和黄金标签；2. 开发了从FOL到Narsese的确定性编译管道；3. 通过ONA运行时执行验证了符号目标的语义对齐；4. 展示了基准数据集支持监督适应的能力，训练了Phi-2 LoRA适配器用于三标签分类；5. 验证了可执行符号生成和执行验证作为实现更可靠神经符号推理系统的可行路径。

Conclusion: 该论文通过将自然语言推理问题转化为可执行的形式表示，并开发相应的编译管道和验证方法，为构建更可靠的神经符号推理系统提供了实用路径。可执行符号生成和基于执行的验证是实现具有显式符号结构、多步推理和可解释不确定性的可靠推理系统的关键方向。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are highly capable at language generation, but they remain unreliable when reasoning requires explicit symbolic structure, multi-step inference, and interpretable uncertainty. This paper presents a neuro-symbolic framework for translating natural-language reasoning problems into executable formal representations using first-order logic (FOL) and Narsese, the language of the Non-Axiomatic Reasoning System (NARS). To support this direction, we introduce NARS-Reasoning-v0.1, a benchmark of natural-language reasoning problems paired with FOL forms, executable Narsese programs, and three gold labels: True, False, and Uncertain. We develop a deterministic compilation pipeline from FOL to executable Narsese and validate retained examples through runtime execution in OpenNARS for Applications (ONA), ensuring that the symbolic targets are not only syntactically well formed but also behaviorally aligned with the intended answer. We further present Language-Structured Perception (LSP), a formulation in which an LLM is trained to produce reasoning-relevant symbolic structure rather than only a final verbal response. As an initial proof of concept, we also train and release a Phi-2 LoRA adapter on NARS-Reasoning-v0.1 for three-label reasoning classification, showing that the benchmark can support supervised adaptation in addition to executable evaluation. Overall, the paper positions executable symbolic generation and execution-based validation as a practical path toward more reliable neuro-symbolic reasoning systems.

</details>


### [700] [Human-Guided Harm Recovery for Computer Use Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18847)
*Christy Li,Sky CH-Wang,Andi Peng,Andreea Bobu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对LM智能体执行有害操作后的恢复机制，通过形式化"危害恢复"问题、构建偏好对齐的数据集和奖励模型，以及引入BackBench基准测试，系统性地解决了智能体安全中事后补救这一被忽视的挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LM智能体安全研究主要关注如何预防有害行为，但缺乏对危害发生后的有效恢复策略的研究。作者旨在填补这一空白，提出一种偏好对齐的恢复方案。

Method: 通过用户研究识别恢复维度并生成自然语言评分标准；构建包含1,150对成对判断的数据集；训练奖励模型对候选恢复计划进行重排序；引入BackBench基准（50个计算机使用任务）评估恢复能力。

Result: 奖励模型支架相比基础智能体和基于评分标准的支架，能生成更高质量的恢复轨迹；用户研究发现偏好存在上下文依赖的权重转移，如更倾向于实用、有针对性的策略而非全面的长期方案。

Conclusion: 本文为智能体安全开辟了新方向——不仅关注预防危害，更注重在危害发生后以对齐和意图引导的方式应对其后果。

Abstract: As LM agents gain the ability to execute actions on real computer systems, we need ways to not only prevent harmful actions at scale but also effectively remediate harm when prevention fails. We formalize a solution to this neglected challenge in post-execution safeguards as harm recovery: the problem of optimally steering an agent from a harmful state back to a safe one in alignment with human preferences. We ground preference-aligned recovery through a formative user study that identifies valued recovery dimensions and produces a natural language rubric. Our dataset of 1,150 pairwise judgments reveals context-dependent shifts in attribute importance, such as preferences for pragmatic, targeted strategies over comprehensive long-term approaches. We operationalize these learned insights in a reward model, re-ranking multiple candidate recovery plans generated by an agent scaffold at test time. To evaluate recovery capabilities systematically, we introduce BackBench, a benchmark of 50 computer-use tasks that test an agent's ability to recover from harmful states. Human evaluation shows our reward model scaffold yields higher-quality recovery trajectories than base agents and rubric-based scaffolds. Together, these contributions lay the foundation for a new class of agent safety methods -- ones that confront harm not only by preventing it, but by navigating its aftermath with alignment and intent.

</details>


### [701] [ADAPT: Benchmarking Commonsense Planning under Unspecified Affordance Constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14902)
*Pei-An Chen,Yong-Ching Liang,Jia-Fong Yeh,Hung-Ting Su,Yi-Ting Chen,Min Sun,Winston Hsu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出DynAfford基准和ADAPT模块，用于评估和增强具身智能体在动态环境中对物体可供性（affordance）的感知与推理能力，使智能体能够处理指令中未明确指定的动态条件变化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法通常直接执行指令，未考虑目标对象是否实际可操作（即缺乏可供性评估），导致在动态环境中无法应对意外条件和异常情况。

Method: 1. 构建DynAfford基准，评估智能体在动态环境中感知物体状态、推断隐含前提并调整行为的能力；2. 提出ADAPT模块，一种即插即用的插件，增强现有规划器显式的可供性推理能力；3. 采用LoRA微调的视觉语言模型作为可供性推断后端。

Result: ADAPT模块显著提升了智能体在已知和未知环境中的鲁棒性和任务成功率；领域适配的LoRA微调VLM在可供性推断上优于商用大模型GPT-4o。

Conclusion: 显式的可供性推理对于动态环境中具身智能体的可靠任务执行至关重要，任务对齐的可供性接地（affordance grounding）比通用大模型更有效。

Abstract: Intelligent embodied agents should not simply follow instructions, as real-world environments often involve unexpected conditions and exceptions. However, existing methods usually focus on directly executing instructions, without considering whether the target objects can actually be manipulated, meaning they fail to assess available affordances. To address this limitation, we introduce DynAfford, a benchmark that evaluates embodied agents in dynamic environments where object affordances may change over time and are not specified in the instruction. DynAfford requires agents to perceive object states, infer implicit preconditions, and adapt their actions accordingly. To enable this capability, we introduce ADAPT, a plug-and-play module that augments existing planners with explicit affordance reasoning. Experiments demonstrate that incorporating ADAPT significantly improves robustness and task success across both seen and unseen environments. We also show that a domain-adapted, LoRA-finetuned vision-language model used as the affordance inference backend outperforms a commercial LLM (GPT-4o), highlighting the importance of task-aligned affordance grounding.

</details>


### [702] [Beyond One Output: Visualizing and Comparing Distributions of Language Model Generations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18724)
*Emily Reif,Claire Yang,Jared Hwang,Deniz Nazar,Noah Smith,Jeff Heer*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出GROVE，一种将多个LM生成结果可视化为文本图重叠路径的交互式工具，帮助用户理解模型输出的分布结构（如模式、边缘情况和提示敏感性）。通过13名研究者的形成性研究和三组众包用户实验（共131人），验证了混合工作流的有效性：图摘要改善结构判断（如多样性评估），而直接输出检查更适合细节问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 用户通常通过单一输出来评估语言模型，但每个输出只是广泛分布中的一个样本，这隐藏了分布结构（如模式、边缘情况、对提示变化的敏感性），导致用户在开放式任务的提示迭代中过度依赖个别案例进行泛化。

Method: 1. 形成性研究：对13名使用LM的研究者进行调研，了解随机性在实践中何时重要、他们如何推理语言分布、以及现有工作流在哪些环节失效。2. 开发GROVE：一种交互式可视化工具，将多个LM生成结果表示为文本图中的重叠路径，揭示共享结构、分支点和聚类，同时保留对原始输出的访问。3. 三项众包用户研究（N=47, 44, 40）评估互补的分布性任务。

Result: 图摘要改善了结构判断（如评估多样性），而直接输出检查在细节导向的问题上表现更强。混合工作流是最优方案。

Conclusion: 支持混合工作流：图摘要改善结构判断，直接输出检查更适合细节问题。GROVE帮助用户更全面地理解LM输出的分布特性。

Abstract: Users typically interact with and evaluate language models via single outputs, but each output is just one sample from a broad distribution of possible completions. This interaction hides distributional structure such as modes, uncommon edge cases, and sensitivity to small prompt changes, leading users to over-generalize from anecdotes when iterating on prompts for open-ended tasks. Informed by a formative study with researchers who use LMs (n=13) examining when stochasticity matters in practice, how they reason about distributions over language, and where current workflows break down, we introduce GROVE. GROVE is an interactive visualization that represents multiple LM generations as overlapping paths through a text graph, revealing shared structure, branching points, and clusters while preserving access to raw outputs. We evaluate across three crowdsourced user studies (N=47, 44, and 40 participants) targeting complementary distributional tasks. Our results support a hybrid workflow: graph summaries improve structural judgments such as assessing diversity, while direct output inspection remains stronger for detail-oriented questions.

</details>


### [703] [ClawEnvKit: Automatic Environment Generation for Claw-Like Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18543)
*Xirui Li,Ming Li,Derry Xu,Wei-Lin Chiang,Ion Stoica,Cho-Jui Hsieh,Tianyi Zhou*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出ClawEnvKit自动化管道，能从自然语言描述生成多样化、可验证的爪型智能体环境；基于该管道构建了包含1040个环境的Auto-ClawEval基准，成本仅为人工的1/13800，并支持实时评估与适应性训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前为爪型智能体构建训练与评估环境的过程依赖人工、难以规模化，缺乏自动化生成多样化验证环境的流程。

Method: ClawEnvKit包含三个模块：解析器（从自然语言提取结构化参数）、生成器（产生任务规范、工具接口和评分配置）、验证器（确保可行性、多样性、结构有效性和内部一致性）。基于该管道构建Auto-ClawEval基准。

Result: Auto-ClawEval包含1040个环境、24个类别；在连贯性和清晰度上匹配或超越人工构建环境，成本降低13800倍；在4个模型家族和8个智能体框架上评估，框架工程可提升最高15.7个百分点，无模型达到饱和，自动化生成实现了此前不可行的规模化评估。

Conclusion: ClawEnvKit实现了从静态基准到实时、用户驱动的评估转变，并可作为按需训练环境生成器，自适应地生成针对智能体当前弱点的任务分布。

Abstract: Constructing environments for training and evaluating claw-like agents remains a manual, human-intensive process that does not scale. We argue that what is needed is not just a dataset, but an automated pipeline capable of generating diverse, verified environments on demand. To this end, we introduce ClawEnvKit, an autonomous generation pipeline that instantiates this formalism from natural language descriptions. The pipeline comprises three modules: (1) a parser that extracts structured generation parameters from natural language input; (2) a generator that produces the task specification, tool interface, and scoring configuration; and (3) a validator that enforces feasibility, diversity, structural validity, and internal consistency across the generated environments. Using ClawEnvKit, we construct Auto-ClawEval, the first large-scale benchmark for claw-like agents, comprising 1,040 environments across 24 categories. Empirically, Auto-ClawEval matches or exceeds human-curated environments on coherence and clarity at 13,800x lower cost. Evaluated across 4 model families and 8 agent harness frameworks, we find that harness engineering boosts performance by up to 15.7 percentage points over a bare ReAct baseline, completion remains the primary axis of variation with no model saturating the benchmark, and automated generation enables evaluation at a scale previously infeasible. Beyond static benchmarking, ClawEnvKit enables live evaluation: users describe a desired capability in natural language and obtain a verified environment on demand, turning evaluation into a continuous, user-driven process. The same mechanism serves as an on-demand training environment generator, producing task distributions that adapt to an agent's current weaknesses rather than being bounded by existing user logs.

</details>


### [704] [OGER: A Robust Offline-Guided Exploration Reward for Hybrid Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18530)
*Xinyu Ma,Mingzhou Xu,Xuebo Liu,Chang Jin,Qiang Wang,Derek F. Wong,Min Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: OGER提出了一种统一离线教师指导与在线强化学习的框架，通过多教师协作训练和基于熵的探索奖励机制，显著提升了大语言模型在数学推理和通用推理任务上的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）方法虽然提升了LLM的推理能力，但模型难以探索其初始潜在空间之外的新轨迹。离线教师指导和熵驱动策略缺乏深度整合，或受限于模型固有容量。

Method: OGER框架通过专门的奖励建模视角，统一了离线教师指导与在线强化学习。具体包括：(1) 多教师协作训练；(2) 构建辅助探索奖励，结合离线轨迹和模型自身熵来激励自主探索。

Result: 在数学推理和通用推理基准上，OGER显著优于竞争基线，在数学推理任务上取得实质性提升，并在域外任务上保持鲁棒的泛化能力。

Conclusion: OGER通过熵感知的奖励调制有效激励了模型的自主探索，消融实验验证了各组件的有效性。代码已开源。

Abstract: Recent advancements in Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) have significantly improved Large Language Model (LLM) reasoning, yet models often struggle to explore novel trajectories beyond their initial latent space. While offline teacher guidance and entropy-driven strategies have been proposed to address this, they often lack deep integration or are constrained by the model's inherent capacity. In this paper, we propose OGER, a novel framework that unifies offline teacher guidance and online reinforcement learning through a specialized reward modeling lens. OGER employs multi-teacher collaborative training and constructs an auxiliary exploration reward that leverages both offline trajectories and the model's own entropy to incentivize autonomous exploration. Extensive experiments across mathematical and general reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that OGER significantly outperforms competitive baselines, achieving substantial gains in mathematical reasoning while maintaining robust generalization to out-of-domain tasks. We provide a comprehensive analysis of training dynamics and conduct detailed ablation studies to validate the effectiveness of our entropy-aware reward modulation. Our code is available at https://github.com/ecoli-hit/OGER.git.

</details>


### [705] [Learning from Less: Measuring the Effectiveness of RLVR in Low Data and Compute Regimes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18381)
*Justin Bauer,Thomas Walshe,Derek Pham,Harit Vishwakarma,Armin Parchami,Frederic Sala,Paroma Varma*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究了在低数据资源条件下，使用可验证奖励强化学习（RLVR）微调小语言模型（SLM）的性能。通过三个程序化生成的数据集（计数、图推理、空间推理），发现：（1）程序化数据集可精细控制数据属性；（2）低复杂度任务训练可泛化到高复杂度任务；（3）混合复杂度训练在低数据场景下样本效率提升最高达5倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 以往RLVR研究关注数据与计算量扩展对推理能力的提升，但在实际场景中标注数据和计算资源往往稀缺。现有结果缺乏对低数据资源下SLM性能的系统研究，因此需要探索RLVR在数据受限条件下的有效性与规律。

Method: 通过三个程序化生成的数据集（数字计数、图推理、空间推理），系统性地控制数据集的大小、多样性和复杂度，在低数据资源条件下对开源小语言模型进行RLVR微调，评估其性能缩放规律。

Result: （1）程序化数据集支持对数据属性（大小、多样性、复杂度）的精细控制；（2）在低复杂度任务上训练的模型能够泛化到更高复杂度任务；（3）混合复杂度训练在低数据场景下表现最佳，相比仅训练简单任务，样本效率提升高达5倍。

Conclusion: 研究为RLVR数据缩放定律的制定提供了启示，并表明程序化数据生成器有助于理解高效微调LLM的有效数据开发策略。

Abstract: Fine-tuning Large Language Models (LLMs) typically relies on large quantities of high-quality annotated data, or questions with well-defined ground truth answers in the case of Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR). While previous work has explored the benefits to model reasoning capabilities by scaling both data and compute used for RLVR, these results lack applicability in many real-world settings where annotated data and accessible compute may be scarce. In this work, we present a comprehensive empirical study of open-source Small Language Model (SLM) performance after RLVR in low data regimes. Across three novel datasets covering number counting problems, graph reasoning, and spatial reasoning, we characterize how model performance scales with dataset size, diversity, and complexity. We demonstrate that (1) procedural datasets allow for fine-grained evaluation and training dataset development with controllable properties (size, diversity, and complexity), (2) under RLVR, models trained on lower complexity tasks can generalize to higher complexity tasks, and (3) training on mixed complexity datasets is associated with the greatest benefits in low data regimes, providing up to 5x sample efficiency versus training on easy tasks. These findings inspire future work on the development of data scaling laws for RLVR and the use of procedural data generators to further understand effective data development for efficient LLM fine-tuning.

</details>


### [706] [LLM Safety From Within: Detecting Harmful Content with Internal Representations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18519)
*Difan Jiao,Yilun Liu,Ye Yuan,Zhenwei Tang,Linfeng Du,Haolun Wu,Ashton Anderson*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: SIREN是一种轻量级守卫模型，通过利用LLM内部层的安全神经元（而非仅终端层），以极少的可训练参数（比现有模型少250倍）在有害内容检测上显著超越现有开源模型，并支持实时流式检测和高效推理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有最先进的守卫模型仅依赖终端层表示，忽略了LLM内部层中分布丰富的安全相关特征，导致检测性能受限。

Method: 通过线性探针识别安全神经元，并采用自适应层加权策略将这些内部特征整合，构建一个无需修改底层LLM的有害内容检测器。

Result: 在多个基准测试上显著优于现有开源守卫模型，可训练参数减少250倍；展现出更强的泛化能力，支持实时流式检测，推理效率大幅提升。

Conclusion: LLM内部状态是构建实用、高性能有害内容检测的有前景的基础。

Abstract: Guard models are widely used to detect harmful content in user prompts and LLM responses. However, state-of-the-art guard models rely solely on terminal-layer representations and overlook the rich safety-relevant features distributed across internal layers. We present SIREN, a lightweight guard model that harnesses these internal features. By identifying safety neurons via linear probing and combining them through an adaptive layer-weighted strategy, SIREN builds a harmfulness detector from LLM internals without modifying the underlying model. Our comprehensive evaluation shows that SIREN substantially outperforms state-of-the-art open-source guard models across multiple benchmarks while using 250 times fewer trainable parameters. Moreover, SIREN exhibits superior generalization to unseen benchmarks, naturally enables real-time streaming detection, and significantly improves inference efficiency compared to generative guard models. Overall, our results highlight LLM internal states as a promising foundation for practical, high-performance harmfulness detection.

</details>


### [707] [WorldDB: A Vector Graph-of-Worlds Memory Engine with Ontology-Aware Write-Time Reconciliation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18478)
*Harish Santhanalakshmi Ganesan*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: WorldDB 是一种基于递归世界（world）节点、内容寻址不可变存储和边即程序（edge-as-program）三大原则构建的记忆引擎，在 LongMemEval-s 上以 96.40% 总体准确率超越 Hydra DB（90.79%）和 Supermemory（85.20%），实现跨会话持久记忆、事实版本追踪与冲突消解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有持久记忆系统（RAG 平面向量存储、双时态知识图谱）缺乏递归组合、内容寻址不变性以及带行为的边类型，无法有效处理跨会话身份保持、事实替代、矛盾检测等长运行智能体系统所需的核心记忆能力。

Method: (i) 每个节点是一个"世界"（world），包含内部子图、本体范围与组合嵌入，可递归嵌套；(ii) 节点内容寻址且不可变，编辑产生新哈希并传播至所有祖先，形成 Merkle 式审计链；(iii) 边类型携带 on_insert/on_delete/on_query_rewrite 处理程序，将语义行为编码在边的写入时刻，禁止原始追加路径。
