Result: LongMemEval-s（500 题，~115k token 对话栈）上，WorldDB + Claude Opus 4.7 总体准确率 96.40%，任务平均 97.11%；超越 Hydra DB（90.79%）+5.61pp，Supermemory（85.20%）+11.20pp；单会话助手召回完美，时序推理 96.24%，知识更新 98.72%，偏好综合 96.67%；消融实验显示图层贡献 +7.0pp 任务平均准确率。

Conclusion: 递归世界结构 + 内容寻址不可变节点 + 边即程序的记忆引擎设计，能够有效替代平面向量存储和静态图结构，为长运行智能体系统提供具备审计性、冲突感知和语义行为的持久记忆基础设施。

Abstract: Persistent memory is the bottleneck separating stateless chatbots from long-running agentic systems. Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) over flat vector stores fragments facts into chunks, loses cross-session identity, and has no first-class notion of supersession or contradiction. Recent bitemporal knowledge-graph systems (Graphiti, Memento, Hydra DB) add typed edges and valid-time metadata, but the graph itself remains flat: no recursive composition, no content-addressed invariants on nodes, and edge types carry no behavior beyond a label. We present WorldDB, a memory engine built on three commitments: (i) every node is a world -- a container with its own interior subgraph, ontology scope, and composed embedding, recursive to arbitrary depth; (ii) nodes are content-addressed and immutable, so any edit produces a new hash at the node and every ancestor, giving a Merkle-style audit trail for free; (iii) edges are write-time programs -- each edge type ships on_insert/on_delete/on_query_rewrite handlers (supersession closes validity, contradicts preserves both sides, same_as stages a merge proposal), so no raw append path exists. On LongMemEval-s (500 questions, ~115k-token conversational stacks), WorldDB with Claude Opus 4.7 as answerer achieves 96.40% overall / 97.11% task-averaged accuracy, a +5.61pp improvement over the previously reported Hydra DB state-of-the-art (90.79%) and +11.20pp over Supermemory (85.20%), with perfect single-session-assistant recall and robust performance on temporal reasoning (96.24%), knowledge update (98.72%), and preference synthesis (96.67%). Ablations show that the engine's graph layer -- resolver-unified entities and typed refers_to edges -- contributes +7.0pp task-averaged independently of the underlying answerer.

</details>


### [708] [A Generalized Synthetic Control Method for Baseline Estimation in Demand Response Services](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18469)
*Jonas Sievers,Mardavij Roozbehani*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出一种广义合成控制方法（Generalized Synthetic Control Method），通过引入动态增强（动态回归项、滞后变量、外生特征）将经典SCM从静态估计器扩展为动态反事实预测框架，在电力需求响应基线估计任务中显著优于经典SCM及其他基准方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 电力市场中需求响应（DR）结算依赖于准确的基线估计，现有机器学习方法预测性能有限，而因果推断与反事实预测领域的方法在该场景下尚未被充分利用。经典合成控制法（SCM）虽提供了强大的反事实估计框架，但它是静态估计器，忽略了残差中的可预测时间结构。

Method: 将基线估计转化为动态反事实预测问题，在经典SCM的同期供体单元表示基础上，引入外生特征、滞后处理负荷以及选定的滞后供体信号作为增强表示，使估计器能够捕获自回归依赖、延迟供体-响应模式及误差修正效应。在线性加权不充分时，进一步兼容非线性预测器，在有限数据场景下获益最大。

Result: 在Ausgrid智能电表数据集上的实验表明，该方法在预测性能上持续优于经典SCM及多个强基准方法，主要的性能提升来源于动态增强模块。

Conclusion: 广义合成控制法通过动态化扩展有效提升了DR基线估计的准确性，弥合了因果推断方法与电力市场应用之间的差距，尤其适用于有限数据场景。

Abstract: Baseline estimation is critical to Demand Response (DR) settlement in electricity markets, yet existing machine learning methods remain limited in predictive performance, while methodologies from causal inference and counterfactual prediction are still underutilized in this domain. We introduce a Generalized Synthetic Control Method that builds on the classical Synthetic Control Method (SCM) from econometrics. While SCM provides a powerful framework for counterfactual estimation, classical SCM remains a static estimator: it fits the treated unit as a combination of contemporaneous donor units and therefore ignores predictable temporal structure in the residual error. We develop a generalized SCM framework that transforms baseline estimation into a dynamic counterfactual prediction problem by augmenting the donor representation with exogenous features, lagged treated load, and selected lagged donor signals. This enriched representation allows the estimator to capture autoregressive dependence, delayed donor-response patterns, and error-correction effects beyond the scope of standard SCM. The framework further accommodates nonlinear predictors when linear weighting is inadequate, with the greatest benefit arising in limited-data settings. Experiments on the Ausgrid smart-meter dataset show consistent improvements over classical SCM and strong benchmark methods, with the dominant performance gains driven by dynamic augmentation.

</details>


### [709] [Six Llamas: Comparative Religious Ethics Through LoRA-Adapted Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18404)
*Chad Coleman,W. Russell Neuman,Manan Shah,Ali Dasdan,Matthew Crispi,Morris Chiang,Zack Leitman,Mustafa Poonawala*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 通过对Meta-Llama-3.1-8B模型进行五种宗教（基督教、伊斯兰教、犹太教、印度教、佛教）语料的LoRA微调，构建"六只羊驼"模型，在17个标准化伦理提示下测试其道德推理模式。结果表明：微调模型产生了系统性的、与各自宗教传统道德逻辑一致的伦理推理差异；电车难题在所有模型和温度下100%一致；在道德争议领域，宗教特异性分歧随温度升高而加剧；基础模型表现出最高的整体响应一致性（均值88.3%），说明LoRA适应既引入了传统特异性信号也增加了采样敏感性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究大语言模型在特定宗教语料上微调后，是否会编码出系统性的、可区分的伦理推理模式，从而验证LLMs能否作为文化与伦理分析的比较研究工具。

Method: 以Meta-Llama-3.1-8B为基础，通过LoRA方法分别在基督教、伊斯兰教、犹太教、印度教、佛教的神圣文本与神学文献上微调，构建5个宗教变体模型，加1个未修改的对照组。使用17个标准化伦理提示（涵盖道德困境、博弈论场景、公共政策问题、道德心理自评）进行探测，采用多温度采样（10个温度设置），计算响应一致性指标、成对模型间一致率、温度敏感性系数和运行间稳定性分析。

Result: LoRA微调模型产生了与基础模型系统性的伦理推理差异，且与各自训练传统的道德逻辑一致；电车难题在所有模型和温度下保持100%一致性；在高共识困境中核心伦理立场随温度变化保持稳定；在道德争议领域，宗教特异性分歧在高温下加剧；基础模型响应一致性最高（均值88.3%），LoRA适应在引入传统特异性信号的同时增加了采样敏感性。

Conclusion: 该研究提供了利用差异训练的语言模型作为文化与伦理分析工具的"凝聚态比较方法"概念验证，并提出了具体的可证伪性标准及后续扩展计划。

Abstract: We present Six Llamas, a comparative study examining whether large language models fine-tuned on distinct religious corpora encode systematically different patterns of ethical reasoning. Six variants of Meta-Llama-3.1-8B are constructed: one unmodified control and five LoRA-adapted models trained exclusively on the sacred and theological texts of Christianity, Islam, Judaism, Hinduism, or Buddhism. All six models are probed with an identical battery of 17 standardized ethical prompts spanning moral dilemmas, game-theoretic scenarios, public policy questions, and moral-psychological self-assessments. To assess robustness and reproducibility, we implement a multi-temperature sampling design spanning ten temperature settings. We compute response consistency metrics, pairwise inter-model agreement rates, temperature sensitivity coefficients across four prompt domains, and run-to-run stability analyses.
  Findings show that LoRA-adapted models produce ethical reasoning patterns that are (a) systematically differentiated from the base model, (b) consistent with the moral logics of their training traditions, (c) structured along interpretable dimensions in moral-philosophical space, (d) core ethical positions remain stable across temperature variations for high-consensus dilemmas. The Trolley Problem achieves 100% consistency across all models and temperatures, while (e) tradition-specific divergence intensifies at higher temperatures in morally contested domains, and (f) the base model exhibits the highest overall response consistency (mean 88.3%), suggesting LoRA adaptation introduces both tradition-specific signal and increased sampling sensitivity.
  The study offers a proof-of-concept for the condensate comparative method using differentially trained language models as instruments for cultural and ethical analysis and identifies specific criteria for falsification and planned extensions.

</details>


### [710] [Evolutionary Negative Module Pruning for Better LoRA Merging](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17753)
*Anda Cao,Zhuo Gou,Yi Wang,Kaixuan Chen,Yu Wang,Can Wang,Mingli Song,Jie Song*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文发现LoRA融合中存在"负模块"（即某些LoRA层在融合后会降低全局性能），并提出进化负模块剪枝（ENMP）方法，通过进化搜索策略在融合前定位并剔除这些有害模块，显著提升了多任务融合性能，在语言和视觉领域均达到新SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LoRA融合方法（如权重插值、子空间对齐）隐含假设所有LoRA矩阵对融合模型都有正向贡献，但实际存在某些LoRA层在融合后会损害全局性能，目前缺乏有效识别和剔除这些"负模块"的手段。

Method: 提出ENMP（进化负模块剪枝），一种即插即用的LoRA剪枝方法。利用进化搜索策略在离散、不可微的模块选择空间中进行优化，定位并排除融合前会降低性能的负模块。

Result: 大量实验表明ENMP能持续提升现有融合算法的性能，在语言和视觉领域均达到新的最优结果。

Conclusion: 本文揭示了LoRA融合中负模块的存在是当前融合范式的关键瓶颈，ENMP通过进化搜索有效解决了这一问题，为多任务高效部署提供了更优方案。

Abstract: Merging multiple Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) experts into a single backbone is a promising approach for efficient multi-task deployment. While existing methods strive to alleviate interference via weight interpolation or subspace alignment, they rest upon the implicit assumption that all LoRA matrices contribute constructively to the merged model. In this paper, we uncover a critical bottleneck in current merging paradigms: the existence of $\textit{negative modules}$ -- specific LoRA layers that inherently degrade global performance upon merging. We propose $\textbf{E}$volutionary $\textbf{N}$egative $\textbf{M}$odule $\textbf{P}$runing ($\textbf{ENMP}$), a plug-and-play LoRA pruning method to locate and exclude these detrimental modules prior to merging. By leveraging an evolutionary search strategy, ENMP effectively navigates the discrete, non-differentiable landscape of module selection to identify optimal pruning configurations. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that ENMP consistently boosts the performance of existing merging algorithms, achieving a new state-of-the-art across both language and vision domains. Code is available at https://github.com/CaoAnda/ENMP-LoRAMerging.

</details>


### [711] [The implicated scientist: on the role of AI researchers in the development of weapons systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18380)
*Alexandra Volokhova,Alex Hernandez-Garcia*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文探讨了AI研究人员在AI武器化所导致的大规模杀伤和不平等中的责任与牵连，并提出将这种牵连转化为与受害者建立差异化、远距离团结的路径。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前AI技术被广泛应用于现代武器系统，已造成大规模杀伤和破坏，同时大国间正加速AI军备竞赛，可能导致更多死亡、破坏及权力与财富不平等加剧。研究者希望揭示AI研究人员在此过程中的被牵连角色。

Method: 通过分析AI研究人员作为被牵连主体在AI武器化危害中的角色，讨论这种牵连的具体性质，并探索将牵连位置转化为差异化、远距离团结的方式。

Result: 揭示了AI研究人员在AI武器化导致的不公正中处于被牵连地位，并提出了转变这种地位的理论可能性。

Conclusion: AI研究人员应当认识到自身在AI武器化中的道德牵连，并寻求与受害者建立差异化、远距离的团结关系，以回应技术强化下的不公正。

Abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) technologies are increasingly used in modern weapons systems. Notably, these systems have recently been involved in mass killings and destruction at scale. Furthermore, there is currently a strong interest and competition among powerful players to accelerate the proliferation of weapons with automated or AI-based components, a phenomenon known as AI arms race. This competition poses a risk of causing even more deaths and devastation in the future, as well as increased power and wealth inequality. In this work, we aim to shed light on the role of AI researchers as implicated subjects in the harms caused by weapons enabled by AI technologies. We investigate and discuss the specifics of this implication and explore ways to transfigure this position of implication into one of differentiated, long-distance solidarity with the victims of technologically fortified injustices.

</details>


### [712] [Training and Agentic Inference Strategies for LLM-based Manim Animation Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18364)
*Ravidu Suien Rammuni Silva,Ahmad Lotfi,Isibor Kennedy Ihianle,Golnaz Shahtahmassebi,Jordan J. Bird*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出ManimTrainer（结合SFT与GRPO的统一训练管道）和ManimAgent（含渲染器在环RITL及文档增强RITL-DOC的推理策略），系统研究了17个开源子30B LLM在Manim动画生成中的训练与推理策略交互。Qwen 3 Coder 30B模型配合GRPO和RITL-DOC达到最优性能（RSR 94%, VS 85.7%），超越GPT-4.1。研究发现SFT提升代码质量，GRPO增强视觉输出和推理时自纠错能力，代码与视觉指标的相关性在训练后增强但在推理增强后减弱。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM在生成程序化动画（如Manim）时面临空间推理、时间序列和领域特定API不熟悉等挑战，且缺乏对训练与推理策略在该场景下交互作用的系统性研究。

Method: 提出ManimTrainer训练管道（SFT+基于GRPO的强化学习，使用融合代码评估与视觉评估的统一奖励信号）和ManimAgent推理管道（RITL策略与RITL-DOC策略），在ManimBench上对17个开源子30B LLM进行九种训练与推理策略组合的系统评估。

Result: Qwen 3 Coder 30B模型经GRPO训练并配合RITL-DOC推理达到最高性能：RSR 94%，VS 85.7%，VS超过GPT-4.1基线3个百分点。SFT提升代码质量，GRPO提升视觉输出及推理时对反馈信号的响应能力。训练后代码与视觉指标相关性增强，但推理增强后相关性减弱。

Conclusion: 训练策略（SFT、GRPO）与推理策略（RITL、RITL-DOC）在Manim动画生成中具有互补作用：训练提升基础能力，推理增强自纠错能力，两者结合可超越闭源大模型。

Abstract: Generating programmatic animation using libraries such as Manim presents unique challenges for Large Language Models (LLMs), requiring spatial reasoning, temporal sequencing, and familiarity with domain-specific APIs that are underrepresented in general pre-training data. A systematic study of how training and inference strategies interact in this setting is lacking in current research. This study introduces ManimTrainer, a training pipeline that combines Supervised Fine-tuning (SFT) with Reinforcement Learning (RL) based Group Relative Policy Optimisation (GRPO) using a unified reward signal that fuses code and visual assessment signals, and ManimAgent, an inference pipeline featuring Renderer-in-the-loop (RITL) and API documentation-augmented RITL (RITL-DOC) strategies. Using these techniques, this study presents the first unified training and inference study for text-to-code-to-video transformation with Manim. It evaluates 17 open-source sub-30B LLMs across nine combinations of training and inference strategies using ManimBench. Results show that SFT generally improves code quality, while GRPO enhances visual outputs and increases the models' responsiveness to extrinsic signals during self-correction at inference time. The Qwen 3 Coder 30B model with GRPO and RITL-DOC achieved the highest overall performance, with a 94% Render Success Rate (RSR) and 85.7% Visual Similarity (VS) to reference videos, surpassing the baseline GPT-4.1 model by +3 percentage points in VS. Additionally, the analysis shows that the correlation between code and visual metrics strengthens with SFT and GRPO but weakens with inference-time enhancements, highlighting the complementary roles of training and agentic inference strategies in Manim animation generation.

</details>


### [713] [TacticGen: Grounding Adaptable and Scalable Generation of Football Tactics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18210)
*Sheng Xu,Guiliang Liu,Tarak Kharrat,Yudong Luo,Mohamed Aloulou,Javier López Peña,Konstantin Sofeikov,Adam Reid,Paul Roberts,Steven Spencer,Joe Carnall,Ian McHale,Oliver Schulte,Hongyuan Zha,Wei-Shi Zheng*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: TacticGen是一种基于多智能体扩散Transformer的生成模型，能够根据比赛上下文生成可适应、可扩展的足球战术，在轨迹预测上达到SOTA，并通过分类器引导机制支持多种推理目标（规则、自然语言或神经模型），经专家评估证实其战术生成的实用价值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有足球分析研究多聚焦于轨迹预测（what is likely to occur），而战术生成（what should occur）这一更具战略价值的方向尚未得到充分发展。作者旨在弥合预测与战术设计之间的鸿沟，为职业足球提供实用的战术规划工具。

Method: 采用多智能体扩散Transformer架构，包含智能体间自注意力（agent-wise self-attention）和上下文感知交叉注意力（context-aware cross-attention），以捕捉球员与球之间的协作与竞争动态。战术被建模为以比赛上下文为条件的多智能体运动序列。通过分类器引导机制（classifier guidance）实现推理时自适应，支持规则、自然语言或神经模型指定的目标。

Result: 在超过330万事件和1亿跟踪帧的顶级联赛数据上训练，在球员轨迹预测任务上达到SOTA精度。足球专家案例研究证实其能生成真实且具有战略价值的战术。

Conclusion: TacticGen实现了从预测到战术设计的跨越，其生成能力具备可适应性和可扩展性，在职业足球战术规划中展现出实际应用潜力。

Abstract: Success in association football relies on both individual skill and coordinated tactics. While recent advancements in spatio-temporal data and deep learning have enabled predictive analyses like trajectory forecasting, the development of tactical design remains limited. Bridging this gap is essential, as prediction reveals what is likely to occur, whereas tactic generation determines what should occur to achieve strategic objectives. In this work, we present TacticGen, a generative model for adaptable and scalable tactic generation. TacticGen formulates tactics as sequences of multi-agent movements and interactions conditioned on the game context. It employs a multi-agent diffusion transformer with agent-wise self-attention and context-aware cross-attention to capture cooperative and competitive dynamics among players and the ball. Trained with over 3.3 million events and 100 million tracking frames from top-tier leagues, TacticGen achieves state-of-the-art precision in predicting player trajectories. Building on it, TacticGen enables adaptable tactic generation tailored to diverse inference-time objectives through classifier guidance mechanism, specified via rules, natural language, or neural models. Its modeling performance is also inherently scalable. A case study with football experts confirms that TacticGen generates realistic, strategically valuable tactics, demonstrating its practical utility for tactical planning in professional football. The project page is available at: https://shengxu.net/TacticGen/.

</details>


### [714] [Agent-World: Scaling Real-World Environment Synthesis for Evolving General Agent Intelligence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18292)
*Guanting Dong,Junting Lu,Junjie Huang,Wanjun Zhong,Longxiang Liu,Shijue Huang,Zhenyu Li,Yang Zhao,Xiaoshuai Song,Xiaoxi Li,Jiajie Jin,Yutao Zhu,Hanbin Wang,Fangyu Lei,Qinyu Luo,Mingyang Chen,Zehui Chen,Jiazhan Feng,Ji-Rong Wen,Zhicheng Dou*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出Agent-World，一个通过可扩展环境自我进化的通用智能体训练平台。它包含自主发现环境任务和持续自我进化训练两大组件，在23个基准测试中，8B和14B参数模型均超越强基线模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型作为通用智能体与外部有状态工具环境交互的需求日益增长，但缺乏真实环境和持续学习机制限制了鲁棒智能体的训练。

Method: (1) Agentic环境-任务发现：自主探索主题对齐的数据库和可执行工具生态系统，合成可验证任务；(2) 连续自我进化智能体训练：结合多环境强化学习与自我进化智能体竞技场，通过动态任务合成自动识别能力差距并驱动针对性学习。

Result: Agent-World-8B和14B在23个挑战性智能体基准测试中一致优于强专有模型和环境扩展基线。

Conclusion: 环境多样性和自我进化轮次存在扩展趋势，为构建通用智能体智能提供了见解。

Abstract: Large language models are increasingly expected to serve as general-purpose agents that interact with external, stateful tool environments. The Model Context Protocol (MCP) and broader agent skills offer a unified interface for connecting agents with scalable real-world services, but training robust agents remains limited by the lack of realistic environments and principled mechanisms for life-long learning. In this paper, we present \textbf{Agent-World}, a self-evolving training arena for advancing general agent intelligence through scalable environments. Agent-World has two main components: (1) Agentic Environment-Task Discovery, which autonomously explores topic-aligned databases and executable tool ecosystems from thousands of real-world environment themes and synthesizes verifiable tasks with controllable difficulty; and (2) Continuous Self-Evolving Agent Training, which combines multi-environment reinforcement learning with a self-evolving agent arena that automatically identifies capability gaps through dynamic task synthesis and drives targeted learning, enabling the co-evolution of agent policies and environments. Across 23 challenging agent benchmarks, Agent-World-8B and 14B consistently outperforms strong proprietary models and environment scaling baselines. Further analyses reveal scaling trends in relation to environment diversity and self-evolution rounds, offering insights for building general agent intelligence.

</details>


### [715] [Enhancing Tabular Anomaly Detection via Pseudo-Label-Guided Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18266)
*Wei Huang,Yuxuan Xiong,Hezhe Qiao,Yu-Ming Shang,Xiangling Fu,Guansong Pang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: PLAG是一种伪标签引导的异常生成方法，通过将整体异常量化解耦为特征级异常累积，并结合两阶段数据选择策略生成高质量合成异常，显著提升了表格数据的异常检测性能，在多个基准上达到SOTA，并能作为灵活框架提升现有无监督检测器的F1分数0.08-0.21。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有无监督方法缺乏异常感知能力，而基于生成和对比学习的方法通常全局计算异常，忽略了表格特征中局部异常模式，导致检测性能次优。

Method: 提出PLAG框架：1) 利用伪异常作为引导信号，将样本整体异常量化解耦为特征级异常累积，实现细粒度的局部异常感知；2) 提出两阶段数据选择策略（格式验证+不确定性估计），确保合成异常的保真度和多样性；3) 合成异常作为判别性指导，增强模型区分正常与异常实例的能力。

Result: 在8个代表性基线上达到SOTA性能；作为灵活框架可无缝集成现有无监督检测器，持续提升F1分数0.08至0.21。

Conclusion: PLAG通过伪标签引导的局部异常解耦与两阶段数据选择，有效解决了表格数据异常检测中标签稀缺和局部异常模式被忽视的问题。

Abstract: Identifying anomalous instances in tabular data is essential for improving data reliability and maintaining system stability. Due to the scarcity of ground-truth anomaly labels, existing methods mainly rely on unsupervised anomaly detection models, or exploit a small number of labeled anomalies to facilitate detection via sample generation or contrastive learning. However, unsupervised methods lack sufficient anomaly awareness, while current generation and contrastive approaches tend to compute anomalies globally, overlooking the localized anomaly patterns of tabular features, resulting in suboptimal detection performance. To address these limitations, we propose PLAG, a pseudo-label-guided anomaly generation method designed to enhance tabular anomaly detection. Specifically, by utilizing pseudo-anomalies as guidance signals and decoupling the overall anomaly quantification of a sample into an accumulation of feature-level abnormalities, PLAG not only effectively obviates the need for scarce ground-truth labels but also provides a novel perspective for the model to comprehend localized anomalous signals at a fine-grained level. Furthermore, a two-stage data selection strategy is proposed, integrating format verification and uncertainty estimation to rigorously filter candidate samples, thereby ensuring the fidelity and diversity of the synthetic anomalies. Ultimately, these filtered synthetic anomalies serve as robust discriminative guidance, empowering the model to better separate normal and anomalous instances. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PLAG achieves state-of-the-art performance against eight representative baselines. Moreover, as a flexible framework, it integrates seamlessly with existing unsupervised detectors, consistently boosting F1-scores by 0.08 to 0.21.

</details>


### [716] [LeGo-Code: Can Modular Curriculum Learning Advance Complex Code Generation? Insights from Text-to-SQL](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18254)
*Salmane Chafik,Saad Ezzini,Ismail Berrada*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出模块化适配器组合（MAC）策略，通过按难度层级顺序训练专用适配器，在Text-to-SQL任务上优于标准微调，有效解决了课程学习中的灾难性遗忘问题，并在Spider和BIRD基准上取得性能提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有代码大语言模型在Text-to-SQL任务中处理复杂逻辑（如多层嵌套、多表连接）和真实世界噪声/混乱数据库模式时仍存在困难，需要探索更有效的训练策略来提升模型在复杂查询上的表现。

Method: 提出模块化适配器组合（MAC）策略：按难度层级（从Easy到Extra-Hard）顺序训练层级专用适配器，构建脚手架式学习环境，采用类似乐高积木的模块化架构，使模型可根据具体模式难度进行组合部署。

Result: 在Spider和BIRD基准测试上，MAC策略相比标准微调和朴素课程学习（按复杂度排序的单轮训练）均取得可衡量的性能提升，且有效克服了朴素课程学习因灾难性遗忘导致的性能下降问题。

Conclusion: 结构化模块化学习是掌握复杂代码生成语法与逻辑的优越方案，优于传统的整体式微调方法。

Abstract: Recently, code-oriented large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities in translating natural language into executable code. Text-to-SQL is a significant application of this ability, enabling non-technical users to interact with relational databases using natural language. However, state-of-the-art models continue to struggle with highly complex logic, particularly deeply nested statements involving multiple joins and conditions, as well as with real-world database schemas that are noisy or poorly structured. In this paper, we investigate whether curriculum learning can improve the performance of code-based LLMs on Text-to-SQL tasks. Employing benchmarks including Spider and BIRD, we fine-tune models under different curriculum strategies. Our experiments show that naive curriculum, simply ordering training samples by complexity in a single epoch, fails to surpass standard fine-tuning due to catastrophic forgetting. To overcome this, we propose a Modular Adapter Composition (MAC) strategy. By sequentially training tier-specific adapters on incremental complexity levels (Easy to Extra-Hard), we create a scaffolded learning environment that improves performance on complex queries. Our approach not only produces measurable performance gains on the Spider and BIRD benchmarks but also provides a flexible, "Lego-like" architecture, allowing models to be composed and deployed based on specific schema difficulty requirements. These findings demonstrate that structured, modular learning is a superior alternative to monolithic fine-tuning for mastering the syntax and logic of complex code generation.

</details>


### [717] [AJ-Bench: Benchmarking Agent-as-a-Judge for Environment-Aware Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18240)
*Wentao Shi,Yu Wang,Yuyang Zhao,Yuxin Chen,Fuli Feng,Xueyuan Hao,Xi Su,Qi Gu,Hui Su,Xunliang Cai,Xiangnan He*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出AJ-Bench基准测试，系统评估Agent-as-a-Judge范式在搜索、数据系统和GUI三个领域的智能体验证能力，包含155个任务和516条标注轨迹，实验表明该方法优于LLM-as-a-Judge基线但仍存在显著挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于规则的验证器和LLM-as-a-Judge方法在复杂环境中泛化能力有限，Agent-as-a-Judge通过主动与环境交互获取可验证证据的能力尚未被充分探索，因此需要系统性基准来评估该范式。

Method: 构建AJ-Bench基准，涵盖搜索、数据系统和GUI三个领域共155个任务和516条标注轨迹，从信息获取、状态验证和过程验证三个维度全面评估Judge Agent能力。

Result: Agent-as-a-Judge在三个领域上均一致优于LLM-as-a-Judge基线，但实验结果同时揭示了基于智能体的验证仍存在大量未解决的开放挑战。

Conclusion: Agent-as-a-Judge通过主动交互范式提升了复杂环境下的验证能力，但当前性能仍不足以完全解决智能体验证问题，未来需进一步研究。

Abstract: As reinforcement learning continues to scale the training of large language model-based agents, reliably verifying agent behaviors in complex environments has become increasingly challenging. Existing approaches rely on rule-based verifiers or LLM-as-a-Judge models, which struggle to generalize beyond narrow domains. Agent-as-a-Judge addresses this limitation by actively interacting with environments and tools to acquire verifiable evidence, yet its capabilities remain underexplored.
  We introduce a benchmark AJ-Bench to systematically evaluate Agent-as-a-Judge across three domains-search, data systems, and graphical user interfaces-comprising 155 tasks and 516 annotated trajectories. The benchmark comprehensively assesses judge agents' abilities in information acquisition, state verification, and process verification. Experiments demonstrate consistent performance gains over LLM-as-a-Judge baselines, while also revealing substantial open challenges in agent-based verification. Our data and code are available at https://aj-bench.github.io/.

</details>


### [718] [Artificial Intelligence for Modeling and Simulation of Mixed Automated and Human Traffic](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12857)
*Saeed Rahmani,Shiva Rasouli,Daphne Cornelisse,Eugene Vinitsky,Bart van Arem,Simeon C. Calvert*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文对混合自主交通仿真中用于建模自动驾驶车辆和人类驾驶行为的AI方法进行了系统综述，提出了一个包含智能体级行为模型、环境级仿真方法以及认知与物理信息方法的三层分类体系，并分析了现有仿真平台的不足及未来方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有仿真工具主要关注图形真实感，依赖简单的基于规则模型，无法准确表征驾驶行为的复杂性和交互性；同时缺乏对AI方法在混合自主交通仿真中应用的全面综述，现有综述要么聚焦工具而忽略AI方法，要么只关注自我中心决策而忽视周围交通建模。

Method: 提出统一分类体系，将AI方法分为三个家族：智能体级行为模型（个体驾驶行为建模）、环境级仿真方法（完整场景仿真）、认知与物理信息方法（融合认知科学和物理约束）。从交通工程和计算机科学双视角进行结构化综述，涵盖AI方法的时间演进、评估协议与指标、仿真工具和数据集。

Result: 系统梳理了各类AI方法在混合自主交通仿真中的应用现状，指出现有仿真平台在支持混合自主研究方面的不足，并提供了从个体行为建模到完整场景仿真的全面方法映射。

Conclusion: 本文填补了AI方法在混合自主交通仿真领域缺乏统一综述的空白，通过跨学科视角为交通工程和计算机科学社区搭建桥梁，并为未来仿真工具和方法的发展指明了方向。

Abstract: Autonomous vehicles (AVs) are now operating on public roads, which makes their testing and validation more critical than ever. Simulation offers a safe and controlled environment for evaluating AV performance in varied conditions. However, existing simulation tools mainly focus on graphical realism and rely on simple rule-based models and therefore fail to accurately represent the complexity of driving behaviors and interactions. Artificial intelligence (AI) has shown strong potential to address these limitations; however, despite the rapid progress across AI methodologies, a comprehensive survey of their application to mixed autonomy traffic simulation remains lacking. Existing surveys either focus on simulation tools without examining the AI methods behind them, or cover ego-centric decision-making without addressing the broader challenge of modeling surrounding traffic. Moreover, they do not offer a unified taxonomy of AI methods covering individual behavior modeling to full scene simulation. To address these gaps, this survey provides a structured review and synthesis of AI methods for modeling AV and human driving behavior in mixed autonomy traffic simulation. We introduce a taxonomy that organizes methods into three families: agent-level behavior models, environment-level simulation methods, and cognitive and physics-informed methods. The survey analyzes how existing simulation platforms fall short of the needs of mixed autonomy research and outlines directions to narrow this gap. It also provides a chronological overview of AI methods and reviews evaluation protocols and metrics, simulation tools, and datasets. By covering both traffic engineering and computer science perspectives, we aim to bridge the gap between these two communities.

</details>


### [719] [A Control Architecture for Training-Free Memory Use](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18206)
*Yanzhen Lu,Muchen Jiang,Zhicheng Qian,Xingyu Zhou*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究了无需训练的提示注入记忆控制问题，提出了一种结合不确定性路由、置信度选择性接受、记忆库选择及基于证据的记忆治理方法，在算术基准上取得显著提升，并揭示了控制架构而非原始记忆暴露是改进的关键。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 提示注入记忆虽能提升推理能力，但存在控制问题：检索到的内容只有在正确状态下应用才有帮助。本文旨在严格无训练设置下解决这一控制问题。

Method: 提出了一种结合不确定性路由（决定何时触发记忆辅助的第二轮推理）、置信度选择性接受（决定何时信任检索结果）、记忆库选择（规则记忆与示例记忆之间选择）以及基于证据的记忆库治理（随时间维护记忆库）的方法。

Result: 在SVAMP上提升+7.0分，ASDiv上提升+7.67分；该架构也能迁移到QA和智能体基准任务（效果较小）；在另一检查点上对主要算术任务保持正向效果。

Conclusion: 控制架构而非原始记忆暴露是驱动算术任务改进的主要因素；置信度能区分有帮助和有害的规则库干预；在固定检索条件下，修复与破坏的差异定位到包含已编辑条目的行。

Abstract: Prompt-injected memory can improve reasoning without updating model weights, but it also creates a control problem: retrieved content helps only when it is applied in the right state. We study this problem in a strict training-free setting and formulate it as applicability control: when to trigger a memory-assisted second pass, when to trust it, and how to maintain the memory bank over time. Our method combines uncertainty-based routing, confidence-based selective acceptance, bank selection across rule and exemplar memory, and evidence-based governance of the memory bank over time. Under a locked training-free protocol with compute-matched controls, it improves two core arithmetic benchmarks by +7.0 points on SVAMP and +7.67 points on ASDiv over baseline. The same architecture also transfers to QA and agent benchmarks with smaller positive effects and shows the same positive direction on a second checkpoint for the main arithmetic tasks. On arithmetic, the main empirical pattern is that the control architecture, rather than raw memory exposure, drives the improvements on SVAMP and ASDiv. Mechanistically, confidence separates helpful from harmful rule-bank interventions, and under fixed retrieval the repair-versus-corrupt difference localizes to rows whose retrieved set actually contains the edited entries.

</details>


### [720] [QuantumQA: Enhancing Scientific Reasoning via Physics-Consistent Dataset and Verification-Aware Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18176)
*Songxin Qu,Tai-Ping Sun,Yun-Jie Wang,Huan-Yu Liu,Cheng Xue,Xiao-Fan Xu,Han Fang,Yang Yang,Yu-Chun Wu,Guo-Ping Guo,Zhao-Yun Chen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 针对大语言模型在量子力学等科学领域缺乏可靠性的问题，本文构建了大规模数据集QuantumQA，并提出了一种基于可验证奖励的验证感知奖励模型(VRM)，通过自适应奖励融合(ARF)机制结合确定性求解器信号与语义评估，使8B参数模型达到与专有模型竞争的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型在通用推理上表现出色，但在量子力学等科学领域缺乏可靠性，原因在于可验证训练资源稀缺以及标准对齐范式中粗粒度反馈信号不足。

Method: 提出QuantumQA数据集（基于任务自适应策略和混合验证协议构建）；提出验证感知奖励模型(VRM)，采用自适应奖励融合(ARF)机制，动态集成科学执行套件(SES)的确定性信号与多维语义评估。

Result: 所提方法持续优于基线模型和通用偏好模型；优化后的8B模型达到与专有模型竞争的性能。

Conclusion: 将可验证的、基于规则的反馈融入强化学习循环，为纯规模扩展提供了一种参数高效的替代方案。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) show strong capabilities in general reasoning but typically lack reliability in scientific domains like quantum mechanics, which demand strict adherence to physical constraints. This limitation arises from the scarcity of verifiable training resources and the inadequacy of coarse feedback signals in standard alignment paradigms. To address the data challenge, we introduce QuantumQA, a large-scale dataset constructed via a task-adaptive strategy and a hybrid verification protocol that combines deterministic solvers with semantic auditing to guarantee scientific rigor. Building on this foundation, we propose the verification-aware reward model (VRM) tailored for Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR), which employs an adaptive reward fusion (ARF) mechanism to dynamically integrate deterministic signals from a scientific execution suite (SES) with multidimensional semantic evaluations for precise supervision. Experimental results demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms baselines and general-purpose preference models. Notably, our optimized 8B model achieves performance competitive with proprietary models, validating that incorporating verifiable, rule-based feedback into the reinforcement learning loop offers a parameter-efficient alternative to pure scaling.

</details>


### [721] [State Transfer Reveals Reuse in Controlled Routing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18158)
*Yanzhen Lu,Zhicheng Qian,Muchen Jiang,Xingyu Zhou*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文通过控制路由任务，对比固定接口复用与可训练提示重定位两种行为干预方式，发现固定接口传输比训练提示成功更能证明状态表示的实质性复用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于提示的干预方法虽能改变模型行为，但仅凭训练成功无法确定行为相关状态在模型中的具体表示位置，需要更严格的因果测试来区分真正的表示复用与提示重定位。

Method: 在GPT-2 triop和add/sub任务上，使用支持数据选择的接口、保留查询评估以及匹配的必要性、充分性和错误接口控制，对比固定接口的零重训练编译传输与可训练提示槽在不同位置的再学习效果，并在Qwen路由上进行跨架构一致性验证。

Result: GPT-2 triop中早期接口支持精确传输；GPT-2 add/sub中固定接口零重训练编译恢复大部分路由精度，而可训练提示槽需更多支持样本和优化才能在其他位置重学相同行为；Qwen路由在算子token处呈现相同模式，但供体特异性身份在局部V路径上仍不明确。

Conclusion: 在受控路由中，固定接口传输比可训练提示成功更能证明状态表示的实质性复用，生成和推理分支用于界定范围：当控制依赖于更长轨迹或更硬选择时，传输范围更广或控制器可识别性更弱。

Abstract: Prompt-based interventions can change model behavior, but trained success alone does not identify where the behaviorally relevant state is represented. We study this question in controlled routing tasks using interfaces chosen on support data, held-out query evaluation, and matched necessity, sufficiency, and wrong-interface controls. On GPT-2 triop, an early interface supports exact transfer under these tests. On GPT-2 add/sub, zero-retrain compiled transfer at the fixed interface recovers most of donor routing accuracy, while trainable prompt slots can relearn the same behavior at several other positions only after additional support examples and optimization. These results distinguish fixed-interface reuse from prompt relocation in a setting where the two can be tested directly. Qwen routing provides a cross-architecture consistency check for the same matched-interface pattern at the operator token, although donor-specific identity on the local V-path remains unresolved. Generation and reasoning branches are used to map scope: they show broader transport or weaker controller identifiability once control depends on longer trajectories or harder selection. In controlled routing, fixed-interface transfer is therefore stronger evidence of reuse than trained prompt success alone.

</details>


### [722] [Multi-Agent Systems: From Classical Paradigms to Large Foundation Model-Enabled Futures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18133)
*Zixiang Wang,Mengjia Gong,Qiyu Sun,Jing Xu,Shuai Mao,Xin Jin,Qing-Long Han,Yang Tang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文系统综述了经典多智能体系统（CMASs）与基于大模型的多智能体系统（LMASs），指出LMASs通过引入大基础模型将协作从低层状态交互提升至语义级推理，增强了灵活性与适应性，并对比了两者在架构、运行机制、适应性和应用方面的差异，最后展望了未来挑战与研究机会。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着人工智能快速发展，多智能体系统正从经典范式向基于大基础模型的架构演进，需要对这两种范式进行系统的综述与对比分析，以厘清其差异与发展方向。

Method: 首先在闭环协调框架下从感知、通信、决策和控制四个维度回顾CMASs；然后分析LMASs如何集成大基础模型实现从低层状态交互到语义级推理的协作升级；接着从架构、运行机制、适应性和应用四个方面进行对比分析。

Result: LMASs相比CMASs在协作灵活性、场景适应性方面具有显著优势，实现了语义层面的协调推理；系统性地揭示了两类系统在架构设计、运行机制、适应能力和应用场景上的差异。

Conclusion: LMASs代表了多智能体系统的重要发展方向，但仍面临开放性挑战和潜在研究机会，需要进一步探索。

Abstract: With the rapid advancement of artificial intelligence, multi-agent systems (MASs) are evolving from classical paradigms toward architectures built upon large foundation models (LFMs). This survey provides a systematic review and comparative analysis of classical MASs (CMASs) and LFM-based MASs (LMASs). First, within a closed-loop coordination framework, CMASs are reviewed across four fundamental dimensions: perception, communication, decision-making, and control. Beyond this framework, LMASs integrate LFMs to lift collaboration from low-level state exchanges to semantic-level reasoning, enabling more flexible coordination and improved adaptability across diverse scenarios. Then, a comparative analysis is conducted to contrast CMASs and LMASs across architecture, operating mechanism, adaptability, and application. Finally, future perspectives on MASs are presented, summarizing open challenges and potential research opportunities.

</details>


### [723] [Training LLM Agents for Spontaneous, Reward-Free Self-Evolution via World Knowledge Exploration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18131)
*Qifan Zhang,Dongyang Ma,Tianqing Fang,Jia Li,Jing Tang,Nuo Chen,Haitao Mi,Yan Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种让智能体具备内在元进化能力的方法，使其无需人类监督或外部奖励，在推理时自主探索未知环境并生成世界知识以提升下游任务表现。在Qwen3-30B和Seed-OSS-36B上应用后，在WebVoyager和WebWalker上性能提升20%，且14B的Qwen3模型凭借自生成世界知识超越了未经辅助的Gemini-2.5-Flash。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前智能体的“自我进化”仍依赖人类定义的外部奖励和规则，缺乏外部监督时进化就会停止。因此，本文旨在赋予智能体内在的元进化能力，使其能够在没有人类指导的情况下，自主学习和适应未知环境。

Method: 设计了一种基于结果（outcome-based）的奖励机制，通过衡量智能体自生成的世界知识对下游任务成功率的提升程度来提供训练信号。该奖励仅在训练阶段使用，教会模型如何有效探索和总结。推理时，智能体无需外部奖励或人类指令，仅依靠内部参数自主进行原生自我进化以适应未知环境。

Result: 在Qwen3-30B和Seed-OSS-36B上，该方法在WebVoyager和WebWalker基准上实现了20%的性能提升。此外，仅14B参数的Qwen3模型凭借自生成的世界知识，性能超越了未经辅助的Gemini-2.5-Flash模型。

Conclusion: 该方法为真正具备自主进化能力的智能体建立了新范式，证明了通过训练阶段的结果奖励机制可以赋予模型在推理时无需外部监督即可自主进化、适应环境的能力，且小模型也能凭借自生成知识超越大模型。

Abstract: Most agents today ``self-evolve'' by following rewards and rules defined by humans. However, this process remains fundamentally dependent on external supervision; without human guidance, the evolution stops. In this work, we train agents to possess an intrinsic meta-evolution capability to spontaneously learn about unseen environments prior to task execution.
  To instill this ability, we design an outcome-based reward mechanism that measures how much an agent's self-generated world knowledge improves its success rate on downstream tasks. This reward signal is used exclusively during the training phase to teach the model how to explore and summarize effectively. At inference time, the agent requires no external rewards or human instructions. It spontaneously performs native self-evolution to adapt to unknown environments using its internal parameters.
  When applied to Qwen3-30B and Seed-OSS-36B, this shift to native evolution yields a 20% performance increase on WebVoyager and WebWalker. Most strikingly, the generated world knowledge even enables a compact 14B Qwen3 model to outperform the unassisted Gemini-2.5-Flash, establishing a new paradigm for truly evolving agents.

</details>


### [724] [Stability Implies Redundancy: Delta Attention Selective Halting for Efficient Long-Context Prefilling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18103)
*Yujie Chen,Tailai Chen,Yifeng Gao,Zoe Wanying He,Yijue Xu,Shaobo Wang,Linfeng Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: DASH通过监测自注意力层更新动态，在令牌达到语义稳定点时提前停止其处理，从而在不牺牲硬件效率（兼容FlashAttention）的情况下加速长文本预填充阶段。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长文本场景下，大语言模型和多模态模型的预填充计算开销巨大，成为性能瓶颈。

Method: 观察到令牌在层间演化中会趋向语义固定点（semantic fixing points），后续处理冗余。提出DASH策略，无需训练，通过监控自注意力机制的逐层更新动态，选择性地让已稳定的令牌提前停止计算。

Result: 在语言和视觉基准上广泛验证，DASH在保持模型准确性和硬件效率的同时，实现了显著的预填充加速。

Conclusion: DASH是一种训练无关、硬件高效（兼容FlashAttention）的令牌选择式提前停止方法，有效缓解了长文本LLM/LMM的预填充瓶颈。

Abstract: Prefilling computational costs pose a significant bottleneck for Large Language Models (LLMs) and Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) in long-context settings. While token pruning reduces sequence length, prior methods rely on heuristics that break compatibility with hardware-efficient kernels like FlashAttention. In this work, we observe that tokens evolve toward \textit{semantic fixing points}, making further processing redundant. To this end, we introduce Delta Attention Selective Halting (DASH), a training-free policy that monitors the layer-wise update dynamics of the self-attention mechanism to selectively halt stabilized tokens. Extensive evaluation confirms that DASH generalizes across language and vision benchmarks, delivering significant prefill speedups while preserving model accuracy and hardware efficiency. Code will be released at https://github.com/verach3n/DASH.git.

</details>


### [725] [Physics-Informed Causal MDPs for Sequential Constraint Repair in Engineering Simulation Pipelines](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17910)
*Chuhan Qiao*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: PI-CMDP框架通过因果识别、状态压缩和物理引导估计，在具有大二进制状态空间的约束MDP中实现样本高效的离线策略学习，并在工程仿真修复任务中显著优于基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 离线策略学习在具有大二进制状态空间的约束MDP中面临根本性矛盾：因果识别需要结构性假设，而样本高效策略学习需要状态空间压缩，现有方法难以同时兼顾两者。

Method: 提出PI-CMDP框架，包含三步流水线：(i) 利用生命周期排序假设进行后门路径识别因果边权重；(ii) 基于层优先级正则性和可交换性构建马尔可夫抽象，将状态基数从2^(WL)压缩至(W+1)^L；(iii) 设计物理引导的双重稳健估计器，在物理先验优于学习模型时保持无偏性并降低方差常数。

Result: 在TPS基准测试（4,206轮次）中，PI-CMDP仅用300训练轮次即达76.2%修复成功率（基线70.8%，+5.4 pp），全数据下83.4%（基线80.6%，+2.8 pp），显著降低级联故障率，5个独立种子的配对t检验p<0.02。

Conclusion: PI-CMDP有效解决了约束MDP中因果识别与状态压缩的权衡问题，在样本效率、修复成功率和故障控制方面均优于现有方法，验证了物理先验引导估计的实际价值。

Abstract: Off-policy learning in constrained MDPs with large binary state spaces faces a fundamental tension: causal identification of transition dynamics requires structural assumptions, while sample-efficient policy learning requires state-space compression. We introduce PI-CMDP, a framework for CMDPs whose constraint dependencies form a layered DAG under a Lifecycle Ordering Assumption (LOA). We propose an Identify-Compress-Estimate pipeline: (i) Identify: LOA enables backdoor identification of causal edge weights for cross-layer pairs, with formal partial-identification bounds when LOA is violated; (ii) Compress: a Markov abstraction compresses state cardinality from 2^(WL) to (W+1)^L under layer-priority regularity and exchangeability; and (iii) Estimate: a physics-guided doubly-robust estimator remains unbiased and reduces the variance constant when the physics prior outperforms a learned model. We instantiate PI-CMDP on constraint repair in engineering simulation pipelines. On the TPS benchmark (4,206 episodes), PI-CMDP achieves 76.2% repair success rate with only 300 training episodes versus 70.8% for the strongest baseline (+5.4 pp), narrowing to +2.8 pp (83.4% vs. 80.6%) in the full-data regime, while substantially reducing cascade failure rates. All improvements are consistent across 5 independent seeds (paired t-test p < 0.02).

</details>


### [726] [Architectural Design Decisions in AI Agent Harnesses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18071)
*Hu Wei*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文通过对70个开源AI智能体系统项目进行协议引导、源码扎根的实证研究，识别出五个重复出现的架构设计维度（子智能体架构、上下文管理、工具系统、安全机制和编排），揭示了维度间的共现结构，并归纳出五种典型架构模式（轻量工具型、平衡CLI框架型、多智能体编排型、企业系统型和场景垂直型）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI智能体系统日益依赖可复用的非LLM工程基础设施（如工具中介、上下文处理、委派、安全控制和编排），但围绕这些基础设施的架构设计决策尚未得到充分研究。

Method: 采用协议引导、源码扎根的实证研究方法，对70个公开的智能体系统项目进行源码和技术文档分析，通过跨项目共现分析揭示设计维度间的结构关系。

Result: 识别出五个重复设计维度；发现文件持久化、混合和分层上下文策略占主导；注册表导向的工具系统仍为主流，MCP和插件导向扩展正在兴起；中间隔离常见但高保障审计罕见。共现分析揭示更深层协调与更显式上下文服务配对、更强执行环境与更结构化治理配对、形式化工具注册边界与更广泛生态愿景配对。最终综合出五种重复出现的架构模式。

Conclusion: 提供了AI智能体系统工程中架构规律性的循证说明，为框架设计者、选择者和研究者提供了基于数据的指导建议。

Abstract: AI agent systems increasingly rely on reusable non-LLM engineering infrastructure that packages tool mediation, context handling, delegation, safety control, and orchestration. Yet the architectural design decisions in this surrounding infrastructure remain understudied. This paper presents a protocol-guided, source-grounded empirical study of 70 publicly available agent-system projects, addressing three questions: which design-decision dimensions recur across projects, which co-occurrences structure those decisions, and which typical architectural patterns emerge. Methodologically, we contribute a transparent investigation procedure for analyzing heterogeneous agent-system corpora through source-code and technical-material reading. Empirically, we identify five recurring design dimensions (subagent architecture, context management, tool systems, safety mechanisms, and orchestration) and find that the corpus favors file-persistent, hybrid, and hierarchical context strategies; registry-oriented tool systems remain dominant while MCP- and plugin-oriented extensions are emerging; and intermediate isolation is common but high-assurance audit is rare. Cross-project co-occurrence analysis reveals that deeper coordination pairs with more explicit context services, stronger execution environments with more structured governance, and formalized tool-registration boundaries with broader ecosystem ambitions. We synthesize five recurring architectural patterns spanning lightweight tools, balanced CLI frameworks, multi-agent orchestrators, enterprise systems, and scenario-verticalized projects. The result provides an evidence-based account of architectural regularities in agent-system engineering, with grounded guidance for framework designers, selectors, and researchers.

</details>


### [727] [Understanding Human Actions through the Lens of Executable Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18064)
*Rimvydas Rubavicius,Manisha Dubey,N. Siddharth,Subramanian Ramamoorthy*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出领域特定语言EXACT，将人体运动表示为未充分指定的运动程序，作为奖励生成函数用于零样本策略推理，通过神经符号组合建模实现动作分割与异常检测，相比传统方法更具数据效率和直觉性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有动作识别方法多关注"做了什么动作"，但未能捕捉动作的内部执行结构（如何执行），而这对于评估动作执行质量和区分不同动作至关重要。

Method: 设计领域特定语言EXACT，将人体运动表示为未充分指定的运动程序；这些程序作为奖励生成函数，利用前向-后向表示进行零样本策略推理；通过EXACT程序的组合性，将独立策略组合成可执行的神经符号模型进行组合建模。

Result: 在动作分割和动作异常检测任务上，可执行动作模型相比整体式、任务特定方法提高了数据效率，并捕捉了动作之间的直觉关系。

Conclusion: 可执行动作模型通过显式建模动作的内部结构，能够更高效地理解人类动作，并捕捉动作间的语义关系。

Abstract: Human-centred systems require an understanding of human actions in the physical world. Temporally extended sequences of actions are intentional and structured, yet existing methods for recognising what actions are performed often do not attempt to capture their structure, particularly how the actions are executed. This, however, is crucial for assessing the quality of the action's execution and its differences from other actions. To capture the internal mechanics of actions, we introduce a domain-specific language EXACT that represents human motions as underspecified motion programs, interpreted as reward-generating functions for zero-shot policy inference using forward-backwards representations. By leveraging the compositional nature of EXACT motion programs, we combine individual policies into an executable neuro-symbolic model that uses program structure for compositional modelling. We evaluate the utility of the proposed pipeline for creating executable action models by analysing motion-capture data to understand human actions, for the tasks of human action segmentation and action anomaly detection. Our results show that the use of executable action models improves data efficiency and captures intuitive relationships between actions compared with monolithic, task-specific approaches.

</details>


### [728] [Polysemantic Experts, Monosemantic Paths: Routing as Control in MoEs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17837)
*Charles Ye,Bo Yuan,Lee Sharkey*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出一种无需参数分解的方法，将MoE模型每层的隐藏状态拆分为控制信号（驱动路由）和正交内容通道（对路由器不可见）。实验发现内容通道保留表层特征（语言、token身份、位置），而控制信号编码抽象函数并在层间旋转。由于路由决策带宽低，这种交接迫使层间组合专业化。单个专家仍是多语义的，但专家路径变为单语义，按语义功能聚类token。同一token（如":"）因不同语义功能走不同轨迹。控制子空间中的聚类比完整表示中的聚类更单语义，因此MoE中可解释性的自然单元是轨迹而非专家。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MoE模型的可解释性研究多聚焦于单个专家，但专家往往呈现多语义性，难以揭示模型内部运作机制。作者希望通过分解隐藏状态，理解MoE模型中路由机制与表示学习之间的因果关系，从而找到更合适的可解释性分析单元。

Method: 提出一种参数无关的分解方法，将MoE每层隐藏状态分解为控制信号（驱动路由选择）和与之正交的内容通道（对路由器不可见）。在六种MoE架构上进行实验分析，比较内容通道与控制信号中编码的信息类型，并追踪token在不同路由决策下的轨迹。

Result: 1) 内容通道保留表层特征（语言、token身份、位置）；2) 控制信号编码抽象函数并在层间旋转；3) 低带宽路由迫使层间组合专业化；4) 专家路径（而非单个专家）是单语义的，按语义功能聚类；5) 同一token因语义角色不同走不同轨迹；6) 控制子空间中的聚类比完整表示更单语义。

Conclusion: MoE模型中可解释性的自然单元不是专家，而是轨迹（token经过的专家路径）。控制信号与内容通道的分解揭示了模型如何实现组合专业化，为理解和解释MoE模型提供了新的视角和工具。

Abstract: An LLM's residual stream is both state and instruction: it encodes the current context and determines the next transformation. We introduce a parameter-free decomposition for Mixture-of-Experts models that splits each layer's hidden state into a control signal that causally drives routing and an orthogonal content channel invisible to the router. Across six MoE architectures, we find that models preserve surface-level features (language, token identity, position) in the content channel, while the control signal encodes an abstract function that rotates from layer to layer. Because each routing decision is low-bandwidth, this hand-off forces compositional specialization across layers. While individual experts remain polysemantic, expert paths become monosemantic, clustering tokens by semantic function across languages and surface forms. The same token (e.g., ":") follows distinct trajectories depending on whether it serves as a type annotation, an introductory colon, or a time separator. Our decomposition identifies the source of this structure: clusters in the control subspace are substantially more monosemantic than those in the full representation. As a result, the natural unit of interpretability in MoEs is not the expert but the trajectory.

</details>


### [729] [The Topological Dual of a Dataset: A Logic-to-Topology Encoding for AlphaGeometry-Style Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18050)
*Anthony Bordg*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文针对AlphaGeometry神经符号推理中符号推理引擎的log-linear扩展瓶颈，提出逻辑到拓扑的编码方法，利用可观测理论中的可证明性与拓扑之间的对偶性，构建数据集的拓扑对偶，作为神经符号AI的"罗塞塔石碑"，实现模型潜在空间中结构不变量的揭示与机械可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AlphaGeometry的符号推理引擎存在log-linear扩展瓶颈，随着问题复杂度增加效率受限；当前神经指导依赖于表层编码而非结构理解，领域特定语言与自然语言之间的互换是性能不变变换，表明现有方法缺乏对输入空间结构的深层把握。

Method: 提出逻辑到拓扑编码（logic-to-topology encoding），利用可观测逻辑（Logic of Observation）中可证明性与拓扑之间的对偶性，构建输入空间的逻辑到拓扑编码器；引入"数据集拓扑对偶"（topological dual of a dataset）概念，作为连接形式逻辑、拓扑和神经处理的桥梁。

Result: 该框架作为神经符号AI的"罗塞塔石碑"，提供了模型在复杂发现路径中导航的机械可解释性的原则性途径，能够揭示模型潜在空间在输入空间变换下的结构不变量。

Conclusion: 逻辑到拓扑编码有效解决了表示瓶颈问题，通过拓扑对偶实现了神经符号推理中结构不变量的捕捉，为提升神经符号系统的可解释性和效率提供了新范式。

Abstract: AlphaGeometry represents a milestone in neuro-symbolic reasoning, yet its architecture faces a log-linear scaling bottleneck within its symbolic deduction engine that limits its efficiency as problem complexity increases. Recent technical reports suggest that current domain-specific languages may be isomorphic as input representations to natural language, interchanging them acts as a performance-invariant transformation, implying that current neural guidance relies on superficial encodings rather than structural understanding. This paper addresses this representation bottleneck by proposing a logic-to-topology encoding designed to reveal the structural invariants of a model's latent space under a transformation of its input space. By leveraging the Logic of Observation, we utilize the duality between provability in observable theories and topologies to propose a logic-to-topology encoder for the input space. We introduce the concept of the "topological dual of a dataset", a transformation that bridges formal logic, topology, and neural processing. This framework serves as a Rosetta Stone for neuro-symbolic AI, providing a principled pathway for the mechanistic interpretability of how models navigate complex discovery paths.

</details>


### [730] [SELF-EMO: Emotional Self-Evolution from Recognition to Consistent Expression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18003)
*Shaowei Zhang,Faqiang Qian,Yan Chen,Ziliang Wang,Kang An,Yong Dai,Mengya Gao,Yichao Wu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出SELF-EMO框架，通过自我进化范式增强LLM在对话中的情绪识别与表达一致性，采用角色自对弈、数据飞轮和SELF-GRPO强化学习算法，在三个基准数据集上取得SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高质量标注数据稀缺且静态，限制了LLM在对话情绪识别中准确识别与连贯情感表达的能力。

Method: 提出SELF-EMO框架：(1) 引入情绪理解和情绪表达两个辅助任务；(2) 基于角色的自对弈范式，模型同时扮演情绪识别器和对话响应者；(3) 数据飞轮机制，使用平滑IoU奖励过滤候选预测和响应；(4) SELF-GRPO强化学习算法，结合多标签对齐奖励和组级一致性信号稳定优化。

Result: 在IEMOCAP、MELD和EmoryNLP上取得SOTA，Qwen3-4B上准确率提升+6.33%，Qwen3-8B上提升+8.54%。

Conclusion: SELF-EMO通过自我进化范式有效提升了对话情绪识别性能，无需外部监督，展现出良好的泛化能力。

Abstract: Emotion Recognition in Conversation (ERC) has become a fundamental capability for large language models (LLMs) in human-centric interaction. Beyond accurate recognition, coherent emotional expression is also crucial, yet both are limited by the scarcity and static nature of high-quality annotated data. In this work, we propose SELF-EMO, a self-evolution framework grounded in the hypothesis that better emotion prediction leads to more consistent emotional responses. We introduce two auxiliary tasks, emotional understanding and emotional expression, and design a role-based self-play paradigm where the model acts as both an emotion recognizer and a dialogue responder. Through iterative interactions, the model generates diverse conversational trajectories, enabling scalable data generation. To ensure quality, we adopt a data flywheel mechanism that filters candidate predictions and responses using a smoothed IoU-based reward and feeds selected samples back for continuous self-improvement without external supervision. We further develop SELF-GRPO, a reinforcement learning algorithm that stabilizes optimization with multi-label alignment rewards and group-level consistency signals. Experiments on IEMOCAP, MELD, and EmoryNLP show that SELF-EMO achieves state-of-the-art performance, improving accuracy by +6.33% on Qwen3-4B and +8.54% on Qwen3-8B, demonstrating strong effectiveness and generalization.

</details>


### [731] [AIT Academy: Cultivating the Complete Agent with a Confucian Three-Domain Curriculum](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17989)
*Jiaqi Li,Lvyang Zhang,Yang Zhao,Wen Lu,Lidong Zhai*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出AIT Academy课程框架，基于人类知识的三元结构（自然科学、人文学科、社会科学）培养AI智能体，并通过三个训练场验证了该框架的有效性，发现了跨域的安全意识校准病理现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前AI智能体开发缺乏系统的课程理论，导致智能体仅能在单一能力维度上优化（如工具使用、代码生成或安全意识），而在未训练领域存在可预测的缺陷。作者认为这反映了结构性缺失——缺少关于"全面发展的智能体应具备什么能力"的 principled 理论框架。

Method: 基于Kagan的三种文化与UNESCO ISCED-F 2013分类法，将智能体能力发展组织为三个领域：自然科学与技术推理（领域I）、人文学科与创造性表达（领域II）、社会科学与伦理推理（领域III）。将儒家六艺（礼乐射御书数）重新诠释为可映射到可训练智能体能力的行为原型。构建了三个训练场：ClawdGO安全道场（领域I）、Athen's Academy（领域II）、Alt Mirage舞台（领域III）。

Result: 在"最弱优先"课程调度下，安全能力评分提升15.9个百分点；在原则性归因建模下，社会推理性能提升7个百分点。发现了跨域现象——安全意识校准病理（SACP），即过度训练的领域I智能体在分布外评估中失败。

Conclusion: AIT Academy框架为AI智能体提供了首个系统的课程理论，其多领域视角能够诊断单领域框架无法发现的跨域问题（如SACP），证明了全面发展课程的必要性。

Abstract: What does it mean to give an AI agent a complete education? Current agent development produces specialists systems optimized for a single capability dimension, whether tool use, code generation, or security awareness that exhibit predictable deficits wherever they were not trained. We argue this pattern reflects a structural absence: there is no curriculum theory for agents, no principled account of what a fully developed agent should know, be, and be able to do across the full scope of intelligent behavior.
  This paper introduces the AIT Academy (Agents Institute of Technology Academy), a curriculum framework for cultivating AI agents across the tripartite structure of human knowledge. Grounded in Kagan's Three Cultures and UNESCO ISCED-F 2013, AIT organizes agent capability development into three domains: Natural Science and Technical Reasoning (Domain I), Humanities and Creative Expression (Domain II), and Social Science and Ethical Reasoning (Domain III). The Confucian Six Arts (liuyi) a 2,500-year-old holistic education system are reinterpreted as behavioral archetypes that map directly onto trainable agent capabilities within each domain.
  Three representative training grounds instantiate the framework across multiple backbone LLMs: the ClawdGO Security Dojo (Domain I), Athen's Academy (Domain II), and the Alt Mirage Stage (Domain III). Experiments demonstrate a 15.9-point improvement in security capability scores under weakest-first curriculum scheduling, and a 7-percentage-point gain in social reasoning performance under principled attribution modeling. A cross-domain finding Security Awareness Calibration Pathology (SACP), in which over-trained Domain I agents fail on out-of-distribution evaluation illustrates the diagnostic value of a multi-domain perspective unavailable to any single-domain framework.

</details>


### [732] [From Fallback to Frontline: When Can LLMs be Superior Annotators of Human Perspectives?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17968)
*Hasan Amin,Harry Yizhou Tian,Xiaoni Duan,Chien-Ju Ho,Rajiv Khanna,Ming Yin*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文挑战了将LLM仅视为人工标注的务实替代品的传统观点，通过将视角采纳定义为对潜在群体层面判断的估计，论证了LLM在预测主观任务中的群体意见时，在某些条件下（包括低方差、减少表征与处理偏差的耦合等结构特性）能够优于人类标注者（包括群体内部成员），并将LLM从成本节约的妥协重新定位为估计集体人类视角的原则性工具。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 挑战将LLM仅视为人工标注的务实替代品的传统假设，探索LLM是否可以作为人类视角的忠实估计器。

Method: 将视角采纳形式化为对潜在群体层面判断的估计，分析LLM作为估计器的结构特性（低方差、减少表征与处理偏差的耦合），并识别LLM优于人类标注者的条件与边界。

Result: 发现LLM在预测主观任务的群体意见时，在某些常见条件下（包括低方差和减少偏差耦合）能够优于人类标注者，包括群体内部成员。

Conclusion: LLM不应仅被视为成本节约的替代品，而应被重新定位为估计集体人类视角的原则性工具，同时明确了人类判断仍然不可或缺的边界。

Abstract: Although large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used as annotators at scale, they are typically treated as a pragmatic fallback rather than a faithful estimator of human perspectives. This work challenges that presumption. By framing perspective-taking as the estimation of a latent group-level judgment, we characterize the conditions under which modern LLMs can outperform human annotators, including in-group humans, when predicting aggregate subgroup opinions on subjective tasks, and show that these conditions are common in practice. This advantage arises from structural properties of LLMs as estimators, including low variance and reduced coupling between representation and processing biases, rather than any claim of lived experience. Our analysis identifies clear regimes where LLMs act as statistically superior frontline estimators, as well as principled limits where human judgment remains essential. These findings reposition LLMs from a cost-saving compromise to a principled tool for estimating collective human perspectives.

</details>


### [733] [TPS-CalcBench: A Benchmark and Diagnostic Evaluation Framework for LLM Analytical Calculation Competence in Hypersonic Thermal Protection System Engineering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17966)
*Jinglai Zheng,Chuhan Qiao,Haiming Huang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出TPS-CalcBench基准，用于评估LLM在高超声速热防护系统设计中的工程推理能力，包含双轨评估（结果准确性+推理质量）、三级诊断干预方法，测试13个模型发现广泛性能差异和隐藏缺陷。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 安全关键航空工程中部署LLM作为推理助手需要比通用科学基准更严格的评估标准，现有基准仅测试抽象数学和基础物理、仅评估最终答案、忽略工程推理过程，无法检测数值合理但物理无效的致命错误。

Method: 构建领域导向任务分类（4难度×8类别），双轨评估（8维度评分+校准裁判+人工审核），人机数据流水线（4560原始→420高置信+810噪声控制），噪声敏感性分析，三种诊断干预方法：DFA-TPS微调、RAG-EQ检索增强、PA-CoT过程感知提示。

Result: 13个模型（7组）测试显示KPI范围12.6-87.9，存在广泛性能差异、隐藏公式选择缺陷、数据驱动排名变化，干预方法有效提升性能。

Conclusion: 建立了安全关键工程LLM部署评估的完整"诊断-评估-干预"框架，揭示了现有模型在工程推理中的关键缺陷并提供了系统性的改进方案。

Abstract: Deploying LLMs as reasoning assistants in safety-critical aerospace engineering requires stricter evaluation criteria than general scientific benchmarks. In hypersonic thermal protection system (TPS) design, inaccurate stagnation-point heat flux or boundary-layer calculations may cause catastrophic design margin violations. Models with numerically reasonable but physically invalid answers are more dangerous than those declining to respond. Current scientific benchmarks only test abstract math and basic physics, evaluate final answers solely, ignore engineering reasoning processes, and cannot detect such critical failures. We propose TPS-CalcBench, the first diagnostic benchmark for closed-form analytical calculations in hypersonic aerodynamics and high-temperature gas dynamics that experienced TPS engineers conduct without simulations. Our contributions include domain-oriented task taxonomy with 4 difficulty levels and 8 categories from Anderson's textbook, dual-track evaluation measuring result accuracy and reasoning quality via an 8-dimension rubric and calibrated judge with human audit to identify right answer wrong reasoning issues, human-AI data pipeline producing 420 high-confidence core items and 810 noise-controlled pre-gating items from 4560 raw data, noise-sensitivity analysis measuring data quality impacts on model ranking, and three diagnostic intervention methods: DFA-TPS fine-tuning, RAG-EQ retrieval grounding and PA-CoT process-aware prompting. Tests on 13 models from 7 groups show wide performance differences (KPI 12.6-87.9), hidden formula selection defects, data-driven rank changes and effective intervention improvements, establishing a complete diagnose-evaluate-intervene framework for safety-critical engineering LLM deployment assessment.

</details>


### [734] [On the Reliability of Computer Use Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17849)
*Gonzalo Gonzalez-Pumariega,Saaket Agashe,Jiachen Yang,Ang Li,Xin Eric Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究计算机使用智能体在重复执行相同任务时可靠性不足的问题，通过OSWorld平台上的重复实验和配对统计检验，分析了随机性、任务歧义和行为变异性三个因素对可靠性的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管计算机使用智能体在单次任务执行中已展现出超越人类的表现，但同一任务重复执行时却可能出现失败，这引发了一个根本性问题：为何能成功一次的任务无法可靠地重复成功？

Method: 在OSWorld平台上对相同任务进行重复执行，并结合配对统计检验来捕捉不同设置下的任务级变化，从执行随机性、任务规范歧义和智能体行为变异性三个维度分析可靠性问题。

Result: 可靠性既取决于任务如何被规范定义，也取决于智能体行为在不同执行轮次之间的变异性。

Conclusion: 需要在重复执行条件下评估智能体，允许智能体通过交互来解决任务歧义，并倾向于采用跨运行保持稳定的策略。

Abstract: Computer-use agents have rapidly improved on real-world tasks such as web navigation, desktop automation, and software interaction, in some cases surpassing human performance. Yet even when the task and model are unchanged, an agent that succeeds once may fail on a repeated execution of the same task. This raises a fundamental question: if an agent can succeed at a task once, what prevents it from doing so reliably? In this work, we study the sources of unreliability in computer-use agents through three factors: stochasticity during execution, ambiguity in task specification, and variability in agent behavior. We analyze these factors on OSWorld using repeated executions of the same task together with paired statistical tests that capture task-level changes across settings. Our analysis shows that reliability depends on both how tasks are specified and how agent behavior varies across executions. These findings suggest the need to evaluate agents under repeated execution, to allow agents to resolve task ambiguity through interaction, and to favor strategies that remain stable across runs.

</details>


<div id='eess.AS'></div>

# eess.AS [[Back]](#toc)

### [735] [Reducing the Offline-Streaming Gap for Unified ASR Transducer with Consistency Regularization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19079)
*Andrei Andrusenko,Vladimir Bataev,Lilit Grigoryan,Nune Tadevosyan,Vitaly Lavrukhin,Boris Ginsburg*

Main category: eess.AS

TL;DR: 提出统一的ASR框架，在单个RNNT模型中同时支持离线和流式解码，通过分块注意力、动态分块卷积和模式一致性正则化来缩小性能差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 统一ASR系统可以降低开发和维护成本，但训练单个模型使其在离线和低延迟流式场景中都能表现良好仍然具有挑战性。需要解决离线和流式模式之间的性能差距问题。

Method: 1. 统一的RNNT训练框架，支持离线和流式解码；2. 使用带右上下文的分块注意力机制；3. 动态分块卷积；4. 引入高效的Triton实现的模式一致性正则化（MCR-RNNT），鼓励不同训练模式之间的一致性。

Result: 实验表明，该方法在低延迟下提高了流式识别准确率，同时保持了离线性能，并能扩展到更大的模型规模和训练数据集。框架和英语模型检查点已开源。

Conclusion: 提出的统一ASR框架成功地在单个RNNT模型中实现了离线和流式解码的良好性能，通过模式一致性正则化等技术有效缩小了两者之间的性能差距，为ASR系统开发提供了高效统一的解决方案。

Abstract: Unification of automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems reduces development and maintenance costs, but training a single model to perform well in both offline and low-latency streaming settings remains challenging. We present a Unified ASR framework for Transducer (RNNT) training that supports both offline and streaming decoding within a single model, using chunk-limited attention with right context and dynamic chunked convolutions. To further close the gap between offline and streaming performance, we introduce an efficient Triton implementation of mode-consistency regularization for RNNT (MCR-RNNT), which encourages agreement across training modes. Experiments show that the proposed approach improves streaming accuracy at low latency while preserving offline performance and scaling to larger model sizes and training datasets. The proposed Unified ASR framework and the English model checkpoint are open-sourced.

</details>


<div id='physics.ao-ph'></div>

# physics.ao-ph [[Back]](#toc)

### [736] [Skillful Global Ocean Emulation and the Role of Correlation-Aware Loss](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18727)
*Niraj Agarwal,Timothy A. Smith,Sergey Frolov,Laura C. Slivinski*

Main category: physics.ao-ph

TL;DR: 本文基于GraphCast架构开发了专用海洋仿真器，使用NOAA的UFS-Replay数据集训练，采用24小时时间步长和单初始条件，无需自回归训练即可实现10-15天的有效预报。引入马氏距离作为损失函数，相比均方误差损失，通过显式考虑目标变量倾向之间的相关性提升了预报技能。空间相关分析表明，该相关感知损失作为统计-动力学正则化器，为数据同化等下游任务提供了更好的背景场。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器学习仿真器在大气状态预报中表现优异，将其应用于全球海洋动力学的潜力值得探索，旨在开发一个能够进行中程预报的专用海洋仿真器。

Method: 将GraphCast架构改造为海洋专用仿真器，由预设大气条件驱动；使用NOAA的UFS-Replay数据集训练；采用24小时时间步长和单初始条件，无需自回归训练；引入马氏距离作为损失函数替代均方误差损失。

Result: 该仿真器能够在10-15天预报时效内提供有效预报；马氏距离损失相比均方误差损失显著提升了预报技能；相关感知损失作为统计-动力学正则化器，改善了海洋慢变相关动力学的预报效果。

Conclusion: 基于GraphCast的海洋专用仿真器在中程海洋预报中表现良好，马氏距离损失通过考虑变量间相关性提供了更优的预报，并为数据同化等下游任务提供了更好的背景场。

Abstract: Machine learning emulators have shown extraordinary skill in forecasting atmospheric states, and their application to global ocean dynamics offers similar promise. Here, we adapt the GraphCast architecture into a dedicated ocean-only emulator, driven by prescribed atmospheric conditions, for medium-range predictions. The emulator is trained on NOAA's UFS-Replay dataset. Using a 24 hour time step, single initial condition, and without using autoregressive training, we produce an emulator that provides skillful forecasts for 10-15 day lead times. We further demonstrate the use of Mahalanobis distance as loss that improves the forecast skill compared to the Mean Squared Error loss by explicitly accounting for the correlations between tendencies of the target variables. Using spatial correlation analysis of the forecasted fields, we also show that the proposed correlation-aware loss acts as a statistical-dynamical regularizer for the slow, correlated dynamics of the global oceans, offering a better background forecast for downstream tasks like data assimilation.

</details>


<div id='eess.IV'></div>

# eess.IV [[Back]](#toc)

### [737] [Deep Image Prior for photoacoustic tomography can mitigate limited-view artifacts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19176)
*Hanna Pulkkinen,Jenni Poimala,Leonid Kunyansky,Janek Gröhl,Andreas Hauptmann*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: DIP框架用于光声层析成像，作为无监督重建方法，可减轻有限视角伪影和噪声，优于传统TV重建。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决光声层析成像中实验环境中常见的有限视角伪影和噪声问题，探索无监督重建方法的有效性。

Method: 采用深度图像先验框架，使用快速前向和伴随算法实现圆形测量几何，通过快速逆初始化和TV正则化抑制噪声和过拟合，并与传统TV重建对比。

Result: DIP框架在有限视角几何下提供稳健的PAT重建，在多个定量指标上优于总变差重建，即使在高噪声情况下也表现良好。

Conclusion: DIP框架是光声层析成像中有效的无监督重建策略，特别适用于具有挑战性的有限视角几何条件。

Abstract: We study the deep image prior (DIP) framework applied to photoacoustic tomography (PAT) as an unsupervised reconstruction approach to mitigate limited-view artifacts and noise commonly encountered in experimental settings. Efficient implementation is achieved by employing recently published fast forward and adjoint algorithms for circular measurement geometries. Initialization via a fast inverse and total variation (TV) regularization are applied to further suppress noise and mitigate overfitting. For comparison, we compute a classical TV reconstruction. Our experiments comprise simulated PAT measurements under limited-view geometries and varying levels of added noise as well as experimental measurements together with using a digital twin for quality assessment. Our findings suggest that DIP framework provides an effective unsupervised strategy for robust PAT reconstruction even in the challenging case of a limited view geometry providing improvement in several quantitative measures over total variation reconstructions.

</details>


### [738] [Optimally Bridging Semantics and Data: Generative Semantic Communication via Schrödinger Bridge](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17802)
*Dahua Gao,Ruichao Liu,Minxi Yang,Shuai Ma,Youlong Wu,Guangming Shi*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 本文提出基于薛定谔桥的生成式语义通信框架SBGSC，通过构建任意分布间的最优传输轨迹，替代传统从高斯分布到图像的间接路径，显著减少幻觉和计算开销。其中DSBGSC变体利用薛定谔势重建扩散模型非线性漂移项，并引入自一致性目标学习直接指向图像的非线性速度场，在图像传输任务中FID提升至少38%、SSIM提升49.3%，推理速度加快8倍以上。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有生成式语义通信方法依赖从高斯分布到图像分布的长距离间接传输轨迹，导致严重的幻觉问题和高计算成本。

Method: 1) 提出SBGSC框架，利用薛定谔桥构建任意分布间的最优传输轨迹，打破高斯分布限制；2) 设计DSBGSC，用薛定谔势重建扩散模型的非线性漂移项，实现直接最优分布传输；3) 提出自一致性目标，引导模型学习直接指向图像的非线性速度场，跳过马尔可夫噪声预测，减少采样步数。

Result: DSBGSC在图像传输任务中FID提升至少38%，SSIM提升49.3%，推理速度加快8倍以上。

Conclusion: SBGSC框架有效解决了传统GSC方法的幻觉和计算开销问题，通过直接的最优分布传输路径显著提升了生成质量和推理效率。

Abstract: Generative Semantic Communication (GSC) is a promising solution for image transmission over narrow-band and high-noise channels. However, existing GSC methods rely on long, indirect transport trajectories from a Gaussian to an image distribution guided by semantics, causing severe hallucination and high computational cost. To address this, we propose a general framework named Schrödinger Bridge-based GSC (SBGSC). By leveraging the Schrödinger Bridge (SB) to construct optimal transport trajectories between arbitrary distributions, SBGSC breaks Gaussian limitations and enables direct generative decoding from semantics to images. Within this framework, we design Diffusion SB-based GSC (DSBGSC). DSBGSC reconstructs the nonlinear drift term of diffusion models using Schrödinger potentials, achieving direct optimal distribution transport to reduce hallucinations and computational overhead. To further accelerate generation, we propose a self-consistency-based objective guiding the model to learn a nonlinear velocity field pointing directly toward the image, bypassing Markovian noise prediction to significantly reduce sampling steps. Simulation results demonstrate that DSBGSC outperforms state-of-the-art GSC methods, improving FID by at least 38% and SSIM by 49.3%, while accelerating inference speed by over 8 times.

</details>


### [739] [VIDS: A Verified Imaging Dataset Standard for Medical AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17525)
*Joan S. Muthu,John Shalen*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 本文提出VIDS（验证成像数据集标准），一个在单一框架内定义文件夹布局、文件命名、注释溯源、质量文档及21条机器可执行验证规则的开源标准，填补了医学影像AI数据集中结构、注释溯源、质量与ML就绪性缺乏统一验证标准的空白。基准测试显示LIDC-IDRI、BraTS等四个主要公共数据集仅满足20-39%的合规维度，并发布了100例完全合规的参考数据集LIDC-Hybrid-100。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有DICOM和BIDS等标准分别关注图像采集存储和数据集组织命名，但均未提供涵盖注释溯源（谁、何时、用什么工具、达到什么质量标准）的策展层验证。医学影像AI开发依赖标注数据集，但缺乏一个能同时验证数据结构、注释溯源、质量文档和机器学习就绪性的机器可执行统一框架。

Method: VIDS定义了文件夹布局、文件命名规范、注释溯源模式、质量文档体系及21条机器可执行验证规则（分两个合规配置文件）。采用NIfTI作为规范工作格式，同时通过侧车文件保留完整DICOM元数据以确保可追溯性，支持无损导出至nnU-Net、MONAI、COCO等下游框架。定义了22个合规维度，对四个公共数据集进行基准测试。

Result: 四个主要公共数据集（LIDC-IDRI、BraTS、CheXpert、Medical Segmentation Decathlon）仅满足22个合规维度中的20-39%，注释溯源和质量文档是最大的系统性缺口。发布了LIDC-Hybrid-100（100例CT参考数据集），包含四位放射科医师的共识分割掩膜（平均成对Dice 0.7765），在完全合规配置文件中通过21/21项验证。

Conclusion: VIDS作为完全开源的标准（规范CC BY 4.0，工具Apache 2.0，验证器可通过pip安装），有效填补了医学影像数据集统一验证的空白，揭示了现有主流数据集在注释溯源和质量文档方面的系统性不足，并为社区提供了完全合规的参考数据集和验证工具。

Abstract: Medical imaging AI development is fundamentally dependent on annotated datasets, yet no existing standard provides machine-enforceable validation across dataset structure, annotation provenance, quality documentation, and ML readiness within a single framework. DICOM standardizes image acquisition, storage, and communication at the individual study level. BIDS organizes neuroimaging research datasets with consistent naming conventions. Neither addresses the curation layer, viz., who annotated what, when, with what tool, and to what quality standard.
  This paper presents VIDS (Verified Imaging Dataset Standard), an open specification that defines folder layout, file naming, annotation provenance schemas, quality documentation, and 21 machine-enforceable validation rules across two compliance profiles. VIDS uses NIfTI as a canonical working format while preserving full DICOM metadata in sidecars for traceability, and supports export to any downstream ML framework (nnU-Net, MONAI, COCO, flat NIfTI) without loss of provenance.
  Twenty-two compliance dimensions are defined and four major public datasets -- LIDC-IDRI, BraTS, CheXpert, and the Medical Segmentation Decathlon -- are benchmarked against these dimensions. Even widely used datasets satisfy only 20--39% of these dimensions, with provenance and quality documentation as the largest systematic gaps. LIDC-Hybrid-100 is released as a 100-subject VIDS-compliant reference CT dataset with consensus segmentation masks from four radiologist annotations (mean pairwise Dice 0.7765), validating 21/21 on the Full compliance profile.
  VIDS is fully open source: the specification is CC BY 4.0, all tools are Apache 2.0, the reference validator is available on PyPI (pip install vids-validator), and LIDC-Hybrid-100 is published on Zenodo (https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19582717).

</details>


### [740] [A Two-Stage Deep Learning Framework for Segmentation of Ten Gastrointestinal Organs from Coronal MR Enterography](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17118)
*Ashiqur Rahman,Md. Abu Sayed,Md Sharjis Ibne Wadud,Md. Abu Asad Al-Hafiz,Adam Mushtak,Muhammad E. H. Chowdhury*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 提出了一种两阶段深度学习框架，先使用DenseNet201-UNet++生成粗分割掩码提取ROI，再使用DenseNet121-SelfONN-UNet进行器官特异性精细分割，在MRE数据集上mDSC达到88.99%，显著提升了胃肠道器官分割性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MRE中胃肠道器官的准确分割对于诊断炎症性肠病（IBD）至关重要，但存在解剖变异、类别不平衡和组织对比度低等问题，现有自动化方法难以可靠处理这些挑战。

Method: 两阶段深度学习框架：第一阶段使用DenseNet201-UNet++生成粗分割掩码并提取ROI；第二阶段使用DenseNet121-SelfONN-UNet对器官特异性补丁进行精细分割。采用数据增强、归一化、五折交叉验证和类别加权以缓解严重类别不平衡问题。

Result: 类别加权使阑尾DSC从6.76%提升至85.76%；第二阶段模型在所有胃肠道结构上分割性能显著提升（盲肠+23.62%，乙状结肠+18.57%，直肠+17.99%，小肠+16.06%）；整体框架mDSC达88.99%，mIoU达84.76%，mHD95为6.94 mm，优于所有基线方法。

Conclusion: 该粗到细、器官感知的分割策略对肠道MRE有效，尽管计算成本较高，但具有良好的临床转化潜力，可为胃肠病学中解剖信息辅助诊断工具提供支持。

Abstract: Accurate segmentation of gastrointestinal (GI) organs in magnetic resonance enterography (MRE) is critical for diagnosing inflammatory bowel disease (IBD). However, anatomical variability, class imbalance, and low tissue contrast hinder reliable automation. This study proposes a dual-stage deep learning framework for organ-specific segmentation of GI structures from coronal MRE images to address these challenges.
  A publicly available MRE dataset of 3,195 coronal T2-weighted HASTE slices from 114 IBD patients was used. Initially, a DenseNet201-UNet++ model generated coarse masks for ROI extraction. A DenseNet121-SelfONN-UNet model was then trained on organ-specific patches. Extensive data augmentation, normalization, five-fold cross-validation, and class-specific weighting were applied to mitigate severe class imbalance, particularly for the appendix.
  The initial stage achieved strong organ localization but underperformed for the appendix; class weighting improved its DSC from 6.76% to 85.76%. The second-stage DenseNet121-SelfONN-UNet significantly enhanced segmentation across all GI structures, with notable DSC gains (cecum +23.62%, sigmoid +18.57%, rectum +17.99%, small intestine +16.06%). Overall, the framework achieved mDSC of 88.99%, mIoU of 84.76%, and mHD95 of 6.94 mm, outperforming all baselines.
  This framework demonstrates the effectiveness of a coarse-to-fine, organ-aware segmentation strategy for intestinal MRE. Despite higher computational cost, it shows strong potential for clinical translation and enables anatomically informed diagnostic tools in gastroenterology.

</details>


<div id='math.DG'></div>

# math.DG [[Back]](#toc)

### [741] [Complex normalizing flows can be information Kähler-Ricci flows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17954)
*Andrew Gracyk*

Main category: math.DG

TL;DR: 本文建立了复归一化流（complex normalizing flow）与Kähler-Ricci流之间的理论联系，证明复归一化流中的Wirtinger Jacobian对数行列式与Kähler流形的Ricci曲率项在微分和条件下相匹配，且对数似然在连续极限下恢复Fisher度量并收敛到Kähler-Ricci流。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 弥合统计学习中的复归一化流与微分几何中的Kähler-Ricci流之间的理论鸿沟，揭示两者内在的数学联系。

Method: 通过复流形的双重实化（twofold realification）将Borel概率测度的数据置于复归一化流框架下，利用Wirtinger Jacobian的对数行列式与Kähler流形上体积形式的Ricci曲率（即混合Wirtinger偏导）之间的形式对应，建立连接；进一步从贝叶斯视角将对数密度解释为全纯拉回下的空间Fisher信息度量，在连续极限下证明对数似然匹配Fisher度量并恢复Kähler-Ricci流。

Result: 建立了复归一化流与Kähler-Ricci流之间的理论等价性，表明复归一化流的对数行列式项在微分后对应Ricci曲率，对数似然的连续极限恢复Fisher度量并满足Kähler-Ricci流方程。

Conclusion: 该框架桥接了统计学习（复归一化流）与几何流（Kähler-Ricci流）两个领域，为进一步探索两者的交叉提供了理论基础。

Abstract: We develop interconnections between the complex normalizing flow for data drawn from Borel probability measures on the twofold realification of the complex manifold and the Kähler-Ricci flow. The complex normalizing flow relates the initial and target realified densities under the complex change of variables, necessitating the log determinant of the Wirtinger Jacobian. The Ricci curvature of a Kähler manifold is the second order mixed Wirtinger partial derivative of the log of the local density of the volume form. Therefore, we reconcile these two facts by drawing forth the connection that the log determinant used in the complex normalizing flow matches the Ricci curvature term under differentiation and conditions. The log density under the normalizing flow is kindred to a spatial Fisher information metric under a holomorphic pullback and a Bayesian perspective to the parameter, thus under the continuum limit the log likelihood matches a Fisher metric, recovering the Kähler-Ricci flow up to expectation. Using this framework, we establish other relevant results, attempting to bridge the statistical and ordinary behaviors of the complex normalizing flow to the geometric features of the Kähler-Ricci flow.

</details>


<div id='cs.CY'></div>

# cs.CY [[Back]](#toc)

### [742] [Fairness Audits of Institutional Risk Models in Deployed ML Pipelines](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19468)
*Kelly McConvey,Dipto Das,Maya Ghai,Angelina Zhai,Rosa Lee,Shion Guha*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 论文提出了一种可复现的机构机器学习系统审计方法，通过对某学院早期预警系统进行复制审计，揭示了系统在性别、年龄和居住状态上的不公平分配问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机构风险模型的公平性审计对于理解已部署的机器学习管道如何分配资源至关重要。通过与Centennial学院的多年合作，作者旨在开发一种可复现的审计方法来评估已部署的早期预警系统，揭示潜在的不公平分配问题。

Method: 采用基于复制的审计方法，使用机构训练数据和设计规范复制已部署的早期预警系统模型。评估了性别、年龄和居住状态在整个管道（训练数据、模型预测和后处理）中的差异，使用标准公平性指标进行分析。

Result: 审计揭示了系统性错误分配：年轻、男性和国际学生被过度标记为需要支持，即使许多人最终成功；而具有可比辍学风险的较年长和女性学生则被识别不足。后处理通过将异质概率压缩为基于百分位的风险等级进一步放大了这些差异。

Conclusion: 这项工作提供了一种可复现的机构机器学习系统审计方法，展示了差异如何在各个阶段出现和加剧，强调了在统计公平性之外评估构建效度的重要性。为更广泛的研究算法、学生数据和高等教育权力的项目贡献了实证线索。

Abstract: Fairness audits of institutional risk models are critical for understanding how deployed machine learning pipelines allocate resources. Drawing on multi-year collaboration with Centennial College, where our prior ethnographic work introduced the ASP-HEI Cycle, we present a replica-based audit of a deployed Early Warning System (EWS), replicating its model using institutional training data and design specifications. We evaluate disparities by gender, age, and residency status across the full pipeline (training data, model predictions, and post-processing) using standard fairness metrics. Our audit reveals systematic misallocation: younger, male, and international students are disproportionately flagged for support, even when many ultimately succeed, while older and female students with comparable dropout risk are under-identified. Post-processing amplifies these disparities by collapsing heterogeneous probabilities into percentile-based risk tiers. This work provides a replicable methodology for auditing institutional ML systems and shows how disparities emerge and compound across stages, highlighting the importance of evaluating construct validity alongside statistical fairness. It contributes one empirical thread to a broader program investigating algorithms, student data, and power in higher education.

</details>


### [743] [Auditing LLMs for Algorithmic Fairness in Casenote-Augmented Tabular Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19204)
*Xiao Qi Lee,Ezinne Nwankwo,Angela Zhou*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 该技术报告审计了在真实住房安置预测任务中，基于LLM的表格分类算法的公平性，发现结合案例摘要的微调模型能提高准确性并减少公平性差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLMs越来越多地被考虑用于高风险社会服务环境中的预测任务，但在此背景下其算法公平性特性了解不足。鉴于住房安置中的历史不平等，审计LLM使用至关重要。

Method: 审计了基于LLM的表格分类在真实住房安置预测任务中的算法公平性，使用非营利合作伙伴提供的街头外展案例笔记。实验包括：1）多类别分类错误差异审计；2）微调模型结合案例摘要；3）零样本表格分类的变量重要性改进实验。
